1.1: ЕҠ camba, Kooh fer eel ci na kehЖҙi.
1.2: KehЖҙi nikee hulang, wa nikka Й“arang. E Гұuus muuree masma, te FuuЙ—siЕӢ Kooh seree ЕӢ Й—afuk wa.
1.3: Kooh woosa ne : В« Wa wiisaat ! В» Wa wiissa.
1.4: A hotta ne siГұaari baahiЙ—, a nistohha siГұaari na Гұuusi.
1.5: A teekka siГұaari "noh", a teekka Гұuusi "wek". Niin raakka, Й“aaЙ“ raakka, wa nikka mbeha Й—eЙ“.
1.6: Wa weem coot, Kooh woosa ne : В« RaЙ—suk raakaat ЕӢ harmban masuЙ“ ci, ne wa nistoh masuЙ“ na masuЙ“. В»
1.7: A haЙ“iЙ—ta raЙ—suki. A nistohha masmi ЕӢ ooЙ“ raЙ—suki na masma ЕӢ Й—afka. Te wa nikohha Й—aa.
1.8: A teekka raЙ—suki "eel ci". Niin raakka, Й“aaЙ“ raakka, wa nikka mbeha kanakЙ—oh.
1.9: ЕҠ finho ineem, Kooh woosa ne : В« Masmi ЕӢ ooЙ“ eel ci nangЙ—ukohaat Й—isik yino po keheЖҙ suyiЙ— pul. В» Te wa nikohha Й—aa.
1.10: A teekka Й“aki suyЙ—i "keheЖҙ", a teekka masmi nangЙ—ukohЙ—i "cookom". A hotta ne wa baahiЙ—.
1.11: NgaЕӢ woo keem, Kooh woyissa ne : В« KehЖҙi riifaat na in ci na paare : paangiici Й“ay tisoh, na kidig ci na Гұamse, kidig nu nik na rimiЕӢ wa na tisohiЕӢ wa ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙi, ЕӢ findi mandohaaЙ—iЕӢ wa, ЕӢ kehЖҙi. В» Te wa nikohha Й—aa.
1.12: KehЖҙi paarra paangi Й“ayiЙ— tisoh findi mandohaaЙ— ciЕӢ ca, kidig ci na rime findi mandohaaЙ— ciЕӢ ca, waa nu nik na tisohiЕӢ wa. A hotta ne wa baahiЙ—.
1.13: Niin raakka, Й“aaЙ“ raakka, wa nikka mbeha kaahayЙ—oh.
1.14: Wa mbeheem coot, Kooh woosa ne : В« NgaЕӢ raЙ—sukiЕӢ eel ci, wa raakaat in ci raak siГұaar, ne ca nistoh noh na wek, ca teeЙ“oh jamano na mbeh na kiis.
1.15: ЕҠ raЙ—sukiЕӢ eel ci, ca nikaat siГұaar ne ca siГұaariЙ— kehЖҙi. В» Te wa nikohha Й—aa.
1.16: Kooh haЙ“iЙ—ta siГұaar kanak yakak, wi yakki ne wa adgoh noh, wi Жҙini ne wa adgoh wek. A haЙ“iЙ—ta yit hor ci.
1.17: A seriЙ—ta ca ЕӢ raЙ—sukiЕӢ eel ci ne ca siГұaariЙ— kehЖҙi,
1.18: ne ca adgoh noh na wek, ca nistoh siГұaar na Гұuus. A hotta ne wa baahiЙ—.
1.19: Niin raakka, Й“aaЙ“ raakka, wa nikka mbeha nikiisЙ—oh.
1.20: ЕҠ woo keem, Kooh woyissa ne : В« NgaЕӢ masuЙ“ ci, cuurund na inaama wiiriis aastiЙ—ohaat, sel pundaat ЕӢ eel ci, ЕӢ Й—afuk kehЖҙi. В»
1.21: ЕҠ ineem, a ferra Й—oopaat ci yakak ci ЕӢ cookmi, na inaamaaci na huЖҙe, ca weЖҙee jen ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ masuЙ“ ci. A ferra ca ЕӢ findi mandohaaЙ— ciЕӢ ca. A ferra yit in ci raak paЙ“ jen, findi mandohaaЙ— ciЕӢ ca. A hotta ne wa baahiЙ—.
1.22: A barke'iЙ—ta ca, an : В« Nikaat Й“asloh, rimaatЙ—ohaat, riifЙ—aat masmiЕӢ cookmi, te yit, sel ci rimaatЙ—oh ЕӢ kehЖҙi. В»
1.23: Niin raakka, Й“aaЙ“ raakka, wa nikka mbeha yatuusЙ—oh.
1.24: Wa weem coot, Kooh woosa ne : В« KehЖҙi pulЙ—aat inaama findi mandohaaЙ— ciЕӢ ca, Й—oopaat ci raakan heЙ—, na ci raakanЙ—i heЙ—, na inaama Жҙin findi mandohaaЙ— ciЕӢ ca. В» Te wa nikohha Й—aa.
1.25: A ferra Й—oopaat ci raakanЙ—i heЙ— findi mandohaaЙ— ciЕӢ ca, a ferra ci raakan heЙ— findi mandohaaЙ— ciЕӢ ca, a ferra inaamaaci Жҙin ci ЕӢ kehЖҙi jen findi mandohaaЙ— ciЕӢ ca. A hotta ne wa baahiЙ—.
1.26: NgaЕӢ woo keem, a woyissa ne : В« ЖҒoo haЙ“Й—aat Й“o' ЕӢ ГұaamaariЕӢ Й“oo, findi mandohaaЙ—iЕӢ Й“oo, ne Й“a adgoh cuurund ciЕӢ cookmi, na sel ciЕӢ eel ci, na Й—oopaat ci, ne Й“a adgoh kehЖҙi jen, na in ci na yoonde ЕӢ kehЖҙi. В»
1.27: Kooh ferra Й“o' ЕӢ ГұaamaariЕӢ Й—e. NgaЕӢ ГұaamaariЕӢ Kooh, a ferra Й“a, Жҙaar na Й“itiЙ“.
1.28: A barke'iЙ—ta Й“a, a woosa Й“a ne : В« ЖҒaslaat, rimaatЙ—ohaat, riifЙ—aat kehЖҙi, minaat kehЖҙi jen, adgohaat cuurund ciЕӢ cookmi, na sel ciЕӢ eel ci, na in ci na yoonde ЕӢ kehЖҙi jen. В»
1.29: Kooh dokkissa, woosa Й“a ne : В« ЖҒayaat, ЕӢ on Й—u paangi nu nik ne weЙ—i ЕӢ kehЖҙi jen, na kidig nu amboh rim na tisohiЕӢ wa Й—ah. Ca nik pesohaaciЕӢ Й—u. В»
1.30: Kooh woosa ne : В« ЖҠoopaat ciЕӢ kehЖҙi, sel ci na punde, in ci na yoonde ЕӢ kehЖҙi, in ci na iike jen, ЕӢ on ca ne, ca pesoh paangi iiri. В» Te wa nikohha Й—aa.
1.31: Kooh hotta in ci a Жҙut haЙ“iЙ— jen, ca baahha lool. Niin raakka, Й“aaЙ“ raakka, wa nikka mbeha yasna-yino'Й—oh.

2.1: Eel ci na kehЖҙi, na in ci ГұimniЙ— ci tumu nga, reehoh feru Й—aa.
2.2: ЕҠ mbeha yasna-kanakЙ—oh, Kooh iЙ—siЙ—ukka, raak Й—e mitЙ—iЙ— pangkaЕӢ Й—e.
2.3: WeЙ— tah po Kooh barke'iЙ—ta mbehi yasna-kanakЙ—oh, a hooliЙ—taa wuu ce, laam a iЙ—siЙ—uk nga, wi a Жҙut fer in ci jen.
2.4: NaandsukiЕӢ feriЕӢ eel ci na kehЖҙi weЙ—i weem. FeruukiЕӢ Й“o' Wa NikiЙ—i Kooh feree kehЖҙi na eel ci,
2.5: ali kidig raakeeЙ—i paaЙ— ЕӢ bilaf fi, te ali paangi puleeЙ—i ndoom, laam raak NikiЙ—i Kooh toЙ“Й—i ЕӢ kehЖҙi, te Й“o' raakeeЙ—i ne a guur merhey mi.
2.6: HondohЙ—i masuЙ“ puleeЙ—a ЕӢ kehЖҙi te wa iiri'Й—eeЙ—a kehЖҙi jen.
2.7: ЕҠ jamanoonaam, NikiЙ—i Kooh mahha Й“o' na merhey miЕӢ kehЖҙi, a fuuЙ—issa ngaЕӢ kiГұin kaЕӢ Й—e iik kipes, jaarra a nikka pesoh.
2.8: Raak, NikiЙ—i Kooh haЙ“Й—een nguuk, ЕӢ pulohaaЙ—-noh, ngaЕӢ Eden, a Й“ekka Й“oya a mahee nga.
2.9: A paariЙ—ta kidig nu nik ЕӢ merhey ma, ca moЙ—ta ЕӢ has, ca neЙ“pa Гұamu, te ngaЕӢ leernaЕӢ nguuka, a paariЙ—ta kidgaЕӢ kipes ki na kidgaЕӢ inhisoh baahiЙ— na baahaaЙ—i.
2.10: Cul puleeЙ—a ЕӢ Eden, wa iiri'Й—eeЙ—a nguuka, wa pulohee ndeem, wa salla sal nikiis.
2.11: Sala Й—eЙ“ teeksee Pison, wa wileen ЕӢ kur kaЕӢ Hawiilaa jen, Й—iska urus raake ;
2.12: ursaЕӢ kur keem, wa nikee koceet, ndeem raakee makndi eeГұЙ—ohaani na woyse badoolah na pemeeni na woyse sooham .
2.13: Sala kanakЙ—oha teeksee Gihon, wa wilee wil kur kaЕӢ Kuus jen.
2.14: Sala kaahayЙ—oha teeksee Tigar, wa nupЙ—ee ЕӢ pulohaaЙ—-nohaЕӢ Assuur. Sala nikiisЙ—oha nikka Ewfaraat.
2.15: ЕҠ ineem, NikiЙ—i Kooh Й“ayya Й“oya, a tummba Й—e guuroh na niiЙ—ohaЕӢ nguukaЕӢ Eden.
2.16: A huflukka Й—e ne : В« Fu miniЙ— Гұam rim ciЕӢ kidig ciЕӢ nguuki jen.
2.17: Waaye kidgiЕӢ inhisoh baahiЙ— na baahaaЙ—i, fu heyЙ—i Гұame nga, laam mbaЙ—na fu Гұaman nga Й—ah, fu hey kaane fut ! В»
2.18: Wa weem coot, NikiЙ—i Kooh woosa ne : В« ЖҠaay kiik ce baahЙ—i ngaЕӢ Й“o'. ЕҠ hey Й—e haЙ“Й—iЙ—e Й“aatЙ—ohoh yi min kerhiЙ—oh na Й—e. В»
2.19: ЕҠ ineem, raak NikiЙ—i Kooh maheen na merhey Й—oopaat ci jen, na sel ci pundoh ci jen, a kommba Й“oya ca, ne a kerah findi yeem teekan ca ; yaa nu nik hey Й“eeЙ—kasse findi Жҙaara na hee Й—e teeke.
2.20: Wa a kom Й“oya ca, Й“oya feriЙ—ta ca tiik jen, Й—oopaat ciЕӢ kahan ci, sel ci pundoh ci, na Й—oopaat ciЕӢ nduufi. Waaye a yi, a hotiЙ—Й—i haf ce Й“aatЙ—ohoh yi min kerhiЙ—oh na Й—e.
2.21: ЕҠ ineem, NikiЙ—i Kooh pani'iЙ—ta Й“oya, a neehha neeh nooЙ—iЙ—. A nihissa Жҙoh yino ngaЕӢ lah-fisaaraЕӢ Й—e, a rannga Й—iska na neh.
2.22: NikiЙ—i Kooh Й“ayya Жҙoha a nihsoh ЕӢ Й“oya weem, a mahha Й“itiЙ“ naa, a kommba Й“oya Й—e.
2.23: Wa Й“oya hot Й—e, a Жҙeella, a woosa ne : В« Waasii, yii a ЖҙohiЕӢ Жҙoh ciЕӢ ngo na nehiЕӢ nehiЕӢ ngo ! ЖҒoyii teeksan Й“o' Й“itiЙ“, laam a kooЙ—ohu ЕӢ Й“o' Жҙaar. В»
2.24: Wa taamboh Й—aa po, Жҙaar hey saЙ“sukohe na yaay na baab, a ЕӢoЙ— ЕӢ Й“itiice, Й“a nik faan yino.
2.25: Te wa nikka ne Й“eЙ— Й“i kanak ceem, Жҙaara na Й“itiice, Й“a nikee faan Й“arang te Й“a supkeeЙ—i nga.

3.1: Waam, e iiГұ uupee ГұaaГұ ЕӢ Й—oopaat ciЕӢ nduufi NikiЙ—i Kooh fere ; iiГұa woosa Й“itЙ“a ne : В« Andi wa keeh ne, e Kooh woo ne, Й—u joyЙ—i Гұam ali rim kidig, ЕӢ kidig ci ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ nguuki ? В»
3.2: ЖҒitЙ“a loffa Й—e ne : В« ЖҒoo miniЙ— Гұam rim ciЕӢ kidig ci ЕӢ nguuki.
3.3: Waaye ini kaЙ— ЕӢ rim ciЕӢ kidgi ЕӢ leerniЕӢ nguuki, Kooh woo ne Й“oo kanaat ca Гұam, Й“oo kanaat ca sah reЙ“ wala Й“oo hey kaane fut. В»
3.4: IiГұa loffa Й—e ne : В« Muk, Й—u heyЙ—i kaane.
3.5: Kooh inah inah ne, Й—u Гұama Й—ah, liiЙ“ohaaciЕӢ Й—u hey rangsuke, Й—u hey inhisohe baahiЙ— na baahaaЙ—i findiice. В»
3.6: ЖҒitЙ“a marakka rim caЕӢ kidga, a hotta ne ca moЙ—iЙ— ЕӢ has, ca mandiЙ— na ini neЙ“, te ca maЙ—aah Гұamu ne ca rangis liiЙ“oha. A Й“eennda nga, a Гұammba, a nammba eЙ— Жҙaar ce raak Й—e nga, yeem Гұammba.
3.7: ЕҠ Й—iska Й—iska liiЙ“ohaacaЕӢ Й“a rangsukka, weЙ— Й“a inhiskoh kotii ne Й“a tas Й“arang ; Й“a Й“ayya Й“i saaf mbaЙ—et, Й“a tokЙ—ohha ca, Й“a kenukka ca.
3.8: Wa noha soos po puuЙ—sa ef-efЙ—eeЙ—a, Й“oya na Й“itiice kerahha NikiЙ—i Kooh wileeЙ—a ЕӢ nguuka, Й“a Й—embeeЙ—a Й—e ЕӢ kidig ca.
3.9: NikiЙ—i Kooh Й“eeЙ—ukka Й“o', a woosa Й—e ne : В« Fu ЕӢ nde ? В»
3.10: A loffa Й—e ne : В« ЕҠ kerah Й—a kerah ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ nguuki, ЕӢ tiitta, weЙ—i ЕӢ Й—asЙ—ukoh Й—a laam ЕӢ tas Й“arang. В»
3.11: NikiЙ—i Kooh woosa Й—e ne : В« Moo, ya Й“a woo Й—a ne fu tas Й“arang ? Fu Гұam ЕӢ kidgi ЕӢ sangohee Й—a e ? В»
3.12: ЖҒoya woosa Й—e ne : В« E Й“itЙ“i fu ambsoh ho na Й—e, a yi eЙ— to ЕӢ rim ciЕӢ kidgi, ЕӢ Гұammba. В»
3.13: NikiЙ—i Kooh woosa Й“itЙ“a ne : В« Wee Й“ek Й—a ЕӢ ineem ? В» ЖҒitЙ“a woosa Й—e ne : В« E iiГұi ГұaaГұoh ho po ЕӢ Гұammbaa. В»
3.14: NikiЙ—i Kooh woosa iiГұa ne : В« ЕҠ ini fu tum weem, ЕӢ alkiЙ— Й—a ngaЕӢ Й—oopaat ciЕӢ kahan ci na ciЕӢ bilaf fi jen, fu na hee hey faske te fu genan melemsuk ЕӢ muniЕӢ merhey mi ngaЕӢ kipes kiЕӢ Й—a jen.
3.15: ЕҠ hey Й“eke sangtiЙ—oh ЕӢ harmban fu na Й“itЙ“i na harmban Й“i na hee rimkohe nga Й—a na Й“iЕӢ Й—e. ЖҒi rimkohan nga Й—e hey pooke hafiЕӢ Й—a te fu Й—oЙ“an Й“a ЕӢ patang kot. В»
3.16: A nammba woo Й“itЙ“a ne : В« ЕҠ hey tume po, fu nik rook Й—ah, fu laay miskiЙ—, te fu Й“aslan ngaЕӢ miskiЙ—. Fu hey Й—iiЙ—ke ЕӢ Жҙaar fu, waaye a yi yilfan Й—a. В»
3.17: A hannda woo Жҙaara ne : В« Fu kerhiЙ— woo kiЕӢ Й“itiifu po fu ГұamiЙ— ЕӢ kidgi ЕӢ sangohee Й—a, fu tahiЙ— po merhey mi alkuuЙ—, ЕӢ kipes kiЕӢ Й—a jen fu hey yaaЙ“e ne fu han raak pesoha ЕӢ kehЖҙi.
3.18: Wa hey paare Гұapir na paangi raakiЙ— rup te fu na hee hey guure kotii ne fu Гұam.
3.19: Fu pesohan opiЕӢ Й—a po mbaЙ—na fu dokkan ЕӢ kehЖҙi fu puloh. Laam fu haЙ“Й—ohu merhey te fu dokkan ЕӢ merhey mi. В»
3.20: ЕҠ ineem Жҙaara teekka Й“itiice Aawa (pesohi). Laam a yi yaayiЕӢ Й“ooЙ“i na pese jen.
3.21: NikiЙ—i Kooh haЙ“Й—iЙ—ta Aadama na Й“itiice kulЙ“a und, a Й“ekiЙ—ta Й“a ca.
3.22: A woosa ne : В« ЕҠ Й—iski wa nik ndii, Й“o' inhisohiЙ— baahiЙ— na baahaaЙ—i findi Й“oo ; a joyЙ—i Й“een kotii ЕӢ rim ciЕӢ kidgi na onohe kipes, a joyЙ—i ca Гұam po kipes kiЕӢ Й—e kee nika po faw. В»
3.23: NikiЙ—i Kooh puliЙ—ta Й—e ЕӢ nguuka ЕӢ Eden ne a guur merhey mi a mahohu.
3.24: Wa a aaГұ Й“o', a Й—aakka ЕӢ pulohaaЙ—-nohaЕӢ nguuka, niiЙ—oh ci na woyse seruben na ndang yongkaah wi na mbiliirke Й“ak nu Й“ak ne Й“a sangoh waasa kaЙ— ЕӢ kidga na onohe kipes.

4.1: ЕҠ finho ineem Aadama hunnda na Й“itiice Aawa, yeem ammba rook po a Й“asilla, a teekka kuЙ“ka Kayin. A yi Aawa, a woosa ne : В« ЕҠ Й“aatЙ—ohiЕӢ NikiЙ—i ЕӢ raakiЙ— Й“o' Жҙaar. В»
4.2: A raakissa kuЙ“u Жҙaar wiiriis teeku Abel, taambЙ—oh Kayin. Abel nikka niiЙ—oh, Kayin nikka guuroh.
4.3: Wa kaЙ—oh kaЙ—oh po Kayin Й“ayya ЕӢ in ca a guure, a puliЙ—ta seeЖҙkaah wuu NikiЙ—i.
4.4: Abel nammba Й“ay ЕӢ saaw caЕӢ gat caЕӢ Й—e, a puliЙ—ta seeЖҙkaah ngaЕӢ sepet caЕӢ mbaal ca uupee fayum. ЕҠ ineem NikiЙ—i neЙ“uusa ЕӢ Abel, a teyЙ—ukka ina a eЙ—oh,
4.5: waaye a neЙ“uuЙ—i ЕӢ Kayin na ina a eЙ—oh. Ineem Й“ekka Kayin aay-keeГұ miskiЙ—, a ГұuusЙ—ukka.
4.6: NikiЙ—i meekissa Й—e ne : В« Fu ayruk ye po fikiiriЕӢ Й—a mannda an ?
4.7: TumohaaЙ—iЕӢ Й—a baah Й—ah, fu hey teyЙ—ukЙ—asse ; fu tumЙ—i baahiЙ— Й—ah, bakaaЙ—i weЙ—i wii raЙ—ukka ЕӢ nguЙ“u tuuЖҙ fu na sekee Й—a, ne wa yilif Й—a, te ya fu joya min. В»
4.8: Waaye, Kayin woosa taambЙ—oh ce ne Й“a kaЙ— yohon ca. Wa Й“a nik ЕӢ yohon ca, Kayin soonnga Abel, a appa Й—e.
4.9: ЖҠekka po NikiЙ—i meekissa Й—e ne : В« Kayin, a nde taambЙ—oh fu Abel ? В» A loffa Й—e ne : В« ЕҠ inahЙ—i kat, Гұam na niiЙ—ee Й—e haa. В»
4.10: NikiЙ—i woosa Й—e ne : В« Fu haЙ“iЙ— ye an ? ЕҠ kerhiЙ— Гұif miЕӢ taambЙ—oh fu looЖҙkohha kehЖҙi po nga so ne wa wirndukЙ—u.
4.11: Fu alkuuЙ— po merhey mi faЙ—iЙ— Й—a, laam ya fu aniЙ—a Гұif miЕӢ taambЙ—oh fu fu aam.
4.12: Fu guuris merhey mi Й—ah, wa eЙ—issanЙ—i Й—a in. Fu na hee hey wiltiЙ—ohe ЕӢ kehЖҙi, fu genanЙ—i Й—isik yino. В»
4.13: Kayin woosa NikiЙ—i ne : В« Ini fu deg go Й“itootiЙ— lool po ЕӢ antalЙ—aa.
4.14: Woti fu aaГұiЙ— to ЕӢ merhey mi an e ? ЕҠ hotiЙ— ne ЕӢ hey Й—a use, mi na hee hey wiltiЙ—ohe ЕӢ kehЖҙi, ЕӢ genanЙ—i Й—isik yino po Й“o' nu hot to Й—ah, a ap po. В»
4.15: NikiЙ—i woosa Kayin ne : В« Kon, Й“o' nu ap Й—a Й—ah, fu hey wirndukЙ—asse waas yasna-kanak. В» A waakiЙ—ta Kayin inhisoha, ne Й“o' nu hot Й—e Й—ah, a apuu Й—e.
4.16: Wa taambohha Й—aa, Kayin kaЙ—ta gena kur ka na woyse Nood, ЕӢ pulohaaЙ—-nohaЕӢ Eden, a ussa NikiЙ—i. ЖҒi puloh ЕӢ Kayin
4.17: Kayin hunnda na Й“itiice, yeem ammba rook po a Й“asilla, a teekka kuЙ“ka Henok. Kayin yippa kur-taah, a teekkaa ngaЕӢ kuЙ“kiЕӢ Й—e Henok.
4.18: Henok nikka baabiЕӢ Irad, Irad nikka baabiЕӢ Mehuya'el, Mehuya'el nikka baabiЕӢ Metusa'el, Metusa'el nikka baabiЕӢ Lemek.
4.19: A yi Lemek, a Й“ayya Й“itiЙ“ kanak, yi koc na woyse Aada, yi kanakЙ—oh, Silla.
4.20: Aada a yi rim Yabal, baab-caaciЕӢ Й“i na gene ЕӢ Й—iip ci, niiЙ—e gat ci.
4.21: TaambЙ—oh ce Жҙaar, ya teekse Yuubal, a yi baab-caaciЕӢ halmoh ci na mbiiЙ“oh ci.
4.22: Silla, Й“itЙ“iЕӢ Й—e yinoora, rimmba Tubal-Kayin, sisЙ“i na tiЙ“e moos na tiwiГұ. Tubal-Kayin raakeen taambЙ—oh Й“itiЙ“ teeku Naama.
4.23: Lemek woosa Й“itiЙ“ ciЕӢ Й—e ne : В« Ee, Й—u Й“i Й“itiЙ“ ciЕӢ ngo, Aada na Silla, SikЙ—ukaat woo kiЕӢ ngo. Heeh, sikЙ—ukaat to, Й—u Й“i Й“itiЙ“ ciЕӢ Lemek. Жіaar gaaГұiЙ— to, ЕӢ appa Й—e, Komaaki Й“uurra so, ЕӢ boommba Й—e.
4.24: Te nik ne e Kayin na hee wirndukЙ—asse waas yasna-kanak ne a apu Й—ah, cam ! Lemek na hee wirndukЙ—asse waas ndaЕӢkiyaah-yasna-kanak na yasna-kanak (77) ! В»
4.25: Aadama hunisseen na Й“itiice, a ambissa rook, a raakka kuЙ“u Жҙaar, Aawa teekka Й—e Set , laam a woyee ne : В« Kooh oniЙ— to kuЙ“u wiiriis, yi na hee namsiЙ—e Abel, yi Kayin ap. В»
4.26: Set nammba raak kuЙ“u, a teekka Й—e Enos. ЕҠ jamanoocaam, weЙ— Й“a camboh Й“eeЙ—koh Kooh ЕӢ tiikiЕӢ NikiЙ—i.

5.1: Inii weЙ— naandsuku ЕӢ Aadama na Й“i rimkoh nga Й—e. Wa Kooh na fere Й“o', a fer Й“a ЕӢ mandohaaЙ—iЕӢ Й—e haf ce.
5.2: A yi Kooh a ferra Й“a Жҙaar na Й“itiЙ“ a barke'iЙ—ta Й“a, a teekka Й“a Й“o' ЕӢ noha mbaЙ—i.
5.3: Wa Aadama pes kiis teemet na kiis ndaЕӢkiyaah-kaahay (130), a raakka kuЙ“u Жҙaar ya Й“ay mandohaaЙ—aЕӢ Й—e na ГұaamaaraЕӢ Й—e, a teekka Й—e Set.
5.4: ЕҠ finho raakuukaЕӢ Set, Aadama pesiЙ— kiis teemet-yasna-kaahay (800) te a raakisseen Й“i kuЙ“u Жҙaar na Й“itiЙ“.
5.5: A kaan wa a raak kiis teemet-yasna-nikiis na kiis ndaЕӢkiyaah-kaahay (930).
5.6: Wa Set pes kiis teemet na kiis yatuus (105), a raakka kuЙ“u Жҙaar, a teekka Й—e Enos.
5.7: ЕҠ finho raakuukaЕӢ Enos, Set pesiЙ— kiis teemet-yasna-kaahay na kiis yasna-kanak (807). A raakisseen Й“i kuЙ“u Жҙaar na Й“itiЙ“.
5.8: A kaan wa a raak kiis teemet-yasna-nikiis na kiis ndaЕӢkiyaah na kiis kanak (912).
5.9: Wa Enos pes kiis ndaЕӢkiyaah-yasna-nikiis (90), a raakka kuЙ“u Жҙaar, a teekka Й—e Kenan.
5.10: ЕҠ finho raakuukaЕӢ Kenan, Enos pesiЙ— kiis teemet-yasna-kaahay na kiis ndaЕӢkiyaah na kiis yatuus (815). A raakisseen Й“i kuЙ“u Жҙaar na Й“itiЙ“.
5.11: A kaan wa a raak kiis teemet-yasna-nikiis na kiis yatuus (905).
5.12: Wa Kenan pes kiis ndaЕӢkiyaah-yasna-kanak (70), a raakka kuЙ“u Жҙaar, a teekka Й—e Mahalal'el.
5.13: ЕҠ finho raakuukaЕӢ Mahalal'el, Kenan pesiЙ— kiis teemet-yasna-kaahay na kiis ndaЕӢkiyaah-nikiis (840). A raakisseen Й“i kuЙ“u Жҙaar na Й“itiЙ“.
5.14: A kaan wa a raak kiis teemet-yasna-nikiis na kiis ndaЕӢkiyaah (910).
5.15: Wa Mahalal'el pes kiis ndaЕӢkiyaah-yasna-yino na kiis yatuus (65), a raakka kuЙ“u Жҙaar, a teekka Й—e Yered.
5.16: ЕҠ finho raakuukaЕӢ Yered, Mahalal'el pesiЙ— kiis teemet-yasna-kaahay na kiis ndaЕӢkiyaah-kaahay (830). A raakisseen Й“i kuЙ“u Жҙaar na Й“itiЙ“.
5.17: A kaan wa a raak kiis teemet-yasna-kaahay na kiis ndaЕӢkiyaah-yasna-nikiis na kiis yatuus (895).
5.18: Wa Yered pes kiis teemet na kiis ndaЕӢkiyaah-yasna-yino na kiis kanak (162), a raakka kuЙ“u Жҙaar, a teekka Й—e Henok.
5.19: ЕҠ finho raakuukaЕӢ Henok, Yered pesiЙ— kiis teemet-yasna-kaahay (800). A raakisseen Й“i kuЙ“u Жҙaar na Й“itiЙ“.
5.20: A kaan wa a raak kiis teemet-yasna-nikiis na kiis ndaЕӢkiyaah-yasna-yino na kiis kanak (962).
5.21: Wa Henok pes kiis ndaЕӢkiyaah-yasna-yino na kiis yatuus (65), a raakka kuЙ“u Жҙaar, a teekka Й—e Matusalem.
5.22: Henok hunee na Kooh. ЕҠ finho raakuukaЕӢ Matusalem, a pessa ЕӢ ineem kiis teemet-kaahay (300). A raakisseen Й“i kuЙ“u Жҙaar na Й“itiЙ“.
5.23: Ina a pes jen wa kiis teemet-kaahay na kiis ndaЕӢkiyaah-yasna-yino na kiis yatuus (365).
5.24: Henok hunee na Kooh po a hotissuuЙ—i laam Kooh rapiЙ— Й—e rapiЙ— ЕӢ serooce.
5.25: Wa Matusalem pes kiis teemet na kiis ndaЕӢkiyaah-yasna-kaahay na kiis yasna-kanak (187), a raakka kuЙ“u Жҙaar, a teekka Й—e Lemek.
5.26: ЕҠ finho raakuukaЕӢ Lemek, Matusalem pesiЙ— kiis teemet-yasna-kanak na kiis ndaЕӢkiyaah-yasna-kaahay na kiis kanak (782). A raakisseen Й“i kuЙ“u Жҙaar na Й“itiЙ“.
5.27: A kaan wa a raak kiis teemet-yasna-nikiis na kiis ndaЕӢkiyaah-yasna-yino na kiis yasna-nikiis (969).
5.28: Wa Lemek pes kiis teemet na kiis ndaЕӢkiyaah-yasna-kaahay na kiis kanak (182), a raakka kuЙ“u Жҙaar.
5.29: A teekka Й—e Noohin te a woosa ne : В« ЕҠ alki NikiЙ—i aluk kehЖҙi wii, yii a yi na hee eЙ—fiЙ—e coonaaniЕӢ Й“oo ЕӢ pangki. В»
5.30: ЕҠ finho raakuukaЕӢ Noohin, Lemek pesiЙ— kiis teemet-yatuus na kiis ndaЕӢkiyaah-yasna-nikiis na kiis yatuus (595). A nameen raak Й“i kuЙ“u Жҙaar na Й“itiЙ“.
5.31: A kaan wa a raak kiis teemet-yasna-kanak na kiis ndaЕӢkiyaah-yasna-kanak na kiis yasna-kanak (777).
5.32: Wa Noohin pes kiis teemet-yatuus (500), a raakeen kuЙ“u kaahay, Sem na Haam na Yaafet.

6.1: Wa Й“o' ci camb Гұimin ЕӢ adinaani, te Й“a raakka Й“i komaaki cafaЖҙ,
6.2: safaal ca hotta ne cafaЖҙ caЕӢ Й“o' ca moЙ—iЙ—, Й“a Й“ayya Й“itiЙ“ ngaЕӢ Й“i neЙ“ Й“a nga Й“a.
6.3: ЕҠ ineem, NikiЙ—i woosa ne : В« ЕҠ heyЙ—i faЙ—isse Й“o' a maaГұ na iiki ЕӢ tum nga Й—e, laam a huf dong. HutiiniЕӢ kipes kiЕӢ Й—e hey nike kiis teemet na kiis ndaЕӢkiyaah-kanak (120). В»
6.4: ЕҠ jamanoocaam, wa raakeen Й“i puЕӢkal ЕӢ kehЖҙi, te Й“a raakisseen. ЖҒeem Й“eЙ— nikee jalmbaaca Й—eЙ“gaan te tiik ciЕӢ Й“a kerhuuЙ—. ЖҒa rimkohee ngaЕӢ safaal ca na cafaЖҙ ca.
6.5: NikiЙ—i hotta ne Й“ooЙ“a nikee ЕӢ kehЖҙi uupee nga uup aГұaand, te keeГұ caЕӢ Й“a genee Й“a yurhiЙ— ngaЕӢ in moЙ—aaЙ—i.
6.6: A raakka aay-keeГұ nga, inwaaso ammba Й—e ЕӢ feri a fer Й“o' ЕӢ kehЖҙi.
6.7: A woosa ЕӢ haf ce ne : В« ЕҠ hey Й—umbe Й“ooЙ“i ЕӢ fer, ЕӢ hooliЙ— Й“a ЕӢ kehЖҙi, ЕӢ faЙ—anЙ—i sah Й—oopaat ci, yakak na Жҙin, po sel ci ; laam inwaaso ambiЙ— to ЕӢ feri ЕӢ fer ca. В»
6.8: Waaye NikiЙ—i baahoheen Noohin. GaalaЕӢ Noohin
6.9: Inii weЙ— naandsuku ЕӢ Noohin. Noohin a nikee Й“o' yurhiЙ— ngaЕӢ Й“ooЙ“aЕӢ jamanoonaЕӢ Й—e, te a hunee na Kooh.
6.10: Noohin raakeen kuЙ“u Жҙaar kaahay, Sem, Haam, na Yaafet.
6.11: ЖҒooЙ“a genee ЕӢ kehЖҙi nikee yahrukohiЙ—, te wa muuЖҙeeЙ—i Kooh, te Й—isik nu Й—isik raakeen tumohaaЙ— moЙ—aaЙ—i.
6.12: Kooh marakka, a hotta ne kehЖҙi yahrukohiЙ— laam, e pesiЙ— ci hotkang jen nikee tumoh in moЙ—aaЙ—i.
6.13: Ineem tahha po Kooh woosa Noohin ne : В« ЕҠ ambiЙ— ne ЕӢ hey Й—umbe Й“ooЙ“i jen sagu riifЙ—i Й“a riifiЙ— Adina na tumohaaЙ— moЙ—aaЙ—i. ЕҠ hey Й“a Й—umbe na kehЖҙi.
6.14: Waaka kidig ndengiЙ—, fu haЙ“Й—iЙ— haf fu in mand na wahnde yakak, wa min teembeer findi gaal. Wa raakaat Й“i tuuЖҙ, fu reefa godirong ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙi na finhoori.
6.15: Fu na hee wa haЙ“Й—ohe an : HutiiniЕӢ wa nikaat saangal teemet na saangal ndaЕӢkiyaah-yatuus (150), angiini nik saangal ndaЕӢkiyaah-kanak na saangal yatuus (25) te njooliini nik saangal ndaЕӢkiyaah na saangal yatuus (15).
6.16: Fu heya waakЙ—e kunoha, harmban wa na gaali nikaat suung yino. Fu heya haЙ“Й—iЙ—e yahndeer ЕӢ hambuusiЕӢ wa, gaali raak nikoha kaahay, ЕӢ yoorЙ—i, ЕӢ leerni na Й—afki.
6.17: Ini kaЙ— nga so, ЕӢ hey bembe kehЖҙi na masuЙ“ ne ЕӢ ap in nu na iike nga Й—ah ; in nu nik ngaЕӢ kehЖҙi Й—ah, a hey kaane.
6.18: Waaye ЕӢ hey ambtiЙ—ohe na Й—a. Fu hey aase ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ gaali na Й“itiifu na kuЙ“uuciЕӢ Й—a kaahay ci na Й“itiЙ“ ciЕӢ Й“a.
6.19: Fu hey name Й“ek ЕӢ gaali heet Й—oopaat nu nik ngaЕӢ kehЖҙi Й—ah, naar yino na riЙ“ yino ne ca min muc na Й—a.
6.20: Heet ciЕӢ Й—oopaat ci hey haye kanak kanak, sel ci na Й—oopaat ciЕӢ kehЖҙi, yakak na Жҙin jen hey haye, ne ca min muc.
6.21: Fu nak, Й“ayndoha kaГұam nu nik, fu Й“ek nga, fu raak pesoha, fu na ca. В»
6.22: Noohin haЙ“Й—ohha in ceem jen Й—aa, findi Kooh nakohee Й—e wa.

7.1: Wa ineem raak, NikiЙ—i woosa Noohin ne : В« Aasa ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ gaali, fu na Й“i kahan fu laam, ЕӢ hot Й—a dong yurhiЙ— ngaЕӢ Й“ooЙ“iЕӢ jamanooniЕӢ Й—a.
7.2: ЖҒayndoha ЕӢ Й—oopaat ci hooliЙ— ci , riЙ“ yasna-kanak na naar yasna-kanak, na ci hoolaaЙ—iici, riЙ“ yino na naar yino,
7.3: na sel ci, riЙ“ yasna-kanak na naar yasna-kanak ; ne cuuЙ“ ciЕӢ ca min ris ЕӢ kehЖҙi.
7.4: Laam, ndii na neeh yasna-kanak, ЕӢ hey toЙ“e toЙ“ yakak, ini ree neeh ndaЕӢkiyaah-nikiis (40). ЕҠ Й—umb in ci ЕӢ fer na iike ЕӢ kehЖҙi jen. В»
7.5: Noohin tumohhaa Й—aa, findi NikiЙ—i nakohee Й—e wa.
7.6: Wa Noohin raak kiis teemet-yasna-yino (600), weЙ— masuЙ“ riifЙ—oh kehЖҙi.
7.7: A aaseen ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ gaala, a yi na Й“itiice na kuЙ“uuciЕӢ Й—e kaahay ci na Й“itiЙ“ ciЕӢ Й“a, ne Й“a muc ЕӢ masma.
7.8: ЖҠoopaat ci hooliЙ— ci na ci hoolaaЙ—iici, sel ci na in ci Жҙin Жҙin ci na iike ЕӢ kehЖҙi jen,
7.9: ca raakeen Noohin ЕӢ gaala kanak kanak, naar na riЙ“, findi Kooh woyohee wa.
7.10: Wa neeh ca yasna-kanak ca coot, masma cammba naaf kehЖҙi.
7.11: WeЙ— kiis ka Noohin raakoh kiis teemet-yasna-yino (600), wa caЙ“na kanakЙ—oha raak neeh ndaЕӢkiyaah na neeh yasna-kanak (17). MbaЙ—i, masma laayohngaana nikee ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ kehЖҙi, pookkaa ЕӢ Й—isik laayiЙ—, wa baliЙ—ta. Eel ci rangsukka, ca nameeЙ—a juur masuЙ“ ЕӢ kehЖҙi.
7.12: A toЙ“eeЙ—a noha na weka, ini ree neeh ndaЕӢkiyaah-nikiis (40).
7.13: MbaЙ—i, raak Noohin ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ gaala, na kuЙ“uuciЕӢ Й—e Жҙaar ci Sem, Haam na Yaafet, na Й“itiice na Й“itiЙ“ ciЕӢ kuЙ“uuciЕӢ Й—e.
7.14: ЖҒa nikka ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ gaala na cuuЙ“ ciЕӢ Й—oopaat ci jen ; ciЕӢ bilaf fi na ciЕӢ kahan ci, in ci Жҙin Жҙin ci na iike ЕӢ kehЖҙi na sel ci.
7.15: In ci na iike jen raakka Noohin ЕӢ gaala kanak kanak,
7.16: naar na riЙ“, findi Kooh woyohee wa. Жіutta, NikiЙ—i rannga buntaanaЕӢ gaala.
7.17: ToЙ“a yuurkeeЙ—a noha na weka ini ree neeh ndaЕӢkiyaah-nikiis (40). Masma uupeeЙ—a nga rap po, wa meeЙ“pa gaala.
7.18: Wa Й“aatkeeЙ—a po, gaala teembeerra ЕӢ jola.
7.19: Wa uupeeЙ—a nga Й“aatuk po, wa onnda tangooca uupee Й—afuk jen.
7.20: Masma mirndohha kaЙ— po, wa onnda tangooca ini ree saangal yasna-kanak.
7.21: In nu nik ne a iikeen ЕӢ kehЖҙi suyЙ—i Й—ah, a kaaniЙ— nga ; sel ca, Й—oopaat caЕӢ kahan ca na caЕӢ bilaf fa na in ca Жҙin Жҙin ca iikee ЕӢ kehЖҙi jen, kaaniЙ— na Й“ooЙ“a.
7.22: In nu nik ne a heЙ— kiГұin ЕӢ kehЖҙi suyЙ—i Й—ah, a kaaniЙ—.
7.23: In ca iikee ЕӢ kehЖҙi jen ceЙ— NikiЙ—i ambsoh, a Й—umbiЙ—ta ca ; Й“o', Й—oopaat, in ca Жҙin Жҙin ca na sel ca. A faЙ—ee Noohin dong na Й“a nikee na Й—e ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ gaala.
7.24: Wa ineem raak, masma rissa oniЙ— kehЖҙi ini ree neeh teemet na neeh ndaЕӢkiyaah-yatuus (150).

8.1: Ina masma na raake neeh teemet na neeh ndaЕӢkiyaah-yatuus (150) ЕӢ kehЖҙi jen, Kooh Й—aakkoheen Noohin nof, a yi na Й—oopaat ca nikee na Й—e ЕӢ gaala. WeЙ— a puuЙ—soh ЕӢ kehЖҙi, masma haawsukeeЙ—a.
8.2: Wa pulohee ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ kehЖҙi na wa juurkohee ЕӢ eel ci, ca tufukka ; toЙ“a seekka.
8.3: Masma cooteeЙ—a Жҙin Жҙin ; ЕӢ finho neeh teemet na neeh ndaЕӢkiyaah-yatuus ceem (150), wa haawsukka kotii.
8.4: MbaЙ—i, caЙ“na yasna-kanakЙ—oh raakee neeh ndaЕӢkiyaah na neeh yasna-kanak (17) ; gaala gaЖҙca ЕӢ tangooca ЕӢ Ararat.
8.5: Masma uupeeЙ—a nga haawsuk po ngaЕӢ mbeha koc ЕӢ caЙ“na ndaЕӢkiyaahЙ—oh, tangooca hotkeeЙ—a.
8.6: Wa degga neeh ndaЕӢkiyaah-nikiis (40), Noohin rangissa palaЕӢteera a haЙ“Й—iЙ—ee gaala.
8.7: A tuuЖҙca ngaak-suur ЕӢ hara, yeem kaЙ—eeЙ—a hayeeЙ—a, po findi masma ЕӢiisoh.
8.8: Noohin nammba tuuЖҙ hoЙ— ne a inah andi masma ЕӢiisiЙ—.
8.9: Waaye a raakЙ—i Й—iski a yongan laam kehЖҙi riifeen na masuЙ“, a dokukka. Noohin puliЙ—ta yaah a ammba Й—e, a Й“ekka Й—e ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ gaala.
8.10: A sekissa neeh yasna-kanak, a tuuЖҙissa hoЙ—a.
8.11: Na niina, a hayya na saaf oliiw as ЕӢ nguЙ“iЕӢ Й—e. Noohin inahha kotii ne masma haawsukiЙ— ЕӢ kehЖҙi.
8.12: A Й“aatta sek neeh yasna-kanak a tuuЖҙissa hoЙ—a, yeem taalndiЙ—ta, a dokkisЙ—i nga Й—e.
8.13: Kiis ka Noohin raakoh kiis teemet-yasna-yino na kiis yino (601), ЕӢ caЙ“na koc nga, ЕӢ mbeha adug nga, raak masma reehiЙ— ЕӢ kehЖҙi. Noohin kunissa gaala, a marakka, a hotta ne kehЖҙi suyiЙ—.
8.14: Wa caЙ“na kanakЙ—oh raak neeh ndaЕӢkiyaah-kanak na neeh yasna-kanak (27), raak kehЖҙi suyiЙ— kong,
8.16: В« Pula gaali, fu na Й“itiifu na kuЙ“uuciЕӢ Й—a na Й“itiЙ“ ciЕӢ Й“a ;
8.17: fu puliЙ— cuuЙ“ ciЕӢ Й—oopaat ci nik na Й—a, ciЕӢ kahan ci na ciЕӢ bilaf fi, sel ci na in ci Жҙin Жҙin ci jen ; ca pasarkohaat, ca nikaat Й“asloh, ca rimaatЙ—ohaat laayiЙ— ЕӢ kehЖҙi. В»
8.18: Noohin pulla gaala, na Й“itiice, na kuЙ“uuciЕӢ Й—e Жҙaar ci, na Й“itiЙ“ caЕӢ Й“a.
8.19: ЖҠoopaat ca jen, na sel ca na in ca Жҙin Жҙin ca ; ca puleeЙ—a gaala cuuЙ“ cuuЙ“.
8.20: Жіutta, Noohin haЙ“iЙ—ta seeЖҙkiЙ—oha haf ce ЕӢ NikiЙ—i, a Й“ayya ЕӢ Й—oopaat ca hooliЙ— ca na ЕӢ sel ca hooliЙ— ca, a hoomiЙ—ta ca nga.
8.21: Wa eeГұЙ—eem ree ЕӢ NikiЙ—i, a neЙ“uusa nga, a woosa ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ ce ne : В« ЕҠ heyЙ—i alkisse kehЖҙi muk sagu Й“o'. Wa keeh ne ЕӢ kikomaakiikaЕӢ Й“a, weЙ— keeГұ ciЕӢ Й“a na cambohee Й“a hiir ЕӢ in moЙ—aaЙ—i ; ЕӢ heyЙ—i Й—umbЙ—isse in ci na pese ЕӢ kehЖҙi muk ЕӢ findi ЕӢ tumoha an.
8.22: Feeh kehЖҙi wii nga Й—ah, in cii kurkohanЙ—i nga : sok na nguЙ—, doh na soos, yuk na reh, noh na wek. В»

9.1: ЕҠ ineem, Kooh barke'iЙ—ta Noohin na kuЙ“uuciЕӢ Й—e, a woosa Й“a ne : В« Nikaat Й“asil, rimaatЙ—ohaat po Й—u riifiЙ— kehЖҙi jen.
9.2: ЖҠiski wa nik ndii Й—oopaat ciЕӢ kehЖҙi na sel ci na in ci Жҙin Жҙin ci ЕӢ kehЖҙi na cuurund ci, ca hey Й—u neЖҙЖҙohe laam, ЕӢ hey ca dege ЕӢ yaah ciЕӢ Й—u.
9.3: Findi kidig ci, in ci na pese te ca yoonde, ЕӢ eЙ—iЙ— Й—u ca jen, ca kaГұam nga Й—u kotii.
9.4: Waaye Й—u heyЙ—i Гұame sepet na kipes kiЕӢ wa, weЙ— ne, na Гұif miЕӢ wa.
9.5: Г‘if miЕӢ Й—u, weЙ— nam nik kipes kiЕӢ Й—u ; weЙ— tah Й—oopaat mbaa Й“o' nu aam Гұif Й“o' Й—ah, ЕӢ hey Й—a wa taambe ; yaa nu aam Гұif miЕӢ morom fu Й—ah, ЕӢ hey Й—a wa meekse.
9.6: ЖҒo' nu aam Гұif Й“o' Й—ah, wiЕӢ Й—a hey aamse ; laam Kooh fer Й“o' ЕӢ ГұaamaariЕӢ Й—e.
9.7: Nikaat Й“asloh, rimaatЙ—ohaat po Й—u riifiЙ— kehЖҙi. В»
9.8: Kooh woyissa Noohin na kuЙ“uuciЕӢ Й—e ne :
9.9: В« Mi yii ambtiЙ—oh na Й—u na Й“i na hee rimkohe nga Й—u,
9.10: na in ci na pese na Й—u jen, findi sel ci na Й—oopaat ciЕӢ kahan ci na ciЕӢ bilaf fi, ceЙ— ci pul na Й—u ЕӢ gaali na in ci na hee pese ЕӢ kehЖҙi jen.
9.11: AmbtiЙ—ohiЕӢ ngo na Й—u, wa na hee nikohe an : ЕҠ heyЙ—i boomisse kipes na masuЙ“ laayiЙ— te masuЙ“ laayiЙ— Й—umbissanЙ—i kehЖҙi. В»
9.12: A hannda deg nga ne : В« Inii weЙ— na hee teeЙ“ohe ambtiЙ—ohiЕӢ ngo na Й—u, Й—u na in ci na pese na Й—u, gomal nu gomal.
9.13: ЕҠ tumiЙ— Гұaangi-ГұaangiiniЕӢ ngo ЕӢ eel ci weЙ— ini na hee teeЙ“ohe ambtiЙ—ohiЕӢ ngo na Й“i kehЖҙi.
9.14: ЕҠ nangЙ—oh eel ci ЕӢ Й—afki te Гұaangi-Гұaangiini pul Й—ah,
9.15: ЕӢ hey naandsuke harmban ndo na Й—u na cuuЙ“ ciЕӢ Й—oopaat ci jen. MasuЙ“ laayiЙ— Й—umbissanЙ—i heЙ— kiГұin ci.
9.16: ЕҠ hot Гұaangi-Гұaangiini puliЙ— Й—ah, ЕӢ naandsuk ambtiЙ—ohi ЕӢ ambtiЙ—oh po faw na in ci na pese ЕӢ kehЖҙi jen. В»
9.17: Kooh woyissa Noohin ne : В« Ini teeЙ“oh ambtiЙ—ohiЕӢ ngo na Й“i kehЖҙi, weЙ—i weem. В» Noohin na kuЙ“uuciЕӢ Й—e
9.18: KuЙ“uuciЕӢ Noohin Й“a puloh ЕӢ gaala nikee Sem na Haam yi baabiЕӢ Kanaan, na Yaafet.
9.19: ЖҒeЙ— Й“i kaahay cii, Й“eЙ— caacuuciЕӢ Й“ooЙ“iЕӢ kehЖҙi jen.
9.20: Noohin nikka guuroh, a yi koc guur reseГұ.
9.21: Wa raakka mbeh, a annda ЕӢ biiГұaЕӢ wa po a laarra, a wolsukka po a hoolla ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ Й—iipaЕӢ Й—e.
9.22: Haam, baabiЕӢ Kanaan, hotta Й—e tas-Й“arang ; a woosa taambЙ—oh caЕӢ Й—e kanak ca nikee ЕӢ hara wa.
9.23: ЕҠ ineem, Sem na Yaafet Й“ayya uuf, Й“a deggaa ЕӢ yuug caЕӢ Й“a, Й“a tiindeeЙ—a paa finho po Й“a reesa, Й“a ulla Й—e wa. ЖҒa yurhiЙ—koheeЙ—i na baab Й“a laam Й“a waaЙ—eeЙ—i Й—e hot tas-Й“arang.
9.24: Wa Noohin laarsuk, a inahha ini kuЙ“kiЕӢ Й—e Жҙini tum,
9.25: a woosa ne : В« Kanaan nikaat Гұaami uup heefu ЕӢ Гұaam ciЕӢ Й“aah ciЕӢ Й—e. В»
9.26: A Й“aatta nga ne : В« NikiЙ—i KoohiЕӢ Sem, a yakЙ—aah ! Kanaan nikaat ГұaamiЕӢ Sem !
9.27: Kooh Й“aataat saangniЕӢ Yaafet te a gen na Sem ЕӢ jam ЕӢ genohaacaЕӢ yeem. Kanaan namaat nik ГұaamiЕӢ Yaafet. В»
9.28: ЕҠ finho toЙ“a yakka Noohin pesisiЙ— kiis teemet-kaahay na kiis ndaЕӢkiyaah-yatuus (350).
9.29: A kaan wa a raak kiis teemet-yasna-nikiis na kiis ndaЕӢkiyaah-yatuus (950).

10.1: Inii weЙ— naandsuku ЕӢ kuЙ“uuciЕӢ Noohin : Sem, Haam na Yaafet na Й“i rimkoh nga Й“a. ЕҠ finho masma Й—umbee kehЖҙi, Й“a raakeen Й“i kuЙ“u Жҙaar.
10.2: ЖҒi rimkoh ЕӢ Yaafet nikee : Goomeer, Maagoog, Maaday, Yaawaan, Tubaal, Mesek na Tiiraas.
10.3: Askenas na Riifat na Toogarma, Й“a puloh ЕӢ Goomeer.
10.4: Eliisa, Tarsis, Kitiim na Doodaanim pulohha ЕӢ Yaawaan.
10.5: ЖҒi puloh nga Й“a, Й“eЙ— genee huntiЙ—kohiЙ— na cookmi, Й“a Й“aatkeeЙ—a. ЖҒaa nu Й“aaheen peЙ—eem Й—ah, Й“aahha kur ; Й“a gennda cuuЙ“ cuuЙ“.
10.6: ЖҒi rimkoh ЕӢ Haam nikee : Kuus, Misrayim, Puut na Kanaan.
10.7: Sebaa, Hawiilaa, Sabtaah, Ra'amaa na Sabtekaa puloh ЕӢ Kuus. Sabaa na Deedaan nammba puloh ЕӢ Ra'amaa.
10.8: Kuus a yi nam rim Nimrood, Жҙaara koc nik jalmba kerhuuЙ— ЕӢ kehЖҙi.
10.9: A nikee kaalsukoh yakak ЕӢ fiki NikiЙ—i, po Й“a meeЙ— woo ne : В« Kaalsukoh yakak ЕӢ fiki NikiЙ—i findi Nimrood. В»
10.10: Kur-taah ca koc ЕӢ nguuraЕӢ Й—e ceЙ— Baabel, Erek, Akkad na Kalne ngaЕӢ Sinyaar.
10.11: Nimrood puloh kur keem, a kaЙ—ta Assuur a yippa kur-taah cii : Niniw, Rehobotiir, Kaalah
10.12: na Resen, kur-taaha yakka ЕӢ harmban Niniw na Kaalah.
10.13: -14 Luud, Anaam, Lehaab, Naftuh, Patarus, Kasluh na Kaftoor puloh ЕӢ Misrayim. ЖҒi puloh ЕӢ Kasluh, Й“eЙ— rim Filistiici.
10.15: Kanaan saawkoh Sidoon, a degga Het nga.
10.16: Het a yi caaciЕӢ Yebuus ci, Amoor ci, Girgaas ci,
10.18: Arwaad ci, Semaar ci na Hamaat ci. ЕҠ mirndaani Й“i puloh ЕӢ Kanaan pasarkohha cuuЙ“-cuuЙ“.
10.19: ЖҒeЙ— genee ini amboh Sidoon na Й“ak Gerar po ЕӢ Gasaa ; na Sodom, Gomor, Atma na Seboyim, kaЙ—eeЙ—a po Leesa.
10.20: ЖҒeem Й“eЙ— Й“i puloh ЕӢ Haam. ЖҒaa nu Й“aaheen peЙ—eem Й—ah, Й“aahha kur ; Й“a gennda cuuЙ“-cuuЙ“.
10.21: Sem yi yakak Yaafet nameen raak Й“i kuЙ“u Жҙaar, a yi caaciЕӢ Eber na Й“i puloh nga Й—e jen.
10.22: ЖҒi rimkoh ЕӢ Sem nikee : Elaam, Assuur, Arpaksad, Luud na Aram.
10.23: Uus, Huul, Geter na Maas pulohha ЕӢ Aram.
10.24: Arpaksad nikka baabiЕӢ Selah, Selah nikka baabiЕӢ Eber.
10.25: Eber raakka kuЙ“u Жҙaar kanak, yinoora teeksee Peleg laam a raaku ЕӢ jamanoona kehЖҙi paysohu. TaambЙ—oh ce teeksee Yaktaan.
10.26: ЖҒii Й“eЙ— puloh ЕӢ Yaktaan : Almodaad, Seelef, Hasarmaawet, Yeera,
10.29: Ofir, Hawiilaa na Yoobaab ; Й“ii jen Й“a puloh ЕӢ Yaktaan.
10.30: ЖҒa genee ЕӢ harmban Messa na tangoocaЕӢ Sefaar, ЕӢ pulohaaЙ—-noh.
10.31: ЖҒeem Й“eЙ— Й“i puloh ЕӢ Sem. ЖҒaa nu Й“aaheen peЙ—eem Й—ah, Й“aahha kur ; Й“a gennda cuuЙ“-cuuЙ“.
10.32: CuuЙ“ ceem ceЙ— puloh ЕӢ kuЙ“uuciЕӢ Noohin, findi Й“a Й“aahoh na findi Й“a genoh. ЖҒi kur ci pasarkoh ЕӢ Adina jen puloh nga Й“a, ЕӢ finho Й—umbuukaЕӢ kehЖҙi na masuЙ“.

11.1: Bala Й“a pasarkohan Й—ah, Й“ooЙ“iЕӢ kehЖҙi jen jombee peЙ—eem yino
11.2: po ЕӢ jamanoona Й“a kurkoh pulohaaЙ—-noh. ЖҒa kaЙ—oh kaЙ—oh po Й“a reesa ЕӢ oon angiЙ— ЕӢ kur ka na woyse Sinyaar, Й“a yippa nga.
11.3: ЖҒa woosa ЕӢ harmban Й“a ne : В« ЖҒoo muulaat, Й“oo ut ca. В» ЖҒa Й“ayee muul findi atoh taЙ“ahoha na godirong findi simong.
11.4: ЖҒa woyissa ne : В« ЖҒoo haЙ“Й—aat kur-taah, Й“oo taЙ“ah nga taЙ“ah jimimim po wa maangee ЕӢ eel ca, wa hey tahe po Й“oo raak tiik te Й“oo heyЙ—i pasarkohe ЕӢ kehЖҙi. В»
11.5: WeЙ— NikiЙ—i ruhsoh ne a marak kur ka na taЙ“aha Й“ooЙ“i ЕӢ kehЖҙi tufkiЙ—e.
11.6: A woosa ЕӢ haf ce ne : В« Findi Й“a camboh an, Й“a nikka cuuЙ“ yino, Й“a Й“aahha peЙ—eem, ali in wooГұissanЙ—i Й“a ЕӢ in nu Й“a waaЙ— tum Й—ah.
11.7: Mbaa Й—ah, Й“oo ruhsaat, Й“oo Й—alohiЙ— woo ciЕӢ Й“a po Й“aa nu nga Й—ah, kerhuu peЙ—mi Й“inooЙ“i na woye. В»
11.8: NikiЙ—i pasarohha Й“a ЕӢ kehЖҙi jen ; kur ka Й“a taЙ“ahee toppa ndaam.
11.9: WeЙ— tah Й“a teekkaa Baabel laam, ЕӢ ndaam weЙ— NikiЙ—i Й—alohiЙ— peЙ—eem ci , a pasarohha Й“ooЙ“i ngaЕӢ kehЖҙi jen. ЖҒi rimkoh ЕӢ Sem
11.10: Inii weЙ— naandsuku ЕӢ Sem na Й“i rimkoh nga Й—e. Wa Sem pes kiis teemet (100), a raakka kuЙ“u Жҙaar, a teekka Й—e Arpaksad, raak toЙ“a yakka cootiЙ— po wa tummba kiis kanak.
11.11: ЕҠ finho raakuukaЕӢ Arpaksad, Sem pesiЙ— kiis teemet-yatuus (500). A nameen raak Й“i kuЙ“u Жҙaar na Й“itiЙ“.
11.12: Wa Arpaksad pes kiis ndaЕӢkiyaah-kaahay na kiis yatuus (35), a raakka kuЙ“u Жҙaar, a teekka Й—e Selah.
11.13: ЕҠ finho raakuukaЕӢ Selah, Arpaksad pesiЙ— kiis teemet-nikiis na kiis kaahay (403). A nameen raak Й“i kuЙ“u Жҙaar na Й“itiЙ“.
11.14: Wa Selah pes kiis ndaЕӢkiyaah-kaahay (30), a raakka kuЙ“u Жҙaar, a teekka Й—e Eber.
11.15: ЕҠ finho raakuukaЕӢ Eber, Selah pesiЙ— kiis teemet-nikiis na kiis kaahay (403). A nameen raak Й“i kuЙ“u Жҙaar na Й“itiЙ“.
11.16: Wa Eber pes kiis ndaЕӢkiyaah-kaahay na kiis nikiis (34), a raakka kuЙ“u Жҙaar, a teekka Й—e Peleg.
11.17: ЕҠ finho raakuukaЕӢ Peleg, Eber pesiЙ— kiis teemet-nikiis na kiis ndaЕӢkiyaah-kaahay (430). A nameen raak Й“i kuЙ“u Жҙaar na Й“itiЙ“.
11.18: Wa Peleg pes kiis ndaЕӢkiyaah-kaahay (30), a raakka kuЙ“u Жҙaar, a teekka Й—e Reyu.
11.19: ЕҠ finho raakuukaЕӢ Reyu, Peleg pesiЙ— kiis teemet-kanak na kiis yasna-nikiis (209). A nameen raak Й“i kuЙ“u Жҙaar na Й“itiЙ“.
11.20: Wa Reyu pes kiis ndaЕӢkiyaah-kaahay na kiis kanak (32), a raakka kuЙ“u Жҙaar, a teekka Й—e Serug.
11.21: ЕҠ finho raakuukaЕӢ Serug, Reyu pesiЙ— kiis teemet-kanak na kiis yasna-kanak (207). A nameen raak Й“i kuЙ“u Жҙaar na Й“itiЙ“.
11.22: Wa Serug pes kiis ndaЕӢkiyaah-kaahay (30), a raakka kuЙ“u Жҙaar, a teekka Й—e Nahor.
11.23: ЕҠ finho raakuukaЕӢ Nahor, Serug pesiЙ— kiis teemet-kanak (200). A nameen raak Й“i kuЙ“u Жҙaar na Й“itiЙ“.
11.24: Wa Nahor pes kiis ndaЕӢkiyaah-kanak na kiis yasna-nikiis (29), a raakka kuЙ“u Жҙaar, a teekka Й—e Tera.
11.25: ЕҠ finho raakuukaЕӢ Tera, Nahor pesiЙ— kiis teemet na kiis ndaЕӢkiyaah na kiis yasna-nikiis (119). A nameen raak Й“i kuЙ“u Жҙaar na Й“itiЙ“.
11.26: Tera raakeen kuЙ“u Жҙaar kaahay, Ibram , Nahor na Haaraan, wa a raak kiis ndaЕӢkiyaah-yasna-kanak (70). ЖҒi kahan Tera, baab Й“i Ibrahiima.
11.27: Inii weЙ— naandsuku ЕӢ Tera na Й“i rimkoh nga Й—e ; Tera a yi baabiЕӢ Ibram na Nahor na Haaraan yi rim Loot.
11.28: Haaraan yeem a kaanoh kur Й“a, ЕӢ kur-taaha na woyse Uur ЕӢ Babilon, raak baab Й“a peseeЙ—a.
11.29: ЖҒiti Ibram teeksee Saraay , yiЕӢ Nahor nikka Milka, kuЙ“kiЕӢ Haaraan. Haaraan a yi namee nik baab Й“i Iska.
11.30: Waaye, Saraay mineeЙ—i raak kuЙ“u, a jaasiree jaasir.
11.31: Wa raakka mbeh, Tera kurkohha Uur ЕӢ Babilon a toorkeeЙ—a Kanaan. A Й“ayndohha kuЙ“kiЕӢ Й—e Ibram, na setiЕӢ Й—e Loot kuЙ“kiЕӢ Haaraan. A nammba Й“ayndoh payum ce Saraay Й“iti Ibram. ЖҒa kaЙ—oh kaЙ—oh po ЕӢ waas, ЕӢ kur-taaha na woyse Haaraan, Й“a yippa nga.
11.32: Tera kaanohha ndaam raak Й—e pesiЙ— kiis teemet-kanak na kiis yatuus (205).

12.1: ЖҒi kahan Tera, Й“eЙ— gen ЕӢ Haaraan po wa raakka mbeh, NikiЙ—i woosa Ibram ne : В« FaЙ—a kur ki fu genoh, fu faЙ— Й“aah ciЕӢ Й—a, fu nam faЙ— Й“i kahan baabiЕӢ Й—a ; fu yurah ЕӢ kur ka maa hee Й—a teeЙ“e.
12.2: ЕҠ hey Й—a barke'Й—e, ЕӢ pulЙ—oh cuuЙ“ angiЙ— nga Й—a, ЕӢ yakiЙ— tiikiЕӢ Й—a te fu nik camboha barke.
12.3: ЖҒooЙ“i waaЙ—Й—an Й—a moЙ—iЙ—, ЕӢ barke'iЙ— Й“a, te Й“o' nu waaЙ—iЙ— Й—a moЙ—aaЙ—i Й—ah, ЕӢ aluk Й—e. CuuЙ“ ciЕӢ kehЖҙi jen raakohan barke saguufu. В»
12.4: ЕҠ finho inaam, Ibram kaЙ—ta findi NikiЙ—i woyoh Й—e wa. Loot, kuЙ“kaЕӢ taambЙ—oh ce, hunee na Й—e. Wa Ibram na kurke ЕӢ Haaraan waam tel Й—e raakiЙ— kiis ndaЕӢkiyaah-yasna-kanak na kiis yatuus (75).
12.5: A Й“ayndohha Й“itiice Saraay, na Loot, yi kuЙ“u nga Й—e, na in ca Й“a raakoh ЕӢ Haaraan jen na Гұaam caЕӢ Й“a. ЖҒa pulla, Й“a kaЙ—eeЙ—a po Й“a reesa Kanaan.
12.6: Wa Ibram ree, raak Й“i Kanaan geniЙ— ЕӢ kur ka, a taammbaa ЕӢ leerna po kidga yakka ЕӢ Moore ngaЕӢ Sisem.
12.7: ЕҠ ndaam NikiЙ—i teeЙ“ukka Й—e, woosa Й—e ne : В« Kur kii jen ЕӢ hey wa eЙ—e Й“i rimkohan nga Й—a. В» Ibram haЙ“iЙ—ta seeЖҙkiЙ—oha haf ce ЕӢ NikiЙ—i, laam a yi teeЙ“uk Й—e nga.
12.8: Wa a Жҙuta haЙ“iЙ—, a kurukka, a yurahha tangooca lak Betel pulohaaЙ—-noh ; a yippa Й—iipaЕӢ Й—e ЕӢ harmban Betel na Ay. Betel lakkaa muyohaaЙ—-noh, Ay pulohaaЙ—-noh. ЕҠ ndaam a haЙ“iЙ—ta seeЖҙkoha, a gidimmba NikiЙ—i na Гұaamuk.
12.9: Wa a puloh nga, a yongsukeeЙ—a Жҙin Жҙin ЕӢ Й“ak Negef. Saarata ЕӢ kahan buuraЕӢ Misra
12.10: Waam, aЙ— raakeen ЕӢ kur ka, Ibram kaЙ—ta Misra ne a nikohaah nga laam aЙ—a miskeen.
12.11: Wa a kaЙ— po a heeЙ—a aase Misra, a woosa Й“itiice Saraay ne : В« SikЙ—uk ko, ЕӢ inhiЙ— ne fu moЙ—iЙ— lool,
12.12: Й“i Misra hot Й—a Й—ah, Й“a hey woye ne fu Й“itiiso te Й“a hey yo ape fu tas.
12.13: Ngalla Й“oo ree Й—ah, fu na woye ne Й“oo taambЙ—oh taambЙ—oh ; ineem hey tahe po Й“a taambkoh ho saguufu, te fu hey tahe po, ЕӢ pes. В»
12.14: Wa Ibram ree kur ka, Й“i Misra hotta ne Й“itiice moЙ—iЙ— lool.
12.15: Huntoh caЕӢ Firawnaana, buuraЕӢ Misra nammba Й—e hot, Й“a laasukka Й—e ЕӢ fikiice, a yi Saraay a Й“ayuusa kahan Firawnaana.
12.16: A tahha po Ibram taambkohuusa moЙ—oЙ—, Firawnaana onnda Й—e Й“i gat : pe', mbaal, inoh, mbaam, naar na riЙ“ na ngeelemb, na Й“i Гұaam, Жҙaar na Й“itiЙ“.
12.17: Waaye NikiЙ—i ruhsiЙ—ta naamo miskiЙ— ЕӢ Firawnaana na Й“i kahan ce sagu Saraay Й“iti Ibram.
12.18: WeЙ—i Firawnaana Й“eeЙ—koh Ibram woosa Й—e ne : В« Ini fu haЙ“iЙ— to wii nak ! Wa ye tah po fu wooЙ—i so ne a Й“itiifu ?
12.19: Wa ye tah fu woosa ne Й—u taambЙ—oh ? Wa tahha po ЕӢ Й“ayya Й—e Й“itiЙ“. ЖҠiski wa nik ndii, Й“itiifu a yi, Й“ayaa Й—e te fu coot. В»
12.20: Firawnaana nakka huntoh caЕӢ Й—e ne Й“a pulЙ—aat Ibram na Й“itiice, na ina a raak jen ЕӢ kur ka.

13.1: Wa Ibram na pulЙ—asse Misra na Й“itiice, na raak-raakaЕӢ Й—e jen, a gurdeeЙ—a Negef, Loot nikangee na Й—e.
13.2: Ibram raakeen lool, a amboheen Й“i gat yakoh na yakoh, na haalis na urus laayoh na laayoh.
13.3: A pulohha Negef, a yongsukeeЙ—a Жҙin-Жҙin po Betel ЕӢ Й—iska a kocee ndut ЕӢ harmban Betel na Ay.
13.4: A Й“eeЙ—kohha Kooh ЕӢ tiikiЕӢ NikiЙ—i ЕӢ seeЖҙkohaana a Й—eЙ“ee haЙ“iЙ— ЕӢ ndaam.
13.5: Loot, yi hunee na Й—e, nameen raak Й“i gat pe', mbaal na inoh, na Й—iip ca Й“ooЙ“aЕӢ Й—e nikohe.
13.6: ЖҒa haЙ“isseeЙ—i ЕӢ kur ka, laam raak-raakaЕӢ Й“a laayeen po Й“a minisseeЙ—i gen ЕӢ Й—isik yino ;
13.7: te yit, Peris ca na Kanaan ca namee gen nga. Ayrukoh raakka ЕӢ harmban niiЙ—oh caЕӢ Ibram na Й“aЕӢ Loot.
13.8: WeЙ—i Ibram woyoh Loot ne : В« Ngalla, ayrukoh kanaat raak ЕӢ harmban mi na Й—a, na harmban niiЙ—oh ciЕӢ Й“oo, laam e Й“oo Й“aah.
13.9: Kon mbaa Й—ah, Й“oo saЙ“sukohaat, marka inii jen ЕӢ kur ki, fu kooЙ— ЕӢ yaah-sing Й—ah, ЕӢ kooЙ— ЕӢ yaah-Гұaahum ; fu kooЙ— ЕӢ yaah-Гұaahum Й—ah, ЕӢ kooЙ— ЕӢ yaah-sing. В»
13.10: Wa Loot marak kehЖҙa wil kalaЕӢ Yurdan, a hotta ne wa iiri po Sowar, weem raak NikiЙ—i Й—umbЙ—i Sodom na Gomor ndoom, wa mandee na nguukaЕӢ Eden, findi kehЖҙiЕӢ Misra.
13.11: Loot waЙ—ukka kehЖҙaЕӢ Yurdan, a yongsukka ЕӢ pulohaaЙ—-noh ; Й“a saЙ“sukohoh Й—aa.
13.12: Ibram gennda ЕӢ Kanaan, Loot kaЙ—ta ndutta ЕӢ sero kur caЕӢ Yurdan, a yippa Й—iip caЕӢ Й—e ЕӢ Й“ak Sodom.
13.13: ЖҒi Sodom nikee aЖҙaarkiЙ—, bakaaЙ—oh yakak ЕӢ fiki NikiЙ—i. Kooh teeЙ“iЙ— Ibrahiima kur ka a gapee Й—e
13.14: Wa Ibram paysukoh na Loot, NikiЙ—i woosa Й—e ne : В« Marka baahiЙ— ЕӢ fikiifu, na finhoofu na yaah-sing, na yaah-Гұaahum,
13.15: laam kur ki fu na hote wii jen, ЕӢ hey Й—a wa one po faw, fu na Й“i na hee rimkohe nga Й—a.
13.16: ЕҠ hey Й“aate Й“i na hee rimkohe nga Й—a po Й“a mand na merhey miЕӢ kehЖҙi, Й“o' minanЙ—i Й“a kind, findi Й“o' minohЙ—i kind merhey miЕӢ kehЖҙi.
13.17: Kurka, fu taambiЙ— kur ki jen ЕӢ hutiiniЕӢ wa na angiiniЕӢ wa, laam maa hee Й—a wa one. В»
13.18: Жіutta, Ibram Й—offa ndutaЕӢ Й—e, a kaЙ—ta, a yippa ЕӢ kidig ca yakak caЕӢ Mamre ЕӢ Й“ak Hebron, ЕӢ ndaam a haЙ“iЙ—ta seeЖҙkoha wuu NikiЙ—i.

14.1: Wa nikee wa Amrafel nikoh buuraЕӢ Sinyaar, Aryok nikka yaЕӢ Elasaar, Kedorlamer yaЕӢ Elaam na Tidyal yaЕӢ Goyim ;
14.2: Й“a hunnda na Й“ooЙ“aЕӢ Й“a, Й“a hiГұoheeЙ—a na Bera buuraЕӢ Sodom na Birsa yaЕӢ Gomor, Sinyab yaЕӢ Atma, Semeber yaЕӢ Seboyim na yaЕӢ Bela, weЙ—i Sowar.
14.3: ЖҒeЙ— Й“i yatuus cii, Й“eЙ— ambsukohee ЕӢ oonaЕӢ Sidim weЙ—i CookmiЕӢ-MeЙ—aami woti-woti.
14.4: Raak wa tumeen kiis ndaЕӢkiyaah na kanak (12) ca fu inah ne, e Kedorlamer a yi adgiЙ—ee Й“a, waaye ЕӢ kiis ka taamb nga Й“a sannga inaam.
14.5: Wa tummba kiis kotii, tahha po, Kedorlamer na buur ca hunee na Й—e heeЙ—a nga Й“a. ЖҒa kocca laЙ“ Refay ca ngaЕӢ Asterot-Karnayim, Sus ca ngaЕӢ Ham, Em ca ngaЕӢ jooraЕӢ Kirsatayim,
14.6: Hoor ca ngaЕӢ tangoocaЕӢ Й“a teeku Seyiir. ЖҒa ngekeeЙ—a Й“a, po ЕӢ El-Paran ЕӢ sero kehЖҙa hulanga.
14.7: ЖҒa pulohha nga, Й“a gurdohha En-Mispat, weЙ—i Kades ; Й“a degga kur kaЕӢ Amalek ca jen yaah. Жіutta Й“a nammba keen Amoor ca genee Hasason-Tamaar.
14.8: Wa Й“a juuЙ“ee Sodom na Gomor na Atma na Seboyim na Bela, wi Sowar, buur caЕӢ kur cii puliЙ—ta jalmbaacaЕӢ Й“a ; Й“a kaЙ—ta hiГұoha ЕӢ oonaЕӢ Sidim
14.9: na Kedorlamer buuraЕӢ Elaam, Tidyal yaЕӢ Goyim, Amrafel yaЕӢ Sinyaar na Aryok yaЕӢ Elasaar ; buur yatuus cohha na buur nikiis. Yatuus ca minuusa, Й“a saandoheeЙ—a.
14.10: Wa buur caЕӢ Sodom na Gomor saandohee, raak woong koltaar laayeen ЕӢ oonaЕӢ Sidim, Й“um keennda nga ca. ЖҒi raawЙ—i kaan kaЙ—ta Й—emmba ЕӢ tangooca.
14.11: ЖҒi ngekee Й“a guridda, Й“ayya in ca Sodom na Gomor ambohee jen findi raak-raak na pesoha, Й“a cootta na ca.
14.12: Loot yi kuЙ“u ЕӢ Ibram nameen Й“ayndohu na ina a raakee jen, laam raak Й—e ЕӢ Sodom.
14.13: Yino ЕӢ Й“i fusee kaЙ—ta, woosa Ibram wa, yi Й“aah ngaЕӢ Heber ci ; raak Й—e yip ngaЕӢ kidig ca yakak caЕӢ Mamre, yi Й“aah ngaЕӢ Amoor ci. Mamre raakeen taambЙ—oh kanak, Eskol na Aner. ЖҒeЙ— Й“i kaahay ceem Й“a langee na Ibram.
14.14: Wa Ibram kerah ne Loot, kuЙ“kaЕӢ taambЙ—oh ce ambuuЙ—, a cohЙ—ohha Й“a min hiГұoh ЕӢ ЖҙaaЙ“a rimohu kahan ce ; Й“a nikee teemet-kaahay na ndaЕӢkiyaah na yasna-kaahay (318). ЖҒa, na Й“i langee na Й“a, taambiЙ—ta buur ca po ЕӢ Daan.
14.15: Ibram paysohha ЖҙaaЙ“aЕӢ Й—e, Й“a keennda Й“a na weka, Й“a laЙ“pa Й“a, Й“a ngekeeЙ—a Й“a po ЕӢ Hobah, ЕӢ finho Damas.
14.16: A naaffa in ca Й“a raak jen, a naafndohha Loot na raak-raakaЕӢ Й—e na Й“itiЙ“ ca na Й“a ambsee Гұaam jen. CohaЕӢ Ibrahiima na Melkisedek na buuraЕӢ Sodom
14.17: Wa Ibram laЙ“ Kedorlamer na langtoh caЕӢ Й—e po a gurdeeЙ—a, buuraЕӢ Sodom pulla kaЙ—ta coha na Й—e ЕӢ oonaЕӢ Sawe, wa na woyse OonaЕӢ-Buur.
14.18: Melkisedek, buuraЕӢ Salem, nammba hay na mbuuru na biiГұ, a yi seeЖҙkiЙ—ohi na seeЖҙkiЙ—ohe wuu Kooh yi ЕӢ Й—afka Й—afka.
14.19: A kiimiЙ—ta Ibram barke an : В« Kooh yi ЕӢ Й—afka Й—afka, yi fer eel ci na kehЖҙi, barke'Й—aat Ibram ;
14.20: Kooh yi ЕӢ Й—afka Й—afka, yi amboh Й—a po fu minnda Й“a fu hiГұohee na Й“a, a yakЙ—aah yakЙ—u. В» Ibram eЙ—ta Й—e ЕӢ in ca a naafee, ndaЕӢkiyaah nu nik Й—ah, winooraЕӢ wa.
14.21: Wa Й“a coh ЕӢ oonaЕӢ Sawe, buuraЕӢ Sodom nammba woo Ibram ne : В« EЙ— to Й“ooЙ“i te fu Й“ay raak-raaki. В»
14.22: Ibram loffa Й—e ne : В« Mi yii meeЙ“ yaah ЕӢ giГұ NikiЙ—i, Kooh yi ЕӢ Й—afka Й—afka, yi fer eel ci na kehЖҙi ne :
14.23: in hend na caas mbaa liiЙ“ ГұafaЙ—, ЕӢ heyЙ—i wa Й“aye ЕӢ ini fu raak, po fu minanЙ—i woo ne, e Гұam tah Ibram raak.
14.24: ЕҠ waaЙ—Й—i ali in nga, nikЙ—i in ci ЖҙaaЙ“i raaw Гұam Й—ah, na Й“akiЕӢ langtoh ciЕӢ ngo, Aner na Eskol na Mamre, Й“i fu inah ne, Й“a raakiЙ— waЙ— nga. В»

15.1: ЕҠ finho coha na buur ca, in hayЙ—ohha Ibram findi heeЖҙ. A NikiЙ—i woyee na Й—e an : В« Ka neЖҙЖҙoh ali in Ibram, laam e Гұam na hee Й—a Й—ipe, te aafiЕӢ Й—a hey yake lool. В»
15.2: Ibram loffa ne : В« An fu na hee so ye one HeЙ— Й“oo NikiЙ—i ? Te ЕӢ raakЙ—i kuЙ“u po Eliyeser yiЕӢ Damas yii, a yi laman raak-raak kiЕӢ ngo !
15.3: Fu onЙ—i so kuЙ“u po jaambri rimkoh ЕӢ kahan ndo a yi na hee so lame ! В»
15.4: NikiЙ—i loffa Й—e ne : В« Muk, a yi lamohiЕӢ Й—a haa, waaye a kuЙ“ki fu rimoot ЕӢ Гұif miЕӢ Й—a, a yi na hee Й—a lame. В»
15.5: NikiЙ—i puliЙ—ta Й—e ЕӢ hara, a woosa Й—e ne : В« Taaknuka, fu kind hor ci ne fu miniЙ—a Й—ah. Fu hotiЙ— findi ca laayoh e ? ЖҒi rimkohan nga Й—a hendan Й—aa. В»
15.6: Ibram kossa, weЙ— tah NikiЙ—i ammba Й—e Й“o' yurhiЙ—.
15.7: A woyissa Й—e ne : В« E Гұam NikiЙ—i yi pulЙ—oh Й—a Uur ЕӢ Babilon, ne ЕӢ on Й—a kur kii, fu raakoota. В»
15.8: A loffa Й—e ne : В« HeЙ— Й“oo NikiЙ—i ЕӢ min inhoh na ne kur kii e Гұam raakana ? В»
15.9: NikiЙ—i woosa Й—e ne : В« ЖҒayiЙ— to inoh yu' na pe' yu' na mbaal naar, yaa nu nga Й—ah raakaat kiis kaahay, na hoЙ— na banuut Жҙin. В»
15.10: Ibram Й“ayya Й—oopaat ceem. A appa ca, yaa nu nga Й—ah, a nguЙ—ta Й—e ЕӢ leerni po tassa sel ca. A yurhiЙ—ohha nguЙ— nu nga Й—ah na wa Й“aat nga.
15.11: Suur ca yipkeeЙ—a ЕӢ fiЙ—aaf caЕӢ ca. Ibram aannja ca.
15.12: Wa noha na muye, Ibram pani'uusa, pani nooЙ—iЙ—. NeЖҙЖҙoh miskiЙ— huniЙ— na Гұuus tuЙ— aassa Й—e.
15.13: WeЙ—i Kooh woyoh Й—e ne : В« Inhaa ne set ciЕӢ Й—a hey nike jaambur ЕӢ kur ka Й“a raakЙ—i, Й“a tumu Гұaam nga, Й“a torhiЙ—u kiis teemet-nikiis (400).
15.14: Waaye ЕӢ hey atte'e Й“i kur ka Й“a tumohu Гұaam, po Й“a puloh nga na raak-raak laayiЙ—.
15.15: ЕҠ ini kaЙ— nga Й—a nak, fu hey raake kipes hutiЙ—, neЙ“iЙ—, fu kuruk nga moЙ—oЙ—, fu uumbu ЕӢ jam.
15.16: E set ciЕӢ Й—a, ЕӢ finho kiis teemet-nikiis ceem (400), na hee dokkisse ЕӢ ndii ; laam aЖҙaarkiЕӢ Amoor ci uupЙ—i yaah ndoom. В»
15.17: Wa noha muy, wa Гұuussa tuЙ—, Й—ekka po njahha Й—uukeeЙ—a hunnda na kocom kaЙ“iЙ—, ca taammba ЕӢ harmban nguЙ— caЕӢ sepet ca.
15.18: MbaЙ—i, NikiЙ—i ambtiЙ—ohha na Ibram. A woosa Й—e ne : В« ЖҒooЙ“i pulohan nga Й—a, Й“eЙ— maa hee eЙ—e kur kii ; ina nguЙ—oh ЕӢ kalaЕӢ Misra po ЕӢ Ewfaraat, kala yakka.
15.19: Wa nikka kur kiЕӢ Ken ci na Kenis ci na Kadmon ci
15.20: na Hit ci na Peris ci na Refay ci
15.21: na Amoor ci na Kanaan ci na Girgaas ci na Yebuus ci. В»

16.1: Saraay yi Й“iti Ibram, a raakЙ—eeЙ—i Й—e kuЙ“u, waaye a raakeen Гұaam teeku Haajara pulohee Misra.
16.2: Saraay Й“ooffa po a woosa Ibram ne : В« Fu hotiЙ— ne NikiЙ—i hondohiЙ— to raak kuЙ“u, huna na Haajara. Wa miniЙ— nik a raak kuЙ“u, yi nikan yiЕӢ ngo. В» Wa a woo Ibram ineem, a teyЙ—ukka.
16.3: Saraay, Й“iti Ibram, Й“ayya ГұaamiЕӢ Й—e pulohee Misra, Haajara, eЙ—ta Жҙaar ce Ibram Й—e, a tummba Й—e Й“itiЙ“. Weem, raak Ibram tumiЙ— kiis ndaЕӢkiyaah ЕӢ Kanaan.
16.4: Wa a hun na Й—e, a ammba rook. A inahha ne a Й“arang haa, a yappa Й“oyaЕӢ Й—e Saraay.
16.5: A yi Saraay a woosa Ibram ne : В« In ci jen ya fu Й“ek ca ; e Гұam deg Haajara ЕӢ yaah ciЕӢ Й—a, waaye ina a amboh rook poyi, a kerhiЙ—isЙ—i so. NikiЙ—i teeЙ“ohaat yi nik ЕӢ keeh ЕӢ harmban mi na Й—a. В»
16.6: Ibram loffa Й—e ne : В« Haajara deey, a ris ГұaamiЕӢ Й—a poyi, in na neЙ“ Й—a Й—ah, fu miniЙ— Й—e wa tum. В» A camboh Й—e iifiЙ— Й—aa, a tumeeЙ—a Й—e in miskiЙ— po a saandohha.
16.7: A kaЙ—oh kaЙ—oh po a nikka ЕӢ sero laaha ЕӢ waas Suur, ЕӢ keheЖҙ hulang ; malaakaaniЕӢ NikiЙ—i raakka Й—e nga,
16.8: a woosa Й—e ne : В« Haajara, ГұaamiЕӢ Saraay, fu kurkoh nde ? Fu na kaЙ—e nde ? В» A loffa Й—e ne : В« Mi na nupe Й“oyiЕӢ ngo Saraay. В»
16.9: MalaakaaniЕӢ NikiЙ—i woosa Й—e ne : В« Wiirka ЕӢ Й“oyiЕӢ Й—a, Saraay, fu ree Й—ah, ruhsiЙ—a haf fu ЕӢ fikiice. В»
16.10: A woyissa Й—e ne : В« ЕҠ hey tume Й“i rimkohan nga Й—a laay po Й“o' minuu Й“a kind. В»
16.11: A Й“aatiЙ—ta Й—e nga ne : В« ЖҠiski fu nik ndii, fu Й“arang haa ; fu hey raake kuЙ“u Жҙaar, teekaa Й—e Ismaayla (Kooh kerhiЙ—) laam NikiЙ—i kerhiЙ— miskiЙ—iЕӢ Й—a.
16.12: KuЙ“kiЕӢ Й—a pesan na haf ce findi mbaam sif raakaaЙ—i heЙ—, a heyЙ—i kerhiЙ—ohe na Й“ooЙ“a, Й“ooЙ“a kerhiЙ—ohanЙ—i na Й—e. A genan saЙ“sukohiЙ— na Й“aah ciЕӢ Й—e. В»
16.13: Haajara teekka NikiЙ—i woyee na Й—e "Ata-El-Roy" (Kooh yi na hote), laam a woo ne : В« Moo ЕӢ hotiЙ— Yi na hotee so e ? В»
16.14: Ineem tahha po laaheem teekuusa "Lahay-Roy" (PesЙ—i na hotee so) ; wa Й—aa ЕӢ harmban Kades na Bered.
16.15: ЕҠ finho ineem, Haajara raakka kuЙ“u, Ibram teekka Й—e Ismaayla.
16.16: Ibram raakeen kiis ndaЕӢkiyaah-yasna-kaahay na kiis yasna-yino (86), wa Haajara raakiЙ— Й—e Ismaayla.

17.1: Wa Ibram raak kiis ndaЕӢkiyaah-yasna-nikiis na yasna-nikiis (99), wa raakka mbeh, NikiЙ—i teeЙ“ukka Й—e, a woosa Й—e ne : В« E mi Koohi Min, pesa findi ЕӢ waaЙ—oh, fu nik yurhiЙ—.
17.2: ЕҠ hey ambtiЙ—ohe na Й—a te ЕӢ hey Й—a tume Й“asil. В»
17.3: Wa a kerah woo keem, Ibram Жҙekka po pukiЕӢ Й—e reesa kehЖҙi, Kooh taalndiЙ—ta woyeeЙ—a na Й—e,
17.4: a woosa Й—e ne : В« AmbtiЙ—ohiЕӢ ngo na Й—a, wa na hee tufkohe an : Fu hey nike baabiЕӢ Й“i cuuЙ“i cuuЙ“,
17.5: te fu teekissuuЙ—i Ibram (baab yakЙ—uuЙ—) waaye Ibrahiima (baabiЕӢ Й“i laayiЙ—), laam ЕӢ hey Й—a tume caaciЕӢ Й“i cuuЙ“ laayiЙ—.
17.6: ЕҠ hey Й—a tume Й“asil, Й“i cuuЙ“i cuuЙ“ hey pulohe nga Й—a, Й“i buur sah hey rimkohe nga Й—a.
17.7: ЕҠ hey ambtiЙ—ohe na Й—a, fu na Й“i na hee rimkohe nga Й—a, gomal nu nik, wa hey nike po faw. ЕҠ ineem ЕӢ hey nike KoohiЕӢ Й—a na Й“i na hee rimkohe nga Й—a.
17.8: Te kur ki fu nikoh jaambur wii, wa nikka Kanaan, ЕӢ hey Й—a wa one jen, fu na Й“i na hee rimkohe nga Й—a, Й—u raakoota po faw ; te Гұam na hee nike KoohiЕӢ Й“a. В»
17.9: ЕҠ finho ineem, Kooh woyissa Ibrahiima ne : В« E fu na hee taambkohe Й“akiЕӢ Й—a ЕӢ ambtiЙ—ohiЕӢ ngo na Й—a, fu na Й“i na hee rimkohe nga Й—a, gomal nu nik.
17.10: Taambkohohaat ambtiЙ—ohiЕӢ ngo na Й—u, fu na Й“i na hee rimkohe nga Й—a, an : Жіaar nu nik nga Й—u Й—ah, joyiЙ— nguЙ—uk,
17.11: nguЙ—keem weЙ—i na hee teeЙ“ohe ambtiЙ—ohiЕӢ ngo na Й—u.
17.12: Komaaki Жҙaar nu raak neeh yasna-kaahay Й—ah, a joyiЙ— nguЙ—uk ; na, gomal nu a min Й“aahoh Й—ah, yi rimohu ЕӢ kahan fu po yi romohu ЕӢ jaambra Й“aahЙ—i ЕӢ cuuЙ“iЕӢ Й—a.
17.13: ЖҒa jen Й“a joyiЙ— nguЙ—uk, a nik Гұaami rimkoh ЕӢ kahan fu mbaa yi fu rom na koporiЕӢ Й—a. Te nguЙ—ki na hee nike ЕӢ faan ciЕӢ Й—u, weЙ— ini na hee teeЙ“ohe ambtiЙ—ohiЕӢ ngo na Й—u po faw.
17.14: Жіaar nu nguЙ—ukЙ—i, te nik ne a sang sang Й—ah, a hey pulЙ—asse ЕӢ cuuЙ“iЕӢ Й—e laam raakan Й—e nguЙ—iЙ— ambtiЙ—ohi ЕӢ tufkiЙ—. В»
17.15: ЕҠ ineem Kooh woosa Ibrahiima ne : В« ЕҠ ini kaЙ— ЕӢ Й“itiifu, a teekissuuЙ—i Saraay ; waaye tiikiЕӢ Й—e wa Saarata kotii.
17.16: ЕҠ hey Й—e barke'Й—e, ЕӢ on Й—a kuЙ“u Жҙaar na Й—e, ЕӢ hey Й—e barke'Й—e, po a nikan caaciЕӢ Й“i cuuЙ“i cuuЙ“ ; Й“i buur sah hey pulohe nga Й—e. В»
17.17: Ibrahiima Жҙekissa po pukaЕӢ Й—e reesa kehЖҙi ; a Жҙennda, a woosa ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ ce ne : В« Moo Жҙaar na kiis teemet (100) minisiЙ— raak kuЙ“u e ? Te Saarata yii, na kiis ciЕӢ Й—e ndaЕӢkiyaah-yasna-nikiis (90) cii, hey raake kuЙ“u e ? В»
17.18: A woosa ne : В« A' ! Te fu amb ЕӢ Ismaayla rek ! В»
17.19: Kooh woosa Й—e ne : В« ЕҠ woo ne hee, Saarata hey raake kuЙ“u Жҙaar yi fu na hee teeke Isaahha , ЕӢ hey ambtiЙ—ohe na Й—e po faw, a yi na Й“i na hee rimkohe nga Й—e.
17.20: Ini kaЙ— ЕӢ Ismaayla, ЕӢ kerhiЙ— woo kiЕӢ Й—a, ЕӢ hey Й—e barke'Й—e, ЕӢ tum Й—e Й“asil, e kilifa ndaЕӢkiyaah na kanak (12) puloh nga Й—e te a fer cuuЙ“ angiЙ—.
17.21: Waaye ambtiЙ—ohiЕӢ ngo na Й—a nak, ЕӢ hey wa tufkiЙ—e na Isaahha, kuЙ“ki Saarata na hee raake maas. В»
17.22: Wa Kooh Жҙut woo na Ibrahiima, a faЙ—ta Й—e ndaam, a cootta ЕӢ Й—afka.
17.23: WeЙ—i Ibrahiima Й“ayoh kuЙ“kiЕӢ Й—e Ismaayla na ЖҙaaЙ“a rimohu kahna na Й“a a romoot na koporaЕӢ Й—e, Жҙaar ca nikee ЕӢ kahan ce jen, a nguЙ—ta Й“a ЕӢ noha mbaЙ—i ; findi Kooh woyoh Й—e wa.
17.24: Wa Ibrahiima na nguЙ—ke raak Й—e raakiЙ— kiis ndaЕӢkiyaah-yasna-nikiis na yasna-nikiis (99).
17.25: KuЙ“kiЕӢ Й—e Ismaayla nameen raak kiis ndaЕӢkiyaah na kaahay (13) wa a na nguЙ—ke.
17.26: ЕҠ noha mbaЙ—i, Ibrahiima na kuЙ“kiЕӢ Й—e Ismaayla nguЙ—ukka.
17.27: Жіaar caЕӢ kahan ce jen nammba nguЙ—uk na Й—e mbaЙ—i, Й“a rimohu nga, na Й“a a rome.

18.1: Wa nikee ЕӢ noh damiЙ—, NikiЙ—i teeЙ“ukka Ibrahiima ЕӢ kidig ca yakak caЕӢ Mamre, raak Й—e Й“oofiЙ— ЕӢ nguЙ“u Й—iipaЕӢ Й—e.
18.2: A jaЙ—tuk jaЙ—tuk, a hotta Й“o' kaahay ЕӢ fikiice, Ibrahiima kurukka ЕӢ Й—iska a Й“oofe, a arra kaЙ— coha na Й“a. Wa a ree, a ЖҙekiЙ—ta Й“a,
18.3: a woosa ne : В« Kilifaani, kana so taamboh an, mi yii kiim Й—a wa, wela ЕӢ kahni,
18.4: Й“a on Й—u masuЙ“ Й—u naawis kot ciЕӢ Й—u, Й—u iЙ—siЙ—uk ЕӢ saangni,
18.5: ЕӢ Й“ayiЙ— Й—u mbuuru Жҙissuut Й—u Й“aatuk hatil, Й—u han coot ; taambiЕӢ Й—u ЕӢ Й“oyi joy Й—u taambkoh nikuu Й“arang Й“arang. В» ЖҒa woosa Й—e ne : В« Ee, tuma findi fu woyoh. В»
18.6: Ibrahiima nuppa, a aassa ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ Й—iipa, a woosa Saarata ne : В« Ara Й“ay andaar mun kaahay ЕӢ wi uup baah, fu siiЙ“a, fu haЙ“iЙ— mbuuru. В»
18.7: Ibrahiima nupissa ЕӢ gat ca, a Й“ayya Й—oon faymiЙ—, a eЙ—ta Й—e Жҙaar ЕӢ Гұaam caЕӢ Й—e, a arra Й—e haЙ“iЙ—.
18.8: Wa sepet ca non, Ibrahiima deЖҙiЙ—ta Й“a ca na miis gundiЙ— na miis kal ; Й“a ГұameeЙ—a ЕӢ saangna, a tufukka ne a taambkoh Й“a.
18.9: ЖҒa meekissa Ibrahiima ne : В« A nde Й“itiifu Saarata ? В» A woosa Й“a ne : В« A yii ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ Й—iipi. В»
18.10: Yino nga Й“a woosa Й—e ne : В« Mi na woyee Й—u ini nik : ЕҠ hey dokkisse ndii maas, ЕӢ raakan Saarata Й“itiifu raakiЙ— kuЙ“u Жҙaar. В» Weem raak Saarata ЕӢ nguЙ“u Й—iipa, ЕӢ finho Й“oyi, a kerheeЙ—a Й“a.

21.14: ЕҠ Kooh-wiisiina, na Й“aaЙ“a teel, Ibrahiima Й“ayya mbuuru na mbohos und tumiЙ— masuЙ“, a eЙ—ta Haajara ca, a likiЙ—ta Й—e ca ЕӢ yuug, a nammba Й—e eЙ— kuЙ“kiЕӢ Й—e. Жіutta, a puliЙ—ta Й—e. Yeem kaЙ—eeЙ—a po a reesa bilaf faЕӢ Beerseba, a muuЖҙca.
21.15: Wa masmaЕӢ mbohosa reeh, Haajara faЙ—ta kuЙ“ka ЕӢ tas kidig Жҙin,
21.16: a tiinnda ini ree saangal teemet (100), a Й“ooffa, a woosa ЕӢ haf ce ne : В« ЕҠ minЙ—i marak muk, ЕӢ kakaan kiЕӢ kuЙ“kiЕӢ ngo. В» A cangtiЙ—ukka a fuЙ—eeЙ—a ЕӢ Й—afka.
21.17: Waaye Kooh kerhiЙ— hoosooraЕӢ kuЙ“ka. ЕҠ Й—afuk eel ci malaakaaniЕӢ Kooh Й“eeЙ—ukka Haajara, a woosa Й—e ne : В« Haajara, wa ye na Й—a ? Kana neЖҙЖҙoh ali in laam Kooh kerhiЙ— kuЙ“ki ЕӢ Й—iski a nik ndeem.
21.18: Kurka fu meeЙ“ Й—e, ambaa Й—e yaah kanak laam, ЕӢ hey fere cuuЙ“ angiЙ— nga Й—e. В»
21.19: Kooh teeЙ“pa Haajara woong, a soЙ—ta mbohosa nga, a aniЙ—ta kuЙ“ka.
21.20: -21 Kooh taambkoheeЙ—a komaaknda, a yakeeЙ—a ЕӢ bilaf faЕӢ Paran, a nikka weesoh Й“is. Yaay Й“a waakiЙ—ta Й—e Й“itiЙ“ ЕӢ Misra. AmbtiЙ—ohaЕӢ Ibrahiima na Abimelek
21.22: ЕҠ jamanoonaam, Abimelek hunnda na Pikol, Жҙaara adgohee hiГұohoh caЕӢ Й—e, a raakka Ibrahiima, a woosa Й—e ne : В« ЕҠ inhiЙ— ne Kooh huniЙ— na Й—a ЕӢ in nu fu haЙ“iЙ— Й—ah.
21.23: ЕҠ Й—iski wa nik ndii, giГұa ЕӢ Kooh ne fu heyЙ—i so njuye, mi na kuЙ“uuciЕӢ ngo po ЕӢ set ciЕӢ ngo na haye ; ne findi ЕӢ moЙ—Й—ohee na Й—a, fu moЙ—Й—ohan na so Й—aa na Й“ooЙ“iЕӢ kur ki fu parЙ—oh wii. В»
21.24: Ibrahiima woosa ne : В« ЕҠ giГұiЙ—a. В»
21.25: A nammba woo na Abimelek ЕӢ ini kaЙ— ЕӢ naaca ЖҙaaЙ“aЕӢ Abimelek naafee nga Й—e.
21.26: Abimelek loffa Й—e ne : В« ЕҠ inahЙ—i Й“oyi tum ineem te fu woyeeЙ—i so wa, ЕӢ hana kerah woti. В»
21.27: Ibrahiima Й“ayya Й“i pe', mbaal na inoh, a eЙ—ta Abimelek ca ; ЕӢ ineem, Й“a kanak, Й“a tufkiЙ—ta ambtiЙ—ohaЕӢ Й“a.
21.28: Wa Й“a tufkiЙ—a, Ibrahiima Й“akiЙ—ta mbaal yasna-kanak.
21.29: Abimelek meekissa Й—e ne : В« Moo mbaal ci yasna-kanak ci fu Й“akiЙ— nak ? В»
21.30: A loffa Й—e ne : В« Teya mbaal ci yasna-kanak cii ЕӢ tiikiЕӢ ngo, weЙ— teeЙ“oh ne, e mi ac naacii. В»
21.31: WeЙ—i tah Й—iska teekuusa Beerseba (naaciЕӢ giГұi), laam, Й“a kanak jen Й“a giГұoh ndaam.
21.32: ЖҒa tufkiЙ—oh ambtiЙ—ohaЕӢ Й“a Й—aa ЕӢ Beerseba. Жіutta, Abimelek hunnda na Pikol, Жҙaara adgohee hiГұohoh caЕӢ Й—e, Й“a guridda ЕӢ kur kaЕӢ Filistiica.
21.33: Ibrahiima jimmba tas kaЙ—eeЙ— ЕӢ Beerseba, a Гұaamukka NikiЙ—i, Koohi moos nik te a yi nikan po faw.
21.34: Ibrahiima gennda in maaГұiЙ— ЕӢ kur kaЕӢ Filistiica.

22.1: Wa in ceem coot, wa raakka mbeh, Kooh markiskeeЙ—a Ibrahiima, a woosa Й—e ne : В« Ibrahiima ! В» Yeem loffa Й—e ne : В« Ee, mi yii kerah Й—a. В»
22.2: Kooh taalndiЙ—ta ne : В« ЖҒaya kuЙ“kiЕӢ Й—a yinoori Isaahha, yi fu waaЙ— ЕӢ keeГұiЕӢ Й—a, fu kaЙ— ЕӢ tangoora maa hee Й—a teeЙ“e ЕӢ kur kaЕӢ Moriya, fu seeЖҙkoh Й—e ЕӢ ndaam, a nik hoomЙ—aah wuu so. В»
22.3: Ibrahiima kurukka na Й“aaЙ“a teel, a Й“essa sokoГұ seeЖҙkoha, a siffa mbaamaЕӢ Й—e, a hunnda na Гұaam kanak ЕӢ Гұaam caЕӢ Й—e, na kuЙ“kiЕӢ Й—e Isaahha ; Й“a kaЙ—eeЙ—a Й—iska Kooh woyee Й—e.
22.4: ЕҠ neeha kaahayЙ—oh, Ibrahiima Жҙokka Й—iska Kooh woyee Й—e in usiЙ—.
22.5: A woosa Гұaam caЕӢ Й—e ne : В« Tasaat ndii na mbaami, mi na njaanji, Й“oo kaЙ— Гұaamka Kooh ndeen, Й“oo hay. В»
22.6: Ibrahiima Й“ayya sokoГұ ca seeЖҙkohaaca, a raannda Isaahha ca, a Й“ayootta yongkaaha na japla. ЖҒa hunnda kanak, Й“a kaЙ—eeЙ—a.
22.7: ЖҒa kaЙ—oh kaЙ—oh po, Isaahha woosa baabiЕӢ Й—e ne : В« Baab ! В» A tahassa Й—e ne : В« Ee, mi yii kerah Й—a. В» KuЙ“ka meekissa Й—e ne : В« SokoГұ ci ceЙ—i cii, yongkaahi weЙ—i wii, moo a nde mbaali joy seeЖҙkohu ? В»
22.8: Ibrahiima loffa Й—e ne : В« E Kooh ЕӢ haf ce na hee eЙ—ohe mbaali joy seeЖҙkohu. В» ЖҒa taalndiЙ—ta kanak, Й“a kaЙ—eeЙ—a.
22.9: Wa Й“a ree Й—iska Kooh woyee Й—e, Ibrahiima haЙ“iЙ—ta seeЖҙkoha, a degga sokoГұ ca nga, a tokka kuЙ“kiЕӢ Й—e Isaahha, a degga Й—e ЕӢ sokoГұ ca.
22.10: Ibrahiima meeЙ“pa japla ne a hoos kuЙ“kiЕӢ Й—e,
22.11: waaye malaakaaniЕӢ NikiЙ—i Й“eeЙ—ukka Й—e ЕӢ eel ci, a woosa Й—e ne : В« Ibrahiima ! Ibrahiima ! В» A tahassa Й—e ne : В« Ee, mi yii kerah Й—a. В»
22.12: Malaakaani woosa Й—e ne : В« Kana reЙ“ kuЙ“ki, kanaa Й—e tum in. ЕҠ inhiЙ— kotii ne, fu nupiЙ— Kooh laam, fu sangiЙ—Й—i so kuЙ“kiЕӢ Й—a yinoori. В»
22.13: Ibrahiima jaЙ—tukka, a hotta mbaal naar na wiic ca longiЙ— ЕӢ kidig Жҙin ; a Й“ayya Й—e, a hoomiЙ—ta Й—e ЕӢ Й—iska Isaahha joyee seeЖҙkohu.
22.14: Ibrahiima teekka Й—iska "NikiЙ—i eЙ—ohiЙ— ini etohu." WeЙ—i tah waam po woti Й“a na woye ne : В« ЕҠ tangooraЕӢ NikiЙ—i, a hey eЙ—ohe ini etohu. В»
22.15: ЕҠ eel ci, malaakaaniЕӢ NikiЙ—i Й“eeЙ—kissa Ibrahiima,
22.16: a woosa Й—e ini NikiЙ—i woo wii : В« ЕҠ giГұiЙ— nga so mi yii ne, ЕӢ tumi fu tum ineem, fu sangiЙ—Й—i so kuЙ“kiЕӢ Й—a yinoori,
22.17: ЕӢ hey Й—a barke'Й—e baahiЙ—, ЕӢ on Й—a Й“i rimkohan nga Й—a laay po Й“a hend na hor ciЕӢ eel ci, po Й“o' minuu Й“a kind findi merhey miЕӢ yaah-cookmi. Te Й“eЙ— na hee mine Й“i sang Й“a jen ;
22.18: cuuЙ“ ciЕӢ kehЖҙi jen hey raake barke sagu Й“i na hee rimkohe nga Й—a, laam fu kerhiЙ—iЙ— to. В»
22.19: Ibrahiima dokukka ЕӢ Й—iska a faЙ—e Гұaam caЕӢ Й—e, Й“a hunnda jen Й“a haadeeЙ—a Beerseba laam, a risee gen nga. ЖҒi rimkoh ЕӢ Nahor taambЙ—oh Ibrahiima
22.20: E Ibrahiima nikoh ЕӢ Beerseba po, a woyuusa an : В« Nahor taambЙ—oh fu namiЙ— raak Й“i kuЙ“u Жҙaar na Й“itiice Milka. В»
22.21: ЖҒa saawkoh Uus, Bus taammba nga, Kemuwel yi baab Й“i Aram,
22.22: Kesed, Haaso, Pildas, Yidlaf na Betuwel.
22.23: Betuwel a yi rim Rebeka ; Й“ii Й“eЙ— kuЙ“u Жҙaar ci yasna-kaahay ci Milka raak na Nahor, taambЙ—oh Ibrahiima.
22.24: Nahor nameen raak kilook ЕӢ Гұaam caЕӢ Й—e na woyse Rewuma, a raakka na Й—e Tebaa, Gaham, Tahas na Ma'akaa.

23.1: Saarata pesiЙ— kiis teemet na kiis ndaЕӢkiyaah-kanak na yasna-kanak (127) a hannda kuruk nga.
23.2: A kaanoh ЕӢ Kiriyat-Arba, weЙ— Hebron, ЕӢ kur kaЕӢ Kanaan. Ibrahiima miskiЙ—ukka kakaan kaЕӢ Saarata ; a fuЙ—ta Й—e lool.
23.3: Жіutta, Ibrahiima faЙ—ta fiЙ—aafa ЕӢ Й—iska wa nik, a kaЙ—ta hotoha na cuuЙ“aЕӢ Hit ca.
23.4: Wa Ibrahiima ree, a woosa Й“a ne : В« ЕҠ jaambur nga Й—u, ЕӢ nikohaah nikohaah ЕӢ ndii, mi yii kiim Й—u ne Й—u on ndo ЕӢ waak ruy-ruyi mi na hee uumbohe fiЙ—aafiЕӢ Й“itiiso. В»
23.6: В« SikЙ—uka ini Й“oo na wee Й—a ; Kooh tumiЙ— Й—a kilifa yakak ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ Й“oo, kon mbaa Й—ah, kooЙ—a wi neЙ“ Й—a ЕӢ ruy-ruy ciЕӢ Й“oo, fu uumb Й“itiifu nga ; nama inah ne ali Й“o' heyЙ—i Й—a sangohe Й—iski fu joy uumb Й“itiifu. В»
23.7: Wa Ibrahiima kerah woo keem, a kurukka, a hiirra ЕӢ fiki Hit ca genee ЕӢ kur ka.
23.8: Жіutta, a hannda Й“a woo ne : В« Nik ne Й—u teyЙ—ukiЙ— ne ЕӢ uumb Й“itiiso ndii Й—ah, kiimaat Efron, kuЙ“kiЕӢ Sohar,
23.9: a faЙ—iЙ— to huraЕӢ atoh faЕӢ Й—e nik ЕӢ Makpela, weЙ—aa ЕӢ sereendaЕӢ yohon ce ; kiimaat Й—e a toon ndo wa ЕӢ candoomiЕӢ wa po wa nik ruy-ruyi ЕӢ raakoot ЕӢ fikiiЙ—u. В»
23.10: Wa Ibrahiima na wee, raak Efron Й“oofiЙ— ЕӢ harmban Й“aah caЕӢ Й—e Hit ca. ЕҠ fiki Hit ca cohee ЕӢ Й—iska jen, ЕӢ aasohaanaЕӢ kur ka, Efron loffa Ibrahiima ЕӢ Й—afka ne :
23.11: В« On ndo ЕӢ woo Й—a kilifaani, Й“aya Й“ay yohna na huraЕӢ atoh fa ; ЕӢ fiki Й“ooЙ“iЕӢ ngo, ЕӢ on Й—a wa, fu tuma ruy-ruyiЕӢ Й“itiifu. В»
23.12: ЕҠ woo keem, Ibrahiima hiirissa ЕӢ fiki Й“ooЙ“aЕӢ kur ka.
23.13: Жіutta, a woosa Efron ЕӢ Й—afka ne : В« ЖҒoo kanaata nookoh, faЙ—a ЕӢ eЙ— Й—a candoomiЕӢ yohni ; teya haalsi po ЕӢ min uumb Й“itiiso. В»
23.15: В« Kilifaani, yohni na care Жҙel haalis teemet-nikiis (400), ineem ye ЕӢ harmban mi na Й—a ? Kon fu miniЙ— uumb Й“itiifu nga. В»
23.16: Ibrahiima kerahha woo ka, a eЙ—ohha candooma Efron woo ЕӢ fiki Hit ca, wa nikka Жҙel teemet-nikiis (400) ЕӢ haalis, Й“eesuuЙ— ЕӢ findi toonoh caam meeЙ— tumoh.
23.17: Ibrahiima raakoh yohon Efron Й—aa, wa nikee ЕӢ Makpela, ЕӢ pulohaaЙ—-nohaЕӢ Mamre. Yohna, po Й—iska wa top, na kidig ca nikee ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙa na huraЕӢ atoh fa ;
23.18: ca nikka raakuuЙ—aЕӢ Ibrahiima ЕӢ fiki Hit ca cohee ЕӢ aasohaanaЕӢ kur ka jen.
23.19: Wa a puloh nga, Ibrahiima Й“ekka fiЙ—aafaЕӢ Й“itiice Saarata ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ huraЕӢ atoh fa nik ЕӢ yohna ЕӢ Makpela ЕӢ pulohaaЙ—-nohaЕӢ Mamre, weЙ— Hebron, ЕӢ kur kaЕӢ Kanaan, wa nikka ruy-ruyaЕӢ Й—e.
23.20: Hit ca teyЙ—ukka ne, e Ibrahiima raak huraЕӢ atoh fa na yohna ; tahha po a tummba Й—iska ruy-ruy caЕӢ Й—e.

24.1: Ibrahiima yaЙ“ko'een lool, te NikiЙ—i barke'Й—een Й—e ЕӢ in nu nik Й—ah.
24.2: Wa raakka mbeh, Ibrahiima woosa Гұaama yakka ЕӢ Гұaam caЕӢ Й—e, ya meeЙ— taambkoh raak-raakaЕӢ Й—e jen ne : В« OoЙ“a yaahiЕӢ Й—a ЕӢ rambiЕӢ ngo,
24.3: fu giГұiЙ— to ЕӢ NikiЙ—i, Kooh yi HeЙ— Й—afki na kehЖҙi, ne fu heyЙ—i waakЙ—e kuЙ“kiЕӢ ngo Й“itiЙ“ ЕӢ cafaЖҙ ciЕӢ Kanaan, kur ki ЕӢ genoh wii,
24.4: waaye fu na hee kaЙ—e po ЕӢ kur Й“oo, ЕӢ Й“ooЙ“aЕӢ ngo, fu waakiЙ— kuЙ“kiЕӢ ngo Isaahha Й“itiЙ“ nga. В»
24.5: Г‘aama loffa Й—e ne : В« Wa miniЙ— nik ne Й“itЙ“eem teyЙ—ukanЙ—i hay na so ЕӢ kur kii, andi maa hee hey Й“ayndohe kuЙ“kiЕӢ Й—a po ЕӢ kur ka fu puloh ? В»
24.6: Ibrahiima woosa Й—e ne : В« Muk, kana moos Й“ay kuЙ“kiЕӢ ngo ЕӢ ndaam.
24.7: Laam NikiЙ—i, Kooh yiЕӢ Й—afki, yi pulЙ—oh ho kahan baab na kur Й“oo, woyiЙ— na so, a giГұiЙ—ta so ne a hey one Й“i rimkohan nga so kur kii jen ; a yi na hee woose malaakaaniЕӢ Й—e, yeem yooЙ“Й—iЙ— Й—a waasiЕӢ Й—a po, fu Й“ayohiЙ— kuЙ“kiЕӢ ngo Й“itiЙ“ ЕӢ ndaam.
24.8: Nik ne Й“itЙ“eem teyЙ—ukanЙ—i hay na Й—a Й—ah, giГұi fu na hee giГұe wii, wa hey Й—a ruhse, waaye findi wa min mand Й—ah, kana Й“ay kuЙ“kiЕӢ ngo ndaam. В»
24.9: Г‘aama ooЙ“pa yaahaЕӢ Й—e ЕӢ rambaЕӢ Ibrahiima kilifaanaЕӢ Й—e, a giГұiЙ—ta Й—e ineem.
24.10: Wa a Жҙut, Гұaama Й“ayya ngeelemb ndaЕӢkiyaah ЕӢ caЕӢ kilifaanaЕӢ Й—e na ina uup baah ЕӢ raak-raakaЕӢ kilifaanaЕӢ Й—e, a yurahha kur ka Nahor genohe, ЕӢ Й“ak Mesopotami.
24.11: A na huntoh caЕӢ Й—e, Й“a kaЙ—oh kaЙ—oh po Й“a reesa ЕӢ woong ne fu aasee ЕӢ kur ka Й—ah, a ЖҙekiЙ—ta ngeelemb ca ; wa nikee ЕӢ noh niiniЙ—, wahtuuni Й“itiЙ“ ca na pulohe ne Й“a kaЙ— neya.
24.12: A woosa ne : В« Mi yii kiim Й—a NikiЙ—i, KoohiЕӢ kilifaaniЕӢ ngo Ibrahiima, teyЙ—ukiЙ— to waasiЕӢ ngo wii, fu baahoha kilifaaniЕӢ ngo Ibrahiima.
24.13: Г‘am yii tufukka ЕӢ woongiЕӢ masmi, te cafaЖҙ ciЕӢ kur ki hey haye neye.
24.14: ЕҠ waaЙ— ne cafЖҙi mi na hee kiime masuЙ“, a naar meemeeniЕӢ Й—e a on ndo ЕӢ an, a nam woo ne, a hey yo anЙ—iЙ—e ngeelemb ci ; yeem a yi nikaat yi fu ambiЙ— ГұaamiЕӢ Й—a Isaahha. Ineem hey yo inhiЙ—e ne fu teeЙ“ohiЙ— baah kiЕӢ Й—a ЕӢ kilifaaniЕӢ ngo. В»
24.15: A reehiЙ—Й—i kiim ndoom, cafaЖҙ pulla na meeme ЕӢ yuugaЕӢ Й—e ; a nikka Rebeka, kuЙ“u Betuwel ; Betuwel yi baab Й“i kuЙ“ki, a Milka yaayiЕӢ Й—e, Nahor yi taambЙ—oh Ibrahiima, nikka baabiЕӢ Й—e.
24.16: A nikee komaaki cafaЖҙ moЙ—iЙ—, inhaaЙ—i Жҙaar. A aassa ЕӢ woonga, a neyya meemeena po a pulla.
24.17: WeЙ— ГұaamaЕӢ Ibrahiima aroh kaЙ— coha na Й—e, a woosa Й—e ne : В« Kaambsuka, fu on ndo ЕӢ an Жҙissuut ne wa neЙ“ Й—a Й—ah. В»
24.18: Rebeka loffa Й—e ne : В« Ee, ana kilifaani. В» A arra kaambsuk, a naariЙ—ta Й—e meemeena, a aneeЙ—a.
24.19: Wa Rebeka Жҙut, a woosa Й—e ne : В« FaЙ—a ЕӢ nam aniЙ— ngeelemb ci po ca hiЖҙ. В»
24.20: A artukka, a yiiffa ina tasee ЕӢ hongla na anЙ—ohse ; a dokkissa ЕӢ woonga. A yi neyoh neyoh po a aniЙ—ta ngeelemb ca jen.
24.21: Жіaara Й—ekka teЙ—, markeeЙ—a Й—e ne a inah, andi NikiЙ—i teyЙ—ukЙ—iЙ— Й—e waasiЕӢ Й—e wala.
24.22: Wa a aniЙ— ngeelemb ca po a Жҙutta, Жҙaara Й“ayya tokkaah ЕӢ kiГұin tiЙ“uuЙ— na garam yasna-yino ngaЕӢ urus, na kiГұi kanak urus Й“ekaah ЕӢ yaah, waa nu nga Й—ah, tiЙ“ohu ini uup garam teemet (100).
24.23: A meekissa Й—e ne : В« Woo so, fu kuЙ“u Й“a ? ЖҒoo raakiЙ— Й—iski Й“oo min neeh ngaЕӢ kahan baab Й—u e ? В»
24.24: Rebeka loffa Й—e ne : В« ЕҠ kuЙ“u Betuwel, ЕӢ setiЕӢ Milka na Nahor.
24.25: Ee, kahan baab Й“oo raakiЙ— mbaang ne ngeelemb ci raak Й—iski ca na hee neehe na Гұamaah laayiЙ—, te wa raakiЙ— Й—iski Й—u joy min neeh. В»
24.26: Жіaara Жҙekka po pukaЕӢ Й—e reesa kehЖҙi ne a Гұaamuk NikiЙ—i.
24.27: A woosa ne : В« Corka NikiЙ—i, KoohiЕӢ kilifaaniЕӢ ngo Ibrahiima ; fu teeЙ“ohiЙ— baah kiЕӢ Й—a nga Й—e te fu moosЙ—i Й—e faЙ—oh ! Ini kaЙ— nga so, fu yurhiЙ—iЙ— to po ЕӢ Й“aah ciЕӢ kilifaaniЕӢ ngo. В»
24.28: Wa kuЙ“ka cafЖҙa puloh ndaam, a arra kaЙ—, a naandsukka Й“i kahan yaay Й“a ina raak jen.
24.29: Rebeka raakeen taambЙ—oh Жҙaar na woyse Laban, Laban kaЙ—ta raaka Жҙaara ЕӢ sero woonga.
24.30: Weem, raak Й—e hoteen tokkaahaЕӢ kiГұin ka na kiГұiica taambЙ—oh ce Й“ekЙ—asse, a nameen kerah wi Rebeka na naandsuke ina Жҙaara woyee na Й—e. A raakka Жҙaara na ngeelemb caЕӢ Й—e ЕӢ sero woonga.
24.31: A woosa Й—e ne : В« Fu yi NikiЙ—i barke'iЙ—, fu Й“oof ye ЕӢ bilaf fii ? Haya Й“oo kaЙ— kahna, ЕӢ haЙ“Й—iЙ—iЙ— Й—u daloha na Й—iski ngeelemb ci nikan. В»
24.32: Wa Жҙaara ree kahna, Й“a nihissa unung caЕӢ ngeelemb ca, ca Й“ekuusa ЕӢ Й—isik baahiЙ—, ca onuusa mbaang na Гұamaah. Жіaara na Й“a hunee na Й—e, onuusa masuЙ“, Й“a naawissa kot.
24.33: ЖҒa nammba deЖҙЖҙu kaГұam, waaye, Жҙaara woosa ne : В« Bala ЕӢ Гұaman Й—ah, ЕӢ woo kot ci ЕӢ tiind. В» Laban woosa Й—e ne : В« Ee, woya. В»
24.34: A woosa ne : В« Mi deey, ЕӢ ГұaamiЕӢ Ibrahiima.
24.35: NikiЙ—i barke'Й—iЙ— kilifaaniЕӢ ngo lool, a tumiЙ— Й—e Й“o' raakiЙ—. A oniЙ— Й—e Й“i pe', mbaal, na inoh, urus na haalis na Й“i Гұaam Жҙaar na Й“itiЙ“ na ngeelemb na mbaam.
24.36: ЖҒitiice Saarata, a kaЙ—een po a Й“itiffa, a hannda raak na Й—e kuЙ“u. KuЙ“keem, a yi Ibrahiima kilifaaniЕӢ ngo eЙ— raak-raak kiЕӢ Й—e jen.
24.37: KilifaaniЕӢ ngo giГұЙ—ukohha so ne : вҖң Fu heyЙ—i waakЙ—e kuЙ“kiЕӢ ngo Жҙaari Й“itiЙ“ ЕӢ cafaЖҙ ciЕӢ Kanaan, kur ki ЕӢ genoh wii ;
24.38: waaye, fu na hee kaЙ—e po ЕӢ Й“ooЙ“aЕӢ ngo ЕӢ kahan baab, fu Й“ayiЙ— Й—e Й“itiЙ“ nga. вҖқ
24.39: ЕҠ woosa kilifaaniЕӢ ngo ne : вҖң Nik ne Й“itЙ“eem teyЙ—ukanЙ—i hay na so Й—ah ? вҖқ
24.40: A loffa so ne : вҖң NikiЙ—i, yi ЕӢ moos taamboh ЕӢ ini a waaЙ—, hey woose malaakaaniЕӢ Й—e, a yooЙ“Й—iЙ— Й—a waasiЕӢ Й—a. Fu hey Й“ayЙ—e kuЙ“kiЕӢ ngo Й“itiЙ“ ЕӢ cuuЙ“iЕӢ ngo, ЕӢ kahan baab Й“oo.
24.41: Ali Й“a teyЙ—ukЙ—i, giГұi fu na hee giГұe, wa hey Й—a ruhse nik ne fu kaЙ—iЙ— po ЕӢ ndaam Й—ah. вҖқ
24.42: Woti, wi ЕӢ hay po ЕӢ reesa ЕӢ woongi, ЕӢ kiimmba an : вҖң NikiЙ—i, KoohiЕӢ kilifaaniЕӢ ngo Ibrahiima, nik ne fu hey yooЙ“Й—e waasiЕӢ ngo Й—ah,
24.43: Гұam yii ЕӢ sero woongi. ЕҠ waaЙ— ne cafЖҙi na hee neye, ЕӢ kiim Й—e masuЙ“ Жҙissuut ЕӢ meemeeniЕӢ Й—e,
24.44: a on ndo ЕӢ an, a nam woo ne, a hey yo anЙ—iЙ—e ngeelemb ci ; yeem a yi nikaat yi fu ambiЙ— kuЙ“kiЕӢ kilifaaniЕӢ ngo. вҖқ
24.45: ЕҠ ЖҙutЙ—i woo ЕӢ haf fo ndoom, Rebeka pulla na meemeeni ЕӢ yuugiЕӢ Й—e. A ruhussa ЕӢ woongi, a neyya masuЙ“. ЕҠ woosa Й—e ne : вҖң On ndo ЕӢ an. вҖқ
24.46: A arra kaambsuk, a naariЙ—ta so meemeeni. A woosa so ne : вҖң Ana, fu Жҙut Й—ah, ЕӢ aniЙ— ngeelemb ci. вҖқ ЕҠ annda, a aniЙ—ta ngeelemb ci.
24.47: WeЙ— ЕӢ meeksoh Й—e ne : вҖң Fu kuЙ“u Й“a ? вҖқ A woosa so ne : вҖң ЕҠ kuЙ“u Betuwel, yiЕӢ Milka na Nahor. вҖқ ЕҠ Й“ekiЙ—ta Й—e tokkaahi ЕӢ kiГұin kiЕӢ Й—e na kiГұiici ЕӢ yaah ciЕӢ Й—e.
24.48: Жіutta, ЕӢ Жҙekka ЕӢ kehЖҙi ne ЕӢ Гұaamuk NikiЙ—i KoohiЕӢ kilifaaniЕӢ ngo Ibrahiima, a yi amboh ho po ЕӢ miniЙ— Й“ayiЙ— kuЙ“kiЕӢ Й—e Isaahha Й“itiЙ“, setiЕӢ taambЙ—oh ce Nahor.
24.49: Mbaa Й—iski wa nik ndii, e Й—u na hee so woye andi Й—u ris amb kilifaaniЕӢ ngo ne Й—u teeЙ“oh baah kiЕӢ Й—u nga Й—e ; wa nikЙ—i Й—ah, ЕӢ inah findi ЕӢ tuman. В»
24.50: Laban na Betuwel loffa Й—e ne : В« Inii deey, wa puloh ЕӢ NikiЙ—i ; Й“oo raakЙ—i woyaah nga.
24.51: Rebeka a yeem ЕӢ fikiifu, Й“ayaa Й—e, a nik Й“iti kuЙ“kiЕӢ kilifaaniЕӢ Й—a findi NikiЙ—i waaЙ—oh. В»
24.52: Wa ГұaamiЕӢ Ibrahiima kerah woo ceem, a ЖҙekiЙ—ta NikiЙ—i po pukiЕӢ Й—e reesa kehЖҙi.
24.53: Жіutta, a puliЙ—ta Й“i in tiЙ“uuЙ— ЕӢ haalis na urus, na Й“i ndima, a eЙ—ta Rebeka. A nammba Й“ay alal keeh-keeh, a onnda yaaya na Laban, taambЙ—oh kuЙ“ka cafЖҙa.
24.54: ЖҒa hannda Гұam kotii, Й“a annda, a yi na huntoh caЕӢ Й—e ; Й“a neehha nga po na Й“aaЙ“a. Wa Й“a kuruk, ГұaamaЕӢ Ibrahiima woosa ne : В« Onaat to ЕӢ haad ЕӢ kilifaaniЕӢ ngo. В»
24.55: TaambЙ—oh Rebeka na yaayiЕӢ Й—e woosa Й—e ne : В« Ona Й“oo, kuЙ“ki cafЖҙi nik na Й“oo Жҙissuut, ini ree neeh ndaЕӢkiyaah dong ; Жҙut Й—ah, fu kaЙ— na Й—e. В»
24.56: A loffa Й“a ne : В« Kanaat to Й—aak, laam NikiЙ—i yooЙ“Й—iЙ—iЙ— to waasiЕӢ ngo po ЖҙutiЙ— ; onaat to ЕӢ gurid ЕӢ kilifaaniЕӢ ngo. В»
24.57: ЖҒa woosa Й—e ne : В« Po woti. Mbaa Й—ah, Й“oo Й“eeЙ—kaat cafЖҙi a woo ini a liiЙ“ nga. В»
24.58: ЖҒa Й“eeЙ—ukka Rebeka, Й“a meekissa Й—e ne : В« Andi fu waaЙ—iЙ— kaЙ— na Жҙaarii woti ? В» A woosa Й“a ne : В« Ee. В»
24.59: ЖҒa ambsohha Й—e na Й“oya meeЙ— Й—e Й“apiЙ— na ГұaamaЕӢ Ibrahiima na Й“a hunee na Й—e, Й“a askohha na Й“a.
24.60: ЖҒa kiimiЙ—ta Й—e an : В« Kooh barke'Й—aat Й—a, gooyiЕӢ Й“oo, a tum Й—a Й“asil, te Й“i rimkohan nga Й—a degaat Й“i sang Й“a yaah. В»
24.61: Rebeka hunnda na Гұaam caЕӢ Й—e Й“itiЙ“ ca, Й“a rappa ngeelemb ca, Й“a kaЙ—eeЙ—a na ГұaamaЕӢ Ibrahiima.
24.62: Waam, raak Isaahha pulohiЙ— Lahay-Roy, a gennda Negef.
24.63: Wa raakka niin, a tiindsukeeЙ—a ЕӢ nduuf-nduufa ; a jaЙ—tuk jaЙ—tuk, a Жҙokka Й“i ngeelemb hayeeЙ—a.
24.64: ЕҠ Й—afuk ngeelmba a rape, Rebeka nammba hot Isaahha, a ruhussa.
24.65: A meekissa Гұaama ne : В« Moo, Жҙaara na hee cohe na Й“oo ЕӢ nduuf-nduufa yen, e Й“a ? В» Г‘aama woosa Й—e ne : В« A kilifaaniЕӢ ngo. В» Rebeka muurukka.
24.66: Wa Й“a coh, Гұaama naandsukka Isaahha findi wa kaЙ—oh jen.
24.67: Isaahha Й“ayya Rebeka Й“itiЙ“, a waaЙ—ta Й—e lool. A Й“ekka Й—e ЕӢ Й—iipaЕӢ yaay Й“a, Saarata. Ineem weЙ— giifiЙ— Isaahha ЕӢ kakaan kaЕӢ yaay Й“a.

25.1: Ibrahiima nameen tok Й“itiЙ“ wiiriis teeku Ketura.
25.2: A raakeen na Й—e kuЙ“u Жҙaar yasna-yino : Simraan na Yoksan, Medaan, Majaan, Yisbak na Suwa.
25.3: Yoksan, a yi baab Й“i Sabaa na Deedaan ; Deedaan nikka caaciЕӢ Asuur ci na Letuus ci na Lewuum ci.
25.4: Majaan, a yi baabiЕӢ Eefa na Eefer, Hanook, Abida na Elda'ah. ЖҒii jen Й“a kuЙ“uuciЕӢ Ketura na set ciЕӢ Й—e.
25.5: Ibrahiima eЙ—een Isaahha raak-raak kaЕӢ Й—e ne a lama.
25.6: ЕҠ ini kaЙ— ЕӢ kuЙ“uucaЕӢ Й“itiЙ“ caЕӢ Й—e Й“inooЙ“a, a nameen Й“a on ЕӢ raak-raaka wa a na pese, a cootiЙ—ta Й“a ЕӢ kur, ЕӢ Й“ak pulohaaЙ—-noh po, Й“a ussa Isaahha, kuЙ“kiЕӢ Й—e.
25.7: Ibrahiima pesiЙ— kiis teemet na ndaЕӢkiyaah-yasna-kanak na kiis yatuus (175) nde a kurukka nga.
25.8: A kaan ЕӢ kiyaЙ“ko neЙ“iЙ—, ЕӢ finho kipes hutiЙ—, a haadda Jaanim.
25.9: KuЙ“uuciЕӢ Й—e Isaahha na Ismaayla uummba Й—e ЕӢ huraЕӢ atoh fa nik Makpela, wa ЕӢ fiki Mamre ЕӢ yohon Efron, kuЙ“kaЕӢ Sohar, ya Й“aahe ЕӢ Hit ca.
25.10: Yohneem weЙ— Ibrahiima romee ЕӢ Hit ca. A yi na Й“itiice Saarata, Й“a uumbu nga.
25.11: ЕҠ finho kakaan kaЕӢ Ibrahiima, Kooh barke'iЙ—ta Isaahha. A yi Isaahha, a genee ЕӢ sero laaha teeku Lahay-Roy. ЖҒi rimkoh ЕӢ Ismaayla
25.12: Inii weЙ— naandsuku ЕӢ Ismaayla na Й“i rimkoh nga Й—e, kuЙ“ki Ibrahiima raakee na Haajara, yi pulohee Misra, ГұaamaЕӢ Saarata.
25.13: Tiik ciЕӢ Й“a ceЙ—i cii : Nebayot a yi saawi, taammba nga Kedaar, taambissa nga Aadabel, na Mipsam,
25.15: Hadad, Teema, Yeetur, Nafis po gannga ЕӢ Keedama.
25.16: ЖҒii Й“eЙ— kuЙ“uuciЕӢ Ismaayla Жҙaar ci, tiik ciЕӢ Й“a ceЙ—i ceem. ЖҒa nikka kilifa ndaЕӢkiyaah na kanak (12) Й“i fu inah ne kur ca na ndut ca Й“a adgohee teeksee nga Й“a.
25.17: Ismaayla pesiЙ— kiis teemet na ndaЕӢkiyaah-kaahay na kiis yasna-kanak (137), a kurukka nga, a haadda Jaanim.
25.18: ЖҒi rimkoh nga Й—e genee ЕӢ harmban Hawiilaa na Suur, ЕӢ pulohaaЙ—-nohaЕӢ Misra, ЕӢ waas Assuur. ЖҒa genoh Й—aa, saЙ“sukohiЙ— na Й“aah caЕӢ Й“a. RaakuukaЕӢ siis ca : Esaaw na YaЕӢhooЙ“a
25.19: Inii weЙ— naandsuku ЕӢ Isaahha na kahan ce ; Isaahha nikee kuЙ“u Ibrahiima.
25.20: Wa a raak kiis ndaЕӢkiyaah-nikiis (40), a Й“ayya Rebeka Й“itiЙ“, taambЙ—oh Laban. Rebeka namee nik kuЙ“u Betuwel ; Й“eЙ— Й“eem, Й“a Й“aahee ЕӢ cuuЙ“aЕӢ Aram ca, Й“a genee Paddan-Aram.
25.21: Waaye Rebeka mineeЙ—i raak kuЙ“u, a ineem tah po, Isaahha kiimmba NikiЙ—i ЕӢ ini kaЙ— ЕӢ Й“itiice, NikiЙ—i teyЙ—ukiЙ—ta Й—e ; Rebeka ammba rook.
25.22: Wa a amb rook, kuЙ“u kanak hiГұoheeЙ—a ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ rookiЕӢ Й—e, a woosa ne : В« Wa ye tah wa kaЙ—ohha an nga so ? В» A kaЙ—ta meeksa NikiЙ—i.
25.23: NikiЙ—i woosa Й—e ne : В« Ca cuuЙ“ kanak nik ЕӢ rookiЕӢ Й—a, cuuЙ“ kanak Й—alohiЙ— hey rimkohe nga Й—a ; winoori hey uupЙ—e wi tas hatil, te yi Жҙini hey yilfe yi yakki. В»
25.24: Wa noha a joyee Й“asloh ree, laam-laam raakЙ—i nga, Й“a nikangannga siis.
25.25: Ya Й—eЙ“ raaku nikka ruumind coy, a riiffa na find haa a Й“eku kulЙ“a, Й“a teekka Й—e Esaaw.
25.26: Ya taamb nga, raaku na yaahiЕӢ Й—e ambiЙ— ЕӢ patangiЕӢ kotiЕӢ Esaaw, Й“a teekka Й—e YaЕӢhooЙ“a. Wa komaakceem na raakse, wa tel Isaahha raakiЙ— kiis ndaЕӢkiyaah-yasna-yino (60). Esaaw tooniЙ— kisaawiЕӢ Й—e
25.27: Wa komaakca yak, Esaaw nikka kaalsukoh keeh-keeh, a uupee waaЙ— nik ЕӢ bilaf fa. YaЕӢhooЙ“a nak, a nikee Й“o' yeeЙ“kiЙ—, a nikangee ЕӢ Й—iip ca.
25.28: ЕҠ ineem Isaahha uupee waaЙ— Esaaw laam a waaЙ—een sepet kaalsukuuЙ— lool, waaye Rebeka uupee waaЙ— YaЕӢhooЙ“a.
25.29: Wa raakka mbeh, YaЕӢhooЙ“a tikeeЙ—a suppa, wa hennda Esaaw pulohha kaala yaaЙ“iЙ—.
25.30: A woosa YaЕӢhooЙ“a ne : В« FaЙ— to ЕӢ on suppaani ruumndii, laam ЕӢ minisЙ—i in. В» Ineem weЙ— tah a tapuusa tiikiЕӢ Edom (ruumind).
25.31: YaЕӢhooЙ“a loffa Й—e ne : В« Mbaa Й—ah, toon ndo waЙ—iЕӢ Й—a paaЙ—, wiЕӢ saawi fu nikoh. В»
25.32: Esaaw woosa ne : В« Mi yi aЙ—uk po ЕӢ minisЙ—i, waЙ— saaw raakiЙ— to winde etoh ? В»
25.33: YaЕӢhooЙ“a loffa Й—e ne : В« GiГұiЙ— to ineem paaЙ—. В» WeЙ— Esaaw giГұohha, a toonnda Й—e wa.
25.34: YaЕӢhooЙ“a eЙ—ta Й—e mbuuru na suppa iraak, a Гұammba, a annda po Жҙutta, a cootta waas ce. Esaaw sagankohoh waЙ—iЕӢ saawiЕӢ Й—e Й—aa.

26.1: Wa raakka jamano, aЙ— raakka ЕӢ kur ka, aЙ— Й—alohiЙ— na wa raakee ЕӢ jamanoonaЕӢ Ibrahiima ; tahha po Isaahha kaЙ—ta Gerar Й—iskaЕӢ Abimelek buuraЕӢ Filistiica.
26.2: ЕҠ ndaam, NikiЙ—i teeЙ“ukka Й—e, woosa Й—e ne : В« Kana kaЙ— Misra waaye tasa ЕӢ kur ka maa hee Й—a teeЙ“e.
26.3: Nikohaaha nga, ЕӢ hey Й—a ambohe, ЕӢ barke'iЙ— Й—a, laam maa hee Й—a eЙ—e keheЖҙ cii jen, fu na Й“i na hee rimkohe nga Й—a ; ЕӢ hey tume ini ЕӢ gapee baab Й—u Ibrahiima te ЕӢ ginnjaa.
26.4: ЕҠ hey Й“aate Й“i rimkohan nga Й—a po Й“a hend na hor ci laay te ЕӢ hey Й“a eЙ—e keheЖҙ cii jen. CuuЙ“ ciЕӢ kehЖҙi jen hey raake barke sagu Й“i na hee rimkohe nga Й—a,
26.5: laam Ibrahiima kerhiЙ—een ndo, a teyЙ—ukeen in ci ЕӢ nakohe te a taambЙ—een waasiЕӢ ngo. В»
26.6: WeЙ— tah Isaahha tassa ЕӢ Gerar.
26.7: A nikee ЕӢ ndaam po Й“ooЙ“aЕӢ kur ka meekissa Й—e ЕӢ ini kaЙ— ЕӢ Й“itiice. A loffa Й“a ne a taambЙ—oh ce laam a neЖҙЖҙoheen woo ne a Й“itiice, bala Й“a apan Й—e sagu moЙ—a Rebeka moЙ—e.
26.8: Wa Й“a nik nga po wa maannja, wa raakka mbeh, Abimelek buuraЕӢ Filistiica nikka ЕӢ palaЕӢteeraЕӢ Й—e, a hotta Isaahha hoГұeeЙ—a Й“itiice Rebeka.
26.9: A nakohha Й—e Й“eeЙ—kiЙ—u, a woosa Й—e ne : В« Kon Й“oyii, a Й“itiifu ! Fu min woyoh na ne a taambЙ—oh fu ? В» Isaahha loffa Й—e ne : В« ЕҠ woyiЙ—a laam ЕӢ sangee ne ЕӢ apu saguuce. В»
26.10: Abimelek woyissa Й—e ne : В« Fu inhiЙ— ini fu haЙ“iЙ— Й“oo e ? Жіaar ЕӢ Й“ooЙ“iЕӢ ngo mineen Й—e Й“itiЙ“koh ; mbaa Й—ah, fu heen Й“oo Й“eke tooГұ. В»
26.11: Abimelek nakohha Й“ooЙ“aЕӢ Й—e jen woyu ne : В« ЖҒo' nu reЙ“ Жҙaarii mbaa Й“itiice Й—ah, a hey apse. В»
26.12: ЕҠ kiis ka, Isaahha sokka ЕӢ kur ka, a raakka ini ree waas teemet ЕӢ ina a soke, laam NikiЙ—i barke'Й—een Й—e.
26.13: A uupeeЙ—a nga raak, a raakka po a nikka heЙ— alal,
26.14: a raakeen Й“i pe', mbaal na inoh na Гұaam laayiЙ— po Filistiica siiseeЙ—a Й—e.
26.15: Siisa Filistiica siisee Й—e tahha po Й“a uummba naac ca Гұaam caЕӢ baab Й“a Ibrahiima acee jen, ЕӢ jamanoonaЕӢ Й—e.
26.16: Abimelek woosa Й—e ne : В« Pula kur ki, fu kaЙ—, laam fu uupЙ—iЙ— Й“oo hatil. В»
26.17: WeЙ— Isaahha kurkoh ndaam, a kaЙ—ta yipa ЕӢ oonaЕӢ Gerar, a nikka nga.
26.18: A uumbissa naac ca baab Й“a acee wa a na pese, te Filistiica uummba ca wa a kuruk nga. Isaahha teekissa ca ЕӢ tiik ca baab Й“a ferЙ—ee ca.
26.19: Wa raakka mbeh, Гұaam caЕӢ Й—e aceeЙ—a naac ЕӢ oona po Й“a pulla ЕӢ cul masuЙ“.
26.20: Waaye niiЙ—oh caЕӢ Gerar nookoheeЙ—a na Й“aЕӢ Isaahha an : В« Masmii, a Й“oo raaka. В» Isaahha teekka naacaam Esek (ГұaЙ—oh) laam Й“a waakee Й—e ГұaЙ—oh.
26.21: Г‘aam caЕӢ Й—e acissa naac, lahtoh raakissa nga, a teekkaa Sitna (lahtoh).
26.22: Isaahha pulohha ndaam, Гұaam caЕӢ Й—e acissa naac, ali woo raakЙ—i nga, a teekkaa Rehobot (Й—isik angiЙ—), laam a woo ne : В« NikiЙ—i oniЙ— Й“oo po, Й“oo raakiЙ— Й—isik angiЙ—, Й“oo hey mine raak in ЕӢ kur kii. В»
26.23: Wa a puloh ndeem, Isaahha kaЙ—ta Beerseba.
26.24: ЕҠ weka mbaЙ—i, NikiЙ—i teeЙ“ukka Й—e, a woosa Й—e ne : В« E mi KoohiЕӢ baab Й—u Ibrahiima, ka neЖҙЖҙoh ali in laam mi yii na Й—a ; ЕӢ hey Й—a barke'Й—e, ЕӢ Й“aat Й“i rimkohan nga Й—a sagu ГұaamiЕӢ ngo Ibrahiima. В»
26.25: Isaahha haЙ“iЙ—ta seeЖҙkoha ndaam, a Й“eeЙ—kohha Kooh ЕӢ tiikiЕӢ NikiЙ—i. A yippa Й—iipaЕӢ Й—e ndaam, Гұaam caЕӢ Й—e acissa naac ЕӢ Й—iska.
26.26: Isaahha, a yi nikoh ЕӢ Beerseba po, Abimelek pulohha Gerar, a hunnda na Ahusat nawleece, na Pikol, Жҙaara adgohee hiГұohoh caЕӢ Й—e, Й“a hayya Й—e raake.
26.27: Isaahha meekissa Й“a ne : В« Wa ye tah po Й—u hayya ndii, te sang ngo weЙ— tahee Й—u puliЙ—ta so kur Й—u ? В»
26.28: ЖҒa loffa Й—e ne : В« ЖҒoo hotiЙ— hooliЙ— ne NikiЙ—i huniЙ— na Й—a, weЙ— tah Й“oo woosa ne Й“oo joyiЙ— kerhiЙ—oh te Й“oo tufkiЙ— ambtiЙ—oh, wa giГұu ЕӢ harmban Й“oo na Й—a.
26.29: GiГұa ne fu heyЙ—i Й“oo tume in moЙ—aaЙ—i laam Й“oo torhiЙ—Й—i Й—a, Й“oo tumЙ—angee Й—a in baahiЙ—, Й“oo faЙ— Й—a faЙ—, fu cootta moЙ—oЙ—. ЕҠ Й—iski wa nik ndii, NikiЙ—i oniЙ— Й—a barke. В»
26.30: Isaahha haЙ“Й—iЙ—ta Й“a kaГұam baahiЙ— Й“a Гұammba, Й“a annda.
26.31: Wa Kooh wiis, Й“a kurukka na Й“aaЙ“a teel, Й“a ginnja ЕӢ harmban Й“a, Isaahha askohha na Й“a, Жҙutta Й“a cootta moЙ—oЙ—.
26.32: MbaЙ—i, Гұaam caЕӢ Isaahha hayya nga Й—e, Й“a woosa Й—e ne, naaca Й“a acee nguliЙ—.
26.33: Isaahha teekka naacaam Siba (giГұ). WeЙ— tah po woti kur ka teeku Beerseba (naaciЕӢ giГұi).
26.34: Wa Esaaw raak kiis ndaЕӢkiyaah-nikiis (40), a Й“ayya Й“itiЙ“ kanak ЕӢ cuuЙ“aЕӢ Hit ca, Yehudit, kuЙ“u Be'eri, na Baasmat, kuЙ“u Eloon.
26.35: ЖҒitiЙ“ caam mirndohha nik aay-keeГұ ЕӢ Isaahha na Rebeka.

27.1: Wa Isaahha yaЙ“ko, has caЕӢ Й—e neЙ“isЙ—i, kaЙ—ta po a minisЙ—i sah hot, wa raakka mbeh a Й“eeЙ—ukka saawaЕӢ Й—e an : В« Esaaw ! В» Yeem loffa Й—e ne : В« Ee Гұam yii ! В»
27.2: Isaahha woosa Й—e ne : В« Fu hot nga, Й—iski wa nik ndii ЕӢ mand na kurkiЙ— nga.
27.3: Mbaa Й—ah, Й“aya halliiniЕӢ Й—a na Й“is ciЕӢ Й—a fu kaЙ— kaalsuka, fu kom mbo,
27.4: fu tikiЙ— to tik neЙ“iЙ— findi ЕӢ waaЙ—oha, ЕӢ Гұam, ЕӢ eЙ— Й—a barkeeni ndo ЕӢ kaanan Й—ah. В»
27.5: Wa Isaahha woyee na Esaaw, Rebeka kerhee nga. Esaaw Й“ayya halliina na Й“is caЕӢ Й—e, a cootta kaala.
27.6: WeЙ— Rebeka Й“eeЙ—koh YaЕӢhooЙ“a a woosa Й—e ne : В« ЕҠ kerhiЙ— baab Й—u woyeeЙ—a taambЙ—oh fu Esaaw ne,
27.7: a kaalsukЙ—aat Й—e, a tikiЙ— Й—e tik neЙ“iЙ—, a Гұam, a eЙ— Й—e barkeeni ЕӢ fiki NikiЙ—i ndo a kaanan Й—ah.
27.8: SikЙ—uk ko, te fu tum ini maa hee Й—a woye.
27.9: KaЙ—a gat ca fu kom mbo koteng kanak baahiЙ— nga, ЕӢ tikiЙ— baab Й—u tik neЙ“iЙ— findi a waaЙ—oha ;
27.10: fu eЙ— Й—e a Гұam, a eЙ— Й—a barkeeni ndo a kurkan nga Й—ah. В»
27.11: YaЕӢhooЙ“a loffa yaay Й“a Rebeka ne : В« Moo, Esaaw paariЙ— te ЕӢ paarЙ—i ;
27.12: baab Й“oo laal lo ЕӢ yaah Й—ah, a hey inhe ne maa ГұaaГұohee Й—e, te ЕӢ kooЙ—ohan alku nga waaye barke haa. В»
27.13: Yaay Й“a woosa Й—e ne : В« Alkeem hay Й—ah, wa ambaat to, tuma Й—aa rek, kom mbo in ci ЕӢ woo Й—a. В»
27.14: YaЕӢhooЙ“a kaЙ—ta Й“aya koteng ca, a eЙ—ta yaay Й“a ca, yeem tikka ca findi baab Й“a waaЙ—oh.
