27.15: Жіutta, Rebeka Й“ayya kulЙ“aacaЕӢ saawaЕӢ Й—e Esaaw, ca uupee moЙ—, raak ca na Й—e ЕӢ kahna, a Й“ekiЙ—ta YaЕӢhooЙ“a ca.
27.16: A Й“ayya ЕӢ und caЕӢ koteng ca a muurra yaah ciЕӢ YaЕӢhooЙ“a na Й“aki raakeeЙ—i find ЕӢ mbooh kiЕӢ Й—e.
27.17: Жіutta a eЙ—ta Й—e mbuuru na kaГұam ka a tike.
27.18: Wa YaЕӢhooЙ“a Й“ay kaГұam ka, a kaЙ—ta ЕӢ baab Й“a a woosa Й—e ne : В« Baab ! В» Isaahha loffa ne : В« Ee, Гұam yii. A fu Й“a ? В»
27.19: YaЕӢhooЙ“a woosa ne : В« Г‘am Esaaw saawiЕӢ Й—a, ЕӢ haЙ“Й—iЙ— ini fu nakee so, Й“oofa fu Гұam, Жҙut Й—ah, fu eЙ— to barkeeni. В»
27.20: Isaahha woosa Й—e ne : В« Moo fu tumoh na po fu arra malu ? В» YaЕӢhooЙ“a loffa Й—e ne : В« E KoohiЕӢ Й—a NikiЙ—i, tum po ЕӢ arra malu. В»
27.21: Isaahha woosa Й—e ne : В« ReЙ“a ndii ЕӢ saaЙ“iЙ— Й—a, ЕӢ marak andi a fu Esaaw. В»
27.22: YaЕӢhooЙ“a reЙ“pa, baab Й“a saaЙ“iЙ—ta Й—e a woosa ne : В« Hoosoori, a wiЕӢ YaЕӢhooЙ“a waaye yaah ci, e ciЕӢ Esaaw. В»
27.23: A inhiseeЙ—i YaЕӢhooЙ“a laam, yaah ciЕӢ Й—e muurkeen na find findi ciЕӢ Esaaw. Tahha po a eЙ—ta Й—e barkeeni.
27.24: Waaye ndo a eЙ—an Й—e wa Й—ah, a meekissa Й—e an : В« Wa hooliЙ— ne a fu Esaaw e ? В» YaЕӢhooЙ“a loffa Й—e : В« Ee, a Гұam. В»
27.25: Isaahha woosa Й—e ne : В« DeЖҙiЙ— to ЕӢ Гұam po ЕӢ min Й—a eЙ— barkeeni. В» YaЕӢhooЙ“a deЖҙiЙ—ta Й—e, a Гұammba ; a nammba Й—e eЙ— biiГұ, a annda.
27.26: Жіutta, Isaahha woosa Й—e ne : В« Haya fu morgiЙ—uk ko. В»
27.27: YaЕӢhooЙ“a reЙ“pa, a morgiЙ—ukka Й—e. Wa Isaahha amb hetaЕӢ kulЙ“aaca, a eЙ—ohha Й—e barkeeni an : В« Aah ! HetiЕӢ kuЙ“kiЕӢ ngo mand na wiЕӢ bilaf fi NikiЙ—i barke'iЙ—.
27.28: Kooh ruhsiЙ—aat maar ЕӢ yohon ciЕӢ Й—a, te a baahiЙ— merhey miЕӢ ca, fu laayiЙ— pees na biiГұ.
27.29: ЖҒi cuuЙ“ Гұaamkaat Й—a, Й“i heet ЖҙekЙ—aat Й—a, fu adgoh Й“aah ciЕӢ Й—a, kuЙ“uuciЕӢ yaay Й—u ЖҙekiЙ— Й—a, Й“o' nu waaЙ—iЙ— Й—a moЙ—aaЙ—i Й—ah, a alku'aat, Й“o' nu waaЙ—iЙ— Й—a moЙ—iЙ— Й—ah, a raakaat barke. В»
27.30: Wa a Жҙut eЙ— YaЕӢhooЙ“a barkeeni, yeem cootee coot rek, Esaaw pulohha kaala.
27.31: A nammba tik tik neЙ“iЙ—, a kommbaa baabiЕӢ Й—e. Wa a ree a woosa Й—e ne : В« Baab, Й“oofa fu Гұam, fu eЙ— to barkeeni. В»
27.32: Isaahha meekissa Й—e ne : В« A fu Й“a ? В» A loffa ne : В« Г‘am Esaaw, saawiЕӢ Й—a. В»
27.33: Isaahha feyuusa po a saakЙ—oheeЙ—a ; a woosa ne : В« Moo, a Й“a kee kaala po a hayya a eЙ—ta so ЕӢ Гұammba raak Й—a hayЙ—i ? Yeem a yi ЕӢ eЙ— barkeeni te wa hey nike na Й—e. В»
27.34: Wa Esaaw kerah woo keem, keeГұiЕӢ Й—e aayya, a leehkeeЙ—a ЕӢ Й—afka. A woosa baab Й“a ne : В« Na so ! Nam mbo eЙ— barke. В»
27.35: Isaahha loffa Й—e ne : В« TaambЙ—oh fu hayiЙ— ndii a ГұaaГұohha so po ЕӢ eЙ—ta Й—e barkeeni ЕӢ joyee Й—a eЙ—. В»
27.36: Esaaw woosa ne : В« A Й—alЙ—i tiikiЕӢ Й—e YaЕӢhooЙ“a (ГұaaГұohoh), a ГұaaГұohiЙ— to waas kanak, a adug Й“ay waЙ—iЕӢ saawi ЕӢ nikoh, a yi a Й“ayissiЙ— barkeeni fu joyee so barke'iЙ—. В» A woosa baab Й“a ne : В« Moo fu tasiЙ—Й—i barkeeni fu min ndo eЙ— e ? В»
27.37: Baab Й“a loffa Й—e ne : В« ЕҠ tumiЙ— Й—e kilifaaniЕӢ Й—a po ЖҙutiЙ—, ЕӢ kiimЙ—iЙ— Й—e pees na biiГұ laayiЙ— te a hey nike kilifaaniЕӢ Й“aah ciЕӢ Й—e, ЕӢ min Й—a ye tumiЙ— ? В»
27.38: Esaaw Й“aatta ndengЙ—uk nga an : В« Fu min barke'Й—oh waas yino dong e ? Nam mbo eЙ— barke, baab. В» A ammba ЕӢ muhun ca a fuЙ—eeЙ—a.
27.39: Baab Й“a woosa Й—e ne : В« Fu hey use merhey mi baahЙ—i na maari na pulohe ЕӢ Й—afki.
27.40: Fu na hee pesohe hiГұoh te a taambЙ—oh fu yilfan Й—a, waaye mbeha fu ndengЙ—ukohan fu hey kaambsuke ini a raan Й—a. В»
27.41: Barkeeni YaЕӢhooЙ“a Й“ayoh ЕӢ baab Й“a, weЙ— tah po Esaaw ambiЙ—ta Й—e aay-keeГұ. A woosa ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ ce ne : В« Baab mand na kaaniЙ—, ruyiЕӢ Й—e reeh Й—ah, ЕӢ ap YaЕӢhooЙ“a. В»
27.42: Wa Rebeka inah ina saawiЕӢ Й—e Esaaw nar tum, a nakohha Й“eeЙ—kiЙ—u YaЕӢhooЙ“a, kuЙ“kiЕӢ Й—e Жҙini, a woosa Й—e ne : В« ЕҠ Й—iski wa nik ndii, taambЙ—oh fu waaЙ— Й—a ap ne a wirnduk.
27.43: Mbaa fu na hee tume an : Ara saandoh Й—iskaЕӢ taambЙ—oh ho Laban ЕӢ Haaraan,
27.44: fu Й“oofohaah nga po Esaaw giif ngaЕӢ ayrukiЕӢ Й—e.
27.45: Aay-keeГұiЕӢ Й—e reeh po a alkoh ini fu haЙ“iЙ— Й—e Й—ah, ЕӢ hey woose Й“o' a kaЙ— Й—a Й“aya ; ЕӢ waaЙ—Й—i Й—u Гұak kanak ЕӢ noh yino. В» SaandohaЕӢ YaЕӢhooЙ“a ЕӢ Paddan-Aram
27.46: Wa Rebeka woo na YaЕӢhooЙ“a po Жҙutta, a woosa Isaahha ne : В« ЖҠiski ЕӢ nik kipes neЙ“isЙ—i so sagu Й“itiЙ“ ciЕӢ Esaaw Й“ii, na cuuЙ“iЕӢ Hiti Й“a nikoh. YaЕӢhooЙ“a nam Й“ay Й“itiЙ“ nga Й“a Й—ah, wa carissanЙ—i ЕӢ pese. В»

28.1: WeЙ— Isaahha Й“eeЙ—koh YaЕӢhooЙ“a a kiimiЙ—ta Й—e barke, a dennga Й—e an : В« Kana Й“ay Й“itiЙ“ muk ЕӢ cafaЖҙ ci gen ndii, Kanaan,
28.2: kaЙ—a Paddan-Aram, ЕӢ Betuwel yi rim yaay Й—u, fu Й“ay Й“itiЙ“ ngaЕӢ kuЙ“uucaЕӢ taanum fu Laban yi taambЙ—oh yaay Й—u.
28.3: Koohi Min onaat Й—a barke, a tum Й—a Й“asil po fu nik caaciЕӢ Й“i cuuЙ“i cuuЙ“.
28.4: Kooh onaat Й—a barkeeni a onee Ibrahiima, fu na Й“i rimkohan nga Й—a po fu raak kur ki fu nikoh jaambur wii, wi a gapee Ibrahiima. В»
28.5: Isaahha tuuЖҙca YaЕӢhooЙ“a a kaЙ—ta Paddan-Aram ЕӢ taanum ce Laban, kuЙ“u Betuwel yi Й“aah ЕӢ cuuЙ“iЕӢ Aram ci, a nikka taambЙ—oh Rebeka, yaay Й“i YaЕӢhooЙ“a na Esaaw.
28.6: ЕҠ ini kaЙ— ЕӢ Esaaw, a kerhiЙ— ne Isaahha kiimЙ—iЙ— YaЕӢhooЙ“a barke po a tuuЖҙiЙ— Й—e Paddan-Aram ne a waak Й“itiЙ“ nga te a dengiЙ— Й—e ne a kanaat Й“ay Й“itiЙ“ ЕӢ cafaЖҙ ciЕӢ Kanaan.
28.7: A kerhissa ne YaЕӢhooЙ“a teyЙ—ukЙ—iЙ— baab Й“a na yaay Й“a po a cootiЙ— Paddan-Aram.
28.8: WeЙ— Esaaw inhoh ne cafaЖҙ ciЕӢ Kanaan neЙ“Й—i baab Й“a.
28.9: Wa tahha po a kaЙ—ta Й“ayya Й“itiЙ“ ЕӢ kuЙ“uuciЕӢ Ismaayla yi kuЙ“kiЕӢ Ibrahiima. A Й“ayya Mahalat taambЙ—oh Nebayot, a Й“aatta ngaЕӢ Й“a a raake.
28.10: YaЕӢhooЙ“a, ЕӢ pulohaЕӢ Й—e Beerseba, a yurah Haaraan.
28.11: A kaЙ—oh kaЙ—oh po Й—iska noha muyoh Й—e, a parahha ЕӢ atoh ca ЕӢ Й—iska, a tiknukkaa, a neehha nga.
28.12: A heeЖҙca inaa feyohiЙ— : Seel yipohha kehЖҙi po wa maannga ЕӢ eel ca, malaakaaciЕӢ Kooh rapeeЙ—a nga, ruhseeЙ—a.
28.13: An ЕӢ heeЖҙi, NikiЙ—i nikee ЕӢ serooce a woosa Й—e ne : В« Г‘am NikiЙ—i, KoohiЕӢ caac Й—u Ibrahiima na baab Й—u Isaahha. KehЖҙi fu faankoh wii, ЕӢ hey Й—a wa one, fu na Й“i na hee rimkohe nga Й—a.
28.14: ЖҒi rimkohan nga Й—a hey laaye po Й“a mand na merhey. ЖҠu hey Й“aatke ЕӢ Й“ak ci jen : pulohaaЙ—-noh na muyohaaЙ—-noh, yaah-sing na yaah-Гұaahum. CuuЙ“ ciЕӢ kehЖҙi jen hey raake barke saguufu, fu na Й“i na hee rimkohe nga Й—a.
28.15: Mi yii na Й—a te ЕӢ hey Й—a niiЙ—e Й—isik nu fu kaЙ— Й—ah. ЕҠ hey Й—a dokne ЕӢ kehЖҙii laam ЕӢ hey Й—a tumЙ—e in ci ЕӢ gap Й—a te ЕӢ moosanЙ—i Й—a faЙ—oh. В»
28.16: Wa YaЕӢhooЙ“a yunuk a woosa ne : В« Ndekete yoo, NikiЙ—i yii ЕӢ Й—iski te ЕӢ inheeЙ—aa. В»
28.17: A neЖҙЖҙohha, a woyissa ne : В« Ndii deey wa kaaГұaah haa, wa nikЙ—i Й—isik wiiriis Й—al kahan Kooh te weЙ— yahndeeriЕӢ eel ci. В»
28.18: Wa Kooh wiis na Й“aaЙ“a YaЕӢhooЙ“a kurukka teel, a Й“ayya atoh fa a tiknukohe, a yippaa, a Й“ayya diwliin a yiiffaa ЕӢ Й—afuk wa.
28.19: A teekka Й—iska Betel (kahan Kooh). Waaye kur ka teeksee Luus ЕӢ Й—eЙ“gaan.
28.20: Жіutta, a gapukka an : В« Kooh hun na so, a tufkoh ho ЕӢ Й“aaЙ“iЕӢ ngo, a on ndo kaГұam na Й“ekkaah,
28.21: te a amboh ho po ЕӢ dokuk kahan baab Й“oo moЙ—oЙ— Й—ah, ЕӢ ineem a yi NikiЙ—i, a yi nikan KoohiЕӢ ngo.
28.22: Te atoh fi ЕӢ yip inhisoha wii, wa hey nike kahan Kooh. NdaЕӢkiyaah nu a tumiЙ— to Й—ah, ЕӢ hey Й—e eЙ—e yinooriЕӢ wa. В»

29.1: Wa YaЕӢhooЙ“a puloh ndaam, a yurahha Й“ak kur kaЕӢ Й“i pulohaaЙ—-noh.
29.2: A kaЙ—oh kaЙ—oh po, wa raakka mbeh, a pulla ЕӢ naac ЕӢ bilaf fa, gat kaahay pe' na mbaal ambsukohiЙ— goorra ЕӢ seroowa, laam, Й“a meeЙ—ee anЙ—oh ndaam. Naaca meeЙ— rangohu atoh yakak.
29.3: ЖҒaa faЙ—e faЙ— po gat ci jen cohha Й—ah, Й“a pilngin atoh fa, Й“a Жҙut aniЙ— Й—ah, Й“a dokina.
29.4: YaЕӢhooЙ“a meekissa niiЙ—oh ca ne : В« ЖіaaЙ“i, Й—u puloh nde ? В» ЖҒa loffa Й—e ne : В« ЖҒoo puloh Haaraan. В»
29.5: A woosa Й“a ne : В« ЖҠu inhiЙ— Laban, setiЕӢ Nahor e ? В» ЖҒa loffa Й—e ne : В« Ee, Й“oo inhiЙ— Й—e. В»
29.6: A woosa Й“a ne : В« A tum na ? В» ЖҒa loffa ne : В« A yaa ЕӢ jam ; cafЖҙa na haye na gateen a kuЙ“kiЕӢ Й—e, Rasel. В»
29.7: YaЕӢhooЙ“a woosa Й“a ne : В« ЖҠu goorЙ—oh Й—oopaat ci ye, te ЕӢ hot nohi ris ЕӢ Й—afki ? AnЙ—aat ca, Й—u kaЙ— ca niiЙ—a book ! В»
29.8: ЖҒa woosa Й—e ne : В« ЖҒoo minЙ—aa paaЙ— ; Й“oo na sekee sek po gat ci jen hayya Й—ah, Й“oo han min pilngin atoh fi rang naaci, Й“oo aniЙ—. В»
29.9: Wa YaЕӢhooЙ“a woyee na Й“a, weЙ—i cafЖҙa reyoh na gataЕӢ baab Й“a, laam a yi Rasel a nikee niiЙ—oh.
29.10: Wa a hot Rasel, kuЙ“kiЕӢ Laban yi taambЙ—oh yaayiЕӢ Й—e, na pe' ca na mbaal ca, YaЕӢhooЙ“a reЙ“pa ЕӢ naaca, a pilnginnda atoh fa, a aniЙ—ta gataЕӢ taanum ce.
29.11: Жіutta a kaГұiЙ—ta Rasel na morgiЙ—uk, a fuЙ—eeЙ—a.
29.12: A woosa Rasel ne : В« Mi na baab Й—u, e Й“oo Й“aah, laam, ЕӢ kuЙ“u Rebeka. В» Rasel nuppa, woosa baab Й“a wa.
29.13: Wa Laban kerah ne YaЕӢhooЙ“a kuЙ“kiЕӢ Rebeka yi taambЙ—oh ce hiiЙ—, a arra kaЙ— coha na Й—e, a morgiЙ—ukka Й—e, a Й“ayya Й—e kahna. YaЕӢhooЙ“a naandsukka Й—e ini raak jen.
29.14: Laban woosa Й—e ne : В« Fu kay, e Й“oo Й“aah Гұif yino. В» YaЕӢhooЙ“a Й“ooffa ЕӢ kahan ce ina ree caЙ“in. Kilook caЕӢ YaЕӢhooЙ“a kanak ca
29.15: Wa YaЕӢhooЙ“a tum nga caЙ“in, Laban woosa Й—e ne : В« Ini fu Й“aah na so tahanЙ—i po, fu pangkiЙ—ee so Й“arang Й“arang ; fu na hee so hey woye ini fu na hee wirndasse. В»
29.16: Waam raak Laban raakiЙ— komaaki kanak cafЖҙiЙ—, saawa teeksee Leya, taambЙ—oh ce teekuusa Rasel.
29.17: Has ciЕӢ Leya moЙ—een waaye Rasel nikee cafaЖҙ moЙ—iЙ— lool.
29.18: ЕҠ ineem YaЕӢhooЙ“a waaЙ—ee Rasel, a woosa Laban ne : В« ЕҠ hey Й—a pangkiЙ—e kiis yasna-kanak, Жҙut Й—ah, fu on ndo Rasel, kuЙ“kiЕӢ Й—a Жҙini. В»
29.19: Laban loffa Й—e ne : В« ЕҠ on Й—a Й—e, weЙ— ngisohiЙ— to fuuf, ЕӢ kee ona Й“o' wiiriis Й—e, kon, Й“oo tum Й—aa, fu miniЙ— tas ЕӢ kahan ndo. В»
29.20: Wa Й“a kerhiЙ—oh ЕӢ woo, YaЕӢhooЙ“a pangkiЙ—ta Laban kiis yasna-kanak, waaye ca mannda nga Й—e na Й“i neeh dong sagu waaЙ—a a waaЙ—ee Rasel.
29.21: Жіutta a woosa Laban ne : В« EЙ— to Й“itiiso ЕӢ neeh na Й—e, laam kiis ci Й“oo woytiЙ—kohee reehiЙ—. В»
29.22: WeЙ—i Laban Й“eeЙ—koh Й“ooЙ“a genee na Й“a jen, a haЙ“iЙ—ta ceeke.
29.23: Waaye, na weka, joy ne a Й“ay Rasel, a Й“ayya saawiЕӢ Й—e Leya, a eЙ—ta YaЕӢhooЙ“a Й—e, yeem neehha na Й—e.
29.24: Raak, Laban eЙ—een Leya ГұaamaЕӢ Й—e Й“itiЙ“ teeksee Silpa ne a amboh Й—e.
29.25: Wa Kooh wiis na Й“aaЙ“a YaЕӢhooЙ“a hotta ne, a neeh na Leya. A woosa Laban ne : В« Fu haЙ“iЙ— to ye wii, ЕӢ woytiЙ—kohee na Й—a Rasel weЙ—i tahee ЕӢ pangkiЙ—ta Й—a, wa ye tah fu worra so ? В»
29.26: Laban loffa Й—e ne : В« Ineem na tumseeЙ—i ЕӢ ndii, ali Й“o' na adgeeЙ—i kilooku yakak ce.
29.27: Waaye, Й—iindoha neeh ci yasna-kanak ciЕӢ kilooki na Leya, Жҙut Й—ah, ЕӢ eЙ— Й—a Rasel ne fu tey pangkis kiis yasna-kanak ndii Й—ah. В»
29.28: YaЕӢhooЙ“a teyЙ—ukkaa a Й—iindohha neeh ca yasna-kanak ca na Leya. Жіutta Laban eЙ—ta Й—e Rasel Й“itiЙ“.
29.29: A nammba eЙ—ndoh Rasel ГұaamaЕӢ Й—e Й“itЙ“a teeksee Bilha.
29.30: YaЕӢhooЙ“a neehha na Rasel, a waaЙ—ta Й—e waaЙ—i uup wa a waaЙ—ee Leya, a pangkiЙ—issa Laban kiis yasna-kanak. KuЙ“uuciЕӢ YaЕӢhooЙ“a
29.31: Wa NikiЙ—i hot ne Leya waaЙ—uuЙ—i, a tummba Й—e Й“asil waaye Rasel mineeЙ—i raak kuЙ“u.
29.32: Leya ammba rook, a raakka kuЙ“u Жҙaar, a woosa ne : В« NikiЙ—i hotiЙ— miskiЙ—iЕӢ ngo, Жҙaar ro hey yo waaЙ—e kotii. В» A teekka kuЙ“ka Ruben (a hotiЙ— ).
29.33: A ambissa rook, a raakissa kuЙ“u Жҙaar, a woyissa ne : В« NikiЙ—i kerhiЙ— to. A inhiЙ— ne ЕӢ waaЙ—uuЙ—i, a onissiЙ— to kuЙ“u wiiriis. В» A teekka Й—e Simeyong (a kerhiЙ—).
29.34: A ambissa rook, a raakissa kuЙ“u Жҙaar, a woosa ne : В« Koti-kotii, Жҙaar ro hey ЕӢoЙ—e nga so, laam ЕӢ raakЙ—iЙ— Й—e kuЙ“u Жҙaar kaahay. В» Ineem tahha po kuЙ“keem teekuusa Lewi (ЕӢoЙ—).
29.35: Leya ambissa rook, a raakissa kuЙ“u Жҙaar, a woyissa ne : В« Waasii, ЕӢ hey gidme NikiЙ—i. В» WeЙ— tah a teekka yeem Yudaa (ЕӢ hey gidme). A raakisЙ—i kuЙ“u, a tufukka.

30.1: Wa Rasel hot ne a minЙ—i raak na YaЕӢhooЙ“a kuЙ“u, a ayrukka taambЙ—oh ce Leya ЕӢ raaki aa raake kuЙ“u ; a woosa YaЕӢhooЙ“a ne : В« ЖҒoo raakaat kuЙ“u, ЕӢ kaaniЙ— waay ! В»
30.2: YaЕӢhooЙ“a ayrukka Й—e, a woosa Й—e ne : В« Г‘am Kooh yi hondoh Й—a raak kuЙ“u e ? В»
30.3: Rasel loffa ne : В« Huna na Bilha ГұaamiЕӢ ngo, a raakiЙ— to kuЙ“u koЙ—aah, po ЕӢ min nik Й“asil. В»
30.4: Rasel eЙ—ta YaЕӢhooЙ“a ГұaamiЕӢ Й—e Й“itiЙ“, a hunnda na Й—e ;
30.5: yeem ammba rook, a raakiЙ—ta YaЕӢhooЙ“a kuЙ“u Жҙaar.
30.6: Rasel woosa ne : В« Kooh atte'iЙ—, a eЙ—iЙ— to keeh, a namiЙ— to kerah po a oniЙ— to kuЙ“u Жҙaar. В» WeЙ— tah, Rasel teekka Й—e Daan (a atte'iЙ—).
30.7: Bilha ambissa rook, a raakЙ—issa YaЕӢhooЙ“a kuЙ“u Жҙaar.
30.8: Rasel woosa ne : В« ЕҠ leberiЙ— na taambЙ—oh ho leber miskiЙ— po ЕӢ saahiЙ—. В» A teekka kuЙ“ka Naftaali (ЕӢ leberiЙ—).
30.9: Wa Leya hot ne a tufkiЙ—, a minisЙ—i raak kuЙ“u, a Й“ayya ГұaamiЕӢ Й—e Silpa a eЙ—ta YaЕӢhooЙ“a Й—e Й“itiЙ“.
30.11: Leya woosa ne : В« Wii deey, wa muuЙ—. В» A teekka kuЙ“ka Gaad (muuЙ—).
30.13: Leya woosa ne : В« ЕҠ sumiЙ— po Й“itiЙ“ ci hey wee ne ЕӢ sumiЙ—. В» A teekka kuЙ“ka Aser (sum).
30.14: Wa raakka mbeh, ЕӢ jamanoona Й“aa nguЙ—ohe bele, Ruben hotta kidig ci na paЖҙe Й“itiЙ“ minaaЙ—i raak kuЙ“u, na woyse mandargoor, a kommba yaay Й“a Leya ca. Rasel hotta ca, a woosa Leya ne : В« On ndo ЕӢ mandargoor ciЕӢ kuЙ“kiЕӢ Й—a, ne wa neЙ“ Й—a Й—ah. В»
30.15: Leya loffa Й—e ne : В« Naafi fu naaf Жҙaar ro doyЙ—i Й—a e ? Po fu waaЙ—is Й“ay mandargoor ciЕӢ kuЙ“kiЕӢ ngo. В» Rasel woosa Й—e ne : В« Mbaa YaЕӢhooЙ“a neehaat na Й—a woti te fu eЙ— to kidig ci. В»
30.16: Wa YaЕӢhooЙ“a puloh yohon ca na niina, Leya kaЙ—ta coha na Й—e, a woosa Й—e ne : В« Woti, fu na hee neehe na so laam, ЕӢ romiЙ— mbari na mandargoor ciЕӢ kuЙ“kiЕӢ ngo. В» MbaЙ—i, YaЕӢhooЙ“a neehha na Leya.
30.17: Kooh teyЙ—ukiЙ—ta Leya, a ammba rook, a raakissa kuЙ“u Жҙaar, yi yatuusЙ—oh.
30.18: Leya woosa ne : В« Kooh wirndiЙ— to ЕӢ eЙ—i ЕӢ eЙ— Жҙaar ro ГұaamiЕӢ ngo. В» A teekka kuЙ“ka Issaakar (wirndiЕӢ ngo).
30.19: Leya ambissa rook, a raakissa kuЙ“u Жҙaar, yi yasna-yino'Й—oh.
30.20: A woosa ne : В« Kooh tumЙ—iЙ— to in yakak, kotii Жҙaar ro hey yo meeЙ“le, laam ЕӢ raakЙ—iЙ— Й—e kuЙ“u Жҙaar yasna-yino. В» A teekka kuЙ“ka Sabuloon (a hey yo meeЙ“le).
30.21: ЕҠ mirndaani a raakissa kuЙ“u Й“itiЙ“ a teekka Й—e Dinaa.
30.22: ЕҠ ini kaЙ— ЕӢ Rasel, wa Kooh tufuk ЕӢ in ciЕӢ Й—e, a teyЙ—ukiЙ—ta Й—e, a onnda Й—e, a minnda raak kuЙ“u.
30.23: Rasel ammba rook, a raakka kuЙ“u Жҙaar. A woosa ne : В« Kooh pulЙ—ohiЙ— to ЕӢ kaciikiЕӢ ngo. В»
30.24: A teekka kuЙ“ka Yuusufa (a Й“aataat), a kiimmba NikiЙ—i ne a Й“aat Й—e kuЙ“u Жҙaar. Findi YaЕӢhooЙ“a raakoh gatiЕӢ Й—e
30.25: ЕҠ finho raakuukaЕӢ Yuusufa, YaЕӢhooЙ“a woosa Laban ne : В« On ndo ЕӢ haad kur Й“oo.
30.26: Fu eЙ— to Й“itiЙ“ ciЕӢ ngo na kuЙ“uuciЕӢ ngo ЕӢ coot, laam, Й“eЙ— tahee so pangkiЙ—eeЙ—a Й—a ; fu ЕӢ haf fu, fu inhiЙ— ini ЕӢ haЙ“Й—iЙ— Й—a. В»
30.27: Laban woosa Й—e ne : В« On ndo wa on ! Laam, ЕӢ markiskiЙ— po ЕӢ hotiЙ— ne, NikiЙ—i barke'Й—iЙ— to saguufu,
30.28: woya ini fu waaЙ— wirndu, ЕӢ eЙ— Й—a wa. В»
30.29: YaЕӢhooЙ“a woosa Й—e ne : В« Fu ЕӢ haf fu, fu inhiЙ— findi ЕӢ pangkiЙ—oh Й—a, na findi gatiЕӢ Й—a mirndoh mand saguuso.
30.30: Ini Жҙissuuti fu raakee bala ЕӢ hayan Й—ah, wa Й“aatkiЙ— baahiЙ—. Laam ina ЕӢ aasoh kahan fu poyi, NikiЙ—i barke'Й—iЙ— Й—a saguuso. Mbaa wa reyiЙ— kotii nak ne ЕӢ pangkiЙ— haf fo. В»
30.31: Laban meekissa Й—e ne : В« Mi na hee Й—a eЙ—e hend na ? В» YaЕӢhooЙ“a woosa ne : В« Fu heyЙ—i so eЙ—e ali in, waaye fu teyЙ—uk ini maa hee Й—a woye Й—ah, ЕӢ hey taalndiЙ—e, ЕӢ niiЙ—Й—issee Й—a gatiЕӢ Й—a.
30.32: ЕҠ woo ne, woti, ЕӢ hey aase ЕӢ gat ciЕӢ Й—a, ЕӢ puliЙ— pe' ci na mbaal ci jen, ci nik njeenje nga na mbaal ci suusus ci, ca nik wirndiЕӢ ngo.
30.33: Kim fu hey marke wirndiЕӢ ngo Й—ah, fu hey hote kiyurhiЕӢ ngo, laam fu hot mbaal ci nikЙ—i suusus mbaa pe' ci nikЙ—i njeenje nga Й—ah, fu inah ne ca roku roku. В»
30.34: Laban woosa Й—e ne : В« Ee ЕӢ huniЙ— nga. В»
30.35: Waaye mbaЙ—i, Laban Й“ayya suket ca na pe' ca njeenjeeca raak in yaanow jen, na mbaal ca suusus ca, a degga ca ЕӢ yaah kuЙ“uuciЕӢ Й—e.
30.36: A cootta na Й“a, Й“a ussa YaЕӢhooЙ“a ini ree tiindu neeh kaahay, waaye YaЕӢhooЙ“a taambkoheeЙ—a ini tas ЕӢ gataЕӢ Laban.
30.37: WeЙ— a waakoh Й“i ndooЙ— iiri ngaЕӢ kidig kaahay Й“aahaaЙ—i, ndooЙ— " poopaalye " na ndooЙ— " gerte-tuЙ“aaЙ“ " na ndooЙ— " palatan " ; a ЕӢeeЖҙ-ЕӢeeЖҙiЙ—ta ca po ndooЙ— nu nga Й—ah, raakka yaanow yaanow.
30.38: A Й“ekka ca ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ hongla na anЙ—ohse, ne Й—oopaat ca hay ane Й—ah, ca hot ca laam, Й—oopaat ca meeЙ— rapkoh ЕӢ ndaam ne ca hayya ane Й—ah.
30.39: Ca rapkohha ЕӢ fiki ndooЙ— ceem Й—ah, ca na rime buul njeenje.
30.40: YaЕӢhooЙ“a saЙ“sohha buul ceem, a yurhiЙ—ta haf ciЕӢ ca ngaЕӢ njeenjeeca na suusus ca nikee ngaЕӢ gataЕӢ Laban. A waakoh gat haf ce Й—aa, Й“aahaaЙ—i na waЕӢ Laban .
30.41: ЖҠoopaat ca kapiЙ— ca heesa rapkohe Й—ah, a Й“ekiЙ— ca ndooЙ— ca ne ca rapkee Й—ah, ca yurhiЙ—koh na ca,
30.42: waaye ca nikka Й—oopaat ca ГұiiЙ“iЙ— ca Й—ah, a Й“ekЙ—uu ca ali in. A tumee Й—aa po ca kapiЙ— ca nikka caЕӢ Й—e, ca ГұiiЙ“iЙ— ca nikka caЕӢ Laban.
30.43: ЕҠ mirndaani a nikka heЙ— raak-raak yakak, a raakeen Й“i gat pe' na mbaal na Й“i Гұaam Жҙaar na Й“itiЙ“ na Й“i ngeelemb na Й“i mbaam.

31.1: KaЙ—ta po YaЕӢhooЙ“a kerahha ini kuЙ“uuciЕӢ Laban meeЙ— woo, an : В« YaЕӢhooЙ“a Й“ayiЙ— raak-raakiЕӢ baabiЕӢ Й“oo jen po wa tahiЙ— Й—e raak. В»
31.2: ЕҠ Й—ooЖҙ ineem YaЕӢhooЙ“a nammba hot ne findi Laban mandee na Й—e, a mandisЙ—i Й—aa.
31.3: NikiЙ—i woosa YaЕӢhooЙ“a ne : В« Gurda fu haad kur Й—u, nga Й“i kahan baab Й—u, ЕӢ hey rise na Й—a. В»
31.4: Waam raak YaЕӢhooЙ“a na gat ca ЕӢ yohon ca, a nakohha Й“eeЙ—kiЙ—u Й“itiЙ“ ciЕӢ Й—e Rasel na Leya ;
31.5: a woosa Й“a ne : В« ЕҠ markiЙ— po ЕӢ hotiЙ— ne baab Й—u mandisЙ—i nga so findi a mande. Waaye KoohiЕӢ baab Й“oo yii na so.
31.6: ЖҠu inhiЙ— ne ЕӢ pangkiЙ—iЙ— Й—e findi ЕӢ minoh,
31.7: hondohЙ—i a worra so, a Й“oЖҙsohha wirndiЕӢ ngo waas ndaЕӢkiyaah, waaye Kooh faЙ—Й—i Й—e ne a tum mbo miskiЙ—.
31.8: A woosa so ne Й—oopaat ci tap-tap ci ceЙ— wirndiЕӢ ngo Й—ah, ndaamuuci jen na rime raakiЙ— tap-tap. A woosa ne ci fiis-fiis ci ceЙ— wirndiЕӢ ngo Й—ah, ndaamuuci jen na rime raakiЙ— fiis-fiis.
31.9: E Kooh naaf gatiЕӢ baabiЕӢ Й—u, a eЙ—ta so wa.
31.10: ЕҠ jamanooni Й—oopaat ci na rapke, ЕӢ hotta ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ heeЖҙ ne suket ci na rape jen nikee njeenje raakiЙ— tap-tap mbaa fiis-fiis.
31.11: WeЙ— malaakaaniЕӢ Kooh woyoh ne : вҖң YaЕӢhooЙ“a ! вҖқ ЕҠ woosa Й—e ne : вҖң Ee mi yi kerah Й—a. вҖқ
31.12: A woosa so ne : вҖң Marka, Й—oopaat ci na rape jen ca njeenje, raakiЙ— tap-tap mbaa fiis-fiis, laam ЕӢ hotiЙ— findi Laban na tumohe na Й—a.
31.13: Г‘am Koohi teeЙ“kee Й—a ЕӢ Betel ЕӢ Й—iska fu yipee atoh fa, fu yiiffa diwliin nga, te fu gappa so mbaЙ—i. ЕҠ Й—iski wa nik ndii, faЙ—a kur kii, fu haad kur Й—u. вҖқ В»
31.14: Wa YaЕӢhooЙ“a woo woo keem, Rasel na Leya loffa Й—e ne : В« ЖҒoo raakisЙ—i Й“ak na in lamaah ЕӢ kahan baabiЕӢ Й“oo.
31.15: ЖҒoo mand na jaambur nga Й—e ; laam a tooniЙ— Й“oo po a ГұamiЙ— candoomi.
31.16: Mbaa, in nu Kooh naafoh nga Й—e Й—ah, a wiЕӢ Й“oo na kuЙ“uuciЕӢ Й“oo ; tuma ini Kooh nak Й—a. В»
31.17: WeЙ—i YaЕӢhooЙ“a kooЙ—koh, a rapiЙ—ta Й“itiЙ“ ciЕӢ Й—e na kuЙ“uuciЕӢ Й—e ЕӢ ngeelemb ca,
31.18: a nammba Й“ay Й—oopaat caЕӢ Й—e na in ca a raakoh Paddan-Aram jen ne a dokuk kahan baab Й“a Isaahha ЕӢ Kanaan.
31.19: Waam raak Laban kaЙ—iЙ— hufa find caЕӢ mbaal caЕӢ Й—e. Rasel tondukka nga, a rokka in ca pestuuЙ— ca baab Й“a ambee ne ceЙ— kooh ciЕӢ Й—e.
31.20: YaЕӢhooЙ“a nammba inah ne Laban yi Й“aah ЕӢ cuuЙ“iЕӢ Aram ci nikЙ—i nga, a moonnda Й—e.
31.21: A saandohha na ina a raakoot jen, a huussa kala na woyse Ewfaraat po a pullaa, a yurahha ЕӢ Й“ak tangooca nik ЕӢ Galaad.
31.22: YaЕӢhooЙ“a cootiЙ— po wa raakka neeh kaahay, Laban hanndaa woyu.
31.23: A jaarra hun na Й“ooЙ“aЕӢ Й—e, Й“a taambЙ—eeЙ—a YaЕӢhooЙ“a ini ree neeh yasna-kanak, Й“a hannda Й—e rahas ЕӢ tangoocaЕӢ Galaad.
31.24: Waaye ЕӢ weka, Kooh teeЙ“ukka Laban ngaЕӢ heeЖҙ, a woosa Й—e ne : В« Wortuka woo YaЕӢhooЙ“a in. В»
31.25: Wa Laban rahas YaЕӢhooЙ“a, raak Й—e yipiЙ— ЕӢ tangoocaЕӢ Galaad ; Laban nammba yip Й—iip caЕӢ Й—e nga, a yi na Й“ooЙ“aЕӢ Й—e.
31.26: A kaЙ—ta ЕӢ YaЕӢhooЙ“a, a woosa Й—e ne : В« Fu haЙ“iЙ— ye cii, fu na Й—embohee so ye fu coote ? Fu Й“ayndoh kuЙ“uuciЕӢ ngo Й“itiЙ“ ci po haa Й“ooЙ“i ambohu ЕӢ hiГұoh.
31.27: Wee tah fu moonnda so, fu kaЙ—e te fu asukЙ—i so ? Fu woyeen ndo Й—ah, ЕӢ heen Й—a faЙ—e fu kaЙ— moЙ—oЙ—, ЕӢ Й“end Й—a na Й“i Жҙeek na haan na koora.
31.28: Fu onЙ—i so sah, ЕӢ askoh na set ciЕӢ ngo na kuЙ“uuciЕӢ ngo ; fu tum naandoha kat !
31.29: ЕҠ miniЙ— Й—a tum in sepЖҙiЙ—, waaye KoohiЕӢ baab Й—u teeЙ“kiЙ— to niinma, a woosa so ne : вҖң Wortuka woo YaЕӢhooЙ“a in. вҖқ
31.30: Fu seesuk haad kahan baab Й—u Й—ah, fu miniЙ— kaЙ— sah, waaye fu rokoh kooh ciЕӢ ngo ye ? В»
31.31: YaЕӢhooЙ“a loffa Laban ne : В« ЕҠ neЖҙЖҙohee ne fu naaf kuЙ“uuciЕӢ Й—a.
31.32: Waaye Й“o' nu fu hot na kooh ciЕӢ Й—a Й—ah, a pesissanЙ—i. ЕҠ fiki Й“ooЙ“iЕӢ ngo na Й“iЕӢ Й—a, marka, in nu fu hot na so te nik ne ya fu raaka Й—ah, Й“ayaa. В» Waam raak YaЕӢhooЙ“a inahЙ—i ne a Rasel rok ca.
31.33: WeЙ—i Laban aasoh ЕӢ Й—iipaЕӢ YaЕӢhooЙ“a na waЕӢ Leya na caЕӢ Гұaam ca kanak ca, a hotЙ—i in. A pulohha waЕӢ Leya, a aassa waЕӢ Rasel.
31.34: Raak Rasel Й“ayiЙ— kooh ca, a Й“ekka ca ЕӢ teg ngeelemb, a Й“ooffa nga. Laban marakka Й—iipa jen, a hotЙ—i in.
31.35: Rasel woosa Й—e ne : В« Baab deey, fu na hee so hey Й—aase, ЕӢ minЙ—i kuruk laam ЕӢ hot naaw. В» Ndaa a markoh po a yaaЙ“pa, a hotЙ—i ali in.
31.36: WeЙ—i YaЕӢhooЙ“a ayrukoh, a ngasukka Laban an : В« ЕҠ tum Й—a ye, ЕӢ haЙ“iЙ— winde ro' po fu taambЙ—ee so mand an ?
31.37: Wi fu waak ЕӢ in ciЕӢ ngo po fu Жҙutta, pulЙ—a ini fu hot ndii te fu raakkaa, degaa ndii ЕӢ fiki Й“ooЙ“iЕӢ ngo na Й“iЕӢ Й—a, Й“a atte Й“oo.
31.38: ЕҠ tumiЙ— kiis ndaЕӢkiyaah-kanak (20) ЕӢ kahan fu ; ali Й—oopaat moosЙ—i waanoh nga te ЕӢ moosЙ—i Й—a ГұamЙ—oh kuy yino.
31.39: Yaa nu apseen nga Й—ah, ЕӢ meeЙ—Й—i Й—a Й—e kom, Гұam meeЙ—a deguk, te Й—oopaat nu rokseen nga, wa nik na wek mbaa na noh, fu meeЙ— to Й—e meeЙ— wirndiЙ—uk.
31.40: DohЙ—iЕӢ nohi meeЙ— reeh nga so. Wek ree Й—ah, soosi hee so ape ; ЕӢ minuu sah gind pani.
31.41: Kiis ndaЕӢkiyaah-kanak (20) ceЙ—Й—i, ЕӢ nikka ca ЕӢ kahan fu, ЕӢ pangkiЙ—iЙ— Й—a kiis ndaЕӢkiyaah na kiis nikiis (14) ne fu on ndo kuЙ“uuciЕӢ Й—a kanak cii. ЕҠ pangkiЙ—issa Й—a kiis yasna-yino ne ЕӢ raak gat, waaye hondohЙ—i, fu Й“oЖҙsohiЙ— wirndiЕӢ ngo waas ndaЕӢkiyaah.
31.42: KoohiЕӢ Ibrahiima, a nammba nik Yi baab Й“oo Isaahha nupe, a amboheeЙ—i so Й—ah, fu heen ndo aaГұe yaah Й“arang. Waaye a hotiЙ— findi ЕӢ yaaЙ“oh na ini ЕӢ op po tahha niinma, a atteesa. В»
31.43: Wa a woo ineem, Laban loffa Й—e ne : В« ЖҒitiЙ“ cii, Й“a kuЙ“uuciЕӢ ngo, komaakcii, Й“a Й“iЕӢ ngo te gat cii, Гұam raak ca. In nu fu hot ndii Й—ah, wa Й“aah nga so ; Й—iski wa nik ndii fu liiЙ“iЙ— moos ne ЕӢ hey tume kuЙ“uuciЕӢ ngo in, na komaakciЕӢ Й“a e ?
31.44: Mi yi kiim Й—a Й“oo tufkiЙ— ambtiЙ—oh ndii mi na Й—a te wa raak ini seede'ana. В»
31.46: a woosa ЖҙaaЙ“aЕӢ Й—e ne Й“a parhaat atoh ; Й“a parahha, Й“a juukka ca Й—isik yino. Жіutta, Й“a Й“ooffa nga jen, Й“a ГұameeЙ—a.
31.47: Laban teekka Й—iska Yegaar-Sahaduta (juuk atoh seede ЕӢ peЙ—miЕӢ Й—e), YaЕӢhooЙ“a nammbaa teek Galeed (juuk atoh seede ЕӢ peЙ—miЕӢ Й—e).
31.48: Laban woyeen ne : В« JuukiЕӢ atoh fii weЙ—i ini na hee nike seedeeni ЕӢ harmban mi na Й—a woti. В» WeЙ— tah wa teekuusa Galeed.
31.49: Wa teekissuuЙ— Mispa (Й—isik markoha), laam Laban woyisseen ne : В« NikiЙ—i markaat Й“oo kanak baahiЙ— ne Й“oo hotohisЙ—i Й—ah.
31.50: Fu torhiЙ— kuЙ“uuciЕӢ ngo, mbaa fu Й“ay Й“itiЙ“ wiiriis fu deg nga Й“a Й—ah, inha ne ali Й“o' nikЙ—i ЕӢ harmban mi na Й—a, a Kooh nikan seedeeni ЕӢ harmban Й“oo. В»
31.51: Laban woyissa YaЕӢhooЙ“a ne : В« JuukiЕӢ atoh fii na atoh fi ЕӢ yip,
31.52: ceЙ— ЕӢ harmban Й“oo, weЙ— teeЙ“oh ne ЕӢ joyЙ—i ca cootuk ne ЕӢ yurhiЙ— in moЙ—aaЙ—i nga Й—a te fu joyЙ—aa nam tum.
31.53: KoohiЕӢ Ibrahiima na yiЕӢ Nahor , kooh ciЕӢ baab ciЕӢ Й“a, nikaat seedeeciЕӢ Й“oo. В» YaЕӢhooЙ“a ginnja ЕӢ Kooh yi baab Й“a Isaahha nupe.
31.54: Жіutta a puliЙ—ta seeЖҙkaah wuu Kooh, a Й“eeЙ—ukka ЖҙaaЙ“a jen, Й“a Гұammba, Й“a neehha nga, ЕӢ tangoora.

32.1: Wa Kooh wiis, Laban kurukka na Й“aaЙ“a teel, a morgiЙ—kohha na set caЕӢ Й—e na kuЙ“uucaЕӢ Й—e, a askohha na Й“a, a haadeeЙ—a.
32.2: YaЕӢhooЙ“a taalndiЙ—ta waasaЕӢ Й—e. A yi kaЙ—oh kaЙ—oh po, Й“i malaaka teeЙ“ukka Й—e.
32.3: Wa a hot Й“a, YaЕӢhooЙ“a woosa ne : В« Wii deey, wa daliЕӢ Kooh. В» WeЙ— tah a teekka Й—iska Mahanayim (dal ci kanak ci). YaЕӢhooЙ“a neЖҙЖҙohiЙ— cohiЕӢ Й—e na Esaaw
32.4: Wa ineem coot, YaЕӢhooЙ“a woossa Й“i Й“o' ne Й“a adug Й—e ЕӢ taambЙ—oh ce Esaaw, ЕӢ kur ka na woyse Seyiir ЕӢ Edom.
32.5: A woosa Й“a ne : В« ЖҠu kaЙ— Й—ah, Й—u na wee kilifaaniЕӢ ngo Esaaw ne : вҖң Г‘aamiЕӢ Й—a YaЕӢhooЙ“a a yi woos Й“oo. A woo ne a Й“aaЙ“ee Й—iskaЕӢ Laban, a nikka nga po woti.
32.6: A raakiЙ— Й“i inoh na mbaam, na Й“i pe' na mbaal na Й“i Гұaam Жҙaar na Й“itiЙ“. A yii kiim Й—a ne fu teyЙ—uk Й—e moЙ—oЙ—. вҖқ В»
32.7: Wa Й“ooЙ“a YaЕӢhooЙ“a woosee hay, Й“a woosa Й—e ne : В« ЖҒoo deey, Й“oo kaЙ—iЙ— ЕӢ taambЙ—oh fu Esaaw. A yii ЕӢ waas, na haye na Жҙaar teemet-nikiis (400). В»
32.8: Wa YaЕӢhooЙ“a kerah ineem a neЖҙЖҙohha lool. A paysohha Й“ooЙ“aЕӢ Й—e dal kanak, na mbaal ca na pe' ca na inoh ca na ngeelemb ca.
32.9: Laam a woo ne : В« Esaaw keen winoori Й—ah, wi tas hey mine fus. В»
32.10: YaЕӢhooЙ“a kiimmba Kooh an : В« NikiЙ—i, KoohiЕӢ caac Ibrahiima, yi nam nik KoohiЕӢ baab Isaahha, a fu woyee so ne ЕӢ dokkaat kur Й“oo, nga Й“i kahan baab Й“oo te fu hey yo ambohe.
32.11: Mi yi ГұaamiЕӢ Й—a deey, ЕӢ carЙ—i baahohi fu baahoh ho na ambi fu amb mbo ; laam, wa maa huuse ЕӢ kalaЕӢ Yurdan, ЕӢ ambee ndooЙ— dong ЕӢ yaah ciЕӢ ngo te ЕӢ raakiЙ— dal kanak kotii.
32.12: Mi yii kiim Й—a fu muciЙ— to ЕӢ yaah ciЕӢ taambЙ—oh ho Esaaw laam, ЕӢ neЖҙЖҙohiЙ— ne a raak ko ndii, a ap po, a apndoh ndaamu na kuЙ“u.
32.13: A fu woyee so ne : вҖң ЕҠ hey Й—a ambohe, ЕӢ Й“aat Й“i na hee rimkohe nga Й—a, po Й“a hend na merhey mi ЕӢ yaah-cookmi. Ali Й“o' minanЙ—i Й“a kind. вҖқ В»
32.14: YaЕӢhooЙ“a neeh ndaam, a nihsiЙ—ta taambЙ—oh ce Esaaw ЕӢ raak-raakaЕӢ Й—e ne a eЙ— Й—e ;
32.15: ca nikka pe' teemet-kanak (200) na suket ndaЕӢkiyaah-kanak (20), na mbaal riЙ“ teemet-kanak (200) na kuy ndaЕӢkiyaah-kanak (20),
32.16: na ngeelemb ndaЕӢkiyaah-kaahay (30) Й“apЙ—oh na buul caЕӢ ca, na inoh riЙ“ ndaЕӢkiyaah-nikiis (40) na naar ndaЕӢkiyaah na mbaam riЙ“ ndaЕӢkiyaah-kanak (20) na mbaam naar ndaЕӢkiyaah.
32.17: Gat nu nga Й—ah, a eЙ—taa Гұaam. A woosa Й“a ne : В« AdgiЙ—ohaat, Й—u kaЙ— te Й—u usoh, ЕӢ taambee nga Й—u. В»
32.18: A woosa Гұaama adug ne : В« Fu coh na taambЙ—oh ho Esaaw Й—ah, a meekis Й—a ne : вҖң Ya Й“a kilifaaniЕӢ Й—a ? Fu na kee nde ? Ya Й“a raak gati fu Й“ay wii ? вҖқ
32.19: Woyaa Й—e ne : вҖң A ГұaamiЕӢ Й—a YaЕӢhooЙ“a na Й—aasnukohee Й—a wa, te a yii hay ЕӢ finho Й“oo. вҖқ В»
32.20: A nammba woo ya kanakЙ—oh Й—aa, na ya kaahayЙ—oh, na Й“a Гұaakee ЕӢ gat ca jen. A dennga Й“a ne : В« ЖҠu coh na Esaaw Й—ah, woyaat Й—e ineem,
32.21: te kanaat alkoh Й“aat nga ne ГұaamiЕӢ Й—e YaЕӢhooЙ“a yii hay ЕӢ finhooЙ—u. В» YaЕӢhooЙ“a woosa ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ ce ne : В« Mi na hee Й—e giifЙ—e na in ci ЕӢ on Й—e ; Жҙut, ЕӢ coh na Й—e Й—ah, ЕӢ liiЙ“iЙ— ne a hey yo teyЙ—uke moЙ—oЙ—. В»
32.22: Gat ca onohu cootta, waaye a yi YaЕӢhooЙ“a, a neehha Й—iska. LebraЕӢ YaЕӢhooЙ“a
32.23: Na weka, YaЕӢhooЙ“a Й“ayya Й“itiЙ“ caЕӢ Й—e kanak ca, na Й“aЕӢ Й—e Гұaam ca kanak ca na kuЙ“uucaЕӢ Й—e ndaЕӢkiyaah na yinooca (11), a huusiЙ—ta Й“a kalaЕӢ Yabbok.
32.24: A koc Й“a ЖҙakaandkiЙ—, po Жҙutta a degga raak-raakaЕӢ Й—e nga.
32.25: A tassa ЕӢ Й—iska kiik ce ; a nikka nga po Жҙaar pulla nga Й—e, Й“a neehha leber po ЕӢ wiisaaЙ—iina.
32.26: Wa Жҙaara kaЙ— po, a inahha ne a miniЙ—Й—i YaЕӢhooЙ“a in ЕӢ lebera, a laЙ“pa Й—e ЕӢ rangaЖҙ ; rangЖҙiЕӢ YaЕӢhooЙ“a mukuЖҙca.
32.27: Жіaara woosa Й—e ne : В« FaЙ— to ЕӢ coot bala nohi pulan Й—ah. В» Waaye YaЕӢhooЙ“a woosa Й—e ne : В« ЕҠ heyЙ—i Й—a faЙ—e fu coot ne fu barke'iЙ—Й—i so Й—ah. В»
32.28: Жіaara meekissa Й—e ne : В« Fu teeku na ? В» A woosa ne : В« ЕҠ teeku YaЕӢhooЙ“a. В»
32.29: Жіaara woyissa Й—e ne : В« Fu teekissuuЙ—i YaЕӢhooЙ“a. TiikiЕӢ Й—a kotii wa Israayel, laam fu hiГұohiЙ— na Kooh, fu hiГұohha na Й“o' te ya fu min. В»
32.30: YaЕӢhooЙ“a nammba Й—e meekis : В« Fu miniЙ— to woo findi fu teeku e ? В» A woosa ne : В« Wee tah fu meeksee so tiikiЕӢ ngo ? В» ЕҠ ineem, a barke'iЙ—ta YaЕӢhooЙ“a.
32.31: YaЕӢhooЙ“a teekka Й—iska Peni'eel (fikiiriЕӢ Kooh) laam, a woo ne : В« ЕҠ hotiЙ— Kooh jahran te ЕӢ ris pes. В»
32.32: Wa noha pul, raak YaЕӢhooЙ“a kurkohiЙ— Peni'eel, a yiiЙ“eeЙ—a sagu rangЖҙiЕӢ Й—e.
32.33: Ineem weЙ— tah po woti, raakiЙ— Й“aki nik ЕӢ rangaЖҙ Israayel ci na ГұameeЙ—i wa, laam, YaЕӢhooЙ“a laЙ“see nga.

33.1: Wa YaЕӢhooЙ“a puloh Peni'eel, Й—ekka po a hotta Esaaw hayeeЙ—a na Жҙaar teemet-nikiis (400). A paysohha komaakca ЕӢ harmban Leya na Rasel na Гұaam ca kanak ca.
33.2: A adgiЙ— Гұaam ca kanak ca na kuЙ“uuca a raak na Й“a, a degga Leya nga na Й“aЕӢ Й—e, a mirndohiЙ—ta Rasel na Yuusufa.
33.3: Жіutta, a hannda adug ЕӢ fikiira a kaЙ—eeЙ—a, a ЖҙekЙ—eeЙ—a taambЙ—oh ce Esaaw poo a raakka waas yasna-kanak bala a reyan nga Й—e Й—ah.
33.4: Esaaw nuppa, a kaЙ—ta coha na Й—e. Wa a ree, a morgiЙ—ukka Й—e, Й“a ambsukohha kanak, Й“a fuЙ—eeЙ—a.
33.5: Wa Esaaw hot Й“itiЙ“ ca na komaakca, a meekissa YaЕӢhooЙ“a ne : В« ЖҒooЙ“i fu hun na Й“a Й“ii, Й“a ye nga Й—a ? В» YaЕӢhooЙ“a loffa Й—e ne : В« E kuЙ“uuci Kooh baahoh ho, kilifaani. В»
33.6: Г‘aam ca na kuЙ“uucaЕӢ Й“a reЙ“pa, Й“a ЖҙekiЙ—ta Esaaw.
33.7: Leya na Й“aЕӢ Й—e nammba reЙ“, Й“a tummba Й—aa. Жіutta, Yuusufa na Rasel nammba tum Й—aa.
33.8: Esaaw meekissa Й—e ne : В« An wa ye tah Й—a woosoh gat ci ЕӢ coh na ca jen ? В» YaЕӢhooЙ“a loffa Й—e an : В« Ne fu teyЙ—uk ko moЙ—oЙ— kilifaani. В»
33.9: Esaaw woosa Й—e ne : В« ЖіaariЕӢ ngo, ЕӢ raakiЙ— po ЕӢ doyЙ—iЙ—, fu miniЙ— amb ini fu raak. В»
33.10: YaЕӢhooЙ“a loffa Й—e ne : В« Muk ЕӢ kiim Й—a wa kiim ne fu ambЙ—isЙ—i so aay-keeГұ Й—ah, teya in ci ЕӢ on Й—a ; laam wi ЕӢ coh na Й—a fu teyЙ—ukiЙ— to moЙ—oЙ— po haa ЕӢ coh na Kooh jahran.
33.11: Mbaa teya in ci ЕӢ on Й—a, laam Kooh oniЙ— to po ЕӢ raakiЙ— lool. В» YaЕӢhooЙ“a ГұaakiЙ—ta Й—e na ca po Esaaw mirndohha ca Й“ay.
33.12: Esaaw woosa Й—e ne : В« Haya Й“oo kaЙ—, ЕӢ Й“end Й—a. В»
33.13: YaЕӢhooЙ“a woosa Й—e ne : В« Kilifaani, fu inhiЙ— ne komaakci ndengЙ—i te ЕӢ waaЙ— seeskiЙ— Й—oopaat ci na Й“apЙ—e Й—ah, noh yino dong ca kaan jen.
33.14: Kon kilifaani, fu na hee so hey adge, ЕӢ hun na komaakci na gat ci, ЕӢ taambee nga Й—a Жҙin-Жҙin po mbaЙ—na ЕӢ raakan Й—a ЕӢ Seyiir. В»
33.15: Esaaw woosa Й—e ne : В« Mbaa, faЙ—a ЕӢ haawsiЙ— Й—a ngaЕӢ Й“ooЙ“iЕӢ ngo. В» YaЕӢhooЙ“a woosa Й—e ne : В« Wa carЙ—aa, ЕӢ waaЙ—ee rek ne fu teyЙ—uk ko moЙ—oЙ—. В»
33.16: MbaЙ—i, Esaaw kooЙ—issa waas, a gurdeeЙ—a Seyiir,
33.17: waaye YaЕӢhooЙ“a yurahha kur ka na woyse Sukkoot. A haЙ“iЙ—ta kahan nga, a nammba Й—iipiЙ— Й—oopaat caЕӢ Й—e nga ; weЙ— tah Й—iska teekuusa Sukkoot (Й—iip).
33.18: YaЕӢhooЙ“a reyiЙ— Kanaan moЙ—oЙ— kotii ЕӢ pulohaЕӢ Й—e Paddan-Aram, a yipee ЕӢ fiki kur ka na woyse Sisem.
33.19: A romohee yohna a yipohee Й—iip caЕӢ Й—e ngaЕӢ kuЙ“uucaЕӢ Hamor, baabiЕӢ Sisem. CandoomaЕӢ wa nikee Жҙel haalis teemet (100).
33.20: A haЙ“iЙ—ta seeЖҙkoha nga ; a teekkaa El-Elohe-Israayel (KoohiЕӢ Israayel a yi Kooh).

34.1: Wa raakka mbeh, Dinaa, kuЙ“ka cafЖҙa YaЕӢhooЙ“a raakee na Leya, kaЙ—ta marka Й“itiЙ“ caЕӢ kur ka,
34.2: raak Hamor, ya Й“aah ЕӢ cuuЙ“aЕӢ Hiw ca a yi adgohee wa ; a raakeen kuЙ“u Жҙaar teeku Sisem. Sisem yeem hotta Dinaa, a ammba Й—e, a siiffa Й—e.
34.3: A waaЙ—ta Й—e po a jeemeeЙ—a Й—e nook ЕӢ haf ce ne yeem waaЙ— Й—e ;
34.4: a woosa baab Й“a Hamor ne : В« Baab, Й“ayiЙ— to cafЖҙii Й“itiЙ“. В»
34.5: Wa YaЕӢhooЙ“a kerah ne Sisem yahiЙ— kuЙ“kaЕӢ Й—e Dinaa, a wooЙ—i in nga laam wa raak kuЙ“uucaЕӢ Й—e Жҙaar ca ЕӢ yohon ca na gat ca ; a sek sek po Й“a hayya.
34.6: ЕҠ neeh ceem, Hamor, baab Й“i Sisem kaЙ—ta ЕӢ YaЕӢhooЙ“a ne a woo na Й—e.
34.7: Wa hennda kuЙ“uucaЕӢ YaЕӢhooЙ“a pulohha yohon ca, Й“a kerahha ina raak, wa mannda na Й“aseeh nga Й“a. Wa ayrukiЙ—ta Й“a lool laam Sisem haЙ“iЙ— in moЙ—aaЙ—i'iЙ— ; faanka a faanuk kuЙ“kaЕӢ YaЕӢhooЙ“a, ini joyЙ—i tumu ЕӢ Israayel.
34.8: Hamor woosa Й“a ne : В« Sisem, kuЙ“kiЕӢ ngo waaЙ—iЙ— Dinaa lool ; mi yii kiim Й—u ne Й—u on Й—e Й—e Й“itiЙ“.
34.9: Te, Й“oo kilooktiЙ—ohaat, Й—u Й“ayee Й“itiЙ“ ЕӢ kuЙ“uuciЕӢ Й“oo, Й“oo namee kilook ЕӢ cafaЖҙ ciЕӢ Й—u.
34.10: Kur ki weЙ—i wii, genaat na Й“oo, Й—u toontukee nga, Й—u waak merhey nga. В»
34.11: Sisem nammba woo YaЕӢhooЙ“a na taambЙ—oh caЕӢ Dinaa ne : В« ЖҠu teyЙ—ukiЙ— to Й—ah, in nu Й—u meekis so Й—ah, ЕӢ hey Й—u wa eЙ—e.
34.12: Meeksaat to cakiim Й“itiЙ—, ЕӢ hey wa eЙ—ohe. Meeksaat to in laayiЙ—, ЕӢ hey Й—u wa one ; teyЙ—ukaat to on kuЙ“kiЕӢ Й—u Й“itiЙ“ rek. В»
34.13: Sagu yahi taambЙ—oh Й“a Dinaa yahu, kuЙ“uuciЕӢ YaЕӢhooЙ“a ГұaaГұohha Sisem na Hamor, yi baabiЕӢ Й—e ;
34.14: Й“a woosa Й“a ne : В« ЖҒoo minЙ—i on taambЙ—oh Й“oo Жҙaari nguЙ—ukЙ—i laam ineem, mand na Й“aseeh nga Й“oo.
34.15: ЖҒoo min Й—u teyЙ—ukiЙ— ЕӢ in yino, weЙ— ne Жҙaar ciЕӢ kur ki jen nguЙ—uk findi Й“oo.
34.16: ЕҠ ineem Й—u hey mine Й“ay Й“itiЙ“ ЕӢ cafaЖҙ ciЕӢ Й“oo, Й“oo min Й“ay ngaЕӢ Й“iЕӢ Й—u ; Й“oo gen na Й—u, Й“oo nik yino.
34.17: Waaye Й—u hunЙ—i ЕӢ ineem Й—ah, Й“oo hey Й“aye taambЙ—oh Й“oo te Й“oo coot na Й—e. В»
34.18: WeЙ— Hamor na kuЙ“kiЕӢ Й—e teyЙ—ukoh ineem.
34.19: A yi Sisem, a arra tum ina a woyu sagu waaЙ—a a waaЙ—ee kuЙ“kaЕӢ YaЕӢhooЙ“a. A nikee Й“oya uupee kerhiЙ—u ЕӢ kahan baab Й“a.
34.20: Hamor na Sisem kaЙ—ta ЕӢ teembohaara, ЕӢ aasohaanaЕӢ kur ka, Й“a woosa Й“ooЙ“aЕӢ Й“a ne :
34.21: В« ЖҒooЙ“ii deey, Й“a raakiЙ— jam na Й“oo, Й“oo faЙ—aat Й“a, Й“a gen ЕӢ kur ki laam wa angiЙ— ; Й“a toontukee nga, Й“oo minee Й“ay Й“itiЙ“ ЕӢ kuЙ“uuciЕӢ Й“a, Й“a namee Й“ay Й“itiЙ“ ЕӢ Й“iЕӢ Й“oo.
34.22: ЖҒa hey teyЙ—uke gen na Й“oo, Й“oo nik yino, waaye, bala ineem minan nik Й—ah, Жҙaar ciЕӢ kur ki jen hey nguЙ—ke findiiЙ“a.
34.23: ЖҒoo teyЙ—ukaat tum ini Й“a woo, Й“a min gen na Й“oo. Wa nik Й—ah, gat ciЕӢ Й“a na raak-raakiЕӢ Й“a jen jaaran nik cuu Й“oo. В»
34.24: Жіaar ca nikee ЕӢ aasohaanaЕӢ kur ka jen, kerhiЙ—ta Hamor na kuЙ“kiЕӢ Й—e Sisem, Й“a nguЙ—ukka.
34.25: Wa Й“a nguЙ—uk po wa degga neeh kanak, miskiЙ—a nikka na Жҙaar ca, kanak ЕӢ kuЙ“uucaЕӢ YaЕӢhooЙ“a, Simeyong na Lewi, taambЙ—oh caЕӢ Dinaa, Й“ayya ndang caЕӢ Й“a ; Й“a aassa kur ka moЙ—oЙ—, Й“a appa Й“a jen.
34.26: ЖҒa apndohha Hamor na Sisem, Й“a naaffa Dinaa, Й“a cootta na Й—e.
34.27: WeЙ—i kuЙ“uucaЕӢ YaЕӢhooЙ“a Й“inooЙ“a rokoh in ca nikee ЕӢ fiЙ—aaf ca, Й“a Й“ayya ina nikee raak-raak ЕӢ kur ka jen sagu njoofa taambЙ—oh Й“a Dinaa Й“eku.
34.28: ЖҒa Й“ayya Й—oopaat caЕӢ Й“a na in ca nikee ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ kur ka na yohon ca jen.
34.29: ЖҒa Й“ayndohha raak-raakaЕӢ Й“a jen na komaakca Жҙin ca na Й“itiЙ“ ca, Й“a faЙ—Й—i ali in ЕӢ kahan ca.
34.30: Wa Й“a puloh ndeem, YaЕӢhooЙ“a woosa Simeyong na Lewi ne : В« ЖҠu deey, Й—u tefЙ—iЙ— to ro', Й—u tahiЙ— po Й“i Kanaan na Й“i Peris, Й“i gen kur cii, hey yo sange. ЖҒa hey ambsukohe, Й“a keen ndo, Й“a apndoh ho na Й“i kahan ndo, laam Й“ooЙ“iЕӢ ngo laayЙ—i. В»
34.31: ЖҒa loffa Й—e ne : В« Жіaari joyiЙ— tum taambЙ—oh Й“oo findi toonkoh e ? В»

35.1: Wa raakka mbeh, Kooh woosa YaЕӢhooЙ“a ne : В« KaЙ—a Betel, te fu nik nga ; haЙ“Й—a seeЖҙkoha nga wuu so, mi yi Koohi teeЙ“kee Й—a nga, wa fu nupee taambЙ—oh fu Esaaw. В»
35.2: YaЕӢhooЙ“a woosa Й“i kahan ce na Й“ooЙ“a hunee na Й—e jen ne : В« SaЙ“sukohaat na kooh ciЕӢ jaambur ci, ci nik na Й—u, Й“oktukaat te Й—u Й“ekuk kulЙ“a wiiriis,
35.3: Й“oo kaЙ— Betel, ЕӢ haЙ“Й—iЙ—a Kooh seeЖҙkoha nga. A yi hirpee so wa ЕӢ feyu te a Й“aatЙ—ohha so ЕӢ Й—isik ci ЕӢ taamb jen. В»
35.4: ЖҒa Й“ayya kooh ca nikee na Й“a jen, na long-long ca Й“a Й“ekkee ЕӢ nof caЕӢ Й“a, Й“a eЙ—ta YaЕӢhooЙ“a ca ; a acca ca ЕӢ tasaЕӢ kidga yakka nik ЕӢ sero Sisem.
35.5: Жіutta, Й“a cooteeЙ—a. Kooh tummba, Й“ooЙ“aЕӢ kur ca wilee Й“a neЖҙЖҙohha po, Й“a kaaГұЙ—i taambiЙ— kuЙ“uucaЕӢ YaЕӢhooЙ“a.
35.6: YaЕӢhooЙ“a na Й“ooЙ“a hunee na Й—e kaЙ—ta po Й“a reesa Luus, weЙ— Betel, ЕӢ kur kaЕӢ Kanaan poyi.
35.7: A haЙ“iЙ—ta seeЖҙkoha nga, a teekka Й—iska El-Betel (KoohiЕӢ Betel) laam, Kooh teeЙ“kohee Й—e ndaam wa a nupee taambЙ—oh ce.
35.8: ЖҒitfa meeЙ—ee Й“apiЙ— Rebeka na woyse Debora hunee na Й“a. A yaa kaanohha ndaam. ЖҒa acca Й—e ЕӢ tasaЕӢ kidga yakka nik ЕӢ sero Betel ; Й“a teekkaa KidgiЕӢ-FuЙ—-ci.
35.9: ЕҠ pulohaЕӢ YaЕӢhooЙ“a Paddan-Aram po a reesa Betel, Kooh teeЙ“kissa Й—e nga, a barke'iЙ—ta Й—e.
35.10: A woosa Й—e ne : В« TiikiЕӢ Й—a wa YaЕӢhooЙ“a, waaye fu Й“eeЙ—kissassanЙ—i YaЕӢhooЙ“a, fu teeku Israayel kotii. В» Kooh teekka Й—e Israayel.
35.11: A woyissa Й—e ne : В« Г‘am Koohi Min. RimaatЙ—oha, fu Й“aatuk laam cuuЙ“ angiЙ— na heet laayiЙ— hey pulohe nga Й—a ; Й“i buur sah hey raake nga.
35.12: Kur ki ЕӢ onee Ibrahiima, ЕӢ onndaa Isaahha, ЕӢ hey Й—a wa one, ЕӢ ona Й“i na hee rimkohe nga Й—a. В»
35.13: Wa a woo po Жҙutta, Kooh faЙ—ta YaЕӢhooЙ“a ЕӢ ndaam, a cootta Й—afka.
35.14: YaЕӢhooЙ“a Й“ayya atoh, a yippaa ЕӢ Й—iska. A seeЖҙkohhaa anaah, a yiiffa diwliin ЕӢ Й—afuk wa.
35.15: A teekka Й—iska Kooh woyohee na Й—e Betel (kahan Kooh). RaakuukaЕӢ Benyaamin na kakaan kaЕӢ Rasel
35.16: Wa YaЕӢhooЙ“a na Й“ooЙ“a hunee na Й—e puloh Betel, Й“a kaЙ— kaЙ— po Й“a tassa ree Efraata, raak Rasel nikee rook, a miskasseeЙ—a ; raakaЕӢ Й—e kuЙ“u misikka lool.
35.17: ЕҠ Й—ooЖҙ miskiЙ—eem, dooГұoha nikee na Й—e woosa Й—e ne : В« Kana neЖҙЖҙoh, fu raakis kuЙ“u Жҙaar. В»
35.18: Waam raak Rasel kaaneeЙ—a, bala a nguЙ—an Й—ah, a teekka kuЙ“ka Benooni (kuЙ“kiЕӢ miskiЙ—iЕӢ ngo). Waaye baab Й“a teekka Й—e Benyaamin (kuЙ“kiЕӢ yaah-Гұaahmi).
35.19: Rasel kurukka nga, a acuusa ЕӢ waas Efraata, weЙ— Betlehem.
35.20: YaЕӢhooЙ“a yippa atoh inhisoha ЕӢ ruy-ruyaЕӢ Й—e ; atoh faam wa Й—aa nga po Й—iski maa woyohe na Й—u ndii.
35.21: Wa Israayel (yi YaЕӢhooЙ“a) puloh ndaam, a kaЙ—ta, a yippa Й—iip caЕӢ Й—e ЕӢ finho Migdal-Eder.
35.22: ЕҠ nikaЕӢ Israayel ndaam, Ruben faanukka na Bilha Гұaama baab Й“a Й“ayee Й“itiЙ“ ; Israayel yeggaa. YaЕӢhooЙ“a raakeen kuЙ“u Жҙaar ndaЕӢkiyaah na kanak (12).
35.23: ЖҒi a raakee na Leya nikee Ruben saawiЕӢ Й—e, na Simeyong, na Lewi na Yudaa na Issaakar na Sabuloon.
35.24: ЖҒi a raakee na Rasel nikka Yuusufa na Benyaamin.
35.25: ЖҒi a raakee na Bilha, ГұaamaЕӢ Rasel nikee Daan na Naftaali.
35.26: ЖҒi a raakee na Silpa, ГұaamaЕӢ Leya nikee Gaad na Aser. ЖҒeem, Й“eЙ— kuЙ“uuci Жҙaar ci YaЕӢhooЙ“a raakoh Paddan-Aram. Kakaan kaЕӢ Isaahha
35.27: Wa raakka mbeh, YaЕӢhooЙ“a dokukka Й—iskaЕӢ baab Й“a Isaahha ЕӢ Mamre ЕӢ sero Kiriyat-Arba wa na woyse Hebron kotii. Ibrahiima nameen gen nga.
35.28: Isaahha kaan wa a raak kiis teemet na kiis ndaЕӢkiyaah-yasna-kaahay (180).
35.29: A kaan ЕӢ finho kipes hutiЙ—, a haadda Jaanim. KuЙ“uuciЕӢ Й—e YaЕӢhooЙ“a na Esaaw uummba Й—e.

36.1: Inii weЙ— naandsuku ЕӢ Esaaw, yi teeku Edom, na Й“i rimkoh nga Й—e.
36.2: Esaaw Й“ayeen Й“itiЙ“ ЕӢ cafaЖҙ caЕӢ Kanaan ; Й“eem Й“a nikee Aada na Ohlibaama. Aada nikee kuЙ“u Eloon ya Й“aahee ЕӢ cuuЙ“iЕӢ Hit ci. Ohlibaama nikee kuЙ“u Aana, Aana nikka kuЙ“u Sibeyon ya Й“aahee ЕӢ cuuЙ“iЕӢ Hiw ci.
36.3: TaambЙ—oh Nebayot, Baasmat yi kuЙ“u Ismaayla namee Й“aah ЕӢ Й“itiЙ“ ciЕӢ Й—e.
36.4: Aada a yi rim Elifaas, Baasmat rimmba Rewyel,
36.5: Ohlibaama rimmba Yewus na Yalaam na Koorah. ЖҒii Й“eЙ— kuЙ“uuci Жҙaar ci Esaaw raakoh Kanaan.
36.6: Wa raakka mbeh, Esaaw Й“ayya Й“itiЙ“ ciЕӢ Й—e na kuЙ“uuciЕӢ Й—e, Жҙaar na Й“itiЙ“, na Й“ooЙ“aЕӢ Й—e, a Й“ayndohha Й—oopaat caЕӢ Й—e na in ca a raakoh Kanaan jen, a yongsukka kur wiiriis, a ussa taambЙ—oh ce YaЕӢhooЙ“a.
36.7: Raak-raakaЕӢ Й“a laayee laay po Й“a haЙ“isseeЙ—i ЕӢ kur ka sagu Й—oopaat caЕӢ Й“a.
36.8: Esaaw yi teeku Edom, kaЙ—oh yipa Й—aa ЕӢ tangoocaЕӢ Seyiir.
36.9: Inii weЙ— naandsuku ЕӢ Esaaw na Й“i rimkoh nga Й—e. A yi caaciЕӢ Edom ca genee ЕӢ tangoocaЕӢ Seyiir.
36.10: Tiik ciЕӢ kuЙ“uuciЕӢ Esaaw Жҙaar ci ceЙ—i cii : Elifaas yi a raak na Й“itiice Aada, na Rewyel yi a raak na Baasmat.
36.11: KuЙ“uuciЕӢ Elifaas Жҙaar ci nikka Teemaan, Omaar, Sefoo, Gataam na Kenas.
36.12: Elifaas raakeen Й“itiЙ“ Гұaam na woyse Timna ; a raakeen na Й—e kuЙ“u teeku Amalek. ЖҒeem Й“eЙ— set ciЕӢ Aada, Й“iti Esaaw.
36.13: KuЙ“uuciЕӢ Rewyel Жҙaar ci nikee Nahat, Seerah, Samaa na Misaa. ЖҒeem Й“eЙ— set ciЕӢ Baasmat, Й“iti Esaaw.
36.14: KuЙ“uuci Жҙaar ciЕӢ Й“iti Esaaw yi na woyse Ohlibaama, kuЙ“kiЕӢ Aana yiЕӢ Sibeyon, Й“eЙ— Yewus, Yalaam na Koorah.
36.15: KilifaaciЕӢ Й“i rimkoh ЕӢ Esaaw Й“a Й—i Й“ii : ЖҒi rimkoh ЕӢ saawiЕӢ Й—e Elifaas nikee Teemaan, Omaar, Sefoo, Kenas,
36.16: Koorah, Gataam na Amalek ; Й“eem Й“eЙ— nikee kilifa ЕӢ kur kaЕӢ Edom Й“i rimkoh ЕӢ Elifaas kuЙ“kiЕӢ Aada.
36.17: ЖҒi rimkoh ЕӢ Rewyel, kuЙ“u Esaaw, nikee Nahat, Seerah, Samaa na Misaa ; Й“eem Й“eЙ— nikee kilifa ЕӢ kur kaЕӢ Edom Й“i rimkoh ЕӢ Rewyel kuЙ“u Baasmat, Й“iti Esaaw.
36.18: ЖҒi rimkoh ЕӢ Ohlibaama nikee Yewus, Yalaam na Koorah ; Й“eem Й“eЙ— kilifaaca rimkoh ЕӢ kuЙ“kiЕӢ Aana, Ohlibaama yi Й“iti Esaaw.
36.19: ЖҒeem Й“eЙ— rimkoh ЕӢ Esaaw, Й“a nikka kilifa ЕӢ Edom. ЖҒi rimkoh ЕӢ Seyiir
36.20: -21 ЖҒii Й“eЙ— rimkoh ЕӢ Seyiir yi Й“aah ЕӢ cuuЙ“aЕӢ Hoor ca te Й“i Edom raakka Й“a geniЙ— nga : Lootaan, Sobaal, Sibeyon, Aana, Disoon, Eeser na Disaan. ЖҒeem Й“eЙ— nikee Й“i rimkoh ЕӢ Seyiir, kilifaacaЕӢ cuuЙ“aЕӢ Hoor ca genee ngaЕӢ kur kaЕӢ Edom.
36.22: KuЙ“uuciЕӢ Lootaan Жҙaar ci nikka Hoori na Hemaam ; taambЙ—oh ce Й“itiЙ“ teeksee Timna.
36.23: KuЙ“uuciЕӢ Sobaal Жҙaar ci nikka Alwaan, Manahat, Eebal, Sefoo na Onaam.
36.24: KuЙ“uuciЕӢ Sibeyon Жҙaar ci nikee Ayaa na Aana. Aana yeem a yi koc hot masma dohЙ—a balЙ—ee ЕӢ kehЖҙi ngaЕӢ bilaf fa, waam raak Й—e niiЙ—ee mbaam caЕӢ baab Й“a Sibeyon.
36.25: KuЙ“uuciЕӢ Aana nikee Disoon na taambЙ—oh ce Й“itiЙ“ Ohlibaama.
36.26: KuЙ“uuci Жҙaar ciЕӢ Disoon nikee Hemdaan, Esbaan, Yitraan na Keraan.
36.27: KuЙ“uuci Жҙaar ciЕӢ Eeser nikka Bilhaan, Sawaan na Akaan.
36.28: ЖҒiЕӢ Disaan nikka Uus na Araan.
36.29: -30 Kon, Й“ii Й“eЙ— nikee kilifaacaЕӢ cuuЙ“aЕӢ Hoor ca ЕӢ kur kaЕӢ Seyiir : Lootaan, Sobaal, Sibeyon, Aana, Disoon, Eeser na Disaan. Buur ca nikee ЕӢ Edom
36.31: Bala buur raakan ЕӢ Israayel Й—ah, Й“ii Й“eЙ— nikee buur caЕӢ kur kaЕӢ Edom :
36.32: Bela kuЙ“u Beyoor, a yi nikee ЕӢ Dinaaba.
36.33: Wa Bela kaan, Yoobaab kuЙ“u Seerah, ya nikee ЕӢ Bosra a yi namsiЙ— Й—e.
36.34: Wa Yoobaab kaan, Husaam ya ЕӢ kur kaЕӢ Teemaan-Teemaan ca, a yi namsiЙ— Й—e.
36.35: Wa Husaam kaan, Hadad, ya nikee ЕӢ Awit, kuЙ“u Bedad, namsiЙ—ta Й—e ; a yi laЙ“ee Majaan-Majaan ca ЕӢ kur kaЕӢ Mowab.
36.36: Wa Hadad kaan, Samla ya ЕӢ Masreeka namsiЙ—ta Й—e.
36.37: Wa Samla kaan, Sawul ya ЕӢ Rehobot-Hanahar namsiЙ—ta Й—e.
36.38: Wa Sawul kaan, Ba'al-Hanan kuЙ“kiЕӢ Akboor namsiЙ—ta Й—e.
36.39: Wa Ba'al-Hanan kuЙ“kiЕӢ Akboor kaan, Hadar ya ЕӢ Pawu namsiЙ—ta Й—e. ЖҒitiice teeksee Mehtabeel kuЙ“u Matareed yi kuЙ“kiЕӢ Mesaahab.
36.40: -43 ЖҒii Й“eЙ— nikee kilifaacaЕӢ cuuЙ“iЕӢ Edom ci puloh ЕӢ Esaaw, yaa nu nga Й—ah, na kur kaЕӢ Й—a : Timna, Alwaah, Yetet, Ohlibaama, Eela, Pinoon, Kenas, Teemaan, Mibsaar, Magdiyel na Iraam.

37.1: ЕҠ ini kaЙ— ЕӢ YaЕӢhooЙ“a, a nikee ЕӢ Kanaan ЕӢ kur ka baab Й“a genohaahe.
37.2: Inii weЙ— naandsuku ЕӢ YaЕӢhooЙ“a na kahan ce. Wa kuЙ“kiЕӢ Й—e Yuusufa raak kiis ndaЕӢkiyaah na kiis yasna-kanak (17), a meeЙ—ee hun na taambЙ—oh ciЕӢ Й—e, Й“a niiЙ—ee mbaal ca na pe' caЕӢ baab Й“a. A nikee komaaki, a meeЙ—ta hun na kuЙ“uuciЕӢ Bilha na Й“iЕӢ Silpa, Й“itiЙ“ ciЕӢ baab Й“a. TaambЙ—oh ciЕӢ Й—e tummba in moЙ—aaЙ—i Й—ah, a woo baab Й“a wa.
37.3: Israayel raakee Й—e ЕӢ kiyaЙ“kookaЕӢ Й—e, tahha po a yi a uupee waaЙ— ЕӢ kuЙ“uuciЕӢ Й—e jen. A haЙ“Й—iЙ—ta Й—e kulЙ“a moЙ—oh na moЙ—oh.
37.4: TaambЙ—oh ciЕӢ Й—e hotta ne baab Й“a uupee Й—e waaЙ—, weЙ—i tahee Й“a sang Й—e po, Й“a mineeЙ—i woo na Й—e sah, woo moЙ—oЙ—.
37.5: Wa kaЙ—eeЙ—a po, Yuusufa heeЖҙca, a naandsukka taambЙ—oh ciЕӢ Й—e wa, Й“a uuppa Й—e nga sang.
37.6: A woo Й“a ne : В« SikЙ—ukaat ini ЕӢ heeЖҙ.
37.7: An Й“oo nikee ЕӢ yohon ca, Й“oo tokeeЙ—a bele, Й—ekka po Й—ufiЕӢ ngo tufukka, ciЕӢ Й—u willaa, ca ЖҙekЙ—eeЙ—aa. В»
37.8: TaambЙ—oh ciЕӢ Й—e woosa Й—e ne : В« Fu waaЙ— woo ne a fu na hee nike buuriЕӢ Й“oo e ? Fu yilif Й“oo e ? В» Tahha po Й“a uuppa Й—e sang, sagu heeЖҙ caЕӢ Й—e na in ca a woyee nga.
37.9: Wa Yuusufa heeЖҙis, a naandsukissaa taambЙ—oh ciЕӢ Й—e an : В« Hee ! ЕҠ heeЖҙissiЙ— nohi na caЙ“ni na hor ndaЕӢkiyaah na yino ЖҙekЙ—eeЙ—a so. В»
37.10: A nammbaa naandsuk baab Й“a, yeem ngassa Й—e an : В« Fu heeЖҙ ye weem ? Fu liiЙ“iЙ— ne mi na yaay Й—u na taambЙ—oh ciЕӢ Й—a, Й“oo hey Й—a ЖҙekЙ—e e ? В»
37.11: TaambЙ—oh ciЕӢ Yuusufa ayrukka Й—e, YaЕӢhooЙ“a Й—aakohha heeЖҙ ceem nof. TaambЙ—oh ciЕӢ Yuusufa tooniЙ— Й—e
37.12: Wa raakeen jamano, taambЙ—oh ciЕӢ Yuusufa kaЙ—ta mangaana na gataЕӢ baab Й“a ЕӢ Й“ak kur ka na woyse Sisem.
37.13: -14 Mbeh, Israayel woosa kuЙ“kiЕӢ Й—e Yuusufa ne : В« Haya ЕӢ woos Й—a, fu marka taambЙ—oh ciЕӢ Й—a ЕӢ Sisem, ndah Й“a Й—aa ЕӢ jam na Й—oopaat ca. In nu raak nga Й—ah, fu woo so. В» Yuusufa woosa Й—e ne : В« Ee. В» A tuuЖҙca Yuusufa, yeem pulohha OonaЕӢ-Hebron, a rappa ЕӢ Й“ak Sisem.
37.15: Жіaar cohha na Й—e wiltiЙ—oheeЙ—a ЕӢ bilaf fa, a meekissa Й—e ne : В« Fu na waake ye ? В»
37.16: Yuusufa woosa Й—e ne : В« Mi na marke taambЙ—oh ciЕӢ ngo, fu miniЙ— to woo Й—iski Й“a na niiЙ—ohe e ? В»
37.17: Жіaara loffa Й—e ne : В« ЖҒa kurkiЙ— ndii, ЕӢ kerhiЙ— Й“a woyeeЙ—a ne Й“aa kee Dotan. В» Yuusufa kaЙ—ta Й“a raaka ЕӢ Dotan.
37.18: Wa taambЙ—oh ciЕӢ Й—e Жҙok Й—e hayeeЙ—a, bala a reyan nga Й“a Й—ah, Й“a waakohha Й—e ap.
37.19: ЖҒa woytiЙ—ohha ЕӢ harmban Й“a ne : В« HeЙ— heeЖҙ ci a yoon na haye.
37.20: ЖҒoo apaat Й—e, Й“oo Й“ek Й—e ЕӢ ngurtut. Hey Й—ah, Й“oo woo ne a Й—oopaat saahiЙ— ap Й—e ; Й“oo marak findi heeЖҙ ciЕӢ Й—e na hee mirndohe. В»
37.21: Wa Ruben kerah ineem, a waaЙ—ta muciЙ— Yuusufa, a woosa Й“a ne : В« ЖҒoo kanaat Й—e ap. В»
37.22: A degga nga ne : В« Kanaat aam Гұif, Й“ekaat Й—e ЕӢ ngurtuta ЕӢ bilaf fa ween, yaah ciЕӢ Й“oo degkuu Й—e. В» A woosa Й“a ineem ne a min Й—e muciЙ— po a wik Й—e baab Й“a.
37.23: Wa Yuusufa ree, Й“a ammba Й—e, Й“a wolissa kulЙ“aakaЕӢ Й—e moЙ—ohngaana,
37.24: Й“a njaffa Й—e ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ ngurtuta.
37.25: Жіutta Й“a Й“ooffa ne Й“a Гұam. ЖҠekka po Й“a hotta Ismaayla-Ismaaylaaca huniЙ—, pulohiЙ— Galaad na ngeelemb caЕӢ Й“a sifiЙ— Й“i toon findi cuuraay, daakaande na diw faan, Й“a kaЙ—eeЙ—a Misra.
37.26: Yudaa woosa taambЙ—oh ciЕӢ Й—e ne : В« Wa raakiЙ— Й“oo winde etoh, Й“oo ap taambЙ—oh Й“oo po Жҙut, Й“oo Й—asЙ—ohee wa ?
37.27: Ismaayla-Ismaaylaaca Й“eЙ—Й—een na haye, Й“oo toonaat Й“a Й—e, Й“oo apuu Й—e laam, e Й“oo Й“aah Гұif, a taambЙ—oh Й“oo. В» ЖҒa hunnda nga.
37.28: Wa toonoh ca ree, tel Й“a puloh kur ka na woyse Majaan, Й“a puliЙ—ta Yuusufa ЕӢ ngurtuta, Й“a toonohha Й“a Й—e Жҙel haalis ndaЕӢkiyaah-kanak (20) ; Ismaayla-Ismaaylaaca cootta na Й—e Misra.
37.29: Wa Ruben wiiruk ngurtuta, a hotta ne Yuusufa nikisЙ—i nga, keeГұaЕӢ Й—e reehha, a faarra kulЙ“aacaЕӢ Й—e.
37.30: A kaЙ—ta ЕӢ taambЙ—oh ciЕӢ Й—e, a woosa Й“a ne : В« Cooy, Yuusufa nikisЙ—i ndaam ! ЕҠ tuman na ? В»
37.31: ЖҒa hoossa suket, Й“a tahha'iЙ—ta kulЙ“aakaЕӢ Yuusufa na Гұif ma.
37.32: Жіutta Й“a kommba baab Й“a wa, Й“a woosa Й—e ne : В« Inii, Й“oo paraha parah, wa kulЙ“aakiЕӢ kuЙ“kiЕӢ Й—a haa e ? В»
37.33: YaЕӢhooЙ“a inhissaa, a woosa ne : В« Marka ! A Й—oopaat saahiЙ— sifiГұsoh Й—e, cooy, Yuusufa sifiГұsohuuЙ— ! В»
37.34: Wa YaЕӢhooЙ“a inhis kulЙ“aaka, weЙ—i a faaroh kulЙ“aacaЕӢ Й—e, a Й“ekukka daah, a ruyiЙ—ta kuЙ“kiЕӢ Й—e neeh laayiЙ—.
37.35: KuЙ“uuciЕӢ Й—e jen, Жҙaar na Й“itiЙ“ giifЙ—eeЙ—a Й—e, waaye a sannga, a woosa ne : В« ЕҠ nikan ЕӢ ruy po mbaЙ—na maa hee Й—e raake ЕӢ Jaanim. В» A taalndiЙ—ta, a fuЙ—eeЙ—a kuЙ“kiЕӢ Й—e.
37.36: ЕҠ ini kaЙ— ЕӢ Majaan-Majaan ca Й“ayee Yuusufa Misra, Й“a toon Й—e Potifaar, Жҙaara adgohee dag caЕӢ Firawnaana.

38.1: ЕҠ jamanoonaam, Yudaa faЙ—ta taambЙ—oh ciЕӢ Й—e, a kaЙ—ta nika na Hiraa, ya gen kur ka na woyse Adulaam.
38.2: A hotta cafaЖҙ nga, kuЙ“u Suwa ya genee Kanaan, a Й“ayya Й—e Й“itiЙ“, a hunnda na Й—e.
38.3: Yeem ammba rook, a raakka kuЙ“u Жҙaar, Yudaa teekka Й—e Eer.
38.4: ЖҒitЙ“a ambissa rook, a raakissa kuЙ“u Жҙaar, a teekka Й—e Onaan.
38.5: A raakissa kuЙ“u Жҙaar, a teekka Й—e Seela. Wa Seela na raakse, raak Yudaa ЕӢ Kesiib.
38.6: Wa saawiЕӢ Й—e Eer kaЙ— po reesa Й—aak Й“itiЙ“, Yudaa kilookiЙ—ta Й—e cafЖҙa na woyse Tamaar ;
38.7: NikiЙ—i hotta ne Eer yi saawiЕӢ Yudaa yurahЙ—i, a appa Й—e.
38.8: Yudaa woosa Onaan taambЙ—oh Eer ne : В« Fu inhiЙ— ini fu joy haЙ“iЙ—, lama Й“itЙ“ii, fu waakiЙ— yakak fu kuЙ“u . В»
38.9: Onaan inheen ne kuЙ“ki a na hee raake na Й“iti taambЙ—oh ce, a nikanЙ—i yiЕӢ Й—e ; weЙ— tah a hunnda na Й—e poo, a heesa keenЙ—e Й—ah, a keeniЙ— ЕӢ bilaf fi ne a sang raakiЙ— taambЙ—oh ce kuЙ“u.
38.10: NikiЙ—i neЙ“aaЙ—i'uusa ЕӢ ini Onaan na tume weem, a nammba Й—e ap.
38.11: Yudaa woosa payum ce Tamaar ne : В« Haada kahan baab Й—u, fu muurka Жҙaar fu nga. Fu Й“oof nga po Seela kuЙ“kiЕӢ ngo yak. В» A neЖҙЖҙohee ne Seela nam kaan findi yakak ciЕӢ Й—e. Tamaar haadda kahan baab Й“a.
38.12: Wa tummba in maaГұiЙ—, Й“iti Yudaa kaannda, kuЙ“kiЕӢ Suwa. Wa ruya coot Yudaa hunnda na nawleece Hiraa, ЖҙaaraЕӢ Adulaam ca, a kaЙ—ta marka Й“ooЙ“a nguЙ—Й—ee Й—e find caЕӢ mbaal caЕӢ Й—e ЕӢ Timnaa.
38.13: Tamaar woyuusa ne : В« Payum fu yaa kaЙ— hufЙ—uka find caЕӢ mbaal caЕӢ Й—e ЕӢ Timnaa. В»
38.14: A inheen ne Seela yakiЙ—, te a tokЙ—uuЙ—i Й—e, tahha po a Й“ekukka kulЙ“a wiiriis kotii, a muurukka findi toonkoh, a kaЙ—ta, a Й“ooffa ЕӢ waas Timnaa ne fu aasee Enayim Й—ah.
38.15: Wa Yudaa hot Й—e, a liiЙ“pa ne a toonkoh laam a muurkee muuruk.
38.16: A reЙ“pa nga Й—e, a woosa Й—e ne a waaЙ— hun na Й—e. Raak Й—e inhisЙ—i payum ce. Tamaar loffa Й—e ne : В« Fu na hee so ye eЙ—e ЕӢ ineem ? В»
38.17: A woosa Й—e ne : В« ЕҠ hey Й“aye koteng ЕӢ gataЕӢ ngo, ЕӢ woosoh Й—e nga Й—a. В» A loffa Й—e ne : В« Ee. Waaye fu na hee wa tayle'ohe ye ? В»
38.18: Yudaa loffa Й—e ne : В« Fu waaЙ— ne ЕӢ tayle'oha ye ? В» Tamaar woosa Й—e ne В« EЙ— to jaarndi inhisohaaniЕӢ Й—a fu tokuk ЕӢ mbooh na ndooЙ—iЕӢ yaah fu. В» Yudaa eЙ—ta Й—e ca, a hunnda na Й—e, yeem taambohha nga, ammba rook.
38.19: A haadda, a nihissa muura, a Й“ekkissa kulЙ“aaca a muurkohe.
38.20: ЕҠ ini kaЙ— ЕӢ Yudaa, a woos nawleece ЖҙaaraЕӢ Adulaam ca ne a kaЙ— Й—e wikЙ—a koteng ka, a haytoh in ca tayle'ohse . Yeem reesa, a hotЙ—i Й“itЙ“a.
38.21: A meekissa Й“ooЙ“a genee Enayim ne : В« A nde toonkohi na nike ЕӢ waasi ? В» ЖҒa loffa Й—e ne : В« Toonkoh moosЙ—i raakoh ndii. В»
38.22: A dokukka ЕӢ Yudaa, a woosa Й—e ne : В« ЕҠ kaЙ—iЙ— po nga, ЕӢ hotЙ—i Й—e te Й“i kur ka woo ne, toonkoh moosЙ—i raakoh ЕӢ ndaam. В»
38.23: Yudaa loffa ne : В« A tasaat na in caam, Й“oo kanaat ЖҙenЙ—uk haf Й“oo, ЕӢ woosiЙ— Й—a, fu kaЙ—iЙ— na koteng ki po ndaam, fu hotЙ—i Й—e. В»
38.24: Wa deg caЙ“in kaahay, Yudaa woyuusa ne : В« Payum fu Tamaar deey, a toonkee toonuk po, a waliЙ— amb rook nga. В» Yudaa woosa ne : В« A pulЙ—assaat, a dohu kaanaaЙ—i. В»
38.25: Wa Tamaar Й“ayse, a woosohha ЕӢ payum ce Yudaa ne a markaat baahiЙ— jaarndi inhisohaani hun na niyiЕӢ wa, na ndooЙ—i, andi a hey inhise Й“oyi raak ca ? Laam heЙ— ca a yi rookiЙ— Й—e.
38.26: Yudaa inhissa ca, a woosa ne : В« A yi uup po nik ЕӢ keeh laam, Гұam joyee Й—e on kuЙ“kiЕӢ ngo Seela, waaye ЕӢ tumЙ—aa. В» ЕҠ ineem a faankisЙ—i na Й—e.
38.27: Wa noha Tamaar joyee Й“asloh ree, wa nikka ne a hee siise.
38.28: A Й“asleeЙ—a, yino ЕӢ siis ca puliЙ—ta yaah, dooГұoha ammbaa, a tokkaa ooy ruumind ; a woosa ne : В« Yii, a yi adug raaku. В»
38.29: Waaye kuЙ“ka dokinnda yaahaЕӢ Й—e, taambЙ—oh ce kocca Й—e pul. DooГұoha woosa Й—e ne : В« Waaw, fu mbolit nde ? В» ЖҒa teekka Й—e Peeres (mbolit).
38.30: Жіutta, taambЙ—oh ce hannda raaku na ooya ruumnda ЕӢ yaahaЕӢ Й—e, Й“a teekka Й—e Seerah.

39.1: ЕҠ ini kaЙ— ЕӢ Yuusufa, wa Ismaayla-Ismaaylaaca ree na Yuusufa Misra, Й“a toon Й—e Potifaar ; a yi daga adgohee ЖҙaaЙ“a niiЙ—e kahan Firawnaana.
39.2: NikiЙ—i huneen na Yuusufa te in nu a haЙ“Й—een Й—ah, wa baah ; a nikka ЕӢ kahan kilifaanaЕӢ Й—e Potifaar.
39.3: KilifaanaЕӢ Й—e hotta ne NikiЙ—i huniЙ— na Yuusufa te in nu a haЙ“iЙ— Й—ah, NikiЙ—i baahiЙ—a.
39.4: KilifaanaЕӢ Й—e baahohha Й—e, a degga Й—e ЕӢ serooce, Yuusufa adgohha kahan ce na raak-raakaЕӢ Й—e jen.
39.5: Wa Potifaar haЙ“iЙ— ineem, NikiЙ—i barke'iЙ—ta kahan ce, in ca nikee nga na ca ЕӢ yohon caЕӢ Й—e jen, sagu Yuusufa.
39.6: Wa tahha po Potifaar faЙ—ta in caЕӢ kahan ce jen ЕӢ yaah Yuusufa ; a taambkohisseeЙ—i ali in, nikЙ—i kaГұam kaЕӢ Й—e Й—ah. Yuusufa na Й“iti Potifaar Yuusufa nikee moЙ—oh fiir.
39.7: KaЙ—ta po, Й“iti kilifaanaЕӢ Й—e hememmba Й—e, a woosa Й—e ne : В« Haya fu faanuk na so ! В»
39.8: Yuusufa sannga, a woosa Й—e ne : В« Fu hot nga, kilifaaniЕӢ ngo oolkiЙ— to po a haЙ“Й—isЙ—i tus ЕӢ kahni, a faЙ—iЙ— in ciЕӢ Й—e jen ЕӢ yaah ciЕӢ ngo.
39.9: A mi na Й—e hend ЕӢ kahni ; a sangiЙ—Й—i so tus nikЙ—i fu Й—ah, laam fu Й“itiice ; mbaa ЕӢ min na tumoh ini moЙ—aaЙ—iineem, ЕӢ tooГұ Kooh ? В»
39.10: A gennda gen ГұaakiЙ— Yuusufa na ineem, waaye tahЙ—i po a teyЙ—ukka faanuk na Й—e.
39.11: Wa raakka mbeh, Yuusufa aassa ЕӢ kahna ne a panguk, raak surgaaca nikeeЙ—i ЕӢ Й—iska ;
39.12: Й“iti Potifaar ammba Й—e ЕӢ kulЙ“a, a woosa Й—e ne : В« Haya Й“oo faanuk ! В» Yuusufa nookukka, kulЙ“aaka tassa ЕӢ yaah caЕӢ Й—e ; Yuusufa saandohha ЕӢ hara.
39.13: ЖҒitЙ“a inahha ne Yuusufa saandohiЙ— te a faЙ—iЙ— Й—e na kulЙ“aaka ЕӢ yaah caЕӢ Й—e,
39.14: a Й“eeЙ—ukka surgaaca, a woosa Й“a ne : В« Markaat ! ЖҒoo komu kuЙ“u Heber ne a Й“asЙ—uk Й“oo ; a hayiЙ— nga so ne a faanuk na so waaye ЕӢ leehukka ЕӢ Й—afka.
39.15: Wi ЕӢ leehuk, a saandohha, a faЙ—ta kulЙ“aakiЕӢ Й—e ndii. В»
39.16: A Й—aakka kulЙ“aakaЕӢ Yuusufa, a sekeeЙ—a hayiЕӢ Жҙaar ce.
39.17: Wa Жҙaar ce hay, a naandsukohha Й—e wa Й—aa, a woosa Й—e ne : В« Г‘aami Heberi fu Й“ayiЙ— Й“oo, a hayiЙ— nga so ne a kelsukoh ho,
39.18: ЕӢ leehukka ЕӢ Й—afka, a saandohha, a faЙ—ta kulЙ“aakiЕӢ Й—e ndii. В»
39.19: Wa Potifaar kerah ina Й“itiice naandsuk Й—e ne weЙ— Yuusufa haЙ“iЙ—, a ayrukka.
39.20: A ambЙ—ukka Yuusufa ne a taЖҙ Й—e ЕӢ kasoona Й“i kahan Firawnaana na Й—aakohse. Yuusufa nikka nga. Yuusufa ЕӢ kasoona
39.21: NikiЙ—i huneen na Yuusufa, a tummba po Жҙaara adgohee kasoona baahohha Й—e.
39.22: Жіaara faЙ—ta Й“ooЙ“a ambsee jen ЕӢ yaah Yuusufa, a adgohha pangkaЕӢ Й“a jen.
39.23: Жіaara haЙ“Й—isЙ—i ali in ЕӢ ina a nakee Й—e laam, a hoteen ne NikiЙ—i huneen na Yuusufa te in nu a haЙ“iЙ— Й—ah, NikiЙ—i baahiЙ—a.

40.1: WeЙ— kaЙ—oh po wa raakka mbeh, dag kanak, toonnja buuraЕӢ Misra. ЖҒa nikee Жҙaara adgohee Й“ooЙ“a meeЙ— taambkoh anaah caЕӢ Й—e, na ya adgohee utoh mbuuruuca.
40.3: A Й—aakЙ—ukka Й“a ЕӢ kasoonaЕӢ daga adgohee ЖҙaaЙ“a niiЙ—ee kahan ce, ЕӢ Й—iska Yuusufa taЖҙu.
40.4: Жіaara degga Й“a ЕӢ yaah Yuusufa, a taambkoheeЙ—a Й“a. ЖҒa nikka nga po,
40.5: wa raakka wek, Й“a kanak, Й“a heeЖҙca ; heeЖҙ nu nga Й—ah, raakka ini wa tokis.
40.6: Wa Kooh wiis na Й“aaЙ“a, Yuusufa kaЙ—ta Й“a marka, a raakka Й“a feyuuЙ—.
40.7: A woosa Й“a ne : В« ЖҠu soos ye an woti ? В»
40.8: ЖҒa woosa Й—e ne : В« ЖҒoo heeЖҙ heeЖҙ yaa nu nga Й—ah, te Й“oo raakЙ—i Й“oyi joy Й“oo ca toksiЙ— ЕӢ ndii. В» Yuusufa woosa Й“a ne : В« Hanaa a Kooh na tokse heeЖҙ haa ? Naandsukaat to ca ЕӢ hot. В»
40.9: WeЙ—i Жҙaara adgohee Й“ooЙ“a meeЙ— taambkoh anaah caЕӢ Firawnaana naandsukoh waЕӢ Й—e an : В« ЕҠ heeЖҙ tas kidig reseГұ ЕӢ fikiiso,
40.10: wa raakka naak kaahay ; wa kifissa, wa possa, wa rimmba, ca ruunnda ЕӢ Й—iski Й—iski.
40.11: Raak ko na kaasiЕӢ Firawnaani ЕӢ yaah, ЕӢ Й“eennda ЕӢ rim ci, ЕӢ pooЖҙca masmiЕӢ ca ЕӢ kaasi, ЕӢ eЙ—ta Й—e wa ЕӢ yaah. В»
40.12: Yuusufa woosa Й—e ne : В« HeeЖҙi tokis inii : Naak ci kaahay ci, ca neeh kaahay.
40.13: Ndii na neeh kaahay, Firawnaani hey Й—a rapЙ—e po Й—iskaЕӢ Й—e, Жҙut Й—a, a dokin Й—a ЕӢ pangkiЕӢ Й—a. Fu eЙ—issee Й—e kaasiЕӢ Й—e findi fu meeЙ— tumoh.
40.14: Waaye, in ciЕӢ Й—a baah Й—ah, kanaa so alkoh. Amboh ho, fu woo Firawnaani ini kaЙ— nga so ne fu puliЙ— to ЕӢ kasoonii.
40.15: ЕҠ uupu hatil ЕӢ kur kaЕӢ Heber ca, ЕӢ Й“ayuusa kur kii. Te ndii, ЕӢ namЙ—i tum ini joy yo tah taЖҙu. В»
40.16: Wa Жҙaara adgohee utoh mbuuruuca hot ne toksaЕӢ Yuusufa na heeЖҙa neЙ“iЙ—, a nammba woo ne : В« Na so, ЕӢ heeЖҙiЕӢ ngo, ЕӢ raan waah kaahay tumiЙ— mbuuru.
40.17: Wi nikee ЕӢ Й—afki riifee na mbuuru nu nik ne Firawnaani na haЙ“Й—iЙ—asse wa Й—ah, waaye sel ci ГұameeЙ—a ca ЕӢ waahi, ЕӢ hafiЕӢ ngo. В»
40.18: Yuusufa woosa Й—e ne : В« HeeЖҙi tokis inii : Waah ci kaahay ci, ca neeh kaahay.
40.19: Ndii na neeh kaahay, Firawnaani hey Й—a rapЙ—e po Й—iskaЕӢ Й—e, Жҙut Й—ah, a ap Й—a, a keЙ— Й—a ЕӢ kidig, sel ci Гұamee Й—a. В»
40.20: Wa degga neeh kaahay Firawnaana yakЙ—eeЙ—a noha a rimohu, a haЙ“Й—iЙ—ta dag caЕӢ Й—e kaГұam neЙ“iЙ—. A rapiЙ—ta ЖҙaaЙ“a kanak ca taЖҙsee ЕӢ kasoona po ЕӢ Й—iskaЕӢ Й—e, dag ca hoteeЙ—a nga.
40.21: A dokinnda ya adgohee taambkohoh anaah ca ЕӢ Й—iska a nikee ne a eЙ—issee Й—e kaasiЕӢ Й—e.
40.22: A appa Жҙaara adgohee utoh mbuuruuca, a keЙ—ta Й—e ЕӢ kidig ; wa taamboh Й—aa, ina Yuusufa woyee raakka.
40.23: Waaye Жҙaara adgohee Й“ooЙ“a meeЙ— taambkoh anaah caЕӢ Firawnaana, alkohha Yuusufa jameet.

41.1: Wa degga kiis kanak, Firawnaana, buuraЕӢ Misra heeЖҙca. ЕҠ heeЖҙiЕӢ Й—e, an a nikee ЕӢ sero kala na woyse Niil.
41.2: A hotta inoh moЙ—iЙ— yasna-kanak, kapiЙ—, pulohha nga, ca ГұameeЙ—a ЕӢ paangfa ЕӢ sereenda.
41.3: A hotissa ЕӢak moЙ—aaЙ—i'iЙ— yasna-kanak nammba puloh ЕӢ kala, ca nikka na ca.
41.4: ЕҠak ca Гұammba inoh ca kapiЙ— ca. Ndeem, Firawnaana yunukka.
41.5: A neehissa, a heeЖҙissa mbong yasna-kanak moЙ—iЙ—, Й“iЙ—siЙ— ЕӢ mbaang yino.
41.6: Furus yasna-kanak ca fu inah ne a mbooyooni oГұiЙ— ca, Й“iЙ—issa ЕӢ serooca ;
41.7: furus ca onnda mbong ca yasna-kanak ca moЙ—iЙ— ca. Firawnaana yunukka, a inahha ne a heeЖҙ heeЖҙ.
41.8: Wa Kooh wiis na Й“aaЙ“a, Firawnaana feyuusa, a cohЙ—ohha naah ca na riifiЙ— haf caЕӢ Misra jen, a naandsukka Й“a heeЖҙ caЕӢ Й—e, waaye ali Й“o' nga Й“a minЙ—i Й—e ca toksiЙ—.
41.9: Жіaara adgohee Й“a meeЙ— taambkoh anaah caЕӢ Firawnaana woosa Й—e ne : В« Mi deey, ЕӢ hey naandsohe tooГұiЕӢ ngo woti.
41.10: Firawna ayrukeen mi na Жҙaara adgohee utoh mbuuruuci po a rannga Й“oo ЕӢ kasooniЕӢ dagi adgoh Й“i na niiЙ—e kahan ce.
41.11: ЖҒoo heeЖҙandoosa, te heeЖҙ nu nga Й—ah raakeen ini wa tokis.
41.12: Komaaki fiir Heber nikeen na Й“oo ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ kasoona, a ГұaamiЕӢ dagi adgoh Й“i na niiЙ—e kahan buur. ЖҒoo naandsukka Й—e yaa nu nga Й—ah ini fu heeЖҙ, a yi toksiЙ— Й“oo ca mbaЙ—i.
41.13: Te findi a toksoh ca, ca raakoh Й—aa ; ЕӢ doknuusa ЕӢ pangkiЕӢ ngo, Жҙaara tas keЙ—uusa ЕӢ kidig. В»
41.14: Firawnaana woosa ne Й“a kaЙ—aat Й“a haya na Й—e. ЖҒa arra kaЙ— ЕӢ kasoona, Й“a puliЙ—ta Й—e, a nenukka, a Й“ekukka kulЙ“a wiiriis, Й“a Й“ayya Й—e ЕӢ Firawnaana.
41.15: Firawnaana woosa Yuusufa ne : В« ЕҠ heeЖҙ heeЖҙ, te ali Й“o' minЙ—i wa tokis, waaye ЕӢ kerah ne fu miniЙ— tokis heeЖҙ nu fu naandsuku Й—ah. В»
41.16: Yuusufa woosa Й—e ne : В« A Гұam haa, waaye a Kooh na hee eЙ—ohe toksi na hee Й—a doye. В»
41.17: Firawnaana woosa Yuusufa ne : В« ЕҠ heeЖҙiЕӢ ngo, ЕӢ nikee ЕӢ sero Niil,
41.18: ЕӢ hotta inoh moЙ—iЙ— yasna-kanak, kapiЙ—, pulohha nga, ca ГұameeЙ—a ЕӢ paangfa ЕӢ sereenda.
41.19: ЕҠak yasna-kanak moЙ—aaЙ—i'oh na moЙ—aaЙ—i'oh nammba puloh nga, ЕӢ moosЙ—i hotoh mand Й—aa moЙ—aaЙ—i ЕӢ Misra.
41.20: -21 Ca Гұammba inoh ca koc, ceЙ— ca yasna-kanak ca kapiЙ— ca nikka ЕӢ rook ciЕӢ ca. Te Й“o' minЙ—i wa hot nga ca sagu risa ca risee ЕӢak ; ndeem ЕӢ yunukka.
41.22: ЕҠ heeЖҙissa mbong yasna-kanak moЙ—iЙ—, Й“iЙ—issa ЕӢ mbaang yino.
41.23: Furus yasna-kanak moЙ—aaЙ—i, ca fu inah ne a mbooyooni oГұiЙ— ca, Й“iЙ—issa ЕӢ serooca.
41.24: Furus ca onnda mbong ca yasna-kanak ca. ЕҠ naandsukiЙ— ca naah ci waaye ali Й“o' nga Й“a minЙ—i so ca toksiЙ—. В»
41.25: Yuusufa woosa Firawnaana ne : В« HeeЖҙ ciЕӢ Й—a tokis in yino ; Kooh na teeЙ“ee Й—a ini a na hee tume.
41.26: Inoh ci yasna-kanak ci kapiЙ— ci ca kiis yasna-kanak findi mbong ci yasna-kanak ci ; kon wa heeЖҙ yino.
41.27: ЕҠak ci yasna-kanak ci moЙ—aaЙ—iici, ca kiis yasna-kanak findi furus ci yasna-kanak ci mbooyooni oГұiЙ— ; ca nikan kiis aЙ— yasna-kanak.
41.28: WeЙ— ini ЕӢ woo Й—a rek Firawna, Kooh na teeЙ“ee Й—a ini a na hee tume.
41.29: Kiis ci yasna-kanak ci na haye, ca na hee nike kiis laaЙ“Й—uk ngaЕӢ Misra jen.
41.30: Kiis yasna-kanak hey taambe nga ca, ci fu inah ne ca na hee nike kiis aЙ—, ca hey tahe po kiis ciЕӢ laaЙ“Й—i alu te ca hey yahrohe kur ki.
41.31: Ca hey miske lool, po Й“ooЙ“i alkoh ne kur ki laaЙ“Й—een.
41.32: Ini tah fu heeЖҙca ca waas kanak Firawna, weЙ— ne Kooh tufkiЙ— ne ca hey raake, te a hey ca raakЙ—e findi wa uup gaawoh.
41.33: ЖҠiski wa nik ndii Firawna, waaka Й“o' ГұaaГұiЙ—, heЙ— liiЙ“ohaaЙ— moЙ—iЙ—, yi fu na hee tufkiЙ—e, a adgoh kur ki.
41.34: Fu nam waak Й“i kilifa Й“i fu inah ne, Й“a hey Й“aye ЕӢ in ci na hee nguЙ—se ЕӢ kur ki, yatuus nu nik Й—ah, yinooriЕӢ wa, ЕӢ kiis ciЕӢ laaЙ“Й—i jen.
41.35: ЕҠ kiis ciЕӢ laaЙ“Й—i na haye, Й“a nangЙ—oh pesoha ЕӢ kur ci yakak ci, fu deg ca yaah.
41.36: Misra hey Й—aakke po kiis ci yasna-kanak ciЕӢ aЙ—i hay Й—ah, ca telan Й“i kur ki raakiЙ— pesoha po Й“a muc ЕӢ aЙ—i. В» Yuusufa adgohiЙ— Misra
41.37: Wa Yuusufa woo po a Жҙutta, Firawnaana na dag caЕӢ Й—e jen hunnda ЕӢ woo kaЕӢ Й—e.
41.38: Firawnaana woosa Й“a ne : В« Жіaari FuuЙ—siЕӢ Kooh nik ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ ce yii, andi Й“oo minisiЙ— raak mand na Й—e ? В»
41.39: A woosa Yuusufa ne : В« Nik ne Kooh teeЙ“iЙ— Й—a in cii jen Й—ah, ali Й“o' minЙ—i mand na Й—a ; fu ГұaaГұiЙ—, fu heЙ— haf,
41.40: mbaa Й—ah, ЕӢ hey Й—a adgiЙ—e, Й“i kur ki jen taambee ЕӢ woo kiЕӢ Й—a ; a tiikiЕӢ buuri ЕӢ nikoh dong weЙ— ЕӢ uupohan Й—a.
41.41: Mbaa, ЕӢ degiЙ— Misra jen ЕӢ yaah ciЕӢ Й—a. В»
41.42: Firawnaana nihissa jaarndaЕӢ Й—e inhisohaana, a Й“ekiЙ—ta Yuusufa wa na kulЙ“a mbaseГұ, a nammba Й—e tokiЙ— ceen urus ЕӢ mbooh.
41.43: A rapiЙ—ta Й—e ЕӢ wotiira uup baah Й—al waЕӢ Й—e Й—ah. ЖҒi Й“o' adugka, Й“a weeЙ—a ne : В« HaaЖҙЙ—ukaat. В» Firawnaana degoh Misra jen Й—aa ЕӢ yaah Yuusufa.
41.44: Firawnaana woosa Yuusufa ne : В« Г‘am Firawnaani, waaye ali Й“o' tumanЙ—i in ЕӢ Misra jen, te fu hunЙ—i nga. В»
41.45: Firawnaana feriЙ—ta Yuusufa tiik, Safnat-Peneya ; a onnda Й—e Й“itiЙ“ teeku Asnat, kuЙ“u Potifera, Й“oyi na seeЖҙkiЙ—ohe ЕӢ kur-taaha na woyse On. Yuusufa taambohha nga, a adgohha Misra jen.
41.46: Wa Yuusufa na Й“ayse ЕӢ Й—iskaЕӢ Firawnaana, buuraЕӢ Misra, tel Й—e raak kiis ndaЕӢkiyaah-kaahay (30). A kurkohha ЕӢ ndeem, ne a taambiЙ— Misra jen.
41.47: Wa kiis ca yasna-kanak caЕӢ laaЙ“Й—a hay, kur ka laaЙ“iЙ—ta keeh-keeh.
41.48: Yuusufa nangЙ—ohha pesohaaca a Й“ayoh ЕӢ kiis ca yasna-kanak caЕӢ laaЙ“Й—a, a Й—aakka ca ЕӢ kur-taah ca ; waa nu nga Й—a, ini nguЙ—ohu ЕӢ Й—isik ci wila Й—aakuusa nga.
41.49: Yuusufa nangЙ—ohha bele po ca laayya findi merhey mi ЕӢ yaah-cookmi. KaЙ—ta po Й“a inhisЙ—i findi ca hend, Й“a faЙ—ta Й“eesa.
41.50: Bala kiis caЕӢ aЙ—a hayan Й—ah, Asnat kuЙ“u Potifera seeЖҙkiЙ—ohaЕӢ kur ka na woyse On, raakeen kuЙ“u Жҙaar kanak na Yuusufa.
41.51: A teekka saawiЕӢ Й—e Manasse (tah alkoh) laam a woo ne : В« Kooh oniЙ— to ini na hee so tahe alkoh miskiЙ— ciЕӢ ngo po caЕӢ kahan baab Й“oo sah. В»
41.52: A teekka taambЙ—oha Efrayim (Й“asil) laam a woo ne : В« Kooh tumiЙ— to Й“asil ЕӢ kur ki ЕӢ torhiЙ—ohu. В»
41.53: Wa kiis ca yasna-kanak caЕӢ laaЙ“Й—a nikee ЕӢ Misra coot,
41.54: caЕӢ aЙ—a hayya findi Yuusufa woyohee wa. Kur ci jen nikka ЕӢ aЙ— waaye pesoha raakeen ЕӢ Misra.
41.55: Wa aЙ—a ree nga Й“i kur ka, Й“a kaЙ—ta ЕӢ Firawnaana, Й“a meekseeЙ—a Й—e Гұamaah. A woosa Й“a jen ne : В« KaЙ—aat ЕӢ Yuusufa, in nu a woo Й—u Й—ah, Й—u tum ineem. В»
41.56: Misra jen nikka ЕӢ aЙ—. Yuusufa rangissa in ca Й“a Й—aakkohe, a tooneeЙ—a bele laam aЙ—a miskeen lool.
41.57: ЖҒi Й“o' puloheeЙ—a ЕӢ kur ci wil Misra jen, Й“a heeЙ—a rome bele ЕӢ Yuusufa, laam, aЙ—a miskeen ЕӢ kehЖҙi jen.

42.1: Wa YaЕӢhooЙ“a kerah ne Misra raakiЙ— bele, a woosa kuЙ“uuciЕӢ Й—e ne : В« ЖҠu Й“oof ye ?
42.2: ЕҠ kerhiЙ— ne bele raakiЙ— ЕӢ Misra, kaЙ—aat Й—u roma nga, Й“oo raak pesoha, Й“oo kaanuu ЕӢ aЙ—i. В»
42.3: TaambЙ—oh ndaЕӢkiyaah ЕӢ Й“aЕӢ Yuusufa kaЙ—ta roma bele ЕӢ Misra.
42.4: Waaye YaЕӢhooЙ“a faЙ—eeЙ—i Benyaamin, yi Й“aah na Yuusufa yaay na baab, ne a kaЙ— na Й“a, a neЖҙЖҙohee ne in rahas Й—e.
42.5: Wa kuЙ“uuciЕӢ Israayel aasee Misra, Й“a huntiЙ—kohee na Й“i romoh wiiriis, laam a kur kaЕӢ Kanaan jen nikee ЕӢ aЙ—.
42.6: Waam raak a Yuusufa a yi adgohee kur ka na toonaЕӢ beleena. TaambЙ—oh ciЕӢ Й—e reesa nga Й—e, Й“a ЖҙekiЙ—ta Й—e po puk ciЕӢ Й“a reesa kehЖҙi.
42.7: Wa Yuusufa hot Й“a, a inhissa Й“a, waaye a mannda na Й“oyi inahЙ—i Й“a, a ngassa Й“a an : В« ЖҠu puloh nde ? В» ЖҒa loffa Й—e ne : В« ЖҒoo puloh Kanaan, Й“oo waaЙ— rom pesoha. В»
42.8: Nikka ne Yuusufa inhisiЙ— taambЙ—oh ciЕӢ Й—e, waaye, Й“a inhisЙ—i Й—e.
42.9: A naandsukka heeЖҙ ca a heeЖҙee ЕӢ ini kaЙ— nga Й“a. A woosa Й“a ne : В« ЖҠu espiyoЕӢ, Й—u hay ne Й—u marak Й—iski Й—u min taamb po Й—u saah kur ki. В»
42.10: ЖҒa woosa Й—e ne : В« Muk kilifaani, Й“oo hay ne Й“oo rom pesoha dong.
42.11: Te Й“oo jen e Й“oo Й“aah baab yino, Й“oo Й“o' yurhiЙ— kilifaani, Й“oo espiyoЕӢ haa. В»
42.12: Yuusufa woosa Й“a ne : В« Ineem keeh haa, Й—u hay ne Й—u marak Й—iski Й—u min taamb po Й—u saah kur ki. В»
42.13: ЖҒa loffa Й—e ne : В« Kilifaani, e Й“oo jen Й“aah baab yino, Й“oo gen Kanaan ; Й“oo nikee ndaЕӢkiyaah na kanak (12), yinoora sooЖҙiЙ—, ya uup Жҙin yaa tassa na baabiЕӢ Й“oo. В»
42.14: Yuusufa woosa Й“a ne : В« Ini ЕӢ woo Й—u weЙ— raak, Й—u espiyoЕӢ,
42.15: waaye ЕӢ hey marke ndah Й—u woo keeh ; ЕӢ giГұiЙ— ЕӢ Firawnaani ne Й—u heyЙ—i kurke ndii feeh taambЙ—oh Й—u yi uup Жҙin hayЙ—i ndii Й—ah.
42.16: Woosaat Й“o' yino nga Й—u, a kaЙ— Й—e Й“aya, Й“i tas nikohaah ЕӢ kasooni po ЕӢ marak ndah Й—u woo keeh ; wa nikЙ—i Й—ah, ЕӢ giГұiЙ— ЕӢ Firawnaani ne Й—u espiyoЕӢ. В»
42.17: Жіutta, Yuusufa rannga Й“a neeh kaahay ЕӢ kasoona.
42.18: NgaЕӢ neeha kaahayЙ—oh, a woosa Й“a ne : В« ЖҠu hun ЕӢ ini maa hee Й—u woye Й—ah, Й—u hey muce, laam ЕӢ nupiЙ— Kooh.
42.19: Nik ne Й—u Й“o' yurhiЙ— Й—ah, yino nga Й—u tasaat ЕӢ kasooni, Й“i tas kom Й“i kahan Й—u bele, Й“eЙ— Й“a nik ЕӢ aЙ—.
42.20: Жіut Й—ah, komaat to taambЙ—oh Й—u yi Жҙini, ЕӢ hey inhe ne Й—u woo keeh, Й—u min muc ngaЕӢ kakaan. В» ЖҒa teyЙ—ukka ineem.
42.21: ЖҒa woyeeЙ—a ЕӢ harmban Й“a an : В« Cey ! A ini Й“oo tum taambЙ—oh Й“oo weЙ— hay nga Й“oo, laam, wa a nik ЕӢ miskiЙ—, a nakeeЙ—a Й“oo yirmu, Й“oo hotee nga te Й“oo sikЙ—ukЙ—i Й—e. Ineem weЙ— tah woti, Й“oo nammba nik ЕӢ miskiЙ—. В»
42.22: Ruben degga nga ne : В« ЕҠ woyeen Й—u ne Й“oo kanaat tum njaanji in, waaye Й—u sikЙ—ukЙ—i so, weЙ— tah, Й“oo deguuЙ— miskiЙ— woti sagu kiГұin kiЕӢ Й—e Й“oo Й“ay. В»
42.23: ЖҒa liiЙ“ee ne Yuusufa kerahЙ—i in ci Й“a woye, laam wa Й“a woyee na Й—e, a Жҙaar a yi toksiЙ—ee Й“a ;
42.24: Yuusufa eЙ—ta Й“a finho, a usЙ—ukka Й“a, a fuЙ—eeЙ—a. Wa Yuusufa fuЙ— po Жҙutta, a dokkissa woya na Й“a, a Й“ayya Simeyong a tokka Й—e ЕӢ fikiiЙ“a.
42.25: A nakohha ne saakuucaЕӢ Й“a soЙ—u bele po ca riif, Й“a tumЙ—u haalis caЕӢ Й“a nga, Й“a nam onu Гұamaah ЕӢ waas ; ineem tumuusa.
42.26: Жіutta taambЙ—oh caЕӢ Й—e siffa ca ЕӢ mbaam caЕӢ Й“a, Й“a cooteeЙ—a.
42.27: ЖҒeЙ— kaЙ—oh kaЙ—oh po Й“a tufukka ЕӢ Й—isik ne Й“a neeh nga, raak weka aasiЙ— ; yino nga Й“a rangissa saakndaЕӢ Й—e ne a on mbaamaЕӢ Й—e Гұamaah, a hotta haalsa a romohee Й“ekuuЙ— nga, ЕӢ nguЙ“aЕӢ wa, a feyuusa.
42.28: A woosa Й“inooЙ“a ne : В« Hee ! ЕҠ doknuuЙ— haalsiЕӢ ngo, weЙ—i wii, ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ saakndiЕӢ ngo. В» ЖҒa tiitta po Й“a saakЙ—oheeЙ—a, Й“a woyeeЙ—a ЕӢ harmban Й“a an : В« Kooh tum Й“oo ye an ? В»
42.29: Wa Й“a ree Kanaan Й—iskaЕӢ baab Й“a, Й“a naandsukka Й—e in ca rahas Й“a jen.
42.30: ЖҒa woosa Й—e ne : В« Жіaara adgoh kur ka ngasee ngas Й“oo ; a amb ne Й“oo espiyoЕӢ.
42.31: ЖҒoo lofiЙ— Й—e ne Й“oo Й“o' yurhiЙ—, Й“oo espiyoЕӢ haa.
42.32: E Й“oo jen Й“aah baab yino, Й“oo nikee ndaЕӢkiyaah na kanak (12), yinoora sooЖҙiЙ—, ya uup Жҙin yaa tassa na baabiЕӢ Й“oo ЕӢ Kanaan.
42.33: Жіaara loffa Й“oo ne a min inhoh ne Й“oo Й“o' yurhiЙ— an : ЖҒoo na hee faЙ—e Й“o' yino, a tas ndaam te Й“oo kom Й“i kahan Й“oo pesoha, Й“eЙ— Й“i nik ЕӢ aЙ—.
42.34: Жіut Й—ah, Й“oo kom Й—e taambЙ—oh Й“oo yi uup Жҙin, ineem weЙ— na hee Й—e teeЙ“e ne Й“oo Й“o' yurhiЙ—, Й“oo espiyoЕӢ haa. ЕҠ ineem, a faЙ—is taambЙ—oh Й“oo, te Й“oo hey mine wil ЕӢ kur ka. В»
42.35: Wa Й“a yiif saakuucaЕӢ Й“a, yaa nu nga hotta nafaanaЕӢ haalsa fu Й“ayee ЕӢ saakndaЕӢ Й—a, Й“eЙ— na baab Й“a jen Й“a jaahiЙ—ta.
42.36: A yi YaЕӢhooЙ“a a woosa Й“a ne : В« ЖҠu Й“ii reehiЙ— kuЙ“uuciЕӢ ngo. Yuusufa na Simeyong sooЖҙiЙ—, Й—u waaЙ—is Й“ay Benyaamin, in ceem jen ЕӢ Й—afuk ko ! В»
42.37: Ruben woosa Й—e ne : В« Baab, degga Benyaamin ЕӢ yaah ciЕӢ ngo, ЕӢ hey Й—a Й—e wike, wa nikЙ—i Й—ah, fu ap kuЙ“uuciЕӢ ngo kanak ci. В»
42.38: YaЕӢhooЙ“a loffa ne : В« Muk, ЕӢ heyЙ—i faЙ—e kuЙ“kiЕӢ ngo a kaЙ— na Й—u. Yakak ce kaaniЙ—, a yi dong ЕӢ tasiЙ—, in rahas Й—e ЕӢ waas Й—ah, ЕӢ kiyaЙ“kookiЕӢ ngo wii, ЕӢ haadan Jaanim na aay-keeГұ saguuЙ—u. В»

43.1: AЙ—a uupeeЙ—a uup misik ЕӢ Kanaan.
43.2: Wa Й“i kahan YaЕӢhooЙ“a reehiЙ— Гұam beleeca Й“a Й“ayohee Misra, a woosa kuЙ“uuciЕӢ Й—e ne : В« KaЙ—issaat, Й—u romЙ—issa Й“oo pesoha Жҙissuut. В»
43.3: Yudaa loffa Й—e ne : В« Жіaara adgoh kur ka gapkiЙ— Й“oo ne, a kanaat hotis Й“oo ЕӢ fikiice ne Й“oo hunЙ—i na taambЙ—oh Й“oo Й—ah.
43.4: Fu teyЙ—uk ne Benyaamin hun na Й“oo Й—ah, Й“oo hey Й—a kee romЙ—a pesoha.
43.5: Waaye fu sang Й—ah, Й“oo heyЙ—i kee laam, Жҙaara woyeen Й“oo hooliЙ— ne : вҖң TaambЙ—oh Й“oo hunЙ—i na Й“oo Й—ah, a kanaat hotis Й“oo ЕӢ fikiice. вҖқ В»
43.6: Israayel woyissa Й“a ne : В« ЖҠu tooГұiЙ— to, wa ye tah Й—u woosa Жҙaara ne Й—u raakiЙ— taambЙ—oh wiiriis ? В»
43.7: ЖҒa loffa Й—e ne : В« Жіaara kat a yi meeksee Й“oo, a meeksisseeЙ—a Й“oo ЕӢ ini kaЙ— nga Й“oo na Й“i kahni an : вҖң Ndah baabiЕӢ Й“oo ris pes ? вҖқ - вҖң Ndah Й“oo raakiЙ— taambЙ—oh wiiriis ? вҖқ ЖҒoo loffa Й—e ЕӢ in ceem, Й“oo moosЙ—i liiЙ“oh ne a hey Й“oo woye ne Й“oo komaat Й—e taambЙ—oh Й“oo. В»
43.8: Yudaa degga nga ne : В« Baab faЙ—a Benyaamin ЕӢ yaah ciЕӢ ngo, Й“oo kaЙ—, Й“oo min pes, Й“oo na Й—a na kuЙ“uuciЕӢ Й“oo, Й“oo kaanuu.
43.9: Г‘am deguka, fu na hee so Й—e meekse ; ЕӢ komЙ—i Й—a Й—e Й—ah, ineem taambЙ—aat to ЕӢ kipes kiЕӢ ngo jen.
43.10: ЖҒoo kaЙ—ee kaЙ— Й—ah, wii hee raake Й“oo tumiЙ— kot kanak. В»
43.11: WeЙ—i Israayel woyoh Й“a ne : В« Nik ne wa Й—aa Й—ah, tumaat an : ЖҒayndohaat ЕӢ in ciЕӢ kur ki baahiЙ— ci findi diw faan na kuum na cuuraay na daakaande na Й“i saal, pistas na amand ; Й—u tum ca ЕӢ saakuuciЕӢ Й—u, Й—u kom Жҙaara ca taambil.
43.12: Te Й—u Й“ayndoh haalsi Й—u raak ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ saakuuciЕӢ Й—u ; wa miniЙ— nik ne Й“a Й—aarkohee Й—aarkoh, Й—u nam Й“ay haalis wiiriis romoha.
43.13: ЖҒayaat taambЙ—oh Й—u te Й—u kaЙ— Й—iskaЕӢ Жҙaara.
43.14: Koohi Min ambohaat Й—u po Й—u misik Жҙaara, a faЙ—is taambЙ—oh Й—u Simeyong na Benyaamin Й“a hayis na Й—u. ЕҠ ini kaЙ— nga so, nik ne maa hee hey Гұake kuЙ“u Й—ah, ЕӢ Гұak rek. В»
43.15: ЖіaaЙ“a kooЙ—ukka, Й“a Й“ayya taambil ca, Й“a Й“ayndohha haalis wiiriis degga ЕӢ wa Й“a kocee Й“ay, Й“a hunnda na Benyaamin, Й“a raakka Yuusufa ЕӢ Misra.
43.16: Wa Yuusufa hot Й“a huniЙ— na Benyaamin, a woosa Жҙaara adgoh kahan ce ne : В« ЖҒaya ЖҙaaЙ“ii kahna, fu ap Й—oopaat, fu haЙ“iЙ— kaГұam, Й“aa hee Гұaktuke na so woti. В»
43.17: Жіaara tummba ina Yuusufa woo Й—e, a Й“ayya ЖҙaaЙ“a kahna.
43.18: ЖҒa feyuusa ЕӢ Й“aya Й“a na Й“ayse kahan Yuusufa, Й“a woosa ne : В« KaЙ— wii Й—ah, haalsi Й“oo raak ЕӢ saakuuciЕӢ Й“oo ЕӢ hayiЕӢ Й“oo koc, weЙ— tah Й“a Й“ayee Й“oo, ne Й“a amb Й“oo, Й“a tum Й“oo Гұaam ; Й“a nam naaf mbaam ciЕӢ Й“oo. В»
43.19: Wa Й“a kaЙ— po Й“a heeЙ—a aase, Й“a woosa Жҙaara adgoh kahan Yuusufa ne :
43.20: В« Kilifaani, Й—aasa Й“oo Жҙissuut ; Й“oo kociЙ— hay rome pesoha ndii.
43.21: Wa Й“oo haadee, e Й“oo kaЙ— po ЕӢ waas, ЕӢ Й—iska Й“oo tufuk ne Й“oo neeh nga, Й“oo rangissa saakuuciЕӢ Й“oo, Й“oo hotta haalsi Й“oo romohee, ЕӢ findi wa hendee ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ ca, waaye Й“oo haytohiЙ—a.
43.22: Te Й“oo namiЙ— Й“ay kopor wiiriis romoha pesoha. ЖҒoo inahЙ—i Й“oyi dokin koporeem ЕӢ saakuuciЕӢ Й“oo. В»
43.23: Жіaara loffa Й“a ne : В« Kanaat neЖҙЖҙohaat, wa jam ; a KoohiЕӢ Й—u, yiЕӢ baab Й—u, a yi tumiЙ— Й—u alaleem ЕӢ saakuuciЕӢ Й—u ; ini kaЙ— ЕӢ haalsiЕӢ Й—u, ЕӢ rahsiЙ—a. В» ЕҠ ineem Жҙaara faЙ—siЙ—ta Й“a Simeyong.
43.24: A Й“ekka Й“a ЕӢ kahan Yuusufa, a onnda Й“a masuЙ“ ne Й“a naawis kot, a nammba on mbaam caЕӢ Й“a kaГұam.
43.25: ЖҒa haЙ“iЙ—ta taambil ca, Й“a sekeeЙ—a hayiЕӢ Yuusufa na noha laam, Й“a yegeen ne aa hee Гұaktuke na Й“a.
43.26: Wa Yuusufa haad kahan ce, Й“a eЙ—ta Й—e taambil ca Й“a Й“aye, Й“a ЖҙekiЙ—ta Й—e po puk ciЕӢ Й“a reesa kehЖҙi.
43.27: Yuusufa kaГұiЙ—ta Й“a, a meekissa Й“a ne : В« Baab Й—u ya Й—u wee so ne a yaЙ“ko'iЙ—, a tum na ? A ris pes e ? В»
43.28: ЖҒa woosa Й—e ne : В« Ee, baabiЕӢ Й“oo, ГұaamiЕӢ Й—a, yaa ЕӢ jam, a ris pes. В» ЖҒa hiirra, Й“a ЖҙekЙ—issa Й—e.
43.29: Yuusufa marakka Benyaamin taambЙ—oh ce, yi a Й“aah na Й—e yaay na baab, a woosa Й“a ne : В« Kon Жҙaarii a yi taambЙ—oh Й—u, yi Жҙini Й—u woyee so e ? KuЙ“ki nee, Kooh barke'Й—aat Й—a. В»
43.30: Wa a hot taambЙ—oh ce, faaniЕӢ Yuusufa nuppa po a minisЙ—i amb muhun caЕӢ Й—e, a arra aas ЕӢ tuuЖҙ ce ne a fuЙ— nga.
43.31: Wa a Жҙut po a muktukka, a ndengЙ—ukka, a hayissa ЕӢ taambЙ—oh ciЕӢ Й—e, a nakohha ne kaГұam ka deЖҙsaat.
43.32: Yuusufa deЖҙЖҙuusa kiik ce, taambЙ—oh ciЕӢ Й—e nammba deЖҙЖҙu kiik Й“a, Й“inooЙ“a genee Misra nammba deЖҙЖҙu kiik Й“a, laam, wa nikee in sanguuЙ— nga Й“a ne Й“a Й“aah na Heber ca kaГұam.
43.33: TaambЙ—oh ciЕӢ Yuusufa Й“oofЙ—uusa taambtiЙ—ohiЙ— ini amboh ЕӢ saawa po ЕӢ ya uup Жҙin, Й“a yurhiЙ—kohha na Й—e ; Й“a feyuusa Й“a markoheeЙ—a.
43.34: Yuusufa nakohha Й“a eЙ—u kaГұam ca nikee ЕӢ fikiice. Benyaamin uupiЙ—ta taambЙ—oh ciЕӢ Й—e nga waas yatuus. ЖҒa Жҙutta, Й“a annda biiГұ po keeГұ ciЕӢ Й“a soossa.

44.1: Wa Й“a Жҙut ЕӢ Гұakta, Yuusufa nakka Жҙaara adgohee kahan ce ne : В« TumЙ—a ЖҙaaЙ“ii pesoha ini saakuuciЕӢ Й“a min Й“ay, yaa nu nga Й—ah, fu Й“ekiЙ— Й—e haalsiЕӢ Й—e ЕӢ saakndiЕӢ Й—e.
44.2: Te fu nam Й“ekndoh kaasiЕӢ ngo haalsi ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ saakndiЕӢ Жҙaari uup Жҙin nga Й“a. В» Жіaara tummba ina Yuusufa nak Й—e.
44.3: Wa Kooh wiis na Й“aaЙ“a teel, ЖҙaaЙ“a woyuusa ne Й“a miniЙ— coot ; Й“a siffa mbaam caЕӢ Й“a, Й“a cooteeЙ—a.
44.4: ЖҒa pulla kur ka waaye bala Й“a usan Й—ah, Yuusufa woosa Жҙaara ne : В« Daba ЖҙaaЙ“a, fu meekis Й“a ne : Wa ye tah Й“a tumЙ—uusa baahiЙ— po Жҙut, Й“a wirndohhaa baahaaЙ—i ?
44.5: Kaasi Й“a rok weЙ— mi na anohe te weЙ— mi na name markiskoh ; ini Й“a tum sepЖҙiЙ—. В»
44.6: Жіaara dabba Й“a, a woosa Й“a ineem.
44.7: ЖҒa loffa Й—e ne : В« Kilifaani, fu na yambe Й“oo ye an ? ЖҒoo tumanЙ—i muk in mand Й—aa.
44.8: Fu hot nga, wa Й“oo puloh Kanaan, Й“oo haytoh haytoh haalsi Й“oo raakee ЕӢ saakuuciЕӢ Й“oo. Mbaa Й“oo min na rokoh urus wala haalis ЕӢ kahan kilifaaniЕӢ Й—a ?
44.9: ЖҒo' nu fu hot na kaaseem Й—ah, a apsaat ; te Й“oo Й“i tas, Й“oo nik Гұaam ciЕӢ Й—a, kilifaani. В»
44.10: A woosa Й“a ne : В« Ee, ЕӢ teyЙ—ukiЙ— ini Й—u woo, waaye a Жҙaari rok dong, a yi ЕӢ amban Гұaam, Й“i tas hool nga. В»
44.11: ЖҒa arra ruhsiЙ— saakuucaЕӢ Й“a, yaa nu nga Й—a rangissa waЕӢ Й—e.
44.12: Жіaara markeeЙ—a, a cambohha waЕӢ yakkaЕӢ Й“a po waЕӢ Жҙaara uup Жҙin. Kaasa hotohuusa ЕӢ saakndaЕӢ Benyaamin.
44.13: Jaarra jaar, keeГұ ciЕӢ Й“a reehha, tahha po Й“a faarra kulЙ“aacaЕӢ Й“a. Жіutta Й“a degissa saakuuca ЕӢ mbaam caЕӢ Й“a, Й“a dokkissa Й—iska na Yuusufa.
44.14: Wa Yudaa na taambЙ—oh ciЕӢ Й—e ree kahan Yuusufa, Й“a raak Й—e ris nga, Й“a raЙ—ukka ЕӢ kehЖҙi, ЕӢ fikiice.
44.15: Yuusufa woosa Й“a ne : В« ЖҠu haЙ“iЙ— ye wii ? Hanaa, Й—u inahЙ—i ne Й“o' findiiso na mine min markis ? В»
44.16: Yudaa woosa Й—e ne : В« ЖҒoo raakЙ—i woyaah, kilifaani, Й“oo minЙ—i taasuk po Й“oo hool ЕӢ inii, laam a Kooh wiГұ Й“oo. ЖҒoo na hee hey ambsukohe jen Й“oo nik Гұaam ciЕӢ Й—a, Й“oo na Жҙaari hotu na kaasi. В»
44.17: A woosa Й“a ne : В« Muk, ЕӢ supkiЙ— tum ineem, a Жҙaari hotu na kaasi dong a yi nikan ГұaamiЕӢ ngo ; Й“i tas haad ЕӢ baabiЕӢ Й“a moЙ—oЙ—. В» Yudaa kiimЙ—iЙ— Benyaamin
44.18: WeЙ—i Yudaa reЙ“oh nga Й—e, a woosa Й—e ne : В« Kilifaani Й—aas so, on ndo ЕӢ woo na Й—a, te kanaa so ayruk, laam fu na Firawnaani, e Й—u hend.
44.19: Wa Й“oo koc hay ndii, kilifaani, fu meekseen Й“oo ne : Ndah baabiЕӢ Й“oo ris pes ? Ndah Й“oo raakiЙ— taambЙ—oh wiiriis ?
44.20: ЖҒoo loffa Й—a ne, kilifaani, baabiЕӢ Й“oo yaa nga, a yaЙ“ko'iЙ— lool te Й“oo raakiЙ— taambЙ—oh Жҙin, yi fu inah ne, a raak Й—e ЕӢ kiyaЙ“kookiЕӢ Й—e. Yakak njaanjeem kaaniЙ—, a yi dong a tasiЙ— ЕӢ kuЙ“uuci a raak na yaayiЕӢ Й“a, a keeГұkohiЙ— Й—e lool.
44.21: Fu woosa Й“oo ne, Й“oo Й“ayЙ—aat Й—a njaanjeem, fu hotoot Й—e.
44.22: ЖҒoo woosa Й—a ne, kilifaani : KuЙ“keem minЙ—i saЙ“sukoh na baab Й“a. A saЙ“sukoh na Й—e Й—ah, baab Й“a hey kaane.
44.23: Fu woosa Й“oo ne kilifaani, feeh taambЙ—oh Й“oo yeem hayЙ—i Й—ah, fu waaЙ—isЙ—i hot Й“oo ЕӢ fikiifu.
44.24: ЖҒoo kaЙ—ta ЕӢ baabiЕӢ Й“oo, ГұaamiЕӢ Й—a, Й“oo woosa Й—e ini fu woo.
44.25: Wa a woyis Й“oo ne, Й“oo hayaat Й“a romЙ—ise pesoha,
44.26: Й“oo woosa Й—e ne, Й“oo minЙ—i kaЙ— te Й“oo hunЙ—i na taambЙ—oh Й“oo, mbaa kilifaanaЕӢ kur ka teyЙ—ukanЙ—i Й“oo.
44.27: BaabiЕӢ Й“oo, ГұaamiЕӢ Й—a, loffa Й“oo ne : вҖң ЖҠu inhiЙ— ne ЕӢ raak kuЙ“u kanak dong na yaay Й“a,
44.28: yinoori sooЖҙiЙ—, ЕӢ amb ne, a sifiГұsohuuЙ—, ЕӢ hotisЙ—i Й—e.
44.29: ЖҠu waaЙ—is Й“ay yi tas Й—ah, ЕӢ kiyaЙ“kookiЕӢ ngo wii, in rahas Й—e Й—ah, ЕӢ hey haade Jaanim na aay-keeГұ saguuЙ—u. вҖқ
44.30: ЖҠiski wa nik ndii kilifaani, ЕӢ haad ЕӢ baab Й“oo, te Й“oo hunЙ—i na njaanji a na iikohe Й—ah,
44.31: a hey kaane ЕӢ kiyaЙ“kookiЕӢ Й—e, te e Й“oo Й“ekan Й—e aay-keeГұi Й“ayan Й—e Jaanim.
44.32: ЖҒaatta nga, mi, ЕӢ haf fo, Гұam woyee Й—e ne, a Гұam deguka, ne ЕӢ wikЙ—i Й—e njaanji Й—ah, ahhaaneem taambЙ—aat to ЕӢ kipes kiЕӢ ngo jen.
44.33: Mbaa, mi yii kiim Й—a, kilifaani, ne ЕӢ tas ndii, ЕӢ nik ГұaamiЕӢ Й—a, te fu faЙ— njaanji, a hun na taambЙ—oh ciЕӢ Й—e a haad.
44.34: ЕҠ minЙ—i dokuk muk ЕӢ baab Й“oo, te ЕӢ hunЙ—i na Й—e. ЕҠ minЙ—i maasoh muk naamooni baab na hee kooЙ—ohe ЕӢ ineem. В»

45.1: Wa Yuusufa kerah woo ceem, a minisЙ—i amb haf ce ЕӢ fiki Й“ooЙ“a nikee ЕӢ Й—iska. A woosa Гұaam caЕӢ Й—e ne Й“a pulaat, a tassa nga na taambЙ—oh ciЕӢ Й—e dong, a hannda Й“a woo ne a yi Yuusufa.
45.2: A fuЙ—eeЙ—a ЕӢ Й—afka, Й“i Misra kerheeЙ—a Й—e po Й“i kahan Firawnaana sah inahha ini raak.
45.3: Yuusufa woosa taambЙ—oh ciЕӢ Й—e ne : В« Г‘am Yuusufa, ndah baab Й“oo ris pes ? В» Waaye ali Й“o' minЙ—i Й—e lof nga Й“a sagu tiit.
45.4: Yuusufa woosa Й“a ne : В« ReЙ“aat nga so. В» ЖҒa reЙ“pa. A woosa Й“a ne : В« Г‘am Yuusufa taambЙ—oh Й—u, ya Й—u toonee ne a haytohu Misra.
45.5: Tooni Й—u toon ndo kanaat Й—u misik laam, a Kooh tuuЖҙ co, ЕӢ adugka Й—u ndii ne Й—u min muc.
45.6: Kiis kanak ceЙ—Й—i kur ki weЙ—i ЕӢ aЙ—, te kiis yatuus ЕӢ fikiiri guur raakanЙ—i nga, nguЙ— raakanЙ—i.
45.7: Kooh a yi tuuЖҙ co ndii, ЕӢ adugka Й—u ne Й—u min raak muc yakiЙ— ne cuuЙ“iЕӢ Й—u sooЖҙuu.
45.8: E Й—u Й“ay yo ndii haa, a Kooh. A yi tum mbo kilifaani uup reЙ“ Firawnaani, ЕӢ adgohha kahan ce na Misra jen.
45.9: ЖҠiski wa nik ndii, araat kaЙ— ЕӢ baab Й“oo Й—u woo Й—e ne, kuЙ“kiЕӢ Й—e Yuusufa woo ne, Kooh tumiЙ— Й—e kilifaaniЕӢ Misra jen, a hayaat findi wa uup gaawoh,
45.10: a hey gene ЕӢ kur ki na woyse Gosen, a yi na kuЙ“uuciЕӢ Й—e, na set ciЕӢ Й—e, na Й—oopaat ciЕӢ Й—e, na ini a raak jen ; a nik ЕӢ serooso.
45.11: ЕҠ hey Й—e eЙ—e in ci a etoh jen ne a pes, a yi na Й“ooЙ“iЕӢ Й—e, na gat ciЕӢ Й—e ; Й—u ГұakanЙ—i ali in. Kiis ci yatuus ci na haye, ca na hee name nik kiis aЙ—. В»
45.12: A woyissa ne : В« E Й—u hotoot, na Й—a Benyaamin, Гұam na wee na Й—u, mi yi Yuusufa ;
45.13: naandsukaat baab kiyak ki ЕӢ raak ЕӢ Misra na ini Й—u hot jen, te Й—u hay na Й—e ndii findi wa uup gaawoh. В»
45.14: A morgiЙ—ukka taambЙ—oh ce Benyaamin, yeem morgiЙ—ukka Й—e, Й“a fuЙ—eeЙ—a.
45.15: A nammba morgiЙ—koh na taambЙ—oh ciЕӢ Й—e Й“inooЙ“i, Й“a ambsohhaa na fuЙ—, Й“a hannda min woo na Й—e.
45.16: Wa Firawnaana kerah ЕӢ kahan ce ne taambЙ—oh ciЕӢ Yuusufa hayiЙ— Misra, a neЙ“uusa nga, a yi na dag caЕӢ Й—e.
45.17: A woosa Yuusufa ne : В« Woya taambЙ—oh ciЕӢ Й—a, Й“a sif mbaam ciЕӢ Й“a, Й“a dokuk Kanaan
45.18: ne Й“a hay na baab Й“a na Й“ooЙ“aЕӢ Й“a nik ndaam. ЕҠ hey Й“a eЙ—e merhey mi uup baah ЕӢ kur ki, Й“a gen nga te Й“a pesohan kaГұam baahiЙ— nga.
45.19: Nama woo taambЙ—oh ciЕӢ Й—a, Й“a Й“ay sareet yakak ndii, haytohoha Й“itiЙ“ ciЕӢ Й“a na kuЙ“uuciЕӢ Й“a na baab Й—u.
45.20: Te in ca Й“aa hee faЙ—e ndaam kanaat Й“a misik laam, Й“aa hee gene na in ci uup baah ЕӢ Misra. В»
