28.42: Fu hey Й“a haЙ“Й—iЙ—e jata, ca nikan leeЕӢ , ca ambohan kinoh ki po ЕӢ ramb ci, Й“a nikuu tas-Й“arang.
28.43: Aaruna na kuЙ“uuciЕӢ Й—e Й“ekuk ca ne Й“a aasee ЖҠiipi-na-Cohohse wala Й“a reЙ“ee ЕӢ seeЖҙkohaani ne Й“a pangkiЙ— to ЕӢ ЖҠiski HooliЙ—i Й—ah. ЕҠ ineem, Й“a teeЙ“kanЙ—i so tas Й“arang te Й“a lafkanЙ—i kaan sagu ineem. Wa nakohi Aaruna na kuЙ“uuciЕӢ Й—e na set ciЕӢ Й—e taambЙ—an po faw. В»

29.1: NikiЙ—i woyissa Musaa ne : В« Fu hoolЙ—ee Aaruna na kuЙ“uuciЕӢ Й—e wuu so ne Й“a nik ЕӢ pangkiЕӢ ngo findi seeЖҙkiЙ—oh Й—ah, fu na hee tumohe an : Fu Й“ayan naar Жҙin yino raakaaЙ—i sikka na kuy mbaal kanak raakaaЙ—i sikka,
29.2: fu nam Й“ay mun bele baahiЙ—, fu haЙ“iЙ— mbuuru raakaaЙ—i lawiir na Й—ang raakaaЙ—i lawiir hiiГұohuuЙ— diwliin, fu nam haЙ“iЙ— Й—ambaaГұ raakaaЙ—i lawiir laalЙ—uuЙ— diwliin.
29.3: Fu tum ca ЕӢ paГұe yino, fu eЙ—oh ca wuu so ЕӢ Й—iska hooliЙ—a, ceЙ—, na naari, na kuy ci kanak ci.
29.4: Fu Й“ay Aaruna na kuЙ“uuciЕӢ Й—e po ЕӢ aasohaaniЕӢ ЖҠiipi-na-Cohohse, fu Й“ook Й“a na masuЙ“.
29.5: Fu Й“ekiЙ— Aaruna kulЙ“aakiЕӢ Й—e : kulЙ“aaki adginkohaani na wi hutiЙ—i yakki, na efoodi , na nafaani ЕӢ fikiiri. Fu tokiЙ— Й—e efoodi na tokЙ—ukohaaniЕӢ wa nik ЕӢ kinoh ki.
29.6: Fu Й“ekiЙ— Й—e mbahne, fu pengu ЕӢ Й—afuk mbahneeri tokkaahiЕӢ puki na teeЙ“ohe ne a wuu so.
29.7: Fu Й“ay diwi na hoolЙ—ohse, fu yiifa ЕӢ hafiЕӢ Й—e, fu tufkiЙ— Й—e, a nik seeЖҙkiЙ—oh.
29.8: Fu nam woo kuЙ“uuciЕӢ Й—e Й“a reЙ“, fu Й“ekiЙ— Й“a kulЙ“a.
29.9: Fu tokiЙ— [Aaruna na] kuЙ“uuciЕӢ Й—e seentur ЕӢ kinoh ciЕӢ Й“a, fu waakiЙ— Й“a mbahne, jaar fu tufkiЙ— Й“a, Й“a nik seeЖҙkiЙ—oh ci, wa nik nakohi genan gen.
29.10: Fu Й“ay naari ЕӢ nguЙ“u ЖҠiipi-na-Cohohse, Aaruna na kuЙ“uuciЕӢ Й—e deg yaah ciЕӢ Й“a ЕӢ hafiЕӢ Й—e.
29.11: Fu hoos Й—e nga ЕӢ fikiiso mi yi NikiЙ—i.
29.12: Fu Й“ay ЕӢ Гұif miЕӢ Й—e, fu reef na ndukniЕӢ Й—a ЕӢ wiic ciЕӢ keesi seeЖҙkohaani, fu yiif wi tas ЕӢ kehЖҙiЕӢ wa.
29.13: Fu nam Й“ay faymi ЕӢ soohi jen na yoorЙ—iЕӢ keeГұi na iraak ci kanak ci na faymiЕӢ ca, fu doh ca ЕӢ Й—afuk seeЖҙkohaani.
29.14: Waaye ini tas ЕӢ faani na undi na haЙ“it ci, fu na hee ca dohe ЕӢ bilaf fa. SeeЖҙkeem, weЙ— seeЖҙki wuu bakaaЙ— ci.
29.15: Fu Й“ay kuyiЕӢ mbaali yinoori, Aaruna na kuЙ“uuciЕӢ Й—e deg yaah ciЕӢ Й“a ЕӢ hafiЕӢ Й—e.
29.16: Fu hoos Й—e, fu Й“ay Гұif miЕӢ Й—e, fu lisa ЕӢ Й“ak ciЕӢ seeЖҙkohaani jen.
29.17: Fu nguЙ—soh Й—e, fu Й“ook soohi na soongal ci, fu deg ca ЕӢ nguЙ— ciЕӢ sepet ci na hafi.
29.18: Fu doh ca jen ЕӢ Й—afuk seeЖҙkohaani. SeeЖҙkeem, weЙ— seeЖҙki na hoomЙ—asse wuu so mi yi NikiЙ—i, wa na hee hey dohse po wa eeГұee so.
29.19: Fu hay na kuyi tas, Aaruna na kuЙ“uuciЕӢ Й—e deg yaah ciЕӢ Й“a ЕӢ hafiЕӢ Й—e.
29.20: Жіut Й—ah, fu hoos Й—e, fu Й“ay ЕӢ Гұif mi, fu reef ЕӢ yoorЙ—iЕӢ nofiЕӢ Aaruna Гұaahmi na ciЕӢ kuЙ“uuciЕӢ Й—e. Fu nam reef ndukun ci yakak ci ЕӢ yaah ciЕӢ Й“a Гұaahum ci na tukun ci yakak ci ЕӢ kot ciЕӢ Й“a Гұaahum ci, fu lis Гұif mi tas ЕӢ Й“ak ciЕӢ seeЖҙkohaani jen.
29.21: Fu Й“ay ЕӢ Гұif mi nik ЕӢ Й—afuk seeЖҙkohaani, fu ambsoha na diwi na hoolЙ—ohse, fu lisa ЕӢ Й—afuk Aaruna na kulЙ“aaciЕӢ Й—e na ЕӢ Й—afuk kuЙ“uuciЕӢ Й—e na kulЙ“aaciЕӢ Й“a. ЕҠ ineem, fu hooliЙ— Aaruna na kulЙ“aaciЕӢ Й—e, na kuЙ“uuciЕӢ Й—e na kulЙ“aaciЕӢ Й“a.
29.22: Fu Й“ay faymiЕӢ kuyi, na koseekiЕӢ Й—e na faymiЕӢ wa, na faymiЕӢ soohi, na yoorЙ—iЕӢ keeГұi, na iraak ci kanak ci na faymiЕӢ ca, fu Й“ekndoh rambiЕӢ Й—e Гұaahmi nga, laam a mbaali na tufkiЙ—ohse.
29.23: Fu nam Й“ay in ci raakaaЙ—i lawiir cii : mbuuru Й—apas yino, na Й—ang haЙ“Й—ohuuЙ— diwliin, na Й—ambaaГұ yino, ЕӢ paГұeeni nik ЕӢ fikiiso.
29.24: In ci fu Й“ay ceem jen, fu deg ca ЕӢ yaah ciЕӢ Aaruna na kuЙ“uuciЕӢ Й—e, fu woo Й“a, Й“a raЙ—is so ca mi yi NikiЙ—i. EЙ—oheem weЙ— eЙ—ohi na raЙ—sasse.
29.25: Жіut Й—ah, fu tey ca nga Й“a, fu doh ca ЕӢ Й—afuk seeЖҙkohaani po ca hoom ; wa nikan seeЖҙki dohsan ЕӢ fikiiso po wa eeГұee so mi yi NikiЙ—i.
29.26: Fu Musaa, fu Й“ay daЙ—iЕӢ kuyi kanakЙ—oh, yi Aaruna tufkiЙ—ohse, fu raЙ—is so wa mi yi NikiЙ—i findi eЙ—ohi na raЙ—sasse, Жҙut Й—ah, wa nik wuu fu. WaЙ—iЕӢ seeЖҙkiЙ—oh ci
29.27: Findi Й—u raЙ—soh ho daЙ—iЕӢ kuyi na tufkiЙ—ohse, Й—u eЙ—ta so rambiЕӢ Й—e Гұaahmi, wa nikohaat Й—aa ЕӢ seeЖҙuk ci na haye. ЖҒak ci kanak ceem, fu hey ca hoolЙ—e wuu so mi yi NikiЙ—i, te ca nikan waЙ—iЕӢ Aaruna na Й“i na hee rimkohe nga Й—e.
29.28: E Israayel ci eЙ—an Й“a ca ; wa nakohi genan gen, ca nikan in ci Israayel ci waЙ—an ndo ne Й“a seeЖҙkee seeЖҙuk wuu jam Й—ah. LamuukiЕӢ kulЙ“aaci
29.29: Aaruna kaan Й—ah, kulЙ“aaci a meeЙ— to nikiЙ—oh, e Й“i rimkoh nga Й—e eЙ—san ca ne Й“a yiifsee diwi na hoolЙ—ohse Й—ah ЕӢ mbeha Й“a camban pangki.
29.30: KuЙ“kiЕӢ Й—e yi laman Й—e ЕӢ seeЖҙki, hey ca Й“ekke neeh yasna-kanak, ne a aasee ЕӢ ЖҠiipi-na-Cohohse ne a panguk ЕӢ ЖҠiski HooliЙ—i Й—ah. Findi seeЖҙkiЙ—oh ci Гұamohan ЕӢ seeЖҙki
29.31: Fu Жҙut tufkiЙ— Aaruna Й—ah, fu Й“ay sepet ciЕӢ kuyi tufkiЙ—ohse, ca tiku ЕӢ Й—isik hooliЙ— wuu so.
29.32: Aaruna na kuЙ“uuciЕӢ Й—e hey Гұame sepet ci ЕӢ nguЙ“u ЖҠiipi-na-Cohohse na mbuuruuci nik ЕӢ paГұeeni.
29.33: E Й“eЙ— dong Гұaman nga ca, ca seeЖҙuk ci Й“a toskoh wi Й“a tufkiЙ—asse, Й“a nikka Й“o' hooliЙ—. Ca in hoolЙ—uuЙ— weЙ— tah ali Й“o' wiiriis ГұamanЙ—i nga ca.
29.34: Te in tas ЕӢ sepet ci wala mbuuruuci po na Й“aaЙ“a Й—ah, ca heyЙ—i Гұamse ; dohaa ca doh, ca in hoolЙ—uuЙ—. Findi seeЖҙkohaani Й“oktohsan
29.35: Findi ЕӢ nakoh Й—a wa jok, fu tumohan na Aaruna na kuЙ“uuciЕӢ Й—e Й—aa ; tufkiЙ—iЕӢ Й—a na Й“a raakan neeh yasna-kanak.
29.36: Kooh-nu-wiis, fu hey seeЖҙkohe naar Жҙin, wa nik seeЖҙki wuu bakaaЙ— ci, waЙ— fu tosohan seeЖҙkohaani, fu Й“okita ЕӢ bakaaЙ— ; fu yiifa diwi na hoolЙ—ohse ne fu hooliЙ—a wuu so.
29.37: Ini ree neeh yasna-kanak, fu tosan seeЖҙkohaani, fu hooliЙ—a wuu so, wa nik in ye hoolan te in nu laala Й—ah, wa jaaran nik wuu so. В» SeeЖҙki genan gen
29.38: NikiЙ—i woyissa Musaa ne : В« In cii ceЙ— fu na hee seeЖҙkohe ЕӢ Й—afuk seeЖҙkohaani : fu seeЖҙkan Kooh-nu-wiis na kuy kanak ci raak kiis yino, te wa genan gen.
29.39: Fu seeЖҙkoh yii na Й“aaЙ“ Й—ah, fu seeЖҙkoh yi tas na niin.
29.40: Kuyi koc hunan na andaar mun kaahay hiiГұuuЙ— na liitar diwliin koceet na camban, a nam hun na liitar biiГұ na camban. BiiГұi nikan seeЖҙuk aamaah ЕӢ Й—isik wuu so.
29.41: Kuyi kanakЙ—oh, fu na hee Й—e seeЖҙkohe na niina, a hunan na in ci fu hunЙ—ee na ya na Й“aaЙ“a, wa nikan seeЖҙki dohsan ЕӢ fikiiso po wa eeГұee so mi yi NikiЙ—i.
29.42: Wa na hee nike seeЖҙuk hoomЙ—aah, wa genan gen, gomal nu gomal. ЖҠu na hee wa seeЖҙke ЕӢ aasohaaniЕӢ ЖҠiipi-na-Cohohse, ЕӢ fikiiso mi yi NikiЙ—i, ЕӢ cohan na Й—u ЕӢ ndeem ne ЕӢ woo na Й—a.
29.43: Te ЕӢ naman coh na Israayel ci ndeem, Й—iski hey hoole sagu yaki ЕӢ yak.
29.44: ЕҠ hey hoolЙ—e ЖҠiipi-na-Cohohse, ЕӢ hooliЙ— seeЖҙkohaani, ca min nik wuu so. ЕҠ hey tume Aaruna na kuЙ“uuciЕӢ Й—e Й“o' hooliЙ—, Й“a pangkiЙ—ee so findi seeЖҙkiЙ—oh.
29.45: ЕҠ genan na Israayel ci, ЕӢ nikan KoohiЕӢ Й“a.
29.46: ЖҒa hey inhe ne Гұam NikiЙ—i, KoohiЕӢ Й“a yi pulЙ—oh Й“a Misra ne ЕӢ gen ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ Й“a. Г‘am NikiЙ—i KoohiЕӢ Й“a. В»

30.1: NikiЙ—i woyissa Musaa ne : В« Fu hey haЙ“Й—e seeЖҙkoha suusoha cuuraay, fu haЙ“Й—ohana hang kassiya.
30.2: Wa nikan kaare , Й“ak nu nga nik suung yino te njooliini nik suung kanak. Fu hey pulЙ—e wiic ciЕӢ wa ЕӢ koГұ ci wa ЕӢ Й—afki, fu puliЙ—ndohan ca ЕӢ hangi wa haЙ“Й—ohsan.
30.3: Fu heya ule na urus koceet, Й—afki na Й“ak ciЕӢ wa jen na wiic ci, fu haЙ“Й—iЙ—a banda urus po wa wil.
30.4: Fu hey wa haЙ“Й—iЙ—e inaa haa kiГұi kanak ЕӢ ooЙ“ bandaani, ЕӢ Й“ak ci kanak ci, Й“ak nu nga raak yino ; in ceem nikan urus, ndooЙ— ci na hee wa Й“ayohse taamban nga ca.
30.5: HaЙ“Й—oha ndooЙ— ceem ndooЙ— kassiya, fu ul ca na urus.
30.6: Fu hey dege seeЖҙkohaaneem ndo fu reyan ridooni Й—asiЙ— Wahndeeni na teeЙ“ohe AmbtiЙ—ohi Й—ah, [wa yurhiЙ—koh na kunohaani, Й—iski na romkohse, wi nik ЕӢ Й—afuk Wahndeeni] ЕӢ Й—iski ЕӢ cohan na Й—a.
30.7: Aaruna hey suuse cuuraay eeГұiЙ— nga Й“aaЙ“ nu ree ne a kee taambkoha laampaaci Й—ah.
30.8: Niin nu ree, a kee dega laampaaci Й—ah, a nam suusis. Wa nikan cuuraayi genan kaЙ“ ЕӢ fikiiso mi yi NikiЙ—i, ЕӢ gomal nu gomal.
30.9: ЖҠu heyЙ—i suuse cuuraay wiiriis nga, Й—u seeЖҙkanЙ—i seeЖҙuk hoomЙ—aah nga, Й—u seeЖҙkanЙ—i na in ci na pulohe ЕӢ yohon ca nga ; te Й—u seeЖҙkanЙ—i seeЖҙuk aamaah nga.
30.10: Kiis nu ree Й—ah, Aaruna heya seeЖҙkiЙ—e waas yino ne wa tosu. A tuman Гұif miЕӢ Й—ooptiЕӢ seeЖҙki wuu bakaaЙ— ci, ЕӢ wiic ciЕӢ seeЖҙkohaani. Wa hey seeЖҙkiЙ—asse ne wa tosu, wa nikan waas yino kiis nu ree Й—ah, ЕӢ gomal nu gomal ; wa in ye hoolan wuu so mi yi NikiЙ—i. В» Lempooci
30.12: В« Fu kindee Israayel ci ne findi Й“a hend inhu Й—ah, yaa nu nga Й—ah hey yo eЙ—e mi yi NikiЙ—i, lempooni a tosohan kipes kiЕӢ Й—e, po naamo raakuu ЕӢ harmban Й“a ЕӢ mbehi Й“a fiiskohan.
30.13: Inii weЙ— yaa nu nga eЙ—ohan ne a fiiskee Й—ah : garam yatuus ЕӢ haalis, wa nikan cambaniЕӢ Й“eesohaani nik ЕӢ ЖҠiski HooliЙ—i. Haalseem nikan wuu so mi yi NikiЙ—i.
30.14: Yaa nu raak kiis ndaЕӢkiyaah-kanak (20) kaЙ— Й—afka Й—ah, a hey fiiske te a eЙ— to wa.
30.15: HeЙ— raak-raak eЙ—ohanЙ—i ini uupa te ГұakiЙ— eЙ—ohanЙ—i ini mitЙ—i garam ci yasna-yinooceem, yaa nu nga hey yo ca eЙ—e, ca nik ini Й“a tosohan kipes ciЕӢ Й“a.
30.16: Fu hey rahse haalseem jen ЕӢ Israayel ci, fu tuma ЕӢ haЙ“Й—uuki na taambkohuukiЕӢ ЖҠiipi-na-Cohohse ; wa nik ini naandsohan ЕӢ fikiiso mi yi NikiЙ—i ne Й“a tosuuЙ—. В» BeГұwaari Й“oktukohaani
30.18: В« Fu hey haЙ“Й—e beГұwaar Й“oktukoha na degohaaniЕӢ wa, fu haЙ“Й—ohan ca moos ruumind. Жіut Й—ah, fu dega ЕӢ harmban ЖҠiipi-na-Cohohse na seeЖҙkohaani, fu neya.
30.19: Masmeem weЙ— Aaruna na kuЙ“uuciЕӢ Й—e Й“ookohan yaah ciЕӢ Й“a na kot ciЕӢ Й“a.
30.20: ЖҒa aasee ЕӢ ЖҠiipi-na-Cohohse wala Й“a reЙ“ee seeЖҙkohaani ne Й“a seeЖҙkee seeЖҙki dohsan po wa sut wuu so mi yi NikiЙ—i Й—ah, Й“a hey Й“ookke ЕӢ masmeem ne Й“a kaanuu.
30.21: ЖҒa Й“ookan yaah ciЕӢ Й“a na kot ciЕӢ Й“a ne Й“a kaanuu. Wa nakohi genan gen, wi Aaruna na Й“i rimkoh nga Й—e taambЙ—an ЕӢ gomal nu gomal. В» Diwi na hoolЙ—ohse
30.23: В« Fu Musaa, Й“aya ЕӢ eeГұЙ—ohaaci uup neЙ“ : Fu Й“ayan kilo miir ГұifsootiЙ— yatuus, na kilo kanak na camban ЕӢ eeГұЙ—ohaani na woyse sinaamom , na kilo kanak na camban ЕӢ wi na woyse kanel ,
30.24: na kilo yatuus ЕӢ wi na woyse kas , ca Й“eesohsan Й“eesohaaca nik ЕӢ ЖҠiski HooliЙ—i. Fu nam Й“ay liitar diwliin oliiw yasna-yino.
30.25: Fu hey ca ambsohe findi haЙ“Й—oh eeГұЙ—oha keeh-keeh na tumohe, wa nik diw hoolЙ—oha, e hoolЙ—uuЙ— ci wuu so yiifsana.
30.26: Diweem weЙ— fu na hee yiife ЕӢ ЖҠiipi-na-Cohohse na Wahndeeni na teeЙ“ohe AmbtiЙ—ohi,
30.27: na taaЙ“li na tumohaaciЕӢ wa jen, na degohaaniЕӢ laampaaci na tumohaaciЕӢ wa, na seeЖҙkohaaniЕӢ cuuraay ci,
30.28: na seeЖҙkohaani na dohohse hoosuuЙ— ci na tumohaaciЕӢ wa jen, na beГұwaari na degohaaniЕӢ wa.
30.29: Fu hey hoolЙ—e in ceem jen wuu so, ca nikan hooloh na hooloh ; in nu laal ca Й—ah jaaran nik wuu so.
30.30: Fu hey name yiif Aaruna na kuЙ“uuciЕӢ Й—e diwi, fu hooliЙ— Й“a wuu so ne Й“a pangkiЙ—ee so findi seeЖҙkiЙ—oh.
30.31: Fu hey woye Israayel ci ne Гұam woo ne : вҖң Diwii wa nikan diw hoolЙ—oha hoolЙ—uuЙ— ci wuu so, ЕӢ gomal nu gomal.
30.32: Wa heyЙ—i yiifse ЕӢ faan Й“o', te Й—u heyЙ—i haЙ“Й—e wi mand naa jok. Wa hoolЙ—uuЙ— wuu so te ambaata findi in hooliЙ—.
30.33: ЖҒo' nu haЙ“iЙ— mand naa, a diwa ЕӢ faaniЕӢ Й“oyi nikЙ—i seeЖҙkiЙ—oh Й—ah, a hey pulЙ—asse ЕӢ cuuЙ“iЕӢ Й—e. вҖқ В» Cuuraayi
30.34: NikiЙ—i woyissa Musaa ne : В« Waaka makind ci eeГұЙ—ohaacii : Naataap na saheelet na helbenaah , na cuuraay koceet, waa nu nga Й—ah ini fu Й“ayan nga hendan hend na morom wa.
30.35: Fu hey ca ambsohe findi haЙ“Й—oh eeГұЙ—oha na tumohe, wa nikan cuuraay jemiЙ—, koceet, hooliЙ— wuu so.
30.36: Fu kooЙ— in nga, fu oЙ—a po wa nik puЙ—, fu tuma ЕӢ fiki Wahndeeni na teeЙ“ohe AmbtiЙ—ohi, ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ ЖҠiipi-na-Cohohse, Й—iski ЕӢ cohan na Й—a. Cuuraayeem nikan in ye hoolan nga Й—u.
30.37: ЖҠu heyЙ—i haЙ“Й—e wi mand naa jok, Й—u njirГұiЙ—kohee wa ; Й—u na hee wa ambe findi in hoolЙ—uuЙ— wuu so mi yi NikiЙ—i.
30.38: Yaa nu haЙ“iЙ— mand naa ne a eeГұЙ—uka Й—ah, a hey pulЙ—asse ЕӢ cuuЙ“iЕӢ Й—e. В»

31.2: В« Marka, ЕӢ taniЙ— Betsalel, kuЙ“u Uri, a setiЕӢ Hur, a Й“aah ЕӢ cuuЙ“iЕӢ Yudaa.
31.3: ЕҠ Й“ekiЙ— FuuЙ—siЕӢ ngo nga Й—e po a raakiЙ— min-min, a ГұaaГұiЙ—, a raakiЙ— inah-inah ЕӢ panguk nu nik ;
31.4: a miniЙ— marak po a inah findi a joy haЙ“Й—oh in moЙ—iЙ— ngaЕӢ urus, haalis wala moos.
31.5: A miniЙ— pes atoh peme, a namiЙ— min Й“ek peme ЕӢ Й“ekoha, a miniЙ— pes kidig, a miniЙ— haЙ“iЙ— panguk nu nik.
31.6: ЖҒaat nga, ЕӢ eЙ—iЙ— Й—e Oholiyaab kuЙ“u Ahisamaak yi Й“aah ЕӢ cuuЙ“iЕӢ Daan, ne a Й“aatЙ—oh Й—e, te Й“ooЙ“i herГұiЙ— ci jen, ЕӢ namiЙ— Й“a on min-min ne Й“a min haЙ“iЙ— in ci ЕӢ nak Й—a cii jen :
31.7: ЖҒeЙ— haЙ“Й—an ЖҠiipi-na-Cohohse, na Wahndeeni Й—aak in ci na teeЙ“ohe AmbtiЙ—ohi na kunohaaniЕӢ wa na tosohse, na tumohaaci nik ЕӢ Й—iipi jen.
31.8: ЖҒa haЙ“iЙ— taaЙ“li na tumohaaci hunan naa, na degohaaniЕӢ laampaaci haЙ“Й—ohsan urus koceet na in ci hunan naa jen, na seeЖҙkohaani suusohsan cuuraay ci.
31.9: ЖҒa haЙ“iЙ— seeЖҙkohaani na hee dohohse hoosuuЙ— ci na tumohaaci hunan naa jen, na beГұwaari na degohaaniЕӢ wa.
31.10: ЖҒa haЙ“iЙ— kulЙ“aaci Й“ekkassan ЕӢ hew, ca nikka kulЙ“aaci hooliЙ— ciЕӢ Aaruna seeЖҙkiЙ—ohi, na kulЙ“aaciЕӢ kuЙ“uuciЕӢ Й—e Жҙaar ci, ne Й“a pangkiЙ—ee so findi seeЖҙkiЙ—oh Й—ah.
31.11: ЖҒa haЙ“iЙ— diwi hoolЙ—ohsan hoolЙ—uuЙ— ci wuu so, na cuuraayi eeГұiЙ—i tumsan ЕӢ ЖҠiski HooliЙ—i. Pangkoh ci hey ca haЙ“Й—e findi ЕӢ nakoh Й—a ca jok. В» IЙ—siЙ—ki ЕӢ pangki
31.13: В« Woytoha Israayel ci, woyaa Й“a ne : вҖң NikiЙ—i woo ne : вҖҳЕҠ pangkeem jen, Й—u hey eЙ—e mbeh ciЕӢ ngo na iЙ—siЙ—kohse cir, laam, ca na hee nike ini na hee teeЙ“ohe ЕӢ harmban ndo na Й—u na Й“i na hee rimkohe nga Й—u ne Гұam NikiЙ—i, yi hooliЙ— Й—u wuu so.
31.14: ЖҠu hey iЙ—siЙ—ke ЕӢ mbehi na iЙ—siЙ—kohse, wa na hee nike nga Й—u in hooliЙ— wuu so. ЖҒo' nu tumЙ—aa mbeh hooliЙ— Й—ah, a hey apse, te Й“o' nu panguk nga Й—ah, a hey pulЙ—asse ЕӢ cuuЙ“i a Й“aahoh.
31.15: Mbeh yasna-yino ceЙ— na hee pangkohse, mbehi yasna-kanakЙ—oh weЙ— wi na iЙ—siЙ—kohse, wi hoolЙ—u wuu so mi yi NikiЙ—i. ЖҒo' nu panguk ЕӢ mbehi na iЙ—siЙ—kohse Й—ah, a hey apse.
31.16: Israayel ci hey eЙ—e mbehi na iЙ—siЙ—kohse cir, Й“a yakЙ—ee wa, Й“eЙ— na Й“i na hee rimkohe nga Й“a, wa nikan ambtiЙ—oh ЕӢ harmban Й“oo te wa genan gen.
31.17: Wa na hee nike mandarga, wi genan gen ЕӢ harmban ndo na Israayel ci, laam ЕӢ neeh yasna-yino, ЕӢ feriЙ— eel ci na kehЖҙi, mi yi NikiЙ—i, ЕӢ faЙ—ta neeha yasna-kanakЙ—oh, ЕӢ iЙ—siЙ—ukka.вҖҷ вҖқ В»
31.18: Wa NikiЙ—i Жҙut woo na Musaa ЕӢ Й—afuk tangooraЕӢ Sinaay, a eЙ—ta Й—e atoh ca kanak ca Й—apas ca woo ciЕӢ AmbtiЙ—ohi fiisohse, atoh ca fu inah ne a Kooh fiisootee ca.

32.1: Ini kaЙ— ЕӢ Israayel ci, Й“a hoteen ne Musaa maaГұiЙ— ЕӢ tangoora a hayЙ—i paaЙ—, Й“a cohha ЕӢ Й—iskaЕӢ Aaruna, Й“a woosa Й—e ne : В« Musaa Жҙaari pulЙ—oh Й“oo Misra yii, Й“o' inhisЙ—i in nga Й—e. Mbaa, haЙ“Й—iЙ—a Й“oo kooh ci adgan ЕӢ fiki Й“oo. В»
32.2: Aaruna loffa Й“a ne : В« SaЙ“sukohaat na long-long ci urus ci nik ЕӢ nof ciЕӢ Й“itiЙ“ ciЕӢ Й—u, na ciЕӢ kuЙ“uuciЕӢ Й—u Жҙaar ci na Й“i Й“itiЙ“ ci, Й—u kom mbo ca. В»
32.3: ЖҒa jen, Й“a saЙ“sukohha na long-long ca urus ca nikee ЕӢ nof ciЕӢ Й“a, Й“a kommba Й—e ca.
32.4: A Й“ayya ca, a naayiЙ—ta ca, a haЙ“iЙ—ta na urseem nataal Й—oon naar. Жіutta, Й“a woosa ne : В« Israayel ! KoohiЕӢ Й“oo pulЙ—oh Й“oo Misra a Yii ! В»
32.5: Wa Aaruna hot ЕӢ ineem, a haЙ“iЙ—ta seeЖҙkoha ЕӢ fiki nataala, a woosa ЕӢ Й—afka ne : В« Kim, feet hey raake yakЙ—oha NikiЙ—i. В»
32.6: Wa Kooh wiis na Й“aaЙ“a teel, Й“a seeЖҙkohha Й“i Й—oopaat seeЖҙuk hoomЙ—aah, na seeЖҙuk wuu jam. ЖҒa Й“ooffa, Й“a ГұameeЙ—a, Й“a aneeЙ—a ; Жҙutta Й“a kurukka, Й“a mbuumbaayeeЙ—a.
32.7: Wa NikiЙ—i hot in ceem, a woosa Musaa ne : В« Ruhsa fu kaЙ—, cuuЙ“iЕӢ Й—a fu pulЙ—oh Misra yahrukohiЙ—.
32.8: ЖҒa ariЙ— faЙ— waasi ЕӢ teeЙ“ee Й“a. ЖҒa haЙ“Й—iЙ—iЙ— haf Й“a Й—oon na urus naayЙ—uuЙ—, Й“a ЖҙekiЙ— ЕӢ fikiice, Й“a seeЖҙkiЙ—ta Й—e te Й“a woosa ne : вҖң Israayel ! KoohiЕӢ Й“oo pulЙ—oh Й“oo Misra a Yii ! вҖқ В»
32.9: NikiЙ—i taalndiЙ—ta woo Musaa ne : В« ЕҠ hotiЙ— ne cuuЙ“ii, wa cuuЙ“ ndengiЙ— haf.
32.10: ЖҠiski wa nik, faЙ— to dohЙ—iЕӢ ayrukiЕӢ ngo dal nga Й“a, ЕӢ Й—umbiЙ— Й“a ; waaye fu, ЕӢ hey tume po cuuЙ“ angiЙ— rimkoh nga Й—a. В»
32.11: ЕҠ ineem, Musaa kiimmba NikiЙ—i KoohiЕӢ Й—e, a kiimmba Й—e kiim keeh-keeh, an : В« NikiЙ—i, wa ye tah fu ruhsiЙ—ee dohЙ—iЕӢ ayrukiЕӢ Й—a ЕӢ cuuЙ“iЕӢ Й—a fu pulЙ—oh Misra, na hatil keeh-keeh na yaah Й“itiЙ— ?
32.12: Fu tumoh Й—aa Й—ah, Й“i Misra hey woye ne aГұaand weЙ— tah fu pulЙ—ohha Israayel ci nga ne fu Й—umbiЙ— Й“a ЕӢ tangooci, Й“a reeh ЕӢ kehЖҙi. GiifЙ—a ayrukiЕӢ Й—a te fu faЙ— miskiЙ—i fu waaЙ—ee deg cuuЙ“iЕӢ Й—a.
32.13: Naandsuka Гұaam ciЕӢ Й—a Ibrahiima na Isaahha, na Israayel, yi YaЕӢhooЙ“a, Й“i fu giГұЙ—e ЕӢ haf fu an : вҖң ЕҠ hey Й“aate Й“i rimkohan nga Й—u po Й“a hend na hor ci. ЕҠ hey Й“a eЙ—e kur ki ЕӢ gapee Й“a wii jen, wa nik wuu Й“a po faw. вҖқ В»
32.14: ЕҠ ineem, NikiЙ—i giiffa, a faЙ—ta miskiЙ—a a waaЙ—ee deg ngaЕӢ cuuЙ“iЕӢ Й—e.
32.15: Musaa ruhussa tangoora, a wiirukka, a yurahha ЕӢ mboolnda ; a ammba atoh ca kanak ca na teeЙ“ohe AmbtiЙ—ohi ЕӢ yaah, atoh nu nga Й—ah fiisuusa ЕӢ Й“ak ciЕӢ wa kanak ci.
32.16: Atoh ceem, a Kooh haЙ“iЙ— ca, a yi fiisoot ca findi Гұaas.
32.17: Wa Yosuwe kerah leehuk caЕӢ Й“ooЙ“a, a woosa Musaa ne : В« Ca leehuk hiГұoh ceЙ— na kerhasse ЕӢ dala. В»
32.18: Musaa loffa Й—e ne : В« Ca leehuk saahiЙ— haa te ca leehuk saahuuЙ— haa ; ca Жҙeek ceЙ— maa kerhe. В»
32.19: Musaa reЙ“ee reЙ“ dala rek a hotta Й—oona na Й“ooЙ“a mbece, a ayrukka ; a mbetta atoh ca a ambe, a pookka ca ЕӢ tasaЕӢ tangoora.
32.20: A Й“ayya nataalaЕӢ Й—oona Й“a haЙ“Й—e, a dohhaa, a oЙ—taa po wa nikka mun, a wasarraa ЕӢ masma, a anЙ—ukohha Й“a wa.
32.21: Musaa meekissa Aaruna ne : В« CuuЙ“ii haЙ“iЙ— Й—a ye po fu tahha Й“a bakaaЙ—ee bakaaЙ— hend an yak ? В»
32.22: Aaruna loffa Й—e ne : В« ЕҠ kiim Й—a wa kiim, kilifaaniЕӢ ngo, kina ayruk ! Fu inhiЙ— ЕӢ haf fu ne cuuЙ“ii tum moЙ—aaЙ—i yooЙ“iЙ— Й“a.
32.23: E Й“eЙ— woo so ne : вҖң Musaa Жҙaari pulЙ—oh Й“oo Misra yii, Й“o' inhisЙ—i in nga Й—e. Mbaa, haЙ“Й—iЙ—a Й“oo kooh ci adgan ЕӢ fiki Й“oo. вҖқ
32.24: ЕҠ woosa Й“a ne : вҖң Yaa nu raak urus Й—ah, saЙ“sukoha naa. вҖқ ЖҒa eЙ—ta so ca, ЕӢ njaffa ca ЕӢ yongkaahi, Й—oonii a yi pulla nga. В»
32.25: Musaa hotta ne Aaruna faЙ— faЙ— Й“i cuuЙ“i ЕӢ ini neЙ“ Й“a po Й“a ЖҙissuutiЙ— ЕӢ fiki Й“i sang Й“a.
32.26: Musaa tufukka ЕӢ aasohaanaЕӢ dala, a woosa ndengiЙ— ne : В« Yaa nu hun na NikiЙ—i Й—ah, a hayaat nga so ! В» ЖҒi rimkoh ЕӢ Lewi jen hayya nga Й—e.
32.27: A woosa Й“a ne : В« NikiЙ—i, KoohiЕӢ Israayel woo inii : вҖң Yaa nu nga Й—u Й—ah, Й“ayaat ndangiЕӢ Й—e, Й—u aas Й“ak nu nik ЕӢ dali, Й—u ap Й“aah ciЕӢ Й—u, nawleeciЕӢ Й—u wala Й“i reЙ“ Й—u. вҖқ В»
32.28: ЖҒi rimkoh ЕӢ Lewi tumohhaa findi Musaa woyoha ; mbaЙ—i, ini uup Жҙaar junni-kaahay (3000) kaannda ЕӢ Israayel ci.
32.29: Musaa woosa Lewiici ne : В« Woti, Й—u tufkiЙ—uuЙ— wuu NikiЙ—i ЕӢ api Й—u ap kuЙ“uuciЕӢ Й—u na taambЙ—oh ciЕӢ Й—u te a barke'Й—iЙ— Й—u woti. В» Musaa Й—aasnukЙ—iЙ— cuuЙ“a
32.30: Wa Kooh wiis, Musaa woosa cuuЙ“a ne : В« ЖҠu bakaaЙ—iЙ— bakaaЙ— yakak. Mi yii rapisseeЙ—a tangoori ЕӢ Й—iskaЕӢ NikiЙ—i, ЕӢ hey Й—u Й—aasnukЙ—e, wa miniЙ— nik ne Kooh Й—aas Й—u bakaaЙ—iЕӢ Й—u. В»
32.31: Musaa dokukka ЕӢ NikiЙ—i, a woosa Й—e ne : В« Cey Kooh ! CuuЙ“ii bakaaЙ—iЙ— bakaaЙ— yakak, Й“a Й“ay urus, Й“a haЙ“Й—iЙ—ta haf Й“a kooh.
32.32: ЖҠaasaa Й“a, ЕӢ kiim Й—a wa kiim ! Wala fu moos tiikiЕӢ ngo ЕӢ teerndi fu fiis. В»
32.33: NikiЙ—i loffa Й—e ne : В« ЖҒoyi haЙ“iЙ— bakaaЙ— nga so, a yi ЕӢ moosan tiikiЕӢ Й—e ЕӢ teerndiЕӢ ngo.
32.34: KaЙ—a, fu adgiЙ— cuuЙ“i, fu Й“aya Й—iska ЕӢ woo Й—a. Amba ne malaakaaniЕӢ ngo hey nike ЕӢ fikiifu waaye mbehi ЕӢ wirndohan ree Й—ah, ЕӢ hey Й“a mbugale sagu bakaaЙ—iЕӢ Й“a. В»
32.35: NikiЙ—i mbugaleen Israayel ci, sagu naka Й“a nakee Aaruna ne a haЙ“Й—iЙ— Й“a nataalaЕӢ Й—oona.

33.1: NikiЙ—i woosa Musaa ne : В« KaЙ—a, fu na cuuЙ“i fu pulЙ—oh Misra, kurkaat ndii, Й—u kaЙ— kur ka ЕӢ giГұЙ—ee Ibrahiima na Isaahha na YaЕӢhooЙ“a ne ЕӢ hey wa eЙ—e Й“i rimkohan nga Й“a.
33.2: ЕҠ hey woose malaaka, a nik ЕӢ fikiiЙ—u, ЕӢ hey aaГұe Kanaan ci na Amoor ci na Hit ci na Peris ci na Hiw ci na Yebuus ci.
33.3: Wa kur riifЙ—iЙ— na miis na kuum. KaЙ—aat, waaye ЕӢ hunanЙ—i na Й—u, ЕӢ nikanЙ—i ЕӢ Й—iski Й—u nikan. ЖҠu cuuЙ“ ndengiЙ— haf, ЕӢ sang Й—u Й—umb ЕӢ waas. В»
33.4: Wa woo ki ndengЙ—i Kooh woo weem ree ЕӢ cuuЙ“a, Й“a nikka ЕӢ neЙ“aaЙ—i po ali Й“o' Й“ekukЙ—i in moЙ—iЙ— nga Й“a.
33.5: Laam, NikiЙ—i nameen woo Musaa ne : В« Woya Israayel ci ne : вҖң ЖҠu cuuЙ“ ndengiЙ— haf ! ЕҠ nik ЕӢ harmban Й—u Жҙissuut Й—ah, ЕӢ hey Й—u Й—umbe. SaЙ“sukohaat na Й“ekkaah ciЕӢ Й—u moЙ—iЙ— ci, Жҙut Й—ah, ЕӢ hey inhe ini ЕӢ tuman Й—u. вҖқ В»
33.6: ЖҒa saЙ“sukohha na ca ndaam, Й“a Й“ekisЙ—i ca ina amboh ЕӢ tangooraЕӢ Horeb. Musaa haЙ“Й—ohaahiЙ— Й—iip cohoha ЕӢ finho dala
33.7: Musaa meeЙ— Й“ay Й—iip, a yipa usohiЙ— na dala, a teekee wa "ЖҠiipi-na-Cohohse". ЖҒo' nu waaЙ—ta woo na NikiЙ—i Й—ah, a pul dala, a kaЙ— ЕӢ ЖҠiipa-na-Cohohse.
33.8: Musaa kaЙ—eesa nga Й—ah, Й“i cuuЙ“i jen kuruk, yaa nu nga tufuk ЕӢ nguЙ“u Й—iipiЕӢ Й—e, Й“a markee Й—e po a aas.
33.9: Musaa aassa Й—ah, eela yipee findi kumbin hay po ЕӢ nguЙ“u Й—iipa, wa tufuk nga, jaar NikiЙ—i woyee na Й—e.
33.10: Israayel ca hottaa rek Й—ah, yaa nu nga Й—a Жҙek ЕӢ nguЙ“u Й—iipiЕӢ Й—e.
33.11: NikiЙ—i woyee na Musaa jahran findi Й“o' na Й“o'. Жіutta Й—ah, Musaa dokuk ЕӢ dala waaye, dagiЕӢ Й—e na woyse Yosuwe, kuЙ“u Nun, tas ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ Й—iipa. Raak Й—e fiir. Musaa kiimiЙ— Kooh ne a ambaat nga rek
33.12: Wa raakka mbeh, Musaa woosa NikiЙ—i ne : В« Marka ! A fu nak ko ne ЕӢ Й“ay cuuЙ“ii waaye fu teeЙ“Й—i so yi hunan na so. Moona a fu woyee so ne : вҖң ЕҠ inhiЙ— Й—a na tiikiЕӢ Й—a, ЕӢ hey Й—a baahohe. вҖқ
33.13: ЖҠiski wa nik, nik ne fu baahohiЙ— to Й—ah, teeЙ“ po tiindohaaЙ— ciЕӢ Й—a ; ЕӢ hey Й—a inhe baahiЙ— te fu hey yo baahohisse. Kina alkoh ne cuuЙ“ii, wa cuuЙ“iЕӢ Й—a ! В»
33.14: NikiЙ—i loffa Musaa ne : В« Mi ЕӢ haf fo, ЕӢ hey hune na Й—a ne ЕӢ iЙ—siЙ— Й—a. В»
33.15: Musaa woosa ne : В« Nik ne fu ЕӢ haf fu, fu heyЙ—i Й“oo Й“ende Й—ah, kina Й“oo kurkiЙ—oh ndii.
33.16: Fu Й“endЙ—i Й“oo Й—ah, wa inhohsan na ne fu baahohiЙ— to, mi na cuuЙ“iЕӢ Й—a ? Huni fu hunan na Й“oo weЙ— tahan Й“oo Й—aloh na cuuЙ“ ciЕӢ kehЖҙi jen. В»
33.17: NikiЙ—i woosa Musaa ne : В« ЕҠ baahohiЙ— Й—a te ЕӢ inhiЙ— Й—a ЕӢ tiikiЕӢ Й—a, tahha po ЕӢ hey name tum ini fu kiim mbo weem. В» Musaa kiimiЙ— Kooh ne a teeЙ“ Й—e yaki a yak
33.18: Musaa woosa Й—e ne : В« ЕҠ kiim Й—a wa kiim, teeЙ“ po yaki fu yak ! В»
33.19: NikiЙ—i woosa Й—e ne : В« ЕҠ hey taambЙ—e baah kiЕӢ ngo jen ЕӢ fikiifu te ЕӢ hey woye tiikiЕӢ ngo "NikiЙ—i" ЕӢ Й—afka ; ЕӢ baahohee Й“oyi ЕӢ baahoh, ЕӢ yirmee Й“oyi ЕӢ yirim.
33.20: Waaye fu minanЙ—i hot fikiiriЕӢ ngo, laam ali Й“o' minЙ—i so hot te a taalndiЙ— a pesisse.
33.21: Seka, Й—isik weЙ—i ЕӢ ndii, ЕӢ serooso ; fu na hee tufke ЕӢ Й—afuk atoh fi.
33.22: SiГұaariЕӢ yaki ЕӢ yak taambee Й—ah, ЕӢ hey Й—a Й—asЙ—e ЕӢ nungiЕӢ atoh fi, ЕӢ Й—ip Й—a na yaahiЕӢ ngo po ЕӢ taamb.
33.23: ЕҠ nihis yaahiЕӢ ngo Й—ah, fu hey hote finhooriЕӢ ngo, waaye fikiiriЕӢ ngo minanЙ—i hotu. В»

34.1: NikiЙ—i woyissa Musaa ne : В« Pestissa atoh kanak po ca nik Й—apas findi ca koc, ЕӢ hey fiise nga ca woo ci nikee ЕӢ ca koc te fu pookka ca.
34.2: KooЙ—ka, kim na Й“aaЙ“a teel, fu rap ЕӢ Й—afuk tangooriЕӢ Sinaay, fu tufuk nga ЕӢ fikiiso.
34.3: Fu kaЙ—ee Й—ah, ali Й“o' kinaat hun na Й—a te Й“o' kinaat hotu ЕӢ Й—afuk tangoori jen ; Й—oopaat sah kinaat eleeruk ЕӢ Й“ak ciЕӢ wa, wa mbaal haa, wa pe' haa, wa inoh haa. В»
34.4: Musaa pessa atoh kanak findi ca koc, a kurukka na Й“aaЙ“a teel, a ammba ca ЕӢ yaah, a rappa ЕӢ tangooraЕӢ Sinaay findi NikiЙ—i nakohee Й—e wa. NikiЙ—i teeЙ“iЙ— Musaa yaki a yak
34.5: NikiЙ—i ruhussa na eela, a rissa ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙa ЕӢ sero Musaa, a woosa tiikiЕӢ Й—e haf ce po wa Й—iiЙ—Й—eeЙ—a an : В« NikiЙ—i. В»
34.6: ЕҠ ineem, NikiЙ—i taammba Musaa fiki, a woosa ЕӢ Й—afka an : В« Г‘am NikiЙ—i, Kooh yi na yirmohe te baahohe, yi yooЙ“Й—i ayruk, riiffa na waaЙ—ohaaЙ— te a dokkuu finho muk,
34.7: a teeЙ“ohee baah kiЕӢ Й—e po ЕӢ junni (1000) gomal, a Й—aasohee tumohaaЙ— moЙ—aaЙ—i, na bakaaЙ—, na ndengsiЙ—koh, waaye Й“oyi tooГұ a ambuu Й—e findi Й“oyi tumЙ—i in, te a na dege deg miskiЙ— kuЙ“uuci na set ci na setaat ciЕӢ baab ci tum moЙ—aaЙ—i po ЕӢ gomala nikiisЙ—oh. В»
34.8: Jaarra Musaa ЖҙekiЙ—ta NikiЙ—i po a raЙ—ukka ЕӢ kehЖҙi.
34.9: A woosa ne : В« HeЙ— Й“oo, ЕӢ kiim Й—a wa kiim, nik ne fu baahohiЙ— to Й—ah, haya fu Й“end Й“oo. ЕҠ inhiЙ— ne cuuЙ“ii wa cuuЙ“ ndengiЙ— haf, waaye Й—aasa Й“oo tumohaaЙ— ci moЙ—aaЙ—iici na bakaaЙ— ciЕӢ Й“oo, tuma Й“oo raakuuЙ—iЕӢ Й—a. В» NikiЙ—i tufkiЙ—issiЙ— ambtiЙ—ohiЕӢ Й—e na Israayel ci
34.10: NikiЙ—i loffa Й—e ne : В« ЕҠ hey tufkiЙ—e ambtiЙ—oh na Й—u. ЕҠ hey tume, ЕӢ fiki cuuЙ“iЕӢ Й—a jen, keemaan ci Й“o' moosЙ—i hotoh ЕӢ ali kur na ali Й“ak ЕӢ kehЖҙi ; Й“ooЙ“i wil Й—a jen hey hote tumohaaЙ— ciЕӢ ngo mi yi NikiЙ—i. In ci ЕӢ lahЙ—ohan nga Й—a, ca nikan in feyohiЙ—.
34.11: FaЙ—oha nof baahiЙ— ini maa nakee Й—a woti. ЕҠ hey aaГұe ЕӢ fikiiЙ—u : Amoor ci na Kanaan ci na Hit ci na Peris ci na Hiw ci na Yebuus ci.
34.12: Wortukaat ambtiЙ—oh nawle na Й“ooЙ“iЕӢ kur ci Й—u aasohan, mbaa Й“a nikan fiir jaЙ—uuЙ— ЕӢ harmban Й—u.
34.13: Waaye Й—u na hee hey fole seeЖҙkohaaciЕӢ Й“a, Й—u pook nataal ci, Й—u fol kumbin ci, ci Й“a na yakЙ—ohee kooh ciЕӢ Й“a.
34.14: Ali Й“o' nga Й—u ЖҙekЙ—anЙ—i kooh wiiriis, laam, mi yi NikiЙ—i, ЕӢ fiir fiir po weЙ— tiikiЕӢ ngo.
34.15: Te ali Й“o' kinaat ambtiЙ—oh nawle na Й“ooЙ“aЕӢ kur ka ; fu ambtiЙ—oh na Й“a Й—ah, Й“a hey Й—a Й“eke ЕӢ njaalooniЕӢ Й“a, weЙ— ne Й“a seeЖҙkee wuu kooh ciЕӢ Й“a Й—ah, Й“a Й“eeЙ—uk Й—a ne fu Гұam ЕӢ seeЖҙki.
34.16: Te ineem hey kaЙ—e po fu Й“ayiЙ— kuЙ“uuciЕӢ Й—a Жҙaar ci Й“itiЙ“ ЕӢ cafaЖҙ ciЕӢ Й“a, cafaЖҙ ceem Й“ek Й“a ЕӢ njaalooni Й“a na njaalo'e, weЙ— ne Гұaamki Й“a na Гұaamke kooh ciЕӢ Й“a.
34.17: Ali Й“o' nga Й—u naayЙ—anЙ—i tiwiГұ, a haЙ“Й—ee nataal, a amb ca findi Kooh.
34.18: Yaa nu nga, fu hey feetke feetiЕӢ Mbuuruuci raakaaЙ—i lawiir ci ; ini ree neeh yasna-kanak ЕӢ jamanooni wa ambu ЕӢ caЙ“niЕӢ mbong ci, fu Гұaman mbuuru raakaaЙ—i lawiir findi ЕӢ woyohee wa, laam ЕӢ caЙ“niЕӢ mbong ci weЙ— Й—u puloh Misra.
34.19: KuЙ“uuciЕӢ Й—a saaw ci Жҙaar ci jen, Й“a wuu so, saaw ci naar ciЕӢ Й—oopaat ci sah Гұam raak ca findi ciЕӢ inoh ci, mbaal ci na pe' ci.
34.20: Saaw ciЕӢ mbaam ci, fu na hee ca hey romkohe na mbaal wala pe' ; fu romkohЙ—i ca Й—ah, fu joyiЙ— weer mbooh ciЕӢ ca. Fu hey romkohe saaw ciЕӢ Й—u Жҙaar ci jen te ali Й“o' hayanЙ—i ЕӢ fikiiso yaah Й“arang.
34.21: Fu hey pangke neeh yasna-yino, wi yasna-kanakЙ—oh fu iЙ—siЙ—uk, fu hey iЙ—siЙ—ke nga sah ЕӢ jamanooni na guurohse na wi na nguЙ—ohse.
34.22: Mbeh dokkiЙ— yasna-kanak ЕӢ finho Paak , fu hey feetke feetiЕӢ Beleeci koc ruund ; wa kaЙ— po ЕӢ reehЙ—ohaaniЕӢ kiis ki Й—ah, fu nam feetuk feetiЕӢ NguЙ— ci.
34.23: Waas kaahay ЕӢ kiis ki, Жҙaar ciЕӢ cuuЙ“i jen hey haye ЕӢ fikiiso mi yi HeЙ— Й—u NikiЙ—i, KoohiЕӢ Israayel.
34.24: Laam ЕӢ hey aaГұe cuuЙ“ ci ЕӢ fikiiЙ—u te ЕӢ hey tume po Й—u raak merhey angiЙ— ; ali Й“o' waaЙ—anЙ—i Й“ay kur kiЕӢ Й—u ЕӢ jamanooci Й—u hayohan ЕӢ fikiiso waas kaahay ЕӢ kiis ki.
34.25: ЖҒo' nga Й—u seeЖҙkee Й“i Й—oopaat wuu so Й—ah, Гұif miЕӢ ca kinaat hun na in raakiЙ— lawiir. Te sepet ciЕӢ seeЖҙkiЕӢ feetiЕӢ Paak neehanЙ—i po na Й“aaЙ“a.
34.26: ЖҒo' nu nga Й—u Й—ah, a komaat to ini a koc nguЙ— ЕӢ yohon ciЕӢ Й—e ЕӢ kahan ndo mi yi NikiЙ—i, KoohiЕӢ Й—u. Ali Й“o' nga Й—u kinaat tikoh koteng miis mi kooЙ—ohu ЕӢ ndaam ce. В»
34.27: NikiЙ—i woosa Musaa ne : В« Woo cii ceЙ— maa hee tufkiЙ—ohe ambtiЙ—ohiЕӢ ngo na Й—a, na Israayel ci ; fiisaa ca. В»
34.28: Musaa nikka ЕӢ tangooraЕӢ Sinaay na NikiЙ—i ini ree neeh ndaЕӢkiyaah-nikiis (40), a ГұamЙ—i, a anЙ—i. NikiЙ—i fiissa ЕӢ atoh ca woo ciЕӢ AmbtiЙ—ohi, Nakoh-ci-NdaЕӢkiyaah-ci. SiГұaarЙ—iЕӢ fikiiriЕӢ Musaa
34.29: Wa Musaa ruhus tangooraЕӢ Sinaay, raak Й—e na atoh ca kanak ca ЕӢ yaah, atoh ci Й—apas ci na teeЙ“ohe AmbtiЙ—ohi, fikiiriЕӢ Й—e siГұaarЙ—eeЙ—a sagu woyi a woyee na NikiЙ—i, waaye a inheeЙ—aa.
34.30: Wa a ree po Aaruna na Israayel ca jen hotta fikiiriЕӢ Й—e siГұaarЙ—eeЙ—a, Й“a kaaГұЙ—i Й—e reЙ“uk.
34.31: WeЙ—i a Й“eeЙ—koh Й“a. Aaruna na yakak caЕӢ Israayel jen hayya nga Й—e, a woytohha Й“a.
34.32: Жіutta, Israayel ca jen reЙ“pa, a eЙ—ta Й“a nakoh ci jen, ci a rahsoh ЕӢ NikiЙ—i ЕӢ Й—afuk tangooraЕӢ Sinaay.
34.33: Wa Musaa Жҙut woo na Й“a, a muurra fikiiriЕӢ Й—e.
34.34: Taambohha ndeem, a kaЙ—eesa ЕӢ Й—iskaЕӢ NikiЙ—i Й—ah, a nihis muuriЕӢ Й—e po a puloh nga. A pulohha nga Й—ah, a woo Israayel ci ini a Й“ayoh nga.
34.35: Israayel ca marakka fikiiriЕӢ Й—e Й—ah, Й“a hot ne wa na siГұaarЙ—e siГұaariЙ—, jaar a muura po findi a na dokkohisse woya na NikiЙ—i.

35.1: Musaa cohЙ—ohha cuuЙ“aЕӢ Israayel jen, a woosa Й“a ne : В« In cii ceЙ— NikiЙ—i nakoh ne ca taambЙ—u :
35.2: Neeh yasna-yino ceЙ— na hee pangkasse, wi yasna-kanakЙ—oh waa hee nike nga Й—u mbeh hooliЙ—, mbehi na iЙ—siЙ—kohse wi hoolЙ—u wuu NikiЙ—i. ЖҒo' nu panguk ЕӢ mbeheem Й—ah, a hey apse.
35.3: ЖҠu heyЙ—i sah fuuЙ—e yongkaah ЕӢ ali Й—isik ЕӢ mbehi na iЙ—siЙ—kohse. В» Musaa teeЙ“ohiЙ— in ci joy onohu ne Genohaani haЙ“Й—u

35.10: Musaa woyissa ne : В« ЖҒi raak min-min nga Й—u jen, hayaat ne Й“a haЙ“iЙ— in ci NikiЙ—i nakoh jen.
35.11: ЖҒa hay Й—ah, Й“a haЙ“iЙ— Genohaani, na baasiЕӢ wa na in ci ula, korohaaci, kaadar ci, laat ci, kumbin ci, na tufkohaaci.

35.22: Жіaar ci na Й“itiЙ“ ci jen, Й“i teyЙ—ukee wa na keeГұ soosiЙ—, Й“a Й“ayeeЙ—a Й“i tokkaah kulЙ“a, Й“i long-long, Й“i jaaru ndukun, Й“i tokkaah wiiriis, na in nu nik ne wa urus Й—ah, yaa nu nga Й—ah Й“ayya ursi fu eЙ—oh, fu eЙ—ohhaa findi eЙ—ohi na raЙ—sasse wuu NikiЙ—i.

36.1: Betsalel na Oholiyaab na Й“i Й“o' wiiriis herГұiЙ—, NikiЙ—i oniЙ— Й“a inah-inah ne Й“a haЙ“iЙ— pangkaah nu nik ne wa haЙ“Й—aah ЕӢ ЖҠiski HooliЙ—i Й—ah. ЖҒooЙ“eem jen nikka Й“i haЙ“Й—an in ci NikiЙ—i nakoh jen, Й“a haЙ“Й—an ca findi NikiЙ—i nakohee Й“a ca. В»

36.6: Musaa nakohha ne wa woysaat ЕӢ dala ne : В« Wa Жҙaar haa wa Й“itiЙ“ haa, ali Й“o' kinaat haЙ“Й—is in haytohaah ЕӢ ЖҠiski HooliЙ—i ! В» ЖҒooЙ“a tufkiЙ—ta, Й“a haytohisЙ—i.
36.7: In ca kooЙ—kiЙ—assee doyeen wuu pangka jen, ca uupeen sah. HaЙ“Й—iЕӢ Genohaani
36.8: Betsalel, na pangkoh ca uupee hereГұ, Й“eЙ— haЙ“Й—ee Genohaani. A haЙ“Й—ohee wa haf-piis ndaЕӢkiyaah teЙ—ohu ooy leeЕӢ eЙ—fiЙ— ndengiЙ— ambsohuuЙ— na ooy bulo, na ooy ruumind eЙ—fiЙ— na ruumind coy. A moЙ—sinohha piis ci Й“i nataal seruben .
36.9: Piis ceem ceЙ— hende, waa nu nga Й—ah hutiiniЕӢ wa nikee saangal ndaЕӢkiyaah na nikiis (14), angiini nikka suung nikiis.
36.10: Yatuus nga ca ambsohuusa suptuusa yino, yatuus ci tas nammba tumu Й—aa.
36.11: -12 Piis ci yatuus ci ambsohuuЙ— ceem, suptiЙ—uusa Й“i yaah koroha ЕӢ Й“aki winoori ЕӢ sereendiЕӢ angiini, ca haЙ“Й—ohsee ooy bulo. Yatuus ci ambsohuuЙ— ci tas nammba suptiЙ—u mand Й—aa. Yaah ci korohaaci ЕӢ piis ci ambsohuuЙ— ci nikka ndaЕӢkiyaah-yatuus (50). CiЕӢ piis ci ambsohuuЙ— ci tas nammba nik ndaЕӢkiyaah-yatuus (50). Korohaaceem, waa nu nga Й—ah korЙ—ohuusa na morom wa ЕӢ piis ci cinooci ambsohuuЙ— ci.

36.15: Haf-piis ceem ceЙ— hende, waa nu nga Й—ah hutiiniЕӢ wa nikee suung ndaЕӢkiyaah-kaahay (30), angiini nikka suung nikiis.

36.20: A Й“ayya hang kassiya, a haЙ“iЙ—ta kaadar tufkiЙ— ne ca amb Genohaani.
36.21: Kaadar ci jen hendee hend ; waa nu nga Й—ah hutiiniЕӢ wa nikee saangal yatuus, angiini nikka suung yino na camban.

36.23: A haЙ“iЙ—ta kaadar ndaЕӢkiyaah-kanak (20) ЕӢ Й“ak yaah-sing ne fu eЙ— pulohaaЙ—-noh finho, fu aasee Й—ah.
36.24: Kaadar ceem haЙ“Й—iЙ—uusa tufkoha ndaЕӢkiyaah-nikiis (40) ЕӢ ooЙ“i, ca haЙ“Й—ohsee haalis. Kaadar nu nga Й—ah raakka tufkoha kanak, kot ci kanak ciЕӢ kaadari joy Й“eku ЕӢ tufkohaaceem.

36.26: na tufkoha ndaЕӢkiyaah-nikiis (40) haЙ“Й—ohu haalis, kaadar nu nga Й—ah raakka tufkoha kanak ЕӢ ooЙ“i.
36.27: ЖҒaki mirndoh ЕӢ Genohaani, ЕӢ Й“ak muyohaaЙ—-noh, raakka kaadar yasna-yino.

36.30: Jaarra, fikiiri raakka kaadar yasna-kaahay na tufkoha ndaЕӢkiyaah na yasna-yino (16) ci haЙ“Й—ohu haalis. Kaadar nu nga raakka tufkoha kanak.
36.31: ЕҠ finho ineem a haЙ“iЙ—ta laat kassiya yatuus ne ca galandu ЕӢ kaadar ci nik ЕӢ Й“ak yaah-sing.

36.36: A Й“ayya kumbin kassiya nikiis, a muurra ca na urus. Ca waakЙ—uusa koroha urus. Ca haЙ“Й—iЙ—uusa tufkoha nikiis haЙ“Й—ohu haalis naayЙ—uuЙ—.

37.1: Betsalel Й“ayya hang kassiya, a haЙ“iЙ—ta WahndeeniЕӢ AmbtiЙ—ohi. HutiiniЕӢ wa nikee suung kanak na camban, angiini nikka suung na camban, njooliini nikka suung na camban.

37.4: A haЙ“iЙ—ta Й“i ndooЙ— kassiya, a ulla ca na urus.
37.5: A taambiЙ—ta ca ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ kiГұiica ne wahndeena min Й“ayu.
37.6: A haЙ“Й—iЙ—taa kunoha, Й—iski na romkohse, wa nikee urus koceet ; hutiiniЕӢ wa nikka suung kanak na camban, angiini nikka suung na camban.
37.7: -8 Na urseem, a tiЙ“pa po a puliЙ—ta nataal seruben ЕӢ Й“ak nu nga ЕӢ Й“ak ci kanak ciЕӢ angiiniЕӢ wa.
37.9: Ca yurhiЙ—kohee yurhiЙ—koh, ca hiirra ЕӢ Й—iski na romkohse, ca raЙ—issa paЙ“ ciЕӢ ca ЕӢ Й—afki, ca Й—ippaa. TaaЙ“liЕӢ mbuuruuci
37.10: A Й“ayya hang kassiya, a haЙ“iЙ—ta taaЙ“li, hutiiniЕӢ wa nikee suung kanak, angiini nikka suung yino, njooliini nikka suung na camban.
37.11: A ullaa na urus koceet, a haЙ“Й—iЙ—taa banda urus po wa willa.
37.12: A haЙ“Й—iЙ—taa kaadar , angiiniЕӢ wa nikee santimeetar yasna-kaahay, a haЙ“Й—iЙ—taa banda urus po wa willa.
37.13: A haЙ“Й—iЙ—ta taaЙ“li inaa haa kiГұi nikiis, ca nikee urus, a tummba ca ЕӢ koГұ ciЕӢ wa nikiis ci, teemb ЕӢ kot ciЕӢ wa.
37.14: KiГұiici nikee ЕӢ sero kaadari , ne ndooЙ— ci na Й“ayohse taaЙ“li taambЙ—u nga ca.
37.15: ЕҠ ineem, a haЙ“iЙ—ta ndooЙ— kassiya kanak, a ulla ca na urus, Й“ayohaa wa.
37.16: A haЙ“iЙ—ta in ci nikan ЕӢ Й—afuk taaЙ“li : Palaat ci, na kaas ci, na koppaaci na meemeeci, ca jen ca haЙ“Й—ohsee urus koceet ; koppaaci na meemeeci nikka tumoha anaah ci na seeЖҙkohse. DegohaaniЕӢ laampaaci
37.17: Betsalel Й“ayya urus koceet a tiЙ“paa po a puliЙ—ta degoha laampa na tasiЕӢ wa na faani na koppaaci na pos ci rangsukaaЙ—iici na ci rangsukiЙ— ci. Ca jen ceЙ— Й“aahee ini ca tiЙ“ohu.
37.18: Wa raakka naak yasna-yino ЕӢ faaniЕӢ wa, kaahay ЕӢ Й“aki singi, kaahay ЕӢ Й“aki Гұaahmi, ca nikka sal kaahay.
37.19: Naak ci yasna-yinooci, waa nu nga raakka koppa kaahay findi amand na posohe, waa nu nga Й—ah raakka Й“i pos rangsukaaЙ—i na Й“i pos rangsukiЙ—.
37.20: FaaniЕӢ wa raakka koppa nikiis findi amand na posohe, waa nu nga Й—ah na pos ciЕӢ wa rangsukaaЙ—iici na ci rangsukiЙ— ci.
37.21: OoЙ“ sal nu nik raakka pos rangsukaaЙ—i ЕӢ faaniЕӢ degohaaniЕӢ laampaaci, po sal ci kaahay ci jen raakka.
37.22: Pos ci rangsukaaЙ—iici na naak ci jen nikee urus koceet tiЙ“uuЙ—, ca na ini tas ЕӢ degohaaniЕӢ laampaaci jen ceЙ— Й“aah ini ca tiЙ“ohu.
37.23: A haЙ“Й—iЙ—taa laampa yasna-kanak, a nammbaa haЙ“Й—iЙ— tanaaЖҙ na tumoha ЖҙuuЖҙ ; ca haЙ“Й—ohu urus koceet.
37.24: A Й“ay kilo urus koceet ndaЕӢkiyaah-kaahay (30) weЙ— a haЙ“Й—oh degohaaniЕӢ laampaaci na in ci hun naa jen. SuusohaaniЕӢ cuuraayi
37.25: Жіutta, a haЙ“iЙ—ta seeЖҙkoha, suusoha cuuraay. A haЙ“Й—oha hang kassiya, wa nikee kaare , Й“ak nu nga nikka suung yino te njooliini nikee suung kanak. A puliЙ—taa wiic ciЕӢ wa ЕӢ koГұ ciЕӢ wa ЕӢ Й—afki, a puliЙ—ndoh ca ЕӢ hangi wa haЙ“Й—ohu.
37.26: A ullaa na urus koceet ЕӢ Й—afki na wiic ci, a nammba ul Й“ak ciЕӢ wa jen ; a haЙ“Й—iЙ—taa banda urus po wa willa.
37.27: A haЙ“Й—iЙ—taa inaa haa kiГұi kanak ЕӢ ooЙ“ bandaani, in ceem nikee urus. ЖҒak nu nga raakka yino, ne ndooЙ— ci Й“ayohsana taambЙ—u nga ca.
37.28: ЕҠ ineem, a haЙ“iЙ—ta ndooЙ— kassiya kanak, a ulla ca na urus. Cuuraayi na diwi na hoolЙ—ohse
37.29: A haЙ“iЙ—ta diwi na hoolЙ—ohse hoolЙ—uuЙ— ci, wa nikka in hoolЙ—uuЙ— wuu Kooh, a nammba haЙ“iЙ— cuuraayi hooliЙ—i eeГұiЙ—i na dohse ЕӢ seeЖҙkohaani, a haЙ“iЙ— ca findi haЙ“Й—oh eeГұЙ—oha keeh-keeh na haЙ“Й—ohe.

38.1: Жіutta, a waakka hang kassiya, a haЙ“iЙ—ta keesi seeЖҙkohaani na dohohse hoosuuЙ— ci ; wa nikee kaare , Й“ak nu nga Й—ah nikee saangal kanak na camban ; njooliini nikka suung kaahay.
38.2: A puliЙ—ta wiic ciЕӢ wa ЕӢ koГұ ciЕӢ wa nikiis ci, a puliЙ—ndoh ca ЕӢ hangi wa haЙ“Й—ohu ; a ullaa jen na moos ruumind.
38.3: A haЙ“iЙ—ta in ci hun naa jen : TumohaaciЕӢ weti niiniЙ—i, peel ci, tumohaaciЕӢ Гұif mi na lisse, furset ciЕӢ sepet ci na tumohaaciЕӢ ЖҙuuЖҙ ci. A haЙ“Й—oh ca jen moos ruumind.
38.4: A haЙ“Й—iЙ—ta seeЖҙkohaani giryaas moos ruumind, a deggaa ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙi, ЕӢ ooЙ“ kaadariЕӢ seeЖҙkohaani, wa yoorra ЕӢ leerni po wa teemmba na leerniЕӢ njooliiniЕӢ seeЖҙkohaani.
38.5: A haЙ“iЙ—ta in nikiis haa kiГұi, a ГұaakiЙ—ta ca ЕӢ koГұ ci nikiis ciЕӢ giryaasi , Й—iski ndooЙ— ci Й“eksan.
38.6: A haЙ“iЙ—ta ndooЙ— kassiya kanak, a ulla ca na moos ruumind.
38.7: A Й“ekka ca ЕӢ kiГұiici ЕӢ Й“ak ciЕӢ seeЖҙkohaani, ca nikka ambohaaciЕӢ wa ne wa Й“ayse Й—ah. SeeЖҙkohaani nikee kees, Й—ooЖҙi nikka hulang.
38.8: Жіutta, a haЙ“iЙ—ta beГұwaari na Й“oktukohse na degohaaniЕӢ wa, a haЙ“Й—oh ca moos ruumind, a Й“ay seetuucaЕӢ Й“itiЙ“ ca na teembe ЕӢ nguЙ“u ЖҠiipa-na-Cohohse ne Й“a panguk, a haЙ“iЙ—ta ca. HaЙ“Й—iЕӢ bayaaliЕӢ Й—iipi
38.9: A haЙ“iЙ—ta in ci Й—ingohsan bayaali wil Genohaani, a haЙ“iЙ—ta piis teЙ—ohuuЙ— leeЕӢ eЙ—fiЙ— ndengiЙ— Й—ingoha Й“ak yaah-sing ne fu eЙ— pulohaaЙ—-noh finho, fu aasee Й—ah. ЖҒakeem nikee saangal ndaЕӢkiyaah-yatuus (50).
38.10: Kumbin ci ndaЕӢkiyaah-kanak ci piis ci tokohsan na tufkohaaci ndaЕӢkiyaah-kanak ci ca yipohsan haЙ“Й—ohuusa moos ruumind, ca raakka koroha na Гұoori ca Й“ekohsan haЙ“Й—ohu haalis.
38.11: ЖҒaki lah yaah-Гұaahum hennda Й—aa, wa nammba haЙ“Й—ohu Й—aa.
38.12: ЖҒaki lahoh na muyohaaЙ—-noh, hutiiniЕӢ piis ciЕӢ wa wa nikee saangal ndaЕӢkiyaah-kanak na yatuus (25), ca toksan ЕӢ kumbin ndaЕӢkiyaah ci yipsan ЕӢ tufkoha ndaЕӢkiyaah. KorohaaciЕӢ ca na Гұoor ci nikee haalis.
38.13: ЖҒakiЕӢ aasohaani, ЕӢ pulohaaЙ—-noh nikee saangal ndaЕӢkiyaah-kanak na yatuus (25).
38.14: -15 ЖҒak ci kanak ci aasohaani nik ЕӢ leerniЕӢ ca, waa nu nga, piis ciЕӢ wa nikee saangal yasna-kanak na camban, wa raakka kumbin kaahay na tufkohaaciЕӢ ca.
38.16: Piis ciЕӢ Й—ingiЕӢ bayaali jen, haЙ“Й—ohsee leeЕӢ eЙ—fiЙ— ndengiЙ—.
38.17: Tufkohaaci kumbin ci yipohsee nikee moos ruumind, korohaaci na Гұoor ci nikka haalis, haf ciЕӢ kumbin ci uluusa na haalis. Kumbin ciЕӢ Й—ingiЕӢ bayaali jen raakee Гұoor haЙ“Й—ohu haalis.
38.18: RidooniЕӢ aasohaaniЕӢ Й—ingiЕӢ bayaali teЙ—ohsee ooy leeЕӢ eЙ—fiЙ— ndengiЙ— ambsohuuЙ— na ooy bulo na ruumind eЙ—fiЙ— na ruumind coy, wa haЙ“Й—uusa findi borode'oh keeh-keeh na borode'ohe. HutiiniЕӢ ridooni nikee saangal ndaЕӢkiyaah, njooliini nikka suung yatuus findi angiiniЕӢ haf-piis ciЕӢ Й—ingiЕӢ bayaali.
38.19: Ridooni toksan ЕӢ kumbin ci nikiis ci haЙ“Й—ohu moos ruumind, ci yipsan ЕӢ tufkohaaci nikiis ciЕӢ ca nam haЙ“Й—ohu moos ruumind ; korohaaci na Гұoor ci nikee haalis, haf ciЕӢ kumbin ci uluusa na haalis.
38.20: Tatohaaci amban Genohaani ЕӢ kehЖҙi na ciЕӢ Й—ingiЕӢ bayaali jen, nikee moos ruumind. In ci kaЙ— ЕӢ haЙ“Й—uukiЕӢ Genohaani
38.21: In cii ceЙ— kaЙ— ЕӢ haЙ“Й—uukiЕӢ Genohaani hooliЙ—i, Й—iski atoh ci fiisohu AmbtiЙ—ohiЕӢ Kooh Й—aaku, findi Musaa nakohee wa. ЖҒi Й“aah ЕӢ cuuЙ“iЕӢ Lewi Й“eЙ— taambkohee kindi ; Itamaar kuЙ“kiЕӢ Aaruna seeЖҙkiЙ—ohi, a yi adgohee Й“a.
38.22: ЖҒoyi haЙ“iЙ— in ci NikiЙ—i nakee Musaa jen, a Betsalel, kuЙ“kiЕӢ Uri, yi setiЕӢ Hur, a Й“aahee ЕӢ cuuЙ“iЕӢ Yudaa.
38.23: Oholiyaab kuЙ“kiЕӢ Ahisamaak yi Й“aah ЕӢ cuuЙ“iЕӢ Daan, a yi Й“aatЙ—ohee Й—e. A Жҙaar herГұiЙ— ЕӢ pesit atoh moЙ—iЙ— na fer in moЙ—iЙ— te a miniЙ— moЙ—sin lool na piis bulo na ruumind eЙ—fiЙ— na ruumind coy, na leeЕӢ eЙ—fiЙ— ndengiЙ—.
38.24: Wi ЖҠiski HooliЙ—i haЙ“Й—asse, ini kaЙ— ngaЕӢ urus jen te e Israayel ci eЙ—oha, wa kilo urus teemet-yasna-kaahay na kilo ndaЕӢkiyaah-yasna-kanak na yasna-kanak (877), na garam teemet-kaahay (300), ca Й“eesu ЕӢ Й“eesohaacaЕӢ ЖҠiska HooliЙ—a.
38.25: Haalsa Жҙaar ca kindu eЙ—ohee, wa kilo haalis junni-kaahay na kilo ndaЕӢkiyaah na yasna-kanak (3017), na garam teemet-yasna-kanak na ndaЕӢkiyaah-yatuus (750), ca Й“eesu ЕӢ Й“eesohaacaЕӢ ЖҠiska HooliЙ—a.
38.26: Haf nu nga Й—ah eЙ—ohee garam haalis yatuus, Й“a Й“ees ca ЕӢ Й“eesohaacaЕӢ ЖҠiska HooliЙ—a. Жіaar nu raakeen kiis ndaЕӢkiyaah-kanak (20) kaЙ—ta Й—afuk ЕӢ bindka Й—ah, eЙ—ohha, Й“a nikee Жҙaar junni-teemet-yasna-yino na junni-kaahay na teemet-yatuus na ndaЕӢkiyaah-yatuus (603.550).
38.27: Kilo haalis junni-kaahay (3000) ceЙ— naayЙ—u haЙ“Й—oha tufkohaaci teemet ciЕӢ kumbin ciЕӢ Genohaani hooliЙ—i na kumbin ciЕӢ ridooni nik ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙi. Yino nu nga Й—ah haЙ“Й—ohuusa kilo haalis ndaЕӢkiyaah-kaahay (30).
38.28: Kilooci ndaЕӢkiyaah na yasna-kanak ci (17) tasee na garam teemet-yasna-kanak na ndaЕӢkiyaah-yatuus ci (750) haЙ“Й—ohuusa korohaaci, ulohuusa haf ciЕӢ kumbin ci, haЙ“Й—ohuusa Гұoor ciЕӢ ridooci toku ЕӢ kumbin ci.
38.29: Moosi Israayel ci eЙ—ohee nikee kilo junni-kanak na kilo teemet na kilo ndaЕӢkiyaah-kanak na nikiis (2124).
38.30: WeЙ— moosi haЙ“Й—ohu tufkohaaci nik ЕӢ aasohaaniЕӢ ЖҠiipi-na-Cohohse, na seeЖҙkohaani moosi na giryaasiЕӢ wa, na in ciЕӢ seeЖҙkohaani ;
38.31: weЙ— nam haЙ“Й—ohu tufkohaaciЕӢ Й—ingiЕӢ bayaali na ciЕӢ aasohaaniЕӢ wa, na tatohaaci amb Genohaani ЕӢ kehЖҙi na ci amb Й—ingiЕӢ bayaali.

39.1: ЖҒa Й“ayya ooy bulo na ruumind eЙ—fiЙ— na ruumind coy, Й“a haЙ“iЙ—ta kulЙ“a hew, ci Й“ekkassan wuu pangka ЕӢ ЖҠiska HooliЙ—a ; Й“a haЙ“Й—iЙ—ta Aaruna kulЙ“a hoolЙ—uuЙ— wuu Kooh, findi NikiЙ—i nakohee wa Musaa.
39.2: ЖҒa teЙ—ta efoodi na fiil urus ambsohuuЙ— na leeЕӢ eЙ—fiЙ— ndengiЙ— na ooy bulo na ruumind eЙ—fiЙ— na ruumind coy.
39.3: ЖҒa Й“ayya urus tiЙ“uuЙ—, wa seeluusa fiil fiil. ЖҒa ambsohhaa na ooy bulo na ruumind eЙ—fiЙ— na ruumind coy na leeЕӢ eЙ—fiЙ—, Й“a teЙ—taa, wa nikka pangki feroh keeh-keeh panguk.
39.4: ЖҒa suptiЙ—taa ngalla kanak ЕӢ lecem ci ЕӢ Й—afki ne wa min Й“ekku.
39.5: Wa raakka tokЙ—ukoha ЕӢ kinoh ki, wa na efoodi , ceЙ— hunee, ca nikee piis yino findi NikiЙ—i nakohee wa Musaa.
39.6: ЖҒa Й“ayya atoh peme kanak, pemeeni na woyse sooham . ЖҒa Й“ayya fiil urus, Й“a teЙ—iЙ—ta ca Й—isik ci ca Й“eksan, Й“a fiissa tiik ciЕӢ kuЙ“uuci Жҙaar ciЕӢ caac Й“a Israayel ЕӢ atoh ceem. Ca fiissee findi Гұaas na Гұaasohse.
39.7: A tummba ca ЕӢ ngallaaciЕӢ efoodi ne ca naandsohee cuuЙ“ ciЕӢ Israayel, findi NikiЙ—i nakohee wa Musaa.
39.8: ЖҒi feroh keeh-keeh haЙ“iЙ—ta nafaani na hee nike ЕӢ fikiiri, Й“a haЙ“Й—oha leeЕӢ eЙ—fiЙ— ndengiЙ— na fiil urus na ooy bulo na ruumind eЙ—fiЙ— na ruumind coy, findi efoodi .
39.9: Wa nikee kaare ne wa lemu kanak Й—ah, Й“ak nu nga Й—ah nikka santimeetar ndaЕӢkiyaah-kanak na yatuus (25).
39.10: Wa moЙ—sinuusa na raЕӢalЙ—oh atoh peme nikiis : raЕӢalЙ—ohi koc raakee atoh ci moЙ—ohngaan ci na woyse : odem , pitdaah , na baareket .
39.11: Wi kanakЙ—oh raakka nopek na safiir na yaahalom .
39.12: Wi kaahayЙ—oh raakka lesem na saboo na ahlamaa .
39.13: Wi nikiisЙ—oh raakka tarsiis na sooham na yaspeeh . Peme nu nga Й—ah teЙ—Й—uusa Й—iski wa Й“eksan na fiil urus, wa Й“ekuusa nga.
39.14: Tiik ciЕӢ kuЙ“uuci Жҙaar ciЕӢ caac Й“a Israayel fiissee ЕӢ atoh ci ndaЕӢkiyaah na kanak ceem (12). Ca fiisuusa findi Гұaas na Гұaasohse. Peme nu nga Й—ah, nikiЙ—ta tiik cuuЙ“ yino.
39.15: -18 ЖҒa Й“ayya ceen ci urus koceet ci teЙ—uuЙ— ci, ci ambЙ—u ЕӢ Й“ekohaaciЕӢ pemeeci kanak ci nik ЕӢ efoodi . ЖҒa haЙ“Й—iЙ—ta ca koroha urus kanak haa kiГұi ЕӢ koГұ ciЕӢ nafaani ЕӢ Й—afki. ЖҒa korra ceen ci ngaЕӢ kiГұiiceem po nafaani minnda nik ЕӢ fikiiri.
39.16: 19-20 ЖҒa haЙ“Й—issa koroha urus nikiis haa kiГұi. Kanak ci, Й“ekuusa ЕӢ koГұ ciЕӢ nafaani ЕӢ kehЖҙi, ЕӢ Й“akiЕӢ Й—ooЖҙi, ca laaleeЙ—a efoodi ; kanak ci tas Й“ekuusa ЕӢ ngallaaciЕӢ efoodi ЕӢ kehЖҙi, ngaЕӢ fikiiri, ЕӢ sero Й—iski ca suptu, ЕӢ Й—afkiЕӢ tokЙ—ukohaaniЕӢ kinoh ki.
39.21: KiГұiiciЕӢ nafaani na ciЕӢ efoodi tokЙ—ohuusa na niy bulo. ЕҠ ineem nafaani ammba ЕӢ tokЙ—ukohaaniЕӢ kinoh ki, wa yoondЙ—i, wa rissa ЕӢ Й—afuk efoodi findi NikiЙ—i nakohee wa Musaa.
39.22: A haЙ“iЙ—ta kulЙ“aaki hutiЙ—i yakki hunan na efoodi , wa teЙ—ohsee ooy bulo jen.
39.23: Mbooh kiЕӢ wa nikee ЕӢ leerni, wa daamina'uusa po wa ndennga ne wa faarkuu.
39.24: ЖҒa Й“ayya ooy bulo na ruumind eЙ—fiЙ— na ruumind coy na ooy leeЕӢ ndengiЙ—, Й“a haЙ“iЙ—ta rim garnaat, Й“a moЙ—sinohha ca kehЖҙiЕӢ kulЙ“aaki po wa willa.
39.25: ЖҒa haЙ“iЙ—ta Й“i joolooli urus koceet, Й“a Й—ookka ca ЕӢ kehЖҙiЕӢ kulЙ“aaki po wa willa, ЕӢ harmban rim ciЕӢ garnaati ;
39.26: Й“a haЙ“iЙ—ta rim garnaat yino Й—ah, Й“a Й—ook joolooli yino po sereendiЕӢ kulЙ“aaki jen willa findi NikiЙ—i nakohee wa Musaa.
39.27: ЖҒa nammba teЙ— Й“i kulЙ“a leeЕӢ wuu Aaruna na kuЙ“uuciЕӢ Й—e ;
39.28: na mbahne wuu seeЖҙkiЙ—ohi yakki na Й“i mbahne wiiriis teЙ—ohu leeЕӢ eЙ—fiЙ—. ЖҒa nammba Й“a haЙ“Й—iЙ— Й“i jata na leeЕӢ eЙ—fiЙ— ndengiЙ—.
39.29: ЖҒa haЙ“iЙ—ta seentur, wa moЙ—sinuusa na ooy leeЕӢ eЙ—fiЙ— ndengiЙ— na ooy bulo na ruumind eЙ—fiЙ— na ruumind coy findi NikiЙ—i nakohee wa Musaa.
39.30: ЖҒa haЙ“iЙ—ta tokkaah ЕӢ puk hoolЙ—uuЙ—, wa nikee urus koceet, wa mandee na pos kidig. Woo kii fiisuusa nga an : "Wuu NikiЙ—i", wa fiisuusa findi Гұaas na Гұaasohse.
39.31: Wa tokuusa na tokЙ—oha bulo ЕӢ fikiiriЕӢ mbahneeri, findi NikiЙ—i nakohee wa Musaa. Musaa teeЙ“uuЙ— pangka haЙ“Й—u jen
39.32: Panguk ciЕӢ Genohaani, weЙ— ЖҠiipi-na-Cohohse, reehoh haЙ“Й—u Й—aa. Israayel ci haЙ“iЙ—ta pangka jen findi NikiЙ—i nakohee wa Musaa jok.
39.33: Musaa komuusa Genohaani, Й—iipi na in ci haЙ“Й—ohuu wa jen : Korohaaci, kaadar ci, laat ci, kumbin ci na tufkohaaci ;
39.34: na baasi haЙ“Й—ohu und kuy mbaal suupuuЙ— ruumind, na wi haЙ“Й—ohu und inoh cookom, na ridooni Й—asЙ—an ЖҠiski Hoolohngaani ;
39.35: na Wahndeeni na teeЙ“ohe AmbtiЙ—ohi na ndooЙ— ci Й“ayohsana, na kunohaani, weЙ— Й—iski na romkohse ;
39.36: na taaЙ“li, na tumohaaci hun naa jen, na mbuuruuci degsan nga, wuu Kooh ;
39.37: na degohaaniЕӢ laampaaci urus koceeti, na laampaaciЕӢ wa taambtiЙ—ohiЙ— ci, na in ci hun naa ; na diwliini fuuЙ—oha laampaaci ;
39.38: na keesi seeЖҙkohaani suusohsan cuuraay ci, wi ursi ; na diwi na hoolЙ—ohse, na cuuraayi eeГұЙ—ohaani, na ridooniЕӢ aasohaaniЕӢ Й—iipi ;
39.39: na keesi seeЖҙkohaani dohohsan hoosuuЙ— ci, wi moosi ; na giryaasiЕӢ wa nam haЙ“Й—ohu moos ruumind, na ndooЙ— ci wa na Й“ayohse, na tumohaaci hun naa jen ; na beГұwaari na hee tumohse masmi Й“oktukohsan na degohaaniЕӢ wa ;
39.40: na piis ciЕӢ Й—ingiЕӢ bayaali na kumbin ciЕӢ wa, na tufkohaaciЕӢ ca ; na ridooniЕӢ aasohaaniЕӢ bayaali, na niy ciЕӢ wa na tatohaaciЕӢ wa ; na tumohaaci pangkohsan ЕӢ Genohaani, weЙ— ЖҠiipi-na-Cohohse ;
39.41: na kulЙ“aaci hoolЙ—uuЙ— ci pangkohsan ЕӢ ЖҠiski HooliЙ—i, ca nikka ciЕӢ Aaruna seeЖҙkiЙ—ohi, na ciЕӢ kuЙ“uuciЕӢ Й—e ne Й“a pangkee findi seeЖҙkiЙ—oh Й—ah.
39.42: Israayel ci haЙ“Й—een pangkeem jen findi NikiЙ—i nakohee wa Musaa jok.
39.43: Musaa marakka pangka Й“a haЙ“iЙ— jen, wa nikka findi NikiЙ—i nakohee Й—e wa jok, Musaa barke'iЙ—ta Й“a.

40.2: В« Mbehi koc ЕӢ caЙ“ni koc, fu hey yipe Genohaani, weЙ— ЖҠiipi-na-Cohohse.
40.3: Fu Й“ay Wahndeeni Й—aak in ci na teeЙ“ohe AmbtiЙ—ohi, fu Й“eka ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙi, fu Й—asiЙ—a na ridooni saЙ“sohaani.
40.4: Fu Й“ay taaЙ“li, fu deg in ci na degse nga. Fu Й“ay degohaaniЕӢ laampaaci, fu deg laampaaci ЕӢ Й—afuk wa.
40.5: Fu Й“ay seeЖҙkohaani haЙ“Й—ohu urus, suusoha cuuraayi, fu dega ЕӢ fiki WahndeeniЕӢ AmbtiЙ—ohi ndo fu reyan ridooni saЙ“sohaani Й—ah. Fu nam Й“ek ridooniЕӢ aasohaaniЕӢ Genohaani.
40.6: Fu deg seeЖҙkohaani na dohohse hoosuuЙ— ci ЕӢ aasohaaniЕӢ Genohaani, ЖҠiipi-na-Cohohse.
40.7: Fu deg beГұwaari na Й“oktukohse ЕӢ harmban Й—iipi na seeЖҙkohaani, fu tuma masuЙ“.
40.8: Fu yip Й—ingiЕӢ bayaali wil Genohaani jen, fu Й“ek rido ЕӢ aasohaaniЕӢ wa.
40.9: Fu Й“ay diwi na hoolЙ—ohse hoolЙ—uuЙ— ci wuu Kooh, fu yiif ЕӢ Genohaani na in ci nik ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙi jen. Fu hoolЙ—ohana Й—aa na tumohaaci hun naa jen, jaar wa nik in hooliЙ— wuu so.
40.10: Fu nama yiif ЕӢ seeЖҙkohaani na dohohse hoosuuЙ— ci na tumohaaci hun naa jen, fu hoolЙ—oha Й—aa, jaar seeЖҙkohaani nik in ye hoolan wuu so.
40.11: Fu nam yiif diwi ЕӢ Й—afuk beГұwaari na Й“oktukohse na degohaaniЕӢ wa, fu hooliЙ—a wuu so.
40.12: Fu Й“ay Aaruna na kuЙ“uuciЕӢ Й—e po ЕӢ aasohaaniЕӢ Й—iipi, fu Й“ook Й“a na masmi.
40.13: Fu Й“ekiЙ— Aaruna kulЙ“aaci hoolЙ—uuЙ— ci wuu so, fu yiif Й—e diwi, fu hoolЙ—oh Й—e Й—aa ne a pangkiЙ—ee so findi seeЖҙkiЙ—oh.
40.14: Fu Й“eeЙ—uk kuЙ“uuciЕӢ Й—e Жҙaar ci, Й“a reЙ“, fu Й“ekiЙ— Й“a kulЙ“aaciЕӢ Й“a.
40.15: Fu yiif Й“a diwi findi baab Й“a, Й“a hool wuu so, ne Й“a pangkiЙ—ee so findi seeЖҙkiЙ—oh. Ineem hey tahe po, Й“eЙ— na Й“i rimkohan nga Й“a nikan seeЖҙkiЙ—oh po faw. В» Musaa yipiЙ— Genohaani
40.16: Musaa haЙ“iЙ—ta ina NikiЙ—i nakee Й—e jok, a haЙ“iЙ—ta ca jen.
40.17: A yippa Genohaani ЕӢ mbehi koc ЕӢ caЙ“ni koc ЕӢ kiis ki kanakЙ—oh ЕӢ pulohaЕӢ Й“a Misra.
40.18: Musaa tufkiЙ—ta Genohaani ; a Й“ekka tufkohaaci, a tufkiЙ—ta kaadar ci, a Й“ekka laat ci, a yippa kumbin ci.
40.19: A degga Й—iipi ЕӢ Й—afuk Genohaani, a uloha Й—iipi baas findi NikiЙ—i nakohee Й—e wa.
40.20: Musaa Й“ayya atoh ciЕӢ AmbtiЙ—ohi, a Й“ekka ca ЕӢ Wahndeeni, a Й“ekka ndooЙ— ci na Й“ayohsee wa, a ranngaa na kunohaaniЕӢ wa, Й—iski na romkohse.
40.21: A Й“ekka Wahndeeni ЕӢ Genohaani, a Й“ekka ridooni saЙ“sohaani ne wa Й—asiЙ— Wahndeeni findi NikiЙ—i nakohee Й—e wa.
40.22: A Й“ekka taaЙ“li ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ ЖҠiipi-na-Cohohse, ЕӢ Й“aki Гұaahmi ne fu eЙ— pulohaaЙ—-noh finho, fu aasee Й—ah, ndo fu reyan ridooni Й—ah.
40.23: A degga mbuuruuci ЕӢ Й—afki, ЕӢ fiki NikiЙ—i, findi NikiЙ—i nakohee Й—e wa.
40.24: A Й“ekka degohaaniЕӢ laampaaci ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ Й—iipi, wa yurhiЙ—kohha na taaЙ“li, ЕӢ Й“aki singi.
40.25: A degga laampaaci ЕӢ Й—afkiЕӢ wa, ЕӢ fiki NikiЙ—i, findi NikiЙ—i nakohee Й—e wa.
40.26: A Й“ekka seeЖҙkohaani ursi ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ Й—iipi, ЕӢ sero ridooni saЙ“sohaani, ndo fu reyan nga Й—ah.
40.27: A suussa cuuraay ЕӢ Й—afuk wa findi NikiЙ—i nakohee Й—e wa.
40.29: A degga seeЖҙkohaani na dohohse hoosuuЙ— ci ЕӢ sero aasohaaniЕӢ Genohaani, weЙ— ЖҠiipi-na-Cohohse. A seeЖҙkohha Й—oopaat nga, a dohha Й—e po a hoommba, a nammba eЙ—oh Й“i pees findi NikiЙ—i nakohee Й—e wa.
40.30: A degga beГұwaari ЕӢ harmban Й—iipi na seeЖҙkohaani ; a tummbaa masuЙ“ Й“ooksukoha.
40.31: Musaa na Aaruna na kuЙ“uuciЕӢ Aaruna Й“ookka yaah ciЕӢ Й“a nga na kot ciЕӢ Й“a.
40.32: ЕҠ ineem mbaЙ—na Й“a hee aase ЕӢ ЖҠiipi-na-Cohohse wala Й“a reЙ“ee seeЖҙkohaani Й—ah, Й“a Й“ook yaah na kot findi NikiЙ—i nakoha Musaa.
40.33: A tufkiЙ—ta Й—ingiЕӢ bayaali, wa willa Genohaani na seeЖҙkohaani. A Й“ekka ridooni ЕӢ aasohaaniЕӢ Й—ingiЕӢ bayaali. Musaa reehЙ—oh pangki Й—aa. Kooh teeЙ“ohiЙ— yaki a yak ЕӢ Genohaani
40.34: WaЙ— eel Й—uuku uloh ЖҠiipi-na-Cohohse, yaki NikiЙ—i yak riiffaa, weЙ— wi Genohaani.
40.35: ЕҠ ineem Musaa mineeЙ—i aas nga sagu eeliЕӢ Й—uukri ulee wa na riifi wa riifee na yaki NikiЙ—i yak.
40.36: Ini kooЙ—oh ndii, ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ yongsiЙ—kohiЕӢ Й“a jen, Israayel ci meeЙ— Й—of ne Й“a coot mbeh nu eeliЕӢ Й—uukri kuruk ЕӢ Genohaani, wa tiimba Й—ah.
40.37: Waaye eeli Й—ofЙ—i Й—ah, Й“a na kaЙ—eeЙ—i po mbaЙ—na wa kurkan.
40.38: Israayel ci jen meeЙ— hot nga, noh reesa Й—ah, eeliЕӢ NikiЙ—i nik ЕӢ Й—afuk Genohaani ; wek reesa Й—ah, yongkaah gile. Wa nikohee Й—aa ЕӢ yongsiЙ—kohiЕӢ Й“a jen.

1.1: Yunus, a nikee kuЙ“u Amitay. Raakka mbeh, NikiЙ—i woosa Й—e ne :
1.2: В« KaЙ—a win-win Niniw, kur ka yakka, looЖҙkaa Й“a ne aЖҙaarkaЕӢ Й“a reyiЙ— nga so. В»
1.3: Waaye Yunus taambohha ndeem a saandohha Tarsis, ne a fus NikiЙ—i. A reesa ЕӢ Joppa, a raakka nga batoona na kaЙ—e Tarsis, a wirinnda, a aassa na Й“i Й“o' ЕӢ batoona na hee Й“a coottohe nga ne a min ki us NikiЙ—i.
1.4: Waaye, wa Й“a nik ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ cookma, NikiЙ—i fuuЙ—issa ЕӢ Й—afuk cookma puuЙ—is ayrukiЙ—, pahul yakak yoppa cookma po batoona waaЙ—eeЙ—a Й“altukoh.
1.5: ЖҒooЙ“a ambohee batoona neЖҙЖҙohha ; yaa nik nga Й“a looЖҙukka tiikaЕӢ koohaЕӢ Й—e, Й“a aammba unung caЕӢ Й“a ЕӢ cookma ne Й“a eЙ—fiЙ— batoona . Raakka waam Yunus ruhsiЙ— ngaЕӢ tasaЕӢ batoona ; a nikee faankiЙ—, a neeheeЙ—a pani nooЙ—iЙ—.
1.6: Жіaara adgiЙ—ee amboh ca reЙ“pa Й—e, woosa Й—e ne : В« Fu neehang ye ? Kurka, koolЙ—a hooso po ЕӢ koohiЕӢ Й—a ! Wa miniЙ— raak Kooh liiЙ“siЙ—oh Й“oo po Й“oo sooЖҙuu. В»
1.7: ЕҠ ndeem, Й“a woytiЙ—ohha an : В« ЖҒoo markiskaat ЕӢ petaaw ci, Й“oo marak miskiЙ—i rahas Й“oo puloh nga Й“a. В» ЖҒa markisukka, petaaw ca teeЙ“ohha Yunus.
1.8: ЖҒa woyissa Й—e ne : В« TeeЙ“a Й“oo Й“oyi Й“ek Й“oo inii ! Fu na haЙ“Й—e ye ? Fu kurkoh nde ? Kur Й—u teeku na ? Fu Й“aah ngaЕӢ winde cuuЙ“ ? В»
1.9: A loffa Й“a ne : В« ЕҠ Heber, NikiЙ—i, a yi mi na yakЙ—e, Kooh ЕӢ Й—afki, yi fer cookmi na kehЖҙi. В»
1.10: Wa Й“a kerah woo kaЕӢ Й—e, amboh ca neЖҙЖҙohha, Й“a tummba Й—e ne : В« Fu haЙ“iЙ— ye an ? В» ЖҒa inheen Й“al ne a na saandohe fusoha NikiЙ—i laam a naandsukeen Й“a wa.
1.11: ЖҒa meekissa Й—e ne : В« ЖҒoo na hee na tumtiЙ—ohe na Й—a po cookmi yeeЙ“uk ? В» Laam raak cookma koolЙ—ukeeЙ—a koolЙ—uk.
1.12: A loffa Й“a an : В« MeeЙ“aat to Й—u biir ro ЕӢ cookmi, Й—ah cookmi hey yeeЙ“ke. Laam ЕӢ inhiЙ—a, wa nga so findi wa taamboh po pahuli ayrukiЙ—ii bipukka ЕӢ Й—afuk Й—u. В»
1.13: Joy ne Й“a tum ini a woo, amboh ca joowwa ne Й“a teer ЕӢ tefsa, waaye ЕӢ Й“arang Й“arang, laam cookma nikee uupeeЙ—a Й“a uup ayruk.
1.14: ЕҠ ineem, Й“a kiimmba NikiЙ—i ne : В« Cey ! NikiЙ—i, kana Й“oo ap sagu Жҙaarii ! Te kan Й“oo yamb kakaan Й“o' yurhiЙ—. Laam a yaf, NikiЙ—i, tum findi wa neЙ“oh Й—a. В»
1.15: ЖҒa jaarra, Й“a meeЙ“pa Yunus, Й“a njaffa Й—e ЕӢ cookma, cookma hannda seemiЙ— Й—uuЙ—aЕӢ wa.
1.16: ЖҒooЙ“a neЖҙЖҙohha ЕӢ NikiЙ—i ; Й“a seeЖҙkiЙ—ta Й—e, Й“a giГұiЙ—ta Й—e ne Й“a hey Й—e tumЙ—e in, Й“a cooteeЙ—a.

2.1: Yunus, ЕӢ tasaЕӢ Й—e ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ cookma, NikiЙ—i kerhiЙ— Й—e. A tummba po cuurund duu'in pulla a onnda Й—e. Yunus nikka ngaЕӢ rookaЕӢ cuurnda neeh kaahay na wek kaahay.
2.2: NgaЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ rookaЕӢ cuurnda a kiimmba NikiЙ—i, KoohiЕӢ Й—e.
2.3: A woosa ne : В« Wa ЕӢ nikoh ngaЕӢ mbugala, ЕӢ looЖҙkiЙ— po ngaЕӢ NikiЙ—i, te a tahsiЙ— to ; ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ oon caЕӢ Jaanim, ЕӢ leehkiЙ—, fu kerhiЙ— hoosooriЕӢ ngo.
2.4: Fu juleen ndo ngaЕӢ nooЙ—-nooЙ—a, ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ cookma, te masma wileen ndo. Ginaah caЕӢ Й—a jen na wal-wal ca mburfuГұeen ndo.
2.5: Mi nak ЕӢ woyee ne : вҖң Fu aaГұiЙ— to, fu waaЙ—isЙ—i so deg has. вҖқ HondohЙ—i ЕӢ ambiЙ— ne ЕӢ hey hotisse KahnaЕӢ Й—a HoolЙ—a.
2.6: MasuЙ“ ca goЙ—een mbooh kiЕӢ ngo, nooЙ—aЕӢ masma wileen ndo. Paangi-cookom duluurkeen hafiЕӢ ngo.
2.7: NgaЕӢ tasaЕӢ tangooca ЕӢ ruhseen, ЕӢ rangseen po faw ngaЕӢ kur caЕӢ fiЙ—aaf ca, ЕӢ Й“ak Й“ooЙ“a Й—eЙ“gaan. Waaye fu tumiЙ— po kipes kiЕӢ ngo pulla ruy-ruya, NikiЙ—i, KoohiЕӢ ngo.
2.8: Wa maa waaЙ—e Гұak kiГұin, ЕӢ haltuk Й—a, NikiЙ—i te fu kerhiЙ— kiimaЕӢ ngo ЕӢ KahnaЕӢ Й—a HoolЙ—a.
2.9: ЖҒi na taambkohe Й“onaah ci, Й“a na faГұe muuЙ—iЕӢ Й“a.
2.10: Mi, faan ndo, ngaЕӢ Й“i hooso jangtuk, ЕӢ hey Й—a seeЖҙke Й“i hoosuuЙ—. Ini ЕӢ giГұ, ЕӢ heya reytine. A NikiЙ—i naafohi. В»
2.11: NikiЙ—i woossa cuurnda, cuurnda hukka Yunus ЕӢ sereendaЕӢ cookma.

3.1: Wa a pul ЕӢ cuurnda, NikiЙ—i kanakЙ—ukka woo Yunus ne :
3.2: В« KaЙ—a win-win Niniw, kur ka yakka. Kataa Й“a ini ЕӢ woo Й—a. В»
3.3: Yunus gooГұukka, kaЙ—ta Niniw findi NikiЙ—i woyoha. Niniw nikee kur yakoh na yakoh, a neeh kaahay onan Й“o' a tiinda Й“ak po Й“ak.
3.4: Wa a kaЙ— po a aassa Niniw, a hooЙ“ukka wil nga. A huflukka Й“i Niniw na hoosoocii : В« TasiЙ— neeh ndaЕӢkiyaah-nikiis (40), Niniw Й—umbu ! В»
3.5: Wa Й“i Niniw kerah woo keem, Й“a kossa Kooh ; Й“a katohha or, Й“a Й“ekukka Й“i daah, ambohha ЕӢ ya uup yak po ЕӢ ya uup Жҙin.
3.6: Wa woo ka ree ЕӢ nofaЕӢ buuraЕӢ Niniw, a kurukka ngaЕӢ Й“oofohaanaЕӢ Й—e, a wolukka lipkohaaЙ—aЕӢ Й—e, a Й“ekukka daah, a baffa ЕӢ wet,
3.7: a woosohha ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ kur ka jen ne : В« Buur na yakak ci sangohiЙ— Й“ooЙ“i na Й—oopaat ci, yakak na Жҙin, ne Й“a kanaat Гұam, Й“a kanaat an masuЙ“,
3.8: yaa nu nga Й—ah, Й“ekkaat daah. ЖҒi hooso meeЙ“uuЙ— koolЙ—u, po ngaЕӢ Kooh, te yaa nu nik suungЙ—uk tiindohaaЙ—iЕӢ Й—e sepЖҙiЙ—i, na tumohaaЙ— ci otiЙ— ciЕӢ yaah ciЕӢ Й—e.
3.9: Yaa inah andi Kooh Й“oЖҙsanЙ—i liiЙ“ohaaЙ—, andi inwaaso ambanЙ—i Й—e, andi a heyЙ—i dokne paa finho dohЙ—iЕӢ aay-keeГұiЕӢ Й—e, po Й“oo sooЖҙuu ? В»
3.10: ЕҠ ineem, Kooh inhisohha in ca Й“a haЙ“Й—e ne Й“a pul ngaЕӢ tiindohaaЙ— ca moЙ—aaЙ—iicaЕӢ Й“a. Taambohha nga inwaaso ammba Kooh ЕӢ in ca a kooЙ—kiЙ—ee Й“a, te a mirndohЙ—i ca raakiЙ—.

4.1: Wa Kooh Й—aas Й“i Niniw, wa neЙ“aaЙ—iisa Yunus lool, a ayrukka.
4.2: A woosa NikiЙ—i : В« Eey NikiЙ—i, ina ЕӢ woyee wa ЕӢ nikoh ЕӢ kur Й“oo weЙ—i wii haa e ? E ineem tahee po ЕӢ Й—eЙ“gohha saandoh Tarsis ; ЕӢ inhangangeen ne, fu Koohi na baahohe, yi na yirmohe, yi yooЙ“Й—i ayruk, yi riif na waaЙ—ohaaЙ— te inwaaso na ambee Й—a amb ЕӢ tum miskiЙ—.
4.3: Teemb ndii, NikiЙ—i, Й“aya kiГұin kiЕӢ ngo, laam nga so, ЕӢ kaan ngisoh ЕӢ pes. В»
4.4: NikiЙ—i loffa : В« Wi fu ayruk wii, fu nik ЕӢ kiyooh e ? В»
4.5: Yunus pulla kur ka, a Й“ooffa ЕӢ Й“ak pulohaaЙ—-noh ; a Й—iippa nga, a saangnukka nga a sekeeЙ—a ini na hee raake na kur ka.
4.6: A nikka nga po, NikiЙ—i Kooh paariЙ—ta kidig, wa njopukka Yunus ne wa saangin hafiЕӢ Й—e, tee Й—ah wa naaf Й—e ЕӢ miskiЙ—iЕӢ Й—e. KeeГұaЕӢ Yunus soosootta ngaЕӢ kidga.
4.7: HondohЙ—i, ngaЕӢ wiisaaЙ—iina, Kooh tummba cangind aassa kidga wa suyya.
4.8: ЖҒaatta nga, wa noh pul, Kooh kurkiЙ—ta mbooyo ; noha dammba hafaЕӢ Yunus po a minisЙ—i. A kiimmba kaan, a woosa ne : В« ЕҠ kaan ngisoh ЕӢ pes. В»
4.9: Kooh meekissa Yunus : В« Fu yii ЕӢ keeh weem oo, na ayruki ЕӢ ini na kidgii ? В» A loffa : В« Ee di' ! Г‘am Й“ur, ЕӢ ayruk po ЕӢ hee kaane. В»
4.10: NikiЙ—i dokkissa ЕӢ woo ka : В« Fu, kidgii miskiЙ— Й—a. NikЙ—i haa ne ya fu taambkoha, te ya fu hooЙ—iЙ—a haa. Wa paar na wek yino, wa leeЙ“pa na wek yino.
4.11: Fu waaЙ—ta ne mi, ЕӢ heeЙ—i miskasse ЕӢ ini hee rahse Niniw, kur ki yakki fu inah ne Й“o' junni-teemet na junni-ndaЕӢkiyaah-kanak (120.000) Й“ii nga Й“i inhisohЙ—i yaah-Гұaahum na yaah-sing, Й“aatta nga Й—oopaat ci minЙ—i reeh ! В»

1.1: Cii ceЙ— tiik ciЕӢ caacuuciЕӢ Yeesu Kiristaa , setiЕӢ Dawuuda, setiЕӢ Ibrahiima.
1.2: Ibrahiima a yi rim Isaahha, Isaahha rimmba YaЕӢhooЙ“a, YaЕӢhooЙ“a rimmba Yudaa na taambЙ—oh ciЕӢ Й—e .
1.3: Yudaa rimmba Seerah na Peeres, a rim Й“a na Tamaar. Peeres rimmba Hesroon, Hesroon rimmba Raam.
1.4: Raam rimmba Aminadaab, Aminadaab rimmba Nahson, Nahson rimmba Salmon.
1.5: Salmon rimmba Boos, a rim Й—e na Rahab, Boos rimmba Obed, a rim Й—e na Riit, Obed rimmba Yesay.
1.6: Yesay rimmba Dawuuda buuri, Dawuuda rimmba Suleymaan, a rim Й—e na Й“iti Uri .
1.7: Suleymaan rimmba Robowaam , Robowaam rimmba Abiya, Abiya rimmba Asaf.
1.8: Asaf rimmba Yosafat, Yosafat rimmba Yoram, Yoram rimmba Osiyas
1.9: Osiyas rimmba Yotam, Yotam rimmba Ahas, Ahas rimmba Esekiyaas

1.11: Yosiyaas rimmba YekoГұas na taambЙ—oh ciЕӢ Й—e ЕӢ jamanoona Israayel ci toorsee Babilon.
1.12: ЕҠ finho tooruukaЕӢ Й“a Babilon, YekoГұas rimmba Salacel, Salacel rimmba Sorobabel
1.13: Sorobabel rimmba Abiyud, Abiyud rimmba Eliyakim, Eliyakim rimmba Asoor
1.14: Asoor rimmba Sadok, Sadok rimmba Ahiim, Ahiim rimmba Eliyud
1.15: Eliyud rimmba Eleyasaar, Eleyasaar rimmba Mattaan, Mattaan rimmba Yakob,
1.16: Yakob rimmba Suseef yi Жҙaar Maryaama yi rim Yeesu, Yeesu yi na woyse MucЙ—ohi Gapohse .
1.17: Fu marak Й—ah, ca gomal ndaЕӢkiyaah na gomal nikiis (14) ЕӢ ini amboh ЕӢ Ibrahiima po ЕӢ Dawuuda. Ini nam kooЙ—oh ЕӢ Dawuuda po ЕӢ tooruukaЕӢ Й“ooЙ“a ЕӢ Babilon ca gomal ndaЕӢkiyaah na gomal nikiis (14). Te ЕӢ tooruukaЕӢ Й“ooЙ“a ЕӢ Babilon po ЕӢ MucЙ—ohi Gapohse ca gomal ndaЕӢkiyaah na gomal nikiis (14). RaakuukaЕӢ Yeesu
1.18: ЕҠ ini kaЙ— ЕӢ Yeesu Kiristaa, a raakohu an : Maryaama yi yaay Й“a, a Suseef nguЙ—ee cakiim nga Й—e ; waaye bala a tokan Й—e Й—ah, wa nikka ne a rook ЕӢ tumohaaЙ— ciЕӢ FuuЙ—si Hoolohngaani, FuuЙ—siЕӢ Kooh .
1.19: Suseef yi fiir ce nikee Й“o' yurhiЙ—. ЕҠ ineem a waaЙ—Й—i Й—e wiГұ, a tufukka ne a reehiЙ— harmban Й“a, Й“a daka ЕӢ kehЖҙi.
1.20: Wa a na liiЙ“siЙ—ohe ЕӢ ineem, malaaka HeЙ— Й“oo teeЙ“ukka Й—e ЕӢ heeЖҙ, woosa Й—e ne : В« Suseef, setiЕӢ Dawuuda, kina neЖҙЖҙoh Й“ay Maryaama Й“itiЙ“, laam kuЙ“ki nik ЕӢ rookiЕӢ Й—e a puloh ЕӢ FuuЙ—si Hoolohngaani.
1.21: A hey raake kuЙ“u Жҙaar, teekaa Й—e Yeesu laam a yi na hee mucЙ—e cuuЙ“iЕӢ Й—e ЕӢ bakaaЙ— ciЕӢ Й“a. В»
1.22: Ineem raakohha Й—aa, ne woo kiЕӢ HeЙ— Й“oo, wi a taambЙ—ee ЕӢ nguЙ“ woosuuЙ—, raak an :
1.23: В« CafЖҙi inahЙ—i Жҙaar, hey ambe rook ; a raak kuЙ“u Жҙaar, yi teeksan Emanuwel В» wi tokis : "Kooh yii na Й“oo".
1.24: Wa Suseef yunuk, a haЙ“iЙ—ta ini malaakaaniЕӢ HeЙ— Й“oo nakee Й—e ; a Й“ayya Maryaama Й“itiЙ“.
1.25: Waaye a hunЙ—i na Й—e po findi yeem raakoh kuЙ“u Жҙaar, a teekka Й—e Yeesu.

2.1: Yeesu raakohu Betlehem ЕӢ kur kaЕӢ Yudee ЕӢ jamanoona Herod nikoh buur. ЖҒi heЙ— haf kurkohha pulohaaЙ—-noh, Й“a hayya Yerusalem.
2.2: ЖҒa meeksoheeЙ—a an : В« A nde kuЙ“ki han raaku, yi nikan buuriЕӢ Yawuut ci ? ЖҒoo hotiЙ— horiЕӢ Й—e ЕӢ pulohaaЙ—-noh. Te Й“oo hay ne Й“oo Гұaamuk Й—e. В»
2.3: Wa Herod buuri kerah ineem, a feyuusa lool, a yi na Й“i Yerusalem jen.
2.4: A cohЙ—ohha kilifaacaЕӢ seeЖҙkiЙ—oh caЕӢ waasiЕӢMusaa na jangЙ—ohoh caЕӢ wa jen, a meekissa Й“a Й—iski MucЙ—ohi Gapohse joy rimohu.
2.5: ЖҒa loffa Й—e ne : В« A joy raakohu Betlehem ЕӢ Yudee ЕӢ ini woosuuЙ—i fiis wii :
2.6: вҖң Fu Betlehem ЕӢ kur kiЕӢ Yudee, fu Й“aahЙ—i muk ЕӢ ci uup Жҙissuut ЕӢ kur ciЕӢ Yudee sagu pulohi kilifaani pulohan nga Й—a, kilifaani niiЙ—an cuuЙ“iЕӢ ngo Israayel. вҖқ В»
2.7: Herod Й“eeЙ—ukka heЙ— haf ca, a Й—aayya na Й“a, ne Й“a teeЙ“ Й—e hooliЙ—, jamanooni hora hotkoh.
2.8: A tuuЖҙca Й“a Betlehem, a woosa Й“a ne : В« KaЙ—aat Й—u meeksoha kuЙ“ki meeksoh hooliЙ—, Й—u hot Й—e Й—ah, Й—u woo so, ЕӢ nam Й—e kaЙ— Гұaamka. В»
2.9: Wa heЙ— haf ca sikЙ—uk buura po Жҙutta, Й“a kaЙ—ta. Hora Й“a hotee ЕӢ pulohaaЙ—-noh pulissa, wa nikka ЕӢ fikiiЙ“a, wa kaЙ—eeЙ—a po wa tiimmba Й—iska kuЙ“ka nik, wa tufukka.
2.10: Hora Й“a hotee, Й“a sumeen nga keeh-keeh po Й“a minisЙ—i.
2.11: ЖҒa aassa ЕӢ kahna, Й“a hotta kuЙ“ka na Maryaama yaay Й“a ; Й“a ЖҙekiЙ—ta Yeesu, Й“a Гұaamukka Yeesu. ЖҒa puliЙ—ta alala Й“a Й“ayndohe, Й“a eЙ—ta Й—e urus, cuuraay na miir .
2.12: Жіutta Kooh teeЙ“pa Й“a ЕӢ heeЖҙ ne, Й“a haadee Й—ah, Й“a kinaat taamb ЕӢ Herod. ЖҒa kooЙ—ta waas wiiriis, Й“a dokukka kur Й“a. Suseef na Maryaama saandohiЙ— ЕӢ Misra
2.13: Wa heЙ— haf ca coot, malaaka HeЙ— Й“oo teeЙ“ukka Suseef ЕӢ heeЖҙ, a woosa Й—e ne : В« Suseef, Herod hey nakohe kuЙ“ki waaku ne a ap Й—e, mbaa kurka fu Й“ay kuЙ“ki na yaay Й“a, fu saandoh Misra, fu nik nga po mbaЙ—na ЕӢ woyan na Й—a. В»
2.14: Suseef kurukka, a Й“ayya kuЙ“ka na yaay Й“a ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ weka, a kaЙ—ta na Й“a Misra.
2.15: ЖҒa nikka nga po Herod kaannda. ЕҠ ineem, ina HeЙ— Й“oo woyee raakka, woo ki a taambЙ—ee ЕӢ nguЙ“ woosuuЙ— an : В« ЕҠ Й“eeЙ—kiЙ— kuЙ“kiЕӢ ngo ne a pul Misra. В»
2.16: Wa Herod inah ne heЙ— haf ca ГұaaГұoh Й—e ГұaaГұoh, a ayrukka lool. A tuuЖҙohha ЕӢ kur kaЕӢ Betlehem na ina wila ne komaakca Жҙaar ca raak kiis kanak ruhussa jen, apsaat. A kindoha ЕӢ jamanoona heЙ— haf ca woyee Й—e.
2.17: Wa nikohha Й—aa findi woosuuЙ—i Yeremi woyohee wa, an :
2.18: В« Hooso kerhuuЙ— ЕӢ kur ki na woyse Rama, ca fuЙ— laayiЙ— na rooy keeh-keeh. A Rasel na fuЙ—e komaakciЕӢ Й—e, Й“a kaaniЙ—, weЙ— tah a waaЙ—Й—i giifЙ—u. В»
2.19: ЕҠ finho kakaan kaЕӢ Herod, malaaka HeЙ— Й“oo teeЙ“ukka Suseef ЕӢ heeЖҙ ЕӢ Misra,
2.20: a woosa Й—e ne : В« Kurka, fu Й“ay kuЙ“ki na yaay Й“a, Й—u dokuk Israayel, Й“ooЙ“a waaЙ—ee Й“ay kiГұin kiЕӢ Й—e Й“a kaaniЙ—. В»
2.21: Suseef kurukka, a Й“ayya kuЙ“ka na yaay Й“a, a haadda Israayel.
2.22: Waaye wa a kerah ne e Arkelawus namsiЙ— baab Й“a Herod ЕӢ hafaЕӢ kur kaЕӢ Yudee, a neЖҙЖҙohha kaЙ— nga. HeЙ— Й“oo woytohha Й—e ЕӢ heeЖҙ, ЕӢ ineem, a kaЙ—ta Galile,
2.23: a gennda nga, ЕӢ kur ka na woyse Nasareet. Ina woosuuЙ— ci woyee raakka, ne MucЙ—ohi Gapohse Й“eeЙ—kohsan ЖҙaariЕӢ Й“i Nasareet .

3.1: ЕҠ kiis caam, Yahya ЖҒoktohi hotukka ЕӢ nduufaЕӢ Yudee, a yegЙ—oheeЙ—a woo kiЕӢ Kooh.
3.2: A woyeeЙ—a ne : В« ЖҒoЖҙsohaat pesohaaЙ—, NguuriЕӢ-ЖҠafki reЙ“iЙ—. В»
3.3: Yahya ЖҒoktohi a yi woosuuЙ—i Esayi woyee an : В« Hooso wa Й—aa leehuk ЕӢ nduufa an : вҖң PaЙ—aat waasiЕӢ HeЙ— Й“oo, haЙ“Й—iЙ—aat Й—e waas ci, ca yurah ! вҖқ В»
3.4: Yahya meeЙ— Й“ekuk kulЙ“a haЙ“Й—ohuuЙ— find ngeelemb, a toka ЕӢ kinoh kiЕӢ Й—e na und. A pesohee paЖҙ na yeeleel kuum.
3.5: ЖҒooЙ“a genee Yerusalem, na Й“aЕӢ Yudee, na Й“aЕӢ Й“akaЕӢ Yurdan jen, hayeeЙ—a nga Й—e.
3.6: ЖҒa teyЙ—ukeeЙ—a bakaaЙ— caЕӢ Й“a, a Й“okteeЙ—a Й“a ЕӢ kalaЕӢ Yurdan.
3.7: Wa a hot ne Й“o' laayiЙ— Й“aah ЕӢ Й“ooЙ“i na woyse Farisen na Sadusen nikee hayeeЙ—a nga Й—e ne Й“a Й“oktu, a woosa Й“a ne : В« Ini Й—u aГұaand haa ne iiГұ jen, Й—u liiЙ“iЙ— ne Й—u miniЙ— penduk ayrukiЕӢ Kooh wi na haye e ?
3.8: TumohaaЙ— ciЕӢ Й—u baahaat, wa teeЙ“oh ne Й—u Й“oЖҙsohiЙ— pesohaaЙ—.
3.9: Te kinaat Й—aar rek Й—u woyee ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ Й—u ne : вҖң ЖҒoo rimkoh ЕӢ Ibrahiima. вҖқ Г‘am na woyee Й—u ne, atoh cii, Kooh miniЙ— pulЙ—iЙ— Ibrahiima kuЙ“u nga ca.
3.10: Kiw ki ЖҙutiЙ— ne wa giing tas kidig, te waa nu raakЙ—i rim baahiЙ— Й—ah, wa hey ЖҙoЙ“se, wa njafu ЕӢ yongkaaha.
3.11: Mi na Й“oktee Й—u ЕӢ masuЙ“ ne Й—u Й“oЖҙsoh pesohaaЙ—. Waaye raakiЙ— Й“oyi na haye ЕӢ finhooso, a yi uup po fuuf, te woliЙ— Й—e ГұafaЙ— ciЕӢ Й—e joombiЙ— to. A yi, a Й“oktohan Й—u FuuЙ—si Hoolohngaani na yongkaah.
3.12: A amb saliЕӢ Й—e ЕӢ yaah, ne a nistoh pees na fuГұind. A nangЙ—oh pees ciЕӢ Й—e ЕӢ ndap, a doh fuГұndi ЕӢ yongkaahi heyЙ—i Жҙime. В» Yeesu teyЙ—ukiЙ— Й“okti
3.13: ЕҠ neeh caam, Yeesu pulohha Galile, a kaЙ—ta kalaЕӢ Yurdan ЕӢ Yahya ЖҒoktohi ne yeem Й“okit Й—e.
3.14: Waaye Yahya teyЙ—ukЙ—i, woosa Й—e ne : В« Г‘am etoh Й“oktuk nga Й—a, fu hayee nga so ! В»
3.15: Yeesu loffa Й—e ne : В« ЖҠiski wa nik, faЙ—a wa nikoh an. Wa in moЙ—iЙ— ne Й“oo mitЙ—oh ini Kooh nakoh jen an ! В» ЕҠ ineem Yahya teyЙ—ukka.
3.16: Wa Yeesu Й“oktu po a pulla masma, jaarra Eel ci rangsukka, a hotta FuuЙ—si Hoolohngaani, FuuЙ—siЕӢ Kooh yipkeeЙ—a nga Й—e findi banuut.
3.17: Hooso kerhukka ЕӢ Eel ci an : В« Yii, a yi KuЙ“kiЕӢ ngo ЕӢ waaЙ— keeh-keeh, yi neЙ“ po ЕӢ keeГұ. В»

4.1: ЕҠ ineem, FuuЙ—si Hoolohngaani, FuuЙ—siЕӢ Kooh Й“ayya Yeesu ЕӢ nduufa, ne Seytaani jaЙ—iЙ— Й—e fiir.
4.2: A orra noh ndaЕӢkiyaah-nikiis (40) na wek ndaЕӢkiyaah-nikiis (40) ; ЕӢ mirndaani a aЙ—ukka.
4.3: Seytaani, yi na jaЙ—Й—ohe fiir, reЙ“pa woosa Й—e ne : В« Nik ne fu KuЙ“kiЕӢ Kooh Й—ah, woya atoh cii, ca Й“oЖҙsuk mbuuru. В»
4.4: Yeesu loffa Й—e ne : В« Fiis ci HooliЙ— ci woyiЙ— ne : вҖң ЖҒo' na pesohe mbuuru dong haa, waaye na woo nu nik ne wa puloh ЕӢ nguЙ“iЕӢ Kooh Й—ah. вҖқ В»
4.5: Seytaani Й“ayya Й—e Yerusalem, ЕӢ jol KahnaЕӢ Kooh ;
4.6: a woosa Й—e ne : В« Nik ne fu KuЙ“kiЕӢ Kooh Й—ah, faЙ—suka ЕӢ kehЖҙi. Fiis ci HooliЙ— ci woyiЙ— ne : вҖң Kooh hey nake malaakaaciЕӢ Й—e, ca Й“ay Й—a ЕӢ yaah ciЕӢ ca po kot ciЕӢ Й—a laЙ“kanЙ—i ЕӢ atoh. вҖқ В»
4.7: Yeesu loffa Й—e ne : В« Fiis ci namiЙ— woo ne : вҖң Fu joyЙ—i markisuk HeЙ— Й“oo, KoohiЕӢ Й—a. вҖқ В»
4.8: Seytaani rapЙ—issa Й—e ЕӢ jol tango njooloh na njooloh. A teeЙ“pa Й—e nguur ciЕӢ adinaani jen na yaki ca yak.
4.9: A woosa Й—e ne : В« In cii jen, fu ЖҙekiЙ— to ne fu Гұaamuk ko Й—ah, ЕӢ hey Й—a ca one. В»
4.10: Yeesu loffa Й—e ne : В« Seytaani, us so ! Fiis ci woyiЙ— ne : вҖң ЖіekЙ—a Kooh HeЙ— fu, te fu Гұaamuk a yi dong. вҖқ В»
4.11: WeЙ— Seytaani faЙ—oh Й—e ndaam, jaarra malaakaaca hayya, taambkoheeЙ—a Й—e. Yeesu cambiЙ— pangkiЕӢ Й—e ЕӢ Galile
4.12: ЕҠ jamanoonaam, Yahya ЖҒoktohi ambseen ЕӢ kasoona ; wa Yeesu keraha, a kaЙ—ta Galile.
4.13: A kurkohha Nasareet a kaЙ—ta gena ЕӢ Kapernawum ЕӢ sero cookma, ЕӢ kehЖҙaЕӢ cuuЙ“ ciЕӢ Sabuloon na Naftaali.
4.14: Jaarra ini woosuuЙ—i Esayi woyee raakka, an :
4.15: В« KehЖҙiЕӢ Sabuloon na Naftaali, wa nikka yaah-cookmi, ЕӢ Й“akiЕӢ Yurdan winoori, weЙ— Galile, kur kiЕӢ Й“ooЙ“i nikЙ—i Yawuut,
4.16: cuuЙ“i Й“oofee ЕӢ Гұuusi hotiЙ— siГұaar yakak, te Й“i Й“oofee ЕӢ kur ki kakaan ki ГұuusiЙ—, siГұaar hayiЙ— nga Й“a. В»
4.17: Ini amboh ndeem, Yeesu cammba woytoh Й“ooЙ“a ЕӢ ini kaЙ— ЕӢ waas Kooh an : В« ЖҒoЖҙsohaat pesohaaЙ—, NguuriЕӢ-ЖҠafki reЙ“iЙ—. В» Yeesu Й“eeЙ—kiЙ— Й“i seeЙ“oh
4.18: Wa raakka mbeh, Yeesu tiindeeЙ—a ЕӢ sereendaЕӢ CookmaЕӢ-Galile, a hotta seeЙ“oh kanak mbaaleeЙ—a cuurund ЕӢ cookma, Й“a nikee Simong yi na woyse Piyeer na taambЙ—oh ce Andare.
4.19: A woosa Й“a ne : В« Г‘aakЙ—aat to, ЕӢ hey Й—u tume seeЙ“oh Й“o'. В»
4.20: ЖҒa jaarra faЙ— mbaal caЕӢ Й“a ndaam, Й“a ГұaakiЙ—ta Й—e.
4.21: A kaЙ—issa Жҙissuut, a hotissa taambЙ—oh kanak, Saak na SaaЕӢ, kuЙ“uuciЕӢ Sebede, a raak Й“a ЕӢ gaala na baab Й“a, Й“a haЙ“iЙ—tineeЙ—a mbaal caЕӢ Й“a. A Й“eeЙ—ukka Й“a ne Й“a hun na Й—e.
4.22: ЖҒa jaarra faЙ— gaala na baab Й“a, Й“a ГұaakiЙ—ta Й—e. Yeesu wirЙ—iЙ— kosaayiЙ— laayiЙ—
4.23: Yeesu wileeЙ—a Galile jen a jangЙ—oheeЙ—a ЕӢ sinaagog ca, a woyeeЙ—a YegЙ—ohiЕӢ Muci , wi kaЙ— ЕӢ NguuriЕӢ-ЖҠafki, a wirЙ—eeЙ—a kosaay ca na Й“eenduk ca jen, ca ambee Й“ooЙ“a.
4.24: LaamtohiЕӢ tiikiЕӢ Й—e willa kur kaЕӢ Siri jen. A komuusa Й“ooЙ“a raakee miskiЙ— jen sagu kosaay ca ambee Й“a, kosaay nu wa min nik Й—ah, Й“a jiini ambe, Й“a raakee kombeЙ—-mbeЙ— na Й“a lafГұe, a wiriЙ—ta Й“a.
4.25: Mboolo laayiЙ— ГұaakiЙ—ta Й—e, Й“ooЙ“eem pulohee Galile, Dekapool , Yerusalem, Yudee, na Й“aka faahaЕӢ Yurdan.

5.1: Wa Yeesu hot mboolnda, a rappa ЕӢ tangoora, a Й“ooffa nga. TaalubeeciЕӢ Й—e reЙ“pa nga Й—e,
5.2: a jangЙ—eeЙ—a Й“a in cii an :
5.3: В« ЖҒa neЙ“Й—iЙ—, Й“ooЙ“i ruhsiЙ— haf ciЕӢ Й“a, Й“a inahha ne Й“a etohiЙ— Kooh, laam NguuriЕӢ-ЖҠafki wa wuu Й“a.
5.4: ЖҒa neЙ“Й—iЙ—, Й“ooЙ“i na fuЙ—e, laam Й“a hey giifЙ—asse.
5.5: ЖҒa neЙ“Й—iЙ—, Й“ooЙ“i soosiЙ— ci, laam Й“eЙ— eЙ—san kehЖҙi.
5.6: ЖҒa neЙ“Й—iЙ—, Й“ooЙ“i aЙ—uk, sifaЙ—ukka kipes yurhiЙ—, laam Й“a hey hiЖҙe, Й“a kap nding.
5.7: ЖҒa neЙ“Й—iЙ—, Й“ooЙ“i na yirmohe, laam Kooh hey Й“a yirme.
5.8: ЖҒa neЙ“Й—iЙ—, Й“ooЙ“i raak keeГұ hooliЙ—, laam Й“a hey hote Kooh.
5.9: ЖҒa neЙ“Й—iЙ—, Й“ooЙ“i na waake jam ЕӢ harmban Й“ooЙ“i, laam Й“a hey Й“eeЙ—kohse kuЙ“u Kooh.
5.10: ЖҒa neЙ“Й—iЙ—, Й“ooЙ“i na mbugalse sagu yurhi Й“a yurah, laam NguuriЕӢ-ЖҠafki wa wuu Й“a.
5.11: ЖҠu neЙ“Й—iЙ—, ne Й“ooЙ“i Й“asee Й—u, Й“a mbugalee Й—u, Й“a leyЙ—ohee Й—u na woo moЙ—aaЙ—i'iЙ— nu nik saguuso Й—ah.
5.12: Sumaat keeh-keeh, laam aafi na sekee Й—u ЕӢ Й—afka yakiЙ—, te Й—u inah ne Й“a mbugalohee woosuuЙ— ci adug Й—u Й—aa. MeЙ—aami na siГұaari
5.13: E Й—u meЙ—aamiЕӢ Adina. Waaye meЙ—a kaЙ— po wa jemisЙ—i Й—ah, wa min jemЙ—ohissu na ye ? Wa na raakisseeЙ—i etoh Й—al, wa mbetu, Й“ooЙ“i dakee nga.
5.14: E Й—u siГұaariЕӢ adinaani, kur ki nik ЕӢ jol tango, wa minЙ—i Й—embЙ—u.
5.15: Te ali Й“o' na fuuЙ—eeЙ—i laampa ne a kuna na kanoh, a degana kay ЕӢ degohaaniЕӢ wa ne wa ГұiiniЙ— Й“i tuuЖҙi jen.
5.16: SiГұaariЕӢ Й—u joy Гұiinoh Й—aa ЕӢ fiki Й“ooЙ“i, ne Й“a hot tumohaaЙ— ciЕӢ Й—u baahiЙ— ci, Й“a yakiЙ— Kooh BaabiЕӢ Й—u yi nik ЕӢ Eel ci. Ini kaЙ— ЕӢ waasiЕӢ Musaa
5.17: Kinaat liiЙ“ ne ЕӢ hay ne ЕӢ nihis waasiЕӢMusaa wala woo ciЕӢ woosuuЙ— ci, ЕӢ hayЙ—i ne ЕӢ nihis ca, waaye ЕӢ hay ne ЕӢ tum in ci Й“a woo po ca mit.
5.18: Г‘am na woyee Й—u wa te wa keeh. Feeh kehЖҙi na eel ci kurukЙ—i nga Й—ah, ali in nihsukanЙ—i ЕӢ waasi po mbaЙ—na wa mitan. Wa fiisi uup Жҙissuut nga haa, wa tap haa.
5.19: WeЙ— tah po Й“o' nu taambiЙ—Й—i wi uup Жҙissuut ЕӢ nakoh ci te a woyee Й“ooЙ“i ne Й“a joyЙ—aa taambiЙ— Й—ah, a hey nike yi uup Жҙissuut ЕӢ NguuriЕӢ-ЖҠafki. Waaye Й“o' nu taambiЙ— ca te a jangЙ—ee Й“ooЙ“i ne Й“a taambiЙ— ca Й—ah, a hey yake ngaЕӢ NguuriЕӢ-ЖҠafki.
5.20: Г‘am na woyee Й—u wa, Й—u uupЙ—i yurah jangЙ—ohoh ciЕӢ waasi na Farisen ci Й—ah, Й—u aasanЙ—i ЕӢ NguuriЕӢ-ЖҠafki. Ini kaЙ— ЕӢ ayrukoh
5.21: ЖҠu kerhiЙ— ne Й“ooЙ“a Й—eЙ“gaan woysee ne : вҖң Kina ap Й“o' ; Й“o' nu apoh Й—ah, a hey atte'se. вҖқ
5.22: Waaye mi na woyee Й—u ne, Й“o' nu ayruk Й“aah ce Й—ah, a hey atte'se. Te Й“o' nu woo Й“aah ce ne : вҖң HafiЕӢ Й—a riifЙ—i вҖқ Й—ah, a hey Й“ayse ЕӢ atte'oh ciЕӢ waasi. Te Й“o' nu woo Й“aah ce ne : вҖң Fu dof вҖқ Й—ah, a hey Й“ekse ЕӢ yongkaaha yakka.
5.23: ЕҠ ineem, fu Й“ayee ini fu eЙ—oh wuu Kooh ЕӢ seeЖҙkohaana, fu naandsuk ne Й“aah fu ambЙ—iЙ— Й—a in Й—ah,
5.24: faЙ—aa ЕӢ fiki seeЖҙkohaana, fu kaЙ— kerhiЙ—oha na Й—e po Жҙut, fu hana hay dege.
5.25: Ara kerhiЙ—oh na Й“oyi, ne a Й“ayee Й—a waas Й—ah. Fu tumЙ—aa ЕӢ waasi po Й—u ree ngelohaana Й—ah, a hey Й—a Й“aye ЕӢ atte'ohi, yeem eЙ— Й—a alkaateeni, fu Й—aaku ЕӢ kasoona.
5.26: Г‘am na woyee Й—a wa te wa keeh, fu pulohanЙ—i ndaam feeh fu wirindЙ—i po ЕӢ darmi uup Жҙissuut Й—ah. Ini kaЙ— ЕӢ njaaloo
5.27: ЖҠu kerhiЙ— ne wa woyuuЙ— ne : вҖң Fu njaaloo'anЙ—i. вҖқ
5.28: Waaye mi na woyee Й—u ne, Й“o' nu marak Й“itiЙ“, a hemem Й—e Й—ah, a njaaloo'iЙ— na Й—e ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ ce po ЖҙutiЙ—.
5.29: HasiЕӢ Й—a Гұaahmi waaЙ— Й—a Й“ek ЕӢ bakaaЙ— Й—ah, nihsaa fu mbeta ; cir yino nihsuk ЕӢ faaniЕӢ Й—a, weЙ— ngisoh wa jen, wa mbetu ЕӢ yongkaaha yakka.
5.30: YaahiЕӢ Й—a Гұaahmi waaЙ— Й—a Й“ek ЕӢ bakaaЙ— Й—ah, nguЙ—aa jameet fu mbeta ; cir yino nihsuk ЕӢ faaniЕӢ Й—a, weЙ— ngisoh wa jen, wa kaЙ— ЕӢ yongkaaha. Ini kaЙ— ЕӢ saЙ“sukoh na Й“itiЙ“
5.31: Wa namiЙ— woyuuЙ— ne : вҖң ЖҒo' nu faЙ— Й“itiice Й—ah, a eЙ—aat Й—e kayti teeЙ“oha. вҖқ
5.32: Waaye e Гұam na woyee Й—u ne, Жҙaar nu saЙ“sukoh na Й“itiice te nikЙ—i ne yeem njaaloo njaaloo Й—ah, a yi Й“ek Й—e ЕӢ njaaloo. Te Й“o' nu Й“ay Й“itiЙ“ faЙ—uuЙ— Й—ah, a njaaloo'iЙ—. Ini kaЙ— ЕӢ giГұ
5.33: ЖҠu namiЙ— kerah ne Й“ooЙ“a Й—eЙ“gaan woysee ne : вҖң Fu giГұ in Й—ah, kinaa nik tumaaЙ—i. In nu fu giГұiЙ— HeЙ— Й“oo Й—ah, tumaa. вҖқ
5.34: Waaye mi na woyee Й—u ne, kinaat giГұ delem. Kinaat giГұ ЕӢ Й—afki, laam Й“oofohaaniЕӢ Kooh, yi buur waa nga.
5.35: Kinaat giГұ ЕӢ kehЖҙi, wa degoha kot ciЕӢ Й—e. Kinaat giГұ ЕӢ Yerusalem, wa kur kiЕӢ Kooh, yi Buuri yakki.
5.36: Te hafiЕӢ Й—a, kina giГұ nga laam fu minЙ—i yaanwiЙ—, fu minЙ—i suussiЙ— find yino nga.
5.37: ЖҠu woo "ee" Й—ah, wa nikaat "ee" ; Й—u woo "a'aa" Й—ah, wa nikaat "a'aa". In nu Й—u deg nga Й—ah, wa puloh Seytaani. Ini kaЙ— ЕӢ wirndiЙ—koh
5.38: ЖҠu kerhiЙ— ne wa woyuuЙ— ne : вҖң Has, e has na wirndee wa ; sis, e sis na wirndee wa. вҖқ
5.39: Waaye mi na woyee Й—u ne, kinaat wirndiЙ—koh na Й“oyi na tumee Й—u in miskiЙ—. ЖҒo' laЙ“ Й—a paЙ— ЕӢ kaЙ“aaЙ“ Гұaahum Й—ah, eЙ—aa Й—e wi tas.
5.40: Te Й“o' waaЙ— Й—a Й“ay waas ne a naaf kulЙ“aakiЕӢ Й—a Жҙini Й—ah, nama Й—e eЙ— paltooniЕӢ Й—a.
5.41: ЖҒo' tiindЙ—ukoh Й—a ЕӢ doole kilomeet yino Й—ah, tiinda na Й—e kanak.
5.42: ЖҒo' kiim Й—a Й—ah, onaa Й—e te kina sang Й“and Й“oyi na Й“andukee Й—a. WaaЙ— Й“i sang Й—a
5.43: ЖҠu kerhiЙ— ne wa woyuuЙ— ne : вҖң WaaЙ—a morom fu, fu sang Й“oyi sang Й—a. вҖқ

6.9: WeЙ— tah kiimohaat Kooh an : BaabiЕӢ Й“oo yi ЕӢ Eel ci, tiikiЕӢ Й—a teyЙ—uksaat ne wa tiik hooliЙ—.
6.10: NguuriЕӢ Й—a hayaat. Ini fu waaЙ— raakaat ЕӢ kehЖҙi findi wa raakoh ЕӢ Eel ci.

6.14: Inhaat ne Й—u Й—aas Й“ooЙ“i na tumee Й—u in moЙ—aaЙ—i Й—ah, BaabiЕӢ Й—u yi nik ЕӢ Й—afki hey Й—u namee Й—aas tumohaaЙ— ciЕӢ Й—u moЙ—aaЙ—iici ;
6.15: waaye Й—u Й—aasЙ—i Й“ooЙ“i Й—ah, a heyЙ—i Й—u namee Й—aas. Findi Й“o' joy oroh
6.16: ЖҠu oree Й—ah, kinaat teeЙ“ Й“ooЙ“i ne Й—u na haЙ“Й—e in miskiЙ—, findi naafeehaaci na tumohee wa. ЖҒa oreesa Й—ah, Й“a ГұuusiЙ— fikiiciЕӢ Й“a ne Й“a teeЙ“ Й“ooЙ“i jen ne Й“a oriЙ—. Г‘am na woyee Й—u wa te wa keeh, Й“a rahsiЙ— aafiЕӢ Й“a po ЖҙutiЙ—.

6.18: ne fu teeЙ“uu Й“ooЙ“i ne fu na ore, waaye Baab Й—u yi nik ЕӢ Й—iski Й—emb, yi na hote ЕӢ Й—iski Й—emb, a hey Й—a aafe. Ini joy waaku
6.19: Kinaat nangЙ—oh raak-raak ЕӢ Adina, Й—iski inah ne Гұuhuk miniЙ—a yahroh wala wa hoy, wala rokoh ci ngul, Й“a aas, Й“a roka.
6.20: Waaye nangЙ—ohaat raak-raak ЕӢ Eel ci, Й—iska fu inah ne Гұuhuk minЙ—aa yahroh, wa hoyanЙ—i te rokoh minЙ—i ngul, a aas ne a roka.

7.6: Kinaat eЙ— Й“uu ci in ci hoolЙ—u wuu Kooh bala ca wiirkan nga Й—u, ca faarsoh Й—u, te kinaat njaf per ciЕӢ Й—u ЕӢ kot ciЕӢ mbaam-huk ci bala ca daksohan ca. Kiimaat, waakaat, laЙ“Й—aat
7.7: Kiimaat, Й—u hey onse ; waakaat, Й—u hey hote ; laЙ“Й—aat, Й—u hey rangsiЙ—asse.

7.14: Waaye yahndeeri na Й“ayohe ЕӢ kipes ki, wa Й“engiЙ—, waasiЕӢ wa sewwa te Й“i hota laayЙ—i. ЖҒi na kulЙ“a'kohe woosuuЙ—
7.15: Wortukaat Й“ooЙ“i na tume haf Й“a woosuuЙ—, ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙiЕӢ Й“a, Й“a Й“aakoЙ“ saahiЙ—. Waaye Й“a haye nga Й—u Й—ah, Й“a na haye soosiЙ— findi mbaal.

7.21: E Й“ooЙ“i na Й“eeЙ—kohee so : вҖң HeЙ— Й“oo, HeЙ— Й“oo вҖқ jen Й“eЙ— na hee aase ЕӢ NguuriЕӢ-ЖҠafki haa, waaye a Й“i na haЙ“Й—e waaЙ—-waaЙ—iЕӢ BaabiЕӢ ngo yi nik ЕӢ Eel ci.
7.22: ЖҒi Й“o' laayiЙ— hey yo woye mbaЙ—i ne : вҖң HeЙ— Й“oo HeЙ— Й“oo, Й“oo meeЙ— yegЙ—oh woo kiЕӢ Kooh ЕӢ tiikiЕӢ Й—a haa e ? ЖҒoo aaГұiЙ— jiiniici ЕӢ tiikiЕӢ Й—a te Й“oo haЙ“Й—iЙ— keemaan laayiЙ— ЕӢ tiikiЕӢ Й—a. вҖқ

7.24: WeЙ— tah Й“oyi na sikЙ—uke woo kiЕӢ ngo wii, a pesohee wa, a mandan na Жҙaar ГұaaГұiЙ— yi taЙ“ah kahan ce ЕӢ Й—afuk atoh ;

8.3: Yeesu raЙ—issa yaah, laalla Й—e, woosa Й—e ne : В« ЕҠ waaЙ—iЙ—a, nika Й“o' hooliЙ—. В» Jaarra kosaay ka hoolla nga Й—e.
8.4: Жіutta Yeesu woosa Й—e ne : В« Wortukaa wa woo ali Й“o' waaye kaЙ—a fu teeЙ“a haf fu seeЖҙkiЙ—oha, fu haЙ“iЙ— seeЖҙki waasiЕӢMusaa nakoh ; wa teeЙ“oh ne fu wiriЙ—. В» Yeesu wirЙ—iЙ— surgaanaЕӢ Жҙaara adgohee soldaar ca
8.5: Yeesu a yi kaЙ—oh po a aassa kur kaЕӢ Kapernawum, weЙ—i Жҙaar Й“aah ЕӢ Й“a adgohee soldaar caЕӢ Rom reЙ“oh nga Й—e, kiimmba Й—e keeh-keeh
8.6: an : В« Kilifaani, ГұaamaЕӢ ngo yaa faanukka ЕӢ kahna, cir ciЕӢ faaniЕӢ Й—e ceЙ— lafaГұ a yaa sayeeЙ—a say. В»
8.7: Yeesu loffa Й—e ne : В« ЕҠ hey Й—e hee wirЙ—e. В»
8.8: Жіaara adgohee soldaar ca loffa ne : В« Kilifaani, ЕӢ yeyyooЙ—i fu aas ЕӢ kahan ndo ; woya woo rek ГұaamaЕӢ ngo hey wire !
8.9: Laam mi ЕӢ haf fo, raakiЙ— Й“ooЙ“i adgoh ho te ЕӢ namiЙ— raak soldaar ci ЕӢ adgoh ; yaa nu ЕӢ woo ne : вҖң KaЙ—a вҖқ Й—ah, a kaЙ—, yaa nu ЕӢ woo ne : вҖң Haya вҖқ Й—ah, a hay. Te in nu ЕӢ woo ГұaamiЕӢ ngo ne a haЙ“Й—aata Й—ah, a haЙ“iЙ—a. В»
8.10: Wa Yeesu kerah woo keem, a feyuusa, a woosa Й“a ГұaakЙ—ee Й—e ne : В« Г‘am na woyee Й—u wa te wa keeh : ЕҠ hotЙ—i ali Й“o' kosiЙ— kosii ngaЕӢ Israayel jen !
8.11: Г‘am na woyee Й—u wa, Й“o' laayiЙ— hey pulohe ЕӢ Й“ak ci jen, Й“a Й“oof na Ibrahiima, Isaahha na YaЕӢhooЙ“a, Й“a Гұamee kaГұam ka yakka ЕӢ NguuraЕӢ Й—afka.
8.12: Waaye Й“i joyee aas ЕӢ Nguuri, hey njafse ЕӢ ГұuusaЕӢ hara, Й—iska fuЙ— na Й—oЙ“Й—oh sis raak. В»
8.13: Жіutta Yeesu woosa Жҙaara adgohee soldaar ca ne : В« KaЙ—a, wa raakohaat Й—aa findi fu kosoha. В» Te ЕӢ jamanoonaam jok, surgaanaЕӢ Й—e wirra. Yeesu wirЙ—iЙ— Й“o' laayiЙ—
8.14: Wa Yeesu kurkoh ndaam, a kaЙ—ta kahan Й“i Piyeer, wa a ree, a tel yaayiЕӢ Й“iti Piyeer jiriЙ— po faankiЙ—, a faaniЕӢ Й—e weЙ— dohe.
8.15: Yeesu laalla yaahiЕӢ Й—e, dohЙ—aЕӢ faana saЙ“sukohha na Й—e ; jaarra a kurukka a taambkoheeЙ—a Yeesu.
8.16: Wa niina ree, a komuusa Й“o' laayiЙ— Й“a jiini ambe. A aannja jiiniica na woo kiЕӢ Й—e, a wiriЙ—ta kosaayiЙ— ca Й“inooЙ“a jen.
8.17: Ina woosuuЙ—i Esayi woyee wii raakka : В« A kooЙ—iЙ— in ci Й“oo miskasse, a degukka kosaay ciЕӢ Й“oo. В» Yeesu na ЖҙaaЙ“a waaЙ—ee Й—e ГұaakiЙ—
8.18: Wa Yeesu hot mboolnda ndeeree Й—e, a woosa taalubeeciЕӢ Й—e ne Й“a kaЙ— Й“aka faahaЕӢ cookma.
8.19: WeЙ—i Жҙaar Й“aah ЕӢ jangЙ—ohoh caЕӢ waasiЕӢ Musaa hayoh nga Й—e woosa Й—e ne : В« JangЙ—ohohi, Й—isik nu fu kaЙ— Й—ah, ЕӢ hey Й—a ГұaakЙ—e. В»
8.20: Yeesu loffa Й—e ne : В« ЖҒaakoЙ“ ci raakiЙ— nung, sel ci raakiЙ— taar, waaye KuЙ“kiЕӢ Й“oyi raakЙ—i sah Й—iski a na hee iЙ—siЙ—kohe. В»
8.21: Жіaar wiiriis ЕӢ taalubeeciЕӢ Й—e woosa Й—e ne : В« Kilifaani, on ndo paaЙ—, ЕӢ taambkoh yaЙ“kooriЕӢ ngo po a kaan, ЕӢ uumb Й—e. В»
8.22: Yeesu loffa Й—e ne : В« Г‘aakiЙ— to te fu faЙ— kaaniЙ— ci Й“a uumb kaaniЙ— ciЕӢ Й“a. В» Yeesu yeeЙ“kiЙ—iЙ— puuЙ—sa na cookma
8.23: Wa Yeesu Жҙut woo na Й“a, a aassa ЕӢ gaal, taalubeeciЕӢ Й—e ГұaakiЙ—ta Й—e.
