16.33: In ceem, ЕӢ woyiЙ— Й—u ca, ne Й—u min raak jam ЕӢ niki Й—u nik nga so. ЖҠu hey raake miskiЙ— ЕӢ Adina, waaye ndengЙ—ukaat ! Mi, ЕӢ saahiЙ— Adina. В»

17.1: Wa Yeesu Жҙut woo in ceem, a taaknukka ЕӢ Eel ci, a woosa ne : В« Baab, wahtuuni reyiЙ— ! TeeЙ“oha yaki KuЙ“kiЕӢ Й—a yak ne KuЙ“ki teeЙ“oh yaki fu yak.
17.2: Laam fu oniЙ— Й—e min-min ЕӢ Й—afuk Й“ooЙ“i jen ne a on Й“i fu deg ЕӢ yaah ce jen kipes ki heyЙ—i reehe.
17.3: Te kipes ki heyЙ—i reehe weЙ— ne Й“a inah Й—a, fu yi Koohi yino-kongi ; te Й“a inah Yeesu Kiristaa, yi fu woos.
17.4: ЕҠ teeЙ“ohiЙ— ЕӢ kehЖҙi yaki fu yak, ЕӢ Й—iindohi ЕӢ Й—iindoh pangki fu nakee so.
17.5: Baab, Й—iski wa nik, eЙ— to ЕӢ seroofu yaki ЕӢ yakee ЕӢ seroofu bala Adina fersan.
17.6: ЖҒooЙ“i Й“aahee ЕӢ Adina te fu degga Й“a ЕӢ yaah ho, ЕӢ inhiЙ—iЙ— Й“a tiikiЕӢ Й—a. ЖҒa nikee Й“iЕӢ Й—a, fu eЙ—ta so Й“a, te Й“a taambЙ—iЙ— woo kiЕӢ Й—a.
17.7: ЖҒa inhiЙ— kotii ne in ci fu eЙ— to jen, ca puloh nga Й—a.
17.8: ЕҠ wikiЙ— Й“a woo ci fu woo so ne ЕӢ woo Й“a ca ; te Й“a teyiЙ— ca, Й“a inhiЙ— keeh-keeh ne ЕӢ puloh nga Й—a, te Й“a kosiЙ— ne yaf woos so.
17.9: Mi na kiimЙ—ee Й“a. ЕҠ kiimiЙ—Й—i Adina, mi na kiimЙ—e Й“i fu eЙ— to, laam Й“a Й“iЕӢ Й—a.
17.10: Ini ЕӢ raak jen, a fu raaka te ini fu raak, Гұam raaka ; yaki ЕӢ yak teeЙ“ohkiЙ— nga Й“a.
17.11: Tas Жҙissuut, ЕӢ nikissanЙ—i ЕӢ Adina, mi na hee nga Й—a, waaye Й“eЙ—, Й“ii ЕӢ Adina. Baab, fu yi HooliЙ—i, niiЙ—aa Й“a ne Й“a min nik yino findi Й“oo nikoh yino mi na Й—a ; niiЙ—a Й“a ЕӢ hatiliЕӢ tiikiЕӢ Й—a, tiiki fu eЙ— to.
17.12: Wa ЕӢ nik na Й“a, ЕӢ niiЙ—iЙ— Й“a ЕӢ doolndiЕӢ tiikiЕӢ Й—a, tiiki fu eЙ— to. ЕҠ taambkohiЙ— Й“a po ali yino sooЖҙЙ—i nga Й“a, Й—al yi joyee sooЖҙ ne ini Fiis ci woo raak.
17.13: Te Й—iski wa nik, mi yii hay nga Й—a ; mi yii woo woo cii ЕӢ ini ЕӢ ris ЕӢ Adina ne Й“a min sum sum kiЕӢ ngo, sum kiЕӢ Й“a mit.
17.14: ЕҠ eЙ—iЙ— Й“a woo kiЕӢ Й—a, te Adina sangiЙ— Й“a sagu ini Й“a Й“aahЙ—i ЕӢ Adina, findi ЕӢ namЙ—i Й“aahoh nga.
17.15: ЕҠ kiimЙ—i Й—a ne fu kooЙ—oh Й“a ЕӢ Adina, waaye mi na kiimee Й—a ne fu niiЙ— Й“a po Seytaani raakuu waas nga Й“a.
17.16: ЖҒa Й“aahЙ—i ЕӢ Adina findi ЕӢ namЙ—i Й“aahoh nga.
17.17: TufkiЙ—ohaa Й“a keeh ki, Й“a nik Й“o' hooliЙ— wuu fu ; woo kiЕӢ Й—a weЙ— keeh ki.
17.18: Findi fu tuuЖҙoh ho ЕӢ Adina, ЕӢ tuuЖҙoh Й“a nga Й—aa.
17.19: ЕҠ eЙ—iЙ— Й—a haf fo jen, ЕӢ nikka wuu fu saguuЙ“a, ne Й“a nam eЙ—oh haf Й“a wuu fu taamboh ЕӢ woo kiЕӢ Й—a, te weЙ— keeh ki.
17.20: ЕҠ kiimiЙ—Й—i Й“a Й“eЙ— dong, waaye Й“eЙ— na Й“ooЙ“i kosan ndo taamboh ЕӢ woo ciЕӢ Й“a.
17.21: Baab, mi na kiimee Й—a ne Й“a jen, Й“a nik yino, findi fu nikoh nga so, ЕӢ nikka nga Й—a. ЕҠ waaЙ— ne Й“a nam nik nga Й“oo po adinaani kos ne a fu woos so.
17.22: Kiyak ki fu tum nga so, ЕӢ tumiЙ—a nga Й“a ne Й“a nik yino findi mi na Й—a nikoh yino.
17.23: ЕҠ nik nga Й“a, fu nik nga so ineem tah po Й“a min nik yino keeh-keeh ne adinaani jen inah ne, a fu woos so, te fu waaЙ—iЙ— Й“a findi fu waaЙ—oh ho.
17.24: Baab, fu waaЙ—iЙ— to bala Adina fersan, tahha po fu tumiЙ— kiyak nga so. Mi yii kiim Й—a ne, ЕӢ Й—iski ЕӢ nikan, Й“ooЙ“i fu eЙ— to nam nik na so nga, Й“a min hot kiyak keem.
17.25: Baab, a fu yurah, Й“i Adina inahЙ—i Й—a, waaye mi, ЕӢ inhiЙ— Й—a te taalubeeciЕӢ ngo Й“ii, Й“a inhiЙ— ne a fu woos so.
17.26: ЕҠ inhiЙ—iЙ— Й“a tiikiЕӢ Й—a, te ЕӢ hey Й“a wa Й“aate inhiЙ— po waaЙ—i fu waaЙ— to nik nga Й“a, te mi, ЕӢ nik nga Й“a. В»

18.1: Wa Yeesu Жҙut woo, a hunnda na taalubeeciЕӢ Й—e, Й“a kaЙ—ta Й“aka winooraЕӢ hulЙ“aЕӢ Sederon. Nguuk nikeen nga, a aassa nga na Й“a.
18.2: Yeesu na taalubeeciЕӢ Й—e meeЙ—een nik nga, tahha po Yudaa, yi na hee Й—e eЙ—ndohe, inheen Й—iska.
18.3: A hunnda nga na Й“i soldaar na Й“i alkaate Й“aah ЕӢ Й“a na niiЙ—e Kahan Kooh, e kilifaacaЕӢ seeЖҙkiЙ—oh ca na Farisen ca tuuЖҙee Й“a. ЖҒa Й“ayya niitoha na ganaay.
18.4: Yeesu inheen ini na hee Й—e rahse jen, a reЙ“pa nga Й“a, a meekissa Й“a ne : В« ЖҠu na waake ya Й“a ? В»
18.5: ЖҒa loffa Й—e ne : В« Yeesu yiЕӢ Nasareet. В» A woosa Й“a ne : В« Г‘am yii. В» Wa raak Yudaa yi na eЙ—ndohee Й—e tufkiЙ— na Й“a.
18.6: Wa Yeesu woo Й“a ne : В« Г‘am yii В», Й“a dokukka finho, Й“a keennda ЕӢ kehЖҙi.
18.7: Yeesu meeksissa Й“a ne : В« ЖҠu na waake ya Й“a ? В» ЖҒa woosa ne : В« Yeesu yiЕӢ Nasareet. В»
18.8: A woosa Й“a ne : В« ЕҠ woyiЙ— Й—u wa, Гұam yii. Nik ne Й—u na waakee so Й—ah, faЙ—aat ЖҙaaЙ“ii Й“a coot. В»
18.9: A woyiЙ— ineem ne ina a woyee wii raak : В« Baab, ЕӢ ГұakЙ—i ali Й“o' ЕӢ Й“i fu eЙ— to. В»
18.10: Simong Piyeer nikee na ndang, a puliЙ—taa, a ЖҙoЙ“pa Гұaam ЕӢ Гұaam caЕӢ seeЖҙkiЙ—oha yakka, nofiЕӢ Й—e Гұaahmi nguЙ—ta. Г‘aameem teeksee Malkus.
18.11: Yeesu woosa Piyeer ne : В« Dokna ndangiЕӢ Й—a ЕӢ holiЕӢ wa. KaasiЕӢ miskiЙ—i Baabi eЙ— to, ЕӢ joyЙ—aa joyЙ—i an e ? В» Yeesu ЕӢ fiki Hannas
18.12: ЕҠ ineem soldaar ca na kilifaanaЕӢ Й“a na alkaateecaЕӢ Yawuut ca, ammba Yeesu, Й“a tokka Й—e.
18.13: ЖҒa koc Й—e Й“ay ЕӢ Й—iskaЕӢ Hannas, baab Й“i Й“iti Kayif ; Kayif, a yi nikee seeЖҙkiЙ—oha yakka ЕӢ kiis kaam.
18.14: A yi woyee kilifaacaЕӢ Yawuut ca ne : В« ЖҒo' yino kaan wuu cuuЙ“i weЙ— ngisoh. В» Piyeer taaskiЙ— Yeesu
18.15: Simong Piyeer na taalube wiiriis nikee taambЙ—eeЙ—a Yeesu. Taalubeeneem, seeЖҙkiЙ—oha yakka inheen Й—e, weЙ— tah a minnda hun na Yeesu, a aassa kahan seeЖҙkiЙ—oha yakka.
18.16: Piyeer nak, a tasee ЕӢ nguЙ“u kahna ЕӢ sero buntaana. Taalubeena yinoora pulla, a woosa na Й“oya nikee ЕӢ buntaana, yeem faЙ—ta Piyeer a aassa na taalubeena.
18.17: KuЙ“ka cafЖҙa nikee ЕӢ buntaana, a nikee Гұaam. A woosa Piyeer ne : В« Fu yii, fu namЙ—i Й“aah ЕӢ taalubeeciЕӢ Жҙaari e ? В» A woosa ne : В« Muk, ЕӢ Й“aahЙ—i nga. В»
18.18: Г‘aam ca na alkaateeca nikee ЕӢ Й—iska, Й“a Й“ayee aaГұind, Й“a fuuЙ—ta yongkaah, Й“a yohnukeeЙ—a sagu soosa. Piyeer nikka na Й“a, nameeЙ—a yohnuk. Hannas meeksiЙ— Yeesu
18.19: SeeЖҙkiЙ—oha yakka meekissa Yeesu ЕӢ ini kaЙ— ЕӢ taalubeeciЕӢ Й—e na jangЙ—ohiЕӢ Й—e.
18.20: Yeesu loffa Й—e ne : В« ЕҠ woyee halang ЕӢ fiki Й“ooЙ“i jen, ЕӢ jangЙ—oheeЙ—a ЕӢ sinaagog ci na Kahan Kooh, Й—isik ci Yawuut ci jen na cohe, te ЕӢ Й—asЙ—oheeЙ—i ali in ЕӢ in ci ЕӢ woye.
18.21: Kon wa ye tah fu meeksee so ? Meeksa Й“ooЙ“i sikЙ—ukee ini ЕӢ woo ; Й“eЙ—, Й“a inhiЙ— ini ЕӢ woo Й“a. В»
18.22: Wa a woo ineem, Жҙaar ЕӢ alkaateeca, ya nikee ЕӢ serooce, kunnda Й—e paЙ—, woosa Й—e ne : В« Fu na hee lofohe seeЖҙkiЙ—ohi yakki an e ? В»
18.23: Yeesu woosa Й—e ne : В« Nik ne ini ЕӢ woo, wa Й—aa haa Й—ah, seede'a. Te nik ne ini ЕӢ woo, wa Й—aa Й—ah, wee tah fu laЙ“pa so ? В»
18.24: WeЙ— Hannas nakoh ne Yeesu Й“aysaat ЕӢ Kayif seeЖҙkiЙ—oha yakka na yaah ciЕӢ Й—e tokuuЙ—. Piyeer taaskissiЙ— Yeesu
18.25: Simong Piyeer risee ЕӢ ndaam yohnukeeЙ—a. Raakka Й“ooЙ“a meekis Й—e ne : В« Fu yii, fu namЙ—i Й“aah ЕӢ taalubeeciЕӢ Жҙaari e ? В» Piyeer taasukka an : В« Muk, ЕӢ Й“aahЙ—i nga Й“a. В»
18.26: Жіaar, Й“aah ЕӢ Гұaam caЕӢ seeЖҙkiЙ—oha yakka, nikee nga. A Й“aah na Жҙaara Piyeer nguЙ—ee nofaЕӢ Й—e, a woosa Piyeer ne : В« ЕҠ hotЙ—i Й—a hotЙ—i na Й—e ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ nguuka e ? В»
18.27: Waaye Piyeer taaskissa. A reehiЙ—Й—i woo, siika leehukka. Yeesu Й“ayuuЙ— ЕӢ fiki Pilaat
18.28: Yeesu kooЙ—ohuusa kahan Kayif, a Й“ayuusa kahan Pilaat goornoora. Wa nikee na Й“aaЙ“-teel. Waam, Й“a sangee raak usuЙ“ ne wa hondohuu Й“a Гұam kaГұam kaЕӢ Paaka ; weЙ— tahee Й“a aaseeЙ—i ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ kahna .
18.29: WeЙ— Pilaat puloh, kaЙ—ta nga Й“a, a meekissa Й“a ne : В« ЖҠu na yambe Жҙaarii ye ? В»
18.30: ЖҒa loffa Й—e ne : В« A nikeeЙ—i tumoh moЙ—aaЙ—i Й—ah, Й“oo heeЙ—i Й—a Й—e kome. В»
18.31: ЕҠ ineem Pilaat woosa Й“a ne : В« ЖҒayaat Й—e, Й—u atte'oot Й—e ЕӢ waasiЕӢ Й—u. В» ЖҒa loffa Й—e ne : В« ЖҠu Й“i Й“i Rom, Й—u onЙ—i Й“oo ne Й“oo ap Й“o'. В»
18.32: Ineem raakka ne findi Yeesu woyee ne a kaanohan Й—aa, raak.
18.33: Pilaat dokkissa ЕӢ kahna, a Й“eeЙ—kiЙ—ukka Yeesu, a woosa Й—e ne : В« A fu buuriЕӢ Yawuut ci e ? В»
18.34: Yeesu loffa Й—e ne В« Wa woo kiЕӢ Й—a, wala e Й“i Й“o' woo Й—a wa nga so ? В»
18.35: Pilaat woosa Й—e ne : В« Mi i ? ЕҠ Yawuut e ? ЖҒooЙ“iЕӢ Й—a na kilifaaciЕӢ seeЖҙkiЙ—oh ci Й“eЙ— Й“ay Й—a nga so. Fu tum ye ? В»
18.36: Yeesu loffa Й—e ne : В« NguuriЕӢ ngo nikЙ—i ЕӢ adinaanii. NguuriЕӢ ngo nikeen ЕӢ adinaanii Й—ah, surgaaciЕӢ ngo heen ndo hiГұohЙ—e po ЕӢ degsuu ЕӢ yaah ciЕӢ kilifaaciЕӢ Yawuut ci. Mbaa NguuriЕӢ ngo nikЙ—i ЕӢ kehЖҙi ndii. В»
18.37: Pilaat woosa Й—e ne : В« Kon fu buur e ? В» Yeesu woosa Й—e ne : В« Fu woo ne ЕӢ buur. Ini tah ho hay Adina, ЕӢ rimukka, weЙ— ne ЕӢ seede keeh ki. ЖҒo' nu Й“aah ЕӢ keeh ki Й—ah na sikЙ—uke sikЙ—uk woo kiЕӢ ngo. В»
18.38: Pilaat woosa Й—e ne : В« Keeh ki weЙ— ye ? В» Pilaat eЙ—ohiЙ— Yeesu ne a daaЖҙu ЕӢ kurwaa Wi Pilaat woo ineem, a pulla, a dokkissa ЕӢ Yawuut ci, a woosa Й“a ne : В« Mi, ЕӢ hotЙ—i ini Жҙaarii tum in moЙ—aaЙ—i po a joyya apu.
18.39: Waaye, Й—u mbaahkohiЙ— ne ЕӢ faЙ—siЙ— Й—u Й“o' yino, feet Paak nu ree Й—ah ; Й—u waaЙ—iЙ— ne ЕӢ faЙ—siЙ— Й—u buuriЕӢ Yawuut ci e ? В»
18.40: ЖҒa leehkisseeЙ—a an : В« Muk ! Kinaa Й—e faЙ—is, faЙ—siЙ—a Й“oo Barabaas. В» Barabaas yeem nikee yoondЙ—oh kur.

19.1: Wa Й“a woo Pilaat ineem, a Й“ayya Yeesu, a nakohha Й—e laЙ“Й—u leraw.
19.2: Soldaar ca teЙ—iЙ—ta Й—e mbahne-buur, Й“a teЙ—ohee wa Гұapir, Й“a deggaa ЕӢ hafiЕӢ Й—e, Й“a Й“ekiЙ—ta Й—e palto ruumind, ruumind buur.
19.3: ЖҒa reЙ“eeЙ—a nga Й—e, Й“a woyeeЙ—a ne : В« BuuriЕӢ Yawuut ci, Й“oo Й“ii kaГұiЙ— Й—a ! В» ЖҒa tipeeЙ—a Й—e paЙ—.
19.4: Pilaat pulissa, a woosa Yawuut ca ne : В« FaЙ—aat ЕӢ Й“ay Й—u Й—e ЕӢ hari, Й—u inah ne ЕӢ hotЙ—i ali ini joy Й—e tah apu. В»
19.5: Yeesu pulla na mbahneeraЕӢ rupa na paltoona ruumnda. Pilaat woosa Й“a ne : В« Жіaari yeЙ—Й—i ! В»
19.6: Wa kilifaacaЕӢ seeЖҙkiЙ—oh ca na alkaateeca hot Й—e, Й“a leehkeeЙ—a ЕӢ Й—afka ne : В« DaaЖҙaa Й—e ЕӢ kurwaa ! DaaЖҙaa Й—e ЕӢ kurwaa ! В» Pilaat woosa Й“a ne : В« ЖҒayaat Й—e, Й—u daaЖҙoot Й—e ; mi, ЕӢ hotЙ—i ini joy Й—e tah apu. В»
19.7: ЖҒa loffa Й—e ne : В« ЖҒoo, Й“oo raakiЙ— waas, te wa woo ne a joy joy kaan, laam a tum haf ce KuЙ“kiЕӢ Kooh. В»
19.8: Wa Pilaat kerah woo keem, a Й“aatta tiit.
19.9: A dokkissa ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ kahna a meekissa Yeesu ne : В« Fu puloh nde ? В» Waaye Yeesu tahasЙ—i Й—e.
19.10: ЕҠ ndeem Pilaat woosa Й—e ne : В« Fu sang woo na so e ? Fu inahЙ—i ne ЕӢ raakiЙ— hatili ЕӢ min Й—a faЙ—soh te ЕӢ namiЙ— raak hatili ЕӢ min Й—a daaЖҙoh ЕӢ kurwaa e ? В»
19.11: Yeesu loffa Й—e ne : В« Fu heeЙ—i raake ali hatil nga so ne Kooh oneeЙ—i Й—a wa Й—ah. WeЙ— tah yi deg go ЕӢ yaah fu a yi raak bakaaЙ—i uup yak. В»
19.12: ЕҠ woo keem, Pilaat waakeeЙ—a findi a faЙ—sohan Й—e. Waaye Yawuut ca leehkeeЙ—a ЕӢ Й—afka ne : В« Fu faЙ—is Й—e Й—ah, fu nawle buuri yakkiЕӢ Rom haa. Yaa nu tum haf ce buur Й—ah, a sangiЙ—iЕӢ buuri yakki ! В»
19.13: Wa Pilaat kerah woo ceem, a Й“ayya Yeesu ЕӢ hara, a Й“ooffa ЕӢ atte'ohaana ЕӢ Й—iska na woyse "Dungohu atoh" te ЕӢ peЙ—eem Yawuut, wa na woyse "Gabata".
19.14: Wa nikee ЕӢ Й“ak leero noh ЕӢ mbeha Yawuut ca na kooЙ—kohe laam Kooh-wiisiina weЙ— na nike PaakaЕӢ Й“a. Pilaat woosa Yawuut ca ne : В« BuuriЕӢ Й—u yeЙ—Й—i ! В»
19.15: Waaye Й“a leehkeeЙ—a ЕӢ Й—afka ne : В« A kaanaat ! A kaanaat ! DaaЖҙaa Й—e ЕӢ kurwaa ! В» Pilaat woosa Й“a ne : В« BuuriЕӢ Й—u, a yi mi na hee daaЖҙe ЕӢ kurwaa e ? В» KilifaacaЕӢ seeЖҙkiЙ—oh ca loffa Й—e ne : В« ЖҒoo raakЙ—i buur wiiriis Й—al buura yakkaЕӢ Rom. В»
19.16: ЕҠ ndeem Pilaat eЙ—ta Й“a Yeesu ne Й“a daaЖҙ Й—e ЕӢ kurwaa. Yeesu daaЖҙuuЙ— ЕӢ kurwaa Pilaat eЙ—ta Й“a Yeesu, Й“a Й“ayya Й—e, Й“a cootta na Й—e.
19.17: Yeesu deguusa kurwaanaЕӢ Й—e, a yurahha Й—iska na woyse "Жіoh-haf", te peЙ—eem Yawuut woyee wa Golgota .
19.18: Soldaar ca daaЖҙoh Й—e ndaam, a yi na Жҙaar kanak yaa nu nga ЕӢ kurwaa, yii lahha Й—e ЕӢ Й“akii, yinni lahha Й—e ЕӢ Й“aki tas, a nikka ЕӢ leerooЙ“a.
19.19: Pilaat nakohha fiisЙ—u ini Yeesu nik, ЕӢ inaa, wa daaЖҙuusa ЕӢ Й—afuk kurwaana. Inii weЙ— fiissee nga : В« Yeesu yiЕӢ Nasareet, buuriЕӢ Yawuut ci. В»
19.20: Yawuut laayiЙ— jangeeЙ—a ini fiisse, Й—iska a daaЖҙsee useeЙ—i kur-taaha te wa fiissee ЕӢ peЙ—eem kaahay : peЙ—eem Yawuut na lateng na gerek.
19.21: KilifaacaЕӢ seeЖҙkiЙ—oh caЕӢ Yawuut ca woosa Pilaat ne : В« Kina fiis "BuuriЕӢ Yawuut ci", waaye fiisa ne : вҖң Жіaarii woo ne a yi buuriЕӢ Yawuut ci. вҖқ В»
19.22: Pilaat loffa ne : В« Ini ЕӢ fiis, ЕӢ fiisiЙ—a. В»
19.23: Wa soldaar ca Жҙut daaЖҙ Yeesu, Й“a Й“ayya kulЙ“aacaЕӢ Й—e, Й“a paysohha ca Й“ak nikiis, yaa nu nga Й“ak yino. ЖҒa nammba Й“ay kulЙ“aakaЕӢ Й—e wa a na adginke, wa nikee piis yino Й—afki po kehЖҙi, wa raakeeЙ—i supit.
19.24: ЖҒa woosa ЕӢ harmban Й“a ne : В« ЖҒoo kinaata faar, Й“oo piilohaata, Й“oo inah Й“oyi raakana nga Й“oo. В» Ineem raakka ne ina Fiis ci woyee raak, an : В« ЖҒa paysohiЙ— kulЙ“aaciЕӢ ngo, Й“a piilohha ne Й“a inah yi raakan kulЙ“aakiЕӢ ngo. В» Ineem weЙ— soldaar ca tum.
19.25: YaayiЕӢ Yeesu, a yi na taambЙ—oh ce Й“itiЙ“, na Mari Й“iti Kolopas, na Mari Makdala, Й“a nikee tufkiЙ— ЕӢ sero kurwaanaЕӢ Yeesu.
19.26: Wa Yeesu hot yaayiЕӢ Й—e, a nammba hot taalubeena a keeГұkohee, ЕӢ sero yaayiЕӢ Й—e, a woosa yaayiЕӢ Й—e ne : В« Yaay, kuЙ“kiЕӢ Й—a yeЙ—Й—eem. В»
19.27: Жіutta a woosa taalubeena ne : В« YaayiЕӢ Й—a yeЙ—Й—eem. В» Ina amboh ЕӢ waam, taalubeena Й“ayya Maryaama kahan ce, a nikka nga. Kakaan kaЕӢ Yeesu
19.28: ЕҠ finho ineem Yeesu inahha ne in ci jen mitiЙ— kotii, a woosa ne : В« ЕҠ sifaЙ—kiЙ—. В» A woyiЙ— ineem ne ini Fiis ci woyee raak.
19.29: Wa raakeen ndaam meeme riifiЙ— na masuЙ“ raakiЙ— bineegar . Soldaar ca Й“ayya daah, Й“a hooЖҙcaa nga, Й“a tokkaa ЕӢ lecem ndooЙ— hisoЙ“ , Й“a reЙ“iЙ—taa ЕӢ nguЙ“iЕӢ Yeesu.
19.30: Wa a an nga po Жҙutta, a woosa ne : В« In ci jen reehiЙ— haЙ“Й—u. В» WeЙ— a naaroh haf, a eЙ—ohha ruuhiЕӢ Й—e. Soldaar maangiЙ— Yeesu salma
19.31: Wa nikee mbehi Й“a kooЙ—kiЙ—ohe mbehi na iЙ—siЙ—kohse. Mbehi na iЙ—siЙ—kohse wii, wa nikee mbeh yakiЙ— ЕӢ Yawuut ci, weЙ— tah kilifaacaЕӢ Й“a waaЙ—eeЙ—i ne mbehaam raak fiЙ—aaf ca ЕӢ Й—afuk kurwaaca. ЖҒa kaЙ—ta ЕӢ Pilaat, Й“a kiimmba Й—e ne kot caЕӢ ЖҙaaЙ“a daaЖҙsee weeru , fiЙ—aaf caЕӢ Й“a nihsu.
19.32: ЕҠ ineem soldaar ca kaЙ—ta ЕӢ ЖҙaaЙ“a kanak ca daaЖҙsee na Yeesu, Й“a weerra kot caЕӢ Й“a. ЖҒa koc weer caЕӢ ya koc, Й“a weerra caЕӢ ya kanakЙ—oh.
19.33: Wa Й“a ree ЕӢ Yeesu, Й“a hotta ne a kaaniЙ—, tahha po Й“a weerЙ—i kot ciЕӢ Й—e.
19.34: Waaye Жҙaar ЕӢ soldaar ca, maannga Й—e salma ЕӢ hambuus. Jaarra wa puliЙ—ta Гұif na masuЙ“.
19.35: ЖҒoyi naandsuk in cii, a hotoot hotoot na has ciЕӢ Й—e te ini a woo, wa keeh. A yi ЕӢ haf ce, a inhiЙ— ne ini a woo, wa keeh, te a seede'iЙ—a ne Й—u nam min kos.
19.36: Ineem kaЙ—ohha Й—aa ne ini Fiis ci woyee raak, an : В« Ali Жҙoh yino ЕӢ Жҙoh ciЕӢ Й—e weersanЙ—i. В»
19.37: Te Fiis ci woyissiЙ— ЕӢ Й—isik wiiriis ne : В« ЖҒa hey marke ЕӢ yi Й“a maange. В» Yeesu Й“ekuuЙ— ЕӢ ruy-ruy
19.38: Wa in ceem coot, Suseef yaЕӢ Arimate, kiimmba Pilaat ne yeem eЙ— Й—e fiЙ—aafaЕӢ Yeesu. Suseef nikee taalubeeniЕӢ Yeesu, waaye a Й—asЙ—ohee wa Й—asЙ—oh sagu neЖҙЖҙoh kilifaacaЕӢ Yawuut ca. Pilaat teyЙ—ukiЙ—ta Й—e, Suseef kaЙ—ta, Й“ayya fiЙ—aafaЕӢ Yeesu.
19.39: Nikodem nammba hay, a Й“ayndohha ini ree kilo diw ndaЕӢkiyaah-kaahay (30) haЙ“Й—ohu miir na puЙ— eeГұЙ—oha na woyse alowe . Nikodem yeem a yi kaЙ—ee marka Yeesu na wek.
19.40: ЕҠ ineem Й“a kanak, Й“a Й“ayya fiЙ—aafaЕӢ Yeesu, Й“a lemeseeЙ—aa na uuf, Й“a tumeeЙ—aa eeГұЙ—ohaana, findi Yawuut ci na tumohe, ne Й“a heesa Й—aake fiЙ—aaf caЕӢ Й“a Й—ah.
19.41: Raakeen nguuk ЕӢ sero Й—iska Yeesu daaЖҙse, ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ nguukeem raakeen ruy-ruy as wi ali Й“o' moosЙ—i Й—aakohu.
19.42: Ini Yawuut ca kooЙ—kiЙ—ee mbehi na iЙ—siЙ—kohse te ruy-ruya useeЙ—i ndaam, weЙ— tah Й“a Й“ekka fiЙ—aafaЕӢ Yeesu nga.

20.1: Wa nikee mbehi taamb ЕӢ mbehi na iЙ—siЙ—kohse na Й“aaЙ“a teel, raaka ris Гұuus, Mari Makdala kaЙ—ta ruy-ruyaЕӢ Yeesu. Wa a ree, a hotta ne atoh fa rangee wa Й“akЙ—uuЙ—.
20.2: WeЙ—i a nupoh ЕӢ Simong Piyeer na taalubeena yinoora, yi Yeesu keeГұkohee, a woosa Й“a ne : В« ЖҒa kooЙ—ohiЙ— fiЙ—aafiЕӢ HeЙ—i ЕӢ ruy-ruya, te Й“oo inahЙ—i Й—iski Й“a Й—aaka ! В»
20.3: Piyeer na taalubeena yinoora pulla ne Й“a kaЙ— ruy-ruya.
20.4: ЖҒa kanak jen, Й“a hunnda, Й“a nupeeЙ—a, waaye taalubeena yinoora uuppa gaaw Piyeer, a kocca Й—e ree.
20.5: A huusukka, a hotta uufa liwsee ЕӢ faaniЕӢ Й—e, waaye a aasЙ—i.
20.6: Simong Piyeer nikee ГұaakЙ—eeЙ—a Й—e, a reesa, a aassa, a hotta uufa deguuЙ— ЕӢ Й—isik.
20.7: A nammba hot wa wilЙ—assee ЕӢ hafa. Wa nikeeЙ—i na winoora, wa nikee lemuuЙ—, wa deguusa kiik wa.
20.8: Taalubeena yinoora hannda nam aas ; a hotta, a kossa.
20.9: Fiis ci woyeen ne Yeesu joyiЙ— hulit, waaye Й“a inheeЙ—aa paaЙ—.
20.10: Taalubeeca kanak ca haadda. Mari Makdala hotiЙ— Yeesu
20.11: Waam raak Mari ЕӢ hara, ЕӢ sero ruy-ruya, fuЙ—eeЙ—a, a huusukka, a markeeЙ—a ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙa.
20.12: A hotta malaaka kanak Й“ekkiЙ— kulЙ“a yaanow, Й“oofiЙ— ЕӢ Й—iska fiЙ—aafaЕӢ Yeesu degse, yinoora Й“ooffa teemb ЕӢ Й—iska hafi nike, ya tas teemb ЕӢ kot ci.
20.13: ЖҒa woosa Й—e ne : В« ЖҒitЙ“i, fu na fuЙ—e ye ? В» A loffa Й“a ne : В« ЖҒa Й“ayiЙ— fiЙ—aafiЕӢ HeЙ— to, te ЕӢ inahЙ—i Й—iski Й“a Й—aaka. В»
20.14: Wa a woo ineem, a heelukka, a hotta Yeesu tufkiЙ— ; waaye a inhiseeЙ—i Й—e.
20.15: Yeesu woosa Й—e ne : В« ЖҒitЙ“i, fu na fuЙ—e ye ? Fu na waake ya Й“a ? В» Mari liiЙ“pa ne a pangkohiЕӢ nguuki Й“a nikoh, a loffa ne : В« Kilifaani, nik ne a fu Й“ay fiЙ—aafi Й—ah, teeЙ“ po Й—iski fu Й—aaka, ЕӢ kaЙ—a Й“aya. В»
20.16: Yeesu woosa Й—e ne : В« Mari ! В» Mari wiirukka, woosa Й—e ЕӢ peЙ—eem Yawuut ne : В« Rabbuuni ! В» Wa tokis "jangЙ—ohohi".
20.17: Yeesu woosa Й—e ne : В« Kinaa so amb ndii laam ЕӢ rapЙ—i ЕӢ Baabi paaЙ—. Waaye kaЙ—a ЕӢ Й“ooЙ“iЕӢ ngo, fu woo Й“a ne mi yii rap ЕӢ Й—iskaЕӢ BaabiЕӢ ngo, yi nam nik BaabiЕӢ Й—u ; KoohiЕӢ ngo, yi nam nik KoohiЕӢ Й—u ! В»
20.18: ЕҠ ineem Mari Makdala kaЙ—ta ЕӢ taalubeeca, a woosa Й“a ne : В« ЕҠ hotiЙ— HeЙ—i ! В» A woosa Й“a ina a woo Й—e jen. Taalubeeci hotiЙ— Yeesu
20.19: MbaЙ—i na niina, taalubeeca cohha ЕӢ kahan, Й“a rangukka nga sagu neЖҙЖҙoh kilifaacaЕӢ Yawuut ca. ЖҠekka po Yeesu nikka ЕӢ leerooЙ“a, a woosa Й“a ne : В« Nikaat ЕӢ jam ! В»
20.20: A teeЙ“pa Й“a Й—iski a maangsee ЕӢ yaah ciЕӢ Й—e na hambuusiЕӢ Й—e. ЖҒa summba lool ЕӢ hoti Й“a hot HeЙ—i.
20.21: Yeesu woyissa Й“a ne : В« Jam nikaat na Й—u ! Findi BaabiЕӢ ngo woosoh ho, mi yii nam Й—u woosoh Й—aa. В»
20.22: ЕҠ finho woo keem a fuuЙ—issa nga Й“a, a woosa Й“a ne : В« Rahsaat FuuЙ—si Hoolohngaani !
20.23: ЖҒi Й—u Й—aasan bakaaЙ— ciЕӢ Й“a, Й“a hey Й—aasse. ЖҒi Й—u Й—aasanЙ—i bakaaЙ— ciЕӢ Й“a, Й“a Й—aassanЙ—i. В» Yeesu na Tomaa
20.24: Waam raak Tomaa yi na woyse Siisi te a Й“aahha ЕӢ taalubeeci ndaЕӢkiyaah na kanak ci (12), a nikeeЙ—i na Й“a wa Yeesu hay nga Й“a.
20.25: Taalubeeci Й“inooЙ“i woyeeЙ—a Й—e ne : В« ЖҒoo hotiЙ— HeЙ—i. В» Waaye Tomaa loffa Й“a ne : В« Feeh ЕӢ hotЙ—i daaЖҙohiiciЕӢ pontooci ЕӢ yaah ciЕӢ Й—e, ЕӢ Й“ekЙ—i ndukniЕӢ ngo ЕӢ Й—iski pontooci daaЖҙsee te ЕӢ Й“ekЙ—i yaahiЕӢ ngo ЕӢ hambuusiЕӢ Й—e Й—ah, ЕӢ kosanЙ—i wa. В»
20.26: Mbeha dokkissa, taalubeeci cohissa ЕӢ kahna, Tomaa nikee na Й“a. Buntaaca jen rangseen, Й—ekka po Yeesu pulla, tufukka ЕӢ leerooЙ“a. A woosa Й“a ne : В« Jam nikaat na Й—u ! В»
20.27: A hannda woo Tomaa ne : В« ЖҒaya ndukniЕӢ Й—a ndii, fu marak yaah ciЕӢ ngo. RaЙ—sa yaahiЕӢ Й—a fu Й“eka ЕӢ hambuusiЕӢ ngo. Kana nikis kosaaЙ—i, kosa kotii. В»
20.28: Tomaa loffa Й—e ne : В« HeЙ— to na KoohiЕӢ ngo ! В»
20.29: Yeesu woosa Й—e ne : В« Hoti fu hot to, weЙ— tah Й—a kos ! ЖҒa neЙ“Й—iЙ—, Й“i kos te Й“a hotЙ—i ! В» Ini tah teerndii fiisu
20.30: Yeesu tumissiЙ— ЕӢ fiki taalubeeciЕӢ Й—e firnde wiiriis laayiЙ— waaye ca fiisuuЙ—i ЕӢ teerndii.
20.31: Firndeeci fiisu cii fiisu ne Й—u kos ne Yeesu a yi MucЙ—ohi Gapohse, KuЙ“kiЕӢ Kooh, te koseem on Й—u kipes ЕӢ tiikiЕӢ Й—e.

21.1: Wa in ceem coot, Yeesu teeЙ“kissa jahran taalubeeciЕӢ Й—e, ЕӢ CookmaЕӢ-Tiberiyad. A teeЙ“koh Й“a an :
21.2: Simong Piyeer, na Tomaa yi na woyse Siisi, na Natanayel yi gen Kanaa ngaЕӢ Galile, na kuЙ“uuciЕӢ Sebede na taalube wiiriis kanak Й“eЙ— nike.
21.3: Simong Piyeer woosa Й“a ne : В« Maa kaЙ— seeЙ“a. В» ЖҒa woosa Й—e ne : В« ЖҒoo hey hune na Й—a. В» ЖҒa kaЙ—ta. ЖҒa aassa gaal, waaye ЕӢ weka jen Й“a ambЙ—i ali in.
21.4: Na Й“aaЙ“a teel Yeesu tufukka ЕӢ sereendaЕӢ cookma waaye taalubeeci inahЙ—i ne a yi.
21.5: Yeesu woosa ne : В« ЖіaaЙ“iЕӢ ngo, Й—u raakЙ—i kaГұam ki Й“o' min ambsoh na mbuuru e ? В» ЖҒa loffa Й—e ne В« A'aa ! В»
21.6: A woosa Й“a ne : В« Njafaat mbaal ciЕӢ Й—u ЕӢ Й“aki ГұaahmiЕӢ gaali, Й—u hey ambe ! В» Wa Й“a njaf ca, Й“a minisЙ—i ca nook sagu cuurund ca laayiЙ— ca Й“a ambe.
21.7: Taalubeeni Yeesu keeГұkohee woosa Simong Piyeer ne : В« A HeЙ—i ! В» Wa Piyeer kerah ne a HeЙ—i, a tokka kulЙ“aakiЕӢ Й—e ЕӢ kinoh ki, raak Й—e Й“ekukЙ—i in wiiriis Й—al kulЙ“aakeem, a faЙ—sukka ЕӢ masma.
21.8: Taalubeeca Й“inooЙ“a kaЙ—ta teera na gaala, Й“a faseeЙ—a mbaala, raaka riifiЙ— na cuurund. ЖҒa useeЙ—i sereendaЕӢ cookma, wa joyee nik saangal teemet.
21.9: Wa Й“a ruhus, Й“a hotta yongkaah, ca aaГұind kaЙ“Й—asse, na cuurund ЕӢ joli na mbuuru.
21.10: Yeesu woosa Й“a ne : В« Hayaat na cuurund, ЕӢ ci Й—u amb. В»
21.11: Simong Piyeer aassa ЕӢ gaala, a nookka mbaala ЕӢ hara. Wa riiffa na cuurund yakak teemet na ndaЕӢkiyaah-yatuus na kaahay (153), te ina ca laayee jen, mbaala faarkeeЙ—i.
21.12: Yeesu woosa Й“a ne : В« Hayaat Й—u malnduk. В» Ali taalube kaaГұЙ—i Й—e meekis ne : В« A fu Й“a ? В» ЖҒa inheen ne a HeЙ—i.
21.13: Yeesu reЙ“pa, a Й“ayya mbuurnda, a eЙ—ta Й“a, a nammba Й“a eЙ— cuurnda.
21.14: Wii nikka waasi kaahayЙ—ohi Yeesu teeЙ“uk taalubeeciЕӢ Й—e, ЕӢ finho hultiЙ—uukiЕӢ Й—e. Yeesu na Piyeer na taalubeena
21.15: Wa Й“a malnduk po Й“a Жҙutta, Yeesu woosa Simong Piyeer ne : В« Simong kuЙ“kiЕӢ SaaЕӢ , fu keeГұkohiЙ— to keeГұkohi uup wi Й“ooЙ“ii raak nga so e ? В» Piyeer loffa Й—e ne : В« Ee HeЙ—i, fu inhiЙ— ne ЕӢ waaЙ—iЙ— Й—a. В» Yeesu woosa Й—e ne : В« Taambkoha buul ciЕӢ mbaal ciЕӢ ngo. В»
21.16: A kanakЙ—ukissa a woosa Й—e ne : В« Simong kuЙ“kiЕӢ SaaЕӢ, fu keeГұkohiЙ— to e ? В» Piyeer loffa Й—e ne : В« Ee HeЙ—i, fu inhiЙ— ne ЕӢ waaЙ—iЙ— Й—a. В» Yeesu woosa Й—e ne : В« NiiЙ—a mbaal ciЕӢ ngo. В»
21.17: A kaahayЙ—ukissa hooso an : В« Simong kuЙ“kiЕӢ SaaЕӢ, fu waaЙ—iЙ— to e ? В» Piyeer soossa ЕӢ meeksohi kaahayЙ—oh an : В« Fu waaЙ—iЙ— to e ? В» A loffa Й—e ne : В« HeЙ—i, fu inhiЙ— in nu nik, fu inhiЙ— ne ЕӢ waaЙ—iЙ— Й—a. В» Yeesu woosa Й—e ne : В« Taambkoha mbaal ciЕӢ ngo. В»
21.18: A degga nga ne В« Г‘am na woyee Й—a wa te amba ne wa keeh, wi fu nik komaaki yaf tokootee ГұooriЕӢ Й—a, fu kaЙ—eeЙ—a Й—iski neЙ“ Й—a ; waaye fu yaЙ“ko Й—ah, fu hey raЙ—se yaah ciЕӢ Й—a, Й“o' wiiriis tokiЙ— Й—a wa, a Й“ay Й—a Й—iski fu waaЙ—Й—i. В»
21.19: ЕҠ woo ceem, a teeЙ“ohee findi Piyeer na hee kaanohe, na findi a yakЙ—ohan Kooh nga. Yeesu Й“aatta nga ne : В« Г‘aakiЙ— to. В»
21.20: Piyeer guridda, a hotta taalubeeni Yeesu keeГұkohee hayeeЙ—a ЕӢ finhooce, a taalubeeni hiiree ЕӢ Yeesu wa Й“a Гұame, a meekissa Й—e yi eЙ—ndohan Й—e.
21.21: Wa Piyeer hot Й—e, Piyeer woosa Yeesu ne : В« HeЙ—i ! Moo ini kaЙ— ЕӢ yii nak ? В»
21.22: Yeesu woosa ne : В« Nik ne ЕӢ waaЙ—iЙ— ne a ris pes po mbaЙ—na ЕӢ hayissan Й—ah, waas fu ye nga ? Fu, ГұaakiЙ— to rek ! В»
21.23: Wa pasarkohha ЕӢ kosiЙ— ca ne taalubeeneem kaananЙ—i. Te kat Yeesu woyeeЙ—i Piyeer ne a kaananЙ—i, a woyee Й—e inii : В« Nik ne ЕӢ waaЙ—iЙ— ne a ris pes po mbaЙ—na ЕӢ hayissan Й—ah, waas fu ye nga ? В»
21.24: Taalubeeneem a yi fiis in ceem, a seede'iЙ— ca, te Й“oo inhiЙ— ne seedeeniЕӢ Й—e keeh.
21.25: Yeesu haЙ“Й—een in wiiriis laayiЙ—, ca fiisseen yino yino Й—ah, ЕӢ liiЙ“iЙ— ne teereeci hee fiisse heeЙ—i haЙ“e ЕӢ Adina.

1.1: Tewofiil ЖҙaariЕӢ ngo, mi yii kaГұiЙ— Й—a. ЕҠ teerndiЕӢ ngo ЕӢ koc fiis, ЕӢ woyiЙ— in ci Yeesu tumee na ci a jangЙ—ohee ЕӢ cambohaana,
1.2: po mbeha a rapЙ—ohu ЕӢ Eel ci. Bala a rapan Й—ah, a eЙ—ta Apootar ci a kooЙ—e nakoh ciЕӢ Й—e, taamboh ЕӢ FuuЙ—si Hoolohngaani, FuuЙ—siЕӢ Kooh.
1.3: ЕҠ finho kakaan kiЕӢ Й—e, a teeЙ“pa Й“a haf ce, a teeЙ“pa Й“a ЕӢ firnde laayiЙ— ne a yii pes. A tummba po Й“a hoteeЙ—a Й—e, a woyeeЙ—a na Й“a ЕӢ ini kaЙ— ЕӢ NguuriЕӢ-Kooh, po wa mitta neeh ndaЕӢkiyaah-nikiis (40).
1.4: Wa raakka mbeh nga, a Й“ooffa a ГұameeЙ—a na Й“a, a eЙ—ta Й“a dengkohii an : В« Kinaat pul Yerusalem, sekaat ini Baabi gapohe, wi ЕӢ woyee Й—u.
1.5: Laam Yahya Й“oktohee na masuЙ“, waaye ndii na Й“i neeh, Й—u hey Й“oktasse na FuuЙ—si Hoolohngaani. В»
1.6: ЖҒooЙ“a cohee ЕӢ Й—iska meekissa Yeesu ne : В« HeЙ— Й“oo, andi jamanoonii weЙ— fu na hee tufkiЙ—ohisse NguuriЕӢ Israayel ? В»
1.7: A loffa Й“a ne : В« ЖҠu onuuЙ—i ne Й—u inah jamanooni wala wahtuuni in ceem hayohan. A Baabi ЕӢ haf ce a yi gap mbehiЕӢ ca ЕӢ ini neЙ“ Й—e.
1.8: Waaye FuuЙ—si Hoolohngaani ruhus nga Й—u Й—ah, Й—u hey rahse hatil te Й—u hey nike seedeeciЕӢ ngo ЕӢ Yerusalem, na ЕӢ kur caЕӢ Yudee jen na caЕӢ Samari jen po Й—iska Adina top. В»
1.9: Wa Yeesu woo po Жҙutta, a rapЙ—asseeЙ—a Asamaan ЕӢ has ciЕӢ Й“a, eel hayya ulla Й—e, Й“a hotisЙ—i Й—e.
1.10: Wa Й“a ris marak rapЙ—uukaЕӢ Yeesu, jaarra Жҙaar kanak Й“ekuk kulЙ“a yaanow nikka ЕӢ serooЙ“a,
1.11: woosa Й“a ne : В« ЖіaaЙ“iЕӢ Galileeci, wa ye tah Й—u tufuk, Й—u markee ЕӢ eel ci ? Yeesu yii, yi kooЙ—ohu nga Й—u, cootta ЕӢ Eel ci, hey hayisse findi Й—u hotoh Й—e kaЙ—eeЙ—a ЕӢ Eel ci. В» Macaas kooЙ—uuЙ— ne a namsiЙ— Yudaa
1.12: Apootar ci kurkohha Й—iska Й“a nikee, ЕӢ tangoora na woyse TangooraЕӢ-Oliiw-ca, Й“a dokukka Yerusalem. Harmban wa na Yerusalem nikee ЕӢ Й“ak kilomeet yino.
1.13: Wa Й“a ree, Й“a kaЙ—ta ЕӢ tuuЖҙa uup Й—afuk ЕӢ kahna, Й—iska Й“a na dale. ЖҒa nikee Piyeer, SaaЕӢ, Saak na Andare, Filip na Tomaa, Bartalemi na Macce, Saak kuЙ“kiЕӢ Alfe, Simong Seloti na Yudaa kuЙ“kiЕӢ Saak.
1.14: ЖҒeЙ— jen, na Й“i Й“itiЙ“ na Maryaama yaayiЕӢ Yeesu, na taambЙ—oh ciЕӢ Yeesu Жҙaar ci, Й“eЙ— meeЙ— coh ne Й“a hun Й“a kiimee Kooh ЕӢ liiЙ“ohaaЙ— yino.
1.15: ЕҠ neeh caam, Piyeer nikee na kosiЙ— ca cohee ЕӢ Й—iska, - Й“a nikeen ЕӢ Й“ak teemet na ndaЕӢkiyaah-kanak (120) - a tufukka, a woosa Й“a ne :
1.16: В« ЖҒaah ciЕӢ ngo, ini FuuЙ—si Hoolohngaani woyee ЕӢ Fiis ci HooliЙ— ci taamboh ЕӢ nguЙ“iЕӢ Dawuuda te wa joyya nik, wa raakiЙ—, weЙ— ini kaЙ— ЕӢ Yudaa yi Й“ayee Й“ooЙ“i hayee ne Й“a amb Yeesu.
1.17: A Й“aahee nga Й“oo te a raakeen Й“ak ЕӢ pangki Й“oo eЙ—u. В»
1.18: ЕҠ ini Piyeer woo weem, kopori Yudaa rahsoh ЕӢ tumohaaЙ—aЕӢ Й—e moЙ—aaЙ—iina, a romoha yohon, a keennda ЕӢ yohna, hafiЕӢ Й—e adugka, rookiЕӢ Й—e pookka, liir ciЕӢ Й—e jen aamukka.
1.19: ЖҒi Yerusalem jen kerheen ineem weЙ— tah Й“a teekee yohneem "Akeldama" ЕӢ peЙ—miЕӢ Й“a, wa tokis "yohon Гұif".
1.20: Piyeer degga nga ne : В« Wa fiisuuЙ— ЕӢ teerndiЕӢ Sabuur ne : вҖң Kahan ce nikaat hulang, ali Й“o' kinaat gen nga ! вҖқ Fiis ci woyissiЙ— ne : вҖң ЖҒo' wiiriis Й“ayaat Й“akiЕӢ Й—e ЕӢ pangki. вҖқ
1.21: Kon book Й“oo joyiЙ— kooЙ— Жҙaar yino, ЕӢ Й“i meeЙ— hun na Й“oo ЕӢ jamanoona HeЙ— Й“oo Yeesu nikoh na Й“oo,
1.22: ini kooЙ—oh wa Yahya Й“okit Й—e po findi a kooЙ—ohu nga Й“oo. ЖҒoyeem joy hun na Й“oo, ne a seede'ee hultiЕӢ Yeesu. В»
1.23: ЕҠ ineem, Й“a Й“ayya Й“o' kanak : Suseef yi na woyse Barsabaas te a nammba tapu Yustus, na Жҙaari na woyse Macaas.
1.24: ЕҠ ndeem, Й“a kiimeeЙ—a Kooh an : В« HeЙ— Й“oo, fu yi inah keeГұ ciЕӢ Й“ooЙ“i jen, teeЙ“oha yi fu kooЙ— ЕӢ Й“ooЙ“i kanak cii,
1.25: ne a Й“ay panguk Apootar , wi Yudaa faЙ— a kaЙ—ta Й—iska a joy nik. В»
1.26: WeЙ— Й“a Й“ayoh atoh ne Й“a marak Й“oyi Kooh kooЙ—, wa hennda ЕӢ Macaas. A Й“aatuusa ЕӢ Apootar ci ndaЕӢkiyaah na yinooci (11).

2.1: Wa mbehiЕӢ Paantakot ree, Й“a jen Й“a cohha ЕӢ Й—isik yino.
2.2: ЖҠekka po Й—uuЙ— pulohha Eel ci findi Й—uuЙ— puuЙ—is yakak. Wa riiffa kahna Й“a nikohee del.
2.3: ЕҠ ineem, Й“a hotta Й“i in haa peЙ—eem, findi jaal yongkaah. Ca paysukohha, ca degukka ЕӢ yaa nu nga Й—ah.
2.4: ЖҒa jen Й“a riiffa na FuuЙ—si Hoolohngaani, FuuЙ—siЕӢ Kooh. ЖҒa jombeeЙ—a ЕӢ Й“i peЙ—eem wiiriis findi FuuЙ—si Hoolohngaani onoh Й“a ne Й“a woo.
2.5: Waam raak Й“i Yawuut pulohiЙ— kur na kur, Й“a hayya Yerusalem, Й“a nikee Й“o' nupiЙ— Kooh.
2.6: Wa Й“ooЙ“a kerah Й—uuЙ—a, Й“a nangЙ—ukohha ЕӢ mboolo yakak. ЖҒa feyuusa lool laam yaa nu nga Й“a Й—ah, kerheen kosiЙ— ca woyeeЙ—a ЕӢ peЙ—ma a Й“ap.
2.7: ЖҒa jaahiЙ—ta lool, wa feyya Й“a, Й“a woyeeЙ—a ne : В« ЖҒi na woye Й“ii jen, Й“a gen Galile haa e ?
2.8: Wa min na nikoh po yaa nu nga Й“oo Й—ah, fu kerhee Й“a, Й“a woyee ЕӢ peЙ—mi fu Й“ap ?
2.9: Te Й“oo puloh Paarte, Medi, Elaam. RaakiЙ— Й“i puloh Mesopotami, Yudee, Kapados, Pontos, na Asi.
2.10: Raakka Й“i puloh Firisi, Pamfili, Misra na Й“aka reЙ“ Sireen ЕӢ Libi, na Й“i Й“aah ЕӢ Й“i Rom,
2.11: Й“i nikee Yawuut nga Й“a, na Й“i aas ЕӢ waasiЕӢ Yawuut ci. RaakiЙ— Й“i puloh Keret na Arabi, Й“oo jen, Й“oo Й“eЙ—i kerah Й“a, Й“a woyee ЕӢ peЙ—eem ciЕӢ Й“oo in ci yakiЙ— ci Kooh tum. В»
2.12: ЖҒa jen, Й“a feyuusa po haf ciЕӢ Й“a rangukka mak, Й“a woytiЙ—oheeЙ—a ne : В« Moo ! Inii wa tokis ye ? В»
2.13: ЖҒum njembtoheeЙ—a an : В« ЖҒa laar laar. В» Woo kiЕӢ Piyeer
2.14: Teemb ndeem Piyeer tufukka, na Apootar ci ndaЕӢkiyaah na yinooci (11) Й“inooЙ“i, a woosa ЕӢ Й—afka ne : В« ЖҠu Й“i Yawuut ci, na Й—u Й“i gen Yerusalem jen, rangsaat nof, Й—u sikЙ—uk woo ciЕӢ ngo, Й—u inah baahiЙ— ini raak.
2.15: ЖҒo' cii laarЙ—i findi Й—u liiЙ“oha, Й“oo Й“ii ЕӢ yoor-yoor dong.
2.16: Inii weЙ— Kooh woyee taamboh ЕӢ woosuuЙ—i Yowel an :
2.17: вҖң Kooh woo ne : вҖҳЕҠ mbeh ci mirndoh ЕӢ Adina, ЕӢ hey pasarohe FuuЙ—siЕӢ ngo ngaЕӢ Й“ooЙ“i jen. KuЙ“uuciЕӢ Й—u, Жҙaar na Й“itiЙ“, hey woye findi woosuuЙ—. Fiir ci hey hote in ci ЕӢ teeЙ“ Й“a te yaЙ“koociЕӢ Й—u hey ca heeЖҙe.
2.18: Ee, ЕӢ mbeh ceem, ЕӢ hey tume FuuЙ—siЕӢ ngo ЕӢ Гұaam ciЕӢ ngo, Жҙaar na Й“itiЙ“, te Й“a hey nike woosuuЙ— ciЕӢ ngo.
2.19: ЕҠ hey tume in feyohiЙ— ЕӢ Й—afki, ngaЕӢ eel ci, ЕӢ tum firnde ЕӢ ndii ЕӢ kehЖҙi : ca nikan Гұif, yongkaah na eel Й—uuku.
2.20: Nohi hey Гұuuse tuЙ—, caЙ“ni ruumind findi Гұif bala mbehiЕӢ HeЙ—i hayan, mbehi yakki hun na ndam.
2.21: Teemb ndeem yaa nu Й“eeЙ—uk HeЙ—i Й—ah, a hey mucЙ—asse. вҖҷ вҖқ
2.22: ЖҠu Й“i Israayel ci, sikЙ—ukaat ini maa hee Й—u woye : Kooh teeЙ“iЙ— Й—u ya Й“a Yeesu yiЕӢ Nasareet, ЕӢ firnde na keemaan na in feyohiЙ— laayiЙ— taamboh nga Й—e, findi Й—u inhoha.
2.23: Жіaareem faЙ—uusa ЕӢ yaah ciЕӢ Й—u, wa nikee ini Kooh inah maaГұiЙ—, a yi kooЙ—kiЙ—oha Й—aa. ЖҠu apЙ—ukiЙ— Й—e ЕӢ daaЖҙi a daaЖҙu ЕӢ kurwaa taamboh ЕӢ Й“i inahЙ—i waasiЕӢ Kooh.
2.24: Waaye Kooh hultiЙ—iЙ— Й—e, a kooЙ—ohha Й—e ЕӢ miskiЙ— ciЕӢ kakaan. Laam kakaan ki mineeЙ—i Й—e amb.
2.25: Dawuuda sah woyiЙ— ЕӢ Yeesu an : вҖң ЕҠ genangeen hot HeЙ—i ЕӢ fikiiso. A yii ЕӢ serooso ne ЕӢ neЖҙЖҙohuu.
2.26: WeЙ— tah keeГұiЕӢ ngo soosiЙ—, Жҙeek ci na pulohe ЕӢ nguЙ“iЕӢ ngo, teeЙ“ohiЙ— sum kiЕӢ ngo. Po ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ ruy-ruyaЕӢ ngo sah, faaniЕӢ ngo hey iЙ—siЙ—ke ЕӢ ooluk.
2.27: Kooh fu, fu faЙ—anЙ—i so muk ЕӢ Jaanim te fu faЙ—anЙ—i ГұaamiЕӢ Й—a yi fu min ooluk, a nopee ЕӢ ruy-ruy.
2.28: Fu teeЙ“iЙ— to waas ciЕӢ kipes ki, fu hey yo riifЙ—e na sum ЕӢ nikiЕӢ Й—a ndii. вҖқ В»
2.29: Piyeer Й“aatta nga ne : В« ЖҒaah ciЕӢ ngo, ЕӢ miniЙ— Й—u woo hooliЙ— ЕӢ ini kaЙ— ЕӢ caac Й“oo Dawuuda : A kaaniЙ—, a uumbuuЙ— te ruy-ruyiЕӢ Й—e ris na Й“oo ndii poyi.
2.30: Dawuuda nikee buur, a nikka woosuuЙ—. A inheen ne Kooh gapeen Й—e te a giГұiЙ—ta Й—e ne a hey name tum yino ЕӢ Й“i rimkohan nga Й—e buuri laman Й—e.
2.31: Dawuuda hoteen ini na haye, weЙ— tahee Й—e woo ЕӢ ini kaЙ— ЕӢ hultiЕӢ MucЙ—ohi Gapohse ne вҖң Kooh faЙ—anЙ—i yeem ЕӢ Jaanim, faaniЕӢ Й—e nopanЙ—i ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ ruy-ruy. вҖқ
2.32: Yeesu yeem, Kooh hultiЙ—iЙ— Й—e, Й“oo jen, Й“oo miniЙ— Й—u seede'iЙ— ineem.
2.33: Kooh Baabi meeЙ“iЙ— Й—e po ЕӢ ГұaahmiЕӢ Й—e, a eЙ—ta Й—e FuuЙ—si Hoolohngaani gapohse, Yeesu ruhsiЙ—ta FuuЙ—si nga Й“oo. Ineem weЙ— Й—u na hote, Й—u kerhee wa wii.
2.34: Dawuuda rapЙ—i ЕӢ Eel ci, moona a yi woo ne : вҖң HeЙ—i woyiЙ— HeЙ— to ne : вҖҳЖҒoofa ЕӢ ГұaahmiЕӢ ngo,
2.35: po mbaЙ—na ЕӢ folan Й“i sang Й—a, fu tum Й“a degoha kot. вҖҷ вҖқ
2.36: Kon Й—u Israayel ci jen inhaat wooriЙ— ne : Yeesu yi Й—u daaЖҙee ЕӢ kurwaa, a yi Kooh tum HeЙ—i, tummba Й—e MucЙ—ohi a gapohe. В»
2.37: Wa Й“ooЙ“a kerah ineem, keeГұ ciЕӢ Й“a reehha, Й“a woosa Piyeer na Apootar ci tas ne : В« ЖҒaah ci, Й“oo joy na tum ? В»
2.38: Piyeer loffa Й“a ne : В« ЖҒoЖҙsohaat pesohaaЙ— ! Yaa nu nga Й—u Й—ah Й“oktukaat ЕӢ tiikiЕӢ Yeesu Kiristaa ne Kooh Й—aas Й—u bakaaЙ— ciЕӢ Й—u te a eЙ— Й—u FuuЙ—si Hoolohngaani.
2.39: Laam gapohiЕӢ Kooh wa wuu Й—u na Й“i rimkohan nga Й—u ; wa wuu Й“i us ndii, wa wuu Й“i Kooh HeЙ— Й“oo na hee Й“eeЙ—ke nga Й—e, ЕӢ findi Й“a hend jen. В»
2.40: Piyeer taalndiЙ—ta woytoheeЙ—a Й“a na Й“i woo laayiЙ—, a ГұaaheeЙ—a Й“a an : В« TeyЙ—ukaat mucЙ—u, usaat Й“ooЙ“i woti, Й“a baahЙ—i. В»
2.41: ЖҒi teyЙ—uk woo kiЕӢ Й—e Й“oktuusa. MbaЙ—i, Й“i Й“aatuk ЕӢ kosiЙ— ci nikee ЕӢ Й“ak junni-kaahay (3000). Kipes kiЕӢ kosiЙ— ci Й—eЙ“
2.42: ЖҒa genee ЕӢ sikЙ—uk jangЙ—ohiЕӢ Apootar ci. ЖҒa jen Й“a mandee na Й“ooЙ“i taambЙ—oh, Й“a meeЙ—ta Гұam yino, Й“a meeЙ—ta hun Й“a kiimee Kooh.
2.43: Kooh taambohha ЕӢ Apootar ci a tumeeЙ—a in feyohiЙ— laayiЙ— na Й“i keemaan ; Й“ooЙ“a jen, yaa nu nga Й—ah feyuusa.
2.44: KosiЙ— ca jen nikka yino, Й“a Й“aahha in ca Й“a raakee jen.
2.45: ЖҒa tooneeЙ—a kahan caЕӢ Й“a na raak-raak caЕӢ Й“a, Й“a paysohha kopora ЕӢ harmban Й“a, yaa nu nga eЙ—uusa in hend na ini a etoh.
2.46: Kooh-nu-wiis, Й“a meeЙ— coh ЕӢ Kahan Kooh ; Й“a hunnda, Й“a Й“aaheeЙ—a kaГұam ЕӢ kahan caЕӢ Й“a, Й“a ГұameeЙ—a kaГұam caЕӢ Й“a na keeГұ soosiЙ— na eЙ—ef.
2.47: ЖҒa yakЙ—eeЙ—a Kooh, Й“ooЙ“a jen neЙ“uusa nga Й“a. Kooh-nu-wiis Й—ah, HeЙ—i Й“aat Й“a mucЙ—uuЙ— wiiriis.

3.1: Wa raakka mbeh, Piyeer na SaaЕӢ kaЙ—ta kiima Kooh ЕӢ Kahan Kooh. Wa nikee jamanooniЕӢ kiimi na tumse ЕӢ Й“ak noh soos.
3.2: Waam raak Й“ooЙ“a Й“ayeeЙ—a Жҙaar lafГұiЙ— nga, a rimuk rimuk na lafГұiЕӢ Й—e. Mbeh nu nik, a na Й“ayse Й“ayu, a degu ЕӢ sero buntaana na woyse "Buntaani-MoЙ—ohngaani" ne a min yalwaan ЕӢ Й“ooЙ“i na aase ЕӢ Kahan Kooh.
3.3: Wi a hot Piyeer na SaaЕӢ heeЙ—a aase, a meekissa Й“a yalwaan.
3.4: Piyeer na SaaЕӢ jen iiЖҙeeЙ—a Й—e, Piyeer woosa Й—e ne : В« Marka Й“oo ! В»
3.5: A markeeЙ—a Й“a baahiЙ—, a ammba ne a hey rahse in nga Й“a.
3.6: Piyeer woosa Й—e ne : В« ЕҠ raakЙ—i urus ЕӢ raakЙ—i haalis, waaye ini ЕӢ raak, ЕӢ hey Й—a wa one : ЕҠ tiikiЕӢ Yeesu Kiristaa yiЕӢ Nasareet, kurka fu tiind ! В»
3.7: A ammba Й—e ЕӢ yaah-Гұaahum, a kurkiЙ—ta Й—e, ЕӢ Й—iska Й—iska kot ciЕӢ Й—e nikka ndengiЙ— tir.
3.8: A kurukka japit, a tufukka, a tiindeeЙ—a. A hunnda na Й“a, a aassa Kahan Kooh, a tiindeeЙ—a, a gongtiЙ—keeЙ—a, a yakЙ—eeЙ—a Kooh.
3.9: ЖҒooЙ“a jen hotta Й—e tiindeeЙ—a, a gidmeeЙ—a Kooh.
3.10: ЖҒa inhissa Й—e ne a yi meeЙ— Й“oof, a yalwaanee ЕӢ buntaana na woyse "moЙ—ohngaani" ЕӢ Kahan Kooh, weЙ— Й“a jaahЙ—oh, Й“a feyuusa ЕӢ ini raak. Woo kiЕӢ Piyeer
3.11: Жіaara lafГұee nikka ЕӢoЙ—iЙ— ЕӢ Piyeer na SaaЕӢ, Й“ooЙ“a jen feyuusa, Й“a faЙ—sukka Й—iska Й“i Piyeer nikee ЕӢ Й—iska na woyse PerngaЕӢ-Suleymaan ngaЕӢ Kahan Kooh.
3.12: Wa Piyeer hot ineem, a woosa mboolnda ne : В« Israayel ci, wa ye tah Й—u feyuusa ЕӢ inii, wa ye tah Й—u markee Й“oo ? ЖҠu liiЙ“ ne wa hatiliЕӢ Й“oo, wala nupi Й“oo nup Kooh tah Жҙaarii wir po a tiinde e ?
3.13: KoohiЕӢ Ibrahiima na Isaahha na YaЕӢhooЙ“a, KoohiЕӢ caac ciЕӢ Й“oo, teeЙ“ohiЙ— yaki surgaaniЕӢ Й—e Yeesu yak. Te e Й—u eЙ—oh Й—e, Й—u taasukka Й—e ЕӢ fiki Pilaat yi tufkee ЕӢ kot faЙ—is Й—e.
3.14: ЖҠu taaskiЙ— Yi hool wuu Kooh te a yurahha, Й—u kiimmba Pilaat ne, Й—u faЙ—siЙ—u apoh Й“o'.
3.15: ЖҠu apЙ—ukiЙ— HeЙ— kipes ki, waaye Kooh hultiЙ—iЙ— Й—e. ЖҒoo nak, Й“oo miniЙ— seede ineem.
3.16: Kosi Й“oo kos Yeesu, weЙ— tah woo ki Й“oo woo ЕӢ tiikiЕӢ Й—e onnda Жҙaari Й—u na hote yii te Й—u inahha Й—e, hatil po a minnda tufuk ndengiЙ—. E tiikiЕӢ Yeesu, na kosi puloh nga Й—e, on Жҙaari wir jameet findi Й—u hotoha an.
3.17: ЖҠiski wa nik ndii Й“aah ciЕӢ ngo, ЕӢ inhiЙ— ne Й—u tum Yeesu ineem ЕӢ inhaaЙ—i, Й—u na kilifaaciЕӢ Й—u.
3.18: Waaye Kooh raakiЙ—ta ineem ne ini a woyee maaГұiЙ— taamboh ЕӢ woo ciЕӢ woosuuЙ— ci jen raak, ne MucЙ—ohi a gapohee joyiЙ— raak miskiЙ—.
3.19: Mbaa Й“oЖҙsohaat pesohaaЙ—, Й—u wiiruk ЕӢ Kooh ne a moos bakaaЙ— ciЕӢ Й—u.
3.20: ЕҠ ineem, HeЙ— Й“oo hey Й—u one Й“i jamano iЙ—siЙ—koha, a woosoh Й—u MucЙ—ohi a tanЙ—ee Й—u maaГұiЙ—, Yeesu.
3.21: Waaye Й—iski wa nik, Eel ci joyiЙ— daliЙ— Yeesu po jamanooni in ci jen doknohsan as, findi Kooh woyoha maaГұiЙ— taamboh ЕӢ woo ciЕӢ woosuuЙ— ciЕӢ Й—e hooliЙ— ci.
3.22: Laam Musaa woyeen ne : вҖң HeЙ—i, KoohiЕӢ Й—u, hey Й—u woosohe WoosuuЙ— findiiso, a pulohan cuuЙ“iЕӢ Й—u, sikЙ—ukaat in ci a woyan Й—u jen.
3.23: Te Й“o' nu sikЙ—ukЙ—i WoosuuЙ—eem Й—ah, a hey pulЙ—asse ЕӢ cuuЙ“iЕӢ Kooh, a apu. вҖқ
3.24: WoosuuЙ— ci woo jen, ina amboh ЕӢ Samuwel po Й“i taamb nga Й—e, findi Й“a hend jen, namiЙ— yegЙ—oh mbeh ci Й“oo na pese cii.
3.25: E Й—u lam woosuuЙ— ceem, ambtiЙ—ohi Kooh tufkiЙ—ee na caac ciЕӢ Й—u, wa wuu Й—u wi a woyee Ibrahiima ne : вҖң ЕҠ hey barke'Й—e cuuЙ“ ciЕӢ kehЖҙi jen taamboh ЕӢ Й“i na hee rimkohe nga Й—a. вҖқ
3.26: Kooh koc woos surgaaniЕӢ Й—e nga Й—u, a woosiЙ— Й—e ne a barke'iЙ— Й—u, a tum po yaa nu nga Й—u Й—ah eЙ— finho tumohaaЙ— ciЕӢ Й—e moЙ—aaЙ—iici. В»

4.1: Wa Piyeer na SaaЕӢ woyee na Й“ooЙ“a, weЙ— seeЖҙkiЙ—oh caЕӢ waasiЕӢMusaa hunoh na Жҙaara adgohee Й“ooЙ“a niiЙ—ee Kahan Kooh, na Й“i Sadusen , Й“a hayya.
4.2: ЖҒa ayrukka Piyeer na SaaЕӢ ЕӢ ini Й“eem jangЙ—ee Й“ooЙ“a, woyeeЙ—a Й“a ne Yeesu hultiЙ— te Й“a ndengЙ—eeЙ—a ne kaaniЙ— ci hey hulte.
4.3: ЖҒa ammba Й“a, Й“a taЖҙohaahha Й“a sagu hooЙ“a Kooh hooЙ“e.
4.4: Waaye raak laayiЙ— ЕӢ Й“i kerhee jangЙ—ohiЕӢ Apootar ci kosiЙ—. ЖҒi kosee jen, Жҙaar ci dong reyeen junni-yatuus (5000).
4.5: Wa Kooh wiis, weЙ— kilifaaca na yakak ca na jangЙ—ohoh caЕӢ waasiЕӢ Musaa, Й“i nikee ЕӢ Yerusalem cohoh.
4.6: Hannas seeЖҙkiЙ—oha yakka nikee nga na Kayif na SaaЕӢ na Aleksaandar na Й“i kahan seeЖҙkiЙ—oha yakka jen.
4.7: ЖҒa nakohha komu Piyeer na SaaЕӢ ЕӢ leerooЙ“a, Й“a meekissa Й“a ne : В« Ini Й—u haЙ“iЙ— wii, Й—u haЙ“Й—oha winde hatil ? ЖҠu tuma ЕӢ tiikiЕӢ ya Й“a ? В»
4.8: ЕҠ ndeem, Piyeer riiffa na FuuЙ—si Hoolohngaani, a woosa Й“a ne : В« ЖҠu Й“i kilifaaciЕӢ cuuЙ“i, na yakak ci,
4.9: nik ne Й“oo na meeksasse woti, ini baahiЙ—i Й“oo tumiЙ— Й“o' lafГұiЙ—, na findi a wirЙ—ohu Й—ah,
4.10: Й—u jen, na Israayel ci findi Й“a hend jen inhaat ne Й“oo taamboh ЕӢ tiikiЕӢ Yeesu Kiristaa yiЕӢ Nasareet ; saguuce weЙ— tah Жҙaarii tufkiЙ— moЙ—oЙ— ЕӢ fikiiЙ—u. Yeesu yeem, e Й—u daaЖҙ Й—e ЕӢ kurwaa, waaye Kooh hultiЙ—iЙ— Й—e.
4.11: Fiis ci HooliЙ— ci woo ЕӢ a yi ne : вҖң Atoh fi Й—u Й“i taЙ“ahoh ci mbete mirndohiЙ— nik atoh fi amb taЙ“ahi. вҖқ
4.12: Ali Й“o' minЙ—i muc, ne wa taambohЙ—i ЕӢ Yeesu Й—ah. ЕҠ Adina jen Kooh eЙ—oh Й—e dong ne tiikiЕӢ Й—e min mucЙ—ohu. В»
4.13: Wa Й“a hot kaaГұi Piyeer na SaaЕӢ kaaГұ ini Й“a woye, Й“a feyuusa, laam Й“a inah Й“a Й“o' an rek, Й“o' jangaaЙ—i. ЖҒa inhissa ne Й“a meeЙ— hun na Yeesu.
4.14: Waaye hota Й“a hotee Жҙaara wirЙ—u tufkiЙ— ЕӢ sero Apootar ci kanak ci, tahha po Й“a raakЙ—i woyaah.
4.15: ЖҒa woosa Piyeer na SaaЕӢ ne Й“a pulaat ЕӢ atte'ohaana, atte'oh ca tassa nga ne Й“a hotoh ЕӢ harmban Й“a.
4.16: ЖҒa woosa ne : В« ЖҒoo tuman ЖҙaaЙ“ii na ? ЖҒa haЙ“Й—iЙ— keemaan hooliЙ— te Й“i Yerusalem jen inhiЙ—a, Й“oo minЙ—aa taas.
4.17: Waaye wa joyЙ—i Й“aat pasarkoh ЕӢ harmban Й“ooЙ“i, kon Й“oo huflukaat Й“a po Й“a woyissuu na ali Й“o' ЕӢ ini kaЙ— ЕӢ tiikiЕӢ Жҙaareem. В»
4.18: ЖҒa Й“eeЙ—ukka Piyeer na SaaЕӢ, Й“a sangohha Й“a keeh-keeh ne Й“a kinaat woyis wala Й“a jangЙ—ohee ЕӢ tiikiЕӢ Yeesu.
4.19: Waaye Piyeer na SaaЕӢ loffa Й“a ne : В« Wa ye weЙ— yurah ЕӢ has ciЕӢ Kooh, kerhiЙ— Й—u wala kerhiЙ— Kooh ? Atte'aat !
4.20: Ini kaЙ— nga Й“oo, Й“oo minЙ—i Й—ek ini Й“oo hot, kerahhaa. В»
4.21: Atte'oh ca Й“aatta hufluk Piyeer na SaaЕӢ, Й“a faЙ—issa Й“a, Й“a raakeeЙ—i waas nga Й“a ne Й“a tum Й“a miskiЙ— laam Й“ooЙ“a jen nikee yakЙ—eeЙ—a Kooh ЕӢ ini raakee weem.
4.22: Жіaara wirЙ—assee wirЙ—a feyohЙ—a uupЙ—een kiis ndaЕӢkiyaah-nikiis (40). KosiЙ— ci kiimiЙ— Kooh
4.23: Wa Piyeer na SaaЕӢ faЙ—su, Й“a kaЙ—ta ЕӢ huntoh caЕӢ Й“a, Й“a naandsukka Й“a in ca kilifaacaЕӢ seeЖҙkiЙ—oh ca na yakak ca woo Й“a jen.
4.24: Wa Й“a kerah ineem, Й“a jen Й“a hunnda Й“a kiimeeЙ—a Kooh an : В« HeЙ— Й“oo, a fu fer Eel ci na kehЖҙi na cookmi na in ci nik nga ca jen.
4.25: A fu eЙ— Dawuuda FuuЙ—si Hoolohngaani, Dawuuda, yi caaciЕӢ Й“oo, surgaaniЕӢ Й—a. Fu taambohha nga Й—e, fu woosa ne : вҖң Wa ye tah cuuЙ“ ci Й—uuЙ—e ? Wa ye tah Й“ooЙ“i waakohee ne Й“a tum in baahaaЙ—i ЕӢ Й“arang Й“arang ?
4.26: Buur ciЕӢ kehЖҙi na kooЙ—kiЙ—e hiГұoh, Й“i raak hatil hun ne Й“a hiГұoh na HeЙ— Й“oo na buuri a tufkiЙ—. вҖқ
4.27: Laam wa keeh ne Herod Antipas na Ponse Pilaat ambsukohiЙ— ЕӢ kur-taahii, Й“a hunnda na cuuЙ“ ci cinooci na Israayel ci jen ne Й“a hiГұoh Yeesu, surgaaniЕӢ Й—a hooliЙ—i, yi fu tufkiЙ—.
4.28: ЖҒa na tume in ci fu kooЙ—kiЙ—ee maaГұiЙ— ЕӢ hatiliЕӢ Й—a, ЕӢ ini neЙ“ Й—a.
4.29: ЖҠiski wa nik ndii, HeЙ— Й“oo, marka findi Й“a na huflukohee Й“oo. Ona Й“oo, Й“i Гұaam ciЕӢ Й—a, Й“oo yegЙ—oh woo kiЕӢ Й—a te Й“oo neЖҙЖҙohuu nga.
4.30: RaЙ—sa hatiliЕӢ yaahiЕӢ Й—a ne wir raak na Й“i firnde na keemaan ЕӢ tiikiЕӢ Yeesu surgaaniЕӢ Й—a hooliЙ—i. В»
4.31: Wa Й“a Жҙut kiim Kooh, Й—iska Й“a cohee yoondeeЙ—a. ЖҒa jen, Й“a riiffa na FuuЙ—si Hoolohngaani, Й“a yegЙ—oheeЙ—a woo kiЕӢ Kooh te Й“a neЖҙЖҙoheeЙ—i nga. KosiЙ— ca Й“aahiЙ— in caЕӢ Й“a
4.32: ЖҒooЙ“a kosee jen hunnda, nikka yino, Й“eЙ— Й“aahee keeГұ yino na liiЙ“ohaaЙ—. Ali Й“o' woyeeЙ—i nga Й“a ne raak-raakiЕӢ Й—e, a yi raaka kiik ce, waaye Й“a ambsohee ambsoh in caЕӢ Й“a jen yino.
4.33: Apootar ci seede'eeЙ—a na hatil keeh-keeh, ne HeЙ— Й“oo Yeesu hultiЙ—, te Kooh baahoheeЙ—a Й“a keeh-keeh yaa nu nga Й—ah.
4.34: Ali Й“o' nga Й“a ГұakeeЙ—i. ЖҒi raakee yohon na kahan tooneeЙ—a ca, Й“a Й“ayya candooma,
4.35: Й“a deggaa ЕӢ yaah ciЕӢ Apootar ci, wa paysohuusa, yaa nu nga eЙ—uusa in hend na ini a etoh.
4.36: Raakeen Жҙaar nga Й“a teeku Suseef, a Й“aahee ЕӢ Lewiici, a nikee Й“o' Siipar. Apootar ci teekee Й—e Barnabaas, wa tokis "Жҙaari na Гұaahe Й“ooЙ“i".
4.37: A toonnda yohon ce, a Й“ayya kopora, a deggaa ЕӢ yaah ciЕӢ Apootar ci.

5.1: Waaye wa raakeen Жҙaar teeku AnaГұaas na Й“itiice Safiira. Raakka yohni Й“a toon.
5.2: Жіaara Й—aakka Й“ak ЕӢ kopora, Й“itiice nammba hun na Й—e ЕӢ ineem, ini tas ЕӢ kopora a Й“ayyaa, a deggaa ЕӢ yaah ciЕӢ Apootar ci.
5.3: Piyeer woosa Й—e ne : В« AnaГұaas, wa ye tah fu faЙ—ta Seytaani a riiffa keeГұiЕӢ Й—a ? Po fu leyee FuuЙ—si Hoolohngaani ЕӢ Й—asЙ—i fu Й—asiЙ— Й“ak ngaЕӢ kopori fu toonoh yohon fu.
5.4: Wi fu toonohЙ—aa, wa nikee wuu fu haa e ? Fu mineena sang toon, wala wi fu toona, kopori nikee wuu fu, fu mineen tum ini neЙ“ Й—a naa. Fu liiЙ“oh tum in mand an na ЕӢ keeГұiЕӢ Й—a ? Fu lee Й“o' haa, fu lee Kooh ! В»
5.5: Wa AnaГұaas kerah woo ceem, a keennda, a kaannda. ЖҒooЙ“a kerhee naandsukiЕӢ wa jen neЖҙЖҙohha keeh-keeh.
5.6: Komaakca fiir ca hayya, Й“a muurra fiЙ—aafa, Й“a Й“ayyaa ne Й“a uumb Й—e.
5.7: Wa degga ini ree wahtu kaahay Й“itiice aassa ; a inheeЙ—i ini raak.
5.8: Piyeer meekissa Й—e ne : В« Woyaa so, Й—u toonoh kehЖҙi candoomii e ? В» A loffa ne : В« Ee, Й“oo toonoha ineem. В»
5.9: Piyeer woosa Й—e ne : В« ЖҠu min kerhiЙ—oh na ne Й—u markisuk FuuЙ—siЕӢ HeЙ— Й“oo ? Kot ci fu kerah ЕӢ yahndeeri, e Й“ooЙ“i puloh uumba Жҙaar fu ; Й“a hey Й—a name Й“ay. В»
5.10: ЕҠ saasi saasi, a keennda ЕӢ kot ciЕӢ Piyeer, a kaannda. Komaakca fiir ca aassa, Й“a hotta ne a kaaniЙ—, Й“a Й“ayya Й—e, Й“a uummba Й—e ЕӢ sero Жҙaar ce.
5.11: ЖҒi Janguuna jen na Й“ooЙ“a kerah ina raak jen neЖҙЖҙohha keeh-keeh. Apootar ca tumiЙ— in feyohiЙ— laayiЙ—
5.12: Kooh taambohha ЕӢ Apootar ci, a tumeeЙ—a in feyohiЙ— na keemaan laayiЙ—, Й“ooЙ“a jen hoteeЙ—a nga. KosiЙ— ca jen ЕӢ findi Й“a hend, Й“a meeЙ— meeЙ— coh ЕӢ bayaalaЕӢ Kahan Kooh, ЕӢ PerngaЕӢ-Suleymaan.
5.13: Ali Й“o' wiiriis kaaГұeeЙ—i kaЙ— nga Й“a, waaye Й“ooЙ“a jen woyee in baahiЙ— nga Й“a.
5.14: ЖҒooЙ“a kosee HeЙ—i uupeeЙ—a nga uup laay Жҙaar na Й“itiЙ“, Й“a Й“aatuusa ЕӢ mboolndaЕӢ kosiЙ— ca.
5.15: E keemaan ceem tah kosaayiЙ— ca sah pulЙ—asseeЙ—a ЕӢ kahan ca, Й“a degseeЙ—a ЕӢ mbeeddaaca, ngaЕӢ fiЖҙaang wala ЕӢ basang ne Piyeer taamb Й—ah, findi wa min mand Й—ah, raak Й“i saangniЕӢ Й—e laalan.
5.16: ЖҒo' laayiЙ— nameeЙ—a puloh kur ca wilee Yerusalem, Й“a Й“ayeeЙ—a kosaayiЙ— ca na Й“ooЙ“a jiini ambe, Й“a jen Й“a wirЙ—asseeЙ—a. AmbuukaЕӢ Apootar ca
5.17: ЕҠ ineem, seeЖҙkiЙ—oha yakka na Й“ooЙ“a nikee na Й—e jen, Й“eЙ— Й“a Sadusen ca, Й“a siissa Apootar ca, Й“a tufukka ЕӢ kot tum in ;
5.18: Й“a ammba Apootar ci Й“a taЖҙca Й“a ЕӢ kasoona.
5.19: Waaye ЕӢ weka, malaaka HeЙ— Й“oo rangissa buntaacaЕӢ wa, a puliЙ—ta Й“a, a woosa Й“a ne :
5.20: В« KaЙ—aat Kahan Kooh, Й—u woo Й“ooЙ“a woo ciЕӢ kipes ki asi wii. В»
5.21: Apootar ci kerhiЙ—ta Й—e, na Й“aaЙ“a teel Й“a kaЙ—ta Kahan Kooh Й“a jangЙ—oheeЙ—a. SeeЖҙkiЙ—oha yakka raakka coh na Й“ooЙ“a na hune na Й—e, Й“a Й“eeЙ—ukka saangnaЕӢ yakak caЕӢ Israayel jen, Й“a woossa Й“i Й“o' ne Й“a kaЙ— Й“aya Apootar ca ЕӢ kasoona.
5.22: Dag ca kaЙ—ta kasoona waaye Й“a raakЙ—i Й“a nga. ЖҒa dokukka, Й“a woosa ina Й“a Й“ayoh nga an :
5.23: В« ЖҒoo raak kasoona ranguuЙ— ndengiЙ— te niiЙ—oh ca nikee nga ЕӢ fiki yahndeera, waaye wi Й“oo rangis, Й“oo hotЙ—i ali Й“o' nga Й“a ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙa. В»
5.24: Wa kilifaanaЕӢ dag ca niiЙ—ee Kahan Kooh kerah woo keem, a yi na kilifaacaЕӢ seeЖҙkiЙ—oh ca, Й“a feyuusa, Й“a liiЙ“eeЙ—a ini rahas Apootar ci na findi wa mirndohan.
5.25: ЕҠ ineem Жҙaar hayya woosa Й“a ne : В« ЖіaaЙ“i Й—u taЖҙee ЕӢ kasoona, Й“a Й—aa ЕӢ Kahan Kooh na jangЙ—e Й“ooЙ“a. В»
5.26: WeЙ— kilifaanaЕӢ dag ca hunoh na Й“i dag, Й“a kaЙ—ta, Й“a Й“ayya Й“a Й“ay moЙ—oЙ—, Й“a kaaГұeeЙ—i Й“a tum in, sagu neЖҙЖҙoh ne mboolnda tap Й“a atoh.
5.27: Wa Й“a Й“ay Й“a, Й“a tufkiЙ—ta Й“a ЕӢ fiki saangnaЕӢ yakak ca, seeЖҙkiЙ—oha yakka woosa Й“a ne :
5.28: В« ЖҒoo sangoheeЙ—i Й—u keeh-keeh ne kinaat jangЙ—ohis ЕӢ tiikiЕӢ Жҙaareem e ? WeЙ—Й—i, Й—u riifЙ—iЙ— Yerusalem jen na jangЙ—ohiЕӢ Й—u, Й“aatta nga, Й—u waaЙ— Й“oo raan kakaan kiЕӢ Жҙaareem ! В»
5.29: Piyeer na Apootar ci Й“inooЙ“i loffa ne : В« KerhiЙ— Kooh weЙ— ngisoh kerhiЙ— Й“ooЙ“i.
5.30: KoohiЕӢ caac ciЕӢ Й“oo hultiЙ—iЙ— Yeesu yi Й—u ap ЕӢ daaЖҙi Й—u daaЖҙ Й—e ЕӢ kurwaa.
5.31: Kooh meeЙ“iЙ— Й—e, po ЕӢ ГұaahmiЕӢ Й—e, a tummba Й—e adgohoh na MucЙ—oh ne a on Israayel ci Й“a Й“oЖҙsoh pesohaaЙ—, Й“a Й—aasu bakaaЙ— ciЕӢ Й“a.
5.32: ЖҒoo nak, Й“oo seede ngaЕӢ in ceem, Й“oo na FuuЙ—si Hoolohngaani Kooh eЙ— Й“i kerhiЙ— Й—e. В»
5.33: Woo ceem ayrukiЙ—ta Й“ooЙ“aЕӢ saangna po Й“a heeЙ—a pooke, Й“a waaЙ—ta ap Apootar ci.
5.34: Waaye Farisen nikeen ngaЕӢ saangnaЕӢ yakak ca, a teeku Gamaliyel, a nikee jangЙ—ohoh ЕӢ waasiЕӢMusaa, Й“ooЙ“a jen eЙ—een Й—e cir. A kurukka, a nakohha ne Apootar ci pulЙ—u Жҙissuut.
5.35: Жіutta a woosa Й“ooЙ“a ne : В« ЖҒaah ci, Й—u Й“i Israayel ci, wortukaat ini Й—u na hee tume ЖҙaaЙ“ii.
5.36: MaaГұaaЙ—i Жҙaar teeku Tedaas hayiЙ—, a tummba haf ce Й“o' yakak, Й“ooЙ“i ГұaakЙ—ee Й—e nikee ЕӢ Й“ak teemet-nikiis (400). Waaye wi a apu, Й“i ГұaakЙ—ee Й—e jen pasarkohha, Й“o' kerhisЙ—i Й“a.
5.37: Wa a coot, Yudaa yi genee Galile nammba hay, wa nikee ЕӢ jamanoona Й“ooЙ“iЕӢ kur ki kindse. A nammba nook Й“o' laayiЙ—, Й“a ГұaakiЙ—ta Й—e. Wi a kaan, Й“ooЙ“i ГұaakЙ—ee Й—e jen pasarkohha.
5.38: ЖҠiski wa nik, Гұam na woyee Й—u ne : Kinaat rahsoh tus na ЖҙaaЙ“ii, faЙ—aat Й“a Й“a coot. Nik ne ini tah Й“a kuruk na ini Й“a na tume puloh ЕӢ Й“o' Й—ah, wa hey yahrukohe.
5.39: Waaye nik ne wa puloh ЕӢ Kooh Й—ah, Й—u minanЙ—aa yahroh. Wa miniЙ— Й—u Й“ek sah, hiГұoh na Kooh. Wortukaat ineem ! В» Atte'oh ca jen hunnda na Й—e.
5.40: ЖҒa Й“eeЙ—ukka Apootar ci, Й“a laЙ“Й—ukka Й“a. ЖҒa woosa Й“a ne Й“a kinaat woyis ЕӢ tiikiЕӢ Yeesu ; Жҙutta Й“a faЙ—ta Й“a ne Й“a coot.
5.41: Apootar ci pulohha saangna, Й“a nikka sumoh na sumoh, ЕӢ ini Kooh attee Й“a ne Й“a yeyyoo'iЙ— ЖҙissuutЙ—u sagu tiikiЕӢ Yeesu.
5.42: Kooh-nu-wiis, Й“a meeЙ—ta kaЙ— Kahan Kooh na kahan ca cinooca, Й“a taalndiЙ—ta, Й“a jangЙ—oheeЙ—a, Й“a woyeeЙ—a YegЙ—ohiЕӢ Muci, ЕӢ ini kaЙ— ЕӢ Yeesu, MucЙ—ohi Gapohse.

6.1: ЕҠ jamanoocaam, taalubeeca Й“aatkeeЙ—a Й“aatuk, ЕӢ ineem Yawuut ca woyee gerek lahtukeeЙ—a ЕӢ Й“a woyee heber. ЖҒa lahtukee ne, Й“itiЙ“ ca Жҙaar caЕӢ Й“a kaan te Й“a Й“aahha nga Й“a, meeЙ— meeЙ— sagankohu ЕӢ paysoh ca meeЙ— paysohu Kooh-nu-wiis.
6.2: Wa Apootar ci ndaЕӢkiyaah na kanak ci (12) keraha, Й“a cohЙ—ohha taalubeeca jen, Й“a woosa Й“a ne : В« Wa moЙ—Й—i Й“oo faЙ— jangЙ—ohiЕӢ woo kiЕӢ Kooh, Й“oo taambkohee paysoh kaГұam.
6.3: Kon, Й“aah ciЕӢ Й“oo, kooЙ—aat ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ Й—u Жҙaar yasna-kanak Й“i raak seede moЙ—iЙ—, riiffa na FuuЙ—si Hoolohngaani te Й“a raakka liiЙ“ohaaЙ— moЙ—iЙ—, Й“oo dengkoh Й“a pangkeem.
6.4: Ini kaЙ— ЕӢ Й“oo, Й“oo min taalndiЙ— yurhiЙ—koh kiimiЕӢ Kooh na pangkiЕӢ jangЙ—ohiЕӢ woo kiЕӢ Й—e. В»
6.5: ЖҒooЙ“a jen hunnda teyЙ—ukka woo keem. WeЙ— Й“a tanoh Ecen, Жҙaar kosiЙ— lool, te a riiffa na FuuЙ—si Hoolohngaani. ЖҒa tannda a yi na Filip, Porokor, Nikanoor, Timoon, Parmenaas, na Nikola ЖҙaariЕӢ AГұcos ci aasee ЕӢ waasiЕӢ Yawuut ci.
6.6: ЖҒa Й“ayya Й“ooЙ“eem ЕӢ Apootar ci, Й“eem degga Й“a yaah ciЕӢ Й“a, kiimiЙ—ta Й“a Kooh.
6.7: Woo kiЕӢ Kooh uupeeЙ—a nga uup pasarkoh, taalubeeca uupeeЙ—a nga uup laay lool ЕӢ Yerusalem. Te seeЖҙkiЙ—oh Yawuut laayiЙ— teyЙ—ukka kos Yeesu. Ecen ambuuЙ—
6.8: Kooh baahohha Ecen, a onnda Й—e hatil po a tumeeЙ—a keemaan, a teeЙ“oheeЙ—a firnde yakak ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ Й“ooЙ“a.
6.9: Waaye raakka Й“i Й“o' Й“aah ЕӢ sinaagoga teeksee " SinaagogiЕӢ Г‘aam ci faЙ—suuЙ— ci", Й“a taastiЙ—oheeЙ—a na Ecen. ЖҒooЙ“eem nikee Yawuut, Й“a pulohee Sireen na Aleksandiri, Й“um pulohha Silisi na Asi.
6.10: Waaye Й“a mineeЙ—i Й—e Й“ur, laam FuuЙ—si Hoolohngaani oneen Й—e liiЙ“ohaaЙ— moЙ—iЙ— po a minnda woo baahiЙ—.
6.11: ЕҠ ndeem, Й“a wirinnda Й“i Й“o' ne Й“a woo ne : В« ЖҒoo kerhiЙ— Ecen woyeeЙ—a in moЙ—aaЙ—i ЕӢ Musaa na Kooh. В»
6.12: ЖҒa yopoh Й“ooЙ“a na yakak ca na jangЙ—ohoh caЕӢ waasiЕӢ Musaa Й—aa ; Й“eem keennda Ecen, Й“a ammba Й—e, Й“a Й“ayya Й—e ЕӢ saangnaЕӢ yakak caЕӢ Israayel.
6.13: ЖҒa Й“ayya Й“i seede leyoh, Й“eem woyeeЙ—a ne : В« Жіaarii na kurkeeЙ—i ЕӢ woo woo moЙ—aaЙ—i ЕӢ ini kaЙ— ЕӢ Kahan Kooh na waasiЕӢ Musaa.
6.14: ЖҒoo kerhiЙ— Й—e woyeeЙ—a ne Yeesu yiЕӢ Nasareet yeem hey fole KahniЕӢ Kooh wii, a Й“oЖҙsoh mbaah ci Musaa faЙ—iЙ— Й“oo. В»
6.15: ЖҒooЙ“aЕӢ saangnaЕӢ yakak ca jen junnga ЕӢ Ecen, markeeЙ—a Й—e, Й“a hotta fikiiriЕӢ Й—e melciЙ—eeЙ—a findi fiki malaaka.

7.1: WeЙ— seeЖҙkiЙ—oha yakka meeksoh Ecen ne : В« In ci fu na yambse ca keeh e ? В»
7.2: Ecen loffa ne : В« ЖҒaah ciЕӢ ngo na baab ciЕӢ ngo, sikЙ—ukaat to. Kooh yi HeЙ— ndam, teeЙ“kiЙ— caac Й“oo Ibrahiima, waam raak Й—e ЕӢ Mesopotami bala a hayan gene ЕӢ Haaraan Й—ah.
7.3: Kooh woosa Й—e ne : вҖң FaЙ—a kur ki fu genoh, fu faЙ— Й“aah ciЕӢ Й—a ; fu kaЙ— ЕӢ kur ki maa hee Й—a teeЙ“e. вҖқ
7.4: ЕҠ ineem, Ibrahiima pulohha kur kaЕӢ Kaldeeca, a kaЙ—ta, a gennda ЕӢ Haaraan. ЕҠ finho kakaan kaЕӢ baab Й“a, Kooh haytohha Й—e ЕӢ kur ki Й—u genoh wii woti-woti.
7.5: Kooh onЙ—i Й—e ali keheЖҙ, a onЙ—i Й—e sah in hend na Й—iski a min deg kot. Waaye a gappa Й—e ne a hey Й—e one kur ki, a yi na Й“i na hee rimkohe nga Й—e ЕӢ finhooce, te moona waam raak Й—e raakЙ—i kuЙ“u ndoom.
7.6: Inii weЙ— Kooh woo Й—e : вҖң Set ciЕӢ Й—a hey nike jaambur ЕӢ kur ka Й“a raakЙ—i, Й“a tumu Гұaam nga, Й“a torhiЙ—u kiis teemet-nikiis (400). вҖқ
7.7: Waaye Kooh degga nga ne : вҖң ЕҠ hey atte'e Й“i kur ka Й“a tumohu Гұaam ЕӢ finho ineem, Й“a hey pulohe nga, Й“a hay yo Гұaamke ЕӢ ndii. вҖқ
7.8: Жіutta Kooh ambtiЙ—ohha na Ibrahiima, a eЙ—ta Й—e nguЙ—uk ne wa teeЙ“ohee ambtiЙ—oheem. Ibrahiima raakka kuЙ“u Жҙaar Isaahha, a nguЙ—ta Й—e ЕӢ mbeha yasna-kaahayЙ—oh. Isaahha nammba tum kuЙ“kiЕӢ Й—e YaЕӢhooЙ“a Й—aa, yeem nammba tum kuЙ“uuciЕӢ Й—e ndaЕӢkiyaah na kanak ci (12) Й—aa, Й“eЙ— Й“i caac ciЕӢ cuuЙ“ ciЕӢ Й“oo.
7.9: Siisa Й“eem siisee taambЙ—oh Й“a Yuusufa tahha po Й“a toonnda Й—e ne a tumsa Гұaam ЕӢ Misra. Waaye Kooh nikee na Й—e,
7.10: a pulЙ—ohha Й—e ЕӢ miskiЙ— ciЕӢ Й—e jen. Kooh tummba po a neЙ“pa Firawnaana, buuraЕӢ Misra, a nammba Й—e on liiЙ“ohaaЙ— moЙ—iЙ— ЕӢ fiki buura po yeem tummba Й—e goornooraЕӢ Misra na kilifaanaЕӢ kahan ce jen.
7.11: WeЙ— aЙ— raakoh ЕӢ kur kaЕӢ Misra jen na Kanaan. Wa misikka nga Й“a lool, po caac ciЕӢ Й“oo raakisЙ—i Гұamaah.
7.12: Wa YaЕӢhooЙ“a kerah ne bele raakiЙ— ЕӢ Misra, a woossa caac ciЕӢ Й“oo nga, wa nikka kaЙ—aЕӢ Й“a koc.
7.13: Wi Й“a kaЙ— kotaЕӢ Й“a kanakЙ—oh, Yuusufa tummba po taambЙ—oh ciЕӢ Й—e inhissa Й—e, ЕӢ ndeem Firawnaana inahha Й“i kahan Yuusufa.
7.14: Yuusufa woosohha ne baab Й“a YaЕӢhooЙ“a kaЙ—aat Й“aysa, a yi na Й“i kahan Й“a jen : Й“a nikeen Й“o' ndaЕӢkiyaah-yasna-kanak na Й“o' yatuus (75).
7.15: YaЕӢhooЙ“a kaЙ—oh Misra Й—aa ; a kaanoh nga, a yi na caac ciЕӢ Й“oo.
7.16: FiЙ—aaf caЕӢ Й“a Й“ayuusa Sisem, Й“a Й—asЙ—uusa ЕӢ ruy-ruya Ibrahiima romee na koporiЕӢ Й—e ЕӢ Й“i rimkoh Hamor ngaЕӢ Sisem.
7.17: Jamanoona Kooh hee mitЙ—ohe ina a gapee Ibrahiima nikee reЙ“eeЙ—a ; raak cuuЙ“iЕӢ Й“oo Й“aatkiЙ—, wa uupeeЙ—a uup laay ЕӢ Misra,
7.18: po findi buur wiiriis adgohoh kur ka, buureem inheeЙ—i Yuusufa.
7.19: A ГұaaГұohha cuuЙ“iЕӢ Й“oo, a tummba caac ciЕӢ Й“oo miskiЙ— po a mbetЙ—ukoheeЙ—a Й“a gooy caЕӢ Й“a ne Й“eem kaan.
7.20: Jamanooneem weЙ— Musaa raakohu, a nikka komaaki moЙ—iЙ— ЕӢ Kooh ; a taambkohseeЙ—a ЕӢ kahan baab Й“a po a raakka caЙ“in kaahay ;
7.21: wi a mbetu, kuЙ“ki Й“itЙ“iЕӢ Firawnaana parahha Й—e, a koЙ—ta Й—e findi kuЙ“uuce.
7.22: Wa kaЙ—oh Й—aa, Musaa jangЙ—uusa ki'inhiЕӢ Й“i Misra jen, a nikka Й“o' raakiЙ— hatil ЕӢ woo na tum.
7.23: Wi a raak kiis ndaЕӢkiyaah-nikiis (40) weЙ— a liiЙ“oh kaЙ— marka Й“aah ciЕӢ Й—e, Israayel ci.
7.24: A hotta Жҙaar gen Misra torhiЙ—eeЙ—a yino nga Й“a, a langЙ—oheeЙ—a Жҙaara torhiЙ—asse, a wirndukЙ—eeЙ—a Й—e, a appa ЖҙaaraЕӢ Misraaca.
7.25: A liiЙ“ee ne Й“aah ciЕӢ Й—e hey inhe ne Kooh waaЙ— taamboh nga Й—e ne a muciЙ— Й“a, waaye Й“a inheeЙ—aa.
7.26: Wa Kooh wiis, a hotta kanak ЕӢ Й“aah ciЕӢ Й—e hiГұoheeЙ—a. A waaЙ—ta Й“a kerhiЙ—ohiЙ—, a woosa Й“a ne : вҖң ЖіaaЙ“i, e Й—u Й“aah, wa ye tah Й—u hiГұohe ? вҖқ
7.27: Waaye Жҙaara torhiЙ—ohee teyЙ—ukЙ—i Musaa, a yennja Й—e, a woosa Й—e ne : вҖң Ya Й“a tum Й—a kilifaaniЕӢ Й“oo na atte'ohiЕӢ Й“oo ?
7.28: Fu waaЙ— to nam ap findi fu apoh ЖҙaariЕӢ Misraaci wotЙ“a e ? вҖқ
7.29: Wa Musaa kerah woo keem, a saandohha, a raayya ЕӢ kur kaЕӢ Majaan. A nikka ЕӢ ndaam, po a raakka kuЙ“u Жҙaar kanak nga.
7.30: Wa degga kiis ndaЕӢkiyaah-nikiis (40), malaaka teeЙ“ukka Musaa ЕӢ kehЖҙa hulangaЕӢ tangooraЕӢ Sinaay, ЕӢ jaalaЕӢ yongkaahaЕӢ kidga Жҙina gile.
7.31: Wa Musaa hot ineem, a feyuusa. A reЙ“pa ne a maraka baahiЙ—, weЙ— a kerhoh hoosooriЕӢ HeЙ— Й“oo an :
7.32: вҖң A Гұam KoohiЕӢ caac ciЕӢ Й—a, KoohiЕӢ Ibrahiima na Isaahha na YaЕӢhooЙ“a ! вҖқ Musaa tiitta po saakЙ—oheeЙ—a, a kaaГұisЙ—i marak.
7.33: HeЙ— Й“oo woosa Й—e ne : вҖң Wolsa ГұafaЙ— ciЕӢ Й—a ; Й—iski fu tufuk wa keheЖҙ hooliЙ—.
7.34: ЕҠ hotiЙ— torhiЙ—i cuuЙ“iЕӢ ngo na torhiЙ—asse ЕӢ Misra. ЕҠ kerhiЙ— iin ciЕӢ Й“a te ЕӢ ruhsiЙ— ne ЕӢ naaf Й“a. ЖҠiski wa nik, haya ЕӢ woos Й—a Misra. вҖқ
7.35: Musaa yeem, a yi Й“aah ciЕӢ Й—e taaske, Й“a woyeeЙ—a Й—e ne : вҖң Ya Й“a tum Й—a kilifa na atte'oh ? вҖқ Musaa a yi Kooh woos ne a nik kilifaani na yi na hee naafe cuuЙ“iЕӢ Й—e, taamboh ЕӢ Й“aatЙ—ohiЕӢ malaakaani teeЙ“kee Й—e ЕӢ kidga Жҙina.
7.36: A Musaa puliЙ— Israayel ci Misra. A tumiЙ— in feyohiЙ— na keemaan laayiЙ— ЕӢ kur keem, na wa Й“a huusee Cookma-Ruumnda na wa Й“a nik ЕӢ kehЖҙa hulanga kiis ndaЕӢkiyaah-nikiis (40).
7.37: A Musaa namee woo Israayel ci ne : вҖң Kooh hey Й—u woosohe WoosuuЙ— findiiso, a pulohan ЕӢ cuuЙ“iЕӢ Й—u. вҖқ
7.38: Wa Й“ooЙ“a coh ЕӢ kehЖҙa hulanga, a Musaa namee nik ЕӢ harmban caac ciЕӢ Й“oo na malaakaana woyee na Й—e ЕӢ tangooraЕӢ Sinaay. A rahassa woo ciЕӢ kipes ki, ne a eЙ— Й“oo ca.
7.39: Waaye caac ciЕӢ Й“oo waaЙ—eeЙ—i kerhiЙ— Musaa, Й“a sannga Й—e teyЙ—uk, keeГұ ciЕӢ Й“a jen nikee ЕӢ dokuk Misra.
7.40: ЖҒa kaЙ—ta ЕӢ Aaruna, Й“a woosa Й—e ne : вҖң Musaa Жҙaari pulЙ—oh Й“oo Misra yii, Й“oo inahЙ—i ini rahas Й—e. Mbaa, haЙ“Й—iЙ—a Й“oo kooh ci adgohan Й“oo. вҖқ
7.41: ЖҒa tiЙ“Й—ukka Й—oon, Й“a tummbaa koohiЕӢ Й“a, Й“a seeЖҙkeeЙ—a nataaleem. ЖҒa neЙ“uusa ЕӢ ina Й“a tiЙ“oot na yaah ciЕӢ Й“a.
7.42: ЕҠ ndeem, Kooh suungЙ—ukka Й“a, a faЙ—ta Й“a Й“a ГұaamkeeЙ—a caЙ“ni na nohi na hor ciЕӢ eel ci findi wa fiisohu ЕӢ Fiis ciЕӢ woosuuЙ— ci an : вҖң Cey cuuЙ“iЕӢ Israayel ci, Й—oopaat ca Й—u seeЖҙkee na sarah ca cinooca Й—u haЙ“Й—ee ini ree kiis ndaЕӢkiyaah-nikiis (40) ЕӢ kehЖҙa hulanga, Й—u haЙ“Й—ee ca wuu so e ?
7.43: Muk ! ЖҠu haЙ“Й—ee ca wuu so haa ! ЖҠu Й“ayndohee Й—iipaЕӢ Molok na horaЕӢ Romfa yi Й—u tum koohiЕӢ Й—u, ceЙ— nataal ci Й—u haЙ“iЙ— ne Й—u Гұaamuk ca. Ineem weЙ— tah po ЕӢ hey Й—u toore ЕӢ Й—iska uup us Babilon. вҖқ В»
7.44: Ecen taalndiЙ—ta an : В« ЕҠ kehЖҙa hulanga, caac ciЕӢ Й“oo nikee na ЖҠiipa Й—aakohsee in ca teeЙ“ohee AmbtiЙ—ohi. ЖҠiipaam haЙ“Й—ohsee findi Kooh nakohee Musaa, laam a woyee Musaa ne a haЙ“Й—aata jok findi a teeЙ“ohee Й—e wa ЕӢ nataal.
7.45: ЖҠiipeem caac ciЕӢ Й“oo taamb nga nameena lam. ЖҒa Й“ayndoheena, wa Yosuwe adgoh Й“a, ЕӢ jamanoona Й“a degoh kur ka yaah ; kur kaЕӢ cuuЙ“ ca Kooh aaГұee ЕӢ fikiiЙ“a. Wa rissa nga po ЕӢ jamanoonaЕӢ Dawuuda.
7.46: Kooh baahoheen Dawuuda, Dawuuda kiimmba Й—e ne a min taЙ“ah genoha ne Й“i kahan YaЕӢhooЙ“a Гұaamkee Й—e nga.
7.47: Waaye a kuЙ“kiЕӢ Й—e Suleymaan mirndoha taЙ“ah.
7.48: Waaye kinaat liiЙ“ keeh-keeh ne Kooh yi ЕӢ Й—afka Й—afka gen ЕӢ in ci yaah Й“o' haЙ“iЙ—. Kerhaat ini woosuuЙ—i woo, an :
7.49: вҖң HeЙ— Й“oo woo ne : вҖҳAsamaan weЙ— Й“oofohaaniЕӢ ngo, kehЖҙi nikka degoha kot ciЕӢ ngo. Kon Й—u taЙ“ahЙ—an ndo kahan mand na ? Wala winde Й—isik weЙ— ЕӢ iЙ—siЙ—kohan ?
7.50: A Гұam fer in cii jen haa e ?вҖҷ вҖқ В»
7.51: Ecen marakka Й“a woosa Й“a ne : В« ЖҠu ndeng ndeng haf ! ЖҠu rannga keeГұ ciЕӢ Й—u na nof ciЕӢ Й—u ЕӢ Й“eeЙ—kohiЕӢ Kooh findi Й“i Й“aahЙ—i ЕӢ AmbtiЙ—ohiЕӢ Й—e. ЖҠu ris hiГұoh na FuuЙ—si Hoolohngaani, Й—u mand na caac ciЕӢ Й—u !
7.52: A yinde woosuuЙ— a yi caac ciЕӢ Й—u tolfiЙ—Й—i ? Caac ciЕӢ Й—u apiЙ— Й“i yegЙ—ohee ne YurhiЙ—i hey haye. Te Й—u Й“i woti-woti, Й—u woriЙ— Й—e, Й—u boommba Й—e.
7.53: ЖҠu rahsiЙ— waasiЕӢ Kooh taamboh ЕӢ malaakaaci, waaye Й—u taambiЙ—Й—aa. В» Kakaan kaЕӢ Ecen
7.54: Wa atte'oh ca kerah woo ciЕӢ Ecen ceem, Й“a ayrukka Й—e po Й“a heeЙ—a pooke.
7.55: Waaye Ecen riiffa na FuuЙ—si Hoolohngaani, a marakka ЕӢ Eel ci, a hotta siГұaariЕӢ Kooh, a hotta Yeesu tufkiЙ— ЕӢ ГұaahmiЕӢ Й—e.
7.56: A woosa ne : В« ЕҠ hotiЙ— Eel ci rangsukiЙ—, KuЙ“kiЕӢ Й“oyi tufukka ЕӢ ГұaahmiЕӢ Kooh. В»
7.57: Wa Й“a kerah woo keem, Й“a leehukka ЕӢ Й—afka, Й“a rannga nof ciЕӢ Й“a. ЖҒa jen Й“a faЙ—sukka Ecen.
7.58: ЖҒa faseeЙ—a Й—e po Й“a puliЙ—ta Й—e kur-taaha, Й“a tapeeЙ—a Й—e atoh ne Й“a ap Й—e. Seede'oh ca faЙ—ee kulЙ“aacaЕӢ Й“a ЕӢ kot ciЕӢ komaaki mitiЙ— fiir na woyse Sool.
7.59: Wa Й“a tapee Ecen atoh, a kiimeeЙ—a Kooh an : В« HeЙ— Й“oo Yeesu, teya ruuhiЕӢ ngo. В»
7.60: WeЙ— a Жҙekoh gik, a leehukka ЕӢ Й—afka an : В« HeЙ—i, kina Й“a amboh bakaaЙ—ii ! В» Wi a woo ineem, a nguЙ—ta.

8.1: Sool huneen ЕӢ ini Ecen apu. KosiЙ— ci cambiЙ— tolfiЙ—u Ini kooЙ—oh mbaЙ—i kosiЙ— ca nikee ЕӢ Yerusalem tolfiЙ—asseeЙ—a. Wa nikee tolfiЙ— miskiЙ—. ЖҒa jen, Й—al Apootar ci, Й“a pasarkohha ЕӢ kur caЕӢ Yudee na caЕӢ Samari.
8.2: Raak Й“i Жҙaar kosiЙ— Kooh lool uumbiЙ— Ecen, Й“a rooyya Й—e rooy miskiЙ—.
8.3: Waaye Sool ЕӢ haf ce, a heeЙ—a reehЙ—e Й“i Janguuna. A aaseeЙ—a ЕӢ kahan nu kahan, a pulЙ—eeЙ—a kosiЙ— ca, Жҙaar na Й“itiЙ“, a taЖҙeeЙ—a ЕӢ kaso.
8.4: ЖҒi pasarkohee nak, kaЙ—eeЙ—a ЕӢ Й—isik nu Й—isik, Й“a woyeeЙ—a YegЙ—ohiЕӢ Muci. Filip woyiЙ— YegЙ—ohiЕӢ Muci ЕӢ kur caЕӢ Samari
8.5: ЕҠ pasarkoheem, weЙ— Filip kaЙ—oh kur-taah ngaЕӢ Samari, a yegЙ—ohha MucЙ—ohi Gapohse ЕӢ ndaam.
8.6: Wa Й“a kerah Й—e te Й“a hotta firndeeca a tume, mboolnda jen hunnda, tummba tek, Й“a sikЙ—ukeeЙ—a Й—e baahiЙ—.
8.7: Laam jiini laayiЙ— nikee puleeЙ—a na leehuk ЕӢ kosaayiЙ— ca te lafaГұ laayiЙ— na Й“eendkiЙ— laayiЙ— wirra.
8.8: ЕҠ ineem sum keeh-keeh raakka ЕӢ kur-taaheem.
8.9: Raakeen Жҙaar Й“aatsiЙ—iЙ— gen nga teeku Simong. A nikee luhusoh te a feyeen Й“i Samari lool. A tumee haf ce Й“o' yakak.
8.10: ЖҒooЙ“a jen, yakak na komaaki meeЙ— meeЙ— sikЙ—uk woo ciЕӢ Й—e baahiЙ—, Й“a woyee ne : В« Жіaarii, a yi hatiliЕӢ Kooh, hatili na woyse "yakki" ! В»
8.11: Simong maaГұiЙ— feyeeЙ—a Й“a na luhusiЕӢ Й—e, weЙ— tah Й“a sikЙ—ukeeЙ—a Й—e baahiЙ—.
8.12: Waaye wa Й“a kos Filip yi woo Й“a YegЙ—ohiЕӢ Muci, wi kaЙ— ЕӢ NguuriЕӢ-Kooh na tiikiЕӢ Yeesu Kiristaa, Й“a Й“oktuusa jen, Жҙaar na Й“itiЙ“.
8.13: Simong sah kossa, a Й“oktuusa. A waaЙ—isЙ—i saЙ“sukoh na Filip, a feysee feyu jameet ЕӢ firndeeca na keemaan ca raake.
8.14: Wa Apootar ci nikee ЕӢ Yerusalem kerah ne Й“i Samari teyЙ—ukiЙ— woo kiЕӢ Kooh, Й“a tuuЖҙca Piyeer na SaaЕӢ nga Й“a.
8.15: Wa Й“a ree, Й“a kiimiЙ—ta Й“a Kooh ne Й“eem rahas FuuЙ—si Hoolohngaani.
8.16: Raak FuuЙ—si Hoolohngaani ruhseeЙ—i ЕӢ ali Й“o' nga Й“a paaЙ— ; Й“a Й“oktassee ЕӢ tiikiЕӢ HeЙ— Й“oo Yeesu dong.
8.17: ЕҠ ndeem Piyeer na SaaЕӢ degga Й“a yaah ciЕӢ Й“a, Й“eem rahassa FuuЙ—si Hoolohngaani.
8.18: Simong hotta ne kosiЙ— ca rahas FuuЙ—si Hoolohngaani wa Apootar ci deg Й“a yaah ciЕӢ Й“a, ЕӢ ineem a kommba Piyeer na SaaЕӢ kopor.
8.19: A woosa Й“a ne : В« Namaat to eЙ— hatilii po Й“o' nu ЕӢ nam deg yaah ciЕӢ ngo ЕӢ haf Й—ah, a rahas FuuЙ—si Hoolohngaani. В»
8.20: Waaye Piyeer loffa Й—e ne : В« KoporiЕӢ Й—a sooЖҙaat na Й—a ! Ini Kooh na onohe, fu liiЙ“ ne fu mina min romoh koporiЕӢ Й—a e ?
8.21: Fu Й“aahЙ—i, fu Й“aahlaanЙ—i ЕӢ inii laam liiЙ“ohaaЙ— ciЕӢ Й—a yurahЙ—i ЕӢ fiki Kooh.
8.22: Mbaa Й“oЖҙsoha liiЙ“ohaaЙ— ciЕӢ Й—a moЙ—aaЙ—iiceem te fu kiim HeЙ—i, wa miniЙ— nik ne a hey Й—a Й—aase liiЙ“ohaaЙ— ciЕӢ Й—a.
8.23: ЕҠ hotiЙ— ne fu riifiЙ— na aay-keeГұ te bakaaЙ— tumiЙ— Й—a Гұaam. В»
8.24: Simong loffa Piyeer na SaaЕӢ ne : В« ЖҠu ЕӢ haf Й—u, kiimЙ—aat to HeЙ—i po ali in, ЕӢ in ci Й—u woo rahsuu so. В»
8.25: Wa Piyeer na SaaЕӢ Жҙut seede na yegЙ—oh woo kiЕӢ HeЙ—i, Й“a dokukka Yerusalem. ЕҠ waasi, Й“a yegЙ—ohha YegЙ—ohiЕӢ Muci ЕӢ kur laayiЙ— ЕӢ Samari. Filip na Жҙaara genee Ecopi
8.26: Wa Piyeer na SaaЕӢ coot, malaaka HeЙ— Й“oo woosa Filip ne : В« Kurka, fu kaЙ— ЕӢ Й“ak yaah-Гұaahum ne fu yurhiЙ—koh na pulohaaЙ—-noh Й—ah, ЕӢ waasa puloh Yerusalem kaЙ—ta Gasaa, wa waas hulang. В»
8.27: Filip jaarra kuruk, a kaЙ—ta. WeЙ— a cohoh na Жҙaar gen Ecopi. Жіaareem Й“ucsee Й“ucu . A nikee kilifa yakak, a yi meeЙ— taambkoh raak-raakaЕӢ Kandaas, buura Й“itЙ“aЕӢ Ecopi. Жіaareem hayee Yerusalem ne a Гұaamuk Kooh.
8.28: Wa raak Й—e hayiЙ— po wiirkeeЙ—a, a Й“ooffa ЕӢ wotiiriЕӢ Й—e, a jangeeЙ—a Fiis ciЕӢ woosuuЙ—i Esayi.
8.29: FuuЙ—si Hoolohngaani woosa Filip ne : В« Daba wotiireen. В»
8.30: Filip nuppa dabbaa, a kerahha ЖҙaaraЕӢ Ecopiica jangeeЙ—a Fiis ciЕӢ Esayi, a meekissa Й—e ne : В« Ini fu na jange, fu inhiЙ— ini wa tokis e ? В»
8.31: Жіaara woosa Й—e ne : В« ЕҠ min na inhoh ini wa tokis te ЕӢ raakЙ—i ali Й“o' ne a teeЙ“ po ! В» WeЙ— a woyoh Filip ne a rapaat, a Й“oof ЕӢ serooce.
8.32: Raak inii weЙ— a jangee ЕӢ Fiis ci : В« A mandee na mbaali na kee hoossa ; a Й—ekka teЙ— findi kuyi Жҙini na hufse, a wooЙ—i ali in.
8.33: A ЖҙissuutЙ—uusa, a ГұakЙ—ukohuusa keeh. Ya Й“a woyan ЕӢ ini kaЙ— ЕӢ Й“i rimkoh nga Й—e ? Kipes kiЕӢ Й—e ЕӢ kehЖҙi reehЙ—uuЙ— ! В»
8.34: Жіaara meekissa Filip ne : В« Ne wa neЙ“ Й—a Й—ah, woo so, woosuuЙ—i na woye ЕӢ ya Й“a ndii ? A na woye haf ce wala Й“o' wiiriis ? В»
8.35: WeЙ— Filip camboh ЕӢ ini Fiis ci woo weem, a woosa Й—e YegЙ—ohiЕӢ Muci, ЕӢ ini kaЙ— ЕӢ Yeesu.
8.36: ЖҒeЙ— kaЙ—oh kaЙ—oh po Й“a hotta masuЙ“ ; Жҙaara woosa ne : В« MasuЙ“ weЙ—Й—i, wa ye hondohan ndo Й“oktu ? В» [
8.37: Filip woosa Й—e ne : В« Fu miniЙ— Й“oktu, ne fu kosiЙ— ЕӢ keeГұiЕӢ Й—a jen Й—ah. В» Жіaara woosa ne : В« ЕҠ kosiЙ— ne Yeesu Kiristaa a yi KuЙ“kiЕӢ Kooh. В»]
8.38: A nakohha ne wotiira tufkiЙ—u. A na Filip ruhussa, Й“a kanak jen, Й“a aassa ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ masma, Filip Й“okitta Й—e.
8.39: Wa Й“a pul masma, FuuЙ—siЕӢ HeЙ— Й“oo ginnda Filip, Жҙaara hotisЙ—i Й—e ; Жҙaara taalndiЙ—ta waasaЕӢ Й—e, a kaЙ—eeЙ—a na keeГұ soosiЙ—.
8.40: Ini kaЙ— ЕӢ Filip, a hotkoh kur-taahaЕӢ Asoot, a woyeeЙ—a YegЙ—ohiЕӢ Muci ЕӢ kur nu a taamboh Й—ah, po a reesa Seesare.

9.1: ЕҠ ini kaЙ— ЕӢ Sool, a genee dabgiЙ— ap taalubeeciЕӢ HeЙ— Й“oo. A kaЙ—ta ЕӢ seeЖҙkiЙ—oha yakka,
9.2: a meekissa Й—e kayit ca a Й“ayan wuu sinaagog caЕӢ Damas ; ne a raak Й“i Жҙaar mbaa Й“itiЙ“ nga taambЙ—ee waasiЕӢ Yeesu Й—ah, a amb Й“a, a Й“ay Й“a Yerusalem.
9.3: Wa a kaЙ— po a heeЙ—a ree Damas, Й—ekka po Гұiin puloh Eel ci willa Й—e, siГұaarЙ—eeЙ—a.
9.4: A keennda ЕӢ kehЖҙi, a kerahha hooso woyeeЙ—a Й—e ne : В« Sool, Sool, waaye tah fu tolfiЙ—ee so ? В»
9.5: A loffa ne : В« A fu Й“a HeЙ—i ? В» Hoosoora woosa Й—e ne : В« E Гұam Yeesu yi fu na tolfiЙ—e.
9.6: Waaye kurka, aasa ЕӢ kur ki, fu hey woyse nga ini fu joy tum. В»
9.7: ЖіaaЙ“a hunee na Й—e tufukka, Й“a feyuusa po Й“a minЙ—i woo. ЖҒa kerheen hoosoora waaye Й“a hoteeЙ—i Й“o'.
9.8: Sool kurukka, a marakka waaye a minisseeЙ—i hot. A ambuusa ЕӢ yaah, a nookuusa ne a reytinu Damas.
9.9: A rissa fuuliЙ— neeh kaahay, a ГұamЙ—i, a anЙ—i.
9.10: Waam, ЕӢ Damas, wa raakeen taalube nga teeku AnaГұaas. HeЙ— Й“oo teeЙ“ukka Й—e findi heeЖҙ, woosa Й—e ne : В« AnaГұaas ! В» Yeem loffa ne : В« Yoo, HeЙ—i, Гұam yii. В»
9.11: HeЙ—i woosa Й—e ne : В« Kurka, fu kaЙ— kahan Yudaa, ЕӢ mbeeddaana na woyse Mbeeddaani YurhiЙ—i, fu meeksoh Жҙaari na woyse Sool gen Tarsa. A yaa kiim Kooh.
9.12: In hayЙ—ohiЙ— Й—e findi heeЖҙ, an Жҙaar teeku AnaГұaas aasiЙ—, degga Й—e yaah ciЕӢ Й—e ne a hotis. В»
9.13: AnaГұaas loffa ne : В« HeЙ—i, ЕӢ kerhiЙ— ЕӢ Й“o' laayiЙ— moЙ—aaЙ—iici Жҙaareem tum Й“ooЙ“iЕӢ Й—a ЕӢ Yerusalem.
9.14: Te Й“aat nga, ndii sah kilifaaciЕӢ seeЖҙkiЙ—oh ciЕӢ waasiЕӢMusaa oniЙ— Й—e ne a min amb Й“ooЙ“i na kiime ЕӢ tiikiЕӢ Й—a jen. В»
9.15: Waaye HeЙ— Й“oo woosa AnaГұaas ne : В« KaЙ—a, laam Жҙaareem, Гұam kooЙ— Й—e ne ЕӢ njirГұiЙ—koh Й—e. A hey inhiЙ—ohe tiikiЕӢ ngo ЕӢ heet ci nikЙ—i Yawuut, na buur ciЕӢ Й“a na Israayel ci.
9.16: Mi ЕӢ haf fo, ЕӢ hey Й—e teeЙ“e juukiЕӢ miskiЙ— ci a raakan sagu tiikiЕӢ ngo. В»
9.17: Wa a kerah woo keem, AnaГұaas kaЙ—ta. A aassa ЕӢ kahna, a degga Sool yaah ciЕӢ Й—e, a woosa Й—e ne : В« Sool taambЙ—oh ho, HeЙ—i a yi tuuЖҙ co, Yeesu, yi teeЙ“uk Й—a ЕӢ waasi wi fu na haye ; a yi tuuЖҙ co ne fu hotis te fu riif na FuuЙ—si Hoolohngaani. В»
9.18: ЕҠ Й—iska Й—iska, in haa waasintoor pulohha ЕӢ has ciЕӢ Й—e, keennda, a hotisseeЙ—a. A kurukka, a Й“oktuusa.
9.19: Жіutta, a Гұammba, a raakissa hatil. Sool cambiЙ— yegЙ—oh YegЙ—ohiЕӢ Muci Wa a Й“oktu po Жҙutta, a tummba Й“i neeh ЕӢ ndaam na taalubeeca gen Damas.
9.20: ЕҠ Й—iska Й—iska, a cammba yegЙ—oh ЕӢ sinaagog ca ne Yeesu a yi KuЙ“kiЕӢ Kooh.
9.21: ЖҒooЙ“a kerhee Й—e jen feyuusa, Й“a woyeeЙ—a ne : В« Ca' ! Жіaarii a yi meeЙ— tumoh miskiЙ— ЕӢ Yerusalem, a torhiЙ—ee Й“ooЙ“i na kiime ЕӢ tiikiЕӢ Жҙaareem haa e ? Te a hay ndii ne a amb Й“ooЙ“eem, a Й“ay Й“a ЕӢ fiki kilifaacaЕӢ seeЖҙkiЙ—oh ca. В»
9.22: Waaye Sool uupeeЙ—a nga uup ndeng ЕӢ ini a yegЙ—ohe. Yawuut ca genee Damas raakЙ—i lofaah, laam a nikee teeЙ“eeЙ—a Й“a ne Yeesu a yi MucЙ—ohi Gapohse !
9.23: Wa tummba in maaГұiЙ—, Yawuut ci kerhiЙ—ohha ne Й“a ap Й—e.
9.24: Sool yeggaa, raak Й“a niiЙ—eeЙ—a yahndeer caЕӢ kur-taaha noh na wek ne Й“a min Й—e ap.
9.25: Waaye taalubeeciЕӢ Й—e Й“ayya Й—e na wek, Й“a Й“ekka Й—e ЕӢ dammba yakiЙ—, Й“a yoorra Й—e huntiЙ—kohiЙ— na miira. Sool kaЙ—iЙ— Yerusalem
9.26: Wa Sool puloh ndaam, a kaЙ—ta Yerusalem, a jeemmba hun na taalubeeci waaye Й“a jen Й“a neЖҙЖҙohha Й—e, Й“a koseeЙ—i kitaalubeekiЕӢ Й—e.
9.27: WeЙ— Barnabaas Й“ayoh Й—e, kaЙ—ta na Й—e ЕӢ Apootar ca, a naandsukka Й“a findi Sool hotoh HeЙ— Й“oo ЕӢ waas Damas na findi HeЙ—i woyoh na Й—e, na oolki a oolkee woo ЕӢ tiikiЕӢ Yeesu ЕӢ ndaam.
9.28: ЕҠ ineem, a nikka na Й“a ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ Yerusalem, a hunnda na Й“a, a woyeeЙ—a ЕӢ tiikiЕӢ HeЙ—i te a neЖҙЖҙohЙ—i.
9.29: A woyeeЙ—a, a taastiЙ—oheeЙ—a na Yawuut ci na jombe gerek, waaye Й“eem jeemeeЙ—a Й—e ap.
9.30: Wa Й“aah caЕӢ Й“oo kosiЙ— ca keraha, Й“a Й“ayya Й—e po ЕӢ Seesare, Й“a cootiЙ—ta Й—e Tarsa.
9.31: Waam raak, kosiЙ— caЕӢ Yudee jen na Galile na Samari, raakiЙ— jam. KosiЕӢ Й“a Й“aatkeeЙ—a, Й“a peseeЙ—a ЕӢ nup Kooh HeЙ— Й“oo, te Й“a uupeeЙ—a nga uup laay, taamboh ЕӢ Й“aatЙ—ohiЕӢ FuuЙ—si Hoolohngaani. Piyeer ЕӢ Lidda, wirЙ—ukaЕӢ Enee
9.32: Piyeer kaЙ—eeЙ—a ЕӢ Й—isik nu nik ЕӢ kur ka. Wa raakka mbeh, a kaЙ—ta marka Й“o'-Kooh ca genee Lidda.
9.33: A cohha na Жҙaar nga teeku Enee. Жіaareem tumiЙ— kiis yasna-kaahay ЕӢ fiЖҙaang, a lafГұee lafaГұ.
9.34: Piyeer woosa Й—e ne : В« Enee, Yeesu Kiristaa a yii wiriЙ— Й—a, kurka fu raЙ—oot fiЖҙaangiЕӢ Й—a. В» Jaarra, Enee kurukka.
9.35: Wa Й“ooЙ“a gen Lidda na kur caЕӢ Saroon hot Й—e, Й“a Й“oЖҙsohha pesohaaЙ—, Й“a kossa HeЙ— Й“oo. Piyeer hultiЙ—iЙ— Tabita ЕӢ Yope
9.36: Wa raakeen ЕӢ Yope taalube Yeesu Й“itiЙ“ teeku Tabita, wa tokis "Dorkas" ЕӢ gerek, weЙ— "Ngaay". A meeЙ— gen ЕӢ tum in baahiЙ— na Й“aatЙ—oh ГұakiЙ— ci.
9.37: ЕҠ neeh caam, a keennda kosaay, a kaannda. ЖҒa Й“ookka fiЙ—aafa, wa deguusa ЕӢ tuuЖҙ, ЕӢ Й—afuk kahna.
9.38: TaalubeecaЕӢ Yope kerheen ne Piyeer yaa ЕӢ Lidda. Lidda usoheeЙ—i na Yope. ЖҒa woossa Жҙaar kanak ne Й“a kaЙ— ЕӢ Piyeer, Й“a kiim Й—e ne a hay nga Й“a win-win.
9.39: Piyeer kurukka, a hunnda na Й“a. Wa a ree, Й“a Й“ayya Й—e ЕӢ tuuЖҙa ЕӢ Й—afka. ЖҒitiЙ“ ca fu inah ne Жҙaar caЕӢ Й“a kaaniЙ—, hayya cohe na Й—e. ЖҒitiЙ“ ceem, Dorkas meeЙ—een Й“a haЙ“Й—iЙ— kulЙ“a wa a na pese. ЖҒa taambkohha Piyeer na fuЙ—, Й“a teeЙ“eeЙ—a Й—e kulЙ“aaceem.
9.40: Piyeer puliЙ—ta Й“a jen, a Жҙekka, a kiimeeЙ—a Kooh, Жҙutta, a yurhiЙ—kohha na fiЙ—aafi, a woosa ne : В« Tabita kurka ! В» Tabita marakka, a hotta Piyeer, a Й“ooffa.
9.41: Piyeer onnda Й—e yaah, Й“aatЙ—ohha Й—e ne a kuruk ; Жҙutta a Й“eeЙ—ukka Й“o'-Kooh ca na Й“itiЙ“ ca Жҙaar caЕӢ Й“a kaane, a teeЙ“pa Й“a Й—e pesiЙ—.
9.42: Ineem yeguusa ЕӢ Yope jen, Й“o' laayiЙ— kossa HeЙ— Й“oo.
9.43: ЕҠ finho ineem, Piyeer tassa ЕӢ Yope Й“i neeh, a dale ЕӢ kahan Жҙaar teeku Simong. Simong yeem nikee fortoh und.

10.1: Wa raakeen ЕӢ Seesare Жҙaar teeku Koorney. A adgohee soldaar teemet, Й“a Й“aahee ЕӢ soldaar caЕӢ Rom, Й“i na woysee soldaar caЕӢ Itaali.
10.2: Жіaareem nikee Й“o' waaЙ—iЙ— Kooh, ye nupan Kooh, a yi na Й“i kahan ce jen. A meeЙ—een on keeh-keeh Yawuut ci raakaaЙ—iici te a meeЙ— gen kiim Kooh.
10.3: Wa raakka mbeh, wi kaЙ— po nohi cammba soos, in hayЙ—ohha Koorney findi heeЖҙ, a hotta hooliЙ— malaaka Kooh aasiЙ—, raakka Й—e ЕӢ Й—iska a nikee, woosa Й—e ne : В« Koorney ! В»
10.4: A tiitta, a iiЖҙca malaakaani hew, a woosa ne : В« Wa ye kilifaani ? В» Malaakaani loffa Й—e ne : В« Kooh teyЙ—ukiЙ— kiim ciЕӢ Й—a, a alkohЙ—i Й“aatЙ—ohi fu na Й“aatЙ—ohe ГұakiЙ— ci.
10.5: ЖҠiski wa nik, woosa Й“i Жҙaar Yope, Й“a Й“eeЙ—kiЙ— Й—a Жҙaara teeku Simong te a woysee Piyeer.
10.6: A dal ЕӢ kahan fortoh und nam teeku Simong, kahan ce nik ЕӢ sero cookma. В»
10.7: Wa malaakaana woyee na Й—e coot, Koorney Й“eeЙ—ukka surga kanak ЕӢ surgaaciЕӢ Й—e na soldaar yino nupiЙ— Kooh ЕӢ Й“i a adgoh in maaГұiЙ—.
10.8: Koorney naandsukka Й“a ini raak jen, Жҙutta a woossa Й“a Yope.
10.9: ЕҠ Kooh-wiisiina, Й“a nikka ЕӢ waas po Й“a reЙ“eeЙ—a Yope, raak Piyeer rapiЙ— ЕӢ Й—afuk kahna ne a kiim Kooh ЕӢ leero noh.
10.10: A aЙ—ukka, a waaЙ—ta Гұam. Wa a tikЙ—assee kaГұam, in puloh ЕӢ Kooh hayЙ—ohha Й—e findi heeЖҙ.
10.11: A hotta Eel ci rangsukiЙ—, inaa haa piis yakak ambuuЙ— ЕӢ koГұ ciЕӢ wa nikiis ci ruhseeЙ—a po ЕӢ kehЖҙi.
10.12: Heet ciЕӢ Й—oopaat ci jen nikka nga : Й—oopaat ci na kot ci nikiis ci na faskoh ci ЕӢ kehЖҙi na pundoh ci ЕӢ Й—afki.
10.13: Raakka hoosoori woo Й—e ne : В« Kurka Piyeer ! Apa fu Гұam ! В»
10.14: Waaye Piyeer loffa ne : В« Muk HeЙ—i, ЕӢ moosЙ—i Гұamoh in araamiЙ— wala in hoolaaЙ—i'iЙ— ! В»
10.15: Hoosoora woyissa Й—e ne : В« Ini Kooh hooliЙ—, fu, kinaa araamiЙ— ! В»
10.16: ЖҠaa, hoosoora woyeeЙ—a, Piyeer lofeeЙ—a po wa nikka waas kaahay, jaarra ina mand na piis rapЙ—uusa ЕӢ Eel ci.
10.17: Piyeer muuЖҙca ЕӢ ini hayЙ—ohee Й—e findi heeЖҙ, an wa joy ye tokis ? Waam raak Й“ooЙ“a Koorney woosee meeksohiЙ— kahan Simong po Й“a reyiЙ— nguЙ“u kahna.
10.18: ЖҒa Й“eeЙ—kohha, Й“a meeksohha an : В« Simong yi na woyse Piyeer a dal ЕӢ ndii e ? В»
10.19: Piyeer rissa liiЙ“siЙ—oh ЕӢ ini hayЙ—ohee Й—e findi heeЖҙ, FuuЙ—si Hoolohngaani woosa Й—e ne : В« Жіaar kaahay Й“ii waak Й—a ЕӢ ndii.
10.20: Kurka fu ruhus, huna na Й“a ; kina raak hel kanak nga, Гұam woos Й“a. В»
10.21: Piyeer ruhussa, a woosa ЖҙaaЙ“a ne : В« Г‘am Й“oyi Й—u na waake, wa ye kot ciЕӢ Й—u ? В»
10.22: ЖҒa loffa Й—e ne : В« A Koorney, Жҙaar ЕӢ Й“i adgoh soldaar ciЕӢ Rom, a yi woos Й“oo. A Жҙaar yurhiЙ—, a nupiЙ— Kooh te Yawuut ci jen seede'iЙ— Й—e seede baahiЙ—. A malaaka Kooh nak Й—e ne a Й“eeЙ—kaat Й—a ЕӢ kahan ce, a sikЙ—uk ini fu raak woyaah Й—e. В»
10.23: Jaarra Piyeer woosa Й“a ne Й“a aasaat, Й“a neeh po kim. Wa Kooh wiis, a Й—offa, a cooteeЙ—a na Й“a ; Й“i Й“o', ЕӢ Й“aah caЕӢ Й“oo kosiЙ— ca ЕӢ kur kaЕӢ Yope Й“ennda Й—e.
10.24: ЕҠ Kooh-wiisiina weЙ— a reyoh Seesare. Raak Koorney Й“eeЙ—kiЙ— Й“aah ciЕӢ Й—e, a nammba Й“eeЙ—uk nawleeciЕӢ Й—e keeh-keeh ci, a sekeeЙ—a Piyeer.
10.25: Wa Piyeer na aase, Koorney kaЙ—ta coha na Й—e, a ЖҙekiЙ—ta Й—e po a reesa kehЖҙi, a Гұaamukka Й—e.
10.26: Waaye Piyeer kurkiЙ—ta Й—e, woosa Й—e ne : В« Kurka ! ЕҠ nam nik Й“o' dong. В»
10.27: A taalndiЙ—ta, a woyeeЙ—a na Koorney po a aassa kahna. A raakka Й“o' laayiЙ— nangЙ—ukohiЙ— nga.
10.28: A woosa Й“a ne : В« ЖҠu inhiЙ— ne wa sangohuuЙ— ne Yawuut ambsukoh na yi nikЙ—i Yawuut wala a aas kahan ce. Waaye Kooh teeЙ“iЙ— to ne ЕӢ joyЙ—i woo ЕӢ ini kaЙ— ЕӢ Й“o' ne a araamiЙ— wala a hoolЙ—i.
10.29: WeЙ— tah, wi Й—u nakoh ho Й“eeЙ—kiЙ—u, ЕӢ degЙ—i ali woo nga, ЕӢ hayiЙ—. ЕҠ waaЙ—iЙ— inah ini tah Й—u Й“eeЙ—ukka so. В»
10.30: Koorney loffa Й—e ne : В« Wa degiЙ— neeh kaahay woti, ЕӢ wahtuunii, wahtuuni nohi na cambohe soos, ЕӢ kiimeeЙ—a Kooh ЕӢ kahan ndo. ЖҠekka po Жҙaar Й“ekuk kulЙ“a melciЙ— nikka jalaГұ ЕӢ fikiiso,
10.31: a woosa so ne : вҖң Koorney, Kooh teyЙ—ukiЙ— kiimiЕӢ Й—a te a alkohЙ—i Й“aatЙ—ohi fu na Й“aatЙ—ohe ГұakiЙ— ci.
10.32: Mbaa woosa Й“i Й“o', Й“a kaЙ— Yope, Й“a Й“eeЙ—kiЙ— Й—a Simong yi na woyse Piyeer. A dal ЕӢ Simong wiiriis fortoh und te kahan ce nik ЕӢ sero cookma. вҖқ
10.33: ЕҠ jaarra woosoh nga Й—a te corka ЕӢ ini fu teyЙ—uk hay. ЖҠiski wa nik ndii, Й“oo jen, Й“oo Й“ii ЕӢ fiki Kooh ne Й“oo kerah ini HeЙ—i nak Й—a woyu jen. В» Woo kiЕӢ Piyeer ЕӢ kahan Koorney
10.34: Piyeer kooЙ—ta woo ka, woosa ne : В« ЕҠ inhiЙ— keeh-keeh kotii ne Kooh raakЙ—i talsoh ЕӢ Й“ooЙ“i,
10.35: laam Й“o' nu nup Й—e te a genee tum in yurhiЙ— Й—ah, ЕӢ cuuЙ“ nu a min Й“aahoh Й—ah, a neЙ“iЙ— Й—e.
10.36: A woosohiЙ— woo kiЕӢ Й—e ЕӢ Israayel ci, a woosa Й“a YegЙ—ohiЕӢ Muci, wiЕӢ jami taamboh ЕӢ Yeesu Kiristaa yi HeЙ— Й“o' ci jen.
10.37: Wa camb wa Yahya woo ne вҖң ЖҒoktukaat ! вҖқ ЖҠu inhiЙ— ini raak cambohha Galile po ЕӢ kur caЕӢ Yudee jen.
10.38: ЖҠu inhiЙ— findi Kooh yiifoh hatiliЕӢ FuuЙ—si Hoolohngaani ЕӢ Yeesu yiЕӢ Nasareet te Й—isik nu a taambeen Й—ah, a tumeeЙ—a in baahiЙ— nga, a wirЙ—eeЙ—a Й“i Seytaani ambe, laam Kooh nikee na Й—e.
10.39: ЖҒoo nak, e Й“oo seedeeciЕӢ in ci Yeesu tum jen ЕӢ Yerusalem na kur ciЕӢ Yawuut ci cinooci. A apuuЙ— ЕӢ daaЖҙi Й“a daaЖҙ Й—e ЕӢ kurwaa,
10.40: waaye Kooh hultiЙ—iЙ— Й—e ЕӢ mbeha kaahayЙ—oh. A onnda Й—e ne a teeЙ“ haf ce Й“ooЙ“i,
10.41: Й“ooЙ“i jen haa, waaye seedeeci Kooh kooЙ—ee bala ineem, weЙ— ne Й“oo, Й“i Гұamee aneeЙ—a na Й—e wa a hulit ЕӢ kakaan ka.
10.42: A nakiЙ— Й“oo ne Й“oo yegiЙ— cuuЙ“i ne a yi Kooh tufkiЙ— ne a atte pesiЙ— ci na kaaniЙ— ci.
10.43: WoosuuЙ— ci jen seede'Й—iЙ— Й—e ne : Yaa nu kos Й—e Й—ah, Kooh hey Й—a Й—aase bakaaЙ— ciЕӢ Й—a ЕӢ tiikiЕӢ Й—e. В» FuuЙ—si Hoolohngaani ruhsiЙ— ЕӢ Й“i nikЙ—i Yawuut
10.44: Wa Piyeer na woye, FuuЙ—si Hoolohngaani ruhussa ЕӢ Й“ooЙ“a sikЙ—ukee YegЙ—ohi jen.
10.45: -46 Yawuut ca kosiЙ— ca nikee na Piyeer kerheeЙ—a Й“eem jombeeЙ—a ЕӢ peЙ—eem ci nikЙ—i peЙ—eem ciЕӢ Й“a, yakЙ—eeЙ—a Kooh. Yawuut ca jen feyuusa ЕӢ ini Kooh nam soЙ— FuuЙ—si Hoolohngaani ЕӢ Й“i nikЙ—i Yawuut. Piyeer woosa ne :
10.47: В« ЖҒi rahas FuuЙ—si Hoolohngaani findi Й“oo, Й“a miniЙ— sangohu Й“oktu ЕӢ masuЙ“ e ? В»
10.48: ЕҠ ineem, a nakohha ne Й“a Й“oktu ЕӢ tiikiЕӢ Yeesu Kiristaa. Жіutta, Й“a kiimmba Й—e ne a nik na Й“a Й“i neeh.

11.1: ЕҠ ineem, Apootar ci na Й“aah ciЕӢ Й“oo kosiЙ— ci nikee ЕӢ Yudee kerahha ne Й“i nikЙ—i Yawuut namiЙ— teyЙ—uk woo kiЕӢ Kooh.
11.2: Wa Piyeer dokuk Yerusalem, Yawuut ca kosiЙ— ca ngaseeЙ—a Й—e
11.3: an : В« Wa ye tah fu aassa kahan nguЙ—kaaЙ—iici po fu ГұameeЙ—a na Й“a ? В»
11.4: ЕҠ ineem Piyeer naandsukka Й“a ina raak jen, ambohhaa ЕӢ cambohaana kaЙ—eeЙ—a po ЕӢ reehЙ—ohaana. A woo Й“a ne :
11.5: В« ЕҠ nikee ЕӢ kur-taahaЕӢ Yope, ЕӢ kiimeeЙ—a Kooh nga. In hayЙ—ohha so haa heeЖҙ : ЕҠ hotta inaa haa piis yakak ambuuЙ— ЕӢ koГұ ciЕӢ wa nikiis ci. Wa ruhsoheeЙ—a Eel ci po wa reesa ЕӢ serooso.
11.6: ЕҠ marakka baahiЙ— ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙi, ЕӢ hotta Й—oopaat ci na kot ci nikiis ci ЕӢ kehЖҙi na ci ЕӢ nduufi na faskoh ci na pundoh ci ЕӢ Й—afki.
11.7: ЕҠ kerahha hooso woyiЙ— to ne : вҖң Kurka Piyeer, apa fu Гұam ! вҖқ
11.8: Waaye ЕӢ loffa ne : вҖң Muk HeЙ—i, ЕӢ moosЙ—i Гұamoh in araamiЙ— wala in hoolaaЙ—i'iЙ—. вҖқ
11.9: Hoosoori puloh Eel ci kanakЙ—ukissa woo an : вҖң Ini Kooh hooliЙ—, fu, kinaa araamiЙ— ! вҖқ
11.10: ЖҠaa, hoosoora woyeeЙ—a, ЕӢ lofeeЙ—a po wa nikka waas kaahay, Жҙutta ina jen dokukka ЕӢ Eel ca.
11.11: Jaarra Й“o' kaahay reyeeЙ—a kahna Й“oo dalohe. ЖҒa pulohee Seesare nikka haa ne Й“a woossee nga so.
11.12: FuuЙ—si Hoolohngaani woosa so ne ЕӢ hunaat na Й“a te ЕӢ kanaat liiЙ“siЙ—oh nga. ЖҒaah ciЕӢ Й“oo kosiЙ— ci yasna-yinooci Й—u na hote Й“ii, Й“ennda so Seesare, Й“oo aassa kahan Koorney.
11.13: A woosa Й“oo ne, a hot malaaka tufkiЙ— ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ kahan ce woosa Й—e inii : вҖң Woosa Й“o' Yope, a Й“eeЙ—kiЙ— Й—a Simong yi na woyse Piyeer.
11.14: A hey Й—a woye woo ci mucЙ—an Й—a, fu na Й“i kahan fu jen. вҖқ
11.15: Wi ЕӢ camb woo, FuuЙ—si Hoolohngaani ruhussa nga Й“a findi a ruhsohee nga Й“oo ЕӢ cambohaana.
11.16: ЕҠ jaarra naandsuk woo kiЕӢ HeЙ—i wii : вҖң Yahya Й“oktohee na masuЙ“ waaye Й—u, Й—u Й“oktohsan FuuЙ—si Hoolohngaani. вҖқ
11.17: Ini Kooh on Й“oo wi Й“oo kos Yeesu Kiristaa, Kooh oniЙ— Й“a wa Й—ah, a mi Й“a po ЕӢ nookohee na Kooh ? В»
11.18: Wa Й“a kerah woo keem, Й“a raakisЙ—i woyaah, Й“a yakЙ—eeЙ—a Kooh an : В« Wa keeh kat ne Kooh namiЙ— on Й“i nikЙ—i Yawuut ne Й“a Й“oЖҙsoh kipes, Й“a raak kipes ki keeh-keehi. В» JanguuniЕӢ AГұcos
11.19: ЕҠ finho kakaan kaЕӢ Ecen, kosiЙ— ci cammba torhiЙ—u po Й“a pasarkohha ЕӢ Feniis na Siipar na AГұcos. ЖҒa topee na yegЙ—ohiЕӢ woo kiЕӢ Kooh ЕӢ Yawuut ci dong.
11.20: Moona raakeen nga Й“a Й“i Й“o' Siipar na Sireen, Й“eem kaЙ—ta AГұcos nameeЙ—a woo Й“i nikЙ—i Yawuut YegЙ—ohiЕӢ Muci kaЙ— ЕӢ Yeesu HeЙ—i.
11.21: HatiliЕӢ HeЙ—i hunnda na Й“a, po Й“o' laayiЙ— kossa, Й“oЖҙsohha pesohaaЙ—, Й“a hayya ЕӢ HeЙ—i.
11.22: ЖҒi JanguuniЕӢ Yerusalem kerahha ineem, Й“a woossa Barnabaas AГұcos.
11.23: Wa a ree, a hotta findi Kooh baahohoh kosiЙ— ca, a neЙ“uusa nga, a Гұaahha Й“a jen ne Й“a risaat ndengЙ—uk keeh-keeh ЕӢ ГұaakЙ—i Й“a na ГұaakЙ—e HeЙ—i.
11.24: Barnabaas nikee Й“o' baahiЙ—, riifiЙ— na FuuЙ—si Hoolohngaani na kos. ЕҠ ineem mboolo keeh-keeh lannga na HeЙ—i.
11.25: Жіutta Barnabaas kaЙ—ta waaka Sool ЕӢ Tarsa.
11.26: Wa a hot Й—e, a Й“ayya Й—e AГұcos. ЖҒa tummba kiis mulnguus na Й“i Janguuna, Й“a jangiЙ—ta mboolo keeh-keeh nga. ЕҠ ndaam, ngaЕӢ AГұcos, weЙ— taalubeeci camboh Й“eeЙ—ku " Kerceen ". Barnabaas na Sool ЕӢ Yerusalem
11.27: ЕҠ mbeh ceem, raakka woosuuЙ— ci puloh Yerusalem, hayya AГұcos.
11.28: Yino nga Й“a teeku Agabus, FuuЙ—si Hoolohngaani inhiЙ—ta Й—e ne aЙ— miskiЙ— hey raake ЕӢ kehЖҙi jen, a kurukka, a woosaa. Wa raakangannga ЕӢ jamanoona Kolod nikohee buura yakkaЕӢ Rom.
11.29: Wa taalubeeca keraha, Й“a kerhiЙ—ohha ne yaa nu nga Й—ah, eЙ—oh ini a min eЙ—oh ne ca woosohu Й“aatЙ—ohoha Й“aah caЕӢ Й“a kosiЙ— ca nik ЕӢ Yudee.
11.30: ЖҒa tummba ineem, Й“a degga onoh ca ЕӢ yaah Barnabaas na Sool, Й“eem kommba ca adgohoh caЕӢ JanguunaЕӢ Yudee.

12.1: ЕҠ jamanoonaam Herod buura, ammba Й“i Й“o' Й“aah ЕӢ Janguuna, a tumeeЙ—a Й“a miskiЙ—.
12.2: A apЙ—ukka Saak na ndang, taambЙ—oh SaaЕӢ.
12.3: Wa a hot ne ineem neЙ“iЙ— Yawuut ci, a nammba ambЙ—uk Piyeer. Wa nikee mbeh ciЕӢ feetiЕӢ Mbuuruuci raakaaЙ—i lawiir ci.
12.4: Wa a amb Piyeer, a taЖҙca Й—e ЕӢ kasoona. A nakka lang soldaar nikiis ne Й“a niiЙ—ee Й—e, lang nu nga Й—ah raakee soldaar nikiis. A waaЙ—ta Й—e Й“ay ЕӢ fiki Й“ooЙ“a, a atte'u ne feetiЕӢ Paak reeh Й—ah.
12.5: ЕҠ ineem Piyeer niiЙ—asseeЙ—a ЕӢ kasoona, waaye Й“i Janguuna kiimЙ—eeЙ—a Й—e Kooh na keeГұ ciЕӢ Й“a jen. Piyeer pulЙ—uuЙ— kasoona
12.6: Herod nikee ЕӢ kot Й“ay Piyeer ЕӢ fiki Й“ooЙ“a ne a atte'u. ЕҠ weka bala a atte'san Й—ah, Piyeer toksee na ceen kanak, a neeheeЙ—a ЕӢ harmban soldaar kanak, te ЕӢ fiki yahndeeraЕӢ kasoona Й“i soldaar tufkeen nga, niiЙ—eeЙ—a.
