12.7: ЖҠekka po malaaka HeЙ— Й“oo hayya, Й—iski siГұaariЙ—ta naГұ. A laЙ“iЙ—ta Piyeer ЕӢ hambuus ne a yun Й—e, a woosa Й—e ne : В« Kurka gaaw ! В» Ceen ci nihsukka ЕӢ yaah ciЕӢ Й—e, ca keennda.
12.8: Malaakaani woyissa Й—e ne : В« Tokka seenturiЕӢ Й—a, fu Й“ekuk ГұafaЙ— ciЕӢ Й—a ! В» A tummbaa. Malaakaani degissa nga ne : В« Degga paltooniЕӢ Й—a te fu ГұaakiЙ— to. В»
12.9: Piyeer ГұaakiЙ—ta malaakaana, a pulla. A ambeeЙ—i ne ini malaakaani na haЙ“Й—e, wa keeh, a liiЙ“ee ne e in hayЙ—ohee Й—e findi heeЖҙ.
12.10: Wa raakeen Й“i lang soldaar nga, tufkiЙ— niiЙ—eeЙ—a. Piyeer na malaakaana taammba yino, Й“a taambissa yino, Й“a reesa buntaana tiwГұa pul ЕӢ kur-taaha, wa rangsukootta, Й“a pulla. ЖҒa kooЙ—ta mbeedda, Й“a kaЙ—eeЙ—a, Й—ekka po malaakaana faЙ—ta Й—e.
12.11: Piyeer dokukka ЕӢ sagooniЕӢ Й—e, a woosa ne : В« ЕҠ inhiЙ— kotii ne wa keeh, HeЙ—i woosiЙ— malaakaaniЕӢ Й—e ne a pulЙ—oh ho ЕӢ yaah Herod na ini Yawuut ci waaЙ—ee ne wa rahas so jen. В»
12.12: Wa Piyeer inhiskoh, a kaЙ—ta kahan Mari yaayiЕӢ SaaЕӢ, SaaЕӢ yi na Й“eeЙ—kohse Maarko. Raak Й“o' laayiЙ— cohiЙ— nga, kiimeeЙ—a Kooh.
12.13: Piyeer laЙ“iЙ—ta buntaanaЕӢ kahna, wa raakeen cafaЖҙ nga, teeku Rood, a nikee Гұaam, a hayya marke Й“oyi na laЙ“Й—e.
12.14: A inhissa hoosooriЕӢ Piyeer, a summba lool ; joyya ne a rangis, a nuppa a kaЙ—taa yegЙ—oha ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙa an : В« A Piyeer, a yii ЕӢ buntaani, ЕӢ hari ! В»
12.15: ЖҒa woosa Й—e ne : В« Hanaa fu na dofe ! В» Waaye a ndennga nga ne wa keeh. ЕҠ ineem, Й“a woosa Й—e ne : В« Kon a malaakaaniЕӢ Й—e ! В»
12.16: Piyeer rissa laЙ“iЙ— ЕӢ buntaana. Wa Й“a rangis, Й“a hotta ne a yi, Й“a feyuusa jameet.
12.17: A woosa na Й“a na yaah ne Й“a Й—ek, a naandsukka Й“a findi HeЙ—i pulЙ—oh Й—e ЕӢ kasoona. A Й“aatta nga ne : В« Woyaata Saak na Й“aah ciЕӢ Й“oo kosiЙ— ci Й“inooЙ“i. В» Жіutta a pulla, a cootta Й—isik wiiriis.
12.18: Wa Kooh wiis, soldaar ca jahaskohha keeh-keeh, Й“a woyeeЙ—a ne : В« Жіaari taamb nde ? В»
12.19: Herod nakohha Й—e waakЙ—u, waaye a hotuuЙ—i. A nakohha ne soldaar ca niiЙ—ee Й—e meeksassaat, Жҙutta a nakohha ne Й“a apu. Wa ineem coot, Herod pulohha Yudee a kaЙ—ta Seesare, a nikka nga Й“i neeh. Kakaan kaЕӢ buur Herod
12.20: Waam, Herod ayrukohee ayrukoh na Й“i Tiir na Й“i Sidoon. ЖҒeem hunnda ЕӢ woo ne Й“a kaЙ— nga Й—e. ЖҒa kiimtiЙ—ohee na Balastus dagi meeЙ— taambkoh tuuЖҙ buur ne a Й“aatЙ—oh Й“a. ЖҒa kiimmba Herod ne jam raak ЕӢ harmban Й“a, laam kur ceem, kaГұam kiЕӢ Й“a, meeЙ— puloh kur kaЕӢ Herod.
12.21: Wa mbeha Й“a ambee ree, Herod Й“ayya kulЙ“a-buur, a Й“ekukkaa, a Й“ooffa ЕӢ Й“oofohaanaЕӢ Й—e, a woyeeЙ—a na Й“ooЙ“a.
12.22: ЖҒooЙ“a leehkeeЙ—a an : В« A Й“o' na woye haa, a kooh ЕӢ kooh ci ! В»
12.23: ЕҠ Й—iska Й—iska, malaaka HeЙ— Й“oo tippa Herod ngonjom a kosaayya ЕӢ ini a wikЙ—i Kooh ciriЕӢ Й—e. Cangind ci Гұamsohha Й—e, a kaannda.
12.24: Woo kiЕӢ Kooh nak, wa Й“aatkeeЙ—a Й“aatuk, wa kaЙ—eeЙ—a kaЙ— !
12.25: Ini kaЙ— ЕӢ Barnabaas na Sool, wa Й“a reehiЙ— pangka Й“ayee Й“a Yerusalem, Й“a dokkeeЙ—a ; Й“a Й“ayndohha SaaЕӢ yi na Й“eeЙ—kohse Maarko.

13.1: ЕҠ JanguunaЕӢ AГұcos, wa raakeen Й“i woosuuЙ— na Й“i jangЙ—ohoh. ЖҒa nikee Barnabaas na Simeyong yi na Й“eeЙ—kohse Suusus, Lusiyus yi genee Sireen, Manahen yi koЙ—u yino na Herod goornoori, na Sool.
13.2: Wa raakka mbeh, Й“a ГұaamkeeЙ—a HeЙ—i, Й“a oreeЙ—a, FuuЙ—si Hoolohngaani woosa Й“a ne : В« ЖҠiski wa nik, faЙ—Й—aat to Barnabaas na Sool wuu pangki tah ho Й“eeЙ—uk Й“a. В»
13.3: ЕҠ ineem, wa Й“a Жҙut or na kiim Kooh, Й“a degga Й“a yaah ciЕӢ Й“a, Й“a faЙ—ta Й“a, Й“a cootta. Barnabaas na Sool kaЙ—iЙ— Siipar
13.4: Wa FuuЙ—si Hoolohngaani woos Barnabaas na Sool, Й“a kaЙ—ta kur kaЕӢ Selesi, Й“a aassa bato ndaam ne Й“a kaЙ— Siipar, kur ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ cookmi.
13.5: Wa Й“a ree Salamin, Й“a yegЙ—oheeЙ—a woo kiЕӢ Kooh ngaЕӢ sinaagog caЕӢ Yawuut ca. SaaЕӢ Maarko hunee na Й“a ne a Й“aatЙ—oh Й“a.
13.6: ЖҒa huussa Siipar jen, Й“a kaЙ—ta po Pafos. ЕҠ ndaam, Й“a cohha na luhusoh teeku Bar-Yeesu, a nikee Yawuut, a tumee haf ce woosuuЙ— te a nikЙ—aa.
13.7: A Й“aahee ЕӢ Й“ooЙ“a wilee goornoora na woyse Seersiyus Polus. Goornooreem nikee Й“o' ГұaaГұiЙ—, a nakohha Й“eeЙ—kiЙ—u Barnabaas na Sool, raak Й—e waaЙ—ee kerah woo kiЕӢ Kooh.
13.8: Waaye luhusohi, yi nam teeku Elimaas (wa tokis ineem ЕӢ gerek) hiГұoheeЙ—a Й“a, a jeemeeЙ—a hondoh goornoora kos.
13.9: ЕҠ ineem, Sool yi na name woyu Pool, riiffa na FuuЙ—si Hoolohngaani, a marakka Й—e ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ has in maaГұiЙ—,
13.10: a woosa ne : В« Leyohi yakki, fu riif na liiЙ“ohaaЙ— moЙ—aaЙ—i, fu kuЙ“u Seytaani rek, fu sangiЙ—iЕӢ in nu baah Й—ah ! Fu heyЙ—i faЙ—e nduuЙ— waasiЕӢ HeЙ— Й“oo yurhiЙ—i e ?
13.11: WeЙ—Й—i, yaahiЕӢ HeЙ—i deggiЙ— Й—a, fu hey fuule, fu hotissanЙ—i nohi Й“i neeh. В» ЕҠ Й—iska Й—iska has ciЕӢ Elimaas Гұuussa, a nikka ЕӢ Гұuus tuЙ—, a saaЙ“Й—eeЙ—a ne a waak Й“oyi nookan Й—e.
13.12: Wa goornoora hot ina raak, a kossa ; ini a jangЙ—assee ЕӢ HeЙ—i aaseen Й—e lool. Woo kaЕӢ Pool ЕӢ AГұcos-Pisidi
13.13: ЕҠ ineem Pool na huntoh caЕӢ Й—e aassa bato , Й“a pulohha Pafos, Й“a kaЙ—ta Perge ЕӢ kur kaЕӢ Pamfili. SaaЕӢ Maarko faЙ—ta Й“a ndaam, a dokukka Yerusalem.
13.14: Waaye Й“eЙ—, Й“a kurkohha Perge, Й“a taalndiЙ—ta po Й“a reesa AГұcos-Pisidi. ЕҠ mbehi na iЙ—siЙ—kohse, Й“a aassa ЕӢ sinaagoga , Й“a Й“ooffa.
13.15: Wa jangaЕӢ teerndiЕӢ waasiЕӢMusaa na woo ciЕӢ woosuuЙ— ci Жҙut, kilifaacaЕӢ sinaagoga nakohha Й“a woyЙ—u ne : В« ЖҒaah ci, Й—u raak ini Й—u woyan Й“ooЙ“i ne Й—u Гұaah Й“a Й—ah, Й—u miniЙ— woo. В»
13.16: Wa Й“a woyu ineem, Pool kurukka, a raЙ—issa yaah a woosa ne : В« ЖҠu, Israayel ci na Й—u Й“i nup Kooh, sikЙ—ukaat to !
13.17: KoohiЕӢ cuuЙ“iЕӢ Й“oo Israayel taniЙ— caac ciЕӢ Й“oo. A Й“aatta cuuЙ“i wa Й“a genohaah ЕӢ Misra. Жіutta, na hatiliЕӢ yaahiЕӢ Й—e, a puliЙ—ta Й“a nga.
13.18: Wa Й“a nik ЕӢ kehЖҙa hulanga, a muГұЙ—eeЙ—a Й“a ini ree kiis ndaЕӢkiyaah-nikiis (40).
13.19: Жіutta, a Й—ummba cuuЙ“ yasna-kanak ЕӢ Kanaan, a eЙ—ta cuuЙ“iЕӢ Й—e kur keem ne Й“a kooЙ—a.
13.20: In ceem jen, a tumiЙ— ca ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ kiis teemet-nikiis na kiis ndaЕӢkiyaah-yatuus (450). Жіutta a eЙ—eeЙ—a caac ciЕӢ Й“oo Й“i kilifa po wi woosuuЙ—i Samuwel hay.
13.21: ЕҠ jamanoonaЕӢ Samuwel, Й“a waaЙ—ta waakЙ—u buur. Kooh eЙ—ta Й“a Sawul kuЙ“kiЕӢ Kis yi Й“aah ЕӢ cuuЙ“iЕӢ Benyaamin. A nikka buur kiis ndaЕӢkiyaah-nikiis (40).
13.22: Kooh ruhsiЙ—ta Й—e, a eЙ—ta Й“a Dawuuda findi buur. Kooh seede'iЙ—ta Й—e inii : вҖң ЕҠ hotiЙ— ЕӢ Dawuuda kuЙ“kiЕӢ Yesay, Жҙaari neЙ“ po ЕӢ keeГұ, yi tuman ini ЕӢ waaЙ— jen. вҖқ
13.23: ЕҠ ineem, Kooh Й“ayiЙ—ta Israayel ci MucЙ—oh ngaЕӢ Й“i rimkoh ЕӢ Dawuuda findi a gapohee wa, te MucЙ—oheem, e Yeesu.
13.24: Bala Yeesu hayan Й—ah, Yahya woyeen na Israayel ci jen, a Й“eeЙ—ukka Й“a ne Й“a Й“oЖҙsoh pesohaaЙ—, te Й“a Й“oktu.
13.25: Wi pangkiЕӢ Yahya na hee reehe, a meeЙ— woo ne : вҖң ЖҠu liiЙ“ ne Гұam Й“a ? Г‘am yi Й—u na seke haa ; waaye Й“oyeem, a yi hay ЕӢ finhooso te ЕӢ yeyyooЙ—i sah toksiЙ— Й—e ГұafaЙ— ciЕӢ Й—e. вҖқ
13.26: ЖҒaah ciЕӢ ngo, Й—u Й“i rimkoh ЕӢ Ibrahiima, na Й—u Й“i nup Kooh te Й—u nikka na Й“oo ndii, Kooh woosoh Й“oo woo kiЕӢ muci.
13.27: ЖҒi Yerusalem na kilifaacaЕӢ Й“a, inheeЙ—i ya Й“a a yi nikee Yeesu, Й“a nameeЙ—i inah ini woo ciЕӢ woosuuЙ— ci tokis, woo ci meeЙ— jangu ЕӢ mbehi na iЙ—siЙ—kohse nu ree. Te kat, Й“a tumeen po ini woosuuЙ— ceem woyee raakka, wa Й“a na atte'ee Yeesu ne a apu.
13.28: ЖҒa hoteeЙ—i ini joy Й—e tah atte'u kaan, waaye Й“a woosa Pilaat ne a apaat Й—e.
13.29: Wi Й“a mitiЙ— in ci Fiis ci woyee nga Й—e jen, Й“a kooЙ—ohha Й—e ЕӢ kurwaana, Й“a Й—aakka Й—e ЕӢ ruy-ruy.
13.31: NgaЕӢ Й“i neeh laayiЙ—, a teeЙ“keeЙ—a Й“i Й“o', Й“a hoteeЙ—a Й—e jahran. ЖҒooЙ“eem nikee Й“ooЙ“a pulohee na Й—e Galile, kaЙ—ta Yerusalem, te Й“ooЙ“eem nikka Й“ooЙ“i na seede'ee Й—e woti-woti ЕӢ fiki cuuЙ“i.
13.32: Te Й“oo hayiЙ— ne Й“oo woo Й—u YegЙ—ohiЕӢ Muci : Ini Kooh gapee caac caЕӢ Й“oo,
13.33: a mitЙ—iЙ— ineem wuu Й“oo Й“i set ciЕӢ Й“a, ЕӢ hultiЙ—i a hultiЙ— Yeesu, findi wa fiisohu ЕӢ saari kanakЙ—oh ЕӢ Sabuur . Wa woo ne : вҖң A fu KuЙ“kiЕӢ ngo, ini kooЙ—oh woti, Гұam rim Й—a. вҖқ
13.34: Kooh gapoheen ne a hey Й—e hultiЙ—e, po a dokissanЙ—i a kee nopa ЕӢ ruy-ruy, weЙ— Kooh woo, wi a woo ЕӢ Fiis ci ne : вҖң ЕҠ hey Й—u one in ci hooliЙ— ci te ca carra kosu, ci ЕӢ gapee Dawuuda. вҖқ
13.35: WeЙ— tah, a woyissa ЕӢ Й—isik wiiriis ЕӢ Fiis ci ne : вҖң Fu faЙ—anЙ—i Г‘aamiЕӢ Й—a yi fu min ooluk, a nopee ЕӢ ruy-ruya. вҖқ
13.36: Moona Dawuuda ЕӢ jamanoonaЕӢ Й—e, a pangkiЙ— ЕӢ waaЙ—-waaЙ—iЕӢ Kooh, a kaannda, a dabba caac caЕӢ Й—e, faaniЕӢ Й—e noppa ЕӢ ruy-ruya.
13.37: Waaye yi Kooh hultiЙ—, faaniЕӢ Й—e nopЙ—i ЕӢ ruy-ruya.
13.38: -39 Kon Й“aah ciЕӢ ngo, inhaat ne, a yi tah Й—u yegЙ—assee ne Й—u Й—aasuuЙ— bakaaЙ— ciЕӢ Й—u, te Й“o' nu kos ЕӢ Yeesu Й—ah, in ci fu mineeЙ—i Й—aasu ЕӢ waasiЕӢ Musaa jen, Kooh hey Й—a ca Й—aase, a amb Й—a findi Й“o' yurhiЙ—.
13.40: Kon wortukaat po ini woosuuЙ— ca woyee wii rahsuu Й—u an :
13.41: вҖң Markaat, Й—u Й“i na heefohe ! Feysaat, sooЖҙaat ! ЕҠ hey haЙ“Й—e ЕӢ jamanooniЕӢ Й—u, ini fu inah ne Й—u naandsuksee wa naandsuku Й—ah, Й—u kosuu wa. вҖқ В»
13.42: Wa Pool na Barnabaas pul sinaagoga , Й“ooЙ“a kiimmba Й“a ne mbehi na iЙ—siЙ—kohse na haye, Й“a dokkis ЕӢ woo ka.
13.43: Wa Й“ooЙ“a pasarkoh, Yawuut laayiЙ—, na laayiЙ— ЕӢ Й“a tuuЙ“ee nikka Yawuut, Гұaakka ЕӢ Pool na Barnabaas. ЖҒeem Й“eesЙ—oheeЙ—a na Й“a, ГұaaheeЙ—a Й“a ne Й“a amb ndengiЙ— oolkohi Й“a oolkoh baahohiЕӢ Kooh. Pool na Barnabaas kaЙ—iЙ— ЕӢ Й“i nikЙ—i Yawuut
13.44: Wa mbeha na iЙ—siЙ—kohse dokkis, Й“o' min woo ne kur ka jen Й“eЙ— coh ne Й“a sikЙ—uk woo kiЕӢ HeЙ— Й“oo.
13.45: Wa Yawuut ca hot mboolnda, Й“a siiseeЙ—a Pool na Barnabaas, Й“a taaseeЙ—a Pool, Й“a Й“aseeЙ—a Й—e.
13.46: ЕҠ ndeem Pool na Barnabaas neЖҙЖҙohЙ—i nga, woosa Й“a ne : В« E Й—u joy koc yegЙ—u woo kiЕӢ Kooh, waaye ЕӢ gantuki Й—u gantuka, Й—u atte haf Й—u ne Й—u yeyyooЙ—i raak kipes ki reehanЙ—i. Kon Й“oo Й“ii yurah ЕӢ cuuЙ“ ci cinooci.
13.47: Laam weЙ— ini HeЙ—i nak Й“oo, wi a woo ne : вҖң ЕҠ tufkiЙ—iЙ— Й—a ne fu nik siГұaariЕӢ cuuЙ“ ci, fu Й“ay muci po Й—isik nu Й—isik ЕӢ Adina. вҖқ В»
13.48: Wa Й“ooЙ“a nikЙ—i Yawuut kerah woo ceem, Й“a summba keeh-keeh, Й“a laasukka woo kiЕӢ HeЙ—i te Й“ooЙ“a Kooh kooЙ—ee ne Й“a rahas kipes ki reehanЙ—i jen kossa.
13.49: Woo kiЕӢ HeЙ— Й“oo pasarkohha ЕӢ kur ca nikee ndaam jen.
13.50: Waaye Yawuut ca hiirra yakak caЕӢ kur-taaha, na Й“i Й“itiЙ“ ; yakak ceem na Й“itiЙ“ ceem tolfiЙ—eeЙ—a Pool na Barnabaas po Й“a puliЙ—ta Й“a ЕӢ kur caam jen. ЖҒitiЙ“ ceem meeЙ— meeЙ— Гұaamuk Kooh, Й“a nikee Й“itiЙ“ raakiЙ— tiik.
13.51: ЕҠ ineem Pool na Barnabaas farsiЙ—ta Й“a merhey miЕӢ kot ciЕӢ Й“a ndeem, kaЙ—ta IkoГұum.
13.52: Waaye ini kaЙ— ЕӢ taalubeeca, Й“a summba keeh-keeh, Й“a riiffa na FuuЙ—si Hoolohngaani.

14.1: Wa Pool na Barnabaas nik ЕӢ IkoГұum wa nikohissa Й—aa : ЖҒa aassa ЕӢ sinaagogaЕӢ Yawuut ca. ЖҒa woyeeЙ—a na Й“ooЙ“a ЕӢ woo kiЕӢ Kooh po Yawuut na nikaaЙ—i Yawuut laayiЙ— kossa.
14.2: Waaye Yawuut ca kosaaЙ—iica tummba po Й“i nikЙ—i Yawuut raakka liiЙ“ohaaЙ— moЙ—aaЙ—i ЕӢ Й“aah caЕӢ Й“oo kosiЙ— ca.
14.3: HondohЙ—i nak Pool na Barnabaas taalndiЙ—ta nikka ЕӢ kur-taaha. ЖҒa woyeeЙ—a woo kiЕӢ Kooh na hel daliЙ—, laam Й“a oolkeen HeЙ— Й“oo te a ndengЙ—een ne woo ki teeЙ“oh baahohiЕӢ Й—e wa keeh. ЕҠ ineem a onnda Й“a, Й“a tumeeЙ—a Й“i keemaan na Й“i in feyohiЙ—.
14.4: ЖҒooЙ“aЕӢ kur ka kerhiЙ—ohЙ—i, Й“a paysukohha kanak : ЖҒum lannga na Yawuut ca, Й“inooЙ“a lannga na Apootar ci.
14.5: Yawuut ca na nikaaЙ—i Yawuut ca hunnda na kilifaacaЕӢ Й“a, Й“a kooЙ—ukka tum Pool na Barnabaas miskiЙ—, Й“a tap Й“a atoh po Й“a ap Й“a.
14.6: Waaye wi Й“a inaha, Й“a kaЙ—ta naafka ЕӢ kur-taah caЕӢ Likawni cii : Listar, Derbe na ina wil ca.
14.7: ЖҒa woyeeЙ—a YegЙ—ohiЕӢ Muci ЕӢ ndaam. Pool na Barnabaas ЕӢ Listar
14.8: ЕҠ Listar, wa raakeen Жҙaar minaaЙ—i tufuk nga ; a rimuk rimuk na ineem, a moosЙ—i tiindoh. A nikka Й“oofiЙ—,
14.9: a sikЙ—ukeeЙ—a woo kiЕӢ Pool. Pool iiЖҙca Й—e, hotta ne Жҙaara raakiЙ— kos ne a min wirЙ—u,
14.10: a woosa Й—e ЕӢ Й—afka ne : В« Kurka, fu tufuk koc na kot ciЕӢ Й—a ! В» Жіaara kurukka japit, a tiindeeЙ—a.
14.11: Wa mboolnda hot ini Pool haЙ“iЙ—, Й“a leehukka, Й“a woosa ЕӢ Likawni peЙ—maЕӢ Й“a ne : В« Hee, kooh ci Й“ayiЙ— mandohaaЙ— Й“o', ca ruhsiЙ— nga Й“oo. В»
14.12: ЖҒa teekka Barnabaas Sos, Й“a teekka Pool Hermes , laam a yi Й“ayohee woo ki.
14.13: Wa raakeen ЕӢ aasohaanaЕӢ kur ka Й—iska Й“a meeЙ— Гұaamkoh Sos. SeeЖҙkiЙ—oha Й“ayya, ЕӢ fiki buntaanaЕӢ wa, Й“i naar inoh Й“ekЙ—uuЙ— tokkaah haЙ“Й—ohuuЙ— pos. A waaЙ—ta hun na mboolnda ne a seeЖҙkoh ca Barnabaas na Pool.
14.14: Wa Barnabaas na Pool kerah ineem, Й“a faarra kulЙ“aacaЕӢ Й“a sagu araami wa araam, Й“a faЙ—sukka mboolnda, Й“a woyeeЙ—a ЕӢ Й—afka ne :
14.15: В« ЖіaaЙ“iЕӢ ngo, wa ye Й“ek Й—u ЕӢ inii ? ЖҒoo nam nik Й“o' njaay findiiЙ—u. ЖҒoo hay ne Й“oo woo Й—u yegЙ—oh neЙ“iЙ— ne Й—u faЙ— in ci raakaaЙ—i njiriГұ ci te Й—u wiiruk ЕӢ Koohi na pese, yi fer Eel ci na kehЖҙi na cookmi na in ci nik nga ca jen.
14.16: WotЙ“a, a faЙ—een cuuЙ“ ci jen, waa nu nga Й—ah taambЙ—eeЙ—a waasiЕӢ Й—e.
14.17: HondohЙ—i a taalndiЙ—ta a teeЙ“eeЙ—a Й“a baah kiЕӢ Й—e : A ruhsiЙ—eeЙ—a toЙ“i ЕӢ eel ci wuu Й—u, a laaЙ“Й—eeЙ—a yohon ci ЕӢ jamanooniЕӢ wa, a oneeЙ—a Й—u kaГұam, a riifЙ—eeЙ—a keeГұ ciЕӢ Й—u na sum. В»
14.18: Na woo ceem jen sah, wa yooЙ“eeЙ—i ЕӢ Barnabaas na Pool ne Й“a hondoh mboolnda seeЖҙuk wuu Й“a.
14.19: Wa ineem coot, Й“i Yawuut pulohha AГұcos-Pisidi na IkoГұum, Й“a tummba po mboolnda lannga na Й“a. ЖҒeem tapeeЙ—a Pool atoh ne Й“a ap Й—e, Жҙutta Й“a faseeЙ—a Й—e po Й“a pulla kur ka, Й“a liiЙ“ee ne a kaaniЙ—.
14.20: Waaye wa taalubeeca hay ndeerra Й—e, Pool kurukka, a aassa kur ka. ЕҠ Kooh-wiisiina, a hunnda na Barnabaas, Й“a kaЙ—ta Derbe. Pool na Barnabaas dokkiЙ— AГұcos
14.21: Pool na Barnabaas woosa YegЙ—ohiЕӢ Muci ЕӢ Derbe, Й“i Й“o' laayiЙ— ndaam kossa, Й“a nikka taalube. ЕҠ ineem, Й“a dokukka Listar, IkoГұum na AГұcos-Pisidi,
14.22: Й“a ndengtineeЙ—a taalubeeca, Й“a ГұaaheeЙ—a Й“a ne Й“a amb ndengiЙ— kosi Й“a kos. ЖҒa woosa Й“a ne : В« ЖҒoo joyiЙ— taamb ЕӢ miskiЙ— laayiЙ— Й“oo han aas ЕӢ NguuriЕӢ-Kooh. В»
14.23: Jangu nu nik Й—ah, Pool na Barnabaas tannda Й“i yakak nga ne Й“eem adgoha, Й“a kiimeeЙ—a Kooh, Й“a oreeЙ—a, Й“a faЙ—ta Й“a ЕӢ yaah HeЙ— Й“oo yi Й“a kose.
14.24: ЖҒa pulohha ndeem, Й“a lahha ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ Pisidi, Й“a kaЙ—ta Pamfili.
14.25: ЖҒa yegЙ—ohha woo kiЕӢ Kooh ЕӢ Perge, Жҙutta Й“a kaЙ—ta Attali.
14.26: ЕҠ ndaam, Й“a aassa bato ne Й“a wiiruk AГұcos, Й—iska kosiЙ— ca wikohee Й“a Kooh ne a baahohaat Й“a ЕӢ pangki Й“a mitiЙ— wii.
14.27: Wa Pool na Barnabaas ree AГұcos, Й“a cohЙ—ohha Й“i Janguuna, Й“a naandsukka Й“a in ci Kooh haЙ“iЙ— taamboh nga Й“a jen, na findi a rangsiЙ—oh Й“ooЙ“i nikЙ—i Yawuut waasiЕӢ kosi.
14.28: ЖҒa tassa ЕӢ ndaam in maaГұiЙ— na taalubeeci.

15.1: Wa raakeen Й“i Й“o', Й“a pulohee Yudee, Й“a hayya AГұcos, Й“a jangЙ—eeЙ—a Й“aah ciЕӢ Й“oo kosiЙ— ci ne Й“a nguЙ—ukЙ—i findi waasiЕӢMusaa nakoha Й—ah, Й“a heyЙ—i mine mucЙ—u.
15.2: Pool na Barnabaas muuЖҙohha na Й“a, taastiЙ—oheeЙ—a na Й“a taastiЙ—oh miskiЙ— ЕӢ ineem. ЕҠ mirndaani, kosiЙ— caЕӢ AГұcos ammba ne Pool na Barnabaas joyiЙ— hun na Й“i Й“o' Й“aah nga Й“a, Й“a kaЙ— Yerusalem ЕӢ Apootar ca na yakak ca ЕӢ ndaam, Й“a woo ЕӢ ineem.
15.3: ЖҒi Janguuna eЙ—ta Й“a ini Й“a Й“ayan ЕӢ Й“aaЙ“iЕӢ Й“a. ЖҒa lahha Feniis na Samari, Й“a naandsukeeЙ—a findi Й“ooЙ“i nikЙ—i Yawuut hayoh ЕӢ HeЙ—i. Ineem soosiЙ—ta lool keeГұ ciЕӢ Й“aah caЕӢ Й“oo kosiЙ— ca jen.
15.4: Wa Й“a ree Yerusalem, Й“i Janguuna na Apootar ca, na yakak caЕӢ Janguuna taambkohha Й“a. ЖҒa naandsukka Й“a in ci Kooh tum jen taamboh nga Й“a.
15.5: Waaye wa raakeen Й“i Й“o' Й“aah ЕӢ Farisen ca, Й“a koseen, Й“a kurukka, Й“a woyeeЙ—a ne : В« KosiЙ— ci nikЙ—i Yawuut joy joy nguЙ—u, Й“a woyu ne Й“a taambЙ—aat waasiЕӢ Musaa. В»
15.6: Apootar ca na yakak ca cohha ne Й“a marak ineem.
15.7: ЖҒa taastiЙ—oheeЙ—a po, Piyeer kurukka, woosa Й“a ne : В« ЖҒaah ciЕӢ ngo, Й—u inhiЙ— ne Kooh taniЙ— to maaГұiЙ— ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ Й—u ne ЕӢ inhiЙ— Й“i nikЙ—i Yawuut YegЙ—ohiЕӢ Muci ne Й“a keraha, Й“a kos.
15.8: Te Kooh yi inah ini nik ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ keeГұ ci teeЙ“ohiЙ— ne a teyЙ—ukiЙ— Й“a, ЕӢ oni a on Й“a ne Й“a rahas FuuЙ—si Hoolohngaani findi a onoha Й“oo.
15.9: Kooh raakЙ—i ali talsoh ЕӢ harmban Й“oo na Й“a, a hoolЙ—iЙ— keeГұ ciЕӢ Й“a ЕӢ kosi Й“a kos.
15.10: Kon Й—iski wa nik, wa ye tah Й—u waaksiЙ—ke Kooh ЕӢ waaЙ—i Й—u waaЙ— raan taalubeeci Й—ufi Й“oo na caac ciЕӢ Й“oo moosЙ—i min raanuk ?
15.11: Muk ! Ini Й“oo kos weЙ— ne HeЙ— Й“oo Yeesu mucЙ—iЙ— Й“oo findi a nam Й“a mucЙ—oh ЕӢ baahohi a baahoh Й“oo jen. В»
15.12: Wa Piyeer woo woo keem, Й“ooЙ“a jen sikЙ—ukeeЙ—a Barnabaas na Pool, Й“eem naandsukka Й“a firndeeci na keemaan ci laayiЙ— ci Kooh tum taamboh nga Й“a ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ Й“ooЙ“i nikЙ—i Yawuut.
15.13: Wa Й“a Жҙut woo, Saak kooЙ—ta woo ka, a woosa ne : В« ЖҒaah ciЕӢ ngo, sikЙ—ukaat to !
15.14: Simong naandsukiЙ— Й—u wi Kooh camb taambkoh Й“i nikЙ—i Yawuut ne a tan nga Й“a cuuЙ“i nikan wiЕӢ Й—e.
15.15: Te woo ciЕӢ woosuuЙ— ci huniЙ— ЕӢ ineem, findi wa fiisohu an :
15.16: вҖң Kooh woo ne : ЕҠ finho in ceem, ЕӢ hey hayisse te ЕӢ hey tufkiЙ—isse kahniЕӢ Dawuuda keene, ЕӢ nangЙ—oh pook-pook ciЕӢ wa, ЕӢ taЙ“ahisa.
15.17: ЕҠ ineem, ini tas ЕӢ Й“ooЙ“iЕӢ adinaani hey waake HeЙ—i, Ee di' ! CuuЙ“ ci ЕӢ tan jen ne Й“a nik wuu so, hey yo waake. Ineem weЙ— HeЙ—i woo, yi na tume in ceem,
15.18: te a inhiЙ—iЙ— Й“ooЙ“i wa in maaГұiЙ—. вҖқ
15.19: WeЙ— tah, mi yi Saak, ЕӢ huniЙ— nga ne Й“oo kinaat yaaЙ“iЙ— Й“i na haye ЕӢ Kooh te Й“a nikЙ—i Yawuut.
15.20: Waaye Й“oo fiisЙ—aat Й“a ne Й“a wortukaat Гұam kaГұam ci seeЖҙkohu wuu kooh ci nikaaЙ—iici, kaГұam ceem hoolЙ—i. ЖҒa nam wortuk faankoh sangohuuЙ—, na Гұam med, na an Гұif.
15.21: Laam ЕӢ Й—eЙ“gaan po wi, Й“i Й“o' Й“ii yegЙ—oh waasiЕӢ Musaa ЕӢ kur-taah nu nik te ЕӢ mbeh ci na iЙ—siЙ—kohse jen, teereeciЕӢ waasiЕӢ Musaa na jangse jangu ЕӢ sinaagog ci. В» Kayit fiisuuЙ—, kaЙ“Й—ohuusa kosiЙ— ca nikЙ—i Yawuut
15.22: Wa Saak Жҙut woo, Apootar ca na yakak ca na Й“i Janguuna jen hunnda ne Й“a kooЙ— Й“i Й“o' ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ Й“a, Й“a tuuЖҙ Й“a AГұcos, Й“a hun na Pool na Barnabaas. ЖҒa kooЙ—ta Yuud yi na Й“eeЙ—kohse Barsabaas, na Silaas. ЖҒeЙ— Й“i kanak ceem, Й“a nikee Й“o' kerhiЙ—uuЙ— ЕӢ Й“aah ciЕӢ Й“oo kosiЙ— ci.
15.23: ЖҒa eЙ—ta Й“a kayti fiisu inii : В« ЖҠu Й“i Й“aah ciЕӢ Й“oo nikЙ—i Yawuut te Й—u gennda AГұcos, Siri na Silisi, Й“oo Й“ii kaГұiЙ— Й—u, Й“oo Й“i Й“aah ciЕӢ Й—u Apootar ci na yakak ci.
15.24: ЖҒoo kerhiЙ— ne raakiЙ— Й“ooЙ“i puloh nga Й“oo ndii Й“a hayya nga Й—u, Й“a ambsohha haf ciЕӢ Й—u, Й“a yahrohha hel ciЕӢ Й—u na woo ciЕӢ Й“a, te Й“oo nakЙ—i Й“a wa.
15.25: Ineem weЙ— tah Й“oo hunnda Й“oo kooЙ—ta Й“i Й“o', Й“oo woossa Й“a nga Й—u. ЖҒoo ambsohha Й“a na Barnabaas na Pool, Й“aah ciЕӢ Й“oo Й“oo keeГұkoh,
15.26: Й“i eЙ—oh kipes ciЕӢ Й“a wuu Yeesu Kiristaa, HeЙ— Й“oo.
15.27: Kon Й“oo Й“ii tuuЖҙ Yuud na Silaas ne Й“a woo Й—u na nguЙ“ ini Й“oo fiis ЕӢ kaytii.
15.28: Ini neЙ“ FuuЙ—si Hoolohngaani te wa neЙ“pa Й“oo weЙ— ne Й“oo heyЙ—i Й—u raane nakoh wiiriis Й—al ci minЙ—i faЙ—u cii :
15.29: Kinaat Гұam kaГұam ci seeЖҙkohu wuu kooh nikaaЙ—i, kinaat an Гұif, kinaat Гұam med, wortukaat njaaloo. ЖҠu penduk in ceem Й—ah, wa hey baahe. Nikaat ЕӢ jam ! В»
15.30: Wa kayta fiisu po Жҙutta, Й“ooЙ“a tuuЖҙsee kurkohha ndaam, Й“a kaЙ—ta AГұcos. Wa Й“a ree, Й“a cohЙ—ohha Й“ooЙ“a, Й“a eЙ—ta Й“a kayta fiisuuЙ—a.
15.31: Wa janguusa, Й“ooЙ“a summba ЕӢ ini wa woo, wa Й“aatta ndengiЙ— kosi Й“a kos.
15.32: Yuud na Silaas Й“eЙ— ЕӢ haf Й“a, Й“a nikee woosuuЙ—. ЕҠ ineem Й“a woyeeЙ—a na Й“aah caЕӢ Й“oo kosiЙ— ca in maaГұiЙ—, Й“a ГұaaheeЙ—a Й“a, Й“a ndengЙ—eeЙ—a kosi Й“a kos.
15.33: ЖҒa nikka ЕӢ ndaam in samiЙ— maaГұ, Жҙutta Й“aah caЕӢ Й“oo kosiЙ— ca faЙ—ta Й“a ne Й“a dokuk moЙ—oЙ— ЕӢ Й“ooЙ“a woosee Й“a. [
15.34: Waaye Silaas tassa ЕӢ AГұcos, Yuud dokukka Yerusalem kiik ce.]
15.35: Pool na Barnabaas tassa ЕӢ AГұcos, Й“a taalndiЙ—ta na Й“i Й“o' laayiЙ— Й“a jangЙ—oheeЙ—a, Й“a yegЙ—oheeЙ—a woo kiЕӢ muci, wi kaЙ— ЕӢ HeЙ—i. Pool na Barnabaas hunisЙ—i
15.36: Wa degga Й“i neeh, Pool woosa Barnabaas ne : В« ЖҒoo dokkaat marka Й“aah ciЕӢ Й“oo kosiЙ— ci ЕӢ kur-taah ci Й“oo taamboh jen yegЙ—oheeЙ—a woo kiЕӢ HeЙ—i, Й“oo marak findi Й“a nikoh. В»
15.37: Barnabaas waaЙ—ta Й“ayndoh SaaЕӢ yi na woyse Maarko,
15.38: waaye Pool hotta ne Й“a joyЙ—i Й—e Й“ayndoh, sagu faЙ—a a faЙ—ee Й“a ЕӢ Pamfili a hunisЙ—i na Й“a ЕӢ pangkaЕӢ Й“a.
15.39: ЖҒa nookohha nookoh miskiЙ— po Й“a mirndohha saЙ“sukoh. Barnabaas Й“ayndohha Maarko, Й“a aassa batoona na kaЙ—e Siipar.
15.40: Pool nak, a tannda Silaas ne a kaЙ— na Й—e. ЖҒaah caЕӢ Й“oo kosiЙ— ca dengkohha Й“a HeЙ—i, ЕӢ baahohiЕӢ Й—e, Й“a cootta.
15.41: ЖҒa taammba Siri na Silisi Й“a ГұaaheeЙ—a Й“ooЙ“a Й“aahee ЕӢ Janguuca ne Й“a ndengЙ—uk ЕӢ kosiЕӢ Й“a.

16.1: Wa Pool taamb ЕӢ Siri na Silisi, a kaЙ—ta Derbe, Жҙutta a kaЙ—ta Listar. Raakeen ЕӢ ndaam taalube teeku Timoote, yaay Й“a nikee Yawuut kosiЙ—, waaye baab Й“a nikee Gerek.
16.2: ЖҒaah caЕӢ Й“oo kosiЙ— ca nikee ЕӢ Listar na IkoГұum seede'een baah kiЕӢ Timoote.
16.3: Pool waaЙ—ta ne a hun na Й—e ; ЕӢ ineem a Й“ayya Й—e, a nguЙ—ta Й—e sagu Yawuut ca genee ЕӢ Й“ak caam. Laam Й“a inheen jen ne baab Й“a Gerek.
16.4: Pool na Silaas hunnda na Timoote, Й“a taambeeЙ—a kur na kur, Й“a woyeeЙ—a kosiЙ— ca ini Apootar ci na yakak caЕӢ JanguunaЕӢ Yerusalem woo ЕӢ cohaЕӢ Й“a, Й“a nakka Й“a ne, Й“a taambЙ—aat ineem.
16.5: ЕҠ ineem, kosiЙ— ca uupeeЙ—a ndeng ЕӢ kosiЕӢ Й“a, Й“a Й“aateeЙ—a laay Kooh-nu-wiis. FuuЙ—si Hoolohngaani Й“eeЙ—kiЙ— Pool ne a kaЙ— Maseduwaan
16.6: FuuЙ—si Hoolohngaani hondohha Pool na Silaas yegЙ—oh YegЙ—ohiЕӢ Muci ЕӢ kur caЕӢ Asi. WeЙ— Й“a taamboh ЕӢ Й“akiЕӢ Firisi wi Й“aah ЕӢ Galaat.
16.7: Wa Й“a ree ЕӢ sero kur caЕӢ Misi, Й“a jeemmba kaЙ— caЕӢ Bitini waaye FuuЙ—siЕӢ Yeesu onЙ—i Й“a ne Й“a kaЙ— ndaam.
16.8: WeЙ— Й“a taamboh ЕӢ Misi, Й“a kaЙ—ta Torowaas, ЕӢ sero cookma.
16.9: Na weka, in hayЙ—ohha Pool findi heeЖҙ : An a hot Й“o' gen Maseduwaan tufkiЙ— kiimeeЙ—a Й—e keeh-keeh ne : В« Aasa bato , fu hay Maseduwaan, fu Й“aatЙ—oh Й“oo ! В»
16.10: Wa Pool heeЖҙ heeЖҙeem, wa hooleen Й“oo ne e Kooh na Й“eeЙ—ke Й“oo ne Й“oo kaЙ— woya YegЙ—ohiЕӢ Muci ЕӢ ndaam. Jaarra Й“oo markeeЙ—a findi Й“oo kaЙ—ohan Maseduwaan. Liidi kosiЙ— Yeesu
16.11: WeЙ— Й“oo kooЙ—oh bato ЕӢ Torowaas, Й“oo yurhiЙ—ta kur ka na woyse Samotaraas, a masuЙ“ wila. ЕҠ Kooh-wiisiina, Й“oo kurkohha ndaam, Й“oo kaЙ—ta Neyapoli.
16.12: ЖҒoo pulohha ndeem, Й“oo kaЙ—ta Filippi. Filippi, wa Й“aahee ЕӢ kur-taah ca Й“i kur kaЕӢ Rom raakootee, te ngaЕӢ Maseduwaan jen, weЙ— uupЙ—ee njiriГұ ЕӢ kur-taah caam. ЖҒoo nikka ЕӢ kur keem Й“i neeh.
16.13: Wa mbehi na iЙ—siЙ—kohse ree, Й“oo pulla ЕӢ bilaf faЕӢ kur-taaha, ЕӢ sero huluЙ“, Й—iska Й“oo liiЙ“ee ne wa Й—isik kiimoha Kooh. ЖҒi Й“itiЙ“ coheen ndaam, Й“oo Й“ooffa, Й“oo Й“eesЙ—oheeЙ—a na Й“a.
16.14: Wa raakeen Й“itiЙ“ nga Й“a teeku Liidi, a nikee toonoh cuup ruumind, a genee kur-taahaЕӢ Tiyatiir, a nikee Й“o' nupiЙ— Kooh. A sikЙ—ukeeЙ—a Й“oo baahiЙ—. HeЙ— Й“oo rangissa keeГұiЕӢ Liidi yeem po a teyЙ—ukka ini Pool woye.
16.15: A Й“oktuusa a yi na Й“i kahan ce, Жҙutta a kiimmba Й“oo ne : В« Nik ne Й—u hotiЙ— ne ЕӢ kosiЙ— HeЙ— Й“oo Й—ah, hayaat Й—u dal ЕӢ kahan ndo. В» A tummba po Й“oo teyЙ—ukka. Pool na Silaas taЖҙuuЙ— ЕӢ Filippi
16.16: Wa raakka mbeh, Й“oo kaЙ—eeЙ—a Й—iska na kiimohse Kooh, Й“oo cohha na cafaЖҙ, a nikee Гұaam. Г‘aameem hunee na jiini, jiinndi Й“ekee Й—e ЕӢ markis. MarkisiЕӢ Й—e meeЙ— meeЙ— kom Й“ooЙ“i raakee Й—e kopor laayiЙ—.
16.17: A ГұaakЙ—eeЙ—a Pool, raak Й“oo hun na Pool, a woyeeЙ—a ЕӢ Й—afka ne : В« ЖҒooЙ“ii, Й“a surgaaciЕӢ Koohi uup yak, Й“a hay ne Й“a teeЙ“ Й—u waasiЕӢ muci. В»
16.18: A gennda gen a woyeeЙ—a ineem Й“i neeh laayiЙ—, waaye wi wa kaЙ— po wa yaaЙ“iЙ—ta Pool, Pool gurdukka jiinnda nikee ЕӢ kuЙ“ka cafЖҙa, a woosa Й—e ne : В« Г‘am woo Й—a wa, ЕӢ tiikiЕӢ Yeesu Kiristaa, pula ЕӢ Й“oyii ! В» ЕҠ Й—iska Й—iska jiinnda pulla ЕӢ kuЙ“ka cafЖҙa.
16.19: Wa Й“i heЙ— Гұaama hot ne Й“a malkisЙ—i ina Й“a meeЙ— maluk nga Й—e, Й“a ammba Pool na Silaas, Й“a faseeЙ—a Й“a po ЕӢ Й—iska na toonohse, ЕӢ fiki kilifaaca.
16.20: ЖҒa kommba Й“a kilifaaca adgohee kur ka, Й“a woosa Й“a ne : В« ЖіaaЙ“ii Й“a na yoonde kur kiЕӢ Й“oo te Й“a Yawuut.
16.21: ЖҒa na jangЙ—ohe mbaah ci fu inah ne waas onЙ—i Й“oo ne Й“oo teyЙ—uk ca wala taambiЙ— ca, Й“oo Й“i Й“aah ЕӢ Rom. В»
16.22: Mboolnda nammba hun nga, Й“a keennda Pool na Silaas. WeЙ— kilifaaca nakohoh ne Й“a wolsassaat, Й“a laЙ“u ndooЙ—.
16.23: Wa Й“a laЙ“ Й“a laЙ“ miskiЙ— po Жҙutta, Й“a rannga Й“a ЕӢ kasoona. Kilifaaca woosa Жҙaara niiЙ—ee kasoona ne a niiЙ—aat Й“a baahiЙ—.
16.24: Denga Жҙaara niiЙ—ee kasoona dengse, tahha po, a Й“ayya Й“a ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ Й—ooЖҙ kasoona, a jatannga kot ciЕӢ Й“a jatang miskiЙ— na hang.
16.25: ЕҠ ndengelnde weka, Pool na Silaas kiimeeЙ—a Kooh, Й“a ЖҙeekeeЙ—a yakkiЕӢ Kooh, ambuuЙ— ca Й“inooЙ“a sikЙ—ukeeЙ—a Й“a.
16.26: ЖҠekka po kehЖҙi yoondЙ—ukka keeh-keeh po fondamaanaЕӢ kasoona yoondЙ—ukka, jaarra buntaaca jen rangsukka, jatang caЕӢ Й“ooЙ“a ambsee jen toksukka.
16.27: WeЙ— Жҙaara niiЙ—ee kasoona yunkoh, a hotta buntaaca rangsukiЙ—, a fuurra ndangaЕӢ Й—e ne a ap haf ce. A liiЙ“ee ne ambuuЙ— ca fusiЙ— .
16.28: Waaye Pool woosa ЕӢ Й—afka ne : В« Kina tum haf fu miskiЙ—, Й“oo jen Й“oo Й“ii nga. В»
16.29: Жіaara meeksohha niitoha, a arra aas, a tiitta po a saakЙ—oheeЙ—a, a Жҙekka ЕӢ fiki Pool na Silaas.
16.30: Жіutta a puliЙ—ta Й“a ЕӢ hara, a meekissa Й“a ne : В« Kilifaaci, ЕӢ joy tum na po ЕӢ min muc ? В»
16.31: ЖҒa loffa Й—e ne : В« Kosa Yeesu HeЙ—i, fu hey muce, fu na Й“i kahan fu. В»
16.32: ЕҠ ineem, Й“a woosa Й—e woo kiЕӢ HeЙ—i, a yi na Й“i gen kahan ce jen.
16.33: ЕҠ wahtuuneem ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ weka, Жҙaara niiЙ—ee kasoona Й“ayya Pool na Silaas, a Й“ookiЙ—ta Й“a gaaГұ caЕӢ Й“a ; a Й“oktuusa ЕӢ Й—iska Й—iska, a yi na Й“i kahan ce jen.
16.34: Жіutta, a Й“ayya Й“a ЕӢ kahan ce, a degiЙ—ta Й“a kaГұam, a summba lool ЕӢ ini a kos Kooh, a yi na Й“i kahan ce jen. Pool na Silaas faЙ—suuЙ—
16.35: Wa Kooh wiis, kilifaaca kanak ca adgohee kur ka tuuЖҙca Й“i alkaate ne Й“a woya Жҙaara niiЙ—ee kasoona ne a faЙ—is ЖҙaaЙ“aam.
16.36: Yeem woosa Pool ne : В« Kilifaaci woosohiЙ— nga so ne Й—u faЙ—su ; kon pulaat Й—u kaЙ— na jam. В»
16.37: Waaye Pool woosa alkaateeca ne : В« ЖҒa atteeЙ—i Й“oo, Й“a laЙ“Й—ukka Й“oo ЕӢ fiki Й“ooЙ“i, Жҙutta Й“a taЖҙca Й“oo ЕӢ kasooni, te moona Й“oo Й“aah ЕӢ Rom. Kotii Й“a waaЙ— Й“oo faЙ—is te wa yegsuu e ? Muk ! ЖҒa hayaat Й“eЙ— ЕӢ haf Й“a, Й“a puliЙ— Й“oo ! В»
16.38: Alkaateeca woosa kilifaaca kanak ca ineem, Й“eem tiitta lool wa Й“a kerah ne Pool na Silaas Й“aah ЕӢ Rom.
16.39: ЖҒa hayya Й“a Й—aasnuke, Й“a puliЙ—ta Й“a ЕӢ kasoona, Й“a kiimmba Й“a ne Й“a pul kur-taaha.
16.40: Wa Й“a pul kasoona, Pool na Silaas kaЙ—ta kahan Liidi. ЖҒa hotohha na Й“aah caЕӢ Й“oo kosiЙ— ca, Й“a Гұaahha Й“a ЕӢ kosa Й“a kos. Жіutta Й“a cootta.

17.1: Wa Й“a kurkoh Filippi, Pool na Silaas taammba Amfipolis na Apoloni, Й“a kaЙ—ta Tessalonik. ЕҠ ndaam, Yawuut ca raakeen sinaagog nga.
17.2: Pool kaЙ—ta nga, findi a na tumohee wa. Mbehi na iЙ—siЙ—kohse reesa Й—ah, a woyee na Й“a ЕӢ ini kaЙ— ЕӢ Fiis ci, po ca nikka mbeh iЙ—siЙ—koha kaahay.
17.3: A toksiЙ—eeЙ—a Й“a Fiis ci, a teeЙ“eeЙ—a Й“a ne MucЙ—ohi Gapohse joyee joy kaan, a hulit. A woosa ne : В« Yeesu yi mi na woyee Й—u yeem, a yi MucЙ—ohi Gapohse. В»
17.4: Woo ceem aassa Й“i Yawuut, Й“a hunnda na Pool na Silaas. ЖҒo' laayiЙ— ЕӢ Gerek ci nup Kooh, na Й“itiЙ“ laayiЙ— Й“aah ЕӢ raakiЙ— tiik ca nammba hun na Й“a.
17.5: Waaye Yawuut ca Й“inooЙ“a, siis ammba Й“a, Й“a parahha Й“i Й“o' mbalay mbalay ЕӢ mbeeddaaca, Й“a nangЙ—ohha Й“a po Й“a Й—uuЙ—iЙ—ta kur-taaha. ЖҒa kaЙ—ta kahan Yasoon waaka Pool na Silaas ne Й“a Й“ay Й“a ЕӢ fiki Й“ooЙ“a.
17.6: Waaye Й“a raakЙ—i Й“a nga, Й“a Й“ayya Yasoon na Й“i Й“o' wiiriis ЕӢ Й“aah caЕӢ Й“oo kosiЙ— ca, Й“a faseeЙ—a Й“a po ЕӢ fiki kilifaacaЕӢ kur ka. ЖҒa woyeeЙ—a ЕӢ Й—afka ne : В« ЖіaaЙ“ii yoondЙ—iЙ— adinaani jen te Й“a reyiЙ— naa ndii kotii !
17.7: Yasoon dalЙ—iЙ— Й“a ЕӢ kahan ce. ЖҒa jen Й“a na haЙ“Й—e ini Й—aloh na nakoh ciЕӢ buuri yakkiЕӢ Rom, Й“a woo ne buur wiiriis raakiЙ—, teeku Yeesu ! В»
17.8: Woo ceem jaahiЙ—ta mboolnda na kilifaaca.
17.9: Kilifaaca sannga faЙ—is Yasoon na Й“inooЙ“a, po Й“eem tayle kopor, Й“a hannda faЙ—su. Pool na Silaas kaЙ—iЙ— Beree
17.10: ЖҒaah caЕӢ Й“oo kosiЙ— ca jaarra Й“ay Pool na Silaas ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ weka, Й“a cootiЙ—ta Й“a Beree. Wa Й“a ree, Й“a kaЙ—ta sinaagogaЕӢ Yawuut ca.
17.11: Yawuut ca genee nga Й“eЙ— uupee rangsuk Й“aЕӢ Tessalonik, Й“a teyЙ—ukeen woo kiЕӢ Kooh te Й“a sawarra nga lool. Kooh-nu-wiis Й—ah, Й“a jangee Fiis ci ne Й“a marak andi ini Й“a na jangЙ—asse wa keeh wala.
17.12: LaayiЙ— nga Й“a kossa. ЖҒitiЙ“ raakiЙ— tiik na Й“i Жҙaar laayiЙ— ЕӢ Gerek ca nammba kos.
17.13: Waaye wa Yawuut ca genee Tessalonik kerah ne Pool yaa nam yegЙ—oh woo kiЕӢ Kooh ЕӢ Beree, Й“a nammba kaЙ— ndaam, Й“a yopeeЙ—a mboolnda, Й“a Й“ekeeЙ—a Й“a ЕӢ Й—uuЙ—.
17.14: ЕҠ ineem Й“aah caЕӢ Й“oo kosiЙ— ca arra cootiЙ— Pool po ЕӢ cookma, waaye Silaas na Timoote tassa ЕӢ Beree.
17.15: ЖҒi Й“endee Pool Й“ayya Й—e po Ateen. Жіutta Й“a dokukka Beree na nakohiЕӢ Pool ne Silaas na Timoote raakaat Й—e ndaam findi wa uup gaawoh Й—ah. Pool ЕӢ Ateen
17.16: Wa Pool nik ЕӢ Ateen, a sekeeЙ—a Silaas na Timoote, a hotta findi kur ka riifoh na nataal ciЕӢ kooh ci nikaaЙ—iici, a raakka aay-keeГұ miskiЙ—.
17.17: A jombeeЙ—a na Yawuut ca na Й“a nikeeЙ—i Yawuut te Й“a ГұaamkeeЙ—a Kooh ЕӢ sinaagoga . Kooh-nu-wiis a meeЙ— meeЙ— woo na Й“ooЙ“a a raakee ЕӢ Й—iska na toonohse jen.
17.18: ЕҠ ineem, wa raakeen Й“i Й“o', Й“a Й“aahee ЕӢ liiЙ“oh ci na woyse Epikireen na Й“i na woyse Istowiseen , Й“a taastiЙ—oheeЙ—a na Й—e. ЖҒum woyeeЙ—a ne : В« Jombohii waaЙ— woo ye ? В» ЖҒinooЙ“a, wa Й“a kerah Pool woyeeЙ—a YegЙ—ohiЕӢ Muci, wi kaЙ— ЕӢ Yeesu na hultiЕӢ kaaniЙ— ci, Й“a woyeeЙ—a ne : В« Wa mand haa ne a na yegЙ—ohe kooh ci Й“oo inahЙ—i. В»
17.19: -20 WeЙ— Й“a hunoh na Pool, Й“a Й“ayya Й—e cohohaanaЕӢ Й“a na woyse Aryopaas, Й“a woosa Й—e ne : В« Fu yii Й“ek Й“oo nof na in ci Й“oo inahЙ—i te Й“oo waaЙ—iЙ— inah ini ca tokis. Kon teeЙ“a Й“oo in ci fu na jangЙ—ohe. В»
17.21: (ЖҒi Ateen jen na hanheeca genee na Й“a nikohee naandsuk na sikЙ—uk in as.)
17.22: Wa Pool tufuk ЕӢ fiki Й“ooЙ“a cohee ЕӢ Aryopaasa, a woosa ne : В« ЖҠu Й“i gen Ateen, ЕӢ hotiЙ— ne nik kos Й—ah, Й—u ndengЙ—ukootiЙ— nga.
17.23: Laam wi maa tiindsuke, ЕӢ markeeЙ—a in ci Й—u na Гұaamkohe, raakiЙ— seeЖҙkohaani ЕӢ hot nga sah, wa fiisu inii : вҖң Wuu koohi inhassaaЙ—iini. вҖқ Ini Й—u na Гұaamke te Й—u inahЙ—aa, ineem weЙ— ЕӢ hay ne ЕӢ inhiЙ— Й—u wa.
17.24: Kooh yi fer adinaani na in ci nik ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙi jen, te a yi HeЙ— Eel ci na kehЖҙi, a genЙ—i ЕӢ Й—isik ci na kiimohse ci yaah Й“o' haЙ“iЙ—.
17.25: A namЙ—i etoh ne yaah Й“o' taambkohee Й—e po haa a etoh etoh in, a yi kay na one Й“o' ci jen kipes na iik na in ci jen.
17.26: A taamboh ЕӢ Й“o' yino, a ferra cuuЙ“ nu nik, ne ca gen kehЖҙi jen ; waa nu nga na jamanooniЕӢ wa na kikiЖҙ ciЕӢ wa.
17.27: Kooh tumiЙ— ineem ne Й“ooЙ“i min Й—e waak, Й“a saaЙ“Й—ee po Й“a hend nga Й—e. Moona a usЙ—i ali Й“o' nga Й“oo.
17.28: Laam a yi tah Й“oo pese, kaЙ—ee haye, nikka ; findi yino ngaЕӢ jangtukoh ciЕӢ Й—u woyoha an : вҖң ЖҒoo nam nik set ciЕӢ Й—e. вҖқ
17.29: Kon nik ne Й“oo set ciЕӢ Kooh Й—ah, mbaa Й“oo joyЙ—i amb ne Kooh mand na in pesuuЙ— moЙ—iЙ—, findi nataal urus, haalis wala atoh ci Й“o' haЙ“iЙ— ЕӢ liiЙ“oha Й“o'.
17.30: Kooh marakЙ—i ЕӢ in ca haЙ“Й—assee Й—eЙ“gaan jen, wa Й“ooЙ“a inahЙ—i, kotii a yii Й“eeЙ—uk Й“ooЙ“i jen, ЕӢ Й—isik nu Й“a min nik Й—ah, ne Й“a Й“oЖҙsoh pesohaaЙ—.
17.31: A gapiЙ— mbehi a atte'ohan adinaani jen atte yurhiЙ—, te a kooЙ—iЙ— Й“o' wuu ineem. ЕҠ hultiЙ—i a hultiЙ— Й“oyeem, a teeЙ“iЙ— Й“ooЙ“i jen wooriЙ— ne a yi atte'ohi a kooЙ—. В»
17.32: Wa Й“a kerah Pool woyeeЙ—a ЕӢ hultiЕӢ kaaniЙ— ci, Й“um njembteeЙ—a Й—e, Й“inooЙ“i woosa Й—e ne : В« ЖҒoo hey Й—a sikЙ—ukisse ЕӢ ineem mbeh wiiriis. В»
17.34: Raakka Й“ooЙ“i kos, Й“a taambiЙ—ta Й—e ; Denis ya Й“aahee ЕӢ Й“ooЙ“aЕӢ Aryopaasa Й“aah nga, na Й“itiЙ“ teeku Damaris, na Й“i Й“o' wiiriis.

18.1: Wa inaam coot, Pool pulla Ateen, a kaЙ—ta Korenta.
18.2: A cohha na Yawuut nga na woyse Akilaas rimohu kur kaЕӢ Pontos. Raak yeem han ree, puloh Itaali na Й“itiice Pirisil. Waam raak Kolod, buura yakka ЕӢ Rom nakoheen ne, Yawuut ca jen pulaat Rom. Pool kaЙ—ta Й—iskaЕӢ Й“i Akilaas,
18.3: sagu ina Й“a Й“aahee panguk, Й“a nikee haЙ“Й—oh Й—iip baas ; a gennda na Й“a, Й“a hunnda, Й“a pangkeeЙ—a.
18.4: Mbehi na iЙ—siЙ—kohse nu ree Й—ah, Pool kooЙ— woo ЕӢ sinaagoga ne a woo na Yawuut ca na Й“i nikЙ—i Yawuut, ne Й“a min kos.
18.5: Mbeh, Silaas na Timoote pulohha Maseduwaan Й“a hayya raake Pool ЕӢ Korenta. Ina kooЙ—oh waam, Pool faЙ—ta pangka, a toppa ЕӢ yegЙ—ohiЕӢ Woo ki kotii ; a teeЙ“eeЙ—a Yawuut ca ne a Yeesu a yi MucЙ—ohi Gapohse.
18.6: Waaye Yawuut ca hiГұoheeЙ—a Й—e, Й“a Й“aseeЙ—a Й—e. Wa raakka mbeh, a irippa kulЙ“aacaЕӢ Й—e, a woosa Й“a ne : В« ЖҠu sooЖҙ Й—ah, e Й—u Й“eka haf Й—u ! Mi nak, ЕӢ hooliЙ— nga. Ini kooЙ—oh woti mi yii kaЙ— ЕӢ Й“i nikЙ—i Yawuut. В»
18.7: A pulla ndaam, a kaЙ—ta kahan Жҙaar teeku Ticiyus Yustus, Жҙaareem nikee Гұaamkoh Kooh te kahan ce nikee ЕӢ sero sinaagoga .
18.8: Жіaara adgohee sinaagoga teeksee Kirispus, a yi na Й“i kahan ce jen, kossa HeЙ—i, laayiЙ— ЕӢ Й“i Korenta Й“i sikЙ—ukee Pool nameeЙ—a kos, Й“a Й“oktasseeЙ—a.
18.9: Wa raakka wek, HeЙ—i teeЙ“ukka Pool findi heeЖҙ, a woosa Й—e ne : В« Kana neЖҙЖҙoh, kana Й—ek, woya,
18.10: laam mi yii na Й—a. Ali Й“o' deganЙ—i Й—a yaah, ali Й“o' tumanЙ—i Й—a miskiЙ—, laam Й“ooЙ“iЕӢ ngo laayiЙ— ЕӢ kur kii, Й“i joy kerah woo kiЕӢ Й—a ne Й“a kos. В»
18.11: ЕҠ ineem, Pool nikka ЕӢ Korenta kiis na camban, a jangЙ—eeЙ—a Й“ooЙ“a woo kiЕӢ Kooh. Pool ЕӢ fiki GaliyoЕӢ, goornoora
18.12: ЕҠ jamanoonaam, GaliyoЕӢ tumuusa goornooraЕӢ Rom ngaЕӢ Akaay, jaarra Yawuut ca hunnda, Й“a hiГұoheeЙ—a Pool, Й“a Й“ayya Й—e ЕӢ atte'ohaana,
18.13: Й“a woosa ne : В« Жіaarii na Й“eke Й“ooЙ“i ЕӢ Гұaamuk Kooh Гұaamuk Й—alohiЙ— na wi waasi nakoh. В»
18.14: Pool heeЙ—a woye, hennda GaliyoЕӢ woosa Yawuut ca ne : В« SikЙ—ukaat to Й—u Й“i Yawuut ci, nikee ne a tum njaahum wala ro' yakak Й—ah, ЕӢ heen Й—u Й“oofЙ—e ЕӢ sikЙ—uk Й—u ;
18.15: waaye wii, wa taastiЙ—oh ЕӢ woo na tiik ЕӢ ini kaЙ— ЕӢ waasiЕӢ Й—u. Weem wa wuu Й—u, ЕӢ waaЙ—Й—i nik atte'oh ЕӢ ini kaЙ— ЕӢ in ceem. В»
18.16: ЕҠ ineem, a aannja Й“a ЕӢ atte'ohaana.
18.17: WeЙ— Й“a hunoh jen, Й“a ammba Sosten ya adgohee sinaagoga , Й“a laЙ“eeЙ—a Й—e ЕӢ fiki atte'ohaana, waaye GaliyoЕӢ faaleeЙ—i Й“a. Pool dokkiЙ— AГұcos
18.18: Pool tassa ЕӢ Korenta in samiЙ— maaГұ, Жҙutta a askohha na kosiЙ— ca, a aassa ЕӢ batoona na kaЙ—e Siri, a hunnda na Pirisil na Akilaas. Waaye bala a aasan batoona Й—ah, a nenukka ЕӢ SeГұsare, laam a tumeen ina a giГұee po Жҙutta .
18.19: Wa Й“a kaЙ— po Й“a reesa Efes, a saЙ“sukohha na Й“a ndaam ; a yi ЕӢ haf ce, a kaЙ—ta ЕӢ sinaagoga , a Й“eesЙ—oheeЙ—a na Yawuut ca,
18.20: Й“eem kiimeeЙ—a Й—e ne a Й“aat nik nga Жҙissuut, waaye a teyЙ—ukЙ—i.
18.21: A askohha na Й“a, a woosa Й“a ne : В« ЕҠ hey Й—u hayisse marke, ne wa neЙ“ Kooh Й—ah. В» A aassa bato , a kurkohha Efes, a taalndiЙ—ta Й“aaЙ“aЕӢ Й—e.
18.22: Wa Й“a ree Seesare, Pool ruhussa, a kaЙ—ta Yerusalem ne a kaГұЙ—a Й“i Janguuna, Жҙutta a nammba kaЙ— AГұcos.
18.23: A nikka nga in samiЙ— maaГұ, Жҙutta a kaЙ—eeЙ—a kur na kur ЕӢ Й“akaЕӢ Galaat na Firisi, a ndengЙ—eeЙ—a taalubeeca jen ЕӢ kosi Й“a kos. Apolos ЕӢ Efes na Akaay
18.24: Raakeen Yawuut na woyse Apolos a genee Aleksandiri, a hayya Efes. A nikee Й“o' miniЙ— woo, te a inheen Fiis ci baahiЙ—.
18.25: A jangЙ—asseen waasiЕӢ HeЙ—i te a sawareen lool. A woyeeЙ—a, a jangЙ—oheeЙ—a hooliЙ— ЕӢ ini kaЙ— ЕӢ Yeesu. Waaye a inhee Й“oktiЕӢ Yahya dong.
18.26: A cammba woo na ooluk ЕӢ sinaagoga . Wa Pirisil na Akilaas sikЙ—uk jangЙ—ohiЕӢ Й—e, Й“a hotta Й—e ЕӢ pet, Й“a Й“aatta Й—e pooksohiЙ— hooliЙ— waasiЕӢ Kooh.
18.27: Жіutta, a waaЙ—ta kaЙ— Akaay, Й“aah caЕӢ Й“oo kosiЙ— ca Гұaahha Й—e nga. ЖҒa fiissa kayit wuu taalubeeca nikee ЕӢ Akaay ne Й“a taambkoh Й—e baahiЙ—. Wa a ree, Kooh baahohha Й—e po a raakiЙ—ta kosiЙ— ca njiriГұ keeh-keeh.
18.28: Laam a Й“uree Yawuut ca Й“ur keeh-keeh ЕӢ fiki Й“ooЙ“a jen, te a taambohee ЕӢ Fiis ci, a teeЙ“oheeЙ—a ne Yeesu a yi MucЙ—ohi Gapohse.

19.1: Wa Apolos nik ЕӢ Korenta, raak Pool ЕӢ Й“aaЙ“aЕӢ Й—e ЕӢ kur caЕӢ tangooca, Жҙutta a kaЙ—ta Efes, a raakka Й“i taalube nga,
19.2: a meekissa Й“a ne : В« Wi Й—u kos, Й—u rahsiЙ— FuuЙ—si Hoolohngaani e ? В» ЖҒa woosa Й—e ne : В« ЖҒoo moosЙ—i kerhoh ne FuuЙ—is Hoolohngaan raakiЙ—. В»
19.3: Pool woosa Й“a ne : В« ЖҠu Й“oktu winde Й“okit ? В» ЖҒa loffa Й—e ne : В« ЖҒoktiЕӢ Yahya. В»
19.4: A woosa Й“a ne : В« Yahya Й“oktee Й“i waaЙ—ee Й“oЖҙsoh pesohaaЙ—. A woyeeЙ—a Й“ooЙ“a ne Й“a kosaat yi na haye ЕӢ finhooce, Yeesu ! В»
19.5: Wa Й“a kerah ineem, Й“a Й“oktuusa ЕӢ tiikiЕӢ Yeesu HeЙ—i.
19.6: Pool degga Й“a yaah ciЕӢ Й—e, FuuЙ—si Hoolohngaani ruhussa nga Й“a, Й“a cammba jomb ЕӢ Й“i peЙ—eem wiiriis, Й“a woyeeЙ—a woo-woosuuЙ—.
19.7: Ini ree Жҙaar ndaЕӢkiyaah na kanak (12) nikee nga.
19.8: ЕҠ finho ineem, Pool kaЙ—ta sinaagoga , a woyeeЙ—a na Й“a na ooluk ini ree caЙ“in kaahay. A woyeeЙ—a na Й“a ЕӢ NguuriЕӢ-Kooh, a ndengЙ—ukeeЙ—a nga, ne Й“i a woyee na Й“a min kos.
19.9: Waaye laayiЙ— nga Й“a ndennga haf, Й“a sannga kos, Й“a woyeeЙ—a woo moЙ—aaЙ—i ЕӢ waasiЕӢ HeЙ—i ЕӢ fiki Й“ooЙ“a cohee ЕӢ Й—iska. Ineem tahha po a saЙ“sukohha na Й“a, a hunnda na taalubeeca, a taalndiЙ—ta a woyeeЙ—a na Й“a Kooh-nu-wiis ЕӢ jangohaaraЕӢ Жҙaara woysee Tirannus.
19.10: Ineem kaЙ—eeЙ—a po wa tummba kiis kanak, Й“ooЙ“a genee Asi jen, Yawuut na nikaaЙ—i Yawuut, kerahha woo kiЕӢ HeЙ—i. KuЙ“uuciЕӢ Sewaa
19.11: Waam, Kooh tumeeЙ—a Й“i keemaan feyohiЙ— taamboh ЕӢ Pool.
19.12: KaЙ—ta po Й“ooЙ“a meeЙ—ta Й“ay seeket ca wala kulЙ“aaca laalee faaniЕӢ Й—e, Й“a degeeЙ—a ca kosaayiЙ— ca, Й“eem wireeЙ—a, jiiniica puleeЙ—a nga Й“a.
19.13: Wa raakeen Yawuut ca meeЙ— wil, aaГұeeЙ—a jiiniici, Й“a jeemeeЙ—a aaГұoh jiiniica ambee Й“ooЙ“a tiikiЕӢ Yeesu HeЙ—i an : В« ЕҠ tiikiЕӢ Yeesu yi Pool na yegЙ—ohe, mi yii woo Й—u ne pulaat ! В»
19.14: ЖҒooЙ“a tumee ineem nikee kuЙ“uuci Жҙaar ci yasna-kanak ciЕӢ Жҙaara woysee Sewaa, a Й“aahee ЕӢ seeЖҙkiЙ—oh ca yakak caЕӢ Yawuut ca.
19.15: Waaye jiinnda loffa Й“a ne : В« ЕҠ inhiЙ— Yeesu te ЕӢ inhiЙ— ya Й“a a yi Pool, waaye Й—u, e Й—u Й“a ? В»
19.16: ЕҠ ineem Жҙaara jiinndeem ambee faЙ—sukka Й“a, a uupiЙ—ta Й“a hatil, a tumeeЙ—a Й“a miskiЙ— po Й“a jen Й“a pulla kahna na mbup, tas Й“arang, gaaГұsukohiЙ—.
19.17: ЖҒooЙ“a genee Efes, Yawuut na nikaaЙ—i Yawuut kerahhaa ; Й“a jen Й“a tiitta, Й“a eЙ—ta tiikiЕӢ Yeesu HeЙ—i cir.
19.18: LaayiЙ— ЕӢ Й“a hanee kos hayya, Й“a woyeeЙ—a bakaaЙ— ciЕӢ Й“a, Й“a teeЙ“oheeЙ—a ЕӢ fiki Й“ooЙ“a in ca moЙ—aaЙ—iica Й“a meeЙ— tum.
19.19: LaayiЙ— ЕӢ Й“a meeЙ— luhus hayeeЙ—a na kayit ca Й“a meeЙ— jangoh luhus, Й“a doheeЙ—a ca ЕӢ fiki Й“ooЙ“a jen. CandoomaЕӢ kayit ca kinduusa, wa nikka darakma junni-ndaЕӢkiyaah-yatuus (50.000) ЕӢ koporaЕӢ Й“a.
19.20: Wa taambohha Й—aa, ЕӢ hatiliЕӢ HeЙ—i, woo kiЕӢ Kooh uupeeЙ—a nga uup kerhuk te hatiliЕӢ wa uupeeЙ—a nga uup hotuk. ЖҠuuЙ—a raakee ЕӢ Efes
19.21: Wa in ceem coot, FuuЙ—si Hoolohngaani hiirra Pool ЕӢ kaЙ— Yerusalem, a waaЙ—ee taamboh ЕӢ Maseduwaan na Akaay. A woosa ne : В« ЕҠ ree nga Й—ah, ЕӢ joyiЙ— nam kaЙ— Rom. В»
19.22: A kooЙ—ta huntoh kanak ЕӢ huntoh caЕӢ Й—e, Timoote na Erasta, a tuuЖҙca Й“a Maseduwaan, waaye a yi ЕӢ haf ce a tasohaahha ЕӢ Asi.
19.23: Wa Pool nik ЕӢ Asi sekeeЙ—a, Й—uuЙ— yakak raakka ЕӢ Efes, sagu waasiЕӢ HeЙ—i.
19.24: Raakeen tiЙ“oh-tokkaah nga na woyse Demetiriyus, a meeЙ— tiЙ“ nataal Жҙin. Nataal ceem nikee nataalaЕӢ kahan koohaЕӢ Й“a Й“itЙ“a teeku Artemis, ca nikee haalis. Pangkeem tahha po a yi na tiЙ“oh caЕӢ Й—e raakeeЙ—a wirind baahiЙ—.
19.25: A cohЙ—ohha Й“a na Й“inooЙ“a pesohee pangkeem jen, a woosa Й“a ne : В« ЖіaaЙ“iЕӢ ngo, Й—u inhiЙ— ne raak-raakiЕӢ Й“oo gaЖҙuk ЕӢ pangkii.
19.26: Te Й—u hotiЙ—, Й—u kerhiЙ—, ЕӢ wooЙ—i Efes dong waaye ini uup ЕӢ Asi jen, Pool yeem Й“oЖҙsohiЙ— Й“o' laayiЙ—, a kosЙ—ukohha Й“a ne kooh ci haЙ“Й—ohu yaah Й“o', ca kooh haa.
19.27: ЕҠ wooЙ—i yahi wa na hee yahe tiikiЕӢ pangkiЕӢ Й“oo, waaye wa hey name yah ciri kahniЕӢ Artemis eЙ—u, wa yah yaki Artemis yak, Artemis, koohi Й“itЙ“i yakki, yi Й“i Asi na adinaani jen na Гұaamke ! В»
19.28: Wa Й“ooЙ“a kerah ineem, Й“a ayrukka, Й“a leehkeeЙ—a an : В« Artemis yiЕӢ Й“i Efes yakiЙ— ! В»
19.29: Jaarra kur-taaha jen yoonnda, Й“ooЙ“a jen faЙ—sukka Й—iska na tiyaatarohse, Й“a ammba Gayus na Aristarka, ЖҙaaЙ“aЕӢ Maseduwaan ca kanak ca Й“endee Pool, Й“a Й“ayndohha Й“a.
19.30: Pool waaЙ—ta kaЙ— ЕӢ fiki Й“ooЙ“a cohee ЕӢ Й—iska waaye taalubeeca sangohha Й—e wa.
19.31: A raakeen Й“i nawle kilifa yakak, Й“aah ЕӢ Й“a adgohee Asi, Й“eem nammba woosoh nga Й—e ne a kanaat kaЙ— ЕӢ Й—iska na tiyaatarohse.
19.32: Waam raak Й—uuЙ—a laayiЙ— ЕӢ Й—iska : ЖҒii leehkeeЙ—a an, Й“um leehkeeЙ—a an ! ЖҒi uup laay nga Й“a inheeЙ—i sah ina tah Й“a kaЙ— ndaam.
19.33: ЖҒi Й“o' ЕӢ mboolnda woosa Жҙaar teeku Aleksaandar ini raak, Yawuut ca adgiЙ—ta Й—e ЕӢ fikiira ne a woo. A meeЙ“pa yaah ne a woo na mboolnda.
19.34: Waaye wa Й“a inah ne a Yawuut, Й“a jen Й“a hunnda Й“a leehkeeЙ—a ini ree wahtu kanak an : В« Artemis yiЕӢ Й“i Efes yakiЙ— ! В»
19.35: ЕҠ mirndaani, Жҙaara adgohee coh caЕӢ kur-taaha tummba po Й“a yeeЙ“ukka, a woosa Й“a ne : В« ЖҠu Й“i Efes, a ya Й“a inahЙ—i ne, a Efes na niiЙ—e kahniЕӢ Artemis, koohi yakki, na nataaliЕӢ Й—e keenoh Eel ci ?
19.36: Ali Й“o' minЙ—i taas ineem, weЙ— tah Й—u joyiЙ— yeeЙ“uk, Й—u marak baahiЙ— bala Й—u tuman in Й—ah.
19.37: WeЙ—Й—i, Й—u Й“ayiЙ— ЖҙaaЙ“ii ndii te Й“a Й“asЙ—i koohiЕӢ Й“oo, Й“a tumЙ—i ali in araamiЙ— ЕӢ kahniЕӢ Й—e.
19.38: Kon Demetiriyus na pangkoh ci hun na Й—e leer na Й“o' Й—ah, Й“a Й“ayaat Й—e waas, raakiЙ— mbeh ci na atte'ohse na Й“ooЙ“i na atte'e !
19.39: Te nik ne Й—u na meeksohe in wiiriis Й—ah, wa hey markasse ЕӢ mbehi Й“oo Й“eeЙ—kohissan coh lakiЙ— waas.
19.40: Ini raak ndii woti, miniЙ— tah po Й“oo yambu ne Й“oo na yoonde, laam ali Й“o' minЙ—i woo ini tah Й—uuЙ—ii. В» Wa a Жҙut woo, a woosa mboolnda ne Й“a pasarkohaat.

20.1: Wa Й—uuЙ—a seem, Pool cohЙ—ohha taalubeeca, a Гұaahha Й“a, Жҙutta a askohha na Й“a, a kaЙ—ta Maseduwaan.
20.2: Wa a ree, a wileeЙ—aa, a woyeeЙ—a na kosiЙ— ca woo laayiЙ—, a ГұaaheeЙ—a Й“a, po findi a reyoh Geres.
20.3: A nikka nga caЙ“in kaahay. Wa a kaЙ— po a heeЙ—a aase bato ne a kaЙ— Siri, a kerahha ne Yawuut ca Й“a Й—aa hotoh ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ Й“a ne Й“a ap Й—e, a hotta ne a joy wiiruk Maseduwaan, a lahoh nga.
20.4: ЖҒi hunee na Й—e nikee Sopateer kuЙ“kiЕӢ Pirrus ya genee Beree, na Aristarka na Sekundus Й“a genee Tessalonik, na Gayus ya genee Derbe, na Timoote, na Tisikos na Torofiim Й“a genee Asi.
20.5: ЖҒeЙ— Й“ii, Й“eЙ— adgee Й“oo Torowaas, Й“a sekeeЙ—a Й“oo nga.
20.6: ЖҒoo nak, wi feetiЕӢ Mbuuruuci raakaaЙ—i lawiir ci reeh, Й“oo aasohha bato ЕӢ Filippi, Й“oo tummba neeh yatuus ЕӢ waas. ЖҒoo raakka Й“a ЕӢ Torowaas, Й“oo nikka nga neeh yasna-kanak. Pool hultiЙ—iЙ— Etikus ЕӢ Torowaas
20.7: ЕҠ mbehi na iЙ—siЙ—kohse na niina, Й“oo cohha ne Й“oo hun Гұam mbuurndi, Pool woyeeЙ—a na Й“ooЙ“a nikee ЕӢ Й—iska. A joyee coot ЕӢ Kooh-wiisiina, tahha po a taalndiЙ—ta a woyeeЙ—a po ЕӢ ndengelnde weka.
20.8: ЖҒoo cohee ЕӢ tuuЖҙ ЕӢ Й—afkaЕӢ kahna, laampa laayiЙ— fuuЙ—seen nga.
20.9: Komaaki Жҙaar teeku Etikus nikee Й“oofiЙ— ЕӢ palaЕӢteera, a pani'uusa keeh-keeh, raak Pool taalndiЙ—iЙ— woyeeЙ—a in maaГұiЙ—. Wi a neeh neeh nooЙ—iЙ—, a eltukohha ndaam, ЕӢ tuuЖҙa kaahayЙ—oh ЕӢ Й—afkaЕӢ kahna, a keennda. A meeЙ“seeЙ—a, waaye raak Й—e kaaniЙ—.
20.10: WeЙ— Pool ruhsoh, a raЙ—ukka nga Й—e, a morgiЙ—ukka Й—e, a woosa ne : В« Kinaat jaahiЙ— ! A yi pes ! В»
20.11: Жіutta, Pool rapissa ЕӢ Й—afka, a poЙ“tohha mbuurnda, Й“a Гұammba. ЕҠ finho ineem, a taalndiЙ—ta a woyeeЙ—a in maaГұiЙ— po findi nohi puloh, a cootta.
20.12: Ini kaЙ— ЕӢ kuЙ“ka Жҙaara, a Й“ayu kahan Й“a peseeЙ—a moЙ—oЙ—, Й“ooЙ“a jen giiffa keeh-keeh. Pool pulohiЙ— Torowaas, a kaЙ—ta Mileet
20.13: ЖҒoo nak, e Й“oo adug coot ne Й“oo aas bato kaЙ— Assos, Й—iska Й“oo cohan na Pool, Й“oo Й“ay Й—e. A woyee ne a heyЙ—i taambe ЕӢ cookmi, a na hee taambe ЕӢ kehЖҙi po nga.
20.14: Wa a raak Й“oo ЕӢ Assos, Й“oo hunnda na Й—e ЕӢ bato , Й“oo taalndiЙ—ta Mitileen.
20.15: ЖҒoo kurkohissa ndaam, Й“oo taalndiЙ—ta ЕӢ cookmi, ЕӢ Kooh-wiisiina Й“oo teemmba ЕӢ Kiwo. Kooh wiisissa, Й“oo reesa Samos, wa taambis nga, Й“oo hannda ree Mileet.
20.16: Pool woyee ne a sereendkan sereenduk Efes, a tufkanЙ—i nga po a kee maaГұa ЕӢ Asi. A seeskee seesuk ne Paantakot min Й—e raak ЕӢ Yerusalem. Pool askiЙ— yakak caЕӢ JanguunaЕӢ Efes
20.17: Wa Й“oo ree Mileet, Pool woosohha Й“a adgohee JanguunaЕӢ Efes.
20.18: Wi Й“a hay, a woosa Й“a ne : В« ЖҠu inhiЙ— findi ЕӢ nikohee na Й—u ЕӢ jamanooni ЕӢ nik na Й—u jen, ina kooЙ—oh mbehi ЕӢ kocoh Й“ek kot ciЕӢ ngo ЕӢ Asi.
20.19: ЕҠ pangkiЙ—iЙ— HeЙ—i, ЕӢ ЖҙissuutiЙ—ta haf fo keeh-keeh, wa hunnda na Й“i muhun, ЕӢ raakiЙ— miskiЙ— sagu Yawuut ci hotohee ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ Й“a ne Й“a tum mbo in.
20.20: ЖҠu inhiЙ— ne ЕӢ moosЙ—i Й—u Й—asЙ—oh ali in, ЕӢ in ci min Й—u njiriГұ. ЕҠ yegЙ—iЙ— Й—u woo kiЕӢ Kooh, ЕӢ jangiЙ—ta Й—u ЕӢ fiki Й“ooЙ“i jen na ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ kahan ci.
20.21: ЕҠ moosЙ—i faЙ—oh woytoh Yawuut ci na Й“i nikЙ—i Yawuut ne Й“a Й“oЖҙsohaat tumohaaЙ—, Й“a hay ЕӢ Kooh te Й“a kos HeЙ— Й“oo Yeesu.
20.22: ЖҠiski wa nik, mi yii kaЙ— Yerusalem, e FuuЙ—si Hoolohngaani hiir ro nga ; ЕӢ inahЙ—i ini rahsan ndo ЕӢ ndaam.
20.23: Waaye ЕӢ inhiЙ— daal ne ЕӢ kur-taah nu ЕӢ aasoh Й—ah, FuuЙ—si Hoolohngaani woo so ne kaso na Й“i miskiЙ— laayiЙ— ca Й—aa sek ko nga.
20.24: Mi nak, kipes kiЕӢ ngo Й“itЙ—i so ; nga so, wa raakЙ—i njiriГұ. Ini nikiЙ— to weЙ— ne ЕӢ waaЙ— kaЙ— po ЕӢ reehЙ—ohaana, ЕӢ mitiЙ— pangki Yeesu HeЙ—i dengkoh ho, weЙ— ne ЕӢ woo YegЙ—ohiЕӢ Muci na teeЙ“ohe baahohiЕӢ Kooh.
20.25: ЖҠiski wa nik, ЕӢ inhiЙ— ne Й—u hotissanЙ—i so, Й—u jen, Й—u Й“i inah ne ЕӢ lahiЙ— nga Й—u, ЕӢ woyeeЙ—a Й—u NguuriЕӢ-Kooh.
20.26: WeЙ— tah mi yii woo Й—u wa woti : ЕҠ hooliЙ— nga, Й“o' nu muuЖҙ nga Й—u Й—ah, a Гұam haa.
20.27: Laam ЕӢ woyiЙ— Й—u ini Kooh kooЙ—uk tum, ЕӢ Й—asЙ—ohЙ—i Й—u ali in nga.
20.28: Tufkaat ЕӢ haf Й—u, Й—u tufuk gati FuuЙ—si Hoolohngaani dengkoh Й—u, ne Й—u niiЙ—a. Findi niiЙ—oh, taambkohaat JanguuniЕӢ Kooh, Janguuni a raakoot taamboh ЕӢ Гұif miЕӢ KuЙ“kiЕӢ Й—e.
20.29: ЕҠ inhiЙ— ne ЕӢ eЙ—ee Й—u finho Й—ah, Й“i Й“o' haa ngumu saahiЙ— hey aase ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ Й—u te Й“a faЙ—anЙ—i gati.
20.30: Te ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ Й—u Й“i Й“o' hey name kuruk, Й“a woyee woo raakaaЙ—i ne Й“a ГұaakiЙ— taalubeeci ЕӢ finhooЙ“a.
20.31: Kon wortukaat te kinaat alkoh ne kiis kaahay, wek na noh, ЕӢ meeЙ— Й—u meeЙ— deng, na muhun sah, yaa nu nga Й—ah.
20.32: ЖҠiski wa nik, mi yii wik Й—u ЕӢ yaah Kooh, mi yii wik Й—u ЕӢ woo kiЕӢ Й—e na teeЙ“ohe baahohiЕӢ Й—e, wi min Й—u Й“aatЙ—oh po Й—u ndeng, te Й—u min lam in ci a Й—aakiЙ— hoolЙ—uuЙ— ciЕӢ Й—e jen.
20.33: ЕҠ moosЙ—i waaЙ—Й—oh haf fo ali haalis wala urus wala kulЙ“a Й“o' nga Й—u.
20.34: ЖҠu inhiЙ— in nga sah, e yaah ciЕӢ ngo cii ceЙ— eЙ— to ini ЕӢ etohe, mi, na huntoh ciЕӢ ngo.
20.35: ЕҠ teeЙ“iЙ— Й—u ЕӢ in ci jen ne Й“o' joy pangkoh Й—aa ne a min Й“aatЙ—oh Й“i raakЙ—i hatil. ЖҒoo naandsukaat woo kiЕӢ Yeesu HeЙ—i a yi ЕӢ haf ce wi a woo ne : вҖң NeЙ“iЙ—i nik ЕӢ onoh weЙ— uup wi nik ЕӢ onu. вҖқ В»
20.36: Wi Pool Жҙut woo ineem, a Жҙekka, a hunnda na Й“a jen ne Й“a kiim Kooh.
20.37: ЕҠ ineem, Й“a jen, Й“a fuЙ—eeЙ—a keeh-keeh, Й“a morgiЙ—ukka Й—e ne Й“a foon Й—e.
20.38: Ini uupee reehiЙ— keeГұ ciЕӢ Й“a, weЙ— ini a woo ne Й“a hotissanЙ—i Й—e. Жіutta Й“a Й“ennda Й—e po ЕӢ batoona .

21.1: Wi Й“oo saЙ“sukoh na Й“i Й“endee Й“oo, Й“oo aassa bato , Й“oo yurahha Kos. Wa Kooh wiis, Й“oo taalndiЙ—ta Rodes, kooЙ—ohha ndeem, Й“oo kaЙ—ta Patara.
21.2: ЖҒoo raakka bato ndaam na kee Feniis, Й“oo aassa nga, Й“oo cootta.
21.3: Wa Й“oo kaЙ— po Й“oo ЖҙokeeЙ—a Siipar, Й“oo faЙ—taa ЕӢ yaah-sing, Й“oo taalndiЙ—ta ЕӢ Й“ak Siri ne Й“oo ruhus ЕӢ Tiir ЕӢ Й—iska batoona ruhsiЙ—an in ca wa Й“aye.
21.4: ЕҠ ndaam, Й“oo waakeeЙ—a po Й“oo hotta Й“i taalube nga, Й“oo nikka na Й“a neeh yasna-kanak. FuuЙ—si Hoolohngaani hiirra Й“a ne Й“a woyaat Pool ne a kinaat kaЙ— Yerusalem.
21.5: Wi neeh ci yasna-kanak ci reeh, Й“oo kurkissa ne taalndiЙ— waasiЕӢ Й“oo. ЖҒa Й“ennda Й“oo po Й“oo pulla kur-taaha, Й“eЙ— jen na Й“itiЙ“ ciЕӢ Й“a na kuЙ“uuciЕӢ Й“a. ЕҠ ndaam, Й“oo Жҙekka ЕӢ yaah-cookma ne Й“oo kiim Kooh.
21.6: Жіutta, Й“oo saЙ“sukohha na Й“a, Й“oo aassa batoona , Й“a wiirukka.
21.7: ЖҒoo nak, ne Й“oo taalndiЙ— Й“aaЙ“iЕӢ Й“oo ЕӢ cookmi, Й“oo puloh Tiir, kaЙ—ta Potolemayis. ЕҠ ndaam Й“oo kaГұiЙ—ta Й“aah caЕӢ Й“oo kosiЙ— ca, Й“oo nikka na Й“a neeh yino.
21.8: Wa Kooh wiis, Й“oo kurkohha ndaam, kaЙ—ta Seesare, aassa kahan Filip, dalla nga. Filip nikee woyoh YegЙ—ohiЕӢ Muci, a Й“aahee ЕӢ yasna-kanak ca kooЙ—see ЕӢ Yerusalem.
21.9: A raakeen kuЙ“u Й“itiЙ“ nikiis, Й“a nikee cafaЖҙ. Kooh meeЙ— meeЙ— woo taamboh nga Й“a.
21.10: Wi Й“oo raak Й“i neeh nga, woosuuЙ— na woyse Agabus puloh Yudee, hayya.
21.11: A hayya nga Й“oo, a Й“ayya seenturiЕӢ Pool, a tokukka naa, ЕӢ yaah ci na kot ci, a woosa ne : В« Inii weЙ— FuuЙ—si Hoolohngaani woo : вҖң HeЙ— seenturii, Yawuut ci tokohan Й—e an ЕӢ Yerusalem, Й“a deg Й—e ЕӢ yaah ciЕӢ Й“i nikЙ—i Yawuut. вҖқ В»
21.12: Wi Й“oo kerah ineem, Й“oo na kosiЙ— ciЕӢ Seesare kiimeeЙ—a Pool keeh-keeh ne a kaЙ—uu Yerusalem.
21.13: Waaye Pool loffa Й“oo ne : В« ЖҠu raak ye fuЙ—aah, Й—u reehЙ—ee keeГұiЕӢ ngo ? ЕҠ wooЙ—i Й—u toki ЕӢ toksan ЕӢ Yerusalem dong, waaye mi, ЕӢ ЖҙutiЙ— ne ЕӢ kaan sagu tiikiЕӢ Yeesu HeЙ—i. В»
21.14: KaЙ—ta po Й“oo miniЙ—Й—i Й—e in, Й“oo Й—ekka, Й“oo woosa ne : В« Ini HeЙ—i waaЙ— raakaat. В»
21.15: Wa degga Й“i neeh, Й“oo kooЙ—ukka, Й“oo degukka ЕӢ waas Yerusalem.
21.16: ЖҒi taalube gen Seesare hunnda na Й“oo, Й“a Й“ayya Й“oo kahan Жҙaar teeku Manaason Й—iska Й“oo dalan. Manaason pulohee Siipar, a maaГұiЙ— nik taalube. Pool ЕӢ Yerusalem
21.17: Wa Й“oo ree Yerusalem, Й“aah caЕӢ Й“oo kosiЙ— ca taambukka Й“oo na sum.
21.18: Wa Kooh wiis, Pool hunnda na Й“oo Й—iskaЕӢ Saak, yakak ca jen nameen hay.
21.19: Pool kaГұiЙ—ta Й“a, a naandsukka Й“a yino yino in ci Kooh tum jen taamboh ЕӢ pangki a pangkiЙ— Й—e ngaЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ Й“i nikЙ—i Yawuut.
21.20: Wa Й“a sikЙ—uk Pool po Жҙutta, Й“a yakiЙ—ta Kooh, Й“a woosa Pool ne : В« ЖҒaah Й“oo, fu hot nga, Й“i Yawuut junni junni kosiЙ— Yeesu te Й“a jen Й“a sawariЙ— ЕӢ waasiЕӢMusaa.
21.21: Waaye Й“a kerhiЙ— ne fu na jangЙ—e Yawuut ci nik ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ cuuЙ“ ci cinooci ne Й“a faЙ—aat waasiЕӢ Musaa, Й“a nguЙ—issuu komaakciЕӢ Й“a, te Й“a taambЙ—issuu mbaah ci.
21.22: Kon Й“o' tuman na ? Wa wooriЙ— ne Й“a hey yege ne fu yii ЕӢ ndii.
21.23: Mbaa, tuma ini Й“oo na hee Й—a woye wii : Жіaar nikiis Й“ii ЕӢ ndii, Й“a giГұЙ—iЙ— Kooh in ;
21.24: Й“ayaa Й“a, fu farsuk na Й“a, fu wirndiЙ— Й“a in ci Й“a joy tum ЕӢ farsuk kiЕӢ Й“a jen, Й“a min nenuk . ЕҠ ineem, Й“ooЙ“i jen hey inhe ne ini woyu nga Й—a keeh haa, fu na taambЙ—e taambiЙ— nakoh ciЕӢ waasiЕӢ Musaa findiiЙ“a.
21.25: Te ini kaЙ— ЕӢ kosiЙ— ci nikЙ—i Yawuut, Й“oo fiisiЙ— Й“a kayit, woosa Й“a nga ini Й“oo tufkiЙ— wii : ЖҒa kinaat Гұam kaГұam ci seeЖҙkohu wuu kooh nikaaЙ—i, Й“a kinaat an Гұif, Й“a kinaat Гұam med, Й“a kinaat njaaloo. В»
21.26: Wa Kooh wiis, Pool Й“ayya ЖҙaaЙ“a, a farsukka na Й“a. Жіutta a aassa Kahan Kooh, a woosa mbehi farsukiЕӢ Й“a reehan, weЙ— ne, mbehi yaa nu nga Й“a seeЖҙkiЙ—ohsan. Pool ambuuЙ—
21.27: Wa mbeh ca yasna-kanak caЕӢ Й“oktuka hee mite, Yawuut ca pulohee Asi hotta Pool ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ Kahan Kooh, Й“a yoppa mboolnda jen, Й“a ammba Й—e.
21.28: ЖҒa leehkeeЙ—a ЕӢ Й—afka ne : В« Hayaatoo, Israayel ci, hayaat ! Жіaari a yi ! A yi na jangЙ—ohe ЕӢ Й—isik nu nik in moЙ—aaЙ—i ЕӢ ini kaЙ— ЕӢ cuuЙ“iЕӢ Й“oo na waasiЕӢ Musaa na Kahan Kooh wii. A Й“ekiЙ— sah ЖҙaaЙ“i nikaaЙ—i Yawuut ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ Kahan Kooh, ЕӢ ineem a soЙ“e'iЙ—ta ЖҠiski HooliЙ—ii. В»
21.29: Ini tahee Й“a woo ineem, Й“a hotee hot Pool ЕӢ Yerusalem na Torofiim yi puloh Efes, Й“a liiЙ“pa ne a Й“ekiЙ— Й—e ЕӢ Kahan Kooh.
21.30: Kur ka jen yoonnda, Й“ooЙ“a puloheeЙ—a Й—isik nu Й—isik. ЖҒa ammba Pool, Й“a faseeЙ—a Й—e po Й“a puliЙ—ta Й—e Kahan Kooh, Й“a jaarra rang buntaaca.
21.31: ЖҒa waaЙ—ta Й—e ap, weЙ— kilifaana adgohee soldaar ca kerhoh ne Yerusalem jen yoondiЙ—.
21.32: ЕҠ Й—iska Й—iska, a nangЙ—ohha Й“i soldaar, na Й“a adgohee Й“a, a faЙ—sukka Й“a na mbup. Wa Yawuut ca hot Й—e na soldaar ca hunee na Й—e, Й“a faЙ—ta laЙ“a Й“a laЙ“ee Pool.
21.33: Jaarra, kilifaana reЙ“pa ЕӢ Pool, a nakohha ne a ambsaat, a ceenu na ceen kanak, a hannda meekis Й“ooЙ“a ne : В« Жіaarii a yi Й“a, a tum ye ? В»
21.34: Waaye ЕӢ mboolnda, Й“ii woyeeЙ—a an, Й“um woyeeЙ—a an. Wa a kaЙ— po a hotta ne a minЙ—i raak in wooriЙ— nga sagu Й—uuЙ—aЕӢ mboolnda, a nakohha ne Pool Й“ayu ЕӢ kahan soldaar ca.
21.35: -36 ЖҒooЙ“a jen nikee ГұaakЙ—eeЙ—a Pool, Й“a leehkeeЙ—a ne : В« A apaah apu ! В» Wa Й“a kaЙ— po Й“a reesa eskalyeeca , soldaar ca mirndohha meeЙ“ Pool sagu diirka mboolnda diirke. Pool kiimiЙ— ne a woo na mboolnda
21.37: Wa Й“a hee aase kahna, Pool woosa kilifaanaЕӢ soldaar ca ne : В« ЕҠ miniЙ— Й—a woo in e, ne wa neЙ“ Й—a Й—ah ? В» Kilifaana woosa ne : В« Fu kerhiЙ— gerek e ?
21.38: Kon a fu ЖҙaariЕӢ Misraaci Й“ekee Й—uuЙ—i miskiЙ—i mbaЙ—ni haa e ? Жіaari Й“ayee apoh Й“o' junni-nikiis (4000) a cootta na Й“a bilaf fa ? В»
21.39: Pool woosa Й—e ne : В« Muk, ЕӢ Yawuut, ЕӢ Й“o' Tarsa, kur raakiЙ— tiik ЕӢ Silisi. ЕҠ kiim Й—a wa kiim, on ndo ЕӢ woo na Й“ooЙ“ii. В»
21.40: KilifaanaЕӢ soldaar ca onnda Й—e wa. Pool tufukka ЕӢ eskalyeeca , a raЙ—issa mboolnda yaah, Й“ooЙ“a Й—ekka teЙ—, a woyeeЙ—a na Й“a ЕӢ peЙ—eem Yawuut.

22.1: В« TaambЙ—oh ciЕӢ ngo na baab ciЕӢ ngo, sikЙ—ukaat kotii ini maa hee Й—u woye ЕӢ yambi Й—u na yambee so. В»
22.2: Wa Й“a kerah Й—e woyeeЙ—a ЕӢ peЙ—miЕӢ Й“a, Й“a Й“aatta Й—ek. Pool taalndiЙ—ta an :
22.3: В« Mi, ЕӢ Yawuut, ЕӢ raakohu Tarsa ЕӢ Silisi, waaye ЕӢ koЙ—ohu ndii, ЕӢ Yerusalem, te Gamaliyel a yi jangiЙ— to waasiЕӢ caac ciЕӢ Й“oo, jangiЙ— yurhiЙ—. ЕҠ sawarra lool ЕӢ ini kaЙ— ЕӢ Kooh findi Й—u mand nga woti-woti, Й—u jen.
22.4: ЕҠ meeЙ—ta tolfiЙ— Й“ooЙ“iЕӢ waasiЕӢ Yeesu, po raakiЙ— Й“i apu nga sah. ЕҠ ambeeЙ—a Жҙaar na Й“itiЙ“, ЕӢ taЖҙeeЙ—a ЕӢ kaso.
22.5: SeeЖҙkiЙ—ohi yakki na saangniЕӢ atte'oh ci jen miniЙ— to seede ngaЕӢ ineem. ЖҒa fiisЙ—een Й“aah ciЕӢ Й“oo Yawuut ci nikee ЕӢ Damas kayit sah, Й“a teyЙ—ukiЙ—ta so ne ЕӢ kaЙ— nga, ЕӢ amba Й“i aas ЕӢ waasiЕӢ Yeesu nga, ЕӢ Й“ay Й“a Yerusalem, Й“a mbugalu.
22.6: Wi ЕӢ kooЙ— waasi po ЕӢ heeЙ—a ree Damas, ЕӢ leero noh cong, Й—ekka po Гұiin pulohha Eel ci, wa willa so, wa siГұaarЙ—eeЙ—a.
22.7: ЕҠ keennda ЕӢ kehЖҙi, ЕӢ kerahha hooso woyeeЙ—a so ne : вҖң Sool, Sool, wa ye tah fu tolfiЙ—ee so ? вҖқ
22.8: ЕҠ woosa ne : вҖң A fu Й“a HeЙ—i ? вҖқ Hoosoori loffa so ne : вҖң E Гұam Yeesu yiЕӢ Nasareet, yi fu na tolfiЙ—e. вҖқ
22.9: ЖҒooЙ“i hunee na so hoteen siГұaari waaye Й“a kerheeЙ—i hoosoori woyee na so.
22.10: ЕҠ meeksohha an : вҖң HeЙ—i, kon ЕӢ joy ye tum kotii ? вҖқ HeЙ—i loffa so ne : вҖң Kurka fu kaЙ— Damas, ndaam, fu hey woyse ini fu joy haЙ“iЙ— jen. вҖқ
22.11: ЕҠ fuulee fuul sagu siГұaara, Й“ooЙ“a hunee na so ammba so ЕӢ yaah, Й“a nookeeЙ—a so po ЕӢ reesa Damas.
22.12: Raakeen Жҙaar nga teeku AnaГұaas, a nikee Й“o' kosiЙ— Kooh, yi meeЙ— taambiЙ— waasiЕӢMusaa te Yawuut caЕӢ Damas jen seede'een Й—e seede moЙ—iЙ—.
22.13: A hayya so raake, a reЙ“pa nga so, a woosa so ne : вҖң Sool, Й“aahiЕӢ ngo, hotissa ! вҖқ ЕҠ Й—iska Й—iska ЕӢ hotisseeЙ—a, ЕӢ hotta Й—e.
22.14: ЕҠ ineem, a woosa so ne : вҖң KoohiЕӢ caaciЕӢ Й“oo kooЙ—iЙ— Й—a maaГұ ne fu inah ini a waaЙ—, ne fu hot yi YurhiЙ—i te fu kerah hoosooriЕӢ Й—e.
22.15: Laam fu nikan seedeeniЕӢ Й—e ЕӢ fiki Й“ooЙ“i jen, ЕӢ ini fu hot, fu kerahhaa.
22.16: ЖҠiski wa nik ndii, fu na seke ye ? Kurka, fu Й“oktu te fu kiim ЕӢ tiikiЕӢ Й—e ne fu hool ЕӢ bakaaЙ— ciЕӢ Й—a. вҖқ
22.17: Wa ЕӢ dokuk Yerusalem, wa raakka mbeh, ЕӢ kiimeeЙ—a Kooh ЕӢ Kahan Kooh, in hayЙ—ohha so haa heeЖҙ.
22.18: ЕҠ hotta HeЙ—i, a woosa ne : вҖң Arra pul Yerusalem ! Laam Й“ooЙ“i gen nga teyЙ—ukanЙ—i seedeeniЕӢ Й—a ЕӢ ini kaЙ— nga so. вҖқ
22.19: ЕҠ woosa ne : вҖң HeЙ—i, Й“a inhiЙ— baahiЙ— ne ЕӢ meeЙ— meeЙ— taambiЙ— sinaagog ci, ЕӢ taЖҙЙ—ukee Й“i kos Й—a, ЕӢ laЙ“Й—ukee Й“a.
22.20: Te wi seedeeniЕӢ Й—a Ecen na apse, ЕӢ nikee nga, mi ЕӢ haf fo. ЕҠ huneen na Й“a ngaЕӢ apa Й“a apee Й—e te Гұam ambЙ—ee Й“a sah kulЙ“aacaЕӢ Й“a. вҖқ
22.21: ЕҠ ineem HeЙ—i woosa so ne : вҖң KaЙ—a, mi, ЕӢ hey Й—a tuuЖҙe usiЙ—, ЕӢ Й“ooЙ“i nikЙ—i Yawuut ! вҖқ В» Pool na kilifaanaЕӢ soldaar ca
22.22: Mboolnda nikee sikЙ—ukeeЙ—a Pool po ЕӢ woo ciЕӢ Й—e mirndoh ceem, jaarra Й“a jen, Й“a leehkeeЙ—a an : В« Apa Жҙaarii ! ЖҒo' mand an yeyyooЙ—i pes ! В»
22.23: ЖҒa looЖҙkeeЙ—a, Й“a wolla kulЙ“aacaЕӢ Й“a, Й“a gusГұeeЙ—a merhey mi ЕӢ Й—afka.
22.24: ЕҠ ndeem, kilifaanaЕӢ soldaar ca nakohha ne Pool Й“eku ЕӢ kahnaЕӢ soldaar ca, a laЙ“u leraw po a woo, ЕӢ ineem Й“o' inah ini tah Yawuut ci leehkee Й—e mand an.
22.25: Wa Й“a tok Й—e ne Й“a laЙ“ Й—e, a woosa Жҙaara adgohee Й“a ne : В« Andi waas oniЙ— Й—u ne Й—u laЙ“ Й“oyi Й“aah ЕӢ Rom te raak Й—e atte'uuЙ—i paaЙ— ? В»
22.26: Wa soldaara kerah ineem a kaЙ—taa woya kilifaana an : В« Fu na hee haЙ“Й—e ye an ? Жіaarii Й“o' Rom ! В»
22.27: KilifaanaЕӢ soldaar ca hayya ЕӢ Pool, a meekissa Й—e ne : В« Woyaa so, wa keeh ne fu Й“o' Rom e ? В» Pool loffa Й—e ne : В« Ee. В»
22.28: ЕҠ ndeem, kilifaanaЕӢ soldaar ca woosa Й—e ne : В« ЕҠ wirind kopor keeh-keeh ne nik Й“o' Rom. В» Pool loffa Й—e : В« Mi nak, ЕӢ rimu naa. В»
22.29: Jaarra, soldaar ca hee Й—e laЙ“e ne a woo, faЙ—ta Й—e ndeem cootta. KilifaanaЕӢ soldaar ca nammba tiit, wa a inah ne a tokЙ—uk Й“o' Rom. Pool ЕӢ fiki atte'ohaana yakka
22.30: KilifaanaЕӢ soldaar ca waaЙ—ta inah wooriЙ— ina Yawuut ca yambee Pool. WeЙ— tah wa Kooh wiis, a nakohha ne Pool pulЙ—u Й—iski a nik, a cohЙ—ohha kilifaacaЕӢ seeЖҙkiЙ—oh caЕӢ waasiЕӢ Musaa na Й“ooЙ“a Й“aah ЕӢ saangnaЕӢ yakak caЕӢ Israayel jen. A Й“ayya Pool, a tufkiЙ—ta Й—e ЕӢ fikiiЙ“a.

23.1: Pool marakka Й“ooЙ“aЕӢ saangna, a woosa ne : В« ЖҒaah ciЕӢ ngo, ina ЕӢ camboh po woti, maa pese ЕӢ fiki Kooh na hel daliЙ—. В»
23.2: WeЙ— AnaГұaas, seeЖҙkiЙ—oha yakka nakoh Й“a nikee ЕӢ sero Pool ne Й“a laЙ“aat Й—e ЕӢ nguЙ“.
23.3: ЕҠ ineem, Pool woosa Й—e ne : В« A Kooh laЙ“an Й—a, fu mandiЙ— nga haa miir yaanwiЙ—uuЙ— ! Fu nik ndii ne fu attee so findi waasi nakoha, waaye weЙ—i fu Й—aliЙ— waasi, ЕӢ ini fu nakoh ne ЕӢ laЙ“saat ! В»
23.4: ЖҒi nikee ЕӢ sero Pool woosa Й—e ne : В« Fu na Й“ase seeЖҙkiЙ—ohi yakki, yiЕӢ Kooh ! В»
23.5: Pool loffa ne : В« ЖҒaah ciЕӢ ngo, ЕӢ inheeЙ—i ne a seeЖҙkiЙ—ohi yakki. Fiis ci woyiЙ— ne : вҖң Kina woo yi adgoh cuuЙ“iЕӢ Й—a in moЙ—aaЙ—i. вҖқ В»
23.6: Pool inheen ne Й“ooЙ“a Й“aah ЕӢ saangnaЕӢ yakak ca, Й“akii nikee Sadusen , Й“akum nikka Farisen , weЙ— tah a leehukka ЕӢ Й—afka ne : В« ЖҒaah ciЕӢ ngo, ЕӢ Farisen , ЕӢ kuЙ“u Farisen . A oolki ЕӢ ooluk ne kaaniЙ— ci hey hulte weЙ— tah ho atte'se. В»
23.7: Wa a woo inaam Farisen ca na Sadusen ca lahtoheeЙ—a, Й“a paysukohha.
23.8: Sadusen ci na woye ne hulit raakЙ—i, malaaka na jiiniici na in ci mand na ca namЙ—i raak waaye Farisen ci kos ne in ceem jen raakiЙ—.
23.9: Woo ka kurukka ЕӢ Й—afka. ЖҒi jangЙ—ohoh, Й“aah ЕӢ Farisen ca, kurukka sannga tic, Й“a woosa ne : В« ЖҒoo hotЙ—i ali in moЙ—aaЙ—i ЕӢ Жҙaarii ! Nik ne a jiini wala malaaka woo na Й—e Й—ah nak ? В»
23.10: Lahtoha misikka lool po kilifaanaЕӢ soldaar ca neЖҙЖҙohha ne Pool sifiГұsohu. WeЙ— tah a nakka soldaar ca ne Й“a ruhsaat nga Й“a, Й“a kooЙ—oh Pool nga, Й“a dokin Й—e ЕӢ kahna.
23.11: ЕҠ weka, HeЙ—i hayya, tufukka ЕӢ sero Pool, woosa Й—e ne : В« NdengЙ—uka, findi fu seede'oh ho ndii ЕӢ Yerusalem, fu joyiЙ— to nam seede'oh Й—aa ЕӢ Rom. В» Yawuut ca waakohiЙ— ne Й“a ap Pool
23.12: Wa Kooh wiis, Й“i Yawuut waakohha, Й“a ginnja ne feeh Й“a apЙ—i Pool Й—ah, Й“a ГұamanЙ—i, Й“a ananЙ—i.
23.13: Ini uup Жҙaar ndaЕӢkiyaah-nikiis (40) Й“eЙ— giГұee giГұeem.
23.14: ЖҒa kaЙ—ta ЕӢ kilifaacaЕӢ seeЖҙkiЙ—oh caЕӢ waasiЕӢMusaa na yakak ca, Й“a woosa Й“a ne : В« ЖҒoo giГұiЙ— ne feeh Й“oo apЙ—i Pool Й—ah, Й“oo ГұamanЙ—i, Й“oo ananЙ—i, te Й“oo tumЙ—aa Й—ah, Kooh alkaat Й“oo.
23.15: ЖҠu nak, hunaat na Й“i saangniЕӢ yakak ci, Й—u kiim kilifaanaЕӢ soldaar ca a eЙ— Й—u Pool, wa mandaat ne Й—u waaЙ— Й“aat marak in ciЕӢ Й—e. Ini kaЙ— nga Й“oo, Й“oo ЖҙutiЙ— ne Й“oo ap Й—e bala a reyan ndii Й—ah. В»
23.16: Waaye kuЙ“ki ЖҙaariЕӢ taambЙ—oh Pool Й“itiЙ“ kerahha jo'a Й“a waaЙ—ee jo' Pool, a kaЙ—ta kahan soldaar ca, a aassa, a woosa Й—e wa.
23.17: Pool Й“eeЙ—ukka yino ЕӢ Й“i adgoh soldaar ca, a woosa Й—e ne : В« ЖҒenda komaakndii ЕӢ kilifaaniЕӢ Й—u, raakiЙ— ini a waaЙ— Й—e woo. В»
23.18: Soldaara Й“ayya komaaknda ЕӢ kilifaana, a woosa Й—e ne : В« Pool yi ambu, a yi Й“eeЙ—uk ko, a kiimmba so ne ЕӢ Й“ay komaakndii nga Й—a ; an raakiЙ— ini a waaЙ— Й—a woo. В»
23.19: KilifaanaЕӢ soldaar ca ammba komaaknda ЕӢ yaah, a usЙ—ukka na Й—e, a meekissa Й—e ne : В« Fu hay yo ye woye ? В»
23.20: A loffa ne : В« Yawuut ci kerhiЙ—ohiЙ— ne Й“a meekis Й—a Pool kim, fu kom Й“a Й—e ЕӢ saangnaЕӢ yakak ca. Wa na hee mande ne Й“a waaЙ— markis baahiЙ— ini kaЙ— nga Й—e.
23.21: Waaye kina Й“a kos, ini uup Жҙaar ndaЕӢkiyaah-nikiis (40) hey Й—e jo'e. ЖҒa giГұiЙ— ne feeh Й“a apЙ—i Й—e Й—ah, Й“a ГұamanЙ—i, Й“a ananЙ—i. ЖҒa ЖҙutiЙ—, Й“a na seke ne fu teyЙ—uk. В»
23.22: KilifaanaЕӢ soldaar ca dennga komaaknda ne : В« Kina woo ali Й“o' ne fu woyiЙ— to inii ! В» Жіutta a woosa Й—e ne a cootaat. Pool cootЙ—uuЙ— Seesare
23.23: Wa komaaknda coot, kilifaana Й“eeЙ—ukka kanak ЕӢ Й“a adgohee soldaar ca, a woosa Й“a ne : В« NangЙ—ohaat soldaar teemet-kanak (200), Й—u nam nangЙ—oh soldaar ndaЕӢkiyaah-yasna-kanak (70) ЕӢ Й“i na rape panis ci, na soldaar teemet-kanak (200) ЕӢ heЙ— salmaaci. KooЙ—kaat Й—u kaЙ— Seesare wahtu yasna-nikiis na weki.
23.24: TokЙ—iЙ—aat Pool Й“i panis, Й—u Й“ay Й—e po ЕӢ goornoor Feliksa te ali in kinaat Й—e rahas. В»
23.25: A fiissa kayit a woosa inii :
23.26: В« Goornoor Feliksa, mi yii kaГұiЙ— Й—a kilifaani, mi yi Kolod Lisiyas.
23.27: Жіaari mi na komee Й—a yii, a Yawuut ci ambee Й—e. Wi Й“a kaЙ— po Й“a heeЙ—a Й—e ape, ЕӢ hayya na soldaar ciЕӢ ngo, ЕӢ naaffa Й—e wi ЕӢ inah ne a Й“o' Rom.
23.28: ЕҠ waaЙ—ta inah ini Й“a yambee Й—e, tahha po ЕӢ Й“ayya Й—e saangnaЕӢ yakak caЕӢ Й“a.
23.29: ЕҠ hotiЙ— ne in ci Й“a yambee Й—e, wa ini kaЙ— ЕӢ waasiЕӢ Й“a, waaye raakЙ—i ini a tum ЕӢ in ci Й“a yambee Й—e po wa joyya Й—e tah apu wala a taЖҙu.
23.30: ЕҠ woyuuЙ— nak ne Yawuut ci Й“a Й—ii waakoh Й—e ne Й“a ap Й—e. WeЙ— tah ЕӢ komeeЙ—a Й—e ЕӢ saasi-saasi, te ЕӢ teeЙ“iЙ— Й“i na yambee Й—e ne Й“a joy ngeloh na Й—e ЕӢ Й—iskiЕӢ Й—a. В»
23.31: Soldaar ca tummba ina Й“a naku, Й“a Й“ayya Pool ЕӢ weka, Й“a kaЙ—ta na Й—e po Antipatiris.
23.32: Wa Kooh wiis, soldaar ca tiindee dokukka kahnaЕӢ Й“a, Й“a faЙ—ta rapoh panis ca, Й“eem taalndiЙ—ta na Pool.
23.33: Wa Й“a ree Seesare, rapoh panis ca eЙ—ta Goornoora ina fiisu, Й“a eЙ—ta Й—e Pool.
23.34: Goornoora jannga ina fiisu, a meekissa Pool Й—iski a puloh. Wa a inah ne a puloh Silisi,
23.35: a woosa Й—e ne : В« ЖҒi na yambee Й—a hay Й—ah, ЕӢ hey Й—a Й“aate meekis. В» A nakohha ne Pool Й—aaksaat a niiЙ—assee ЕӢ taЙ“aha na woyse kahan buur Herod.

24.1: Wa degga neeh yatuus, AnaГұaas, seeЖҙkiЙ—oha yakkaЕӢ waasiЕӢMusaa hayya Seesare, a hunnda na Й“i yakak na ngeloh na woyse Tertullus. ЖҒa kaЙ—ta ЕӢ Goornoor Feliksa ne Й“a ngela na Pool.
24.2: -3 Pool Й“eeЙ—kuusa, Tertullus cammba Й—e yamb ЕӢ woo cii : В« Feliksa kilifaani, Й“oo Й“ii ЕӢ jam keeh-keeh saguufu ЕӢ findi fu na tiinЙ—ohe kur ki na in ci as ci fu haytoh ЕӢ nguuriЕӢ Й“ooЙ“ii, Й“oo hotiЙ— in ceem Kooh-nu-wiis na Й—isik nu nik te Й“oo Й“ii corkiЙ— Й—a nga keeh-keeh.
24.4: ЕҠ waaЙ—Й—i Й—a maaГұiЙ— ndii na woo laayiЙ—, weЙ— tah mi yii kiim Й—a ЕӢ baah kiЕӢ Й—a, fu sikЙ—uk Й“oo Жҙissuut rek.
24.5: ЕҠ ineem Й“oo hotiЙ— ne Жҙaarii, a nduhum ЕӢ kur, a na Й“eke hiГұoh ЕӢ Yawuut ci ЕӢ Adina jen, a Й“aah ЕӢ Й“i adgoh Й“i lang na ЖҙaariЕӢ Nasareet ci.
24.6: A jeemiЙ— sah hoolaaЙ—i'iЙ— Kahan Kooh. ЕҠ ineem Й“oo ammba Й—e. [ЖҒoo waaЙ—ta Й—e atte ЕӢ waasiЕӢ Й“oo,
24.7: waaye a Lisiyas, kilifaaniЕӢ soldaar ci, a yi hay a naaffa Й—e na doole ЕӢ yaah ciЕӢ Й“oo.
24.8: A woosa Й“oo ne Й“oo hayaat nga Й—a.] Fu miniЙ— Й—e meekis sah ЕӢ ini kaЙ— ЕӢ in ceem jen, fu hey hotoote ne in ci Й“oo na yambe Жҙaarii, ca keeh. В»
24.9: Yawuut ca Й“aatta ndengiЙ— woo ciЕӢ Tertullus. Pool taasiЙ— in ci a yambu ЕӢ fiki Goornoor Feliksa
24.10: Wa Tertullus Жҙut woo, goornoora eЙ—ta Pool woo ka ne a namaat woo, Pool woosa ne : В« ЕҠ inhiЙ— ne a fu na atte'e Й“ooЙ“i ЕӢ kur kii Й“i kiisi kiis ; weЙ— tah ЕӢ oolkiЙ— hay ЕӢ fikiifu ne ЕӢ taas in ci ЕӢ yambu.
24.11: Fu sah, fu miniЙ—a marak, wa uupЙ—i neeh ndaЕӢkiyaah na kanak (12), ЕӢ kaЙ—iЙ— Yerusalem ne Гұaamuk Kooh.
24.12: Te ali Й“o' hotЙ—i so jombeeЙ—a na Й“o' wala Й“ekeeЙ—a mboolndi ЕӢ yoond, wa ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ Kahan Kooh haa, waa ЕӢ sinaagog ca haa, wa ЕӢ Й—isik wiiriis ЕӢ kur-taaha haa.
24.13: Te Й“ooЙ“ii minЙ—i Й—a teeЙ“ ali firnde ЕӢ in ci Й“a na yambee so cii.
24.14: ЕҠ teyЙ—ukiЙ— inii ЕӢ fikiifu, weЙ— ne : Taamboh ЕӢ waasiЕӢ Yeesu, wi Й“a amb ne wa waas tufkaaЙ—i, mi na Гұaamke KoohiЕӢ caac ciЕӢ Й“oo nga, maanaam ЕӢ kosiЙ— in ci fiisu ЕӢ waasiЕӢ Musaa na fiis ciЕӢ woosuuЙ— ci jen.
24.15: ЕҠ raakiЙ— ini ЕӢ oolkoh ЕӢ Kooh te Й“eЙ— Й“ii, Й“a nam oolkoh ineem. WeЙ— ne Kooh hey hultiЙ—e kaaniЙ— ci, yurhiЙ— na yurhaaЙ—i jen.
24.16: WeЙ— tah ЕӢ nam gen ЕӢ ndengЙ—uk ne ЕӢ raak hel daliЙ— ЕӢ fiki Kooh na fiki Й“ooЙ“i.
24.17: Wa tumiЙ— Й“i kiis laayiЙ— ЕӢ nikeeЙ—i nga, ЕӢ neeh cii ЕӢ hayya ne ЕӢ kom Й“i cuuЙ“iЕӢ Й“oo kopor Й“aatЙ—ohaa Й“a, te ЕӢ nam seeЖҙuk wuu Kooh.
24.18: Wi maa haЙ“Й—e ineem, Й“a raak ko ЕӢ Kahan Kooh Й“oktukiЙ— po ЖҙutiЙ—, mboolo ndeereeЙ—i so, Й—uuЙ— raakeeЙ—i nga.
24.19: Waaye raakiЙ— Yawuut ci nikee nga puloh Asi. ЖҒeЙ— joyee hay ndii ne Й“a seede in ci Й“a na yambee so ЕӢ fikiifu, ne Й“a raakiЙ— ini Й“a taamban ndo Й—ah.
24.20: ЖҒeЙ— Й“i nik ndii nak, Й“a woyaat ini moЙ—aaЙ—iini Й“a hot ne ЕӢ tumiЙ—a wa ЕӢ tufkiЙ—u ЕӢ saangnaЕӢ yakak ca.
24.21: Hanaa woo ki ЕӢ woyee ЕӢ Й—afka wii, wi ЕӢ tufuk ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ Й“a ne : вҖң ЕҠ Й“ayu woti ne ЕӢ atte'u Й—ah, a ini ЕӢ kos ne kaaniЙ— ci hey hulte ! вҖқ В»
24.22: Feliksa inheen in laayiЙ— ЕӢ ini kaЙ— ЕӢ waasiЕӢ HeЙ—i, a faЙ—ta Й“a ne Й“a kaЙ— po mbeh wiiriis, a woosa ne : В« Lisiyas kilifaaniЕӢ soldaar ci hay Й—ah, ЕӢ hey marke ini Й—u leer. В»
24.23: A nakka Жҙaara adgohee soldaar ca ne a taalndiЙ—aat a niiЙ—ee Pool waaye a on Й—e a raak haf ce Жҙissuut te Й“ooЙ“iЕӢ Й—e minee Й—e hay taambkohe. ЖҒeesЙ—ohaЕӢ Pool na Feliksa
24.24: Wa degga Й“i neeh, Feliksa hayya na Й“itiice Dursil, yeem nikee Yawuut. A Й“eeЙ—kiЙ—ukka Pool, a sikЙ—ukeeЙ—a Й—e ЕӢ ini kaЙ— ЕӢ kos Yeesu Kiristaa.
24.25: Waaye, wa Pool woo po a Й“ayya woo ka ЕӢ kiyurah, na amb haf fu, na atteeniЕӢ Kooh na haye, Feliksa tiitta, woosa Й—e ne : В« Fu miniЙ— kaЙ—ohaah, ЕӢ rahsis ne ЕӢ min woo na Й—a Й—ah, ЕӢ hey Й—a Й“eeЙ—kisse. В»
24.26: Feliksa liiЙ“ee ne Pool hey Й—e eЙ—e kopor, weЙ— tah a meeЙ—ta Й—e Й“eeЙ—kiЙ—uk ne a Й“eesЙ—oh na Й—e.
24.27: Wa degga kiis kanak, Porsiyus Festus namsiЙ—ta Feliksa. Feliksa waaЙ—ee ne Yawuut ca neЙ“u nga Й—e, tahha po a faЙ—ta Pool ЕӢ kasoona.

25.1: Wa Festus tum neeh kaahay ЕӢ kur ca a joy adgoh, a pulohha Seesare a kaЙ—ta Yerusalem.
25.2: KilifaacaЕӢ seeЖҙkiЙ—oh caЕӢ waasiЕӢMusaa na kilifaacaЕӢ Yawuut ca hayya, Й“a kalaameesa Pool nga Й—e. ЖҒa kiimeeЙ—a keeh-keeh
25.3: ne a amboh Й“a, a haytoh Pool Yerusalem. ЖҒa waaЙ—ee Й—e jo'nduk ЕӢ waasi, Й“a ap Й—e.
25.4: Festus loffa Й“a ne : В« Pool yaa ЕӢ Seesare, ЕӢ yaah soldaar ci te mi na dokke ndaam maaГұaaЙ—i.
25.5: Kon Й“i Й“o' oolkuuЙ— nga Й—u hunaat na so, Й“a ree Й—ah Й“a yamb Й—e, nik ne a tum in moЙ—aaЙ—i Й—ah. В»
25.6: Festus tumЙ—i ini uup neeh yasna-kaahay mbaa neeh ndaЕӢkiyaah ndaam, Жҙutta a dokukka Seesare. Wa Kooh wiis a kaЙ—ta a Й“ooffa ЕӢ atte'ohaana, a nakohha haytohu Pool.
25.7: Wa yeem ree, Yawuut ca pulohee Yerusalem willa Й—e, Й“a yambeeЙ—a Й—e in laayiЙ—, yakiЙ—. Waaye in ci Й“a yambee Й—e jen, Й“a minЙ—i teeЙ“oh ali firnde nga.
25.8: Waaye Pool ngeliЙ—ta haf ce an : В« ЕҠ tumЙ—i ali in moЙ—aaЙ—i, wa waasiЕӢ Yawuut ci haa, wa Kahan Kooh haa, wa buuri yakkiЕӢ Rom haa. В»
25.9: Festus waaЙ—ta ne Yawuut ca neЙ“u nga Й—e, a meekissa Й—e ne : В« Fu waaЙ—iЙ— kaЙ— Yerusalem ne fu atte'u nga ЕӢ fikiiso, ngaЕӢ ini kaЙ— ЕӢ inii e ? В»
25.10: Pool loffa ne : В« Г‘am yii tufukka ЕӢ ngeloha, ЕӢ ngelohaaciЕӢ buuri yakkiЕӢ Rom te ЕӢ joy atte'ohu nga. Ini kaЙ— ЕӢ Yawuut ci nak, ЕӢ tooГұЙ—i Й“a te fu ЕӢ haf fu, fu inhiЙ—a baahiЙ—.
25.11: ЕҠ tooГұeen wala ЕӢ tum ini car ne ЕӢ apu Й—ah, ЕӢ heeЙ—i sange kaan nga ; waaye nik ne in ci Й“a na yambee so keeh haa Й—ah, ali Й“o' joyЙ—i so deg ЕӢ yaah Й“a. ЕҠ Й“aysaat ЕӢ buura yakka ! В»
25.12: Wi a woo ineem, Festus hotohha na atte'oh ca Й“inooЙ“aЕӢ ngelohaana, Жҙutta a woosa ne : В« Fu woo ne fu Й“aysaat ЕӢ buura yakka, fu Й“aysan nga Й—e. В» Pool ЕӢ fiki Agiripa na Berenis
25.13: Wa degga Й“i neeh, buura teeku Agiripa na Berenis taambЙ—oh ce Й“itiЙ“, hayya Seesare ne Й“a kaГұiЙ— Festus.
25.14: Nika Й“a joyee nik nga Й“i neeh tahha po Festus woosa buura ina kaЙ— ЕӢ Pool an : В« RaakiЙ— Жҙaari Feliksa faЙ— ndii, ЕӢ kasooni.
25.15: Wa ЕӢ kaЙ— Yerusalem, kilifaacaЕӢ seeЖҙkiЙ—oh ca na yakak caЕӢ Yawuut ca kalaame'iЙ— Й—e, Й“a nakka so ne ЕӢ deg Й—e in.
25.16: ЕҠ loffa Й“a ne : вҖң ЖҒi Rom mbaahkohЙ—i eЙ—oh Й“o' yambuuЙ— raak Й—e ngelЙ—i. A joyiЙ— onu ne a min taasuk ЕӢ fiki Й“i na yambee Й—e. вҖқ
25.17: WeЙ— Й“a hunoh na so ndii, ЕӢ sannga Й—aak ineem, Kooh wiis wiis rek, ЕӢ kaЙ—ta ЕӢ Й“ooffa atte'ohaana, ЕӢ nakohha haytohu Жҙaareem.
25.18: ЖҒi na yambee Й—e hayya, waaye Й“a wooЙ—i ali in ЕӢ in ci moЙ—aaЙ—iici ЕӢ liiЙ“ee ne ceЙ— a tum.
25.19: ЖҒa leer na Й—e ЕӢ ini kaЙ— ЕӢ taastiЙ—oh ngaЕӢ ini kaЙ— ЕӢ waas-KoohiЕӢ Й“a na Жҙaar na woyse Yeesu, a kaaniЙ— waaye Pool na ndengЙ—e ne a yi pes.
25.20: Mi nak, wa ЕӢ inahЙ—i in nga, ЕӢ meekissa Pool andi a waaЙ—iЙ— kaЙ— Yerusalem ne a atte'u ineem ndaam.
25.21: Waaye Pool nakohha ne a risaat ambuuЙ—, a Й“ayu ЕӢ buuri yakki ЕӢ Rom ne atteeniЕӢ Й—e tumohu ndaam. ЕҠ nakohha ne a risaat ambuuЙ— po mbaЙ—na ЕӢ tuuЖҙan Й—e ЕӢ buuri yakki. В»
25.22: Agiripa woosa Festus ne : В« ЕҠ namiЙ— waaЙ— sikЙ—uk Жҙaareem de'. В» Festus loffa Й—e ne : В« Kim Й—ah, fu hey Й—e sikЙ—uke. В»
25.23: ЕҠ ineem, wa Kooh wiis, Agiripa na Berenis hayya Й—iski na ngelohse, hay roofiЙ—. ЖҒa hunee na kilifaaciЕӢ soldaar ci na kilifaaciЕӢ kur ki, Festus nakohha ne Pool haytohu.
25.24: Жіutta a woosa ne : В« Buur Agiripa na Й—u Й“i nik na Й“oo ndii jen, Жҙaari ЕӢ fikiiЙ—u yii, Yawuut ci ЕӢ findi Й“a hend hayiЙ— ГұaЙ—tuke nga so ; ndii na Yerusalem jen Й“a na leehkee so ne, a joyЙ—i pesis.
25.25: Mi nak, ЕӢ hotiЙ— ne a tumЙ—i ali ini joy Й—e tah apu. Waaye a nakoh Й“ayu ЕӢ buuri yakki, weЙ— tah ЕӢ ambiЙ— ne, ЕӢ hey Й—e Й—e kome.
25.26: ЕҠ raakЙ—i ini hool lo, wi ЕӢ fiisan kilifaani yakki ЕӢ ini kaЙ— nga. WeЙ— tah ЕӢ Й“ayya Й—e ЕӢ fikiiЙ—u, ЕӢ fikiifu sah Agiripa ne Й—u Жҙut Й—e meekis Й—ah, ЕӢ raak ini ЕӢ fiisan.
25.27: Fu amb Й“o', fu tuuЖҙ Й—e Rom te fu wooЙ—i hooliЙ— in ci a na yambse, weem liiЙ“aah haa. В»

26.1: Agiripa woosa Pool ne : В« Fu onuuЙ— ne fu ngeliЙ— haf fu. В» Pool raЙ—issa yaah, a cammba ngel an :
26.2: В« Buur Agiripa, ЕӢ sumiЙ— woti ЕӢ mini ЕӢ min taas ЕӢ fikiifu in ci Yawuut ci na yambee so jen.
26.3: Fu kangam ЕӢ inhi fu inah mbaah ciЕӢ Yawuut ci jen na taastiЙ—oh ci ЕӢ ini kaЙ— ЕӢ waasi. Kon mi yii kiim Й—a fu sikЙ—uk ko te fu sang seesuk nga.
26.4: Yawuut ci jen inhiЙ— kipes kiЕӢ ngo ЕӢ kikomaakiikaЕӢ ngo poyi. ЖҒa inhiЙ— findi ЕӢ mandee ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ cuuЙ“iЕӢ ngo ЕӢ Yerusalem.
26.5: ЖҒa inhiЙ— to maaГұiЙ— te Й“a miniЙ— to seede, ne Й“a waaЙ—a Й—ah, ЕӢ nikee Farisen , ЕӢ peseeЙ—a pes Farisen , te weЙ— ini uup yooЙ“aaЙ—i taambiЙ— ЕӢ waasiЕӢMusaa.
26.6: ЖҠiski wa nik, mi yii atte'u, sagu ini ЕӢ ooluk gapohi Kooh gapee caac ciЕӢ Й“oo.
26.7: CuuЙ“ ciЕӢ Й“oo ndaЕӢkiyaah na kanak ci (12) ambiЙ— ne wa hey raake weЙ— tah Й“eЙ—i Гұaamuk Kooh noh na wek. Ee kilifaani, oolkeem nak weЙ— tah Yawuut ci yambee so.
26.8: Wa ye tah Й—u amb ne wa minЙ—i kosu ne Kooh na hultiЙ—e kaaniЙ— ci ?
26.9: Mi ЕӢ haf fo sah, ЕӢ liiЙ“ee ne ЕӢ joyee joy hiГұoh tiikiЕӢ Yeesu yiЕӢ Nasareet ЕӢ findi naa nu wa minoh nik Й—ah.
26.10: Ineem weЙ— ЕӢ tumee ЕӢ Yerusalem, ЕӢ taЖҙca Й“o'-Kooh laayiЙ— ЕӢ kaso. KilifaaciЕӢ seeЖҙkiЙ—oh ciЕӢ waasiЕӢ Musaa teyЙ—ukЙ—een ndo ne ЕӢ tuma, te Й“ooЙ“eem atte'seen ne Й“a joy joy apu Й—ah, ЕӢ meeЙ— meeЙ— hun nga.
26.11: ЕҠ kaЙ—eeЙ—a ЕӢ sinaagog nu sinaagog ne ЕӢ torhiЙ— Й“a, ЕӢ faЙ—Й—ukoh Й“a kosi Й“a kos Yeesu. Ayruki ЕӢ ayrukee Й“a miskeen lool po wa tahha so tolfiЙ—eeЙ—a Й“a po ЕӢ kur-taah ciЕӢ kur ci cinooci sah. Pool naandsukiЙ— Agiripa findi a tuuЙ“oh
26.12: Wa kaЙ—eeЙ—a Й—aa po wa raakka mbeh, ЕӢ kaЙ—eeЙ—a Damas. KilifaacaЕӢ seeЖҙkiЙ—oh ca woosee so, Й“a onnda so ne ЕӢ min amb kosiЙ— ca nikee ndaam.
26.13: Kilifaani, Гұam kaЙ—oh po ЕӢ leero noh, ЕӢ hotta Гұiin puloh Eel ci, siГұaarЙ—iЕӢ wa weЙ— uup wiЕӢ nohi. Wa willa so, mi na Й“i hunee na so, wa siГұaarЙ—eeЙ—a.
26.14: ЖҒoo jen, Й“oo keennda ЕӢ kehЖҙi, ЕӢ kerahha hooso woyiЙ— to ЕӢ peЙ—miЕӢ Yawuut ci ne : вҖң Sool, Sool, wa ye tah fu tolfiЙ—ee so ? Fu gaaГұee haf fu findi mbaami na mbalnguuse ndooЙ—i a na aaГұohse ! вҖқ
26.15: ЕҠ loffa ne : вҖң A fu Й“a HeЙ—i ? вҖқ HeЙ—i woosa so ne : вҖң E Гұam Yeesu, yi fu na tolfiЙ—e.
26.16: Waaye kurka fu tufuk ! Inii weЙ— tah ho teeЙ“uk Й—a : ЕҠ kooЙ—iЙ— Й—a ne fu nik surgaaniЕӢ ngo ne fu seede'ee ini fu hot nga so woti, na ci ЕӢ teeЙ“issan Й—a.
26.17: ЕҠ hey Й—a mucЙ—e ЕӢ yaah ciЕӢ Yawuut ci na Й“i nikЙ—i Yawuut, Й“i maa tuuЖҙohee Й—a,
26.18: ne fu rangis has ciЕӢ Й“a, fu pulЙ—oh Й“a ЕӢ Гұuus, fu Й“ek Й“a ЕӢ siГұaari, fu puliЙ— Й“a ЕӢ nguuriЕӢ Seytaani, fu Й“ay Й“a ЕӢ Kooh, Й“a Й—aasu bakaaЙ— ciЕӢ Й“a, Й“a raak Й“ak ЕӢ lamaahi te Й“a hey Й“aahe ЕӢ Й“ooЙ“iЕӢ Kooh hoolЙ—uuЙ— ci sagu kosi Й“a kos so. вҖқ
26.19: Kilifaani, a ineem tah, ЕӢ taambЙ—iЙ— ini ЕӢ hotee pulohha Eel ci.
26.20: ЕҠ ineem, ЕӢ kocca woo na Й“i Damas na Й“i Yerusalem, ЕӢ nammba woo na Й“i Yudee jen na Й“i nikЙ—i Yawuut, ne Й“a Й“oЖҙsoh pesohaaЙ—, Й“a hay ЕӢ Kooh te ЕӢ tumohaaЙ— ciЕӢ Й“a, Й“a teeЙ“oh ne Й“a Й“oЖҙsohiЙ— pesohaaЙ— keeh-keeh.
26.21: Inii de', weЙ— tah Yawuut ci ammba so ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ Kahan Kooh, Й“a waaЙ—ta so ap.
26.22: Waaye Kooh yii niiЙ— to po woti, te ЕӢ ris pes, ne ЕӢ seede ЕӢ fiki yakiЙ— na Жҙin. Te ЕӢ wooЙ—i ini Й—aloh na in ci Musaa na woosuuЙ— ci jen woo ne ca hey raake.
26.23: WeЙ— ne MucЙ—ohi Gapohse hey yaaЙ“e, a yi kocan hulit ЕӢ kaaniЙ— ci te a yegЙ—oh siГұaariЕӢ muci ЕӢ Yawuut ci na Й“i nikЙ—i Yawuut. В» Ini Agiripa liiЙ“ ngaЕӢ Pool
26.24: Pool rissa ngelЙ—eeЙ—a haf ce Й—aa, weЙ— Festus leehkoh Й—e an : В« Fu dof dof Pool ! Ini fu jang laay laay po fu arndiЙ—ohiЙ— ! В»
26.25: Pool loffa Й—e ne : В« Muk kilifaani, ЕӢ arndiЙ—ohЙ—i. In ci ЕӢ woo jen keeh te ca wiriЙ—.
26.26: Buur Agiripa sah inhiЙ— in cii weЙ— tah ЕӢ kaannja ca woo ЕӢ fikiice an. Wa hooliЙ— to ne ali in fusЙ—i Й—e ЕӢ in cii, laam, findi ca raakoh Й—embЙ—i.
26.27: Buur Agiripa, fu kosiЙ— woo ciЕӢ woosuuЙ— ci e ? ЕҠ inhiЙ— ne fu kosiЙ— ca ! В»
26.28: Agiripa woosa Pool ne : В« Tas Жҙissuut rek, fu hey yo kosЙ—ukohe, fu tum mbo Kerceen ! В»
26.29: Pool loffa ne : В« Wa nik win-win wala wa yiih, ЕӢ wooЙ—i Й—a fu dong waaye mi yii kiim Kooh ne Й“i na sikЙ—ukee so woti jen, Й—u nik ini ЕӢ nikoh, Й—al toku na ceen. В»
26.30: Wa Pool woo po Жҙutta, buura na goornoora na Berenis na Й“ooЙ“a hunee na Й“a jen, kurukka.
26.31: Wa Й“a pulee, Й“a woyeeЙ—a ЕӢ harmban Й“a ne : В« Жіaarii tumЙ—i ini joy Й—e tah apu wala taЖҙu. В»
26.32: Agiripa woosa Festus ne : В« Жіaarii mineen faЙ—su ne a nakoheeЙ—i Й“ayu ЕӢ buuri yakki Й—ah. В»

27.1: Wa Й“a tufuk ЕӢ Й“ek Й“oo bato ne Й“oo kaЙ— Itaali, Pool na Й“i ambuuЙ— wiiriis deguusa ЕӢ yaah Жҙaar teeku Juliyus. A nikee adgohoh soldaar, Й“a Й“aahee ЕӢ soldaar ci na woyse "soldaar ciЕӢ buuri yakki".
27.2: ЖҒoo aassa bato puloh Adaramit kaЙ—eeЙ—a Asi ЕӢ kur ca ЕӢ sereendaЕӢ cookmi, Й“oo cootta. Aristarka, ЖҙaariЕӢ Tessalonik ЕӢ kur kaЕӢ Maseduwaan hunee na Й“oo.
27.3: ЕҠ Kooh-wiisiina, Й“oo serra ЕӢ Sidoon. Juliyus taambkohee Pool taambkoh moЙ—iЙ—, a teyЙ—ukiЙ—ta Й—e ne a kaЙ— marka nawleeciЕӢ Й—e ne Й“a Й“aatЙ—oh Й—e.
27.4: Wa Й“oo puloh ndaam, Й“oo lahha ЕӢ sero Siipar ne Й“oo naafuk sagu puuЙ—si yurhiЙ—kohee na Й“oo.
27.5: Жіutta Й“oo taalndiЙ—ta ЕӢ cookmiЕӢ Silisi na wiЕӢ Pamfili, Й“oo serra batooni ЕӢ Miira, kur-taah ngaЕӢ Lisi.
27.6: ЕҠ ndaam, Juliyus, yi adgohee soldaar ci, raakka bato wiiriis nga puloh Aleksandiri kaЙ—eeЙ—a Itaali, a aassa na Й“oo nga.
27.7: ЖҒoo tummba Й“i neeh laayiЙ— ЕӢ waas, sagu ne batoona kaЙ—ee kaЙ— yiihiЙ— po Й“oo ree Й“ak Kenid yaaЙ“oh na yaaЙ“oh. PuuЙ—si tahha po Й“oo minЙ—i taalndiЙ— ЕӢ ndaam, Й“oo taambohha Salmone, kaЙ—ta hendЙ—uka puuЙ—si ЕӢ Keret.
27.8: SereendkaЕӢ Й“oo ndaam misikka lool, Й“oo kaЙ—eeЙ—a po Й“oo reesa Й—isik teeku "Seroha-NeЙ“iЙ—", wa usoheeЙ—i na kur-taahi na woyse Lasee.
27.9: ЕҠ ineem, Й“aaЙ“iЕӢ Й“oo maannja lool, kaЙ—ta po Й“aaЙ“ ЕӢ cookma nikka in wooraaЙ—i kotii, laam jamanooniЕӢ soosi nikee cambiЙ—, mbehi na orse sah cooteen. WeЙ— tah Pool woosa ne :
27.10: В« ЖіaaЙ“iЕӢ ngo, ЕӢ hotiЙ— ne kaЙ—ii woorЙ—i, batooni na ini nik nga hey laaye yahkiЙ—, te Й“oo sah kiГұin ciЕӢ Й“oo miniЙ— tas nga. В»
27.11: Waaye Juliyus ya adgohee soldaar ca uupee kos woo caЕӢ Жҙaara nupЙ—ee batoona , na heЙ— batoona , waaye woo caЕӢ Pool haa.
27.12: Serohaana baaheeЙ—i ne Й“o' nik nga ЕӢ jamano soos, weЙ— tahee ini uup ЕӢ Й“ooЙ“a nikee ЕӢ batoona woyee ne Й“oo pulohaat ndaam. ЖҒa waaЙ—ee ne Й“oo taalndiЙ— ЕӢ cookma, Й“oo jeem kaЙ— Feniksa, seroha wiiriis ЕӢ caЕӢ Keret, ne Й“oo nik nga ЕӢ jamanooniЕӢ soosi. Serohaaneem, puuЙ—si mineeЙ—i hay nga, Й—al ЕӢ Й“ak kanak dong ЕӢ muyohaaЙ— noh. PuuЙ—sa laayЙ—a
27.13: Wa Й“oo nik ndaam, Й—ekka po puuЙ—is eЙ—fiЙ— puloh cookmi, ef-efЙ—eeЙ—a. ЖҒa liiЙ“pa ne ini Й“a waaЙ—ee hey nike. ЖҒa nihissa sap caЕӢ batoona , Й“a sereendukka Keret baahiЙ—, Й“a kaЙ—eeЙ—a.
27.14: Waaye wa deg Жҙissuut rek, puuЙ—is wiiriis raakiЙ— hatil teeku Erakilon pulohha Keret keennda nga Й“oo.
27.15: Wa uupiЙ—ta batoona hatil, wa minisseeЙ—i yurhiЙ—koh naa, Й“oo faЙ—taa, wa coottoheeЙ—a Й“oo.
27.16: Wa maaГұЙ—i Й“oo lahha ЕӢ sero kur Жҙin na woyse Kawda, a masuЙ“ wila. Wa Й—ippa Й“oo Жҙissuut ЕӢ puuЙ—sa, tahha po Й“oo hannda min rapiЙ— gaala Жҙina waaye bala wa nikan Й—ah, wa miskeen lool.
27.17: Wa Й“oo rapiЙ—a po Жҙutta, Й“a Й“ayya Й“i niy, Й“a tokka batoona po wa willa. ЖҒa namee neЖҙЖҙoh ne wa kaЙ— giira ЕӢ merhey maЕӢ Sirta ЕӢ Libi, wa Й“altukoh, tahha po Й“a njaffa in ЕӢ masma ne wa haawis nupaЕӢ batoona , Й“oo taalndiЙ—ta, puuЙ—sa coottoheeЙ—a Й“oo ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ cookma.
27.18: Wa Kooh wiis, raak puuЙ—sa ris yoondiЙ— batoona na hatil po Й“a mbetta Й“ak ЕӢ ina batoona sife.
27.19: ЕҠ neeha kaahayЙ—oh, Й“eЙ— Й“a ambohee batoona mbetootta Й“i in Й“itiЙ— ca Й“aahee ЕӢ batoona .
27.20: Wa tummba Й“i neeh laayiЙ— ci inah ne nohi hotukЙ—i, hor ci hotukЙ—i, puuЙ—sa rissa raakiЙ— hatil, wa kaЙ—ta po Й“oo ambisseeЙ—i ne Й“oo hey muce.
27.21: Wa tummba in maaГұiЙ—, Й“ooЙ“i nikee ЕӢ batooni ГұamЙ—i. ЕҠ ineem Pool tufukka ЕӢ leerooЙ“a, a woosa Й“a ne : В« ЖіaaЙ“iЕӢ ngo, Й—u sikЙ—ukeen ndo Й—ah, Й“oo heeЙ—i pulohe Keret ; te Й“oo heen mine penduk yahЙ—ukii, te Й“oo Гұakuu in ci Й“oo Гұak jen.
27.22: Waaye Й—iski wa nik, mi yii kiim Й—u, Й—u tok fit ciЕӢ Й—u ; ali Й“o' ГұakanЙ—i kiГұin kiЕӢ Й—e nga, a batooni dong yahkan.
27.23: Kooh yi ЕӢ Й“aahoh te ЕӢ Гұaamkee Й—e, malaakaaniЕӢ Й—e hayiЙ— nga so ЕӢ weki,
27.24: a woosa so ne : вҖң Pool, kina neЖҙЖҙoh ! Fu hey kaЙ—e po fu tufkiЙ—u ЕӢ fiki buura yakkaЕӢ Rom, te Kooh ЕӢ baahohiЕӢ Й—e na Й—a, a hey mucЙ—e kipes ciЕӢ Й“ooЙ“i hun na Й—a ЕӢ Й“aaЙ“iЕӢ batooni jen. вҖқ
27.25: Mbaa Й—ah, ndengЙ—ukaat ЖҙaaЙ“iЕӢ ngo, ЕӢ oolkiЙ— Kooh ne wa raakohan findi a woyoh ho wa.
27.26: Batooni hey gaЖҙe ЕӢ kur ki masuЙ“ wil. В»
27.27: Wa nikee ЕӢ weka ndaЕӢkiyaah na nikiisЙ—oh (14), puuЙ—sa rissa Й“oo coottoh ЕӢ cookmaЕӢ Mediterane. ЕҠ ndengelnde weka, wa mannda ЕӢ Й“a ambohee batoona ne Й“oo reЙ“ee keheЖҙ.
27.28: ЖҒa yoorra niy na inaa Й“itiЙ— ne Й“a marak nooЙ—iina, Й“a hotta ne wa meetar ndaЕӢkiyaah-kaahay na meetar yasna-kanak (37) ; wa kaЙ—ta Жҙissuut, Й“a tumissa Й—aa, wa nikka meetar ndaЕӢkiyaah-kanak na meetar yasna-kaahay (28).
27.29: ЖҒa neЖҙЖҙohha ne batoona laЙ“ ЕӢ atoh, Й“a njaffa sap nikiis ЕӢ finhooriЕӢ batoona , Й“a seesukka ne Kooh wiis.
27.30: ЖҒa ambohee batoona waaЙ—ta saandoh, Й“a ruhsiЙ—eeЙ—a gaala Жҙina ЕӢ masma, Й“a njaf-njafЙ—ukeeЙ—a sap ЕӢ fiki batoona .
27.31: Pool woosa soldaar ca na ya adgohee Й“a ne : В« ЖіaaЙ“ii faЙ— batooni Й“a coot Й—ah, Й—u minanЙ—i muc. В»
27.32: ЕҠ ineem soldaar ca nguЙ—ta niy ca tokee gaala Жҙina, Й“a faЙ—taa, wa keennda ЕӢ cookma.
