4.24: Ineem raakiЙ— ini wa waaЙ— woo : ЖҒitiЙ“ ci kanak ceem Й“a nikiЙ— findi ambtiЙ—oh kanak. Yinoori, a yi ambtiЙ—ohi tufkiЙ—ohu tangooraЕӢ Sinaay, a na rime Гұaam, a yi Haajara.
4.25: Haajara yeem, a yi tangooraЕӢ Sinaay, wa nik ЕӢ Arabi - te a yi nam nik Yerusalemi woti-woti, wa Гұaam, wa na kuЙ“uuciЕӢ wa jen.
4.26: Waaye YerusalemaЕӢ Й—afka raakiЙ— haf wa, te weЙ— yaayiЕӢ Й“oo.
4.27: Wa fiisuuЙ— ne : В« Suma, fu yi Й“itЙ“i jaasir, fu yi raakЙ—i kuЙ“u ! Leehka sagu sum, fu yi moosЙ—i yegoh miskiЙ— ciЕӢ Й“asil ! KuЙ“uuciЕӢ Й“itЙ“i faЙ—u Й“eЙ— uupan laay Й“iЕӢ Й“itЙ“i nik na Жҙaar ce. В»
4.28: Ini kaЙ— nga Й—u, Й“aah ciЕӢ ngo, Й—u kuЙ“uuciЕӢ gapohi findi Isaahha.
4.29: Waaye ЕӢ jamanoonaam, kuЙ“ki rimuk findi Й“o' na rimkohe, meeЙ—een tolfiЙ— yi rimuk ЕӢ tumohaaЙ— ciЕӢ FuuЙ—si Hoolohngaani, te wa mand Й—aa woti.
4.30: Waaye Fiis ci woo ye nga ? Ca woo ne : В« AaГұa Гұaami na kuЙ“kiЕӢ Й—e, laam, kuЙ“kiЕӢ Гұaami joyЙ—i lam na kuЙ“kiЕӢ gori. В»
4.31: Mbaa Й“aah ciЕӢ ngo, Й“oo kuЙ“u Гұaam haa, Й“oo kuЙ“u gor.

5.1: Kiristaani naafiЙ— Й“oo ne Й“oo raak haf Й“oo. Kon, ndengЙ—ukaat, te kinaat dokkis Й—u nikis Гұaam.
5.2: SikЙ—ukaat to ! Mi yi Pool, Гұam na woyee Й—u wa : ЖҠu teyЙ—uk nguЙ—u Й—ah, Kiristaani heyЙ—i Й—u raakЙ—isse njiriГұ.
5.3: Te mi woytohis Й“o' nu teyЙ—uk nguЙ—u Й—ah : ЖҒoyeem inhaat ne a joy joy taambiЙ— nakoh ciЕӢ waasi findi ca hend jen.
5.4: ЖҠu Й“i na waake kiyurah taamboh ЕӢ nakoh ciЕӢ waasi, Й—u saЙ“sohuuЙ— na Kiristaani ; Й—u ГұakiЙ— baahohiЕӢ Kooh.
5.5: ЖҒoo nak, e FuuЙ—si Hoolohngaani on Й“oo oolki Й“oo ooluk ne Kooh hey Й“oo one kiyurah taamboh ЕӢ kosi Й“oo kos, te Й“oo Й“ii seka na seesuk.
5.6: Ini raak njiriГұ ngaЕӢ Й“i nik ЕӢ Kiristaani Yeesu, wa nguЙ—uk haa, wa nguЙ—kaaЙ—i haa, wa kosi na tume sagu waaЙ—oh.
5.7: ЖҠu nikee ЕӢ waas baahiЙ— ! Ya Й“a tufkiЙ— Й—u, po a hondohha Й—u kerhiЙ— keeh ki ?
5.8: Ini Й“ek Й—u ЕӢ inii pulohЙ—i ЕӢ Kooh yi Й“eeЙ—uk Й—u.
5.9: Findi wa na woyohse : Lawiir Жҙissuut na guufЙ—e muni jen.
5.10: Mi, ЕӢ oolkiЙ— Й—u, ЕӢ niki Й“oo nik ЕӢ HeЙ—i. ЕҠ inhiЙ— ne Й—u hunan na so. Waaye Й“oyi yahroh hel ciЕӢ Й—u, Й“o' nu a min ki nik Й—ah, Kooh hey Й—e wa wirnde.
5.11: ЖҒaah ciЕӢ ngo, ini kaЙ— nga so, nikee ne ЕӢ ris Й“eeЙ—koh nguЙ—uk Й—ah, kon, ЕӢ heeЙ—i tolfiЙ—asse poyi. Mbaa, yegЙ—ohi mi na yegЙ—ohe kakaan kiЕӢ Kiristaani ЕӢ kurwaana, heeЙ—i kafndisse ali Й“o' !
5.12: ЖҒi na Й“aye Й—uuЙ— ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ Й—u, cey, Й“a mineen nguЙ—uk po Й“a Й“uc haf Й“a Й—ah ! FuuЙ—si Hoolohngaani na taambiЙ— kiГұin
5.13: ЖҠu nak, Й“aah ciЕӢ ngo, Kooh Й“eeЙ—kiЙ— Й—u ne Й—u raak haf Й—u ; waaye kinaat tonduk ЕӢ ineem, Й—u taambЙ—ee kiГұin ciЕӢ Й—u ; yaa nu nga Й—u Й—ah, waaЙ—i a waaЙ— morom ce tahaat po a taambkohee Й—e.
5.14: Nakoh ciЕӢ waasi jen, Й“o' miniЙ— ca rohЖҙiЙ— ЕӢ woo yino, an : В« WaaЙ—a morom fu findi fu waaЙ—oh haf fu. В»
5.15: Waaye Й—u Й—oЙ“tiЙ—ohe, Й—u sifiГұsohtiЙ—ohee Й—ah, wortukaat yahrohtiЙ—oh.
5.16: Inii weЙ— ЕӢ woo : Pesohaat FuuЙ—si Hoolohngaani, mbaa Й—u taambЙ—anЙ—i kiГұin ciЕӢ Й—u.
5.17: Laam, Й“oo taambiЙ— kiГұin ciЕӢ Й“oo Й—ah, in ci Й“oo waaЙ— na ci FuuЙ—si waaЙ— suftiЙ—koh suftiЙ—koh ; waaЙ—-waaЙ— ci kanak ci suftiЙ—koh suftiЙ—koh, po Й—u na tumeeЙ—i ini Й—u waaЙ—.
5.18: Waaye Й—u faЙ— FuuЙ—si, a adgiЙ— Й—u Й—ah, nakoh ciЕӢ waasi yilifЙ—i Й—u.
5.19: ЖҒooЙ“i jen inhiЙ— ini taambiЙ— kiГұin na rime : Faankoh sangohuuЙ—, usЙ“iЙ— haf fu, cakaay,
5.20: Гұaamuk kooh ci nikaaЙ—iici, honjomoh, sangtiЙ—oh, lahtoh, siisoh, yooЙ“ ayruk, nook ЕӢ haf fu, saЙ“soh Й“o', Й“ek kerhiЙ—ohaaЙ—i ЕӢ mboolo,
5.21: siis, [apoh] laar, mbuumbaay na in ci mand na ca. Findi ЕӢ woytohee Й—u, mi yii woytohis Й—u : ЖҒooЙ“i na tume in ceem, Й“a raakanЙ—i Й“ak ЕӢ NguuriЕӢ-Kooh.
5.22: Waaye ini FuuЙ—si na rime ЕӢ Й“oyi, weЙ— in cii : WaaЙ—oh, sum, jam, min muГұ seke, baah, haltukoh, car oolku,
5.23: nik Й“o' soosiЙ—, min amb haf fu ; ali waas sangЙ—i in ceem.
5.24: ЖҒi Й“aah ЕӢ Kiristaani Yeesu nak, Й“a daaЖҙiЙ— ЕӢ kurwaa ini meeЙ— Й“a Й“ek ЕӢ taambiЙ— kiГұin ciЕӢ Й“a na waaЙ—-waaЙ— ciЕӢ Й“a na maЙ—-maЙ— ciЕӢ Й“a.
5.25: ЖҒoo pesohee FuuЙ—si Й—ah, Й“oo namaat taambiЙ— FuuЙ—si.
5.26: ЖҒoo kinaat hotsiЙ—uk ; Й“oo faЙ—aat waak lahtoh, Й“oo kinaat siisoh.

6.1: ЖҒaah ciЕӢ ngo, Й“o' telu tumee ini yurahЙ—i Й—ah, Й—u Й“i na pesohe FuuЙ—si Hoolohngaani, Й“aatЙ—ohaat Й—e po a dokuk ЕӢ waas, wa hun na woo soosiЙ—. Te yaa nu nga Й—u Й—ah, marak haf ce baahiЙ— po a namuu kafnduk.
6.2: Yaa nu nga Й—ah raankohaat morom ce Й“itki a Й“ituk. ЖҠu tuma Й—ah, Й—u mitiЙ— waasiЕӢ Kiristaani.
6.3: Yi amb ne a yi uupiЙ— njiriГұ, te a ali in haa, a na leye haf ce.
6.4: Yaa nu nga markisaat ini a na tume, a hot ini neЙ“ Й—e nga Й—ah, a neЙ“saat, waaye a Й“eesuu wa ЕӢ Й“inooЙ“i ;
6.5: in nu Й“o' tum Й—ah, a tuma haf ce.
6.6: Yi na jangЙ—asse woo kiЕӢ Kooh, eЙ—aat yi na jangЙ—ee Й—e ngaЕӢ baahiЙ— ci a raak.
6.7: Kinaat lee haf Й—u ; Kooh na njembtasseeЙ—i. Ini Й“oyi sok, weЙ— a nguЙ—an.
6.8: Yi sok wuu ini neЙ“ faaniЕӢ Й—e, nguЙ—an ini puloh ЕӢ neЙ“iЙ— ciЕӢ faaniЕӢ Й—e, maanaam Й—umbu, waaye yi sok wuu FuuЙ—si Hoolohngaani, nguЙ—an ini puloh ЕӢ FuuЙ—si Hoolohngaani, maanaam kipes ki heyЙ—i reehe.
6.9: ЖҒoo kinaat yaaЙ“ ЕӢ tum in baahiЙ—, laam, Й“oo hey nguЙ—e ЕӢ jamanooniЕӢ wa, ne Й“oo faЙ—sukЙ—i nga Й—ah.
6.10: Mbaa, Й“oo tumЙ—aat Й“ooЙ“i jen in baahiЙ—, ЕӢ woyisЙ—i Й—a Й“aah ciЕӢ Й“oo kosiЙ— ci feeh Й“oo Й“ii mina Й—ah. Nakoh ci mirndoh na askohi
6.11: ЖҠu hotiЙ— fiis ci yakak ci mi na fiisootee wuu Й—u na yaahiЕӢ ngo.
6.12: ЖҒi waaЙ— hotaat to ЕӢ ini kaЙ— ЕӢ in ci min hotu, findi Й“a hend jen, Й“eЙ— Й“i na woyee Й—u ne Й—u nguЙ—uk. ЖҒa waaЙ— in yino dong nga, weЙ— ne Й“a sang tolfiЙ—u sagu kurwaaniЕӢ Kiristaani.
6.13: ЖҒeЙ— Й“i nguЙ—uk, ЕӢ haf Й“a sah, Й“a taambiЙ—Й—i waasiЕӢMusaa ; waaye Й“a waaЙ— ne Й—u nguЙ—uk ne Й“a min yaksiЙ—uk nga.
6.14: Waaye, ini kaЙ— nga so, ЕӢ heyЙ—i waake muk yaksiЙ—koha ЕӢ ali in wiiriis Й—al ЕӢ kurwaaniЕӢ HeЙ— Й“oo Yeesu Kiristaa. Sagu kurwaani, findi ЕӢ hotoh Adina, wa mand na ini daaЖҙu ЕӢ kurwaa, wa raakisЙ—i njiriГұ nga so, te Adina na namee so hotoh Й—aa.
6.15: Ini raak njiriГұ, wa nguЙ—uk haa, wa nguЙ—kaaЙ—i haa, waaye nik feruuЙ— as, weЙ— raak njiriГұ.
6.16: Jam na yirmoh nikaat na Й“o' nu na taambЙ—e ini ЕӢ nakoh wii Й—ah, ca nam nik na IsraayeliЕӢ Kooh !
6.17: Ini kooЙ—oh ndii, ali Й“o' kinaat to yaaЙ“iЙ— ; mi, ЕӢ raak ЕӢ faaniЕӢ ngo muuy-gaaГұ ci teeЙ“oh ne ЕӢ Й“aah ЕӢ Yeesu.
6.18: ЖҒaah ciЕӢ ngo, baahohiЕӢ HeЙ— Й“oo Yeesu Kiristaa nikaat na Й—u ! Amiin !

1.1: Mi yii kaГұiЙ— Й—u, Й—u Й“i Й“o'-Kooh ci nik [ЕӢ Efes]. Mi yi Pool, ApootariЕӢ Kiristaani Yeesu ЕӢ ini Kooh waaЙ—, mi yii fiis Й—u, Й—u Й“i hool wuu Kooh te Й—u carra oolku ЕӢ niki Й—u nik ЕӢ Yeesu Kiristaa.
1.2: Kooh BaabiЕӢ Й“oo baahohaat Й—u, a on Й—u jam ; Yeesu Kiristaa HeЙ—i baahohaat Й—u, a on Й—u jam ! Barke mitiЙ— ЕӢ Kiristaani
1.3: Eey Kooh, yi nik KoohiЕӢ HeЙ— Й“oo Yeesu Kiristaa, a nammba nik BaabiЕӢ Й—e, a yakЙ—aah ; ЕӢ niki Й“oo nik ЕӢ Kiristaani, a barke'Й—iЙ— Й“oo ЕӢ FuuЙ—si Hoolohngaani, barke nu nik ЕӢ Й—afki.
1.4: ЕҠ Kiristaani, Kooh taniЙ— Й“oo bala Adina camban, ne Й“oo hool wuu ce te Й“oo raakuu sikka ЕӢ fikiice. ЕҠ waaЙ—ohiЕӢ Й—e,
1.5: a ambeen ne a hey Й“oo tume kuЙ“uuciЕӢ Й—e taamboh ЕӢ Yeesu Kiristaa. Ineem weЙ— a waaЙ— ЕӢ baah kiЕӢ Й—e,
1.6: ne Й“oo Жҙeek yaki baahohi a baahoh Й“oo yak, wi a on Й“oo ЕӢ niki Й“oo nik ЕӢ Kiristaani, yi a waaЙ—.
1.7: ЕҠ aami a aam Гұif miЕӢ Й—e, a pulЙ—ohiЙ— Й“oo ЕӢ baahaaЙ—i, Й“oo Й—aasuuЙ— bakaaЙ— ci. WeЙ— yakkiЕӢ baahohiЕӢ Kooh,
1.8: a eЙ—ta Й“oo nga laayiЙ—, wa hunnda na liiЙ“ohaaЙ— moЙ—iЙ— nu nik na kiГұaaГұ nu nik.
1.9: A inhiЙ—iЙ— Й“oo ini Й—asЙ—ukiЙ—iЕӢ ini a waaЙ—ee tum. A tufkiЙ—een ЕӢ baah kiЕӢ Й—e ne, a heya tume taamboh ЕӢ Kiristaani.
1.10: Ineem, a hey wa tume ЕӢ jamanoonaЕӢ wa, weЙ— ne a ambsoh in ci nik ЕӢ Eel ci na kehЖҙi jen, a deg Kiristaani ЕӢ hafiЕӢ ca.
1.11: ЖҒaatta nga, ЕӢ niki Й“oo nik nga Й—e, Й“oo rahsiЙ— Й“akiЕӢ Й“oo ЕӢ gapohi, laam, Kooh taniЙ— Й“oo maaГұ, wa nikee ini a tufkiЙ—ee tum sagu ne a waaЙ—ee wa waaЙ—. Te in nu Kooh tufuk tum Й—ah, a tuma findi a waaЙ—oha.
1.12: ЖҒoo Жҙeekaat yaki a yak, Й“oo, Й“i koc ooluk Kiristaani.
1.13: ЖҠu, wa Й—u kerah woo kiЕӢ keeh ki, YegЙ—ohiЕӢ MuciЕӢ Й—u, Й—u nameen Й—e kos, te ЕӢ niki Й—u nik nga Й—e, Kooh eЙ—iЙ— Й—u FuuЙ—si Hoolohngaani gapohse ne a nik Гұaasi teeЙ“oh ne Й—u wuu ce.
1.14: FuuЙ—si Hoolohngaani a yi firnde ne in ci Kooh gap cuuЙ“iЕӢ Й—e, Й“oo hey ca rahse. ЖҒoo hey ca rahse mbeha Й“oo pulЙ—assan ЕӢ miskiЙ—. Kon, Й“oo Жҙeekaat yaki a yak. Pool kiimЙ—iЙ— Й“i Efes Kooh
1.15: Ineem weЙ— tah po, wa ЕӢ kerah poyi kosi Й—u kos Yeesu HeЙ—i na waaЙ—i Й—u waaЙ— Й“o'-Kooh ci jen,
1.16: ЕӢ gen corkiЙ— Kooh ЕӢ ini kaЙ— nga Й—u. ЕҠ Й“aahndohee Й—u ЕӢ kiim ci mi na kiimee Й—e.
1.17: Ini mi na kiimЙ—ee Й—u, weЙ— ne KoohiЕӢ HeЙ— Й“oo Yeesu Kiristaa, Baabi raak kiyak ki, on Й—u FuuЙ—si Hoolohngaani yi onan Й—u liiЙ“ohaaЙ— moЙ—iЙ— te a teeЙ“ Й—u ya Й“a Kooh po Й—u inah Й—e keeh-keeh.
1.18: A ГұiinЙ—aat has ciЕӢ Й—u na keeГұ ciЕӢ Й—u, ne Й—u inah yaakaari a on Й—u wa a Й“eeЙ—uk Й—u, Й—u nam inah findi gapohiЕӢ Й—e yakoh ЕӢ Й“o'-Kooh ci
1.19: na findi hatiliЕӢ Й—e yakoh ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ Й“a, maanaam ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ Й“oo Й“i kos. WeЙ— hatili yakohngaani
1.20: Kooh hultiЙ—oh Kiristaani, weЙ— hatili a nam Й—e Й“oofЙ—oh ЕӢ yaah ГұaahmiЕӢ Й—e, ЕӢ Й—afka.
1.21: Kiristaani Й“oofЙ—uuЙ— ЕӢ Й—afuk ki'adug nu nik, ЕӢ Й—afuk kikilifa nu nik, ЕӢ min-min nu nik, ЕӢ hatil nu nik na in nu raak tiik Й—ah, ngaЕӢ adinaanii dong haa, waaye na adinaani na haye.
1.22: Kooh on Kiristaani ne a adgoh in ci jen, a degga Й—e ЕӢ Й—afuk in ci jen, a onnda Janguuni Й—e, ne a nik hafiЕӢ Janguuni.
1.23: Janguuni weЙ— faaniЕӢ Kiristaani ; ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ Janguuni, a yii nga keeh-keeh, te a yi mitiЙ— in ci jen.

2.1: Ini kaЙ— nga Й—u, Й—u nikee kaaniЙ— sagu Й—al ciЕӢ Й—u na bakaaЙ— ciЕӢ Й—u.
2.2: ЖҠu taambЙ—ee pesohaaЙ—iЕӢ adinaanii, Й—u taambЙ—ee Seytaani yi adgoh feruuЙ— ci baahaaЙ—iici raak hatil ЕӢ harmban kehЖҙi na Eel ci, a yi na tumЙ—ukohe Й“i sang Kooh.
2.3: ЖҒoo jen, Й“oo Й“aahee ЕӢ Й“i sang Kooh, Й“oo pesohee taambiЙ— kiГұin ciЕӢ Й“oo Й—eЙ“gaan, Й“oo meeЙ— tum ini faan ciЕӢ Й“oo na liiЙ“ ciЕӢ Й“oo waaЙ—, te findi Й“oo nikohee, Й“oo sekЙ—ohsee ayrukiЕӢ Kooh findi Й“inooЙ“i.
2.4: Waaye Kooh laayiЙ— yirmoh, te waaЙ—i keeh-keehi a waaЙ— Й“oo, tahiЙ— po,
2.5: ali Й“oo nikee kaaniЙ— sagu Й—al ci sah, a ambsohiЙ— Й“oo na Kiristaani, a onnda Й“oo kipes ; inhaat ne a baahoh tah Й—u mucЙ—u.
2.6: ЕҠ niki Й“oo nik ЕӢ Kiristaani Yeesu, a hultiЙ—iЙ— Й“oo na Kiristaani, a Й“oofiЙ—ta Й“oo na Й—e ЕӢ Eel ci.
2.7: Ineem na teeЙ“ohe baahohiЕӢ Й—e laayohngaani ЕӢ jamanooci na haye, taamboh ЕӢ baahi a baah nga Й“oo ЕӢ ini Kiristaani Yeesu tum.
2.8: A baahoh tah Й—u mucЙ—u, taamboh ЕӢ kos. Ineem pulohЙ—i nga Й—u, wa onohiЕӢ Kooh ;
2.9: tumohaaЙ— ci tahЙ—i, ne ali Й“o' yaksiЙ—kuu nga.
2.10: Laam Й“oo haЙ“Й—uuЙ— ciЕӢ Kooh, a feris Й“oo ЕӢ Kiristaani Yeesu, ne Й“oo tum in ci baahiЙ— ci a kooЙ—kiЙ— Й“oo po Жҙutta, ne Й“oo pesoh ca. Nik yino ngaЕӢ Kiristaani
2.11: ЖҠu nikeeЙ—i Yawuut ngaЕӢ Гұif. ЖҒi na woye haf Й“a nguЙ—kiЙ— ci te Й“a nguЙ—uk ЕӢ faan - e yaah Й“o' nguЙ— Й“a - Й“a woyeeЙ—a Й—u nguЙ—kaaЙ—iici. ЕҠ ineem, naandsukaat inii :
2.12: ЖҠu raakeeЙ—i Kiristaani ЕӢ jamanoonaam, Й—u Й“aaheeЙ—i ЕӢ cuuЙ“iЕӢ Israayel na ambtiЙ—oh ciЕӢ Kooh na Й“a, na gapohi ca puloh. ЖҠu nikee ЕӢ Adina, Й—u raakeeЙ—i yaakaar, Й—u raakeeЙ—i Kooh.
2.13: Waaye kotii, ЕӢ niki Й—u nik ЕӢ Kiristaani Yeesu, Й—u Й“i use, Й—u reЙ“iЙ—, taamboh ЕӢ Гұif miЕӢ Й—e.
2.14: Laam a Kiristaani ЕӢ haf ce jamiЕӢ Й“oo, a yi ambsoh Yawuut na nikaaЙ—i Yawuut, a tummba Й“a yino ; wa a eЙ—oh faaniЕӢ Й—e, a sannja Й—ingi saЙ“sohee Й“a, maanaam sangtiЙ—oh.
2.15: A Й“arngiЙ—ta nakoh ciЕӢ waasiЕӢMusaa na tumaah ciЕӢ wa, ne a tum Yawuut na nikaaЙ—i Yawuut yino, a feris Й“a Й“o' as ЕӢ niki Й“a nik nga Й—e ; a tufkiЙ—oh jam Й—aa.
2.16: Ini a waaЙ—ee tum, weЙ— ne kanak ci nik yino, a tummba po Й“a kerhiЙ—ohha na Kooh, te taamboh ЕӢ kurwaani, a appa sangtiЙ—ohi nikee ЕӢ harmban Й“a.
2.17: A hayya woye yegЙ—oh baahiЙ—, jam wuu Й—u, Й—u Й“i use, na jam wuu Й“i reЙ“e .
2.18: Taamboh nga Й—e, Й“oo miniЙ— reЙ“ Baabi, Й“ii na Й“um ngaЕӢ FuuЙ—is yino, FuuЙ—si Hoolohngaani.
2.19: ЕҠ ineem, Й—u nikisЙ—i hanhe wala Й“ooЙ“i genohaah ; waaye Й—u gentoh ciЕӢ Й“o'-Kooh ci, Й—u Й“aah ЕӢ Й“i gen na Kooh kotii.
2.20: ЖҠu taЙ“ahu ЕӢ fondamaani , maanaam Apootar ci na woosuuЙ— ci, te Kiristaani Yeesu ЕӢ haf ce nikka atoh fi amb taЙ“ahi.
2.21: A yi amb taЙ“ahi jen, po Й“ak ci jen taЙ“ahsee moЙ—oЙ—, wa Й“aatee yak po wa nik kahan Kooh, hoolЙ—uuЙ— taamboh ЕӢ HeЙ—i.
2.22: ЕҠ niki Й—u nik nga Й—e, Й—u na name taЙ“ahu ne Й—u hun na kosiЙ— ci jen, Й—u nik genoha, wi Kooh genohan taamboh ЕӢ FuuЙ—si Hoolohngaani.

3.1: Ineem weЙ— tah, mi Pool, mi yi ambu ЕӢ kaso sagu pangki ЕӢ pangkiЙ— Kiristaani Yeesu wuu Й—u Й“i nikЙ—i Yawuut...
3.2: A', Й—u kerhiЙ— pangki Kooh deg go de' ! Pangki a deg go wuu Й—u, ЕӢ baahohiЕӢ Й—e.

4.9: "A rapiЙ—" wa tokis ye ? Wa joy tokis ne a ruhseen po ЕӢ kehЖҙi haa e ?

4.12: A oniЙ— Й“ooЙ“eem ne Й“a Й“aatЙ—oh Й“ooЙ“iЕӢ Kooh po Й“eem min pangkiЙ— Kooh baahiЙ—, ne faaniЕӢ Kiristaani min kaЙ— fiki.
4.13: ЕҠ ineem, Й“oo jen Й“oo hey kaЙ—e po Й“oo nik yino, Й“oo Й“aah kos te Й“oo Й“aah inah KuЙ“kiЕӢ Kooh, Й“oo hey kaЙ—e po Й“oo nik yakak jameet, Й“oo hend na Kiristaani ЕӢ miti a mit.

4.16: Te wa taamboh nga Й—e, faani jen findi wa hend, hunnda ambsukohha. Pok ciЕӢ wa jen ceЙ— Й“ekЙ—ukoh, tummbaa faan yino, te cir nu nik na tume pangkiЕӢ wa, faani hooЙ—e, kaЙ—ee fiki taamboh ЕӢ waaЙ—oh. Kipes as ЕӢ Kiristaani
4.17: Inii weЙ— mi na woyee Й—u, mi yii deng Й—u wa ЕӢ tiikiЕӢ HeЙ—i, weЙ— ne : ЖҠu joyisЙ—i pes findi kosaaЙ—iici, Й“a na ГұaakЙ—e liiЙ“ ci raakЙ—i haf, raakЙ—i kose.

5.24: Kon, findi Janguuni teyЙ—ukЙ—oh Kiristaani, Й“itiЙ“ ci joy teyЙ—ukЙ—oh Жҙaar ciЕӢ Й“a Й—aa, ЕӢ in nu nik.

6.16: ЕҠ in ceem jen, Й“aataat kos nga, wa nik Й—ipkoha Й“is, ne Й—u min Жҙim Й“is ci kaЙ“Й—uuЙ— ci Seytaani na weesee Й—u jen.

6.18: ЕҠ in ceem jen, genaat kiim Kooh, kiimaat Й—e ne a Й“aatЙ—oh Й—u. ЕҠ in nu wa min nik Й—ah, kiimaat Kooh, taamboh ЕӢ FuuЙ—si Hoolohngaani te Й—u neehuu ; ЕӢoЙ—aat nga, Й—u kiimЙ—ee Й“o'-Kooh ci jen.

1.1: ЖҒoo Й“ii kaГұiЙ— Й—u, Й—u Й“i Й“o'-Kooh ci nik ЕӢ Filippi, Й—u Й“i hoolЙ—u wuu Kooh ЕӢ niki Й—u nik ЕӢ Kiristaani Yeesu. Mi yi Pool, na Timoote, Гұaam ciЕӢ Kiristaani Yeesu, Й“oo Й“ii kaГұiЙ— Й—u jen, Й—u na Й“i adgoh Й—u na Й“i na taambkohe in ciЕӢ Janguuni.
1.2: Kooh BaabiЕӢ Й“oo baahohaat Й—u, a on Й—u jam ; Yeesu Kiristaa HeЙ—i baahohaat Й—u, a on Й—u jam ! Pool kiimЙ—iЙ— Й“i Filippi Kooh

1.4: te ЕӢ kiimЙ—eesa Й—u Kooh Й—ah, mi na kiimЙ—ee Й—u jen na sum,

1.6: Wa wooriЙ— to ne Kooh yi camb panguk baahiЙ— nga Й—u, a heya taalndiЙ—e po a Й—iindoha ЕӢ mbeha Kiristaani Yeesu hayohan.
1.7: Wa waas ЕӢ liiЙ“iЙ—ta Й—u ineem, Й—u jen, sagu keeГұkohi ЕӢ keeГұkoh Й—u, na raaki Й—u raak jen Й“ak ЕӢ baahohi Kooh baahoh ho ; wa nikoh Й—aa ЕӢ niki ЕӢ nik ЕӢ kaso, wa nikohha Й—aa ЕӢ teeЙ“ohi mi na teeЙ“ohe ne YegЙ—ohiЕӢ Muci, wa in baahiЙ— te wa keeh.
1.8: Kooh inhiЙ— ne ЕӢ keeГұkohiЙ— Й—u jen ЕӢ waaЙ—ohi nik ЕӢ Kiristaani Yeesu.
1.9: Ini mi na kiimЙ—ee Й—u weЙ— ne waaЙ—ohiЕӢ Й—u Й“aatkee, wa uupee riif na inah na inhisoh keeh-keeh.
1.10: ЕҠ ineem, Й—u min inhisoh ini raak njiriГұ ne Й—u hool te Й“o' raakuu woyaah nga Й—u ЕӢ mbehi Kiristaani hayohan.
1.11: ЖҠu nam riif na ini kiyurah na rime ЕӢ Й“o', wa puloh ЕӢ Yeesu Kiristaa, te wa yakЙ—oha Kooh na Жҙeek Й—e. YegЙ—ohiЕӢ Muci na Й“aatke Й“aatuk
1.12: ЖҒaah ciЕӢ ngo, ЕӢ waaЙ—iЙ— ne Й—u inah inii : Ini rahas so tufkiЙ—Й—i YegЙ—ohiЕӢ Muci, wa Й“aata kaЙ—iЙ— fiki kay.
1.13: Laam, Й“ooЙ“i nik ЕӢ kahniЕӢ buur wii, na Й“inooЙ“i jen, wa leeriЙ— nga Й“a ne e Kiristaani tah ho taЖҙu ЕӢ kaso.
1.14: Te ini uup ЕӢ Й“aah ciЕӢ Й“oo kosiЙ— ci, taЖҙuukiЕӢ ngo wii tahiЙ— po Й“a Й“aatiЙ— ooluk HeЙ—i, Й“a Й“aatta kaaГұ yegЙ—oh YegЙ—ohiЕӢ Muci te Й“a neЖҙЖҙohЙ—i nga.
1.15: Ali nik ne Й“um nga na yegЙ—ohe Kiristaani ЕӢ siisoh na lahtoh, Й“inooЙ“i na tumee wa na liiЙ“ moЙ—iЙ—.
1.16: ЖҒeem Й“a na tumee wa sagu waaЙ—ohi nik nga Й“a, Й“a inhiЙ— ne ЕӢ naku ne ЕӢ teeЙ“ohee ne YegЙ—ohiЕӢ Muci baahiЙ—.
1.17: ЖҒinooЙ“i na yegЙ—ohe Kiristaani ЕӢ hundiskoh, in ci Й“a waaЙ— hoolЙ—i ; Й“a na dabgiЙ—e Й“aat miskiЙ— nikiЕӢ ngo ЕӢ kasooni.
1.18: Waaye ali in ! Findi wa min mand Й—ah, wa nik ЕӢ yurhiЙ— wala ЕӢ yurhaaЙ—i, Kiristaani yii yegЙ—ohu, te ЕӢ sumiЙ— nga. ЕҠ hey Й“aate sum nga,
1.19: laam ЕӢ inhiЙ— ne wa mirndohan nik faЙ—suukiЕӢ ngo, taamboh ЕӢ kiim ci Й—u na kiime Kooh na Й“aatЙ—ohiЕӢ FuuЙ—siЕӢ Yeesu Kiristaa.
1.20: Ini mi na seke ngaЕӢ seesuk, ЕӢ oolkiЙ— ne, ЕӢ heyЙ—i nike tumaaЙ—i ini ЕӢ naku, waaye findi ЕӢ meeЙ—a tumoh rek, ЕӢ risan ndengiЙ— po ЕӢ yakЙ—oh Kiristaani faaniЕӢ ngo ЕӢ kipes wala ЕӢ kakaan.
1.21: Nga so, kipes weЙ— Kiristaani, ali ЕӢ kaan sah, wa Й“aatan ndo kaЙ—iЙ— fiki.

1.26: Ineem tahiЙ— po, ЕӢ hayis nga Й—u Й—ah, Й—u hey Й“aate ndamkoh Kiristaani Yeesu saguuso. HiГұoh wuu YegЙ—ohiЕӢ Muci

2.1: Niki Й—u nik ЕӢ Kiristaani oniЙ— Й—u kaaГұ, waaЙ—i a waaЙ— Й—u giifiЙ—ta Й—u, FuuЙ—si Hoolohngaani oniЙ— Й—u ne Й—u nik yino, keeГұkoh na yirmoh raakiЙ— ЕӢ harmban Й—u, wa ineem haa e ?
2.2: Kon mitЙ—aat sumi ЕӢ sum : Raakaat hotohaaЙ— yino, Й—u waaЙ—tiЙ—oh Й—u nik yino, Й—u nik keeГұ yino, na liiЙ“ohaaЙ— yino.
2.3: Kinaat tum ali in ngaЕӢ hundiskoh wala ЕӢ hotsiЙ—uk, waaye ruhsiЙ—aat haf Й—u, Й—u eЙ— Й“inooЙ“i cir po haa Й“eЙ— uup Й—u.
2.4: Yaa nu nga kinaat top ЕӢ haf ce dong, waaye, a namaat liiЙ“ ЕӢ Й“inooЙ“i.

2.6: Ini a moos nik keeh-keeh, wa Kooh, waaye niki a nik yino na Kooh weem, a ambЙ—i wa findi ini a joy ЕӢoЙ—oh.
2.7: Waaye a woluk woluk ineem, a tummba haf ce Гұaam keeh-keeh, a nikka findi Й“o' ci ; Й“o' kiЕӢ Й—e weЙ— hotuk,
2.8: a ЖҙissuutiЙ—ta haf ce, a kerhiЙ—ta Kooh po a teyЙ—ukka kaan, kaan ngaЕӢ kurwaa sah.
2.9: Ineem weЙ— tah Kooh rapiЙ—ta Й—e ЕӢ Й—iska uup Й—afuk, a eЙ—ta Й—e tiiki uup tiik ci jen,
2.10: ne ЕӢ tiikiЕӢ Yeesu, feruuЙ— ci nik ЕӢ Eel ci na kehЖҙi na ooЙ“ kehЖҙi jen Жҙek,
2.11: te nguЙ“ ci jen teyЙ—uk woo ne Yeesu Kiristaa a yi HeЙ—i, wa yakiЙ— Kooh Baabi. SiГұaariЙ— findi hor ciЕӢ eel ci
2.12: Mbaa Й“aah ciЕӢ ngo ЕӢ keeГұkoh, Й—u moos nik kerhiЙ—iЙ— Kooh. Ini ЕӢ nikЙ—i na Й—u kinaat tah po wa haawsuk, Й“aataata, pangkaat na nup Kooh po muci Й—u mucЙ—u rim in.
2.13: Laam, Kooh a yi tum nga Й—u ne Й—u waaЙ— tum in ci neЙ“ Й—e te a yi na name Й—u ca tumЙ—ukoh.
2.14: Tumaat in ceem jen, wa hunuu na Гұukumsuk, wa hunuu na ГұaЙ—tuk.
2.15: ЖҠu tum Й—aa ne Й“o' raakuu woyaah nga Й—u, Й—u hool, Й—u nik kuЙ“u Kooh raakaaЙ—i sikka ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ Й“ooЙ“i nduuЙ—kiЙ— ci, yurhaaЙ—iiciЕӢ Adina. ЖҠu siГұaariЙ— ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ Й“a findi hor ciЕӢ eel ci,
2.16: Й—u eЙ— Й“a woo kiЕӢ kipes ki. Wa hey tahe po ЕӢ ndamkoh Й—u ЕӢ mbehi Kiristaani hayohan. Jaar, pangkiЕӢ ngo miskiЙ—i nikuu Й“arang Й“arang.
2.17: Ali ЕӢ kaan sah, po kipes kiЕӢ ngo mand na seeЖҙuk aamkaah, wa yiifu ЕӢ seeЖҙki nik kosi Й—u kos sah, ЕӢ hey sume nga, te ЕӢ Й“aahan sum ki na Й—u jen.
2.18: ЖҠu, namaat sum, Й—u Й“aah sum ki na so ! Pool woosiЙ— Timoote na Epaforodit
2.19: ЕҠ niki ЕӢ nik ЕӢ Yeesu HeЙ—i, ЕӢ oolkiЙ— ne ЕӢ hey woose Timoote nga Й—u maaГұaaЙ—i, ne mi, ЕӢ nam raak ini soosЙ—an keeГұiЕӢ ngo ЕӢ ini a woyan ndo nga Й—u.
2.20: ЖҠal a yi Й—ah, ЕӢ raakЙ—i ali Й“o' yi na yege na so in ci mi na yege, yi na liiЙ“ee nga Й—u keeh-keeh.
2.21: ЖҒinooЙ“i jen na liiЙ“e in haf Й“a, waaye in ciЕӢ Yeesu Kiristaa haa.
2.22: Waaye a yi, Й—u inhiЙ— ne a teeЙ“ohiЙ— findi a mand : A pangkiЙ—iЙ— YegЙ—ohiЕӢ Muci na so, findi kuЙ“u ЕӢ sero baab.
2.23: A yi ЕӢ liiЙ“ ne ЕӢ hey Й—u Й—e woosohe, mbehi ЕӢ inhohan findi ЕӢ mirndohan.

2.28: Kon ЕӢ woosiЙ— Й—e na seesuk ne Й—u sumis ngaЕӢ hot Й—e, te ЕӢ ineem, soosi ЕӢ soos reeh.

3.1: Ini tas Й“aah ciЕӢ ngo, weЙ— ne Й—u sum ЕӢ HeЙ—i. ЕҠ woyis Й—u wa, wa in Й“itiЙ— nga so haa, te weЙ— ngisoh nga Й—u. Inah Yeesu HeЙ—i weЙ— uup in ci jen

3.3: Laam e Й“oo nguЙ—kiЙ— ci keeh-keeh, Й“oo Й“i na Гұaamke Kooh taamboh ЕӢ FuuЙ—siЕӢ Й—e, Й“oo ndamkohee Kiristaani Yeesu te Й“oo oolkohЙ—i ini kaЙ— ЕӢ faan.
3.4: Moona mi, ЕӢ mineen oolkoh ini kaЙ— ЕӢ faan. Nik ne a Й“um oolkoh ini kaЙ— ЕӢ faan Й—ah, ЕӢ woyisЙ—i Й—a mi :
3.5: ЕҠ nguЙ—uk ЕӢ mbeha yasna-kaahayЙ—oh, ЕӢ rimkaЕӢ ngo poyi ЕӢ Й“o' Israayel, ЕӢ Й“aah ЕӢ cuuЙ“iЕӢ Benyaamin, ЕӢ Heber, ЕӢ rimu Heber. ЕҠ ini kaЙ— ЕӢ waasiЕӢMusaa, ЕӢ Farisen .
3.6: ЕҠ ini kaЙ— ЕӢ sawar, ЕӢ kaЙ—een po ЕӢ tolfiЙ—eeЙ—a Й“i Janguuni. ЕҠ ini kaЙ— ЕӢ yurhiЙ—i puloh ЕӢ nakoh ciЕӢ waasi, Й“o' raakeeЙ—i woyaah nga so.
3.7: Waaye ini ЕӢ ambee ne wa raak-raak wuu so, woti ЕӢ amb ne wa Гұak sagu Kiristaani.

3.9: Ini ЕӢ waaЙ— weЙ— ne ЕӢ hotuk nga Й—e, maanaam ЕӢ raakuu kiyurhiЕӢ ngo haf fo, wi puloh ЕӢ nakoh ciЕӢ waasi, waaye ЕӢ raak kiyurah taamboh ЕӢ kosi ЕӢ kos Kiristaani, wi puloh ЕӢ Kooh te wa gaЖҙukka ЕӢ kos.
3.10: Ini ЕӢ waaЙ— weЙ— ne ЕӢ inah Kiristaani na hatiliЕӢ hultiЕӢ Й—e te ЕӢ raak Й“ak ngaЕӢ miskiЙ— ciЕӢ Й—e, ЕӢ mand na Й—e ЕӢ ini kaЙ— ЕӢ kakaan kiЕӢ Й—e,
3.11: ne findi wa min nikoh Й—ah, ЕӢ nam min rahas hulti. Pool waaЙ— nup po a ree Й—iski na kaЙ—se
3.12: Wa nikЙ—i haa ne ЕӢ rahsiЙ— ineem jen po ЖҙutiЙ—, wala ЕӢ reyiЙ— ЕӢ mit ; waaye mi yii nup ne ЕӢ amba, findi mi ЕӢ haf fo Kiristaani Yeesu amboh ho.
3.13: ЖҒaah ciЕӢ ngo, ini kaЙ— nga so, ЕӢ ambЙ—i ne ЕӢ rahsiЙ—a waaye, raakiЙ— ini mi na tume : Mi na alkohe alkoh ini ЕӢ cootuk te ЕӢ ndengЙ—ukee ЕӢ ini ЕӢ fikiiri.
3.14: Mi yii nup nup yurhiЙ— ngaЕӢ Й—iski na kaЙ—se ne ЕӢ min rahas aafi, aafi tah Kooh Й“eeЙ—uk ko taamboh ЕӢ Kiristaani Yeesu ne ЕӢ kaЙ— ЕӢ Й—afka.
3.15: Mbaa, Й“oo Й“i nikisЙ—i komaaki jen ЕӢ kosi Й“oo kos, Й“oo ambaat liiЙ“eem ; te Й—u raak ini Й—u hunЙ—i na so nga Й—ah, Kooh hey Й—u wa name inhiЙ—.
3.16: Waaye ЕӢ Й—iski Й“oo ree ndii, Й“oo hunaat, Й“oo taalndiЙ—.
3.17: ЖҒaah ciЕӢ ngo, Й—u jen, altiЙ—kohaat to, te Й—u taamb ЕӢ kot ciЕӢ Й“i na taambЙ—e kot ciЕӢ Й“oo.
3.18: Laam, Й“i Й“o' laayiЙ—, tumohaaЙ— ciЕӢ Й“a teeЙ“ohiЙ— ne Й“a sangiЙ— ciЕӢ kurwaaniЕӢ Kiristaani ; ЕӢ meeЙ—een Й—u woo ЕӢ ini kaЙ— nga Й“a, te woti mi woyis Й—u wa na muhun.
3.19: ЖҒooЙ“eem, Й“a mirndohan ngaЕӢ Й—umbu ; rook ciЕӢ Й“a ceЙ— koohiЕӢ Й“a, Й“a amb ne kaci ndam ; liiЙ“ ciЕӢ Й“a jen, ca in ciЕӢ kehЖҙi.
3.20: Ini kaЙ— nga Й“oo nak, Й“oo Й“o' Asamaan, Й—iski Yeesu Kiristaa HeЙ—i pulohan, MucЙ—ohi Й“oo na seke na seesuk.
3.21: A hey Й“oЖҙsohe faan ciЕӢ Й“oo miskohiЙ— cii ne a tum ca findi wiЕӢ Й—e, wi hun na siГұaar, a tumana taamboh ЕӢ hatili a minoh in ci jen.

4.1: Ineem weЙ— tah, Й“aah ciЕӢ ngo ЕӢ keeГұkoh, Й—u Й“i ЕӢ waaЙ— keeh-keeh te ЕӢ marra Й—u hot, Й—u Й“i sumiЕӢ ngo na raayaaniЕӢ ngo, ЕӢoЙ—aat ndengiЙ— ЕӢ HeЙ—i ! Sumaat ЕӢ niki Й—u nik ЕӢ HeЙ—i
4.2: Mi yii Гұaah Ewodi na Sintik ne Й“a kerhiЙ—oh ЕӢ niki Й“a nik ЕӢ HeЙ—i.
4.3: Te fu yi Й“aah ho keeh-keeh ngaЕӢ pangki , mi yii kiim Й—a ne fu Й“aatЙ—oh Й“itiЙ“ ceem, Й“a Й“aahee na so hiГұohi ЕӢ ini kaЙ— ЕӢ YegЙ—ohiЕӢ Muci, Й“eЙ— na Kelema na huntoh ciЕӢ ngo Й“inooЙ“i. Tiik ciЕӢ Й“a fiisuuЙ— ЕӢ teerndiЕӢ kipes ki.
4.4: Genaat sum ЕӢ niki Й—u nik ЕӢ HeЙ—i ; ЕӢ woyisa, sumaat !
4.5: ЖҒooЙ“i jen inhaat baah kiЕӢ Й—u. HeЙ—i reЙ“iЙ—.

4.7: Te jamiЕӢ Kooh, wi cootuk liiЙ“ nu nik, wa hey niiЙ—e keeГұ ciЕӢ Й—u na liiЙ“ohaaЙ— ciЕӢ Й—u ЕӢ niki Й—u nik ЕӢ Kiristaani Yeesu.
4.8: ЖҒaah ciЕӢ ngo, ini tas weЙ— ne : In nu nik keeh, na in nu nik eЙ—aah cir, in nu yurah, in nu hool, in nu nik waaЙ—aah, in nu nik baahiЙ— ЕӢ hot-hotkiЕӢ Й“ooЙ“i, in nu nik nawaah, na in nu nik Жҙeekaah Й—ah, ceЙ— nikaat ЕӢ liiЙ“ ciЕӢ Й—u.

2.20: ЕҠ Й—ooЖҙ kahan yakiЙ—, e pangkoha haЙ“Й—ohuuЙ— urus na haalis dong nik nga haa, wa namiЙ— raak pangkoha haЙ“Й—ohuuЙ— ndooЙ— na Й—ok. Cum njirГұiЙ—koha ЕӢ ceeke, cum njirГұiЙ—koha ЕӢ in ci Жҙin Жҙin ci.

2.7: Te fu, ЕӢ in nu wa min ki nik Й—ah, nika altiЙ—kohaah ЕӢ tum in baahiЙ— na jangЙ—oh yurhiЙ—. JangЙ—ohiЕӢ Й—a joyiЙ— nawu,

2.10: Й“a rokЙ—uu Й“a ali in, waaye Й“a teeЙ“ohee ne Й“a cariЙ— oolku keeh-keeh. ЕҠ in ceem jen, Й“a hey moЙ—Й—e jangЙ—ohi kaЙ— ЕӢ Kooh, MucЙ—ohiЕӢ Й“oo. CuuЙ“i Й“aah ЕӢ Yeesu Kiristaa
2.11: JangЙ—oheem raakiЙ— njiriГұ, laam Kooh teeЙ“ohiЙ— baahohi a baahoh Й“ooЙ“i, baahohi rangis waasiЕӢ muci wuu Й“ooЙ“i jen.

2.13: te Й“oo sekee mbehi neЙ“iЙ—i Й“oo oolkoh : hayiЕӢ Yeesu Kiristaa ЕӢ yaki a yak, a yi Kooh, MucЙ—ohiЕӢ Й“oo.
2.14: A eЙ—ohiЙ— haf ce wuu Й“oo ne a tos Й“oo ЕӢ moЙ—aaЙ—i nu nik. ЕҠ hoolЙ—i a hooliЙ— Й“oo, a tumiЙ— Й“oo cuuЙ“ hooliЙ—, Й“oo nikka cuuЙ“i a raak, cuuЙ“i sawaran ЕӢ tum in baahiЙ—.
2.15: Fu joy jangЙ—oh in ceem Tit, fu Гұaahee Й“i na sikЙ—ukee Й—a, fu kuЖҙsee Й“a, wa hun na kikilifa mitiЙ—. Ali Й“o' kinaat Й—a heef !

3.1: Gena naandis Й“aah ciЕӢ Й“oo kosiЙ— ci ne Й“a joy joy teyЙ—uk kilifaaci na Й“i adgoh kur ki ; Й“a kerhiЙ— Й“a te Й“a tokЙ—uk ne Й“a haЙ“iЙ— in baahiЙ— nu nik.
3.2: ЖҒa Й“asuu ali Й“o', Й“a wortuk lahtoh, Й“a nik Й“o' baahiЙ—, Й“a nik Й“o' soosiЙ— ЕӢ Й“ooЙ“i jen.

3.4: Waaye wi Kooh, Yi MucЙ—ohiЕӢ Й“oo, teeЙ“oh baahkiЕӢ Й—e na waaЙ—iЕӢ Й—e na Й“ooЙ“i,
3.5: a mucЙ—iЙ— Й“oo. Te wa ЕӢ tumohaaЙ— ci, ciЕӢ Й“oo yurhiЙ— ci haa, waaye Й“oo misik Й—e misik, a muciЙ—ta Й“oo taamboh ЕӢ Й“ooki, Й“ooki tah Й“oo rimkis, a onnda Й“oo kipes as taamboh ЕӢ FuuЙ—si Hoolohngaani ;

3.7: ЕҠ baahohi a baahoh Й“oo, a ambiЙ— Й“oo Й“o' yurhiЙ—, a onnda Й“oo kipes ki reehanЙ—i, wi Й“oo ooluk ne Й“oo heya rahse.
3.8: Woo keem wooriЙ—, te ЕӢ waaЙ—iЙ— ne fu ndengiЙ—a baahiЙ—, ne Й“i kos Kooh liiЙ“ ciЕӢ Й“a puluu ЕӢ ndengЙ—uk ЕӢ tum in baahiЙ—. Ineem weЙ— moЙ— te wa raakka njiriГұ ЕӢ Й“ooЙ“i.
3.9: Waaye wortuka taastiЙ—oh ci naandohaaci, limiЕӢ caac ci, na lahtoh ci na taastiЙ—oh ci ЕӢ ini kaЙ— ЕӢ waasiЕӢMusaa. In ceem jen ca raakЙ—i njiriГұ te ca Й“arang Й“arang.
3.10: Yaa nu Й“ek saЙ“sukoh ЕӢ Й“ooЙ“i Й—ah, woytohaa Й—e waas yino po waas kanak, a Й“oЖҙsohЙ—i Й—ah, aaГұaa Й—e ЕӢ Janguuni,
3.11: Й“o' mand Й—aa Й—ah, wa wooraat Й—a ne a faЙ—iЙ— waasi yurhiЙ—i. A na bakaaЙ—e, a atte'iЙ— haf ce po ЖҙutiЙ—. KooЙ—kiЕӢ Й“aaЙ“ ci na askohi
3.12: ЕҠ hey Й—a woosohe Artemas wala Tisikos. A ree Й—ah, ndengЙ—uka fu hay fu raak ko ЕӢ Nikopolis. ЕҠ ambiЙ— ne jamanooniЕӢ soosi ЕӢ nikana ndaam.
3.13: NdengЙ—uka fu taambkoh Senas ngelohi, a yi na Apolos po Й“a raak in ci Й“a etoh jen ЕӢ Й“aaЙ“iЕӢ Й“a.
3.14: ЖҒooЙ“iЕӢ Й“oo joyiЙ— nam jang tum baahiЙ— ne Й“a Й“aatЙ—oh Й“o' ЕӢ etoh ci keeh-keeh ci, ЕӢ ineem kipes ciЕӢ Й“a min raakiЙ— Й“o' njiriГұ.
3.15: ЖҒooЙ“i nik na so jen Й“ii kaГұiЙ— Й—a. KaГұЙ—iЙ— to nawleeciЕӢ Й“oo kosiЙ— ci. Kooh baahohaat Й—u jen !

1.1: Mi yii kaГұiЙ— Й—a Filemoon, mi yi Pool, yi ambu ЕӢ kaso sagu taambiЙ— woo kiЕӢ Kiristaani Yeesu, mi na Й“aah Й“oo Timoote, e Й“oo na fiise kaytii wuu fu, fu yi Й“oo keeГұkoh te Й“oo Й“aahha na Й—a pangkiЕӢ Kooh,
1.2: Й“oo Й“ii kaГұiЙ— Й—a fu na Apiyaa Й“aah Й“oo Й“itiЙ“, na Arsip yi Й“aah na Й“oo hiГұohi Й“oo na hiГұohe, na Й“aah ciЕӢ Й“oo kosiЙ— ci na cohe ЕӢ kahan fu jen.
1.3: Kooh BaabiЕӢ Й“oo baahohaat Й—u, a on Й—u jam, Yeesu Kiristaa HeЙ—i baahohaat Й—u, a on Й—u jam. WaaЙ—i na kosiЕӢ Filemoon
1.4: Mi na gene corkiЙ— KoohiЕӢ ngo, ne ЕӢ kiimee po ЕӢ woo tiikiЕӢ Й—a Й—ah.

1.7: Laam, ЕӢ sumiЙ— lool ЖҙaariЕӢ ngo te heliЕӢ ngo daliЙ— ЕӢ findi fu na teeЙ“ohe waaЙ—i fu waaЙ— Й“ooЙ“i, fu soosЙ—iЙ— keeГұ ciЕӢ Й“o'-Kooh ci. Pool kiimiЙ— Filemoon ne a teyЙ—uk Onesim
1.8: WeЙ— tah, ini maa hee Й—a woye, ЕӢ degЙ—aa ЕӢ kikilifaaki ЕӢ eЙ—u ЕӢ Kiristaani ne ЕӢ woo Й—a fu tum ini lah waas,
1.9: waaye ЕӢ waaЙ— Й—a wa kiim sagu waaЙ—ohi nik ЕӢ harmban Й“oo. E Гұam na kiimee Й—a wa, mi yi Pool, ЕӢ niki ЕӢ nik yakak, Й“aatta nga ЕӢ ambi ЕӢ ambu wii sagu taambiЙ— woo kiЕӢ Kiristaani Yeesu.
1.10: Mi na kiimee Й—a wuu Onesim, yi ЕӢ amb findi kuЙ“kiЕӢ ngo yi ЕӢ raakoh ЕӢ kasooni.
1.11: ЖҠeЙ“gaan a raakЙ—eeЙ—i Й—a njiriГұ, ali nik ne tiikiЕӢ Й—e tokis njiriГұ , waaye Й—iski wa nik a raakЙ—iЙ— Й“oo njiriГұ mi na Й—a.
1.12: Mi yii wik Й—a Й—e, a yi fu inah ne a usiЙ— ЕӢ keeГұiЕӢ ngo.
1.13: ЕҠ waaЙ—een Й—e amb ЕӢ serooso ne a tufkiЙ— Й—a ndii a Й“aatЙ—ohee so, fu hot nga mi yii ЕӢ kasooni sagu YegЙ—ohiЕӢ Muci.
1.14: Waaye ЕӢ woyee ЕӢ haf fo ne ЕӢ waaЙ—Й—i tum ali in te fu hunЙ—i nga, ne ini baahiЙ—i fu tuman nikuu ne fu Й“eku Й“eku nga waaye wa ini fu waaЙ—oot tum.
1.15: Te wa miniЙ— nik ne a saЙ“sohseen na Й—a Жҙissuut ne fu wikuu Й—e a nik yiЕӢ Й—a kotii po faw.
1.16: A nikissanЙ—i findi Гұaam dong, waaye a hey uupe ineem, a nikan Й“aahi keeГұkohu ; weЙ— a nik keeh-keeh nga so, mi yi sah, kon mbaa a uupan nik ineem nga Й—a fu yi heЙ— ce, fu yi Й“aah ce ЕӢ HeЙ—i !
1.17: Kon nik ne fu ambiЙ— to findi nawleefu Й—ah, teyЙ—ukaa Й—e po mand haa a Гұam.
1.18: Nik ne a tumiЙ— Й—a in yurhaaЙ—i wala nik ne a raakЙ—ohiЙ— Й—a kombot Й—ah, ЕӢ deggiЙ— ca.
1.19: Mi Pool, mi yii fiis na yaahiЕӢ ngo ne : Г‘am na hee Й—a wa wirnde, mi ЕӢ haf fo. ЕҠ sang Й—a woo rek ne fu ЕӢ haf fu, fu raakЙ—ohiЙ— to kombot ; fu raakЙ—ohiЙ— to kipes kiЕӢ Й—a.
1.20: Ee, Й“aah ho, raakiЙ— to njiriГұ sagu HeЙ—i Й“oo Й“aah, dalЙ—a heliЕӢ ngo ЕӢ Kiristaani.
1.21: ЖҠiski mi na fiise kaytii, wa wooriЙ— to ne fu hey tume ini ЕӢ kiim Й—a, ЕӢ inhiЙ— ne fu hey tume ini uup sah ineem.
1.22: Namaa so kooЙ—kiЙ— daloha ; ЕӢ ambiЙ— yaakaar ne ЕӢ hey Й—u wikse sagu kiim ciЕӢ Й—u Kooh. Askohi

1.24: a yi na Maarko, na Aristarka, na Demaas na Luk, Й“i Й“aah na so pangki.

1.1: ЕҠ maaГұiЙ—, Kooh taambohee ЕӢ woosuuЙ— ci, a woosa na caac ciЕӢ Й“oo waas laayiЙ— te woyohaaЙ— ci Й—alohha.
1.2: Waaye ЕӢ jamanoociЕӢ reehЙ—ohaaniЕӢ adinaani Й“oo nikoh cii, a woyiЙ— na Й“oo taamboh ЕӢ KuЙ“kiЕӢ Й—e. ЕҠ camba, adinaani na findi wa na tiindohe jen, a feroha KuЙ“keem. Te a yi a eЙ—an in ci jen.
1.3: A yi siГұaariЕӢ yaki Kooh yak, a yi sah ГұaamaariЕӢ ini Kooh nik keeh-keeh. Te a yi raanuk adinaani jen na woo kiЕӢ Й—e raakiЙ— hatili. Wi a tum po Й“ooЙ“i minnda hoolЙ—u ЕӢ bakaaЙ— ciЕӢ Й“a, weЙ— a kaЙ—oh ЕӢ Eel ci, a Й“ooffa ЕӢ ГұaahmiЕӢ Kooh yi buur.
1.4: A uuppa malaakaaci findi tiiki Kooh eЙ— Й—e uupoh ciЕӢ Й“a. KuЙ“ki a yi uup malaakaaci
1.5: Laam, Й—u inhiЙ— ne, woo ki Kooh woo ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ Fiis ci HooliЙ— ci wii : В« Woti, Гұam BaabiЕӢ Й—a, a fu KuЙ“kiЕӢ ngo. В» a moosЙ—aa woo ali malaaka. Te a namЙ—i woyoh ЕӢ ini kaЙ— ЕӢ ali malaaka ne : В« ЕҠ hey nike Baab nga Й—e, a nik nga so findi KuЙ“u. В»
1.6: Te wi a na haytohe KuЙ“kiЕӢ Й—e saawi ЕӢ Adina, Fiis ci woo ne : В« MalaakaaciЕӢ Kooh jen ЖҙekЙ—aat Й—e ! В»
1.7: Inii weЙ— Fiis ciЕӢ Kooh woo ЕӢ ini kaЙ— ЕӢ malaakaaci : В« A tum malaakaaci findi puuЙ—is ; Й“eЙ— pangkoh ciЕӢ Й—e, a tummba Й“a findi jaal yongkaah. В»
1.8: Waaye ini Kooh woo KuЙ“kiЕӢ Й—e ЕӢ Fiis ci weЙ—i wii : В« Eey Kooh, NguuriЕӢ Й—a genan gen, te salmaariЕӢ wa, weЙ— wiЕӢ waasi yurhiЙ—i.
1.9: Fu teeЙ“ohiЙ— ne fu waaЙ— in yurhiЙ—, fu sang ini nikЙ—i waas, weЙ— tah, eey Kooh, KoohiЕӢ Й—a tannda Й—a ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ huntoh ciЕӢ Й—a, a diwiЙ—ta Й—a hafiЕӢ Й—a diw eeГұiЙ—, wa hunnda na sum. В»
1.10: Kooh namiЙ— woo ЕӢ Fiis ci ne : В« NgaЕӢ camba, eey HeЙ—i, a fu yip kehЖҙi te a fu haЙ“iЙ— Eel ci na yaah ciЕӢ Й—a.
1.11: In ceem jen hey sooЖҙe waaye fu, fu genan gen. Eel ci na kehЖҙi jen hey kaane findi kulЙ“a,
1.12: fu lem ca findi palto. Wiiriis as degu findi Й“oyi Й“ekkis, waaye fu, fu risan mand findi fu mand ; kipes kiЕӢ Й—a reehanЙ—i. В»
1.13: Markaat rek ! Ini Kooh woo ЕӢ Fiis ci wii : В« Haya fu Й“oof ЕӢ ГұaahmiЕӢ ngo, po mbaЙ—na ЕӢ folan sangiЙ— ciЕӢ Й—a ЕӢ kehЖҙi, fu tum Й“a degoha kot. В» A moos woyoh yinde malaaka in mand na weem ?
1.14: Malaakaaci, ca jen ca pangkoh ci minЙ—i hotu haa e ? Ca woosu ne ca Й“aatЙ—oh Й“i rahsan muci haa e ?

2.1: Ineem weЙ— tah Й“oo joyiЙ— uup amb ndengiЙ— ЕӢ woo kiЕӢ Kooh Й“oo kerah, ne Й“oo yoЙ“uu ЕӢ kosi Й“oo kos po Й“oo kee faЙ—suka.
2.2: -4 Woo ki Kooh eЙ—oh ЕӢ Й—eЙ“gaana, wa taambohee ЕӢ malaakaaci, te wa tufkeen. Waaye muci Й“oo raak kotii, weЙ— uup yak. Laam, a HeЙ—i koca gapoh, Й“i keraha Й“aatta Й“oo wa ndengЙ—iЙ—. Kooh teeЙ“oheeЙ—a ne woo ciЕӢ Й“a keeh ngaЕӢ Й“i firnde, ЕӢ kehЖҙi na eel ci, na keemaan nu nik. A nammbaa teeЙ“oh ЕӢ in ci FuuЙ—si Hoolohngaani na onohe te a paysohee ca ЕӢ findi a waaЙ—oha. ЖҒoo min na fusoh mbugal, ne Й“oo sagankoh muc hend an yak Й—ah, nik ne woo ka Й—eЙ“gaan sah tufkeen po tumohaaЙ— nu huneeЙ—i naa Й—ah mbugaluusa findi wa joy mbugalohu Й—ah ? Yeesu, taambЙ—ohi yakkiЕӢ Й“o' ci
2.5: ЕҠ waaЙ— Й—u woo ne, adinaani na haye, wi Й“oo na woye, Kooh degЙ—aa ЕӢ yaah ciЕӢ malaakaaci.
2.6: Waaye, ЕӢ Fiis ci, raakiЙ— Й“oyi woo Kooh ne : В« ЖҒo' ye, po fu liiЙ“ee nga Й—e ? Wala kuЙ“u Й“o' ye, po fu liiЙ“siЙ—ohee nga Й—e ?
2.7: Fu degeen Й—e ЕӢ Й—iski inah ne, a yi uupee Жҙissuut malaakaaci, waaye wa maaГұЙ—i. Fu yakЙ—iЙ— Й—e, a eЙ—uusa cir, wa nikka mbahne-buur nga Й—e.
2.8: Fu degga in ci jen ЕӢ yaah ciЕӢ Й—e. В» Kooh woo ne a degiЙ— in ci jen ЕӢ yaah Й“o' Й—ah, kon a faЙ—Й—i ali in ; moona woti-woti, Й“oo hotЙ—i paaЙ— ne in ci jen degu ЕӢ yaah Й“o',
2.9: waaye Й—iski wa nik ndii, e Yeesu, a yi Й“oo na hote. ЖҒoo hotiЙ— ne Yeesu degseen Й—iski fu inah ne, a yi uupee Жҙissuut malaakaaci, waaye wa maaГұeeЙ—i ; a degseen nga ne, ngaЕӢ baahohiЕӢ Kooh, a kaan wuu Й“ooЙ“i jen. Te Й—iski wa nik, Й“oo na hotee Й—e yakЙ—uuЙ—, eЙ—uuЙ— cir po haa a Й“ekЙ—u mbahne-buur, sagu miskiЙ—iЕӢ kakaan ki.
2.10: A Kooh fer in ci jen te ca jen ca raakiЙ— ne ca nik wuu ce. A hotta ne wa baahiЙ— ne a lahiЙ— Yeesu ЕӢ miskiЙ—eem, ne yeem ree Й—iski a joyee ree ngaЕӢ mit ; ЕӢ ineem, a nikka yi adgiЙ—oh ЕӢ muci ne kuЙ“u laayiЙ— Й“aah ЕӢ yaki a yak.
2.11: Laam yi na hoolЙ—ohe na Й“i hoolЙ—u, Й“a jen Й“eЙ— Й“aah Baab. Ineem weЙ— tah po a supukЙ—i Й“a Й“eeЙ—koh taambЙ—oh ciЕӢ Й—e
2.12: wi a woo Kooh ЕӢ Fiis ci ne : В« ЕҠ hey inhiЙ—e taambЙ—oh ciЕӢ ngo tiikiЕӢ Й—a te ЕӢ hey Й—a Жҙeeke ЕӢ fiki mboolo kosiЙ—. В»
2.13: A woyissa nga ca ne : В« Mi, ЕӢ hey oolke Kooh. В» A woyissa nga ca ne : В« Г‘am yii, na kuЙ“uuci Kooh eЙ— to. В»
2.14: KuЙ“uuci a na woye Й“eem, Й“a Й“o' njaay, heЙ— faan na Гұif. Ineem weЙ— tah po Yeesu ЕӢ haf ce, nammba Й“aah na Й“a mandohaaЙ—eem ne, taamboh ЕӢ kakaan kiЕӢ Й—e, a saah Seytaani yi ambohee doolndiЕӢ kakaan.
2.15: ЕҠ ineem, a minnda tokis Й“ooЙ“i jen, ЕӢ findi Й“a hend, Й“i nikee Гұaam ЕӢ kipes kiЕӢ Й“a jen sagu neЖҙЖҙoh kakaan.
2.16: Wa wooriЙ— ne, Yeesu na taambkohe malaakaaci haa, a na taambkohe Й“i rimkoh ЕӢ Ibrahiima.
2.17: WeЙ— tah a joyya mand na taambЙ—oh ciЕӢ Й—e ЕӢ in ci jen ne a nik SeeЖҙkiЙ—ohiЕӢ Й“a yakki wuu Kooh, SeeЖҙkiЙ—oh riifiЙ— na yirmoh, tokЙ—ukiЙ— ЕӢ pangkiЙ— Kooh, ne a rahas Й—aasuukiЕӢ bakaaЙ— ciЕӢ Й“ooЙ“i.

7.18: ЕҠ Й“ak, nakoha maaГұЙ—a nihsuuЙ— sagu raakaaЙ—iikiЕӢ wa hatil na njiriГұ,
7.19: laam waasiЕӢ Musaa moosЙ—i mitiЙ— ali in ; ЕӢ Й“ak wiiriis, Kooh oniЙ— Й“oo ini uupa, wi Й“oo min ooluk ne Й“oo taamboh nga, Й“oo reЙ“ Й—e.
7.20: ЖҒaatta nga, ineem nikЙ—i in Жҙin ; wa hunee na giГұ ! SeeЖҙkiЙ—oh ci Й“inooЙ“i tufkiЙ—asseesa Й—ah, wa na huneeЙ—i na giГұ,
7.21: waaye wi Й“oyi Fiis cii na woye tufkiЙ—asse, Kooh giГұ giГұ Й—iski Fiis ci woo ne : В« HeЙ—i giГұiЙ— te a dokkanЙ—i finho nga, fu tufkiЙ—uuЙ— SeeЖҙkiЙ—oh po faw. В»
7.22: E giГұi tah po yi deguk ambtiЙ—ohi uup baah, e Yeesu.
7.23: Te wa raakissiЙ— in wiiriis : WeЙ— ne seeЖҙkiЙ—oh ci Й“inooЙ“i laayiЙ— sagu kakaan ki ; gomal nu gomal, yaa nu kaannda Й—ah, morom ce namsiЙ— Й—e, ineem weЙ— hondoh Й“a nik seeЖҙkiЙ—oh po faw.
7.24: Waaye Yeesu, kipes kiЕӢ Й—e heyЙ—i reehe, weЙ— tah a SeeЖҙkiЙ—ohi moosanЙ—i namsiЙ—u.
7.25: Ineem weЙ— tah a namiЙ— min muciЙ— muc mitiЙ— Й“i taamboh nga Й—e ne Й“a reЙ“ ngaЕӢ Kooh. Laam, a pesan pes po faw ne a ngelЙ—ee Й“a. Yeesu a yi SeeЖҙkiЙ—ohiЕӢ AmbtiЙ—ohi Asi
7.26: SeeЖҙkiЙ—oh yakak mand Й—aa, a yi Й“oo etohee keeh-keeh, a hooliЙ—, a raakЙ—i bakaaЙ—, a raakЙ—i usuЙ“, a saЙ“sohuuЙ— na bakaaЙ—oh ci te Kooh meeЙ“iЙ— Й—e po ЕӢ Й—afuk Eel ca.
7.27: A mandЙ—i na seeЖҙkiЙ—oh ci yakak ci Й“inooЙ“i ne mbeh nu nik, Й“a joyiЙ— seeЖҙuk sagu bakaaЙ— ciЕӢ Й“a haf Й“a, po Жҙut, Й“a seeЖҙkis sagu caЕӢ Й“ooЙ“a. Yeesu seeЖҙkiЙ— waas yino po faw wi a eЙ—oh haf ce ne a hooliЙ— bakaaЙ— ci.
7.28: SeeЖҙkiЙ—oh ci yakak ci waasiЕӢ Musaa tufkiЙ—ee, Й“a nikee seeЖҙkiЙ—oh mitaaЙ—i, waaye SeeЖҙkiЙ—ohi yakki Kooh tufkiЙ— na giГұ, wi waasi eЙ—ohu po Жҙutta, e KuЙ“kiЕӢ Й—e, te KuЙ“keem, a mitЙ—iЙ— Й—e po faw.

8.1: Inii weЙ— uup raak njiriГұ ngaЕӢ ini Й“oo na woye jen : WeЙ— ne Й“oo raakiЙ— SeeЖҙkiЙ—oh yakak mand Й—aa. A yaa Й“ooffa ЕӢ Eel ca, ЕӢ ГұaahmaЕӢ Й“oofohaanaЕӢ Kooh yi buur.
8.2: A yaa panguk ЕӢ ЖҠiska HooliЙ—a, weЙ— Й—iipa keeh-keeha, KahnaЕӢ Kooh, wa fu inah ne a HeЙ—i tufkiЙ—a, Й“o' haЙ“iЙ—Й—aa.
8.3: SeeЖҙkiЙ—oh yakak nu fu hot Й—ah, a tufkiЙ—u ne a eЙ—ee Kooh onoh ci, na seeЖҙuk ci. Kon SeeЖҙkiЙ—ohiЕӢ Й“oo joyeen nam raak ini a eЙ—ohan.
8.4: A nikee ЕӢ kehЖҙi Й—ah, a heeЙ—i sah nike seeЖҙkiЙ—oh, laam raakiЙ— seeЖҙkiЙ—oh ci nik ndii, Й“i na eЙ—ee Kooh onoh ci findi waasiЕӢMusaa nakohoha.
8.5: ЖҒeЙ— Й“eem, Й“a na pangkiЙ—e Kooh ЕӢ Й—isik wi fu inah ne wa ГұaamaariЕӢ in ca keeh-keeh ca nik ЕӢ Й—afka. Wa saangniЕӢ ca rek. Findi Fiis ci woyoha, wa Musaa hee haЙ“Й—e Й—iipa nikee Kahan Kooh, Kooh woytoh Й—e woytoh an : В« Marka, te fu haЙ“iЙ—a jen, findi wa fu teeЙ“see ЕӢ Й—afuk tangoori. В»
8.6: ЖҠiski wa nik, Yeesu a yi eЙ—u ne a nik ЕӢ harmban Й“ooЙ“i na Kooh ne a tiindiЙ— ambtiЙ—oh as, wi deguk ЕӢ gapoh as. Findi AmbtiЙ—ohi Asi uupoh wa koc, te findi gapoh ci as ci namoh uup ca koc, pangkiЕӢ Й—e uupoh fuuf wiЕӢ seeЖҙkiЙ—oh ci koc Й—aa. WoyaahiЕӢ AmbtiЙ—oha Koc
8.7: ЕҠ AmbtiЙ—oha Koc, woyaah raakeeЙ—i nga Й—ah, kon wa heeЙ—i etohisse ne AmbtiЙ—ohi KanakЙ—oh tufkiЙ—asse.
8.8: Waaye Kooh raak raak woyaah nga, findi wa woyohu ЕӢ Fiis ci ne : В« A HeЙ—i woo ne : вҖң Inhaat ne : Mbeh cii hayeeЙ—a, ЕӢ hey tufkiЙ—e ambtiЙ—oh as na cuuЙ“iЕӢ Israayel, na wiЕӢ Yudaa .
8.9: Wa mandanЙ—i na ambtiЙ—ohi ЕӢ tufkiЙ—ee na caac caЕӢ Й“a, wa ЕӢ amb Й“a ЕӢ yaah ne ЕӢ puliЙ— Й“a Misra. Laam Й“a ambЙ—i AmbtiЙ—ohi, weЙ— tah ЕӢ liiЙ“isЙ—i nga Й“a. Mi yi HeЙ—i, Гұam woo wa.
8.10: AmbtiЙ—ohii weЙ— maa hee tufkiЙ—e na cuuЙ“iЕӢ Israayel ЕӢ finho mbeh ceem : - Mi yi HeЙ—i, Гұam woo wa - ЕҠ hey Й“eke nakoh ciЕӢ ngo ЕӢ liiЙ“ ciЕӢ Й“a, ЕӢ fiis ca ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ keeГұ ciЕӢ Й“a ; ЕӢ nik KoohiЕӢ Й“a, Й“a nik Й“ooЙ“iЕӢ ngo.
8.11: Ali Й“o' jangЙ—issanЙ—i gentohiЕӢ Й—e wala Й“aah ce, a woyee Й—e ne : вҖҳInha HeЙ—i.вҖҷ ЖҒooЙ“i jen hey yo inhe, ini amboh ЕӢ yi uup Жҙissuut po ЕӢ yi uup yak.
8.12: Laam ЕӢ hey Й“a Й—aase kiyurhaaЙ—iikiЕӢ Й“a, ЕӢ naandsukissanЙ—i bakaaЙ— ciЕӢ Й“a. вҖқ В»
8.13: Kon Kooh woyee woo ambtiЙ—oh as Й—ah, raakee Й—e kiisiЙ— kiisiЙ— wa koc. In nu maaГұ po wa yakakee Й—ah, wa usisЙ—i ЕӢ coot.

9.1: ЕҠ AmbtiЙ—oha Koc, Й“i nakoh tufkiЙ—asseen ne ca teeЙ“ Й“ooЙ“i findi Й“a joy Гұaamkoh Kooh. Wa nammba raak Й—isik hooliЙ— ЕӢ kehЖҙi, Гұaamkohaa Й—e.
9.2: Wa nikka Й—iipa nikee Kahan Kooh ; Й“akaЕӢ wa koc teeksee ЖҠiska HooliЙ—a, degohaanaЕӢ laampaaca nikee nga na taaЙ“la na degohse mbuuruuci wuu Kooh.
9.3: E rido saЙ“sohee wa na Й“aka kanakЙ—oh ; Й“akeem teeksee ЖҠiska Hoolohngaana.
9.4: Ndaam raakeen seeЖҙkoha hoomЙ—oha cuuraay ; seeЖҙkohaanaam haЙ“Й—ohsee urus. WahndeenaЕӢ AmbtiЙ—ohi namee nik nga, wa muurohuusa urus ЕӢ Й“ak ci jen. Meeme haЙ“Й—ohu urus Й“ekseen ЕӢ wahndeena, weЙ— tumohsee maana , kaГұam ka Israayel ci eЙ—see ЕӢ kehЖҙa hulanga. NdooЙ—aЕӢ Aaruna namee nik ЕӢ wahndeena, weЙ— ndooЙ—a pulЙ—ee kifis na pos. Atoh ca Й—apas ca fu inah ne woo ciЕӢ AmbtiЙ—ohi fiissee nga ca, namee Й—aaku nga.
9.5: Nataal caЕӢ feruuЙ— ca nik ЕӢ Asamaan, ci na woyse seruben deguusa ЕӢ Й—afuk wa ne ca teeЙ“oh ne yaki Kooh yak waa ЕӢ ndaam ; paЙ“ ciЕӢ ca saangneeЙ—a kunohaana, weЙ— Й—iska na Й—aasohse bakaaЙ—. Waaye pooksohiЕӢ ЖҙohiЕӢ woo ceem, wa tahЙ—i Й“oo kuruk.
9.6: Mbaa, in ceem jen tufkiЙ—ohsee Й—aa. Kooh-nu-wiis Й—ah, seeЖҙkiЙ—oh ca aas ЕӢ Й“aki koc ne Й“a haЙ“iЙ— pangkiЕӢ Й“a.
9.7: Waaye a seeЖҙkiЙ—ohi yakki dong meeЙ— aas ЕӢ Й“aki kanakЙ—oh te wa na nikee waas yino ЕӢ kiis ki. A aasuu nga muk Й“ayndohaaЙ—i Гұif ; Гұif meem, a wiЕӢ Й—oopti a seeЖҙkoh wuu bakaaЙ— ciЕӢ Й—e haf ce na ci Й“ooЙ“i tum te Й“a tiiЙ—i ca.
9.8: FuuЙ—si Hoolohngaani na teeЙ“ohe ndii ne, feeh Й“aki koc wa Й—ii nga Й—ah, waasi kaЙ— ЕӢ ЖҠiska Hoolohngaana rangsuuЙ—i paaЙ—.
9.9: Wa Гұaamaar ngaЕӢ jamanooni woti ; wa tokis ne onoh ci na seeЖҙuk ci wuu Kooh minЙ—i tah hafiЕӢ Й“oyi na tumee ca yeeЙ“uk jameet ЕӢ ini kaЙ— ЕӢ bakaaЙ— ciЕӢ Й—e.
9.10: Ca nakoh ci top ЕӢ faan dong, findi kaГұam ci na anaah ci na farsuk ci Й—alohiЙ— ci. Ca nikee nga po findi Kooh eЙ—oh tiindohaaЙ—i asi. MucЙ—ohi Gapohse seeЖҙkoh kiГұin kiЕӢ Й—e
9.11: Kiristaani hayiЙ— findi SeeЖҙkiЙ—oh yakak ne a rangis waasiЕӢ in ci baahiЙ— ci hay. A aas ЕӢ Й—iipi uup yak, uuppa mit, KahnaЕӢ Kooh wa yaah Й“o' haЙ“iЙ—Й—i, weЙ— ne wa Й“aahЙ—i ЕӢ ferii.
9.12: A aasiЙ— nga po ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ ЖҠiska Hoolohngaana ; wa nikka waasi yinooreem. A eЙ—ohЙ—i Гұif suket nga wala Гұif Й—oon, a eЙ—oh Гұif miЕӢ Й—e, a rahassa muciЕӢ Й“oo po faw.
9.13: ЖҒo' hoolaaЙ—i, a lisu Гұif suket wala Гұif naar-coc, wala weti kooЙ—ohu ЕӢ inoh yu' dohuuЙ— Й—ah, wa Й“okit faaniЕӢ Й—e.
9.14: Nik ne wa raakoh Й—aa Й—ah, Гұif miЕӢ MucЙ—ohi Kooh gapohee weЙ— joy uupiЙ— hatil. MucЙ—ohi taamboh ЕӢ FuuЙ—si Hoolohngaani, yi gen gen, a eЙ—ta haf ce Kooh. A nikka seeЖҙkaah raakaaЙ—i sikka, a hey Й“oo Й“okte ЕӢ tumohaaЙ— ci na Й“ayohe ЕӢ kakaan po haf ciЕӢ Й“oo yeeЙ“uk ЕӢ ini kaЙ— ЕӢ bakaaЙ— ciЕӢ Й“oo, ne Й“oo min Гұaamuk Koohi na pese.
9.15: ЖҠaa, ngaЕӢ AmbtiЙ—ohi Asi Kooh tufkiЙ— na Й“ooЙ“i, a MucЙ—ohi Gapohse a yi nik ЕӢ harmban ce na Й“a, ne Й“ooЙ“i Kooh Й“eeЙ—uk min rahas lamaahi minЙ—i reeh, wi a gapee Й“a. Ini tah po Й“a heya mine rahas weЙ— ne, kaani etohsee kaanuuЙ—, kaani joyee tos Й“ooЙ“i ЕӢ bakaaЙ— ci tumsee ЕӢ AmbtiЙ—oha Koc.
9.16: ЖҒoyi kaan, te raak Й—e dengkohiЙ— findi raak-raak kiЕӢ Й—e joy paysohohu Й—ah, wa joyiЙ— hoolЙ—u ne kakaan kiЕӢ Й“oyeem raakiЙ—.
9.17: Laam, e kakaan na tufkiЙ—e dengkoh ; feeh Й“oyeem yii pes Й—ah, dengkohiЕӢ Й—e tufukЙ—i.
9.18: AmbtiЙ—oha Koc mand Й—aa , feeh Гұif aamkeeЙ—i Й—ah wa heeЙ—i cambe tiindЙ—u.
9.19: Wa Musaa woo Й“ooЙ“a jen nakoh nu nik ЕӢ waasi po Жҙutta, a Й“ayya Гұif maЕӢ Й—oon ca [na waЕӢ suket ca] a ambsohha ca na masuЙ“, a Й“ayya car hisoЙ“ , a tokiЙ—taa ooy ruumind haЙ“Й—ohuuЙ— find mbaal. A Й“ekeeЙ—aa ЕӢ Гұif ma, a liseeЙ—aa, po ЕӢ teerndiЕӢ waasi sah ; a nammbaa lis ЕӢ Й“ooЙ“a jen.
9.20: A woyeeЙ—a ne : В« Wii, weЙ— Гұif mi aamu wuu ambtiЙ—ohi Kooh tufkiЙ— na Й—u. В»
9.21: A nammba lis Гұif ma ЕӢ Й—iipa nikee KahnaЕӢ Kooh na in ca Й“a na njirГұiЙ—kohe jen ne Й“a nikiЙ—eesa Kooh Й—ah.
9.22: Findi waasi woyoha, ini uup ngaЕӢ in ci jen na farsohse Гұif, Гұif aamukЙ—i Й—ah, Й—aasoh bakaaЙ— raakanЙ—i. MucЙ—ohi Gapohse eЙ—ohiЙ— haf ce waas yino po faw
9.23: Nik ne ГұaamaariЕӢ in caЕӢ Й—afka weЙ— joy farsohu Й—aa Й—ah, kon seeЖҙki joy hooliЙ— in ca kiyooh ca ЕӢ Й—afka joy uup.
9.24: Kiristaa aasЙ—i ЕӢ ЖҠiski Hoolohngaani yaah Й“o' haЙ“iЙ—, weЙ— wi fu inah ne wa ГұaamaariЕӢ ЖҠiska Hoolohngaana keeh-keeha ; a aas ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ Eel ci sah te Й—iski wa nik, a yaa tufkiЙ—ta Й“oo ЕӢ fiki Kooh.
9.25: ЕҠ waasiЕӢ Musaa, kiis nu ree Й—ah, seeЖҙkiЙ—ohi yakki aas ЕӢ ЖҠiska Hoolohngaana na Гұif mi nikЙ—i wiЕӢ Й—e ; waaye Kiristaa, a aasЙ—i ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ Eel ci ne a eЙ—ohe kipes kiЕӢ Й—e a eЙ—ohissee wa.
9.26: Wa nikohee Й—aa Й—ah, mbaa a heen joye yaaЙ“ waas laayiЙ— ЕӢ ina Adina camboh po wi. Waaye a hayiЙ— waas yino ngaЕӢ jamanooci mirndoh, ne a moos bakaaЙ— ciЕӢ Й“ooЙ“i ЕӢ seeЖҙki a seeЖҙkoh haf ce.
9.27: Findi Й“o' na kaanohe waas yino, Жҙut Й—ah, a taamb ЕӢ atteena,
9.28: MucЙ—ohi Gapohse namiЙ— eЙ—oh haf ce Й—aa waas yino po faw, ne a deguk bakaaЙ— ciЕӢ Й“i Й“o' laayiЙ—. Жіut Й—ah a hayis waasiЕӢ Й—e kanakЙ—oh, te bakaaЙ— ci tahuu, waaye a hayissan ne a teeЙ“uk Й“i seesuk Й—e hot ne Й“a rahas muci.

10.1: WaasiЕӢMusaa, wa in ci baahiЙ— ci keeh-keeh ci joy hay haa, wa ГұaamaariЕӢ ca rek. Kiis nu kiis, seeЖҙkohaaЙ— ciЕӢ wa yino ; wa dokke, wa dokkisse. ЖҒi na taambЙ—ee wa ne Й“a reЙ“ Kooh, wa moosanЙ—i Й“a min tah mit.
10.2: Wa mineen tah Й“o' mit Й—ah, Й“i na Гұaamkohe Kooh Й—aa hee Гұaamke waas yino, Й“a hool po faw. ЖҒa heeЙ—i yegisse Й“itkiЕӢ bakaaЙ— ciЕӢ Й“a po Й“a seeЖҙke, Й“a seeЖҙkisse.
10.3: SeeЖҙuk ceem na naandse Й“a bakaaЙ— ciЕӢ Й“a kiis nu ree.
10.4: Г‘if miЕӢ naar ci na wiЕӢ suket ci moosanЙ—i min nihis bakaaЙ— ci.
10.5: WeЙ— tah, ngaЕӢ Fiis ci HooliЙ— ci, wi MucЙ—ohi Kooh gapohe haye Adina, a woo Kooh ne : В« Ini fu waaЙ—ee keeh-keeh, a seeЖҙuk ci na onoh ci haa, waaye fu mahiЙ— to faan.
10.6: Fu raakЙ—i ini neЙ“ Й—a ЕӢ Й—oopaat ci na hoomЙ—asse ЕӢ seeЖҙkohaani na seeЖҙuk ci wuu bakaaЙ— ;
10.7: teemb ndeem ЕӢ woosa ne : Kooh ! Fiis ci HooliЙ— ci woyiЙ— ЕӢ ini kaЙ— nga so ; ЕӢ hayiЙ— ne ЕӢ tum ini fu waaЙ—. В»
10.8: A camboh woo kiЕӢ Й—e ne seeЖҙuk ci na onoh ci, Й—oopaat ci na hoomЙ—asse ЕӢ seeЖҙkohaani, na seeЖҙuk ci wuu bakaaЙ— ci, Kooh waaЙ—eeЙ—i ca keeh-keeh, te a raakЙ—i ini neЙ“ Й—e nga ca. Te moona waasi nakoh ne seeЖҙuk ceem jen joy joy tumu.
10.9: A degga nga ne a hayiЙ— ne a tum ini Kooh waaЙ—. A nihis ini koc, a tufkiЙ—ta wi kanakЙ—oh.
10.10: Kon, waaЙ—-waaЙ—iЕӢ Kooh tah po Yeesu Kiristaa eЙ—ohiЙ— faaniЕӢ Й—e waas yino po faw, Й“oo hoolla, Й“oo nikka Й“o'-Kooh.
10.11: ЕҠ waasiЕӢ Musaa, seeЖҙkiЙ—oh nu nik na tufke ЕӢ pangkiЕӢ Й—e Kooh-nu-wiis. A seeЖҙkee seeЖҙuk ci a na seeЖҙkange te ca moosanЙ—i min nihis bakaaЙ— ci.
10.12: Waaye MucЙ—ohi Kooh gapohe nak, a seeЖҙuk wuu bakaaЙ— ci seeЖҙuk yino, a Й“ooffa ЕӢ ГұaahmaЕӢ Kooh po faw.
10.13: ЖҠiski wa nik, a na seke ne sangiЙ— ciЕӢ Й—e folu, Й“a tumu degoha kot wuu ce.
10.14: Laam ЕӢ seeЖҙuk yino, a tumiЙ— po Й“a nikiЙ— Й“o' mitiЙ— po faw, Й“i na hoolЙ—asse ЕӢ bakaaЙ—.
10.15: Ineem weЙ— FuuЙ—si Hoolohngaani ndengЙ—iЙ— Й“oo, ЕӢ Й—iski Fiis ci woo ne :
10.16: В« AmbtiЙ—ohii weЙ— maa hee tufkiЙ—e na Й“a ЕӢ finho mbeh ceem : - Mi yi HeЙ—i, Гұam woo wa - ЕҠ hey Й“eke nakoh ciЕӢ ngo ЕӢ keeГұ ciЕӢ Й“a, ЕӢ fiis ca ЕӢ liiЙ“ ciЕӢ Й“a. В»
10.17: Fiis ci woyissa nga ne : В« ЕҠ naandsukissanЙ—i muk bakaaЙ— ciЕӢ Й“a na tumohaaЙ— ciЕӢ Й“a moЙ—aaЙ—iici. В»
10.18: In ceem Й—aasohu Й—ah, seeЖҙuk wuu ca etohissuuЙ—i. ЖҒoo ambaat keeh ki, Й“oo pesoha
10.19: ЖҒaah ciЕӢ ngo, Й“oo ambaat ne Й“oo miniЙ— taamboh ЕӢ Гұif miЕӢ seeЖҙkiЕӢ Yeesu, Й“oo aas supkaaЙ—i ЕӢ ЖҠiska Hoolohngaana.
10.20: ЖҒoo ambaat ne a rangsiЙ—iЙ— Й“oo waas as, taamboh ЕӢ ridoonaЕӢ wa, weЙ— ne faaniЕӢ Й—e. Waaseem, wii pes.
10.21: Te Й“oo ambaat ne Й“oo raak SeeЖҙkiЙ—oh yakak yi adgoh Kahan Kooh, wa nikka Й“ooЙ“iЕӢ Й—e.
10.22: Mbaa Й“oo reЙ“gaat Kooh na keeГұ keeh-keeh na ooluk mitiЙ— wi puloh ЕӢ kos, laam keeГұ ciЕӢ Й“oo lisuuЙ— Гұif miЕӢ Yeesu ne ca Й“oktu ngaЕӢ Й“itkiЕӢ moЙ—aaЙ—iici, te faan ciЕӢ Й“oo Й“ookuuЙ— na masuЙ“ hooliЙ—.
10.23: Te Й“oo ambaat ndengiЙ— ini Й“oo woo ne weЙ— Й“oo yaakaar te Й“oo faЙ—sukuu. Laam, Kooh na dokkeeЙ—i finho ЕӢ in ci a gapoh.
10.24: Yaa nu nga Й“oo faЙ—ohaat morom ce nof ne Й“oo hiirtiЙ—ohee ЕӢ waaЙ—oh na tum in baahiЙ—.
10.25: ЖҒoo kinaat faЙ— coh ci Й“oo na cohe. ЖҒinooЙ“i faЙ—iЙ— ca po wa nikiЙ— ini Й“a meeЙ—. Ineem kinaat Й“oo rahas. ЖҒoo joy joy ГұaahtiЙ—oh. Te Й—u uupee hot ne mbehiЕӢ HeЙ— Й“oo wii reЙ“eeЙ—a Й—ah, uupaat nga ГұaahtiЙ—oh.
10.26: Laam, Й“oo rahas keeh ki po Й“oo inaha wooriЙ— te Й“oo ris bakaaЙ—ee ЕӢ ini Й“oo ti' Й—ah, inhaat ne, seeЖҙki min hooliЙ— bakaaЙ— ci raakisЙ—i.
10.27: Ini na hee tase kay, weЙ— ne Й“oo saakЙ—ohee, sekee ini na haye, atteeni na yongkaahi miskiЙ—i na hee hoomЙ—e Й“i sang Kooh.
10.28: ЖҒo' sannga taambiЙ— nakoh ciЕӢ waasiЕӢ Musaa, te Й“o' kanak wala kaahay seede ne a nikЙ—i ЕӢ waas Й—ah, a na apse yirmassaaЙ—i.
10.29: Kon Й“o' nu heef KuЙ“kiЕӢ Kooh po a faaleeЙ—i Й—e Й—ah, findi a joy mbugalohu mandan na misik ? ЖҒoyeem eЙ—Й—i Гұif miЕӢ AmbtiЙ—ohi ciri inaa Kooh joy eЙ—u, Гұif mi fu inah ne, weЙ— hooliЙ— Й—e, a nikka Й“o'-Kooh. ЖҒaatta nga, a Й“asiЙ— FuuЙ—si Hoolohngaani na inhiЙ—ohe baahohiЕӢ Kooh.
10.30: Te Й“oo inhiЙ— baahiЙ— Yi woo ЕӢ Fiis ci ne : В« Г‘am raak wirndiЙ—koh, Гұam na hee wirnduke tumohaaЙ— ci moЙ—aaЙ—iici ! В» Fiis ci woyissa ne : В« HeЙ—i hey atte'e Й“ooЙ“iЕӢ Й—e. В»
10.31: Kooh yii pes, de' ! Mas Й“oyi keenan ЕӢ yaah ciЕӢ Й—e !
10.32: Naandsukaat ina raake, wa Й—u rahas leeri ; ЕӢ jamanoonaam Й—u leberiЙ— keeh-keeh na miskiЙ— ca.
10.33: Cum Й—ah, Й—u Й“asse, Й—u mbugalse ЕӢ fiki Й“ooЙ“i jen. Cum Й—ah, Й—u Й“aah miskiЙ—i na Й“i tumsee ineem.
10.34: MiskiЙ—i Й“i ambsee ЕӢ kaso raakee, Й—u Й“aahhaa na Й“a. ЖҠu teyЙ—ukeen na keeГұ soosiЙ— ne raak-raakaЕӢ Й—u naafu, sagu inha Й—u inhee ne, Й—u raakiЙ— wi ngisoh te wa genan gen.
10.35: Mbaa Й—ah, kinaat mbet oolki Й—u ooluk, wa hun na aaf yakak.
10.36: ЖҠu etohiЙ— muГұ Й—u seke. ЖҠu tumohee wa Й—aa Й—ah, Й—u na tume ini Kooh waaЙ—, Й—u mirndohan rahas ini a gapoh.
10.37: Laam, Fiis ci HooliЙ— ci woo ne : В« Tas Жҙissuut, Жҙissuut rek, Й“oyi na haye, hay ; a nikanЙ—i hayaaЙ—i ЕӢ wahtuuniЕӢ wa.
10.38: ЖҒoyiЕӢ ngo yurhiЙ—i, pesohan kosi a kos. Waaye a dokuk finho nga Й—ah, keeГұiЕӢ ngo soosanЙ—i nga Й—e. В»
10.39: ЖҒoo nak, Й“oo Й“aahЙ—i ЕӢ Й“ooЙ“i na dokke finho ; dokuk finho na Й“ekohee ЕӢ Й—umbu. ЖҒoo kosiЙ— Kooh te Й“oo hey muce.

11.1: Kos weЙ— ne : wa woor Й“oyi ne in ci yaakaaru raakiЙ—, te a ooluk ne in ci hotuuЙ—i nikiЙ—.
11.2: Caac ciЕӢ Й“oo kosohee Й—aa, weЙ—i tah Kooh seede'iЙ— Й“a seede moЙ—iЙ— ЕӢ Fiis ci HooliЙ— ci.
11.3: A kos tah po, Й“oo hotta ne Adina ferohu woo kiЕӢ Kooh, kon in ci na hotke pulohЙ—i ЕӢ ini Й“o' min hot.
11.4: A kos tah po, Abel seeЖҙukka wuu Kooh seeЖҙki uup baah wiЕӢ Kayin. A weЙ— tah po Fiis ci HooliЙ— ci seede'iЙ— ne a Й“o' yurhiЙ—, Kooh seede'iЙ— Й—e ЕӢ teyЙ—uka a teyЙ—uk seeЖҙkaЕӢ Й—e. A kos tah po, ЕӢ ini a nik Й“o' kaaniЙ— jen, a ris woo poyi.
11.5: A kos tah po, Henok coottohuusa ne a lahuu ЕӢ kakaan. A hotissuuЙ—i, laam a Kooh coottoh Й—e. Waaye bala a coottohsan Й—ah, Fiis ci HooliЙ— ci seede'iЙ— ne a neЙ“iЙ— Kooh.
11.6: ЖҠal kos Й—ah, ali Й“o' minЙ—i neЙ“ Kooh. Laam Й“o' nu waaЙ— reЙ“ Kooh Й—ah, fu joyiЙ— kos ne a nikiЙ— te a na aafe aaf Й“i na waakee Й—e.
11.7: A kos tah po, wa Noohin inhiЙ—u in ci hee raake te Й“o' hotЙ—i ca paaЙ—, a kerhiЙ—ta Kooh, a haЙ“iЙ—ta gaal yakak ne a muciЙ— Й“i kahan ce. A kosa a kosee tah po a Й“urra Й“i Adina, a rahassa kiyurhi kos na eЙ—ohe.
11.8: A kos tah po, wa Ibrahiima Й“eeЙ—ku, a teyЙ—ukka kaЙ— kur ka a joyee rahas lamaah lamu te a inahЙ—i Й—iska a kaЙ—e.
11.9: A kosa a kosee tah po, a gennda ЕӢ kur ka a gapse findi hanhe ; a gennda ngaЕӢ Й—iip na Isaahha na YaЕӢhooЙ“a Й“i Kooh namee gap ne Й“a hey name lam kur keem.
11.10: A sekeeЙ—a ne a gen ЕӢ kur-taaha yipu ЕӢ atoh, wi fu inah ne a Kooh fiisoota, taЙ“ahhaa.
11.11: A kos tah, Kooh tummba po Ibrahiima na Saarata minnda raak kuЙ“u, ali nik ne Й“a yakeen ЕӢ raak kuЙ“u, te a yi Saarata sah, a nikee Й“itiЙ“ minaaЙ—i raak kuЙ“u. Wa wooree woor Ibrahiima ne Yi gapoh na dokkeeЙ—i finho.
11.12: Tahha po wa raakangannga, Й“i laayiЙ— rimkohha ngaЕӢ Й“o' yino yi useeЙ—i kakaan ; Й“a laayya po haa hor ciЕӢ eel ci, Й“a minaaЙ—iisa kindu po haa merhey miЕӢ yaah-cookmi.
11.13: ЖҒooЙ“i kosee Й“eem jen kaan na kos. ЖҒa rahasЙ—i in ci Kooh gapohe, waaye Й“a ЖҙokiЙ— ca, Й“a summba nga ca po haa Й“oyi na taambЙ—ukee Й“o' ; Й“a woosa halang ne Й“a hanhe ngaЕӢ kehЖҙi, Й“a Й“aaЙ“oh.
11.14: ЖҒi na woyohee Й—aa na teeЙ“ohe wooriЙ— ne Й“a na waake kur ki Й“a min Й“aahoh.
11.15: Nikee ne, a kur ka Й“a pulohee weЙ— hel ciЕӢ Й“a nikohee Й—ah, Й“a heen mine dokuk nga.
11.16: Waaye Й“a waaЙ—ee wi uup baah, wi nik ЕӢ Eel ci. WeЙ— tah Kooh supukЙ—i Й“eeЙ—kohu KoohiЕӢ Й“a, laam a kooЙ—kiЙ—iЙ— Й“a kur.
11.17: A kos tah po, wa Ibrahiima markiskasse, a teyЙ—ukka ne a seeЖҙkoh kuЙ“kiЕӢ Й—e Isaahha, kuЙ“kiЕӢ Й—e yino-kongi. Waam raak Й—e gapuuЙ—,
11.18: te ЕӢ in ci a gapse, Kooh woyiЙ— Й—e nga ne : В« Fu raakohan Й“i rimkohan nga Й—a ЕӢ Isaahha. В»
11.19: Ibrahiima markeen po a inahha ne Kooh raakiЙ— hatili min hultiЙ— kaaniЙ— sah. ЕҠ ineem, Й“o' miniЙ— woo ne a wiku wiku kuЙ“kiЕӢ Й—e findi Й“oyi hultiЙ—u.
11.20: A kos tah po, Isaahha nammba barke'iЙ— YaЕӢhooЙ“a na Esaaw ЕӢ in ca haye.
11.21: A kos tah po, wa YaЕӢhooЙ“a na kaane, a barke'iЙ—ta yaa nu nga ЕӢ kuЙ“uuciЕӢ Yuusufa, a ambaalukka ЕӢ hafiЕӢ ndooЙ—iЕӢ Й—e, a Жҙekka ne a Гұaamuk Kooh.
11.22: A kos tah po, wa Yuusufa hee kaane, a woosa ЕӢ pulaЕӢ Israayel Misra, a dengkohha ЕӢ ini kaЙ— ЕӢ Жҙoh ciЕӢ Й—e.
11.23: A kos tah po, wa Musaa rimu, yaay Й“a na baab Й“a Й—asiЙ—ta Й—e caЙ“in kaahay. Laam Й“a hoteen moЙ— ЕӢ kuЙ“ka te Й“a neЖҙЖҙoheeЙ—i nakohaЕӢ buura.
11.24: A kos tah po, wa Musaa yak, a teyЙ—ukЙ—i kerhis ne a kuЙ“u ngaЕӢ kuЙ“ki Й“itЙ“iЕӢ Firawnaana.
11.25: A tannda ne a mbugalu na cuuЙ“iЕӢ Kooh, te raak kipes kiЕӢ Й—e mineen neЙ“ ; waaye neЙ“Й—eem heen reehe te wa hee nike neЙ“iЙ— ЕӢ bakaaЙ—.
11.26: TeyЙ—uk heefu findi Kiristaani, weЙ— ngisohЙ—ee Й—e raak-raakiЕӢ Misra jen ; laam a degee has ciЕӢ Й—e ЕӢ aafi Kooh aafan Й—e.
11.27: A kos tah po, a pulohha Misra te a neЖҙЖҙohЙ—i ayrukaЕӢ buura. Wa mand haa ne a hotee Yi na hotseeЙ—i, weЙ— tah Й—e muГұeeЙ—a.
11.28: A kos tah po, Musaa haЙ“iЙ—ta seeЖҙkaЕӢ Paak , a woosa Й“ooЙ“a ne Й“a reefaat Гұif ma ЕӢ yahndeer ca ne malaakaani na yahrohe hay Й—ah, a laaluu saaw ciЕӢ Israayel ca.
11.29: A kos tah po, wa Israayel ca taamb ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ Cookma-Ruumnda, wa mannda haa Й“a taamb ЕӢ merhey suyiЙ— ; Й“i Misra jeemmba nam taamb nga, masma onnda Й“a.
11.30: A kos tah po, wa Israayel ca taambЙ—ee miira Й—ingee Yeriko, Й“a wileeЙ—aa, po Й“a raakka neeh yasna-kanak na ineem, miira keennda juЖҙ.
11.31: A kos tah po, wa Й“ooЙ“a taambЙ—eeЙ—i Kooh apse, Rahab, Й“itЙ“a toonkoha, mucca, laam a taambkohee taambkoh moЙ—oЙ— espiyoЕӢ ca Israayel ca tuuЖҙe.
11.32: ЕҠ joy ye Й“aatis kotii ? Wa haЙ“Й—i nga ne ЕӢ woo ЕӢ ini kaЙ— ЕӢ Gedewon, Barak, Samson, Yefte, Dawuuda, Samuwel na woosuuЙ— ci.
11.33: E kos tah po, Й“a folla Й“i buur po Й“a degga kur ciЕӢ Й“a yaah, Й“a tiindЙ—eeЙ—a waas, Й“a rahassa in ci Kooh gapohe, Й“a rannga nguЙ“ gaynde saahiЙ—,
11.34: Й“a Жҙimmba doole yongkaah, Й“a mucca ngaЕӢ kaaГұ ndang, Й“a rahassa hatili Й“a raakeeЙ—i, Й“a nikka jalmba ЕӢ hiГұoh, Й“a ngekka hiГұohoh caЕӢ kur ca cinooca.
11.35: Wa haЙ“Й—i nga ne ЕӢ nam woo ЕӢ ini kaЙ— ЕӢ Й“itiЙ“ ca wiksee kaaniЙ— ciЕӢ Й“a hultiЙ—uuЙ—. Na Й“i Й“o' wiiriis, Й“i kaan ЕӢ mbugal ca Й“a mbugalse, sagu waaЙ—a Й“a waaЙ—eeЙ—i findi Й“a hee pulЙ—ohse nga ; Й“a waaЙ—ee rahas hulti na eЙ—ohe kipes ki ngisoh kipes ki Й“a hee Гұake .
11.36: Na Й“i wiiriis, Й“i njembtasse, laЙ“seeЙ—a ngeer, jatngasseeЙ—a, Й“ekseeЙ—a ЕӢ kasooci, te Й“a munnja.
11.37: ЖҒum tapseeЙ—a atoh po Й“a kaannda, Й“inooЙ“i Й“esuusa ЕӢ leerni, [Й“inooЙ“i nattu'seeЙ—a] Й“um apuusa na ndang, raakka Й“i raakeeЙ—i ali in, Й“a Й“ekkee und mbaal wala und pe', Й“a wileeЙ—a Й“ak nu Й“ak, Й“a torhiЙ—asseeЙ—a, Й“a mbugalseeЙ—a.
11.38: Adina yeyyoo'eeЙ—i Й“a ! ЖҒa nikee nga, Й“a kaЙ—eeЙ—a Й—isik nu Й—isik ЕӢ bilaf ci na tangooci, na Й—embohaaci nik ЕӢ hur ciЕӢ atoh ci na nung ciЕӢ kehЖҙi.
11.39: ЖҒooЙ“eem jen, a kosiЕӢ Й“a tah po, Й“a seede'Й—uusa seede moЙ—iЙ—. Moona deey, Й“a rahseeЙ—i ini Kooh gapohe.
11.40: Laam, Kooh kooЙ—kiЙ—ee Й“oo in wiiriis wi uup baah, a waaЙ—eeЙ—i ne Й“a mitЙ—u te Й“oo Й“aahuu nga.

12.1: ЕҠ ineem, Й“oo hotiЙ— ne, Й“a seede laayoh na laayoh Й“eЙ— wil Й“oo, kon Й“oo kocukohaat na nup kocukohi Й“oo degu te Й“oo muГұ po Й“oo ree. Tahha po Й“oo kaambsukaat raanoo raan, weЙ— ne Й“oo saЙ“sukoh na bakaaЙ— nu nik, laam bakaaЙ— na longЙ—ohe yooЙ“oh na yooЙ“oh.
12.2: ЖҒoo nupee Й—ah, Й“oo markaat ЕӢ Yeesu yi tufkiЙ— kosi te a mitiЙ—taa. A hotee neЙ“Й—i a degЙ—assee ne a heya rahse, weЙ— tah Й—e muГұ ЕӢ kurwaana te a marakЙ—i ЕӢ kaciika. A Й“oofiЙ— kotii ЕӢ ГұaahmaЕӢ Й“oofohaanaЕӢ Kooh.
12.3: Markaat ЕӢ yi muГұee sangi bakaaЙ—oh ci sangee hun na Й—e, ne Й—u yaaЙ“uu po Й—u kee goya.
12.4: LeberiЕӢ Й—u na bakaaЙ—, Гұif miЕӢ Й—u aamukЙ—i nga paaЙ—.
12.5: ЖҠu alkoh alkoh deng ci Й—u dengse po haa kuЙ“u e ? Findi Fiis ci woyoh ne : В« KuЙ“u, kina heef koЙ—iЕӢ HeЙ—i, te a woytohee Й—a Й—ah, kina faЙ—suk.
12.6: Laam, HeЙ—i na koЙ—e Й“oyi a waaЙ—, te Й“i a teyЙ—uk findi kuЙ“u jen, Й“eЙ— a na laЙ“e leraw. В»
12.7: MuГұaat miskiЙ— ci Kooh na degee Й—u, a na degee Й—u ca ne a koЙ— Й—u. Laam a amb Й—u findi kuЙ“uuciЕӢ Й—e. A yinde kuЙ“u a yi baabiЕӢ Й—e na koЙ—eeЙ—i ?
12.8: KoЙ—i Й“ooЙ“i jen na koЙ—se, nik ne wa Й—aliЙ— Й—u Й—ah, Й—u kuЙ“u keeh-keeh haa, Й—u kuЙ“u lewaaЙ—i.
12.9: ЖҒoo jen baab ci rim Й“oo na koЙ—e Й“oo koЙ— te Й“oo kerhiЙ—iЙ— Й“a ; ЕӢ woyisЙ—i Й—a Kooh, BaabiЕӢ Й“oo ; Й“oo kerhiЙ—aat Й—e, Й“oo min pes.
12.10: Baab ciЕӢ Й“oo na koЙ—e Й“oo Й“i kiis rek, ЕӢ findi Й“a hotoh ; Kooh nak, koЙ—i a na koЙ—e Й“oo, wa ini baah nga Й“oo ne a Й“aahndoh Й“oo ЕӢ hool kiЕӢ Й—e.
12.11: Wa keeh ne Й“o' koЙ—see Й—ah, wa na nikeeЙ—i in neЙ“iЙ— nga Й—e, wa in miskiЙ— ; waaye wa na mirndohe rimiЙ— Й“i teyЙ—uk taamb nga kipes yurhiЙ— huniЙ— na jam.
12.12: WeЙ— tah, poЙ—saat yaah ciЕӢ Й—u neeЙ“ohiЙ— ci na Жҙii ciЕӢ Й—u sangiЙ— ci.
12.13: HaЙ“Й—iЙ—aat kot ciЕӢ Й—u waas yurhiЙ—, ne wi na yiiЙ“e nga ca Й—iindkohuu, waaye wa kooЙ—oh wir nga.
12.14: Waakaat jam na Й“ooЙ“i jen, Й—u waak hool kiЕӢ Й“o'-Kooh. ЖҠal hool keem Й—ah, ali Й“o' hotanЙ—i HeЙ— Й“oo.
12.15: Wortukaat po ali Й“o' tasuu finho ЕӢ ini kaЙ— ЕӢ baahohi Kooh na baahohe. Wortukaat po ali Й“o' nga Й—u kinaat mand na niir baahaaЙ—i, wi kifis na in moЙ—aaЙ—i po wa kee kaЙ“a Й“o' laayiЙ— ЕӢ aay kiЕӢ wa.
12.16: Wortukaat po ali Й“o' kinaat nik njaalo'oh wala a heef in ciЕӢ Kooh, findi Esaaw yi lofkohee waЙ—i a joyee rahas findi saaw sagu noЙ— yino dong.
12.17: ЖҠu inhiЙ— ne ЕӢ mirndaani, wa a waaЙ— lam barkeeniЕӢ baab Й“a, a teyЙ—ukЙ—uuЙ—i. Inwaaso ammba Й—e nga po a fuЙ—eeЙ—a, waaye ЕӢ Й“arang Й“arang. Tangooci kanak ci : Sinaay na Siyong
12.18: ЖҠu nak, Й—u reЙ“ ЕӢ tangoori min laalu haa. TangooriЕӢ Sinaay caac caЕӢ Й—u reЙ“ee, wi riifee na yongkaah na puuЙ—is, wa Гұuussa tuЙ—,
12.19: wa Й—iiЙ—Й—eeЙ—a sagu kuluЙ“ roofiЙ—, na hooso feyohiЙ— po Й“a kerhee nga kiimeeЙ—a ne, Й“a waaЙ—isЙ—i kerah hoosooreem.
12.20: ЖҒa kaaГұeeЙ—i kaaГұeeЙ—i nakohii : В« Ali Й—oopaat sah laal tangoori, a hey tapsohse atoh po a kaan. В»
12.21: Ina Й“a hotee tiitЙ—oheen po Musaa woosa ne : В« ЕҠ tiitiЙ— po mi yii saakЙ—oheeЙ—a. В»
12.22: Waaye Й—u, Й—u reЙ“ tangooriЕӢ Siyong , kur kiЕӢ Koohi na pese. WeЙ— YerusalemaЕӢ Eel ca, mbuumbaaya Й“i junni junni malaaka cohoh.
12.23: ЖҠiski Й—u reЙ“, Й—u reЙ“ ЕӢ cohiЕӢ saaw ci, Й“eЙ— Й“i tiik ciЕӢ Й“a fiisu ЕӢ Eel ci. ЖҠu reЙ“ ЕӢ Kooh yi na atte'e Й“ooЙ“i jen. ЖҠu reЙ“ ЕӢ ruuh ciЕӢ Й“ooЙ“i yurhiЙ— ci te Й“a mitЙ—uusa.
12.24: ЖҠu reЙ“ ЕӢ Yeesu yi nik ЕӢ harmban Й“oo na Kooh ЕӢ AmbtiЙ—ohi Asi ; Й—u reЙ“ ЕӢ Гұif miЕӢ Й—e lisu te ini Гұif meem woo, wa uuppa baah ini Гұif miЕӢ Abel woye.
12.25: Wortukaat ! Kinaat Й—ikЙ—uk Yi na woye na Й—u. ЖҒi sangee sikЙ—uk yi woyee na Й“a ЕӢ kehЖҙi, Й“a fuseeЙ—i ЕӢ mbugal. ЖҒoo nak, Kooh na woyohe na Й“oo ЕӢ Eel ci, kon Й“oo suungЙ—uk Й—e Й—ah, wa wooriЙ— ne Й“oo hey mbugalse.
12.26: Waam hoosooriЕӢ Й—e yoondЙ—ee kehЖҙi, waaye wii a gapkiЙ— ЕӢ Fiis ci HooliЙ— ci an : В« TasiЙ— waas yino, mi, ЕӢ hey yoondЙ—isse kehЖҙi, wa nikan weЙ— dong haa, waaye na Eel ci. В»
12.27: ЕҠ woo ki a woo an "tasiЙ— waas yino", ineem weЙ— teeЙ“oh ne in ci min yoondЙ—u, ci hotkang, hey coote, ci minЙ—i yoondЙ—u ris.
12.28: Ini kaЙ— nga Й“oo, Й“oo rahas Nguuri minЙ—i yoondЙ—u, Й“oo genaat corkiЙ— Kooh, weЙ— na tahe Й“oo min Й—e Гұaamuk Гұaamki neЙ“ Й—e, wa hun na eЙ— Й—e cir na nup Й—e.
12.29: Laam KoohiЕӢ Й“oo nam nik yongkaahi na hoomЙ—e.

13.1: WaaЙ—tiЙ—ohiЕӢ Й—u genaat gen. ЖҠu jen, e Й—u Й“aah.
13.2: Kinaat alkoh taambkoh Й“i na haye nga Й—u. RaakiЙ— Й“i meeЙ—a tum po Й“a daliЙ—ta Й“i malaaka te Й“a inheeЙ—i ne Й“a daliЙ— malaaka.
13.3: Naandsukaat Й“i taЖҙu, po wa mand haa ne Й—u Й“ii na Й“a ЕӢ kaso. Naandsukaat Й“i nik ЕӢ mbugal, po wa mand haa ne e faan ciЕӢ Й—u na mbugalse.
13.4: ЖҒooЙ“i jen ambaat sey, Й“a eЙ—a cir te Жҙaar top ЕӢ Й“itiice, Й“itiЙ“ top ЕӢ Жҙaar ce ; laam Kooh hey atte'e mbalayoh ci na njaalo'oh ci.
13.5: ЕҠ pesohaaЙ—iЕӢ Й—u, kinaat waaЙ— kopor lool ; ini Й—u raak doyaat Й—u. Kooh sah woyiЙ— ЕӢ Fiis ci HooliЙ— ci ne : В« ЕҠ alkohanЙ—i Й—a te ЕӢ faЙ—anЙ—i Й—a muk. В»
13.6: WeЙ— tah Й“oo miniЙ— woo wooriЙ— woo kii : В« HeЙ—i a yi Й“aatЙ—ohohiЕӢ ngo, ЕӢ heyЙ—i neЖҙЖҙohe ali in. ЖҒo' min ndo ye tum ? В»
13.7: Naandsukaat Й“i adgohee Й—u, Й“i inhiЙ— Й—u woo kiЕӢ Kooh. Markaat findi Й“a pesohe, na findi kipes kiЕӢ Й“a reehoh, Й—u altiЙ—koh Й“a ЕӢ kosa Й“a kose.
13.8: Yeesu Kiristaa Й“oЖҙsukohЙ—i ; findi a mandee wotЙ“a, a mand Й—aa woti te a mandan Й—aa po faw.
13.9: Kinaat ГұaaГұohu Й—u jangЙ—asse Й“i jang mbalay Й—alohiЙ— na ini Й—u inhiЙ—asse. Wa moЙ—iЙ— ne baahohiЕӢ Kooh Й“aat keeГұ ciЕӢ Й—u hatil, waaye, ca joyЙ—i Й“aatohu hatil na nakoh ci kaЙ— kaГұam. Laam nakoh ceem moosЙ—i njirГұoh Й“ooЙ“a taambЙ—ee ca ali in.
13.10: ЖҒoo raakiЙ— Й—isik seeЖҙkoha wi fu inah ne, seeЖҙkiЙ—oh ciЕӢ Kahan Kooh ЕӢ AmbtiЙ—ohi Koc joyЙ—i kooЙ—oh kaГұam kiЕӢ Й“a nga.
13.11: Findi seeЖҙkiЙ—ohi yakki meeЙ— tum, ne a seeЖҙkeesa wuu bakaaЙ— ci Й—ah ; a meeЙ— aam Гұif miЕӢ Й—oopaat ci ЕӢ ЖҠiska Hoolohngaana, waaye ca na ГұamseeЙ—i, ca meeЙ— meeЙ— dohu ЕӢ bilaf fa.
13.12: WeЙ— tah po miskiЙ—aЕӢ Yeesu nammba raakoh ЕӢ finho kur ka, ne a hooliЙ— Й“ooЙ“i na Гұif miЕӢ Й—e, Й“a nik Й“o'-Kooh.
13.13: Mbaa Й“oo pulaat, Й“oo kaЙ— coha na Й—e ЕӢ bilaf fa, ne Й“oo teyЙ—uk Й“asu na Й—e.
13.14: Laam Й“oo raakootЙ—i ndii kur ki risan po faw, waaye Й“oo na waake wi na haye.
13.15: Kon Й“oo taambohaat ЕӢ Yeesu, Й“oo gen ЕӢ yakiЙ— Kooh, wa nik seeЖҙki wuu Kooh. WeЙ— ne Й“oo Жҙeekee Жҙeek ci na teeЙ“ohe ne Й“oo hun na Й—e.
13.16: Kinaat aloh tum in baahiЙ— na Й“aah ini fu raak na Й“ooЙ“i, in ceem ca findi seeЖҙuk ci neЙ“ Kooh.
13.17: KerhiЙ—aat Й“i adgoh Й—u te Й—u teyЙ—uk Гұaak nga Й“a ; laam Й“eЙ— na niiЙ—e ini nik ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ keeГұ ciЕӢ Й—u te Kooh meeksan Й“a findi Й“a tumohe. Mbaa Й—ah, ini ngisoh nga Й—u weЙ— ne, Й—u kerhiЙ— Й“a ne Й“a min tum pangkiЕӢ Й“a na keeГұ soosiЙ— po Й“a raakuu aay-keeГұ nga.
13.18: KiimЙ—aat Й“oo Kooh, wa wooriЙ— Й“oo ne nikohaaЙ—iЕӢ Й“oo, wa Й—aa. ЖҒoo waaЙ— haЙ“iЙ— baahiЙ— ЕӢ in ci jen.
13.19: Mi yii nak Й—u keeh-keeh ne Й—u kiimiЙ— to, po ЕӢ min hayis nga Й—u findi wa uup gaawoh. Kiimi
13.20: Kooh yi na onohe jam, a hultiЙ—iЙ— HeЙ— Й“oo Yeesu, yi fu inah ne, na Гұif miЕӢ Й—e, a tufkiЙ—iЙ— ambtiЙ—ohi genan gen, a nikka niiЙ—ohiЕӢ Й“oo yakki.
13.21: Kooh onaat Й—u po Й—u min tum in nu baah Й—ah, ne Й—u haЙ“iЙ— ini a waaЙ—. Te a tumee nga Й“oo ini a teyЙ—uk, taamboh ЕӢ Yeesu Kiristaa yi yakЙ—aah po faw. Amiin. Askohi
13.22: Mi yii kiim Й—u Й“aah ciЕӢ ngo, ne Й—u amb woo ceem ; Гұam Гұaah Й—u na ca, ЕӢ woo Й—u ca ЕӢ fiis rohЖҙiЙ—.
13.23: Inhaat ne Timoote yi Й“aah na Й“oo ini Й“oo kos, faЙ—suuЙ—. A teel hay Й—ah, ЕӢ hey hune na Й—e, ЕӢ hey Й—u marke.
