13.25: BaahohiЕӢ Kooh nikaat na Й—u jen.

1.1: Mi yi Saak, ГұaamiЕӢ Kooh na HeЙ— Й“oo Yeesu Kiristaa, mi yii fiis kaytii ne ЕӢ woo na Й—u, Й—u Й“i cuuЙ“ ci ndaЕӢkiyaah na kanak ci (12) nik Й“ooЙ“iЕӢ Kooh, te Й—u pasarkohha ЕӢ adinaani. ЖҠu moЙ— jam e ? Kos ndengiЙ—
1.2: ЖҒaah ciЕӢ ngo, miskiЙ— nu Й—u min degu Й—ah, ambaat ne wa jam yakak nga Й—u ;
1.3: Й—u inah ne kosi Й—u kos hey markiskasse, na Й“i miskiЙ—, te miskiЙ— ceem ceЙ— na ndengЙ—ee Й—u.
1.4: Ini ndengЙ—eem na rimЙ—ee Й—u, joy joy kaЙ— po wa ree, nde Й—u nik Й“o' mitiЙ—, ali in haawsukuu nga Й—u.
1.5: Te Й“o' nga Й—u tas raak liiЙ“ohaaЙ— moЙ—iЙ— Й—ah, a kiimaat Kooh yi na one Й“ooЙ“i jen wa moЙ—oЙ— te a na lahtukeeЙ—i nga ; a hey Й—e wa one.
1.6: Waaye a kiimohaata kosohaaЙ— mitiЙ—, a raakuu hel kanak ЕӢ Kooh, laam Й“oyi na raake hel kanak ЕӢ Kooh, a mand na ginaah ciЕӢ cookmi puuЙ—si na meeЙ“e, faane.
1.7: ЖҒo' mand Й—aa, a kinaat liiЙ“ ne a hey rahse in ngaЕӢ HeЙ—i.
1.8: ЖҒoyeem, a Й“o' siisndiЙ—ohiЙ—, a minЙ—i oolku ЕӢ ali in ЕӢ in ci a na haЙ“Й—e.
1.9: ЖҒo' nu Й“aah nga Й“oo, te yaahiЕӢ Й—e rahsiЙ—Й—i finhooriЕӢ Й—e Й—ah, a neЙ“saat ЕӢ meeЙ“i Kooh meeЙ“ Й—e.
1.10: Te Й“oyi raak, a neЙ“saat ЕӢ ruhsiЙ—i Kooh ruhsiЙ— Й—e. A inhaat ne a hey seeye findi pos paangi na seeyohe.
1.11: Nohi dammba Й—ah, paangfi na suye suy, pos ci yaЙ—, moЙ— kiЕӢ ca coot. Wa mand Й—aa, Й“oyi raak na yaЙ—ohe Й—aa ЕӢ tiindЙ—ohaaЙ— ciЕӢ Й—e, a coot.
1.12: ЖҒoyi gen ndengЙ—ukee ЕӢ miskiЙ—, a neЙ“Й—iЙ— ! A hey pule nga na ndam, a rahas raayaani, weЙ— kipes ki Kooh gap Й“i waaЙ— Й—e.
1.13: ЖҒo' nu waaЙ—-waaЙ—iЕӢ Й—e Й“ek po a waaЙ— tum in moЙ—aaЙ—i Й—ah, a kinaat woo ne a Kooh na tumЙ—ukohee Й—e wa. In moЙ—aaЙ—i minЙ—i Й“ek Kooh ЕӢ in te Kooh ЕӢ haf ce na Й“ekeeЙ—i ali Й“o' ЕӢ in moЙ—aaЙ—i.
1.14: Waaye yaa nu nga Й—ah, a kiГұin kiЕӢ Й—a na nookee Й—a, wa yurhiЙ— Й—a ЕӢ ini fu waaЙ—.
1.15: WaaЙ—-waaЙ—i baahaaЙ—iineem weЙ— na nike rook, wa Й“asil bakaaЙ— ; bakaaЙ—eem weЙ— na kaЙ—e po wa yak, wa eЙ—oh kakaan.
1.16: ЖҠu Й“i Й“aah ciЕӢ ngo ЕӢ keeГұkoh, kinaat Й—al ЕӢ inii :
1.17: in baahiЙ— nu Й—u rahas na in mitiЙ— nu Й—u eЙ—u Й—ah, wa puloh Й—afki. Wa ruhsoh ЕӢ Baabi leer ci puloh nga Й—e, yi na leerЙ—eeЙ—i woti, kim a ГұuusiЙ— ; a na Й“oЖҙsukoheeЙ—i.
1.18: ЕҠ waaЙ—-waaЙ—iЕӢ Й—e, taambohha ЕӢ woo ki keeh ki, a tumiЙ— Й“oo kuЙ“uuciЕӢ Й—e, ne Й“oo nik waЙ—iЕӢ Й—e koc ЕӢ in ci a fer jen. SikЙ—uk woo kiЕӢ Kooh te fu pesoha
1.19: ЖҠu Й“i Й“aah ciЕӢ ngo ЕӢ keeГұkoh, inhaat inii : ЖҒo' nu nik ndengЙ—ukaat, a sikЙ—uke, a gaawuu woo te a yooЙ“uu ayruk.
1.20: Laam, Й“o' ayrukiЙ— na tumeeЙ—i in yurhiЙ— ЕӢ fiki Kooh.
1.21: WeЙ— tah, wolaat in ci hoolaaЙ—iici nik nga Й—u jen na aГұaand ki laayЙ—i. Te na eЙ—ef, Й—u teyЙ—uk woo ki Й“eku nga Й—u, weЙ— min Й—u muciЙ—.
1.22: Kinaat top ЕӢ sikЙ—ukiЕӢ Woo ki dong, ineem, wa ГұaaГұoh haf fu ; waaye pesohaata.
1.23: ЖҒoyi na sikЙ—uke Woo ki te a pesohuu wa, a mand na Й“oyi na seetnduke ;
1.24: a marak haf ce ЕӢ seetu po Жҙutta, a pulla, a jaarra alkoh findi a mand.
1.25: Waaye Й“oyi na marke ЕӢ waasi mit te wa faЙ—see ambuuЙ— ci, a ЕӢoЙ— nga, a sikЙ—ukuu wa ne a alkoha, waaye a pesohee wa, Й“oyeem hey barke'Й—asse ЕӢ in ci a na haЙ“Й—e jen.
1.26: ЖҒo' nu liiЙ“ ne a yi ЕӢ waas-Kooh, raak Й—e ambЙ—i nguЙ“iЕӢ Й—e Й—ah, a na ГұaaГұohe haf ce, te waas-KoohiЕӢ Й—e Й“arang Й“arang.
1.27: Waas-Koohi hool te wa raakЙ—i riiЙ“ ЕӢ fiki Kooh, yi Baabi, weЙ— ne fu taambkohee yaЙ—uuci na Й“itiЙ“ ci Жҙaar ciЕӢ Й“a kaan ЕӢ miskiЙ— ciЕӢ Й“a, te fu namee penduk in ci hoolaaЙ—iiciЕӢ Adina.

2.1: ЖҠu Й“i Й“aah ciЕӢ ngo, kosi Й—u kos Yeesu Kiristaa HeЙ— Й“oo yi raak kiyak, kinaata ambsoh na talsoh Й“o'.
2.2: ЖҒo' hayeen ЕӢ cohiЕӢ Й—u, a Й“ekuk kulЙ“a moЙ—iЙ— na jaaru urus ; Й“o' wiiriis ГұakiЙ— nam hay na daah ciЕӢ Й—e.
2.3: ЖҠu eЙ— cir Й“oyi na kulЙ“aaci moЙ—iЙ— ci, Й—u woo Й—e ne a Й“oofaat ЕӢ Й—isik baahiЙ— ; Й—u woo heЙ— daah ci ne a tufkaat wala a Й“oof ЕӢ kehЖҙi, ЕӢ kot ci.
2.4: ЖҠu tum ineem Й—ah, Й—u talsoh talsoh haa e ? Teemb ndeem, Й—u nikiЙ— atte'oh na liiЙ“ohaaЙ— moЙ—aaЙ—i'iЙ— !
2.5: ЖҒaah ciЕӢ ngo ЕӢ keeГұkoh, sikЙ—ukaat to. ЖҠu inhiЙ— baahiЙ— ne a Kooh tan ГұakiЙ— ciЕӢ Adina ne Й“a nik raakiЙ— ci ngaЕӢ kos, Й“a raak Й“ak ЕӢ Nguuri a gap Й“i waaЙ— Й—e.
2.6: Waaye Й—u, Й—u ruhsiЙ—iЙ— ГұakiЙ— ci ! ЖҠu hotЙ—i hotЙ—i ne e heЙ— raak-raak ci na torhiЙ—ee Й—u, Й“a Й“ayee Й—u waas ne Й—u ngela e ?
2.7: A Й“inde na riiЙ“Й—e tiiki moЙ—ohngaani Й—u eЙ—u ? E Й“eЙ— haa e ?
2.8: Fiis ci woyiЙ— ne : В« WaaЙ—a morom fu findi fu waaЙ—oh haf fu. В» Mbaa, Й—u taambЙ—oh waasiЕӢ Kooh, HeЙ— Nguuri, Й—aa Й—ah, Й—u haЙ“iЙ— in baahiЙ—.
2.9: Waaye Й—u talsohohee Й—ah, wa bakaaЙ— ; te waasi hey Й—u ambe findi Й“o' yurhaaЙ—i.
2.10: ЖҒo' nu taambiЙ— waasi, a Й—al nakoh yino dong nga Й—ah, a faЙ—iЙ—a jen.
2.11: Laam Yi woo ne : В« Kina njaaloo В», a yi nam woo ne : В« Kina ap Й“o'. В» Nik ne fu njaalooЙ—i na Й“itiЙ“ jaambur, waaye fu ap Й“o' Й—ah, fu Й—aliЙ— waasiЕӢ Kooh jen.
2.12: ЖҠu inhiЙ— ne Й—u hey atte'se ngaЕӢ waasi na faЙ—se ambuuЙ— ci. Kon, woyohaaЙ— ciЕӢ Й—u, na tumohaaЙ— ciЕӢ Й—u hunaat naa.
2.13: ЖҒo' nu yirmohЙ—i Й—ah, a yirmassanЙ—i ЕӢ atteeni ; laam, a yirim uupiЙ— atte hatil. Kos hun na tum
2.14: ЖҒaah ciЕӢ ngo, wa raak winde njiriГұ Й“o' woyee ne a kosiЙ— te kosiЕӢ Й—e hunЙ—i na tum ? ЖҠu liiЙ“iЙ— ne koseem miniЙ— Й—e muciЙ— e ?
2.15: Findi taambЙ—oh Жҙaar mbaa Й“itiЙ“, a Гұak Й“ekkaah, a raakuu kaГұam ki a etoh Kooh-nu-wiis ;
2.16: Й“o' nga Й—u woo Й—e ne : В« KaЙ—a na jam. Soosi faЙ—aat Й—a. MeeЙ—Й—a haf fu Гұam po fu kap. В» Raak Й—a paЖҙiЙ—Й—i Й—e ini a etoh Й—ah, wa raak winde njiriГұ ?
2.17: Kosi hunЙ—i na tum mand Й—aa ; wa kaaniЙ— sagu niki wa nik kiik wa.
2.18: Waaye, Й“o' miniЙ— woo morom ce ne : Fu raak kos-kos, ЕӢ raakka tum-tum. TeeЙ“ po kosiЕӢ Й—a wi hunЙ—i na tum, ЕӢ teeЙ“ Й—a kosiЕӢ ngo ЕӢ tum-tum.
2.19: Fu kosiЙ— ne Kooh yino ; ineem in baahiЙ—. Waaye jiiniici na baahaaЙ—iikiЕӢ ca sah kosiЙ—a po ca na saakЙ—ohe saakЙ—oh nga.
2.20: NaandЙ—i ! Andi fu waaЙ— teeЙ“u ne kosi hunЙ—i na tum raakЙ—i njiriГұ ?
2.21: Ini tah po Kooh ammba caac Й“oo Ibrahiima findi Й“o' yurhiЙ—, wa ina a tumee haa e ? E dega a dege kuЙ“kaЕӢ Й—e Isaahha ne a seeЖҙkoh Й—e haa e ?
2.22: Kon, fu hotiЙ— ne kosiЕӢ Й—e hunee na tum ! E ini a tumee tah kosaЕӢ Й—e mit.
2.23: ЕҠ ineem, ini Fiis ci woo raakka, an : В« Ibrahiima kossa Kooh, tahha po Kooh ammba Й—e findi Й“o' yurhiЙ— ; po a na Й“eeЙ—kohse nawle Kooh. В»
2.24: ЖҠu hotiЙ— nga, Kooh na ambe Й“o' findi yurhiЙ— ЕӢ in ci a na tume, kon wa ЕӢ kos dong haa.
2.25: Rahab toonkoha nak, ini tah po Kooh ammba Й—e findi Й“o' yurhiЙ—, wa ina a tumee haa e ? E Й—embЙ—a a Й—embЙ—ee Й“ooЙ“a Israayel ca tuuЖҙe, Жҙutta, a lahiЙ—ta Й“a ЕӢ waas wiiriis haa e ?
2.26: Findi faani raakЙ—i kiГұin kaanoh, kosi hunЙ—i na tum kaanoh Й—aa.

3.1: ЖҒaah ciЕӢ ngo, kinaat laay Й“i nikan jangЙ—ohoh ciЕӢ waasi ; Й—u inhiЙ— ne, e Й“oo Й“i jangЙ—ohoh ci raakan atteeni uupan misik.
3.2: Laam Й“oo jen, Й“oo laayiЙ— findi Й“oo na kafndukohe. ЖҒo' nu kafndukЙ—i ЕӢ woo ciЕӢ Й—e Й—ah, a Й“o' mitiЙ—, yi min amb cir ciЕӢ faaniЕӢ Й—e jen.
3.3: ЖҒoo na lahЙ“e panis ci ne ca teyЙ—ukiЙ— Й“oo, Й“oo min ca yurhiЙ— na faaniЕӢ ca jen ЕӢ Й—isik nu neЙ“ Й“oo.
3.4: Namaat marak batooci . Ini caa yake, te puuЙ—is yakak yeГұee ca jen, wa guweernaay Жҙissuut weЙ— na tahe Й“i na nupЙ—ee ca yurhiЙ— ca Й—isik nu neЙ“ Й“a.
3.5: PeЙ—eem mand Й—aa, wa cir Жҙissuut ЕӢ faan, waaye wa na tipaahke ngaЕӢ Й“i in yakak. Markaat findi melem nduuЖҙ Жҙissuutoh, wa miniЙ— hoomiЙ— nduuf yakak.
3.6: PeЙ—eem, wa yongkaah. Fu maraka ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ cir ci Й—ah, wa Adina riifiЙ— na in baahaaЙ—i. WeЙ— na kaЙ“e faani jen in baahaaЙ—i, wa doh kipes ki jen. WeЙ— ЕӢ haf wa, wa kaЙ“oh ЕӢ yongkaaha yakka.
3.7: Heet ciЕӢ Й—oopaat ci jen, ca miniЙ— koЙ—u, ci na tiinde, na sel ci na ci na faske ЕӢ kehЖҙi, na ciЕӢ cookmi, ca jen ca miniЙ— koЙ—u te Й“o' na koЙ—ee ca.
3.8: Waaye, ali Й“o' minЙ—i koЙ— peЙ—eem ; wa njaajaani Й“o' minЙ—i amb, wa riifiЙ— na daЕӢari na ape.
3.9: WeЙ— Й“oo na yakЙ—ohe HeЙ— Й“oo Kooh, Baabi ; Й“oo namee wa kiimЙ—oh moЙ—aaЙ—i Й“ooЙ“i Kooh fer ЕӢ mandohaaЙ—iЕӢ Й—e.
3.10: Moo nguЙ“i yino yakЙ—ohe, yonjohe e ? Ineem joyЙ—i nikoh Й—aa, Й“aah ciЕӢ ngo !
3.11: Cul yino miniЙ— pulЙ—e masuЙ“ hooliЙ— na masuЙ“ aayiЙ— e ?
3.12: ЖҒaah ciЕӢ ngo, ndun miniЙ— rim oliiw e ? Wala reseГұ miniЙ— rim ndun ? Naac jemiЙ— namЙ—i min puliЙ— masuЙ“ neЙ“iЙ— ! LiiЙ“ohaaЙ—i moЙ—iЙ—i puloh ЕӢ Kooh
3.13: Ya Й“a raak liiЙ“ohaaЙ— moЙ—iЙ— nga Й—u, a Гұaannja ? A teeЙ“ohaata na pesohaaЙ— moЙ—iЙ— ; tumohaaЙ— ciЕӢ Й—e hunaat na eЙ—ef na liiЙ“ohaaЙ— moЙ—iЙ—.
3.14: Waaye Й“o' nga Й—u, a hot Й“o' na in, a minЙ—i wa raak, a raak aay-keeГұ nga, wala a nik Й“oyi waaЙ— ne a yi dong raakan, Й“oyeem, a kinaat yaksiЙ—uk nga ; a yaksiЙ—uk nga Й—ah, a nikЙ—i ЕӢ keeh.
3.15: LiiЙ“ohaaЙ—eem pulohЙ—i Й—afki. Wa inaa Adina, inaa Й“o', inaa jiini.
3.16: ЖҠisik nu mandohaaЙ— ceem nik Й—ah, wa hey raake mbalay na tumohaaЙ— moЙ—aaЙ—i nu nik.
3.17: ЕҠ ini kaЙ— ЕӢ liiЙ“ohaaЙ—i moЙ—iЙ—i puloh Й—afki, wa hooliЙ—, wa waaЙ—iЙ— jam, wa soosiЙ—, wa huniЙ— na rangsuk, wa riifiЙ— na yirmoh te wa na rime in baahiЙ—. Wa raakЙ—i langЙ—oh, wa raakЙ—i naafeeha.
3.18: Waas yurhiЙ—, e sokoh jam ci na sokee wa ЕӢ jam.

4.1: Wa ye Й“ek lahtoh ci na hiГұoh ci ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ Й—u ? E waaЙ—-waaЙ— ci na hiГұohe ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ cir ciЕӢ faan ciЕӢ Й—u haa e ?
4.2: ЖҠu na waaЙ—e in, Й—u raakuu wa, Й—u boomoh. ЖҠu hot Й“o' na in, Й—u minuu wa raak, Й—u lahtohe, Й—u hiГұohe. ЖҠu na kiimeeЙ—i Kooh, weЙ— tah Й—u raakЙ—i.
4.3: Ali Й—u kiim sah, Й—u rahsanЙ—i, laam kiimiЕӢ Й—u baahЙ—i. ЖҠu na kiime ne Й—u taambiЙ— waaЙ—-waaЙ— ciЕӢ Й—u.
4.4: Njaalo'oh ci Й—u nikoh ! ЖҠu inahЙ—i ne Й“o' nu waaЙ— Adina Й—ah, a sangiЙ— Kooh e ? Te Й“o' nu waaЙ— nawle'koh na Adina Й—ah, a sangiЙ—iЕӢ Kooh.
4.5: ЖҠu liiЙ“iЙ— ne ini Fiis ci woo, wa Й—i ЕӢ Й“arngi e ? Ne : В« Kooh waaЙ—iЙ— ruuhi a geniЙ— nga Й“oo te a fiiriЙ— nga lool. В»
4.6: Waaye a baah kiЕӢ Й—e weЙ— uup. Ineem, wa hunnda na ini Fiis ci woo ne : В« Kooh hunЙ—i na yaksiЙ—koh ci, Й“i ruhsiЙ— haf Й“a, Й“eЙ— a na teeЙ“e baah kiЕӢ Й—e. В»
4.7: Mbaa Гұaamkaat Kooh. NdengsiЙ—kohaat na Seytaani, a hey saandohe po a us Й—u.
4.8: ReЙ“gaat Kooh, a hey Й—u reЙ“ge. ЖҠu Й“i bakaaЙ—oh ci, siisndiЙ—ohiЙ— ci Й—u nikoh, Й“ohГұukaat te Й—u hooliЙ— keeГұ ciЕӢ Й—u.
4.9: MiskiЙ—kaat, nikaat ЕӢ ruy, rooyaat ! Жіen ciЕӢ Й—u Й“oЖҙsukaat muhun, sumi Й—u sum nik tiis.
4.10: RuhsiЙ—aat haf Й—u ЕӢ fiki HeЙ—i, a hey Й—u meeЙ“e. Woo ЕӢ Й“o'
4.11: ЖҒaah ciЕӢ ngo, kanaat Й“oofoh morom Й—u. ЖҒo' nu woo in moЙ—aaЙ—i ЕӢ morom ce wala a attee Й—e Й—ah, woo keem, a woo wa waasiЕӢ Kooh, te atteeneem, a attee wa waasiЕӢ Kooh. ЕҠ ineem, a tum haf ce atte'oh waasi, te a joya joy taambiЙ—.
4.12: A yino na tufkiЙ—e waas a atte'e. A yi dong min mucЙ—oh, a yi min Й—umboh. Kon fu yi na atte'e morom fu, yaf Й“a ? YaksiЙ—uk
4.13: SikЙ—ukaat Й—u Й“i na woye ne : В« Woti wala kim, Й“oo hey kee kur nangam, Й“oo tum nga kiis, Й“oo toontuk, Й“oo raak kopor. В»
4.14: ЖҠu inah inah kimiЕӢ Й—u findi wa moocohan e ? Kipes kiЕӢ Й—u ye ? ЖҠu mand na maari na pule, wa maaГұuu, wa coot.
4.15: Inii kay weЙ— Й—u joy woo : В« Wa neЙ“ HeЙ—i Й—ah, Й“oo hey pese, Й“oo haЙ“iЙ— inii wala wii. В»
4.16: Waaye Й—u Й“ii yaksiЙ—uk ЕӢ yegi Й—u yeg haf Й—u te yaksiЙ—uk mand Й—aa baahЙ—i.
4.17: Mbaa Й“oyi inah ini baahiЙ—i a joy haЙ“iЙ—, a haЙ“iЙ—Й—aa Й—ah, a bakaaЙ—iЙ—.

5.1: ЖҠiski wa nik sikЙ—ukaat to, Й—u Й“i heЙ— raak-raak ci ! FuЙ—aat ! Wililkaat sagu moЙ—aaЙ—iici rahsan Й—u !
5.2: Raak-raakiЕӢ Й—u nopiЙ— ! KulЙ“aaciЕӢ Й—u cangndiЙ— !
5.3: UrsiЕӢ Й—u na haalsiЕӢ Й—u hoyiЙ—, te hoyi ca hoy weЙ— teeЙ“ohan Й—u ! Hoyeem hey ambe faan ciЕӢ Й—u po wa Гұam ca findi yongkaah. ЖҠu Й“ii nangЙ—oh raak-raak te Й“oo Й“eЙ—Й—i ngaЕӢ reehiЕӢ Adina.
5.4: ЖҠu sangiЙ— wirind pangkoh ci na nguЙ—Й—ee Й—u yohon ciЕӢ Й—u. SikЙ—ukaat wirndeem ! Wa leehkiЙ—, te leehuk ciЕӢ nguЙ—oh ceem reyiЙ— ЕӢ nof ciЕӢ Kooh, HeЙ— malaakaaci.
5.5: ЕҠ kehЖҙi, Й—u na pesohe neЙ“iЙ— na moЙ—iЙ—, Й—u na yafalke yafaluk haa Й—oopti na sekЙ—ohse mbehi a hoosohsan.
5.6: ЖҠu na ambe amb Й“oyi yurah, Й—u ap Й—e, te a na ndengsiЙ—koheeЙ—i na Й—u. Min muГұ
5.7: ЖҒaah ciЕӢ ngo, muГұaat, Й—u sekee po HeЙ—i hayis. Markaat ЕӢ guurohi findi a na muГұohe, a sekee nguЙ— ci a oolkoh, ЕӢ toЙ“ ci koc po ЕӢ ci mirndoh.
5.8: Namaat min sek te Й—u ndengЙ—uk ; hayisiЕӢ HeЙ—i mand na reyiЙ—.
5.9: ЖҒaah ciЕӢ ngo, ali Й“o' kanaat lahtuk ЕӢ morom ce wala Й—u hey atte'se ; atte'ohi a yi ЕӢ yahndeeri.
5.10: Ini kaЙ— ЕӢ miskiЙ— ci na min muГұ, markaat ЕӢ woosuuЙ— ci woyee ЕӢ tiikiЕӢ HeЙ—i.
5.11: ЖҒi genee ndengЙ—uk, Й“eЙ— Й“oo amb ne Й“a neЙ“Й—iЙ—. ЖҠu kerhiЙ— findi AyooЙ“a genohee ndengЙ—uk, na ini HeЙ—i on Й—e ЕӢ mirndaani. HeЙ—i riifiЙ— na baah na yirmoh. Ini nik ЕӢ kiim Kooh
5.12: ЖҒaah ciЕӢ ngo, kanaat giГұ muk ngaЕӢ Eel ci wala ngaЕӢ kehЖҙi wala ngaЕӢ in wiiriis nu wa min nikoh Й—ah. ЖҠu woo "ee" Й—ah, wa nikaat "ee" te Й—u woo "a'aa" Й—ah, wa nikaat "a'aa" ; ne Kooh atte'uu Й—u.
5.13: ЖҒo' nga Й—u nik ЕӢ miskiЙ— Й—ah, a kiimaat Kooh. ЖҒo' sum Й—ah, a Жҙeekaat Kooh.
5.14: ЖҒo' nga Й—u kosaay Й—ah, a Й“eeЙ—kaat yakak ci adgoh Й—u, Й“a kiimiЙ— Й—e Kooh, Й“a ambsoha na reefiЙ— Й—e diw ЕӢ tiikiЕӢ HeЙ—i.
5.15: Kiimi Й“a kiiman na kos hey Й—e mucЙ—e. HeЙ—i hey Й—e kurkiЙ—e. Wa raak Й—e raakiЙ— bakaaЙ— Й—ah, HeЙ—i hey Й—e Й—aase.
5.16: Mbaa, woytiЙ—ohaat bakaaЙ— ciЕӢ Й—u ЕӢ harmban Й—u, te yaa nu nga kiimЙ—ee morom ce Kooh ne Й—u min wir. Kiim Й“o' yurhiЙ— raakiЙ— hatil lool.
5.17: Ilyas nikee Й“o' findi Й“oo, a kiimmba na hatil ne wa kanaat toЙ“. MasuЙ“ keenЙ—i ЕӢ kehЖҙi ini ree kiis kaahay na camban.
5.18: Жіutta a kiimissa ne wa toЙ“. Wa toЙ“pa, kehЖҙi eЙ—ohha in.
5.19: ЖҒaah ciЕӢ ngo, Й“o' nga Й—u muuЖҙ, a us keeh ki ; Й“o' wiiriis dokin Й—e nga Й—ah,
5.20: inhaat ne a mucЙ—iЙ— kiГұin kiЕӢ Й“oyeem te bakaaЙ— laayiЙ— hey ulse saguuce.

1.1: Mi yii kaГұiЙ— Й—u, mi yi Piyeer, ApootariЕӢ Yeesu Kiristaa. Mi yii fiis Й—u kaytii, Й—u Й“i Kooh kooЙ— te Й—u pesee findi hanhe, ЕӢ pasarkohi Й—u pasarkoh ЕӢ kur ciЕӢ Pontos na Galaat na Kapados na Asi na Bitini.
1.2: Kooh Baabi kooЙ—iЙ— Й—u ЕӢ findi a inhohee in ci bala ca hayan Й—ah, ЕӢ hoolЙ—i FuuЙ—si Hoolohngaani hooliЙ— Й—u. A kooЙ—iЙ— Й—u ne Й—u kerhiЙ— Yeesu Kiristaa te Й—u lisu Гұif miЕӢ Й—e. Baahohsaat, Й—u onu jam te wa Й“aatkee Й“aatuk ! Ini Й“oo yaakaar minЙ—i yahuk
1.3: Kooh yakЙ—aah, KoohiЕӢ HeЙ— Й“oo Yeesu Kiristaa, a nammba nik BaabiЕӢ Й—e. ЕҠ miski Й“oo misik Й—e keeh-keeh, a tumiЙ— po Й“oo rimkissiЙ—, a onnda Й“oo yaakaari na pese taamboh ЕӢ hultiЕӢ Yeesu Kiristaa.
1.4: In ci a gap Й“oo minЙ—i yahuk, ca soЙ“e'anЙ—i te moЙ—kiЕӢ ca minЙ—i coot, Й—u Й—aakЙ—uuЙ— ca ЕӢ Eel ci.
1.5: Te Й—u sah, Kooh a yii niiЙ— Й—u na hatiliЕӢ Й—e taamboh ЕӢ kosi Й—u kos ne Й—u raak muc. Muceem ЖҙutiЙ— ne a teeЙ“oha ЕӢ jamanooni mirndoh.
1.6: Ineem weЙ— tah Й—u riifiЙ— na sum, ali nik ne sah Й“i neeh ceЙ—Й—i, Й—u Й“ii ЕӢ miskiЙ—, a Kooh na markiskee Й—u, markiskohaaЙ— nu nik.
1.7: MiskiЙ— ceem na hee teeЙ“ohe ne kosiЕӢ Й—u koceet, findi koceetiЕӢ ursi na markohse ngaЕӢ yongkaah. Te urus na geneeЙ—i, a kosiЕӢ Й—u uupa fuuf. WeЙ— tah Yeesu Kiristaa teeЙ“ohuk Й—ah, Kooh hey Й—u Й—aape, a yakiЙ— Й—u, a meeЙ“ Й—u.
1.8: Yeesu, Й—u hotЙ—i Й—e te moona Й—u waaЙ—iЙ— Й—e. ЖҠiski wa nik, ali nik ne Й—u hotЙ—i Й—e sah, Й—u kosiЙ— Й—e, Й—u sumoh na sumoh, Й—u sumiЙ— sumi nguЙ“ minЙ—i woo, Й—u sumiЙ— po Й—u minisЙ—i sum.
1.9: ЖҠu Й“ii rahas Жҙin Жҙin muci kosiЕӢ Й—u mirndohan Й—u on. WoosuuЙ— ci na muci
1.10: Ini kaЙ— ЕӢ muceem, woosuuЙ— ci Й—eЙ“gaan markiЙ—a, markissaa baahiЙ— wi Й“a yegЙ—ohee baahohi Kooh baahohan Й—u.
1.11: ЖҒa markiЙ—a ne Й“a inah ina wala jamanoona FuuЙ—siЕӢ Kiristaani nikee nga Й“a woyoh na Й“a. A woyee na Й“a ЕӢ in ci na haye, ini kaЙ— miskiЙ— ciЕӢ Kiristaani na yaki a yakan ЕӢ finho miskiЙ— ceem.
1.12: ЖҒa teeЙ“uuЙ— ne wa nikee wuu Й“a ЕӢ haf Й“a haa, waaye wuu Й—u. Te Й—iski wa nik, in ceem, a FuuЙ—si Hoolohngaani woosohu Eel ci woo Й—u ca, taamboh ЕӢ Й“i yegЙ—ohee muci. Malaakaaci sah waaЙ—iЙ— ca marak keeh-keeh po inah. Kipes hooliЙ— wuu Kooh
1.13: Kon tokЙ—ukaat, Й—u yun hel ciЕӢ Й—u. OolkiЕӢ Й—u jen nikaat ЕӢ baahohi Й—u baahohsan mbeha Yeesu Kiristaa teeЙ“ohkan.
1.14: Findi kuЙ“uuci kerhiЙ— Й“i rim Й“a, kinaat taambiЙ— waaЙ—-waaЙ— ci Й—u raakee wotЙ“a wa Й—u inahЙ—i Kiristaani ;
1.15: waaye hoolaat ЕӢ tumohaaЙ— ciЕӢ Й—u jen findi Yi Й“eeЙ—uk Й—u hooloh,
1.16: wa fiisuuЙ— ne : В« ЖҠu joy joy hool, laam, mi, ЕӢ hooliЙ—. В»
1.17: Kooh, a yi na atte'e Й“ooЙ“i jen, yaa nu nga ЕӢ tumohaaЙ— ciЕӢ Й—e, te wa raakЙ—i talsoh. Te nik ne Kooh yeem, a yi Й—u na Й“eeЙ—ke Baab ne Й—u kiimee Й—e Й—ah, nupaat Й—e ЕӢ jamanooni Й—u nikoh hanhe ЕӢ kehЖҙi.
1.18: ЖҠu inhiЙ— ne ini tos Й—u ЕӢ pesohaaЙ—i raakaaЙ—i njirГұi Й—u lamoh ЕӢ caac ciЕӢ Й—u, wa ini na reehe findi haalis wala urus haa.
1.19: Waaye Й—u tosohu Гұif miЕӢ Kiristaani wi uupiЙ— njiriГұ fuuf, wa mand na Гұif miЕӢ mbaali raakaaЙ—i sikka wala haawsuk.
1.20: Kooh inheen Й—e bala Adina fersan, te a teeЙ“ohiЙ— Й—e ЕӢ mirndaaniЕӢ jamanooni saguuЙ—u.
1.21: ЖҠu, Й—u kosiЙ— Kooh taamboh nga Й—e, Kooh yi hultiЙ— Й—e, yakiЙ—ta Й—e ne kosiЕӢ Й—u na yaakaariЕӢ Й—u gaЖҙuk ЕӢ Kooh.
1.22: ЖҠu kerhiЙ—iЙ— keeh ki po Й—u hoolЙ—iЙ— haf Й—u ne Й—u waaЙ—oh waaЙ—ohi hunЙ—i na naafeeha, Й—iski wa nik, waaЙ—tiЙ—ohaat waaЙ—tiЙ—oh keeh-keeh na keeГұ hooliЙ—.
1.23: Laam Й—u rimkissiЙ—, te Й—u rimukЙ—i ЕӢ Й“oyi na kaane, Й—u puloh ЕӢ tisohi na yahkeeЙ—i, woo kiЕӢ Kooh, wi na pese te wa genan gen.
1.24: Fiis ci woyiЙ— ne : В« ЖҒo', a paangi, yaki a yak jen, wa pos paangi ; paangi na suye suy posi yaЙ—,
1.25: waaye woo kiЕӢ HeЙ—i risan ris po faw. В» Te woo keem weЙ— YegЙ—ohiЕӢ Muci Й—u woyu.

2.1: Kon saЙ“sukohaat na in nu nik aГұaand wala ГұaaГұoh, naafeeha, siis wala Й—ooЙ“oh Й—ah.
2.2: Findi komaakci han rimu na waaЙ—ohe miis koceet, waaЙ—ohaat Й—aa woo kiЕӢ Kooh, weЙ— min Й—u hooЙ—iЙ— po ЕӢ muca.
2.3: Laam Й—u ЖҙoohiЙ— po Й—u inhiЙ— findi HeЙ—i baahoh . Atoh fi amb taЙ“ahi
2.4: ReЙ“aat ЕӢ HeЙ—i, a yi atoh fi na pese. Wa keeh ne Й“ooЙ“i mbet Й—e mbet, waaye Kooh kooЙ—iЙ— Й—e, te a waaЙ—aah keeh-keeh nga Й—e.
2.5: ЖҠu ЕӢ haf Й—u, findi atoh ci na pese, nikaat atoh taЙ“ahoha kahan Kooh. ЖҠu nik cuuЙ“ seeЖҙkiЙ—oh hooliЙ— wuu ce, ne Й—u seeЖҙkee Й—e na in ci baahiЙ— ci FuuЙ—si Hoolohngaani na tumЙ—ukohee Й—u. Ca nik seeЖҙuk ci neЙ“ Й—e taamboh ЕӢ Yeesu Kiristaa.
2.6: Laam inii weЙ— Fiis ci woo : В« Mi yii yip atoh fi amb taЙ“ahi ngaЕӢ Siyong. Wa atoh fi ЕӢ kooЙ—, atoh waaЙ—aah keeh-keeh, te yaa nu taЙ“ah kosiЕӢ Й—e nga Й—ah, a kaci'anЙ—i nga muk. В»
2.7: Kon, ini kaЙ— nga Й—u, Й—u Й“i kosiЙ— ci, atoh feem waaЙ—aah lool. Waaye ЕӢ ini kaЙ— ЕӢ kosaaЙ—iici, Fiis ci woo ne : В« Atoh fi taЙ“ahoh ci mbete mirndohiЙ— nik atoh fi amb taЙ“ahi. В»
2.8: Te ЕӢ Fiis ci poyi wa В« atoh fi na kafndohe, folohe. В» KosaaЙ—iici Й“a Й—ii kafnduk ЕӢ atoh feem, laam Й“a teyЙ—ukЙ—i woo kiЕӢ Kooh. Ineem weЙ— ini joyee Й“a rahas.
2.9: Waaye Й—u nak, Й—u cuuЙ“ kooЙ—uuЙ—, cuuЙ“ seeЖҙkiЙ—oh wuu Kooh Buuri, cuuЙ“ hooliЙ— wuu ce, cuuЙ“i a raakoot. ЖҠu nikiЙ— in ceem ne Й—u yegЙ—oh in ci moЙ—ohngaan ci a haЙ“iЙ—. A yi Й“eeЙ—uk Й—u, Й—u pulla ЕӢ Гұuusi, Й—u hayya ЕӢ siГұaariЕӢ Й—e moЙ—ohngaani.
2.10: WotЙ“a, Й—u nikeeЙ—i cuuЙ“, waaye woti, Й—u cuuЙ“iЕӢ Kooh, wotЙ“a, Й—u rahseeЙ—i yirmohiЕӢ Й—e, waaye woti, Й—u rahsiЙ—a. Pes findi kosiЙ— ЕӢ Adina
2.11: ЖҒaah ciЕӢ ngo ЕӢ keeГұkoh, Й—u Й“i genohaah findi hanhe ЕӢ kehЖҙi, mi yii Гұaah Й—u, ne Й—u wortuk taambiЙ— in ci neЙ“ kiГұin ciЕӢ Й—u, ci na hiГұohe na ini nik nga Й—u.
2.12: Raakaat pesohaaЙ— moЙ—iЙ— ЕӢ harmban kosaaЙ—iici, ne Й“a yambee Й—u ne Й—u tumoh moЙ—aaЙ—i Й—ah, Й“a hot tumohaaЙ— ciЕӢ Й—u moЙ—iЙ— ci te Й“a yakiЙ— Kooh ЕӢ mbehi a hayohan na hatil.
2.13: TeyЙ—ukaat kikilifa nu nik, sagu HeЙ—i, teyЙ—ukЙ—aat buuri yakkiЕӢ Rom, yi adgoh kur ki,
2.14: na goornoor ci a na tuuЖҙe ne Й“a kuЖҙis tumoh moЙ—aaЙ—iici, Й“a Й—aap tumoh baahiЙ— ci.
2.15: Laam, ineem weЙ— Kooh waaЙ—, Й—u tumee in baahiЙ— ne Й—u rang nguЙ“ ciЕӢ naandiЙ— ci na woye sagu inhaaЙ—i.
2.16: ЖҠu tumohan Й—aa findi Й“oyi raak haf ce, te kinaat Й—asЙ—uk ЕӢ raaki Й—u raak haf Й—u, Й—u tumee in baahaaЙ—i, waaye tumaat findi Й“oyi na Гұaamke Kooh.
2.17: EЙ—aat Й“ooЙ“i jen cir, Й—u waaЙ— mboolndiЕӢ kosiЙ— ci, Й—u nup Kooh, Й—u eЙ— buuri cir. MuГұ miskiЙ— ci findi Kiristaani
2.18: ЖҠu Й“i Гұaam ci, kerhiЙ—aat heЙ— ciЕӢ Й—u, Й—u eЙ— Й“a cir keeh-keeh. ЕҠ wooЙ—i Й“i baah, te Й“a soossa dong, waaye kerhiЙ—aat sah aГұaandiЙ— ci.
2.19: Laam a tum in baahiЙ—, Й“oyi na muГұe miskiЙ— ci a yeyyooЙ—i, te Kooh dong tah.
2.20: A raak wi nde ndam nga, Й“oyi muГұ laЙ“ sagu tum ini lahЙ—i waas ? Waaye Й—u muГұee miskiЙ— ci, raak Й—u tum baahiЙ— Й—ah, Й—u tum in baahiЙ— ЕӢ fiki Kooh.
2.21: Te Kooh Й“eeЙ—uk Й—u ЕӢ ineem, laam Kiristaani ЕӢ haf ce, a nameen raak miskiЙ— wuu Й—u, a faЙ—iЙ—ta Й—u taambЙ—aah, ne Й—u taamb ЕӢ kot ciЕӢ Й—e.
2.22: A moosЙ—i tum ali bakaaЙ—, te woo ГұaaГұoh moosЙ—i puloh ЕӢ nguЙ“iЕӢ Й—e .
2.23: A Й“asuusa Й—ah, a na wirndukeeЙ—i. A deguusa miskiЙ— Й—ah, a na gapkoheeЙ—i, waaye a na wike haf ce ЕӢ yaah ciЕӢ Atte'ohi yurhiЙ—i.
2.24: A yi ЕӢ haf ce, a yi gaduk bakaaЙ— ciЕӢ Й“oo ЕӢ faaniЕӢ Й—e ЕӢ daaЖҙa a daaЖҙu ЕӢ kurwaana ne Й“oo reehЙ—ukoh na bakaaЙ—, aas ЕӢ kipes yurhiЙ—. E gaaГұ ciЕӢ Й—e wiriЙ— Й—u.
2.25: Laam Й—u muuЖҙee muuЖҙ findi mbaal, waaye Й—iski wa nik Й—u dokkiЙ— ЕӢ niiЙ—ohi na niiЙ—ee Й—u.

3.1: ЖҒitiЙ“ ci, namaat teyЙ—ukiЙ— Жҙaar ciЕӢ Й—u. Wa raak ЕӢ Жҙaar ceem Й“i sang kos woo kiЕӢ Kooh Й—ah, mandohaaЙ—iЕӢ Й—u miniЙ— tah po Й“a kos, te wa etohanЙ—i sah, Й—u woyee na Й“a nga.
3.2: ЕҠ ineem, Й“a hey hote findi Й—u eЙ—oh Й“a cir, na findi Й—u na pesohe pes hooliЙ—.
3.3: KimoЙ— kiЕӢ Й—u kinaat nik ЕӢ ini min hotuk dong, maanaam ЕӢ maaruk, wala tokkaah urus, wala Й“ekuk kulЙ“a moЙ—iЙ—.
3.4: Waaye wa joy nik ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙi, ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ keeГұi ; wa nik wiЕӢ keeГұ moЙ—iЙ—, yeeЙ“kiЙ—. KimoЙ— mand Й—aa, weЙ— raak candoom keeh-keeh ЕӢ fiki Kooh te wa na yahkeeЙ—i.
3.5: ЖҠeЙ“gaan, Й“itiЙ“ ci hooliЙ— ci oolkee Kooh ЕӢ in ci a gapohee, meeЙ— haЙ“Й—ukoh Й—aa, Й“a teyЙ—ukЙ—een Жҙaar ciЕӢ Й“a,
3.6: findi Saarata kerhiЙ—ohee Ibrahiima te a Й“eeЙ—kohee Й—e heЙ— ce. ЖҠu kuЙ“uuciЕӢ Й—e ne Й—u tumee baahiЙ— te Й—u neЖҙЖҙohЙ—i ali in nga Й—ah.
3.7: ЖҠu Й“i Жҙaar ci, yaa nu nga Й—u Й—ah namaat liiЙ“ baahiЙ— ЕӢ findi a na pesohe na Й“itiice, fu inah ne hatiliЕӢ Й“itiifu hendЙ—i na wiЕӢ Й—a. EЙ—a Й—e cir laam a hey name Й“aah ЕӢ findiifu ЕӢ kipes ki Й“oo baahohsan. Tumohaat Й—aa ne kiim ciЕӢ Й—u Kooh nikuu teyЙ—uksaaЙ—i. Tum baahiЙ—
3.8: Kon book, Й—u jen Й“aahaat liiЙ“ohaaЙ—, Й—u Й“aahee ini neЙ“ Й—u na wi misik Й—u, Й—u waaЙ—tiЙ—oh findi Й“ooЙ“i Й“aah yaay na baab, Й“ooЙ“i miskaat Й—u, te Й—u ruhsiЙ— haf ciЕӢ Й—u.
3.9: ЖҒo' tum Й—u miskiЙ— wala Й“a Й“as Й—u Й—ah, kinaat wirnduk. KiimЙ—aat Й“a barke, laam, Kooh Й“eeЙ—uk Й—u ne Й—u tumohee Й—aa, Й—u rahsee barke.
3.10: Laam, Fiis ci woo ne : В« ЖҒo' nu waaЙ— raak kipes mitiЙ— na mbeh neЙ“iЙ— Й—ah, a niiЙ—aat nguЙ“iЕӢ Й—e ЕӢ woo moЙ—aaЙ—i, po ali lee taambuu ЕӢ njootoot ciЕӢ Й—e.
3.11: A us baahaaЙ—i, a tumee baahiЙ— ; a waakaat jam te a tiindee jam.
3.12: Laam has ciЕӢ HeЙ—i ca Й—ii ЕӢ yurhiЙ— ci, te a naar nof ЕӢ kiim ciЕӢ Й“a. Waaye tumoh moЙ—aaЙ—iici, HeЙ—i na ГұuusЙ—ukee Й“a ГұuusЙ—uk. В» Tufuk ne seede ini fu oolkoh
3.13: Te sah, yaa tuman Й—u miskiЙ— ne Й—u sawar ЕӢ tum baahiЙ— Й—ah ?

3.15: Waaye ambaat ЕӢ keeГұ ciЕӢ Й—u ne Kiristaani a yi hool wuu Kooh, te a yi HeЙ—i ; te Й“ooЙ“i meekis Й—u ЕӢ oolki Й—u ooluk in ciЕӢ Kooh na haye Й—ah, tufkaat ne Й—u lof Й“a.
3.16: Waaye lofaat Й“a na eЙ—ef, wa hun na cir, hunaat na hel daliЙ— po Й—u yambsee tumoh moЙ—aaЙ—i Й—ah, Й“ooЙ“i na yambee Й—u hot tumohaaЙ— ciЕӢ Й—u baahiЙ— ci Й—u raak ЕӢ Kiristaani, Й“a kaci.
3.17: Laam, kooЙ—oh miskiЙ— ngaЕӢ tum in baahiЙ—, nik ne weЙ— waaЙ—-waaЙ—iЕӢ Kooh Й—ah, weЙ— ngisoh kooЙ—oh miskiЙ— ЕӢ tum in baahaaЙ—i. NdamiЕӢ Kiristaani
3.18: Kiristaani namiЙ— raak miskiЙ— waas yino po faw wuu Й—aasuukiЕӢ bakaaЙ— ci. A YurhiЙ—i kaan wuu yurhaaЙ—iici, ne a Й“ay Й—u ЕӢ Kooh. A apuuЙ— ЕӢ kipes kiЕӢ faaniЕӢ Й—e waaye a pesЙ—uuЙ— ЕӢ kipes ki hun na FuuЙ—si Hoolohngaani.
3.19: WeЙ— a kaЙ—oh yegЙ—oha ЕӢ ruuh ca taЖҙu ЕӢ kaso.

3.21: Wa nikee ГұaamaariЕӢ Й“oktuki woti, wi Й“oo na rahse, Й“oo muc, wa na nihse riiЙ“ faan haa, waaye wa teyЙ—uk Й“eeЙ—kohiЕӢ Kooh na hel daliЙ— . Wa muciЙ— Й—u taamboh ЕӢ hultiЕӢ Yeesu Kiristaa.

4.1: Kon, Kiristaani degseen miskiЙ— ЕӢ faaniЕӢ Й—e. Mbaa Й—u nak, ganaaykohaat liiЙ“ohaaЙ—eem, laam, Й“o' nu degu miskiЙ— ЕӢ faaniЕӢ Й—e Й—ah, a reehЙ—ukohiЙ— na bakaaЙ—.

4.3: Ee di', Й—eЙ“gaan, Й—u tumee ini neЙ“ kosaaЙ—iici. ЖҠu meeЙ— meeЙ— cakaay, Й—u taambЙ—ee kiГұin ciЕӢ Й—u, Й—u laaree, Й—u mbuumbaayee na biiГұ laayiЙ—, Й—u ГұaamkeeЙ—a kooh ci nikaaЙ—iici Гұaamuk siЙ“aah. ЖҠu maannja nga lool ; Й—iski wa nik, wa doyiЙ—.
4.4: KosaaЙ—iici feyuuЙ— ЕӢ ini Й—u seeskisЙ—i hun na Й“a ЕӢ cakaayi miskiЙ—eem, Й“eЙ—i Й“as Й—u.

4.7: ReehiЕӢ in ci jen reЙ“iЙ—. Kon hunaat na sagoociЕӢ Й—u te Й—u yunuk ne Й—u min kiim Kooh.

4.9: Yaa nu nga Й—ah dalЙ—aat morom ce baahiЙ— ЕӢ kahan ce te wa hunuu na woo Жҙin-Жҙin.

4.11: Yaa nu Kooh on min woo ЕӢ tiikiЕӢ Й—e Й—ah, a woyaat ini Kooh woo. Yaa nu Kooh on a taambkohee Й“o' Й—ah, a taambkohaat Й—e na hatili Kooh eЙ— Й—e. ЕҠ ineem, Kooh yakЙ—u ЕӢ in ci jen, taamboh ЕӢ Yeesu Kiristaa, yi HeЙ— kiyak na hatil, te wa genan gen po faw. Amiin ! ЖҒaah ЕӢ miskiЙ— ciЕӢ Kiristaani
4.12: ЖҒaah ciЕӢ ngo ЕӢ keeГұkoh, kinaat feyu ЕӢ yongkaahi Й—u nikoh ne wa markis Й—u, kinaata amboh in feyohiЙ—.

4.14: ЖҠu Й“asu sagu tiikiЕӢ Kiristaani Й—ah, Й—u neЙ“Й—iЙ—, laam FuuЙ—si yaki, FuuЙ—siЕӢ Kooh, a yii nga Й—u.
4.15: Ali Й“o' nga Й—u kinaat mbugalu sagu ne a ap Й“o', wala a rok rok, wala a tum in baahaaЙ—i wiiriis, wala a aas ЕӢ ini waas ce nikohЙ—i.
4.16: Waaye nik ne Й—u na mbugalse sagu ini Й—u nik Kerceen Й—ah, kinaat raak kaci nga, yakЙ—aat Kooh ЕӢ mini Й—u min Й“ay tiikeem .

5.1: Kon, mi yii Гұaah yakak ci adgoh Й—u, mi yi yakak findiiЙ“a, ЕӢ seede ngaЕӢ miskiЙ— ciЕӢ Kiristaani te ЕӢ raakiЙ— Й“ak ЕӢ yaki a yak, wi teeЙ“ohsan.
5.2: Mi yii Гұaah Й—u yakak ci, taambkohaat gati Kooh dengkoh Й—u ; kinaata niiЙ— ЕӢ Гұak pehey, waaye niiЙ—aata sagu waaЙ—i Й—u waaЙ—a tum, findi Kooh waaЙ—oh. ЖҠu joyЙ—i waak kopor nga ЕӢ ini lahЙ—i waas waaye Й—u joy niiЙ— gatiЕӢ Й—u na sawar.

5.4: ЕҠ ineem, NiiЙ—ohi yaki hay Й—ah, Й—u hey rahse raayaani moЙ—kiЕӢ wa minЙ—i yahuk. Findi kosiЙ— ci joy mand
5.5: ЖҠu Й“i komaakci, namaat kerhiЙ— yakak ci. ЖҠu Й“i kosiЙ— ci jen ruhsiЙ—aat haf Й—u, ne yaa nu nga Й—u Й—ah taambkohee morom ce, laam Fiis ci woo ne : В« Kooh hunЙ—i na yaksiЙ—koh ci, Й“i ruhsiЙ— haf Й“a, Й“eЙ— a na teeЙ“e baah kiЕӢ Й—e. В»
5.6: RuhsiЙ—aat haf Й—u ЕӢ fiki Kooh, yi raak hatil, ne a meeЙ“ Й—u ЕӢ jamanooni a waaЙ—oha.

5.11: A yi nikaat HeЙ— hatil po faw ! Amiin ! Askohi
5.12: ЖҒaah Й“oo Silweng, ЕӢ amb Й—e findi Й“aah cariЙ— oolku, ЕӢ taamboh nga Й—e, ЕӢ kaЙ“Й—ohha Й—u woo ci rohЖҙiЙ— cii, ne ЕӢ Гұaah Й—u, ЕӢ seede'iЙ— Й—u ne Й—u amb ЕӢ baahohiЕӢ Kooh keeh-keehi.

1.1: Mi yii kaГұiЙ— Й—u, mi yi Simong Piyeer, ГұaamiЕӢ Yeesu Kiristaa, yi Й“aah ЕӢ Apootar ciЕӢ Й—e, mi yii fiis Й—u kaytii, Й—u Й“i rahas kosi car waaЙ—u findi wiЕӢ Й“oo. ЖҠu rahasa taamboh ЕӢ yurhi Kiristaani yurah, a yi KoohiЕӢ Й“oo na MucЙ—ohiЕӢ Й“oo.
1.2: Baahohsaat, Й—u onu jam te in ceem gen Й“aatke, ЕӢ inhi Й—u inah Kooh na HeЙ— Й“oo Yeesu ! In ci Й“oo etoh ne Й“oo raak kipes ЕӢoЙ—iЙ— ЕӢ Kooh
1.3: ЕҠ hatiliЕӢ Й—e, HeЙ—i eЙ—iЙ— Й“oo in ci Й“oo etoh jen ne Й“oo raak kipes ЕӢoЙ—iЙ— nga Й—e. A eЙ—iЙ— Й“oo ca taamboh ЕӢ inhi Й“oo inah Kooh yi Й“eeЙ—uk Й“oo. A Й“eeЙ—uk Й“oo taamboh ЕӢ yaki a yak ЕӢ haf ce na baah kiЕӢ Й—e.
1.4: ЕҠ ineem, a gapeen Й“oo gapoh baahiЙ— ci Й“o' inahЙ—i findi ca hend te Й“oo rahsiЙ— ca. A tumiЙ— ineem ne Й—u fus ЕӢ maЙ—aah ci baahaaЙ—iici na yahrohe Й“i adinaanii, Й—u raak Й“ak ЕӢ kipes kiЕӢ Й—e.
1.5: Ineem, weЙ— tah, ndengЙ—ukaat keeh-keeh, te ЕӢ kosiЕӢ Й—u, Й—u Й“aat nga tumohaaЙ— baahiЙ—, ЕӢ tumohaaЙ—i baahЙ—eem, Й—u Й“aat nga inah Kooh,
1.6: ЕӢ inhiЕӢ Kooh weem, Й—u Й“aat nga min amb haf Й—u, ЕӢ min kiЕӢ Й—u amb haf Й—u weem, Й—u Й“aat nga muГұ miskiЙ—, ЕӢ muГұiЕӢ miskiЙ—eem, Й—u Й“aat nga ЕӢoЙ— ЕӢ Kooh,
1.7: ЕӢ ЕӢoЙ—iЕӢ Й—u ЕӢ Kooh weem, Й—u Й“aat nga waaЙ—tiЙ—oh ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ Й—u, te ЕӢ waaЙ—tiЙ—ohiЕӢ Й—u weem, Й—u Й“aat nga waaЙ— Й“ooЙ“i keeh-keeh.
1.8: Laam in ceem jen nik nga Й—u te ca gen Й“aatuk Й—ah, inhi Й—u inah HeЙ— Й“oo Yeesu Kiristaa hey tume po Й—u nikanЙ—i yoondЙ—ukaaЙ—i wala raakaaЙ—i njiriГұ.
1.9: Waaye Й“o' nu in ceem nikЙ—i nga Й—e Й—ah, a mand na fuuliЙ—, has ciЕӢ Й—e na hoteeЙ—i usiЙ—. A alkohiЙ— ne a hoolЙ—uuЙ— ЕӢ bakaaЙ— ciЕӢ Й—e Й—eЙ“gaan.
1.10: Ineem weЙ— tah, Й“aah ciЕӢ ngo, ndengЙ—ukaat po Й“eeЙ—ki Kooh Й“eeЙ—uk Й—u na kooЙ—i a kooЙ— Й—u nik in wooriЙ— nga Й—u ; Й—u tuma Й—ah, Й—u keenanЙ—i muk.
1.11: Te ЕӢ ineem, Й—u hey rangsiЙ—asse baahiЙ— buntaaciЕӢ Nguuri genan po faw, NguuriЕӢ HeЙ— Й“oo Yeesu Kiristaa, MucЙ—ohiЕӢ Й“oo. Woo ciЕӢ Apootar ci na woosuuЙ— ci oolkaah
1.12: Ineem weЙ— tah, ЕӢ genan Й—u naandis in ceem, ali nik ne Й—u inhiЙ— ca po ЖҙutiЙ— sah te Й—u tufkiЙ— po Й—u ndengiЙ— ngaЕӢ keeh ki Й—u teeЙ“u.
1.13: ЕҠ amb ne wa ini ЕӢ joy tum feeh mi yii pes Й—ah ne ЕӢ yunee Й—u ЕӢ naandsoh ceem.
1.14: Laam, ЕӢ inhiЙ— ne ЕӢ hey saЙ“sukohe na faanii maaГұaaЙ—i, findi HeЙ— Й“oo Yeesu Kiristaa ЕӢ haf ce teeЙ“oh ho wa.

1.16: Wi Й“oo yegЙ—ee Й—u hayiЕӢ HeЙ— Й“oo Yeesu Kiristaa ЕӢ hatiliЕӢ Й—e, Й“oo gaЖҙkeeЙ—i ЕӢ andiini feru ЕӢ hereГұ Й“o', Й“oo hotoot hotoot yaki a yak.
1.17: Laam Kooh Baabi a yi eЙ— Й—e cir, yakiЙ—ta Й—e, wa nikee wa hoosooraЕӢ Kooh yi HeЙ— kiyak hay nga Й—e, woosa ne : В« Yii a yi KuЙ“kiЕӢ ngo ЕӢ waaЙ— keeh-keeh, yi neЙ“ po ЕӢ keeГұ. В»
1.18: ЖҒoo kerhootiЙ— hoosooreem puloh Asamaan, wa Й“oo nik na Yeesu ЕӢ tangooraЕӢ Kooh.
1.19: Wa Й“aatta Й“oo woor ne woo ciЕӢ woosuuЙ— ci tufkiЙ—, te wa baahiЙ— ne Й—u faЙ—oh ca nof. Ca mand na laampaani na siГұaarЙ—e ЕӢ Й—isik ГұuusiЙ—, po ЕӢ wiisaaЙ—i, jaar mbeedi pul, hori na Й“aaЙ“. Wa siГұaariЙ— ЕӢ keeГұ ciЕӢ Й—u.
1.20: Bala ali in, inhaat ne, ЕӢ woo-woosuuЙ— ci nik ЕӢ Fiis ci, ali woosuuЙ— moosЙ—i woyoh woo ciЕӢ Й—e haf ce .
1.21: Laam ali woosuuЙ— moosЙ—i woyoh ЕӢ ini a waaЙ— ЕӢ haf ce. A FuuЙ—si Hoolohngaani hiiree Й“a, Й“a yegЙ—oheeЙ—a woo kiЕӢ Kooh.

2.1: ЖҠeЙ“gaan, Й“i woosuuЙ— leyoh nikeen ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ cuuЙ“iЕӢ Israayel ; wa nam mand Й—aa, Й“i jangЙ—ohoh leyoh hey name nik ЕӢ harmban Й—u. JangЙ—ohoh ceem hey Й“eke, ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ jangЙ—oh ciЕӢ Й“a, liiЙ“ohaaЙ— ci na Й“aye Й“o' ЕӢ muuЖҙ ; Й“a hey kee po Й“a taas HeЙ—i tos Й“a. ЕҠ ineem, Й“a Й“ek haf Й“a ЕӢ muuЖҙi gaawan Й“a sooЖҙiЙ—.
2.2: LaayiЙ— hey Й“a taambЙ—e ЕӢ tumohaaЙ— ciЕӢ Й“a sepЖҙiЙ— ci. ЖҒa hey tahe po waasiЕӢ keeh ki Й“asu.
2.3: WaaЙ—i Й“a waaЙ— kopor hey tahe po Й“a feree lee, Й“a ГұaaГұohee Й—u na ca. Atte'uukiЕӢ Й“a cambiЙ— maaГұ, te sooЖҙЙ—uukiЕӢ Й“a tufkiЙ—.
2.4: Laam Kooh faЙ—Й—i sah malaakaaci bakaaЙ—e , a njaf ca ЕӢ nunga topaaЙ—iina, a tokka ca na ceen ЕӢ Гұuus tuЙ— po ЕӢ mbaЙ—naЕӢ atteena.
2.5: A faЙ—Й—i sah adinaana Й—eЙ“gaan, waaye ЕӢ jamanoona a ruhsiЙ—oh masma laayЙ—a ЕӢ adinaani riifee na sangiЙ— ciЕӢ Й—e, a mucЙ—iЙ— Noohin na Й“o' yasna-kanak wiiriis, Noohin yi woyee Й“ooЙ“a ne Й“a yurhaat.
2.6: Kooh atte'iЙ— kur-taah ci kanak ci Sodom na Gomor, a hoomiЙ—ta ca, po ca nikka misaal ЕӢ sangiЙ— ciЕӢ Й—e na haye.
2.7: Waaye a mucЙ—iЙ— Loot yurhiЙ—i, yi raakee ini misik Й—e lool ЕӢ cakaaya Й“ooЙ“a yurhaaЙ—iicaam nikohe.
2.8: Loot genee ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ Й“a, a yi a nikee Й“o' yurhiЙ—. A meeЙ—ta raak miskiЙ— noh na wek sagu tumohaaЙ— caЕӢ Й“a moЙ—aaЙ—iica a hotee, a kerheeЙ—a ca.
2.9: Mbaa HeЙ—i inhiЙ— findi a mucЙ—ohan Й“i ЕӢoЙ— nga Й—e po Й“a pul ЕӢ miskiЙ— ci, te a ambiЙ— yurhaaЙ—iici, Й“a na sekЙ—ohse mbehaЕӢ atteena ne Й“a mbugalu.
2.10: A uupan mbugal Й“i na taambЙ—e kiГұin ciЕӢ Й“a ЕӢ waaЙ—-waaЙ— usЙ“iЙ—, Й“a heeffa kikilifaakiЕӢ Й—e. JangЙ—ohoh ci leyoh ceem, Й“a Й“o' yegiЙ— haf Й“a, te Й“a yaksiЙ—ukka, Й“a nupЙ—i sah Й“as yakЙ—uuЙ— ci.

3.1: ЖҒaah ciЕӢ ngo ЕӢ keeГұkoh, wii weЙ— fiisi kanakЙ—oh, wi maa kaЙ“Й—ohee Й—u. Ca kanak jen mi na naandsee Й—u in ci Й—u jangЙ—asse, ne ЕӢ yun kiГұaaГұ kiЕӢ Й—u po Й—u liiЙ“ee hooliЙ—.

3.5: ЖҒooЙ“eem na alkoh alkohЙ—uke ne Й—eЙ“gaan, Kooh fereen Eel na keheЖҙ taamboh ЕӢ woo kiЕӢ Й—e, kehЖҙeem pulohee ЕӢ masuЙ“, wa nikee ЕӢ leero masuЙ“.

3.15: Te ambaat ne : SekЙ—ohi HeЙ—i na sekЙ—ohe, a waaЙ— ne Й“ooЙ“i muc, findi Pool, Й“aah Й“oo yi Й“oo keeГұkoh namoh Й—u wa woo ЕӢ fiisi a kaЙ“Й—oh Й—u, ЕӢ liiЙ“ohaaЙ—i moЙ—iЙ—i Kooh on Й—e.
3.16: Ineem weЙ— a na woye ЕӢ fiis ci a na kaЙ“Й—ohe jen, ci a na woyohe in ceem. RaakiЙ— Й“ak nga ca, ca yooЙ“Й—i inhu, tahha po inhaaЙ—iici na Й“i mokiЙ—Й—i baahiЙ— waasi na Й“oЖҙsohe Й“oЖҙsoh ini ca tokis. ЖҒa na name tum Й—aa na Fiis ci cinooci. Ineem na Й“ayee Й“a ЕӢ Й—umbu. Nakohi na askohi

1.1: Ini raakee, kooЙ—oh ЕӢ camba poyi, Й“oo kerahhaa, hotoottaa na has ciЕӢ Й“oo, Й“oo marakkaa baahiЙ— te Й“oo laallaa na yaah ciЕӢ Й“oo, weЙ— Woo ki na onohe kipes ki.

2.1: KomaakciЕӢ ngo, mi yii fiis Й—u in ceem ne Й—u bakaaЙ—uu. Waaye yino nga Й“oo bakaaЙ— Й—ah, Й“oo raakiЙ— Yi ngelЙ—an Й“oo ЕӢ fiki Baabi, a Yeesu Kiristaa, YurhiЙ—i.

2.3: Ini na teeЙ“e Й“oo ne Й“oo inhiЙ— HeЙ—i, weЙ— ne Й“oo taambiЙ— nakoh ciЕӢ Й—e.

2.12: Mi yii fiis Й—u, komaakci : ЖҠu Й—aasuuЙ— bakaaЙ— ciЕӢ Й—u sagu Yeesu Kiristaa.

2.15: Kinaat waaЙ— Adina na in ci nik ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ Adina. ЖҒo' waaЙ— Adina Й—ah, waaЙ— Baabi nikЙ—i nga Й—e.
2.16: In ci nik ЕӢ Adina jen, findi taambiЙ— kiГұin, maЙ— in ci has na hote, na yaksiЙ—uk ЕӢ raak-raak, ceem jen ca ina Baabi haa, ca ina Adina.
2.17: Te kat, Adina na reehe reeh na in ci na maЙ—se nga, waaye yi na tume ini Kooh waaЙ— genan gen po faw. SangiЙ— ciЕӢ Kiristaani

2.20: ЖҠu nak, Й—u rahsiЙ— FuuЙ—si Hoolohngaani taamboh ЕӢ Yeesu Kiristaa, tahha po Й—u jen Й—u inhiЙ— keeh ki ЕӢ ini kaЙ— ЕӢ Kooh.

3.11: Inii weЙ— yegЙ—ohi Й—u kerah ЕӢ camba poyi an : ЖҒoo waaЙ—tiЙ—ohaat ;
3.12: Й“oo kinaat tum findi Kayin, yi Й“aahee ЕӢ Seytaani, a boommba taambЙ—oh ce. A boomoh Й—e ye ? E tumohaaЙ— caЕӢ Й—e haf ce ceЙ— sepЖҙe, caЕӢ taambЙ—oh ce nikka yurhiЙ—, weЙ— tah a boommba Й—e.

3.16: Inii weЙ— inhiЙ— Й“oo waaЙ—oh : Yeesu eЙ—ohiЙ— kipes kiЕӢ Й—e wuu Й“oo. Mbaa Й“oo joyiЙ— nam eЙ—oh kipes ciЕӢ Й“oo wuu Й“aah ciЕӢ Й“oo.

3.18: KuЙ“uuciЕӢ ngo, waaЙ—ohiЕӢ Й“oo kinaat top ЕӢ nguЙ“ ci dong, waaye wa hunaat na tumohaaЙ— na keeh.
3.19: ЕҠ ineem, Й“oo hey inhe ne Й“oo Й“aah ЕӢ keeh ki, te Й“oo hey raake jam ЕӢ keeГұ ciЕӢ Й“oo ЕӢ fiki Kooh.
3.20: Ali Й“oo atte haf Й“oo sah, Й“oo inhiЙ— ne Kooh a yi uup yak liiЙ“ ciЕӢ Й“oo te a inhiЙ— in ci jen.
3.21: ЖҒaah ciЕӢ ngo ЕӢ keeГұkoh, liiЙ“ ciЕӢ Й“oo ambЙ—i Й“oo findi yurhaaЙ—i Й—ah, Й“oo raakiЙ— ooluk ЕӢ fiki Kooh.
3.22: Te in nu Й“oo kiim Й—e Й—ah, Й“oo rahasa nga Й—e, laam Й“oo Й“ii taambiЙ— nakoh ciЕӢ Й—e te Й“oo na tume ini neЙ“ Й—e.
3.23: Inii weЙ— nakohiЕӢ Й—e : WeЙ— ne Й“oo kos ЕӢ KuЙ“kiЕӢ Й—e Yeesu Kiristaa, te Й“oo waaЙ—oh ЕӢ harmban Й“oo findi a nakoh Й“oo wa.
3.24: ЖҒo' nu taambiЙ— nakoh ciЕӢ Kooh Й—ah, a gen ngaЕӢ Kooh, te Kooh gen nga Й—e ; ЕӢ inii, Й“oo inhiЙ— ne a gen nga Й“oo : sagu FuuЙ—si Hoolohngaani a eЙ— Й“oo.

4.1: ЖҒaah ciЕӢ ngo ЕӢ keeГұkoh, kinaat kos Й“ooЙ“i jen, Й“i na woye ne a FuuЙ—si Hoolohngaani na woyЙ—ukohee Й“a ; markisaat Й“a baahiЙ— po Й—u inah andi fuuЙ—si na woyЙ—ukohee Й“a puloh ЕӢ Kooh wala ; laam adinaani woti-woti, Й“o' laayiЙ— na tume haf Й“a woosuuЙ— te Й“a nikЙ—aa.
4.2: ЖҠu na hee inhisohe FuuЙ—siЕӢ Kooh an : ЖҒo' nu woo jahran ne Yeesu Kiristaa hayiЙ— na faan Й—ah, ini woyЙ—ukoh Й—e puloh ЕӢ Kooh ;
4.3: te waa nu teyЙ—ukЙ—i Yeesu yeem Й—ah , wa pulohЙ—i ЕӢ Kooh, waaye wa liiЙ“iЕӢ sangiЙ—iЕӢ Kiristaani ; Й—u kerheen ne wa Й—ii hay te Й—iski wa nik, wa Й—ii ЕӢ Adina.
4.4: ЖҠu Й“i kuЙ“uuciЕӢ ngo, Й—u Й“aah ЕӢ Kooh, te Й“ooЙ“i tum haf Й“a woosuuЙ— Й“eem, e Й—u saah Й“a, laam Yi nik nga Й—u a yi uup yak yi nik ЕӢ Adina.
4.5: ЖҒeЙ—, Й“a Й“aah ЕӢ Adina ; weЙ— tah woo kiЕӢ Й“a woo Adina te Й“i Adina Й“a Й—ii sikЙ—uk Й“a.
4.6: ЖҒoo nak, Й“oo Й“aah ЕӢ Kooh ; Й“o' nu inah Kooh Й—ah na sikЙ—uke Й“oo sikЙ—uk ; yi Й“aahЙ—i ЕӢ Kooh, na sikЙ—ukeeЙ—i Й“oo. ЖҒoo na inhisohe FuuЙ—siЕӢ keeh ki na wi na muuЖҙЙ—ohe Й—aa. WaaЙ—ohiЕӢ Kooh
4.7: ЖҒaah ciЕӢ ngo ЕӢ keeГұkoh, Й“oo waaЙ—tiЙ—ohaat ЕӢ harmban Й“oo ; laam waaЙ—oh puloh ЕӢ Kooh, te Й“o' nu waaЙ— morom ce Й—ah, a rimkoh ЕӢ Kooh te a inhiЙ— Kooh.
4.8: ЖҒo' nu waaЙ—Й—i morom ce Й—ah, a moosЙ—i inhoh Kooh, laam Kooh, a waaЙ—oh.
4.9: Kooh teeЙ“ohiЙ— waaЙ—i a waaЙ— Й“oo ЕӢ inii : Woosi a woos KuЙ“kiЕӢ Й—e yino-kongi ЕӢ Adina ne Й“oo pes taamboh nga Й—e.
4.10: Te waaЙ—oheem nikЙ—i haa ne e Й“oo waaЙ— Kooh, waaye a yi waaЙ— Й“oo te a woossa KuЙ“kiЕӢ Й—e ne a nik seeЖҙkaahi nihsan bakaaЙ— ciЕӢ Й“oo.
4.11: ЖҒaah ciЕӢ ngo ЕӢ keeГұkoh, Kooh waaЙ—iЙ— Й“oo waaЙ—eem jen, mbaa, Й“oo joyiЙ— nam waaЙ—tiЙ—oh ЕӢ harmban Й“oo.
4.12: Ali Й“o' hotohЙ—i Kooh. Waaye Й“oo waaЙ—tiЙ—oh ЕӢ harmban Й“oo Й—ah, a genan nga Й“oo, te waaЙ—ohiЕӢ Й—e hey mite nga Й“oo.
4.13: Inii weЙ— na inhiЙ—e Й“oo ne Й“oo gen ЕӢ Kooh, te a gen nga Й“oo : eЙ—i a eЙ— Й“oo FuuЙ—siЕӢ Й—e.
4.14: ЖҒoo hotiЙ— ne Baabi a yi woos KuЙ“ki ne a nik MucЙ—ohiЕӢ Adina te Й“oo Й“ii seede wa.
4.15: ЖҒo' nu woo jahran ne Yeesu a yi KuЙ“kiЕӢ Kooh Й—ah, Kooh gen nga Й—e, te a gen ЕӢ Kooh.
4.16: Te Й“oo inhiЙ— waaЙ—i Kooh waaЙ— Й“oo, te Й“oo kosiЙ—a. Kooh, a waaЙ—oh, te Й“o' nu gen ЕӢ waaЙ—oh Й—ah, a gen ЕӢ Kooh, Kooh gen nga Й—e.
4.17: WaaЙ—ohi mitiЙ— ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ Й“oo ЕӢ raaki Й“oo raak hel daliЙ— ЕӢ mbehaЕӢ atteena, laam findi a mand, Й“oo mand Й—aa ЕӢ adinaanii.
4.18: WaaЙ—oh hunЙ—i na neЖҙЖҙoh, waaЙ—oh keeh-keeh na aaГұe aaГұ neЖҙЖҙoh, laam neЖҙЖҙoh na seke mbugal, kon Й“oyi neЖҙЖҙoh, waaЙ—oh mitЙ—i nga Й—e.
4.19: Ini kaЙ— nga Й“oo nak, a yi koc waaЙ— Й“oo, weЙ— tah Й“oo waaЙ—iЙ— Й—e.
4.20: ЖҒo' woo ne a waaЙ—iЙ— Kooh, te a sang morom ce Й—ah, a leyoh ; Й“o' nu waaЙ—Й—i morom ce yi a na hote Й—ah, a minЙ—i waaЙ— Kooh yi a hotЙ—i.
4.21: Te Й“oo rahsoh nakohii nga Й—e an : В« Yaa nu waaЙ— Kooh Й—ah, a namaat waaЙ— Й“aah ce. В»

5.1: ЖҒo' nu kos ne a Yeesu, a yi Kiristaani Й—ah, Й“oyeem, a kuЙ“u Kooh, te Й“o' nu waaЙ— Baabi, yi na rime Й—ah, a waaЙ—iЙ— Й“i rimkoh nga Й—e.
5.2: ЕҠ inii Й“oo inhiЙ— ne Й“oo waaЙ—iЙ— kuЙ“uuciЕӢ Kooh : ЖҒoo waaЙ—iЙ— Й“a ne Й“oo waaЙ— Kooh te Й“oo taambiЙ— nakoh ciЕӢ Й—e Й—ah.
5.3: Laam waaЙ— Kooh weЙ— ne Й“oo taambiЙ— nakoh ciЕӢ Й—e. Te nakoh ciЕӢ Й—e Й“itЙ—i,
5.4: laam Й“o' nu rimkoh ЕӢ Kooh Й—ah, a miniЙ— saah Adina ; te ini saah Adina, weЙ— kosi Й“oo kos.
5.5: Ya Й“a a yi min Adina Й—al yi kos ne Yeesu a KuЙ“kiЕӢ Kooh ?
5.6: Yeesu Kiristaa yeem, a yi hay taamboh ЕӢ masuЙ“ na Гұif ne a muciЙ— Й“oo ; a taamboh ЕӢ masuЙ“ dong haa, waaye ЕӢ masuЙ“ na Гұif ; te a FuuЙ—si Hoolohngaani na seede'ee wa, laam FuuЙ—si a yi keeh ki.
5.8: FuuЙ—si na masmi na Гұif mi, te ca kaahay jen ca huniЙ—.
5.9: ЖҒo' seede Й—ah, a na kosse kosu ; waaye seedeeniЕӢ Kooh weЙ— uupiЙ— hatil, te wii weЙ— seedeeniЕӢ Kooh : A seede'iЙ— KuЙ“kiЕӢ Й—e.
5.10: Yaa nu kos KuЙ“kiЕӢ Kooh Й—ah, a raak seedeeneem ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ ce ; yaa nu kosЙ—i seedeeniЕӢ Kooh Й—ah, a amb Kooh findi leyoh, a kosЙ—i seedeeni Kooh seede KuЙ“kiЕӢ Й—e.
5.11: Seedeeneem weЙ— ne Kooh eЙ—iЙ— Й“oo kipes ki reehanЙ—i te kipes keem weЙ—i ЕӢ KuЙ“kiЕӢ Й—e.
5.12: Yi raak KuЙ“ki a yi raak kipes ki ; yaa nu raakЙ—i KuЙ“kiЕӢ Kooh Й—ah, raakЙ—i kipes.
5.13: ЕҠ fiis Й—u in ceem ne Й—u inah ne Й—u raakiЙ— kipes ki reehanЙ—i, Й—u Й“i kos KuЙ“kiЕӢ Kooh.
5.14: Oolki Й“oo raak nga Й—e, weЙ— ne in nu Й“oo kiim te wa hun na waaЙ—-waaЙ—iЕӢ Й—e Й—ah, a kerah Й“oo.
5.15: Te Й“oo inah ne a yii kerah Й“oo ЕӢ in nu Й“oo kiim Й—e Й—ah, Й“oo namiЙ— inah ne Й“oo rahsiЙ— in ci Й“oo kiim. KiimЙ—aat kosiЙ— ci na bakaaЙ—e
5.16: ЖҒo' hot yino ЕӢ Й“aah ciЕӢ Й“oo kosiЙ— ci bakaaЙ—ee, bakaaЙ—i Й“ekЙ—i Й—e kakaan Й—ah, a kiimЙ—aat Й—e Kooh, a onu kipes ; a hey wa one Й“i bakaaЙ—Й—i bakaaЙ—i Й“ek Й“a kakaan. Waaye raakiЙ— bakaaЙ—i na Й“ekohe kakaan. Ineem tahЙ—i so nakoh kiim Kooh.
5.17: In yurhaaЙ—i nu nik Й—ah, wa bakaaЙ—, waaye raakiЙ— bakaaЙ— ci Й“ekЙ—i Й“o' kakaan.
5.18: ЖҒoo inhiЙ— ne yaa nu rimkoh ЕӢ Kooh Й—ah, a na bakaaЙ—eeЙ—i. A KuЙ“kiЕӢ Kooh na niiЙ—ee Й—e, Seytaani minЙ—i Й—e laal.
5.19: ЖҒoo inhiЙ— ne Й“oo Й“ooЙ“iЕӢ Kooh te Adina jen wa Й—ii ЕӢ yaah Seytaani.
5.20: Te Й“oo namiЙ— inah ne KuЙ“kiЕӢ Kooh hayiЙ—, te a eЙ—iЙ— Й“oo ГұaaГұ ne Й“oo inhisoh Kooh, Keeh-keehi ; te Й“oo Й“ii ngaЕӢ Kooh, Keeh-keehi, ngaЕӢ KuЙ“kiЕӢ Й—e Yeesu Kiristaa. Yeem, a Koohi keeh-keehi, kipes ki po faw.
5.21: KomaakciЕӢ ngo, wortukaat kooh ci nikЙ—i keeh.

1.1: Mi, yakkiЕӢ Janguuni, mi yii fiis Й—a, fu yi ЖҒitЙ“i Kooh tan na kuЙ“uuciЕӢ Й—a. ЕҠ keeГұkohiЙ— Й—u keeh-keeh. A mi dong waaЙ— Й—u haa, waaye na Й“i inah jen keeh ki kaЙ— ЕӢ Kooh.
1.2: ЖҒoo waaЙ—iЙ— Й—u sagu keeh ki Й“oo jen Й“aah te wa nikan nik ngaЕӢ keeГұ ciЕӢ Й“oo po faw.
1.3: Kooh Baabi hey Й“oo baahohe, Й“oo misik Й—e, a on Й“oo jam. Yeesu Kiristaa kuЙ“kiЕӢ Baabi hey Й“oo baahohe, Й“oo misik Й—e, a on Й“oo jam. ЕҠ ineem Й“oo pesee ЕӢ keeh na waaЙ—oh. Nakohi rahsohu ЕӢ Baabi
1.4: ЕҠ sumiЙ— lool ЕӢ hotiЙ— Й“um ngaЕӢ kuЙ“uuciЕӢ Й—a Й“ii pes ЕӢ keeh ki findi nakohi Й“oo jen rahas ЕӢ Baabi.
1.5: Te Й—iski wa nik, mi yii kiim Й—a fu yi ЖҒitЙ“i ne Й“oo jen waaЙ—tiЙ—ohaat. Ini ЕӢ fiis Й—a wii, wa nakoh as haa, waaye wa nakohi Й“oo rahas ЕӢ cambohaana.
1.6: Te waaЙ—oh weЙ— ne Й“oo pesee ЕӢ nakoh ciЕӢ Kooh. Wii weЙ— nakohi, findi Й—u kerhoha ЕӢ cambohaana poyi : ЖҒoo pesaat ЕӢ waaЙ—tiЙ—oh. Wortukaat Й“i na ГұaaГұohe
1.7: ЖҒo' laayiЙ— pasarkohiЙ— ЕӢ adinaani te Й“a na ГұaaГұohe ГұaaГұoh Й“o', Й“a teyЙ—ukЙ—i ne Yeesu Kiristaa hayiЙ— ЕӢ Adina na faan, findi Й“o'. ЖҒoyi na taase ineem, a ГұaaГұohoh Й“o', a sangiЙ—iЕӢ Kiristaani.
1.8: Tufkaat ЕӢ haf Й—u, ne Й—u Гұakuu ini pangkiЕӢ Й“oo rim, waaye Й—u rahas aaf mitiЙ—.
1.9: ЖҒo' nu kaЙ— ini uup us ndeem te a topЙ—i ЕӢ jangЙ—ohi ЕӢ ini kaЙ— ЕӢ Kiristaani Й—ah, a raakЙ—i Kooh ; Й“o' nu top ЕӢ jangЙ—oheem Й—ah, a raakiЙ— Baabi na KuЙ“ki.
1.10: Kim Й“o' hey Й—u marke a kom Й—u jangЙ—oh wiiriis wi Й—aloh na jangЙ—oheem Й—ah, kinaat Й—e daliЙ— ЕӢ kahan ciЕӢ Й—u, kinaat sah tahas kaГұЙ—ohiЕӢ Й—e.
1.11: Laam Й“o' nu tahas Й—e ЕӢ kaГұЙ—ohiЕӢ Й—e Й—ah, a hun hun na Й—e ЕӢ tumohaaЙ— ciЕӢ Й—e baahaaЙ—iici. Askohi
1.12: RaakiЙ— in laayiЙ— ci ЕӢ joy Й—u woo waaye ЕӢ waaЙ—Й—i ca fiis ЕӢ kayit findi an ; ЕӢ oolkiЙ— ne ЕӢ hey Й—u hee marke, ЕӢ woo na Й—u Й“o' na Й“o' ne Й“oo uup sum.
1.13: KuЙ“uuciЕӢ taambЙ—oh fu Й“itiЙ“ yi Kooh nam tan, Й“ii kaГұiЙ— Й—a.

1.1: Mi yii kaГұiЙ— Й—a, Gayus, mi yi yakkiЕӢ Janguuni, mi yii fiis kaytii wuu fu nawleeso, fu yi ЕӢ keeГұkoh keeh-keeh.
1.2: Nawleeso, mi na kiime Kooh ne fu raak jam ЕӢ in ci jen. Findi kipes kiЕӢ Й—a na Kooh wiroh, Kooh onaat Й—a wir faan mand Й—aa.
1.3: ЖҒaah ciЕӢ Й“oo kosiЙ— ci hayya ndii Й—ah, Й“a na seede'e seede keeh ki nik nga Й—a na findi fu na pesohe ЕӢ keeh ki ; ineem, ЕӢ neЙ“uuЙ— nga lool.
1.4: ЕҠ kerahha ne komaakciЕӢ ngo ЕӢ Kiristaani na pese ЕӢ keeh ki Й—ah, sumi mi na sume ЕӢ ineem, ЕӢ minЙ—i raak sum ki uupa. Findi Gayus na tumohe na Й“aaЙ“oh ci
1.5: Nawleeso, in ci fu na tumЙ—e Й“aah ciЕӢ Й“oo kosiЙ— ci na Й“aaЙ“e, po Й“i fu inahЙ—i sah, fu na tumee wa tum wooriЙ—.
1.6: ЖҒa seede'iЙ— waaЙ—i fu waaЙ— Й“ooЙ“i, ЕӢ fiki Й“i Janguunii. Te wa heen baahe lool ne fu Й“aatЙ—ohee Й“aah ciЕӢ Й“oo Й“eem ЕӢ Й“aaЙ“iЕӢ Й“a findi Й“o'-Kooh na tumohe.
1.7: Laam e tiikiЕӢ Kiristaani tah Й“a kuruk te Й“a heelkuu ali in ЕӢ Й“ooЙ“i kosaaЙ—iici.
1.8: Kon Й“oo, kosiЙ— ci, e Й“oo joy Й“aatЙ—oh Й“aaЙ“oh ceem ne Й“oo hun na Й“a, Й“oo pangkiЙ— keeh ki. Joteref na Demetiriyus
1.9: ЕҠ fiisiЙ— kayit, ЕӢ kaЙ“Й—ohhaa Й“i JanguuniЕӢ Й—u, waaye Joteref taambkohЙ—i woo kiЕӢ Й“oo te a waaЙ— ne a yi adgohan Й“ooЙ“i jen.
1.10: WeЙ— tah ЕӢ hay Й—ah, ЕӢ hey woye in ci a na tume, in ci moЙ—aaЙ—iici naandohaaci a na woyЙ—e Й“oo. Ineem doyЙ—i Й—e, a yi ЕӢ haf ce, a na taambЙ—ukeeЙ—i Й“aah ciЕӢ Й“oo kosiЙ— ci na haye ndeem te Й“aat nga Й“i na waaЙ—e wa tum a yi na hondohee Й“a tuma, Й“a sanga Й—ah a aaГұ Й“a ЕӢ Janguuni.
1.11: Nawleeso, kina altiЙ—koh in baahaaЙ—i, waaye altiЙ—koha in baahiЙ— ; Й“oyi na tume in baahiЙ—, a Й“aah ЕӢ Kooh ; Й“oyi na tume in baahaaЙ—i, a moosЙ—i inah findi Kooh mand.
1.12: Demetiriyus nak, Й“ooЙ“i jen na woye in baahiЙ— nga Й—e te Й“o' miniЙ— hot ne wa keeh. ЖҒoo namiЙ— Й—e seede'iЙ— te fu inhiЙ— ne in nu Й“oo seede Й—ah, wa keeh. Askohi
1.13: RaakiЙ— in laayiЙ— ci ЕӢ joy Й—a woo, waaye ЕӢ waaЙ—Й—i ca fiis ЕӢ kayit findi an.
1.14: ЕҠ oolkiЙ— ne ЕӢ hey Й—a hote maaГұaaЙ—i te Й“oo hey woye Й“o' na Й“o'.
1.15: Jam nikaat na Й—a ! Nawleeci Й“a Й—ii kaГұiЙ— Й—a ! KaГұЙ—a nawleeciЕӢ Й“oo, yaa nu nga ЕӢ tiikiЕӢ Й—e.

1.1: Mi yii kaГұiЙ— Й—u, mi yi Yuud, ГұaamiЕӢ Yeesu Kiristaa, ЕӢ nammba nik taambЙ—oh Saak, mi yii fiis kaytii wuu Й—u, Й—u Й“i Kooh Й“eeЙ—uk ЕӢ haf ce, Й—u Й“i Kooh Baabi waaЙ—, Й—u Й“i Yeesu Kiristaa na niiЙ—e.
1.2: Miskaat Kooh, a on Й—u jam na waaЙ—-waaЙ— te in ceem gen Й“aatke ! Tumoh moЙ—aaЙ—iici nik ЕӢ harmban kosiЙ— ci
1.3: ЖҒaah ciЕӢ ngo ЕӢ keeГұkoh, ЕӢ waaЙ—een Й—u fiis lool ЕӢ ini kaЙ— ЕӢ muci Й“oo Й“aah. Waaye ini uup tufuk weЙ— ne ЕӢ Гұaah Й—u, Й—u leber wuu kosi Kooh eЙ— Й“ooЙ“iЕӢ Й—e te koseem, findi wa nikohee, wa risan Й—aa.
1.4: Laam raakiЙ— Й“ooЙ“i Й—emb aassa nga Й—u, Й“i fu inah ne atteeniЕӢ Й“a fiisuuЙ— maaГұ. ЖҒa Й“o' kaaГұiЙ— Kooh. Ini Й“oo yeyyooЙ—i baahohi Kooh baahoh Й“oo, weЙ— Й“a nduuЙ— po Й“a taambЙ—ee kiГұin ciЕӢ Й“a, Й“a mbalaye, Й“a taasee Yeesu Kiristaa yi HeЙ— Й“oo ; te a yi dong Й“oo kerhiЙ—. Kooh hey atte'e tumoh moЙ—aaЙ—iici
1.5: ЖҠu inhiЙ— in ci maa hee Й—u woye jen po ЖҙutiЙ— waaye mi na naandsee Й—u ca rek. Wa HeЙ—i muciЙ— cuuЙ“iЕӢ Israayel ЕӢ Misra, wa kaЙ—ta po wa raakka Й“i sang kos, a ap Й“a ap.
1.6: Naandsukaat malaakaaci topeeЙ—i ЕӢ hatili Kooh onee ca, ca faЙ—ta Й—iska ca gene. Kooh ceenЙ—uk ca ceenЙ—uk ceeni genan gen, a taЖҙca ca ЕӢ Гұuus tuЙ— po mbeha yakka, mbehaЕӢ atteena.
1.7: Namaat naandsuk Й“i Sodom na Gomor na kur-taah ca nikee ЕӢ serooca tumee moЙ—aaЙ—i findi Й—aa, Й“a nikohee faankoh sangohuuЙ—, Й“a jeemeeЙ—a faankoh faankohi Й—aloh na faankohi Kooh teyЙ—uk, Kooh attee attee kur ceem, ca nikka firndeeni Й“ooЙ“i jen min hot, te ca ris ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ yongkaahi genan gen.
1.8: ЖҒooЙ“i Й—emb aassa nga Й—u na name tum Й—aa ; Й“a na heeЖҙe in ci na Й“ekee Й“a ЕӢ usЙ“iЙ— faan ciЕӢ Й“a, Й“a sang teyЙ—uk kikilifaakiЕӢ HeЙ—i, Й“a Й“ase yakЙ—uuЙ— ciЕӢ Asamaan.
1.9: Mikayel yi Й“aah ЕӢ kilifaaciЕӢ malaakaaci sah, a tumЙ—aa. Wa a lahtohee na Seytaani, a nookoheeЙ—a na Й—e fiЙ—aafiЕӢ Musaa, a kaaГұeeЙ—i Й—e atte wala a Й“as Й—e, a woo Й—e ne : В« HeЙ—i ngasaat Й—a ! В»
1.10: Waaye Й“ooЙ“i mi na woye Й“eem, in nu Й“a inahЙ—i Й—ah, Й“a na Й“asee wa Й“as, te in ci Й“a inah, Й“a inhoh ca findi Й—oopaat na inhohe ; inheem na Й“ayee Й“a ЕӢ Й—umbu.
1.11: Mas Й“ooЙ“eem ! ЖҒa taambiЙ— waasiЕӢ Kayin. Te sagu waaЙ— kopor, Й“a tumiЙ— po Й“a muuЖҙiЙ— haf Й“a findi Balaam ; Й“a kaaniЙ— laam Й“a na ndengsiЙ—kohe na Kooh findi Kore.

ЖҒa mand na ngaaЙ“i na toЙ“eeЙ—i, wi puuЙ—si na coottohe ; Й“a mand na kidig ci na raakeeЙ—i ali kuЙ“u ЕӢ jamanooni ca na rimohe ; kidig ci kaan, kaanissa, Й—ofuusa ;

1.14: Henok caaciЕӢ Й“oo yasna-kanakЙ—oh, camboh ЕӢ Aadama, a woyeen findi woosuuЙ— ЕӢ ini kaЙ— nga Й“a an : В« Marka, ЕӢ hotiЙ— HeЙ—i hayeeЙ—a huniЙ— na malaakaaciЕӢ Й—e hooliЙ— ci junni-junniici !
1.15: A hay ne a atte Й“i Adina jen, a mbugal bakaaЙ—oh ci jen ЕӢ moЙ—aaЙ—iici Й“a tum jen sagu ndengsiЙ—kohi Й“a ndengsiЙ—kohee na Й—e. A nam Й“a mbugal ЕӢ woo ci Й“aseeh ci Й“ooЙ“eem woyee Й—e jen, Й“ooЙ“i fu inah ne Й“a sang Й—e sang. В»

1.17: Waaye Й—u Й“i Й“aah ciЕӢ ngo ЕӢ keeГұkoh, naandsukaat in ci Apootar ciЕӢ HeЙ— Й“oo Yeesu Kiristaa woyee maaГұiЙ—.

1.24: -25 YakЙ—aat Kooh yi min Й—u amb po Й—u kafndukuu, yi min tum po, mbehi Й—u tufkan ЕӢ fiki yaki a yak, Й—u raakuu sikka te Й—u hey sume keeh-keeh. YakЙ—aat Koohi yino-kongi, a yi MucЙ—ohiЕӢ Й“oo taamboh ЕӢ Yeesu Kiristaa, HeЙ— Й“oo. A yi yakЙ—aah, a yi eЙ—aah cir, a yi HeЙ— hatil na nguur, bala Adina raakan na woti na po faw ! Amiin !

1.1: Inii weЙ— Yeesu Kiristaa teeЙ“oh : Kooh eЙ— Й—e ne a teeЙ“ Гұaam ciЕӢ Й—e ini joy hay maaГұaaЙ—i. A yi Yeesu, a woos malaakaaniЕӢ Й—e ne a teeЙ“ SaaЕӢ wa, ГұaamiЕӢ Й—e.

1.3: ЖҒoyi jangЙ—an Й“ooЙ“i teerndii hey sume, a yi na Й“ooЙ“i kerhan woo ci puloh ЕӢ Kooh ceem te Й“a amb in ci fiisu ceem, laam jamanooniЕӢ ca reЙ“iЙ—. KaГұЙ—ohi wuu Janguuci yasna-kanak ci
1.4: Mi SaaЕӢ, mi yii fiis wuu Janguuci yasna-kanak ci nik ЕӢ Asi. Yi nik, te a yi nikee te a yi na haye baahohaat Й—u, a on Й—u jam. FuuЙ—is ci yasna-kanak ci nik ЕӢ fiki Й“oofohaaniЕӢ Й—e baahohaat Й—u, ca on Й—u jam.
1.5: Yeesu Kiristaa, seedeeni woor, yi koc rimuk ЕӢ kaaniЙ— ci, kilifaaniЕӢ buur ciЕӢ kehЖҙi, baahohaat Й—u, a on Й—u jam. A waaЙ—iЙ— Й“oo te a moosЙ—iЙ— Й“oo bakaaЙ— ciЕӢ Й“oo na Гұif miЕӢ Й—e,
1.6: a ambsohiЙ— Й“oo jen, a haЙ“Й—iЙ—ta Й“oo Nguur, a Й“ekka Й“oo nga, a tummba Й“oo seeЖҙkiЙ—oh wuu Kooh Baab Й“a. A yakЙ—aah te min-min nikaat na Й—e po faw. Amiin !
1.7: Markaat, a yi hay ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ eel ; yaa nu nga hey Й—e dege has po Й“i maang Й—e sah, cuuЙ“ ciЕӢ kehЖҙi jen hey Й—e rooye. Ee, amiin !
1.8: Kooh HeЙ—i woo ne : В« Г‘am Alfa na Omega , Гұam nik, Гұam nikee te Гұam na haye ; a Гұam HeЙ—-hatil. В» Yeesu teeЙ“kiЙ— SaaЕӢ
1.9: Mi SaaЕӢ, Й“aah Й—u ngaЕӢ Yeesu, huntohiЕӢ Й—u yi Й“aah na Й—u miskiЙ—i, Й“aahha na Й—u Nguur na muГұ seke. Wa nikee wa ЕӢ ambu ЕӢ Patmos, kur ka masmi wil, ЕӢ ambsee sagu woo kiЕӢ Kooh na seede Yeesu.
1.10: ЕҠ mbehiЕӢ HeЙ—i, FuuЙ—si Hoolohngaani ammba so, ЕӢ kerheeЙ—a ЕӢ finhooso hooso leehkeeЙ—a findi kuluЙ“
1.11: an : В« Ini fu na hote fiisaa, wa nik teere, fu kaЙ“Й—oha Janguuci yasna-kanak cii : Efes na Ismirna, Pergam, Tiyatiir, Sardees, Filadelfi na Lawdise. В»
1.12: ЕҠ heelukka ne ЕӢ marak ya Й“a heЙ— hoosoori na wee na so, ЕӢ hotta laampa yasna-kanak urus.
1.13: Mannda haa ne a Й“o' nikee ЕӢ leerooca. A Й“ekkee kulЙ“a hutiЙ—, wa tokuusa ЕӢ fisaari na seentur urus.
1.14: Find ciЕӢ hafiЕӢ Й—e nikee yaanow haa find mbaal, haa maar galacaac. Has ciЕӢ Й—e siГұaarЙ—eeЙ—a findi jaal yongkaah.
1.15: Kot ciЕӢ Й—e mannda na moosi hoolЙ—ohu ЕӢ yongkaah, foocuusa po wa melciЙ—eeЙ—a. HoosooriЕӢ Й—e mannda na Й—uuЙ— masuЙ“ laayiЙ—.
1.16: A ammba hor yasna-kanak ЕӢ yaahiЕӢ Й—e Гұaahmi, ndang kaaГұiЙ—, wi na nguЙ—e na Й“ak kanak puleeЙ—a ЕӢ nguЙ“iЕӢ Й—e ; fikiiriЕӢ Й—e siГұaarЙ—eeЙ—a findi nohi.
1.17: ЕҠ hot Й—e hot rek ЕӢ keennda ЕӢ kot ciЕӢ Й—e po mand haa ne ЕӢ kaan kaan ; waaye a degga so yaahiЕӢ Й—e Гұaahmi, a woosa ne : В« Kana neЖҙЖҙoh, Гұam koc te Гұam mirndohan,
1.18: Гұam pesiЙ—i, ЕӢ kaaneen, waaye Й—iski wa nik mi yii pes po faw, caaЙ“ndiЕӢ kakaan na wiЕӢ Jaanim cii na so.

1.20: Ini Й—asЙ—ukiЙ—i nik ЕӢ hor ci yasna-kanak ci fu hot ЕӢ yaahiЕӢ ngo Гұaahmi na laampaaci urus ci yasna-kanak ci tokis inii : hor ci yasna-kanak ci ceЙ— malaakaaciЕӢ Janguuci yasna-kanak ci. Te laampaaci yasna-kanak ci ceЙ— Janguuci yasna-kanak ci.

2.1: Fiisa inii wuu malaakaaniЕӢ JanguunaЕӢ Efes, woyaa Й—e ne : вҖң Yi amb hor ci yasna-kanak ci ЕӢ yaah-Гұaahum te a tiindee ЕӢ harmban laampa-urus ci yasna-kanak ci, woo inii :
2.2: ЕҠ inhiЙ— ini fu na haЙ“Й—e jen, ЕӢ inhiЙ— pangkiЕӢ Й—a miskiЙ—i na mini fu min muГұ fu seke ; ЕӢ inhiЙ— ne fu minЙ—i teyЙ—uk aГұaandiЙ— ci. Fu markiskiЙ— Й“i na woye ne Й“a apootar po fu inahha ne Й“a na leye.
2.3: Fu minnda muГұ fu seke, fu yaaЙ“iЙ— lool sagu tiikiЕӢ ngo te fu dokukЙ—i finho.
2.4: Waaye raakiЙ— ini ЕӢ hot nga Й—a te wa baahЙ—i, weЙ— faЙ—i fu faЙ— waaЙ—i fu waaЙ—ee so koc.
2.5: Naandsuka Й—iski fu puloh, fu keennda, fu Й“oЖҙsoh tumohaaЙ—, dokka ЕӢ tumohaaЙ— caЕӢ Й—a koc. Wa nikЙ—i Й—ah, ЕӢ hey hee nihse laampaaniЕӢ Й—a ЕӢ Й—iski wa nik, hanaa fu Й“oЖҙsoh tumohaaЙ—.
2.6: Waaye raakiЙ— ini ЕӢ hot nga Й—a te wa baahiЙ—, sangi fu sang in ci Й“i Nikola na haЙ“Й—e. Mi sah ЕӢ namiЙ— ca sang.
2.7: Yi raak nof kerhaat ini FuuЙ—si Hoolohngaani, FuuЙ—siЕӢ Kooh woo ЕӢ Janguuci ! Yaa nu saah Й—ah, ЕӢ hey Й—e ГұamЙ—e ЕӢ rimiЕӢ kidgiЕӢ kipes ki nik ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ nguukaЕӢ Kooh. вҖқ Ini fiisu wuu JanguuniЕӢ Ismirna
2.8: Fiisa inii wuu malaakaaniЕӢ JanguunaЕӢ Ismirna, woyaa Й—e ne : вҖң Yi koc na Yi mirndoh, Yi kaanee te a hulitta, woo inii :
2.9: ЕҠ inhiЙ— miskiЙ—iЕӢ Й—a na Гұaki fu Гұak, moona fu heЙ— raak-raak. ЕҠ inhiЙ— leyЙ—oh ciЕӢ Й“i na woye ne Й“a Yawuut te Й“a Yawuut haa, Й“a sinaagog Seytaani.
2.10: Fu hey raake miskiЙ— waaye kina neЖҙЖҙoh. Marka, Seytaani hey Й“eke Й“i Й“o' nga Й—u ЕӢ kaso ne Й—u markisku, te Й—u hey raake miskiЙ— neeh ndaЕӢkiyaah, waaye kinaat faЙ—, ndengЙ—ukaat po ali Й—u kaanoh nga sah Й—u Й“ay, ЕӢ hey Й—u aafe kipes ki reehanЙ—i.
2.11: Yi raak nof kerhaat ini FuuЙ—si Hoolohngaani woo Janguuci ! Yi saahan, a yeganЙ—i miskiЙ—iЕӢ kakaan ki kanakЙ—oh. вҖқ Ini fiisu wuu JanguuniЕӢ Pergam
2.12: Fiisa inii wuu malaakaaniЕӢ JanguunaЕӢ Pergam, woyaa Й—e ne : вҖң Yi amb ndangi kaaГұiЙ—i, wi na nguЙ—e na Й“ak kanak woo inii :
2.13: ЕҠ inhiЙ— ne Й—iski fu gen weЙ— Й—iski Й“oofoha-buuri nik, wiЕӢ Seytaani, waaye fu ЕӢoЙ—iЙ— nga so. Fu faЙ—Й—i kosi fu kos nga so, po sah wa Antipas seedeeniЕӢ ngo woor apse. A apohu ЕӢ kur Й—u, ЕӢ Й—iska Seytaani gen.
2.14: Waaye Й“i in rek, ceЙ— ЕӢ hot nga Й—a te ca baahЙ—i : RaakiЙ— ЕӢ Й“ooЙ“iЕӢ Й—a, Й“i taambiЙ— jangЙ—oh ciЕӢ Balaam, yi jangЙ—ee Balak ne a bakaaЙ—Й—ukoh Israayel ci po Й“a Гұammba sepet ci seeЖҙkohu wuu kooh ci nikaaЙ—iici, Й“a faankoheeЙ—a faankoh sangohuuЙ—.
2.15: NamiЙ— raak Й“i Й“o' ЕӢ Й“ooЙ“iЕӢ Й—a Й“i taambiЙ— jangЙ—oh ciЕӢ Й“i Nikola.
2.16: Mbaa ! ЖҒoЖҙsoha pesohaaЙ— wala ЕӢ hey haye win-win na ndangi na pule ЕӢ nguЙ“iЕӢ ngo ne ЕӢ hiГұoh Й“ooЙ“eem.

2.18: Fiisa inii wuu malaakaaniЕӢ JanguunaЕӢ Tiyatiir, woyaa Й—e ne : вҖң KuЙ“kiЕӢ Kooh yi has ciЕӢ Й—e siГұaarЙ—e haa jaal yongkaah, kot ciЕӢ Й—e mannda na moosi foocu po wa melciЙ—e, woo inii :
2.19: ЕҠ inhiЙ— ini fu na haЙ“Й—e jen, na waaЙ—i fu waaЙ—oh, na kosi fu kos, na waaЙ—i fu waaЙ— taambkohoh, na mini fu min muГұ fu seke. ЕҠ hotiЙ— ne ini fu na haЙ“Й—e jen woti-woti weЙ— uup wa koc.
2.20: Waaye raakiЙ— ini ЕӢ hot nga Й—a te wa baahЙ—i, faЙ—i fu faЙ— Yesabel ЕӢ ini neЙ“ Й—e, Й“itЙ“i na woye ne a woosuuЙ—. A muuЖҙЙ—ee Гұaam ciЕӢ ngo, a jangЙ—ee Й“a faankoh sangohuuЙ— na Гұam sepet ci seeЖҙkohu wuu kooh nikaaЙ—i.

2.22: Marka, ЕӢ hey Й—e faane kosaay miskiЙ—, a yi na Й“i na njaalo'e na Й—e ne Й“a Й“oЖҙsohЙ—i pesohaaЙ—, Й“a faЙ— tumohaaЙ— ciЕӢ Й—e Й—ah.

2.24: Ini kaЙ— nga Й—u, Й—u Й“i Й“inooЙ“i te Й—u Й“aahha ЕӢ JanguuniЕӢ Tiyatiir, Й—u Й“i taambЙ—eeЙ—i jangЙ—ohiЕӢ Й“oyeem, Й—u Й“i inahЙ—i sah in ci Й—asЙ—ukiЙ— ci nooЙ—iЙ— ciЕӢ Seytaani findi Й“a na woyohee wa, mi yii woo Й—u ne ЕӢ deganЙ—i Й—u in Й“itiЙ— wiiriis.
2.25: Waaye ini Й—u raak, ЕӢoЙ—aat nga po mbaЙ—na ЕӢ hayan.

2.29: Yi raak nof kerhaat ini FuuЙ—si Hoolohngaani woo Janguuci. вҖқ

3.1: Fiisa inii wuu malaakaaniЕӢ JanguunaЕӢ Sardees, woyaa Й—e ne : вҖң Yi raak FuuЙ—is ci yasna-kanak ciЕӢ Kooh na hor ci yasna-kanak ci woo inii : ЕҠ inhiЙ— ini fu na haЙ“Й—e jen ; ЕӢ inhiЙ— ne Й“ooЙ“i amb ne fu yii pes te fu kaaniЙ—.

3.3: Kon naandsuka ini fu rahas te fu kerahhaa ; taambЙ—aa te fu Й“oЖҙsoh pesohaaЙ—. Fu yunukЙ—i Й—ah, ЕӢ hey haye nga Й—a baГұit findi rokoh te fu inhanЙ—i wahtuuni wa nikohan.
