3.5: Yi saahan, a Й“ekkohan kulЙ“a yaanow Й—aa ; ЕӢ moosanЙ—i tiikiЕӢ Й—e ЕӢ teerndiЕӢ kipes ki, te ЕӢ hey teyЙ—uke ЕӢ fiki BaabiЕӢ ngo na malaakaaciЕӢ Й—e ne : вҖҳYii a yiЕӢ ngo.вҖҷ
3.6: Yi raak nof kerhaat ini FuuЙ—si Hoolohngaani woo Janguuci. вҖқ Ini fiisu wuu JanguuniЕӢ Filadelfi
3.7: Fiisa inii wuu malaakaaniЕӢ JanguunaЕӢ Filadelfi, woyaa Й—e ne : вҖң Yi hool te a nikka Keeh-keehi, yi amboh caaЙ“ndiЕӢ Dawuuda, yi rangis Й—ah Й“o' ranganЙ—i, te a rang Й—ah Й“o' rangsanЙ—i, Й“oyeem woo inii :
3.8: ЕҠ inhiЙ— ini fu na haЙ“Й—e jen. Marka, ЕӢ rangsiЙ— ЕӢ fikiifu buntaani ali Й“o' minЙ—i rang. Fu raakЙ—i hatil laayiЙ— waaye fu ambiЙ— woo kiЕӢ ngo te fu taasukЙ—i tiikiЕӢ ngo.
3.9: Inii weЙ— ЕӢ tuman Й“ak ЕӢ Й“i Й“aah ЕӢ sinaagogiЕӢ Seytaani, leyoh ci na woye ne Й“a Yawuut te Й“a nikЙ—aa. SikЙ—uka, ЕӢ hey Й“a hayЙ—ukohe, Й“a Жҙek ЕӢ kot ciЕӢ Й—a po Й“a inah ne ЕӢ waaЙ—iЙ— Й—a.
3.10: ЕҠ woyee Й—a ne muГұa fu sek, te fu tumiЙ—a ; mi nak, ЕӢ hey Й—a Й—ipe ЕӢ jamanooni miskiЙ—i na hee ule Adina jen. Wa hayan ne wa markisuk Й“ooЙ“i gen ЕӢ kehЖҙi.
3.11: HayiЕӢ ngo usisЙ—i. ЕҠoЙ—a ЕӢ ini fu raak po ali Й“o' minuu kooЙ—oh raayaaniЕӢ Й—a nga Й—a.
3.12: Yi saahan, ЕӢ hey Й—e tume kumbin ЕӢ kahniЕӢ Kooh, KoohiЕӢ ngo ; a pulissanЙ—i nga muk te ЕӢ hey fiise nga Й—e tiikiЕӢ KoohiЕӢ ngo na tiikiЕӢ kur kiЕӢ KoohiЕӢ ngo, Yerusalemi asi, wi ruhsoh Eel ci, ЕӢ KoohiЕӢ ngo ; ЕӢ nam fiis nga Й—e tiikiЕӢ ngo asi.
3.13: Yi raak nof kerhaat ini FuuЙ—si Hoolohngaani woo Janguuci. вҖқ Ini fiisu wuu JanguuniЕӢ Lawdise
3.14: Fiisa inii wuu malaakaaniЕӢ JanguunaЕӢ Lawdise, woyaa Й—e ne : вҖң Yi na woyse "Amiin", Seedeeni woor te a woyee keeh, Yi in ci Kooh fer jen taamboh nga Й—e woo inii :
3.15: ЕҠ inhiЙ— ini fu na haЙ“Й—e jen, fu soosЙ—i, fu dohЙ—i. Cey fu mineen soos wala fu doh Й—ah !
3.16: Waaye ini fu iroh, fu dohЙ—i, fu soosЙ—i, tahiЙ— po ЕӢ hey Й—a Й“ote.
3.17: Laam fu yii tipuk ne fu heЙ— raak-raak, an fu raakiЙ— po fu etohisЙ—i in, waaye fu inahЙ—i ne, fu torhiЙ—, fu miskohiЙ—, fu Й“angtuuЙ—, fu fuuliЙ—, fu tas-Й“arang !
3.18: WeЙ— tah po inii weЙ— maa woyee Й—a : Roma nga so urus hoolЙ—uuЙ— na yongkaah, fu raak ; fu rom kulЙ“a yaanow, fu raak Й“ekkaah wa Й—asiЙ— kaciikiЕӢ tas-Й“arngiЕӢ Й—a ; fu rom tuufkaah wuu has ciЕӢ Й—a, fu min hot.
3.19: ЖҒi ЕӢ waaЙ— jen, maa woytohee Й“a woytoh, ЕӢ kuЖҙsee Й“a. Sawra te fu Й“oЖҙsoh pesohaaЙ— !
3.20: Markaat, Гұam yii ЕӢ buntaani te mi yii laЙ“iЙ—, Й“o' kerah hoosooriЕӢ ngo te a rangis Й—ah, ЕӢ hey aase kahan ce ЕӢ Гұam na Й—e, a Гұam na so.
3.21: Yi saahan, ЕӢ hey Й—e eЙ—e a Й“oof na so ЕӢ Й“oofoha-buuri, Й“oofohaaniЕӢ ngo, findi wi ЕӢ saah, ЕӢ Й“oofiЙ— na BaabiЕӢ ngo ЕӢ wiЕӢ Й—e.
3.22: Yi raak nof kerhaat ini FuuЙ—si Hoolohngaani woo Janguuci. вҖқ В»

4.1: Wa ineem coot inii weЙ— teeЙ“uk ko : ЕҠ hot bunta rangsukiЙ— ЕӢ Eel ci te hoosoori ЕӢ Й—eЙ“ee kerah woyeeЙ—a na so Й—iiЙ—Й—eeЙ—a findi kuluЙ“ woosa so ne : В« Rapa ndii, ЕӢ teeЙ“ Й—a ini taamb nga te wa raakohan Й—aa. В»
4.2: ЕҠ Й—iski Й—iski FuuЙ—si Hoolohngaani ammba so, ЕӢ hotta Й“oofoha-buur tufkiЙ—uuЙ— ЕӢ Eel ci, raakka Yi Й“oof nga.
4.3: Yi Й“oofee nga melciЙ—eeЙ—a findi atoh fi moЙ—ohngaani na woyse yaspis na wi na woyse sardiyon ; Гұaangi-Гұaangi melciЙ— findi atoh fi moЙ—ohngaani na woyse esmaragdos willaa.
4.4: ЖҒoofoha-buur ndaЕӢkiyaah-kanak na nikiis (24) ndeerra Й“oofohaaneem, yakak ndaЕӢkiyaah-kanak na nikiis (24) Й“ooffa nga ca, Й“a Й“ekkee kulЙ“a yaanow, Й“a degga mbahne-buur haЙ“Й—ohu urus ЕӢ haf ciЕӢ Й“a.
4.5: ЖҒi meleГұ na Й“i Й—uuЙ— na Й“i inding kurkoheeЙ—a ЕӢ Й“oofoha-buura te laampa yasna-kanak siГұaarЙ—eeЙ—a ЕӢ fiki Й“oofoha-buura, ceЙ— FuuЙ—is ci yasna-kanak ciЕӢ Kooh .
4.6: ЕҠ fiki Й“oofoha-buura raakee inaa haa cookom weer melciЙ— findi seetu. ЕҠ leerniЕӢ Й“oofoha-buuri, na ini wila, raakeen pesiЙ— nikiis, ca riiffa na has ЕӢ fikiiri na finhoori.
4.7: PesiЙ—i koc mand na gaynde ; yi kanakЙ—oh mand na Й—oon naar ; yi kaahayЙ—oh raak fiki haa fiki Й“o', yi nikiisЙ—oh mand na caangooni na punde.
4.8: PesiЙ— ci nikiis ceem yaa nu nga Й—ah raakka paЙ“ yasna-yino ; paЙ“ ciЕӢ ca riiffa na has ЕӢ ooЙ“i na Й—afki. Ca gennda gen na woo kii noh na wek : В« A hooliЙ—, a hooliЙ—, a hooliЙ— ; Kooh HeЙ—i, yi HeЙ—-hatili ; a yi nikee, a yi nik te a yi na haye. В»
4.9: Waas nu ca yakЙ—ohee na Жҙeek Yi Й“oof ЕӢ Й“oofoha-buuri, Yi na pese po faw, te ca eЙ—ee Й—e cir, ca corkiЙ—ee Й—e Й—ah,
4.10: yakak ci ndaЕӢkiyaah-kanak na nikiis ci (24) Жҙek ЕӢ fiki Yi nik ЕӢ Й“oofoha-buuri ne Й“a Гұaamuk Yi na pese po faw. Jaar Й“a njaf mbahne-buur ciЕӢ Й“a ЕӢ fiki Й“oofoha-buuri, Й“a woyee ne :
4.11: В« HeЙ—i, KoohiЕӢ Й“oo, a fu yakЙ—aah, fu yeyyoo cir na hatil. Laam a fu fer in ci jen fu waaЙ—ta ne ca raak, ca feruusa. В»

5.1: Teemb ndeem, ЕӢ hotta teere ЕӢ yaahi ГұaahmiЕӢ Yi Й“oof ЕӢ Й“oofoha-buuri, wa raakeen fiis ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙi na Й—afki, wa ГұaakЙ—uusa na ndaЙ— yasna-kanak ne wa rangu, ndaЙ— nu nik raakka mandargaani teeЙ“oh ne teerndi ranguuЙ— ЕӢ tiikiЕӢ Kooh.
5.2: ЕҠ hotta malaaka raakiЙ— hatil leehkeeЙ—a an : В« A Й“a yeyyoo nihis ndaЙ— ci, a rangis teerndi ? В»
5.3: Waaye yi yeyyoo rangis teerndi a marak Й—ooЖҙi, raakЙ—i ; wa ЕӢ Asamaan haa, wa ЕӢ kehЖҙi haa, wa ЕӢ ooЙ“ kehЖҙi haa.
5.4: ЕҠ fuЙ—eeЙ—a fuЙ— miskiЙ— ЕӢ ini ali Й“o' yeyyooЙ—i rangis teerndi, Й“o' yeyyooЙ—i marak ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙi.
5.5: Yakak yino ЕӢ yakak ca woosa so ne : В« Kina fuЙ—. Marka, gayndeeniЕӢ cuuЙ“iЕӢ Yudaa, yi setiЕӢ Dawuuda saahiЙ— Й“i sang Й—e ; a yeyyoo'iЙ— nihis ndaЙ— ci yasna-kanak ci, a rangis teerndi. В»
5.6: WeЙ— ЕӢ hotoh kuy mbaal Жҙin. A tufkee ЕӢ leernaЕӢ Й“oofoha-buura ; pesiЙ— ca nikiis ca na yakak ca willa Й—e. A mandee na ini hoosu ; a raakee wiic yasna-kanak na has yasna-kanak, ceЙ— FuuЙ—is ciЕӢ Kooh yasna-kanak ci woosohu ЕӢ kehЖҙi jen.
5.7: KuyaЕӢ Mbaala Жҙina kaЙ—ta, a Й“ayya teernda nikee ЕӢ yaah-ГұaahmiЕӢ Yi Й“oof ЕӢ Й“oofoha-buuri.
5.8: Wa a Й“aya, pesiЙ— ca nikiis ca na yakak ca ndaЕӢkiyaah-kanak ca na nikiis ca (24) ЖҙekiЙ—ta KuyaЕӢ Mbaala Жҙina. Raak yaa nu nga ambiЙ— koora na kaas urus riifiЙ— na cuuraay, cuuraay ceem ceЙ— kiim ciЕӢ Й“o'-Kooh ci.
5.9: ЖҒa ЖҙeekeeЙ—a Жҙeek as an : В« Fu yeyyoo'iЙ— Й“ay teerndi, fu nihis ndaЙ— ci. Laam fu hoosuuЙ— ne fu seeЖҙkohu te na Гұif miЕӢ Й—a fu tosiЙ— wuu Kooh Й“o' laayiЙ—, ngaЕӢ heet ci jen na peЙ—eem ci jen, cuuЙ“ ci jen na kur ci jen.
5.10: Fu tumiЙ— Й“a Nguur, fu tummba Й“a seeЖҙkiЙ—oh wuu KoohiЕӢ Й“oo te Й“a hey nike buur ЕӢ kehЖҙi jen. В»
5.11: ЕҠ markissa, ЕӢ kerahha hooso malaaka laayoh na laayoh, Й“a nikee Й“i milyongi milyong malaaka, Й“a willa Й“oofoha-buura, na pesiЙ— ca na yakak ca.
5.12: Ca ЖҙeekeeЙ—a ЕӢ Й—afka an : В« KuyiЕӢ Mbaali Жҙini hoosu eЙ—aah hatil, na raak-raak, na liiЙ“ohaaЙ— moЙ—iЙ—, na doole, a yi eЙ—aah cir, a yakЙ—aah a yi Жҙeekaah. В»
5.13: ЕҠ nammba kerah in ci Kooh fer ЕӢ Eel ci, na kehЖҙi na ooЙ“ kehЖҙi na Й—ooЖҙ cookmi, in ci nik ЕӢ Adina jen ЖҙeekeeЙ—a an : В« Yi Й“oof ЕӢ Й“oofoha-buuri na KuyiЕӢ Mbaali Жҙini, Жҙeeksaat, Й“a yakЙ—assaat, Й“a eЙ—u cir na hatil po faw ! В»
5.14: PesiЙ— ca nikiis ca woyeeЙ—a ne В« Amiin ! В» Te yakak ca raЙ—ukka Гұar, ГұaamkeeЙ—a.

6.1: ЕҠ ineem, ЕӢ hotta KuyaЕӢ Mbaala Жҙina nihsiЙ— ndaЙ—a koc ЕӢ ca yasna-kanak ca, ЕӢ kerahha pesiЙ— yino ЕӢ ca nikiis ca leehkeeЙ—a findi inding an : В« Haya ! В»
6.2: Жіutta ЕӢ hotta panis yaanow puliЙ—, yi rapee Й—e ammba Й“is ciЕӢ Й—e ; a eЙ—uusa mbahne-buur, a cootta ne a saahisa, laam a yi min.
6.3: Wa Kuya nihis ndaЙ—a kanakЙ—oh, ЕӢ kerahha pesiЙ—i kanakЙ—oh woyiЙ— ne В« Haya ! В»
6.4: Panis wiiriis, ruumind coy, pulla ; yi rapee Й—e eЙ—uusa hatil nihsoha jamiЕӢ kehЖҙi, a eЙ—u wa ne Й“ooЙ“i aptiЙ—ohee ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ Й“a. A eЙ—uusa ndang yakak.
6.5: Wa Kuya nihis ndaЙ—a kaahayЙ—oh, ЕӢ kerahha pesiЙ—i kaahayЙ—oh woyiЙ— ne : В« Haya ! В» Jaarra ЕӢ hotta panis suusus, yi rapee Й—e ammba balaas ЕӢ yaah.
6.6: ЕҠ kerahha in mand na hooso ЕӢ leero pesiЙ— ca nikiis ca woyeeЙ—a ne : В« Andaar bele na care hooЙ“uk panguk, andaar lorso kaahay na care hooЙ“uk panguk ! Waaye diwliini na biiГұi kanaa ca laal ! В»
6.7: Wa Kuya nihis ndaЙ—a nikiisЙ—oh, ЕӢ kerahha hoosooriЕӢ pesiЙ—i nikiisЙ—oh woyiЙ— ne : В« Haya ! В»
6.8: Jaarra ЕӢ hotta panis sam hiliir. Yi rapee Й—e teeksee "Kakaan ki", Jaanim taammba nga Й—e. ЖҒa eЙ—uusa hatil ЕӢ haaЖҙiЕӢ haaЖҙiЕӢ kehЖҙi ne Й“a ap Й“a na ndang, Й“um na aЙ—, Й“inooЙ“i na kosaay ki na kaЙ“kohe, Й“i tas nga, Й“a apoh Й“a Й—oopaat-nduuf.
6.9: Wa Kuya nihis ndaЙ—a yatuusЙ—oh, ЕӢ hotta ЕӢ ooЙ“ seeЖҙkohaani ruuh ciЕӢ Й“ooЙ“i apu sagu ГұaakiЙ— woo kiЕӢ Kooh na seedeeni Й“a seede'ee wa.
6.10: ЖҒa leehkeeЙ—a ЕӢ Й—afka an : В« HeЙ— Й“oo yi hool te fu keeh, cooy fu na hee atte'e Й“i gen kehЖҙa kiЙ—a, fu wirndukiЙ— Й“oo Гұif miЕӢ Й“oo aamu ? В»
6.11: ЕҠ ndeem, yaa nu nga Й—ah eЙ—uusa kulЙ“a yaanow hutiЙ—, Й“a woyuusa ne Й“a Й“aataat iЙ—siЙ—uk Жҙissuut po Й“i joy apu jen findiiЙ“a, apu ; Й“eЙ— Й“i Й“aah na Й“a pangki wuu Kooh na kos.
6.12: Жіutta ЕӢ hotissa Kuya nihsiЙ— ndaЙ—a yasna-yino'Й—oh, weЙ— kehЖҙi yoondЙ—ukoh yoondЙ—uk keeh-keeh, nohi nikka suusus findi kulЙ“a ruy, caЙ“ni findi wa hend jen wa nikka ruumind haa Гұif.
6.13: Hor ciЕӢ eel ci keeneeЙ—a ЕӢ kehЖҙi. Ca keeneeЙ—a findi rim ndun ruundaaЙ—i, ci puuЙ—is laayiЙ— na yookЙ—e.
6.14: Eel ci cooteeЙ—a findi basngi na lemse, tangooci jen na Й—isik ci masuЙ“ wil jen kurkiЙ—asseeЙ—a ЕӢ Й—isik ci ca nik.
6.15: Buur ciЕӢ kehЖҙi na kilifaaci na heЙ— garat ci na heЙ— alal ci na heЙ— hatil ci na Й“inooЙ“i jen, Гұaam na nikaaЙ—i Гұaam, Й“a kaЙ—ta, Й“a Й—asЙ—ukeeЙ—a ЕӢ hur ca, na atoh caЕӢ tangooca.
6.16: ЖҒa woyeeЙ—a tangooca na atoh ca ne : В« Keenaat ЕӢ Й—afuk Й“oo, Й—u Й—asiЙ— Й“oo ne Yi Й“oof ЕӢ Й“oofoha-buuri hotuu Й“oo, Й—u Й—asiЙ— Й“oo ЕӢ ayruki KuyiЕӢ Mbaali Жҙini ayruk,
6.17: laam mbehi yakkiЕӢ ayrukiЕӢ Й“a hayiЙ—, te ya Й“a min tufkiЙ—oh naa ? В»

7.1: Жіutta ЕӢ hotta malaaka nikiis tufkiЙ— ЕӢ koГұ ci nikiis ciЕӢ kehЖҙi. Ca ammba puuЙ—is ci nikiis ciЕӢ kehЖҙi ne ali puuЙ—is puuЙ—suu ЕӢ kehЖҙi na cookmi, na kidig nu wa min nik Й—ah.
7.2: Жіutta ЕӢ hotta malaaka wiiriis rapiЙ— ЕӢ Й“ak pulohaaЙ—-noh, ambiЙ— ГұaasohaaniЕӢ Kooh yi na pese ; a leehukka malaakaaca nikiis ca. Malaakaaci nikiis ceem, ceЙ— onu ne ca yahroh kehЖҙi, ca yahroh cookmi.
7.3: A leehuk ca an : В« Sekaat, bala Й—u yahrohan kehЖҙi na cookmi na kidig ci Й—ah, Й“i na pangkiЙ—e KoohiЕӢ Й“oo, Й“oo Гұaas Й“a ЕӢ puk ciЕӢ Й“a paaЙ—. В»
7.4: ЕҠ woyuusa Й“ooЙ“i Гұaasu findi Й“a hend : ЖҒa nikee junni-teemet na junni-ndaЕӢkiyaah-nikiis na junni-nikiis (144.000) ЕӢ cuuЙ“ ciЕӢ Israayel jen.
7.5: Junni-ndaЕӢkiyaah na junni-kanak (12.000) ЕӢ cuuЙ“iЕӢ Yudaa, junni-ndaЕӢkiyaah na junni-kanak (12.000) ЕӢ cuuЙ“iЕӢ Ruben, junni-ndaЕӢkiyaah na junni-kanak (12.000) ЕӢ cuuЙ“iЕӢ Gaad,
7.6: junni-ndaЕӢkiyaah na junni-kanak (12.000) ЕӢ cuuЙ“iЕӢ Aser, junni-ndaЕӢkiyaah na junni-kanak (12.000) ЕӢ cuuЙ“iЕӢ Naftaali, junni-ndaЕӢkiyaah na junni-kanak (12.000) ЕӢ cuuЙ“iЕӢ Manasse,
7.7: junni-ndaЕӢkiyaah na junni-kanak (12.000) ЕӢ cuuЙ“iЕӢ Simeyong, junni-ndaЕӢkiyaah na junni-kanak (12.000) ЕӢ cuuЙ“iЕӢ Lewi, junni-ndaЕӢkiyaah na junni-kanak (12.000) ЕӢ cuuЙ“iЕӢ Issaakar,
7.8: junni-ndaЕӢkiyaah na junni-kanak (12.000) ЕӢ cuuЙ“iЕӢ Sabuloon, junni-ndaЕӢkiyaah na junni-kanak (12.000) ЕӢ cuuЙ“iЕӢ Yuusufa, junni-ndaЕӢkiyaah na junni-kanak (12.000) ЕӢ cuuЙ“iЕӢ Benyaamin, Й“a jen, Й“a Гұaasuusa ЕӢ puk. Mboolndi minЙ—i kindu
7.9: Wi ЕӢ hot Й“ooЙ“i Гұaasu Й“eem po Жҙutta, ЕӢ markissa, ЕӢ hotissa mboolo keeh-keeh, wi ali Й“o' minЙ—i kind. ЖҒooЙ“eem pulohee kur nu nik, heet nu nik, cuuЙ“ nu nik na peЙ—eem nu nik. ЖҒa tufukka ЕӢ fiki Й“oofoha-buura na KuyaЕӢ Mbaala Жҙina, Й“a Й“ekkee kulЙ“a yaanow hutiЙ—, Й“a ammba raang njang ЕӢ yaah.
7.10: ЖҒa leehkeeЙ—a an : В« KoohiЕӢ Й“oo yi Й“oof ЕӢ Й“oofoha-buuri, na KuyiЕӢ Mbaali Жҙini, mucЙ—iЙ— Й“oo. В»
7.11: Malaakaaca jen nikee tufkiЙ—, willa Й“oofoha-buura na yakak ca na pesiЙ— ca nikiis ca. Ca Жҙekka ЕӢ fiki Й“oofoha-buura po fikiiciЕӢ ca degukka ЕӢ kehЖҙi, ca ГұaamkeeЙ—a Kooh
7.12: an : В« Amiin ! KoohiЕӢ Й“oo a yi Жҙeekaah, a yi feyoh, a yi HeЙ— liiЙ“ohaaЙ— moЙ—iЙ—, a yi corkiЙ—aah, a yi eЙ—aah cir, te hatil na doole genaat gen na Й—e po faw ! Amiin ! В»
7.13: Yino ЕӢ yakak ca woosa so ne : В« ЖҒooЙ“i Й“ekuk kulЙ“a yaanow Й“ii, a Й“inde, Й“a puloh nde ? В»
7.14: ЕҠ loffa Й—e ne : В« Kilifaani a fu inaha. В» A woosa so ne : В« E Й“i puloh ЕӢ miskiЙ—a yakka ; Й“a naawiЙ— kulЙ“aaciЕӢ Й“a, Й“a yaanwiЙ—ta ca ЕӢ Гұif miЕӢ KuyiЕӢ Mbaali Жҙini.
7.15: WeЙ— tah po Й“a nikka ЕӢ fiki Й“oofohaaniЕӢ Kooh, buuri, Й“a Гұaamkee Й—e noh na wek ЕӢ kahnaЕӢ Й—e ; te Yi Й“oof ЕӢ Й“oofoha-buuri hey Й“a Й—ipe ЕӢ Й—iipiЕӢ Й—e.
7.16: ЖҒa aЙ—kissanЙ—i Й“a sifaЙ—kissanЙ—i ; noh damissanЙ—i Й“a, puuЙ—is dohissanЙ—i Й“a.
7.17: Laam KuyiЕӢ Mbaali Жҙini nik ЕӢ leerniЕӢ Й“oofoha-buuri hey Й“a niiЙ—e te a hey Й“a yurhiЙ—e ЕӢ cul ciЕӢ masmiЕӢ kipes ki. Te Kooh hey Й“a moosЙ—e muhun ciЕӢ Й“a jen. В»

8.1: Wa KuyaЕӢ Mbaala Жҙina nihis ndaЙ—a yasna-kanakЙ—oh, Asamaan tummba tek ini ree camban wahtu.
8.2: WeЙ— ЕӢ hotoh malaakaaci yasna-kanak ci na tufke ЕӢ fiki Kooh ; ca eЙ—uusa kuluЙ“ yasna-kanak.
8.3: Malaaka wiiriis hayya tufukka ЕӢ sero seeЖҙkohaana. A ambee anda cuuraay haЙ“Й—ohuuЙ— urus. A eЙ—uusa cuuraay laayiЙ— ne a ambsoh ca na kiim ciЕӢ Й“o'-Kooh ci jen, a eЙ—oh ca ЕӢ seeЖҙkohaani haЙ“Й—ohu urus, wi nik ЕӢ fiki Й“oofoha-buuri.
8.4: Wa a eЙ—oh ca, Й—uukriЕӢ cuuraay ci rapeeЙ—a ЕӢ fiki Kooh, wa hunnda na kiim ciЕӢ Й“o'-Kooh ci.
8.5: Жіutta malaakaani Й“ayya andaani, a tummbaa yongkaah po wa riiffa ЕӢ yongkaahiЕӢ seeЖҙkohaani. A njafoha ndaam, wa keennda ЕӢ kehЖҙi, jaarra inding ci laЙ“eeЙ—a, Й“i Й—uuЙ— kerhasseeЙ—a, wa melГұeeЙ—a, kehЖҙi yoondЙ—ukka. KuluЙ“ ci nikiis ci koc
8.6: Malaakaaci yasna-kanak ci ambee kuluЙ“ ci yasna-kanak ci tufukka ne ca kuluЙ“.
8.7: Yi koc kuluЙ“pa, weЙ— toЙ“ galacaac na yongkaah ambsukohiЙ— na Гұif hayoh, wa njafuusa ЕӢ kehЖҙi, haaЖҙ yino ЕӢ haaЖҙ ci kaahay ciЕӢ kehЖҙi hoommba, haaЖҙ yino ЕӢ haaЖҙ ci kaahay ciЕӢ kidig ci na paangfi iirndi nammba hoom.
8.8: Yi kanakЙ—oh kuluЙ“pa, inaa duu'in haa tango yakak kaЙ“iЙ— njafuusa ЕӢ cookmi. HaaЖҙ yino ЕӢ haaЖҙ ci kaahay ciЕӢ cookmi nikka Гұif,
8.9: haaЖҙ yino ЕӢ haaЖҙ ci kaahay ciЕӢ feruuЙ— ci na pese ЕӢ cookmi kaannda, haaЖҙ yino ЕӢ haaЖҙ ci kaahay ciЕӢ gaal ci yahrohuusa.
8.10: Yi kaahayЙ—oh kuluЙ“pa, hor yakak puloh eel ci, wa jaaleeЙ—a jafjaf. Wa keennda ЕӢ haaЖҙ yino ЕӢ haaЖҙ ci kaahay ciЕӢ kal ci na cul ciЕӢ masuЙ“ ci.
8.11: Horeem teeku " Absinta " . HaaЖҙ yino ЕӢ haaЖҙ ci kaahay ciЕӢ masuЙ“ ci jen nikka absinta , ca aayya po Й“ooЙ“a anee nga, laayiЙ— nga Й“a kaannda.
8.12: Yi nikiisЙ—oh kuluЙ“pa, ЕӢ ndeem, haaЖҙ yino ЕӢ haaЖҙ ci kaahay ciЕӢ nohi na caЙ“ni na hor ci laЙ“uusa ne haaЖҙ yino ЕӢ haaЖҙ ciЕӢ wa kaahay ci Гұuus ; siГұaariЕӢ mbehi Гұakka haaЖҙ yino ЕӢ haaЖҙ ciЕӢ wa kaahay ci, wiЕӢ weki nammba mand Й—aa.
8.13: ЕҠ markissa. ЕҠ hotta caango pundeeЙ—a ЕӢ Й—afka Й—afka, ЕӢ kerahha Й—e leehkeeЙ—a an : В« Cooy naamo ! Naamo ! Naamo ! Mas Й—u Й“i gen ЕӢ kehЖҙi, sagu kuluЙ“ ci tas, ci malaakaaci kaahay ci kulЙ“an. В»

9.1: Wi malaakaani yatuusЙ—oh kuluЙ“, ЕӢ hotta hor ЕӢ kehЖҙi, keenoh eel ci. Wa eЙ—uusa caaЙ“ndiЕӢ nunga topaaЙ—iina.
9.2: Wa rangissa nunga topaaЙ—iina, Й—uuku puloheeЙ—a nga haa Й—uuku puur yakiЙ—, nohi na jawuuni Гұuussa tuЙ— sagu Й—uukra.
9.3: Njeeleer ci puleeЙ—a ЕӢ Й—uukreem, ca yongeeЙ—a kehЖҙi ; ca eЙ—uusa hatil ndangal.
9.4: Ca sangohuusa tum miskiЙ— paangiici na kidig ci na in nu na paare Й—ah, waaye ca yurhiЙ—uusa ЕӢ Й“o' ci raakЙ—i ГұaasiЕӢ Kooh ЕӢ puk ciЕӢ Й“a.
9.5: Ca onseeЙ—i ne ca ap Й“a, waaye ca onsee ne ca mbugal Й“a rek ini ree caЙ“in yatuus. MiskiЙ—i ca eЙ—ohee hendee na wiЕӢ tap ndangal.
9.6: ЕҠ mbeh ceem, Й“ooЙ“i hey waake kakaan te Й“a hotanЙ—aa. ЖҒa hey maЙ—e kakaan waaye kakaan ki nupan Й“a nup !
9.7: Njeeleer ceem ca mand na panis ci tokЙ—u ne ca kaЙ— hiГұoha ; haf ciЕӢ ca raakee in mand na mbahne-buur haЙ“Й—ohu in mand na urus, fikiiciЕӢ ca mand na fiki Й“o'.
9.8: Ca raakee find haa find Й“itiЙ“, te sis ciЕӢ ca mannda na sis gaynde.
9.9: DaЙ— ciЕӢ ca haa ca Й“ekuk tiwiГұ te Й—uuЙ—iЕӢ paЙ“ ciЕӢ ca mannda na Й—uuЙ— wotiir panis laayiЙ— ci faЙ—suk hiГұoh.
9.10: Ca raakee kose raakiЙ— tapoha findi ceek, ini ca mbugalohee Й“ooЙ“i caЙ“in yatuus pulohee ЕӢ koseeceem.
9.11: MalaakaanaЕӢ nunga topaaЙ—iina a yi buuriЕӢ ca ; a teeku Abadoon ЕӢ heber, a teekuusa Apoliyoon ngaЕӢ gerek, wa tokis yahrohoh.
9.12: Naamooni koc cootiЙ—, Жҙut Й—ah naamo kanak ceЙ—i hay. KulЙ“a yasna-yino'Й—oh
9.13: Wi malaakaani yasna-yino'Й—oh kuluЙ“ weЙ— ЕӢ kerhoh hooso. Hoosooreem pulohee wiic [ci nikiis] ci nik ЕӢ koГұ ciЕӢ seeЖҙkohaani ursi nik ЕӢ fiki Kooh.
9.14: Hoosoori woosa malaakaani yasna-yino'Й—oh, yi Й“ay kulЙ“i ne : В« FaЙ—sa malaakaaca nikiis ca ceenu ЕӢ sero Ewfaraat, kala yakka. В»
9.15: Malaakaaca nikiis ca faЙ—suusa, ceЙ— kooЙ—kiЙ—assee ne ca ap haaЖҙ yino ЕӢ haaЖҙ ci kaahay ciЕӢ Й“ooЙ“i gen kehЖҙi, ЕӢ kiis keem na caЙ“neem na mbeheem na wahtuuneem.
9.16: HiГұohoh ca rapee panis ca, ЕӢ woyseen findi Й“a hend, Й“a nikee milyong teemet-kanak (200.000.000).
9.17: ЕҠ ini ЕӢ hot findi heeЖҙ, panis ceem na Й“i rapee ca Й“ekkee teemb ЕӢ daЙ—i tiwiГұ ruumind haa yongkaah, na bulo cim, na mbohha haa suufar . Haf ciЕӢ panis ci mand na haf gaynde, nguЙ“ ciЕӢ ca pulЙ—eeЙ—a yongkaah na Й—uuku na suufar .
9.18: HaaЖҙ yino ЕӢ haaЖҙ ci kaahay ciЕӢ Й“ooЙ“i apuusa ЕӢ naamooci kaahay ci pulohee ЕӢ nguЙ“ ciЕӢ panis ci : yongkaaha, Й—uukra na suufara .
9.19: HatiliЕӢ ca nikee ЕӢ nguЙ“ ciЕӢ ca na koseeciЕӢ ca : KoseeciЕӢ ca mandee na iiГұ ; ca raakee haf, ca tumohee miskiЙ— na haf ceem.
9.20: Waaye Й“o' ci Й“inooЙ“i, Й“i naamooceem apeeЙ—i, ineem taheeЙ—i po Й“a Й“oЖҙsohha tumohaaЙ—. ЖҒa rissa na nataal ci Й“a haЙ“Й—oote, Й“a rissa Гұaamuk jiiniici, na kooh ci Й“a haЙ“Й—ohee urus wala haalis, moos wala atoh wala ndooЙ—, ci minЙ—i hot minЙ—i kerah, minЙ—i tiind.
9.21: ЖҒa faЙ—Й—i apoh, Й“a faЙ—Й—i tamb kiЕӢ Й“a, na faankoh sangohuuЙ—, na rok.

10.1: ЕҠ markissa, ЕӢ hotta malaaka wiiriis raakiЙ— hatil ruhsoheeЙ—a Asamaan, a Й“ekkee eel, Гұaangi-Гұaangi willa hafiЕӢ Й—e, fikiiriЕӢ Й—e mandee na nohi, kot ciЕӢ Й—e mannda na yongkaah, tufkiЙ— haa kumbin.
10.2: A ambee ЕӢ yaah ce teere Жҙin rangsuuЙ—. A degga kotiЕӢ Й—e Гұaahmi ЕӢ Й—afuk cookmi, wi singi ЕӢ kehЖҙi.
10.3: A leehukka ЕӢ Й—afka findi gayndeeni na ЕӢaare. Wa a leehuk rek, inding ca yasna-kanak ca kerhukka.
10.4: Wa inding ca yasna-kanak ca laЙ“, ЕӢ heeЙ—a fiise ini ca woo, ЕӢ kerahha hooso ЕӢ Eel ci, wa woosa so ne : В« ЖҠasЙ—a in ci inding ci yasna-kanak ci woo, ca nikaat kumpa, kinaa ca fiis. В»
10.5: ЕҠ ndeem, malaakaani meeЙ“pa yaahiЕӢ Й—e Гұaahmi a yurhiЙ—taa ЕӢ Eel ci.
10.6: A ginnja ЕӢ Kooh yi na pese po faw, yi fer Eel ci na ini nik nga jen, na kehЖҙi na ini nik nga jen, na cookmi na ini nik nga jen. A woosa ne : В« SekЙ—oh raakisЙ—i !
10.7: Waaye jamanooni malaakaani yasna-kanakЙ—oh kulЙ“an, ini Kooh kooЙ—uk tum te a Й—asЙ—ohhaa hey raake, findi woo ki baahiЙ—i a woo Гұaam ciЕӢ Й—e, woosuuЙ— ci. В»
10.8: Hoosoori woyee na so ЕӢ Eel ci woyissa so ne : В« KaЙ—a fu Й“ay teerndi Жҙini rangsu ЕӢ yaahiЕӢ malaakaani tufuk ЕӢ cookmi na kehЖҙi В»
10.9: ЕҠ kaЙ—ta ЕӢ woosa malaakaani ne a eЙ—aat to teerndi Жҙini. A woosa so ne : В« ЖҒayaa ! Te fu Гұama ; wa hey aaye ЕӢ rookiЕӢ Й—a waaye wa hey celme ЕӢ nguЙ“iЕӢ Й—a findi kuum. В»
10.10: ЕҠ teyya teerndi ЕӢ yaah malaakaani, ЕӢ Гұammbaa ; wa celemmba findi kuum ЕӢ nguЙ“iЕӢ ngo waaye wi ЕӢ Гұama, wa aayya hak ЕӢ rookiЕӢ ngo.
10.11: ЕҠ woyuusa ne : В« ЕҠ tiikiЕӢ Kooh fu joyiЙ— woyis woo-woosuuЙ— ЕӢ ini kaЙ— ЕӢ cuuЙ“ laayiЙ—, na kur laayiЙ—, na peЙ—eem laayiЙ—, na buur laayiЙ—. В»

11.1: Жіutta ЕӢ eЙ—uusa hapeel mand na ndooЙ— Й“eesoha. Yi eЙ— to wa woosa so ne : В« KaЙ—a fu Й“eesa Kahan Kooh na ini wila ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙi na seeЖҙkohaana, fu kind Й“ooЙ“a na Гұaamke nga.
11.2: Waaye ini wila ЕӢ hari, kanaa Й“ees, faЙ—aa laam e kosaaЙ—iici eЙ—uu wa : ЖҒa hey daksohe kur kiЕӢ Kooh ini ree caЙ“in ndaЕӢkiyaah-nikiis na kanak (42).
11.3: ЕҠ hey tuuЖҙe seedeeciЕӢ ngo kanak ci, Й“a Й“ekuk kulЙ“a ruy te Й“a woo na Й“ooЙ“i ЕӢ tiikiЕӢ ngo ini ree neeh junni na neeh teemet-kanak na neeh ndaЕӢkiyaah-yasna-yino (1260) . В»
11.4: Seedeecii, e Й“eЙ— tas ciЕӢ oliiw ci kanak ci na laampaaci kanak ci te Й“a tufkiЙ— ЕӢ fiki HeЙ— kehЖҙi.
11.5: ЖҒo' waaЙ— Й“a tum miskiЙ— Й—ah, yongkaah hey pule ЕӢ nguЙ“ ciЕӢ Й“a, wa hoomiЙ— Й“i sang Й“a ; ee di', Й“o' nu waaЙ— Й“a tum miskiЙ— Й—ah, a kaanohan Й—aa.
11.6: ЖҒa onuuЙ— ne Й“a min rang eel ci po ali toЙ“ keenuu ЕӢ kehЖҙi ЕӢ jamanooni Й“a woyohan ЕӢ tiikiЕӢ Kooh. ЖҒa namiЙ— onu ne Й“a min Й“oЖҙis masuЙ“ ci Гұif te Й“a namiЙ— min ruhsiЙ— ЕӢ kehЖҙi naamo nu nik, wahtu nu neЙ“oh Й“a Й—ah.
11.7: Waaye Й“a Жҙut seede Й—ah, Й—oopti puloh nunga topaaЙ—iina hey hee hiГұohe na Й“a, a saah Й“a, a ap Й“a.
11.8: FiЙ—aaf ciЕӢ Й“a faЙ—san ЕӢ mbeeddaanaЕӢ kur-taaha yakka na mandtiЙ—kohse Sodom wala Misra. HeЙ— Й“a daaЖҙohu ЕӢ kurwaa ЕӢ kur-taaheem.
11.9: ЖҒi Й“o' Й“aah ЕӢ cuuЙ“ ci jen na heet ci jen na peЙ—eem ci jen na kur ci jen hey marke fiЙ—aaf ciЕӢ Й“a, ini ree neeh kaahay na camban te Й“a hey sangohe ne Й“a Й“eku ЕӢ ruy-ruy.
11.10: ЖҒooЙ“i gen kehЖҙi hey neЙ“se ЕӢ kakaan kiЕӢ woosuuЙ— ci kanak ceem, Й“a hey mbuumbaaye po Й“a aaftiЙ—ohe sagu miskiЙ— ci Й“a Й“ekee Й“a.
11.11: Waaye wi neeh ci kaahay ceem na cambani coot, iik kipes puloh ЕӢ Kooh hayya, aassa fiЙ—aaf ci ; weЙ— Й“a kurkoh Й“a tufukka. Jaarra Й“ooЙ“i markee Й“a tiitta po Й“a kot-kotЙ—eeЙ—a.
11.12: Hooso meeЙ“uuЙ— kerhukka ЕӢ Asamaan wa woosa woosuuЙ— ci kanak ci ne : В« Rapaat ndii ! В» Eel Й“ayya Й“a, Й“a rappa Asamaan. SangiЙ— ciЕӢ Й“a hoteeЙ—a nga.
11.13: ЕҠ Й—iska Й—iska, kehЖҙi yoondЙ—ukka yoondЙ—uk keeh-keeh, haaЖҙ yino ЕӢ haaЖҙ ci ndaЕӢkiyaah ciЕӢ kur-taaha keennda. ЖҒo' junni-yasna-kanak (7000) kaannda ЕӢ yoondЙ—ukaЕӢ kehЖҙa. ЖҒi rawЙ—i kaan nga jaahiЙ—ta, Й“a yakЙ—eeЙ—a KoohiЕӢ Eel ci.
11.14: Naamooni kanakЙ—oh cootiЙ—. WeЙ—Й—i, wi kaahayЙ—ohan wa Й—ii hayeeЙ—a maaГұaaЙ—i ! KulЙ“i yasna-kanakЙ—oh
11.15: Wa kehЖҙa yoond po Жҙutta, malaakaani yasna-kanakЙ—oh kuluЙ“pa, Й“i hooso meeЙ“uuЙ— kerhukka ЕӢ Eel ci woyeeЙ—a ne : В« Kotii, nguuriЕӢ Adina, wii ЕӢ yaah HeЙ— Й“oo na KiristaaniЕӢ Й—e te a nikan nik buur po faw. В»
11.16: Yakak ca ndaЕӢkiyaah-kanak ca na nikiis ca (24) Й“oofee ЕӢ fiki Kooh ЕӢ Й“oofoha-buur ca Й“a eЙ—see, yippa puk ciЕӢ Й“a ЕӢ kehЖҙi, Й“a ГұaamkeeЙ—a Kooh,
11.17: Й“a woyeeЙ—a ne : В« ЖҒoo Й“ii corkiЙ— Й—a HeЙ— Й“oo Kooh, HeЙ—-hatil, yaf nikee te yaf nik, hatiliЕӢ Й—a yakiЙ— ! ЖҒoo Й“ii corkiЙ— Й—a ЕӢ kooЙ—i fu kooЙ— hatiliЕӢ Й—a, fu tufkiЙ—ta NguuriЕӢ Й—a.
11.18: CuuЙ“ ci ayrukeen, waaye ayrukiЕӢ Й—a weЙ— hay. Jamanooni fu atte'ohan kaaniЙ— ci reyiЙ—, wi fu aafohan Гұaam ciЕӢ Й—a, woosuuЙ— ci na Й“o'-Kooh ci na Й“i nup tiikiЕӢ Й—a, Жҙin na yakak. WeЙ— jamanooni fu naman yahroh Й“i na yahrohe kehЖҙi. В»
11.19: ЕҠ ineem, Kahan Kooh wi nik ЕӢ Eel ci, rangsukka, WahndeeniЕӢ ambtiЙ—ohiЕӢ Й—e hotukka nga. A melГұeeЙ—a, Й“i Й—uuЙ— kerhasseeЙ—a, inding ci laЙ“eeЙ—a, kehЖҙi yoondЙ—ukka, toЙ“ galacaac raakiЙ— hatil keennda.

12.1: Firnde yakak pulla ЕӢ eel ci, a nikee Й“itiЙ“, a lipukka nohi, caЙ“ni nikka ЕӢ ooЙ“ kot ciЕӢ Й—e, mbahne-buur haЙ“Й—ohu hor ndaЕӢkiyaah na kanak (12) willa hafiЕӢ Й—e.
12.2: A nikee rook po heeЙ—a Й“asle, a leehkeeЙ—a raak Й—e miskasseeЙ—a keeh-keeh.
12.3: Firnde wiiriis pulissa ЕӢ eel ci : a nikee iiГұ-safaal yakoh na yakoh ruumind haa yongkaah, a raakka haf yasna-kanak na wiic ndaЕӢkiyaah ; haf nu nga, raakka mbahne-buur.
12.4: Na koseekiЕӢ Й—e, a Й“oorra haaЖҙ yino ЕӢ haaЖҙ ci kaahay ciЕӢ hor ci ; a njaffa ca ЕӢ kehЖҙi. A tufukka ЕӢ fiki Й“itЙ“a ne yeem Й“asil rek Й—ah, a Гұam kuЙ“ka.
12.5: ЖҒitЙ“a Й“asilla kuЙ“u Жҙaar yi adgohan cuuЙ“ ci jen adgoh dengiЙ— na salma. KuЙ“kiЕӢ Й“itЙ“i arra rapЙ—u ЕӢ sero Kooh, yi Buur, na sero Й“oofohaaniЕӢ Й—e.
12.6: ЖҒitЙ“a nak, a saandohha ЕӢ kehЖҙa hulanga, Й—iska Kooh kooЙ—kiЙ—ee Й—e ne a nik nga, a eЙ—see kaГұam ini ree neeh junni na teemet-kanak na ndaЕӢkiyaah-yasna-yino (1260).
12.7: ЕҠ ineem hiГұoh raakka ЕӢ Eel ci, Mikayel na malaakaaci a adgoh hiГұoheeЙ—a na iiГұ-safaala na malaakaacaЕӢ Й—e, iiГұ-safaala na malaakaacaЕӢ Й—e nameeЙ—a hiГұoh na Й“a.
12.8: Waaye iiГұ-safaala raakЙ—i ndam nga, tahha po a yi na malaakaaciЕӢ Й—e, Й“a raakisЙ—i nikoha ЕӢ Eel ci.
12.9: A njafuusa ЕӢ hara a yi iiГұ-safaali yakki, iiГұa Й—eЙ“gaan yi na woyse siЙ“niЙ—i, wala Seytaani, yi na ГұaaГұohe Adina jen ; a njafuusa ЕӢ kehЖҙi a yi na malaakaaciЕӢ Й—e.
12.10: Жіutta, ЕӢ kerahha ЕӢ Eel ci hooso meeЙ“uuЙ— woyeeЙ—a ne : В« ЖҠiski wa nik jamanooniЕӢ muci hayiЙ—, KoohiЕӢ Й“oo teeЙ“ohiЙ— hatiliЕӢ Й—e, a tufkiЙ—ta NguuriЕӢ Й—e. ЖҠiski wa nik KiristaaniЕӢ Й—e teeЙ“ohiЙ— min-min kiЕӢ Й—e. Seytaani, yi na yambe Й“aah ciЕӢ Й“oo te a meeЙ—ta Й“a yamb noh na wek ЕӢ fiki KoohiЕӢ Й“oo, a njafuuЙ— ЕӢ hara.
12.11: Waaye Й“eЙ— Й“i Й“aah ciЕӢ Й“oo, Й“a saahiЙ— Й—e sagu Гұif miЕӢ KuyiЕӢ Mbaali Жҙini na woo kiЕӢ seedeeciЕӢ Й“a, laam Й“a adgiЙ—eeЙ—i kiГұin ciЕӢ Й“a, Й“a sangeeЙ—i kaan.
12.12: WeЙ— tah, Eel ci na Й“ooЙ“i gen nga, neЙ“siЙ—kaat ! Waaye mas kehЖҙi na cookmi. Laam Seytaani ruhsiЙ— nga Й—u ayrukoh na ayrukoh sagu inhi a inah ne jamanooni a taskoh laayЙ—i. В»
12.13: Wa iiГұ-safaala hot ne a njafuuЙ— ЕӢ kehЖҙi, a taambiЙ—ta Й“itЙ“a Й“aslee kuЙ“ka Жҙaara.
12.14: Waaye Й“itЙ“a rahassa paЙ“ ci kanak ciЕӢ caangooni yakki ne a pund a kaЙ— kehЖҙa hulanga, Й—iska a kooЙ—kiЙ—u ne a eЙ—u kaГұam nga, ini ree kiis kaahay na camban ; a ussa iiГұa.
12.15: IiГұa puussa masuЙ“ laayiЙ— haa huluЙ“ ЕӢ finho Й“itЙ“a ne wa coottoh Й—e.
12.16: Waaye kehЖҙi hirippa Й“itЙ“a, wa rangsukka, wa onnda masma iiГұa puuse.
12.17: ЕҠ ineem, iiГұa ayrukka Й“itЙ“a, a kaЙ—ta hiГұoha na Й“i tas ЕӢ Й“i rimkoh nga Й—e, Й“i na taambЙ—e nakoh ciЕӢ Kooh te Й“a rissa ГұaakiЙ— in ci Yeesu woo.

13.1: ЕҠ hotta Й—oopaat, a pulohha cookmi, a raakee wiic ndaЕӢkiyaah na haf yasna-kanak, wiic nu nga raakka mbahne-buur te haf nu nga Й—ah fiisuusa tiik Й“aseeh ЕӢ Kooh.
13.2: ЖҠoopti ЕӢ hot mandee na ciЙ“ndo, kot ciЕӢ Й—e mandee na kot uursu , nguЙ“iЕӢ Й—e mannda na nguЙ“ gaynde ; iiГұ-safaali eЙ—ta Й—e hatiliЕӢ Й—e na Й“oofoha-buur, wiЕӢ Й—e, a tummba Й—e kilifa keeh-keeh.
13.3: Yino ЕӢ haf ciЕӢ Й—e mandee na ini gaaГұuk gaaГұi na ape. Waaye gaaГұa min ap waam wirra. ЖҒi kehЖҙi jen feyuusa ЕӢ ineem, Й“a ГұaakiЙ—ta Й—oopta.
13.4: ЖҒooЙ“a Гұaamukka iiГұ-safaala, sagu tuma a tumee Й—oopta kilifa. ЖҒa jen Й“a nammba Гұaamuk Й—oopta, Й“a woyeeЙ—a ne : В« Yaa mand na Й—oopti ? Yaa min hiГұoh na Й—e ? В»
13.5: A onuusa ne a woyee woo yaksiЙ—koha na woo Й“aseeh ЕӢ Kooh. A onuusa ne a tiindiЙ— ini neЙ“ Й—e caЙ“in ndaЕӢkiyaah-nikiis na kanak (42).
13.6: A cammba Й“as Kooh, a Й“aseeЙ—a tiikiЕӢ Kooh, na genohaanaЕӢ Kooh, na Й“i gen ЕӢ Eel ci jen.
13.7: A teyЙ—ohuusa hiГұoh na Й“o'-Kooh, a nammba teyЙ—ohu ne a saah Й“a ; a rahassa hatili a degohan heet ci jen yaah na cuuЙ“ ci jen na peЙ—eem ci jen na kur ci jen.
13.8: ЖҒooЙ“i gen kehЖҙi jen hey Й—e Гұaamke, Й—al Й“i tiik ciЕӢ Й“a fiisu wa Adina feru ngaЕӢ teerndiЕӢ kipes ki, wiЕӢ KuyiЕӢ Mbaali Жҙini hoosu.
13.9: ЖҒo' nu raak nof Й—ah, a kerhaat !
13.10: Kooh tum ЕӢ Й“oyi ne a hey taЖҙse Й—ah, a hey taЖҙse, Kooh tum ЕӢ Й“oyi ne a apohsan ndang Й—ah, a hey apse na ndang. Ndii weЙ— Й“o'-Kooh ci joy raakoh kos na min muГұ seke. ЖҠoopti puloh kehЖҙi
13.11: ЕҠ nammba hotis Й—oopaat wiiriis a pulohha kehЖҙi, a raakee wiic kanak findi wiic kuy mbaal Жҙin, waaye a jombee findi iiГұ-safaal.
13.12: A tiindЙ—oheeЙ—a hatiliЕӢ Й—oopti koc jen, ЕӢ fiki yeem. A Й“ekka kehЖҙi na Й“i gen nga ne Й“a Гұaamuk Й—oopti koc, ya gaaГұkee gaaГұi na ape te a wirra.
13.13: A tumeeЙ—a Й“i firnde yakak feyohiЙ—, po a ruhsiЙ—eeЙ—a yongkaah puloh eel ci ngaЕӢ kehЖҙi ЕӢ fiki Й“ooЙ“a jen.
13.14: ЕҠ ineem a muuЖҙiЙ—ta Й“i kehЖҙi sagu in ci feyohiЙ— ci a onsee ne a tum ca ЕӢ fiki Й—oopti koc. A haЙ“Й—iЙ—ukoheeЙ—a Й“a nataaliЕӢ Й—oopteem, yi gaaГұsee na ndang te a pesissa.
13.15: A onuusa ne a pesiЙ— nataaliЕӢ Й—oopti koc, wa min jomb, wa tum po Й“o' nu ГұaamukЙ—aa Й—ah, a apu.
13.16: A junnga Й“ooЙ“a jen ne Й“a waakЙ—u mandarga ЕӢ yaah-Гұaahum wala ЕӢ puk, yakak na komaaki, raakiЙ— na ГұakiЙ—, Гұaam na nikaaЙ—i Гұaam.
13.17: Ali Й“o' mineeЙ—i rom wala toon ne fu raakЙ—i mandargaaneem Й—ah, weЙ— tiikiЕӢ Й—oopti wala kindi hend na tiikiЕӢ Й—e.
13.18: Ndii, wa meeksoh inah-inah. ЖҒoyi ГұaaГұ waakaat kindi hend na tiikiЕӢ Й—oopti, ini wa tokis. Wa kindi hend na tiik Й“o', wa teemet-yasna-yino na ndaЕӢkiyaah-yasna-yino na yasna-yino (666).

14.1: ЕҠ markissa, ЕӢ hotta KuyiЕӢ Mbaali Жҙini tufkiЙ— ЕӢ tangooriЕӢ Siyong, a nikka na Й“o' junni-teemet na junni-ndaЕӢkiyaah-nikiis na junni-nikiis (144.000) Й“i fu inah ne tiikiЕӢ Й—e na wiЕӢ BaabiЕӢ Й—e fiisseen ЕӢ puk ciЕӢ Й“a.
14.2: ЕҠ kerahha hooso puloh Eel ci, wa Й—iiЙ—Й—eeЙ—a findi Й—uuЙ— masuЙ“ laayiЙ—, findi inding raakiЙ— hatil. Hoosoori ЕӢ kerhee mandee na koora'oh ci na koora'e.
14.3: ЖҒooЙ“a junni-teemet na junni-ndaЕӢkiyaah-nikiis na junni-nikiis ca (144.000) jen ЖҙeekeeЙ—a Жҙeek as ЕӢ fiki Й“oofoha-buura na pesiЙ— ca nikiis ca na yakak ca. Ali Й“o' mineeЙ—i jang Жҙeeka Й—al Й“ooЙ“eem, Й“eЙ— Й“i tossee ЕӢ kehЖҙi.
14.4: ЖҒooЙ“eem Й“a soЙ“eeЙ—i na Й“itiЙ“, Й“a hooliЙ— les. ЖҒa na ГұaakЙ—e KuyiЕӢ Mbaali Жҙini ЕӢ Й—isik nu a kaЙ— Й—ah. ЖҒa tosuuЙ— ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ Й“ooЙ“i ne Й“a eЙ—ohu findi waЙ—i koc wuu Kooh na KuyiЕӢ Mbaali Жҙini.
14.5: Lee moosЙ—i puloh ЕӢ nguЙ“ ciЕӢ Й“a, Й“a raakЙ—i ali sikka. Malaakaaci kaahay ci yegЙ—ohiЙ— atteena
14.6: ЕҠ markissa, ЕӢ hotissa malaaka wiiriis pundeeЙ—a ЕӢ Й—afka Й—afka. A Й“ayee YegЙ—ohiЕӢ Muci, wi genan gen, a joyyaa woo Й“ooЙ“i gen kehЖҙi, weЙ— kur ci jen, heet ci jen, peЙ—eem ci jen na cuuЙ“ ci jen.
14.7: A woyeeЙ—a ЕӢ Й—afka ne : В« Nupaat Kooh te Й—u yakЙ—ee Й—e. Laam wahtuuni a atte'ohan reyiЙ—. Г‘aamkaat Yi fer Eel ci na kehЖҙi na cookmi na cul ciЕӢ masuЙ“ ci. В»
14.8: Malaaka wiiriis yi kanakЙ—oh taammba nga Й—e woyeeЙ—a ne : В« Wa keeniЙ—, wa keeniЙ—, Babilon kur-taahi yakki, wi meeЙ— laariЙ— kur ci jen na biiГұiЕӢ wa, weЙ— faankohiЕӢ wa mbalayi. В»
14.9: Malaaka wiiriis yi kaahayЙ—oh taammba ЕӢ ca kanak ca, a woyeeЙ—a ЕӢ Й—afka ne : В« ЖҒo' nu Гұaamuk Й—oopti na nataaliЕӢ Й—e te a teyЙ—uk waakЙ—u mandarga ЕӢ puk wala ЕӢ yaah Й—ah,
14.10: Й“oyeem hey ane ЕӢ biiГұiЕӢ ayrukiЕӢ Kooh, biiГұi kooЖҙsaaЙ—iini a yiifЙ—assan ЕӢ kaasiЕӢ ayrukiЕӢ Kooh. Te a hey mbugalse na yongkaah na suufar , ЕӢ fiki malaakaaci hooliЙ— ci na KuyiЕӢ Mbaali Жҙini.
14.11: ЖҠuukriЕӢ mbugaliЕӢ Й“a Й—uukan Й—uuk po faw. ЖҒo' nu Гұaamuk Й—oopti na nataaliЕӢ Й—e, na Й“o' nu raak mandargaaniЕӢ tiikiЕӢ Й—e Й—ah, fu iЙ—siЙ—kanЙ—i, wa noh haa, wa wek haa. В»
14.12: Ndii, Й“o'-Kooh ci, Й“i na taambЙ—e nakoh ciЕӢ Й—e te Й“a kossa ЕӢ Yeesu, Й“a joyiЙ— min muГұ Й“a sek.
14.13: ЕҠ kerhissa hooso ЕӢ Eel ci, wa woyeeЙ—a so ne : В« Fiisa inii : Ini kooЙ—oh woti, Й“i Й“aahan ЕӢ HeЙ—i po Й“a kaanoh nga, Й“a neЙ“Й—iЙ— ! FuuЙ—si Hoolohngaani woo ne : вҖң Ee di' ! TumohaaЙ— ciЕӢ Й“a moЙ—iЙ— ci hey Й“a Й“ende, tahha po Й“a hey iЙ—siЙ—ke ЕӢ panguk ciЕӢ Й“a miskiЙ— ci. вҖқ В» NguЙ—i
14.14: ЕҠ markissa, ЕӢ hotta eel yaanow, Yi Й“oofee nga mandee na kuЙ“u Й“o'. A Й“ekukka mbahne-buur, haЙ“Й—ohu urus, a ammba nguЙ—oha kaaГұiЙ— ЕӢ yaah.
14.15: Malaaka wiiriis pulohha Kahan Kooh, a leehukka ЕӢ Й—afka, a woosa Yi Й“oofee ЕӢ eeli ne : В« NguЙ— reyiЙ— ; nguЙ—aahi ЕӢ kehЖҙi ruundiЙ—. Amba nguЙ—ohaaniЕӢ Й—a, fu nguЙ—. В»
14.16: WeЙ— Yi Й“oofee ЕӢ eeli raЙ—soh yaah, jaarra kehЖҙi nguЙ—uusa.
14.17: Malaaka wiiriis pulohha Kahan Kooh ЕӢ Eel ci, a namee amb nguЙ—oha kaaГұiЙ— ЕӢ yaah.
14.18: Malaaka wiiriis, yi adgohee yongkaahi, pulohha seeЖҙkohaana, a leehukka ya Й“ayee nguЙ—ohaana kaaГұiЙ—a ne : В« Ndung ciЕӢ reseГұiЕӢ kehЖҙi ruundiЙ—. Amba nguЙ—ohaaniЕӢ Й—a kaaГұiЙ—i, fu nguЙ— ndung ci. В»
14.19: Malaakaana raЙ—issa yaah ЕӢ kehЖҙi, a nguЙ—ta rim ciЕӢ reseГұiЕӢ kehЖҙi, a tummba ca ЕӢ pooЖҙohaani yakkiЕӢ ayrukiЕӢ Kooh.
14.20: ReseГұi pooЖҙuusa ЕӢ pooЖҙohaana, ngaЕӢ bilaf faЕӢ kur-taaha. Г‘if pulohha nga, wa rapeeЙ—a po wa gannga panis ЕӢ lahaЙ“, wa kaЙ—Й—eeЙ—a po wa reesa kilomeet teemet-kaahay (300).

15.1: ЕҠ hotissa mandarga wiiriis yakiЙ— feyohiЙ— ЕӢ Eel ci : Malaaka yasna-kanak Й“ayiЙ— naamooci yasna-kanak ci mirndoh, laam ayrukiЕӢ Kooh mitoh nga ca.
15.2: ЕҠ nammba hot in mand na cookom haa weer ambsukohiЙ— na yongkaah. ЖҒooЙ“i saah Й—oopti na nataaliЕӢ Й—e te Й“a teyЙ—ukЙ—i kindi hend na tiikiЕӢ Й—e, tufukka ЕӢ Й—afuk cookmaЕӢ weera, Й“a ammba kooraaca Kooh eЙ—ee Й“a ЕӢ yaah.
15.3: ЖҒa ЖҙeekeeЙ—a ЖҙeekiЕӢ Musaa, ГұaamiЕӢ Kooh, na ЖҙeekiЕӢ KuyiЕӢ Mbaali Жҙini an : В« HeЙ— Й“oo Kooh HeЙ—-hatil, in ci fu haЙ“iЙ— yakiЙ—, ca feyohiЙ— ! BuuriЕӢ cuuЙ“ ci, tumohaaЙ— ciЕӢ Й—a yurhiЙ—, ca lakiЙ— waas !
15.4: Ya Й“a kaaГұ Й—a nik neekaaЙ—i, HeЙ—i ? Ya Й“a sangan yakiЙ— tiikiЕӢ Й—a ? A fu dong hool. CuuЙ“ ci jen hey Й—a hee ЖҙekЙ—e ne Й“a Гұaamuk Й—a, Й“a hotiЙ— hooliЙ— in ci yurhiЙ— ci fu tum. В»
15.5: ЕҠ finho ineem, ЕӢ nammba hot ЕӢ Eel ci, ЖҠiski Hoolohngaani ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ Й—iipi na teeЙ“ohe AmbtiЙ—ohi. ЕҠ hottaa rangsukiЙ—.
15.6: Malaakaaci yasna-kanak ci ambee naamooci yasna-kanak ci pulohha nga ; ca Й“ekkee kulЙ“a leeЕӢ hooliЙ—, melciЙ—, ca tokukka seentur urus ЕӢ fisa.
15.7: Yino ЕӢ pesiЙ— ca nikiis ca eЙ—ta malaakaaci yasna-kanak ci kaas urus yasna-kanak riifiЙ— na ayrukiЕӢ Koohi na pese po faw.
15.8: ЖҠiska hoolohngaana riiffa na Й—uuku, sagu kiyak ki na hatiliЕӢ Kooh. Ali Й“o' mineeЙ—i aas ЕӢ Й—iska po findi naamooci yasna-kanak ci malaakaaci yasna-kanak ci Й“ayee mitoh.

16.1: ЕҠ kerhissa hooso meeЙ“uuЙ— puloh ЖҠiska Hoolohngaana, wa woyeeЙ—a malaakaaca yasna-kanak ca ne : В« KaЙ—aat Й—u yiifa ЕӢ kehЖҙi kaas ci yasna-kanak ciЕӢ ayrukiЕӢ Kooh. В»
16.2: WeЙ— malaakaani koc kaЙ—oh, a yiiffa kaasiЕӢ Й—e ЕӢ kehЖҙi, Й“i puus miskiЙ— nikka ЕӢ faan caЕӢ Й“ooЙ“a raakee mandargaanaЕӢ Й—oopta, Й“a Гұaamkee nataalaЕӢ Й—e.
16.3: Malaakaani kanakЙ—oh yiiffa kaasiЕӢ Й—e ЕӢ cookmi, masmiЕӢ cookmi nikka Гұif, findi Гұif Й“o' kaaniЙ— ; pesoh ciЕӢ cookmi jen kaannda.
16.4: Malaakaani kaahayЙ—oh yiiffa kaasiЕӢ Й—e ЕӢ kal ci na cul ciЕӢ masuЙ“ ci, ca nikka Гұif.
16.5: ЕҠ ineem, ЕӢ kerahha malaakaani Й“ayoh masmi woyiЙ— ne : В« Fu yurhiЙ—, fu yi nik, te yaf nike, fu hooliЙ— ; findi fu atte'oh, wa Й—aa.
16.6: Laam Й“eЙ— aam Гұif miЕӢ Й“o'-Kooh ci na woosuuЙ— ci te fu eЙ— Й“a Гұif ne Й“a an ; Й“a yeyyoo ineem. В»
16.7: Жіutta ЕӢ kerahha seeЖҙkohaana woyiЙ— ne : В« Ee di', HeЙ— Й“oo, Kooh HeЙ—-hatil, atteeniЕӢ Й—a keeh te wa yurhiЙ—. В»
16.8: Malaakaani nikiisЙ—oh yiiffa kaasiЕӢ Й—e ЕӢ nohi, nohi onuusa ne wa raaЙ“ee Й“ooЙ“a na yongkaahiЕӢ wa.
16.9: DohiЙ— miskiЙ— raaЙ“pa Й“ooЙ“a. ЖҒa Й“aseeЙ—a Kooh yi amboh naamooceem. ЖҒa sannga Й“oЖҙsoh tumohaaЙ—, Й“a yakiЙ—Й—i tiikiЕӢ Kooh.
16.10: Malaakaani yatuusЙ—oh yiiffa kaasiЕӢ Й—e ЕӢ Й“oofoha-buur, waЕӢ Й—oopta, kur ka a nikohee buur Гұuussa. ЖҒooЙ“a Й—oЙ“eeЙ—a peЙ—eem ciЕӢ Й“a sagu miskiЙ—a.
16.11: ЖҒa Й“aseeЙ—a KoohiЕӢ Eel ci sagu miskiЙ— ca rahsee Й“a na puus ca. ЖҒa Й“oЖҙsohЙ—i tumohaaЙ—.
16.12: Malaakaani yasna-yino'Й—oh yiiffa kaasiЕӢ Й—e ЕӢ kala yakka, Ewfaraat ; masma ЕӢiissa ne wa faЙ—iЙ— buur ci joy puloh pulohaaЙ—-noh waas.
16.13: ЕҠ hotta jiini kaahay ye hoolaaЙ—i'an, puleeЙ—a ЕӢ nguЙ“aЕӢ iiГұ-safaala na waЕӢ Й—oopta na waЕӢ woosuuЙ—a leye. Ca mandee na mboЙ“.
16.14: Ca jiini-safaal, ca na haЙ“Й—e in feyohiЙ—, ca kaЙ—ee ЕӢ buur ciЕӢ Adina jen ne ca cohЙ—oh Й“a wuu hiГұohiЕӢ mbehi yakkiЕӢ Kooh HeЙ—-hatil.
16.15: HeЙ— Й“oo woo ne : В« SikЙ—uka, mi yii hay findi rokoh. A neЙ“Й—iЙ—, Й“oyi neehЙ—i, yi ris na kulЙ“aaciЕӢ Й—e, a heyЙ—i tiinde tas-Й“arang po a kee raaka kaci nga ne a hotu Й—ah. В»
16.16: Jiini-safaal ci cohЙ—oh buur ci ЕӢ Й—iska na woyse Harmagedoon ЕӢ peЙ—eem heber.
16.17: Malaakaani yasna-kanakЙ—oh yiiffa kaasiЕӢ Й—e ЕӢ puuЙ—si, hooso meeЙ“uuЙ— puloh ЖҠiska Hoolohngaana, ЕӢ Й“oofoha-buura, woosa ne : В« Wa mitiЙ— ! В»
16.18: ЕҠ ineem wa melГұeeЙ—a, Й“i Й—uuЙ— kerhasseeЙ—a, wa indngeeЙ—a, kehЖҙi yoondЙ—ukka keeh-keeh ; yoondЙ—uk mand Й—aa moosЙ—i raakoh ina Й“o' nikoh ЕӢ kehЖҙi poyi.
16.19: Kur-taaha yakka pookka haaЖҙ kaahay, kur-taah ciЕӢ cuuЙ“ ci jen keennda. WeЙ— Kooh yurhiЙ—koh ЕӢ ini kaЙ— ЕӢ Babilon kur-taahi yakki, a aniЙ—taa biiГұiЕӢ kaasiЕӢ Й—e, biiГұiЕӢ ayrukiЕӢ Й—e dohЙ—i.
16.20: ЖҠisik ci masuЙ“ wilee jen cootta, tangooci sooЖҙca.
16.21: Galacaac yakak puloh eel ci keeneeЙ—a ЕӢ Й—afuk Й“ooЙ“a findi toЙ“. Waa nu nga Й—ah reyeen kilo ndaЕӢkiyaah-nikiis (40). ЖҒa Й“aseeЙ—a Kooh sagu naamooniЕӢ toЙ“iЕӢ galacaaci, laam wa nikee naamo miskiЙ— lool.

17.1: Жіutta malaaka yino ЕӢ ci yasna-kanak ci ambee kaas ci yasna-kanak ci hayya, woosa so ne : В« Haya ЕӢ teeЙ“ Й—a findi toonkohi yakki atte'ohsan, a yi kur-taahi yakki yipu ЕӢ sero Й“i masuЙ“ laayiЙ—.
17.2: Buur ciЕӢ kehЖҙi faankohiЙ— na Й—e te Й“ooЙ“iЕӢ kehЖҙi na laarohe toonkiЕӢ Й—e. В»
17.3: ЕҠ ineem, FuuЙ—siЕӢ Kooh ammba so, jaarra malaakaani Й“ayya so kehЖҙa hulanga. ЕҠ hotta Й“itiЙ“ Й“oofiЙ— ЕӢ Й—oopaat ruumind coy. FaanaЕӢ Й—oopta riifee na tiik Й“aseeh ЕӢ Kooh, a raakee haf yasna-kanak na wiic ndaЕӢkiyaah.
17.4: ЖҒitЙ“a Й“ekkee kulЙ“a ruumind eЙ—fiЙ— na ruumind coy, a riiffa na tokkaah urus, na peme na per. A ammba kaas urus ЕӢ yaah, riifiЙ— na in sepЖҙiЙ— na usЙ“i rimkoh ЕӢ toonkiЕӢ Й—e.
17.5: Tiiki Й—asЙ—ukiЙ—ii fiisseen ЕӢ pukiЕӢ Й—e : В« Babiloni yakki, yaayiЕӢ toonkoh ci, yaayiЕӢ tumohaaЙ— ci sepЖҙiЙ— ci ЕӢ adinaani. В»
17.6: ЕҠ hotta ne Й“itЙ“eem laariЙ— ЕӢ Гұif miЕӢ Й“o'-Kooh ci na wiЕӢ seedeeciЕӢ Yeesu. Wi ЕӢ hot Й—e, ЕӢ feyuusa lool.
17.7: Malaakaani woosa so ne : В« Wa joyЙ—i Й—a fey. ЕҠ hey Й—a teeЙ“e ini Й—asЙ—ukiЙ—i kaЙ— ЕӢ Й“itЙ“i na Й—oopti Й“ay Й—e, yi raak haf ci yasna-kanak ci na wiic ci ndaЕӢkiyaah ci.
17.8: ЖҠoopti fu hot, a nikeen waaye a nikisЙ—i. A pulohan nunga topaaЙ—iina, a kaЙ— Й—umbsa. ЖҒooЙ“i gen kehЖҙi Й“i tiik ciЕӢ Й“a fiisuuЙ—i ЕӢ teerndiЕӢ kipes ki ina Adina camboh poyi, Й“a hot Й—e Й—ah, Й“a hey feyse sagu ini a nikee, a nikisЙ—i te a hey hayisse.
17.9: Ndii wa meeksoh ГұaaГұ na raak inah-inah : Haf ci yasna-kanak ci ceЙ— tangooci yasna-kanak ci Й“itЙ“i Й“oof nga ca. Ca nam nik buur yasna-kanak :
17.10: Yatuus ci keeniЙ—, yasna-yino'Й—ohi nikiЙ— buur, yasna-kanakЙ—ohi hayЙ—i paaЙ— te a hay Й—ah, a joy nik buur jamano Жҙissuut.
17.11: Ini kaЙ— ЕӢ Й—oopti nikee te a nikisЙ—i, a yi ЕӢ haf ce a yi yasna-kaahayiЙ— Й“a, a kindohuuЙ— ЕӢ yasna-kanak ci, te aa kee Й—umbsa.
17.12: Wiic ci ndaЕӢkiyaah ci fu hot, Й“a buur, Й“a rahasЙ—i nguur paaЙ—, waaye ini ree wahtu, Й“a hey eЙ—se ne Й“a nik buur, Й“a hun na Й—oopti.
17.13: ЖҒeЙ— Й“aah ini Й“a liiЙ“ tum, weЙ— ne Й“a eЙ— Й—oopti hatiliЕӢ Й“a na kinguur kiЕӢ Й“a.
17.14: ЖҒa hey hiГұohe na KuyiЕӢ Mbaali Жҙini te yeem hey Й“a saahe, laam a yi HeЙ—iЕӢ heЙ— ci, BuuriЕӢ buur ci. ЖҒooЙ“i a Й“eeЙ—uk te a kooЙ—ta Й“a, Й“a ndengЙ—ukka Й“a rissa nik na Й—e, Й“ooЙ“eem hey name saah na Й—e. В»
17.15: Malaakaani woyissa so ne : В« MasuЙ“ ci fu hot toonkohi Й“ooffa nga ca, ca cuuЙ“ ci, mboolooci, kur ci na peЙ—eem ci.
17.16: Wiic ci ndaЕӢkiyaah ci fu hot na Й—oopti fu hot hey sange Й“itЙ“i toonkohi. ЖҒa hey Й—e tume tas-Й“arang dung, Й“a Гұam septiЕӢ Й—e, Й“a hey Й“arngiЙ—e kur-taahi, Й“a doha.
17.17: Laam Kooh tumeen ini a waaЙ— ЕӢ keeГұ ciЕӢ Й“a ne Й“a tuma, ЕӢ ineem Й“a hey hune Й“a Й“aah ini Й“a liiЙ“ tum, weЙ— ne Й“a eЙ— Й—oopti hatiliЕӢ kinguur kiЕӢ Й“a po ini Kooh woyee mit.
17.18: Te Й“itЙ“i fu hot, a kur-taahi yakki na nike buur, ЕӢ Й—afuk buur ciЕӢ Adina. В»

18.1: ЕҠ finho ineem, ЕӢ hotta malaaka wiiriis ruhsoheeЙ—a ЕӢ Eel ci. A raakee hatil keeh-keeh, yaki a yak siГұaarЙ—eeЙ—a ЕӢ kehЖҙi jen.
18.2: A leehkeeЙ—a ЕӢ Й—afka an : В« Wa keeniЙ— ! Wa keeniЙ— ! Babilon kur-taahi yakki keeniЙ— ! Wa genohaaniЕӢ jiiniici kotii, Й—iski ca Й—asЙ—uk na hoolaaЙ—iiki ca hoolaaЙ—i. Wa genohaaniЕӢ sel ci hoolЙ—i Гұamu [na Й—oopaat ci hoolЙ—i Гұamu ] te ca siЙ“uusa.
18.3: Laam weЙ— meeЙ— laariЙ— kur ci jen na biiГұiЕӢ wa, weЙ— faankohiЕӢ wa mbalayi. Buur ciЕӢ Adina faankiЙ—a, te toonoh ci kooЙ—ohiЙ— raak-raak nga sagu waaЙ—a wa waaЙ—ee toon ciЕӢ Й“a moЙ—iЙ— ci. В»
18.4: ЕҠ kerhissa hooso wiiriis puloh Eel ci woyeeЙ—a ne : В« Pulaat nga, Й“ooЙ“iЕӢ ngo ! ЖҠu Й“aahuu naa bakaaЙ— ciЕӢ wa, Й—u Й“aahuu ЕӢ naamooci rahsana.
18.5: Laam bakaaЙ— ciЕӢ wa degsukohiЙ— po ЕӢ Eel ci te Kooh alЙ—i tumohaaЙ— ciЕӢ wa sepЖҙiЙ— ci.
18.6: Tumaata findi wa tumee Й“inooЙ“i, wirndaata waas kanak ini wa tum. YiifЙ—aata ЕӢ kaasiЕӢ wa anaahi uup aay waas kanak anaahi wa anЙ—ukohee Й“inooЙ“i.
18.7: Tumaata miskiЙ—, kur keem nikaat ЕӢ ruy po ruyiЕӢ wa hend na yaksiЙ—kiЕӢ wa na waaЙ—i wa waaЙ—ee in ci moЙ—iЙ— ci. Kur keem woo ЕӢ haf wa ne : вҖң ЕҠ Й“oofiЙ— findi buur Й“itiЙ“, ЕӢ Й“itЙ“i Жҙaar ce kaan haa te ЕӢ moosanЙ—i rooy Жҙaar. вҖқ
18.8: Sagu ineem, naamooci wa Й—aakЙ—u hey keene nga ЕӢ neeh yino dong : Ca nikka kakaan na rooy na aЙ—, te yongkaah hey wa Й—umbe. Laam Kooh HeЙ— Й“oo yi attee wa raakiЙ— hatil. В»
18.9: Buur ciЕӢ kehЖҙi Й“aahee na Й—e toonki a toonkee na in ciЕӢ Й—e moЙ—iЙ— ci, hey fuЙ—e, Й“a miskiЙ—uk ini kaЙ— nga Й—e, ne Й“a hot Й—uukriЕӢ kur-taahi kaЙ“ee Й—ah.
18.10: ЖҒa hey cangtiЙ—ke sagu neЖҙЖҙoh mbugali a mbugalsan, Й“a woyee ne : В« Mas ! Mas waay ! Babilon, kur-taahi yakki, heЙ— hatili ! Fu atte'uuЙ— ЕӢ wahtu yino dong ! В»
18.11: Toonoh ciЕӢ adinaani heya name fuЙ—, Й“a miskiЙ—uka ; laam ali Й“o' romissanЙ—i toon ciЕӢ Й“a.
18.12: Findi urus, haalis, peme, per ; piis leeЕӢ eЙ—fiЙ— moЙ—iЙ—, piis ruumind eЙ—fiЙ—, piis suwa, piis ruumind coy ; hangi yooЙ“aaЙ—iini raaku, in haЙ“Й—ohuuЙ— sis cooh wala hang Й—oЙ“iЙ—, moos, tiwiГұ wala atoh moЙ—iЙ—.
18.13: Ali Й“o' romissanЙ—i safЙ—ohaaci na eeГұЙ—ohaaci, cuuraay, miir , laackoloГұ ; biiГұ, diw, fariГұ, bele ; inoh, mbaal, panis, wotiir, po Гұaam sah, kipes Й“o'.
18.14: Toonoh ci hey woye ne : В« Ey ! In ci baahiЙ— ci fu maЙ—ee jen, fusiЙ— Й—a ; raak-raak ceem na in ci moЙ—iЙ— ceem jen, fu ГұakiЙ— ca te ca rahsissassanЙ—i muk. В»
18.15: Toonoh ci raakoh nga Й—e, hey cangtiЙ—ke sagu neЖҙЖҙoh mbugaliЕӢ Й—e. ЖҒa hey fuЙ—e, Й“a miskiЙ—ke.
18.16: ЖҒa woyee ne : В« Mas ! Mas waay ! Kur-taahi yakki ! Wa nikee Й“ekkiЙ— kulЙ“a leeЕӢ eЙ—fiЙ— moЙ—iЙ—, na piis ruumind eЙ—fiЙ— na ruumind coy na tokkaah urus na per na peme.
18.17: ЕҠ wahtu yino dong raak-raakeem jen sooЖҙiЙ— ! В» ЖҒi adgoh batooci na Й“i na Й“aaЙ“e nga ca, na Й“i pangkee ЕӢ cookmi na Й“i na pesohee wa jen, nikee cangtiЙ—kiЙ—.
18.18: Wi Й“a hot Й—uukriЕӢ dohiЕӢ kur-taahi, Й“a leehkeeЙ—a an : В« Ali kur-taah moosЙ—i hend na kur kii yak ! В»
18.19: ЖҒa yiifkeeЙ—a merhey ЕӢ haf, Й“a fuЙ—eeЙ—a, Й“a miskiЙ—keeЙ—a, Й“a rooyeeЙ—a an : В« Mas ! Mas waay, kur-taahi yakki ! HeЙ— batoociЕӢ cookmi jen raakoh ЕӢ raak-raakiЕӢ Й—e. ЕҠ wahtu yino dong, wa saГұuuЙ— ! В»
18.20: Eel ci, neЙ“siЙ—kaat ЕӢ Й—umbuukiЕӢ wa ! NeЙ“siЙ—kaat Й“o'-Kooh ci, na Apootar ci na woosuuЙ— ci ! Kooh atte'iЙ—a a wikkaa miskiЙ—i wa tum Й—u !
18.21: ЕҠ ineem malaaka raakiЙ— hatil Й“ayya atoh yakak mand na oЙ—oha bele, a njaffaa ЕӢ cookma, a woosa ne : В« Babilon kur-taahi yakki njafohsan na doole an, te ali Й“o' hotissanЙ—aa muk !
18.22: Koora'oh ci na Жҙeekoh ci, mbiiЙ“oh ci na kulЙ“oh ci kerhissassanЙ—i nga Й—a. Ali pangkoh na yaah hotkissanЙ—i nga Й—a ; Й—uuЙ— oЙ—oha kerhissassanЙ—i nga Й—a ;
18.23: siГұaariЕӢ laampaaci melcissanЙ—i muk nga Й—a ; hooso kilook na Жҙaar ce kerhissassanЙ—i nga Й—a. Laam e toonoh ciЕӢ Й—a degee yaah ЕӢ kehЖҙi te luhus ciЕӢ Й—a tahiЙ— po Й“ooЙ“i jen kosiЙ— lee ciЕӢ Й—a.
18.24: ЖҒaat nga woosuuЙ— ci, na Й“o'-Kooh ci na Й“i boomu ЕӢ kehЖҙi jen, Гұif miЕӢ Й“a hotuuЙ— aamkeeЙ—a nga Й—a. В»

19.1: Wa malaakaana reehiЙ— woo, ЕӢ kerahha ЕӢ Eel ci hooso meeЙ“uuЙ— findi hooso mboolo yakak, wa woyeeЙ—a ne : В« Halleluya ! KoohiЕӢ Й“oo yakЙ—aah, Muci na hatili wuu ce.
19.2: Ee di', atteeniЕӢ Й—e keeh te wa yurhiЙ— ! A atte'iЙ— toonkohi yakki yi yahrohee kehЖҙi na toonkiЕӢ Й—e. Г‘aam ciЕӢ Kooh, Kooh wirndukЙ—iЙ— Й“a, a meekissa toonkohi Гұif miЕӢ Й“a aamuk. В»
19.3: Hoosooca woyissa ne : В« Halleluya ! ЖҠuukriЕӢ kur-taahi na dohe wii, kurkan kuruk po faw. В»
19.4: Yakak ci ndaЕӢkiyaah-kanak na nikiis ci (24), na pesiЙ— ci nikiis ci, Жҙekka ГұaamkeeЙ—a Kooh yi Й“oof ЕӢ Й“oofoha-buuri ; Й“a woyeeЙ—a ne : В« Amiin ! Halleluya ! В» KaГұam kiЕӢ kilookiЕӢ KuyiЕӢ Mbaali Жҙini
19.5: Wa yakak ca na pesiЙ— ca woo po Жҙutta, raakka hoosoori puloh ЕӢ Й“oofoha-buuri woosa ne : В« Жіeekaat KoohiЕӢ Й“oo, Й—u Й“i Гұaam ciЕӢ Й—e jen, Й—u Й“i nup Й—e, Жҙin na yakak ! В»
19.6: Wa hoosoora Жҙut woo, ЕӢ kerhissa hooso haa hooso mboolo yakak Й—uuЙ—eeЙ—a findi masuЙ“ laayiЙ—, Й—iiЙ—Й—eeЙ—a findi inding yakiЙ—, wa woyeeЙ—a ne : В« Halleluya ! Kooh, HeЙ— Й“oo, HeЙ—-hatili, tufkiЙ—iЙ— NguuriЕӢ Й—e.
19.7: ЖҒoo sumaat, Й“oo neЙ“u te Й“oo yakiЙ— Й—e, kilookiЕӢ KuyiЕӢ Mbaali Жҙini reyiЙ— te kilook ce kooЙ—kiЙ— po ЖҙutiЙ—.
19.8: A onuuЙ— ne a Й“ekuk kulЙ“a leeЕӢ eЙ—fiЙ—, melciЙ—, hooliЙ— les. В» KulЙ“aaki leeЕӢeem weЙ— tumohaaЙ— ci yurhiЙ— ciЕӢ Й“o'-Kooh ci.
19.9: ЕҠ ineem, malaakaani woosa so ne В« Fiisa ne : ЖҒa neЙ“Й—iЙ—, Й“ooЙ“i Й“eeЙ—ku ЕӢ kaГұam kiЕӢ kilookiЕӢ KuyiЕӢ Mbaali Жҙini ! В» Жіutta a degga nga ne : В« Woo cii, ca woo ciЕӢ Kooh te ca keeh. В»
19.10: ЕҠ keennda ЕӢ kot ciЕӢ Й—e ne ЕӢ Гұaamuk Й—e, waaye a woosa so ne : В« Muk ! Kina wa tum, ЕӢ Гұaam findiifu, findi Й“i Й“aah na Й—a kos te Й“a rissa amb keeh ki Yeesu teeЙ“oh. Г‘aamka Kooh, laam keeh ki Yeesu teeЙ“oh weЙ— nik ЕӢ liiЙ“iЕӢ woosuuЙ— ci. В» Жіaari rap pansi yaanwi
19.11: Wi malaakaani Жҙut woo na so, ЕӢ hotta Eel ci rangsukiЙ—, panis yaanow pulla. Yi rapee Й—e teeku WooriЙ—i, Keeh-keehi. AtteeniЕӢ Й—e na hiГұohiЕӢ Й—e lakiЙ— waas.
19.12: Has ciЕӢ Й—e kaЙ“ee findi jaal yongkaah, hafiЕӢ Й—e Й“ekuusa mbahne-buur laayiЙ—. Tiik fiisuusa nga Й—e, tiiki ali Й“o' inahЙ—i Й—al a yi.
19.13: A Й“ekkee kulЙ“a hooЖҙuuЙ— ЕӢ Гұif. A teeksee "Woo kiЕӢ Kooh".
19.14: HiГұohoh ci nik ЕӢ Eel ci ГұaakЙ—eeЙ—a Й—e, Й“a rapee Й“i panis yaanow, Й“a Й“ekukka kulЙ“a leeЕӢ eЙ—fiЙ—, yaanow, hooliЙ— les.
19.15: Ndang kaaГұiЙ— pulla ЕӢ nguЙ“iЕӢ Й—e, ndangi a laЙ“ohan cuuЙ“ ci. A hey Й“a adgohe na salma, a hey pooЖҙoote ЕӢ pooЖҙoha biiГұiЕӢ ayrukiЕӢ Kooh, yi HeЙ—-hatil.
19.16: Tiikii fiisseen ЕӢ kulЙ“aakiЕӢ Й—e teemb rambiЕӢ Й—e "BuuriЕӢ buur ci, HeЙ—iЕӢ heЙ— ci".
19.17: ЕҠ hotta malaaka wiiriis tufkiЙ— ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ nohi, a leehukka sel ci na eleerke ЕӢ Й—afka Й—afka ne : В« Hayaat Й—u coh ndii ЕӢ kaГұam ki yakki Kooh onoh.
19.18: Hayaat Й—u Гұam sepet ciЕӢ buur ci, na ciЕӢ kilifaaciЕӢ soldaar ci, na ciЕӢ hiГұohoh ci, na ciЕӢ panis ci na Й“i rapee ca, na fiЙ—aaf ciЕӢ Й“ooЙ“i jen, Гұaam na nikaaЙ—i Гұaam, Жҙin na yakak. В»
19.19: ЕҠ ineem, ЕӢ hotta Й—oopti na buur ciЕӢ kehЖҙi na hiГұohoh ciЕӢ Й“a, Й“a ambsukohha ne Й“a hiГұoha na Yi rapee pansi, a yi na hiГұohoh ciЕӢ Й—e.
19.20: ЖҠoopti ambuusa, a yi na woosuuЙ—i leyohi. WoosuuЙ—i leyoheem, a yi meeЙ— tum in feyohiЙ— ЕӢ fiki Й—oopti ne a muuЖҙiЙ— Й“ooЙ“i raak mandargaaniЕӢ Й—oopti te Й“a meeЙ—ta Гұaamuk nataaliЕӢ Й—e. ЖҒa kanak jen, Й“a njafuusa kaanaaЙ—i ЕӢ kalaЕӢ yongkaaha, Й—iska suufara kaЙ“e.
19.21: ЖҒi tas apuusa na ndangi pulohee ЕӢ nguЙ“iЕӢ Yi rapee pansi, sel ci jen Гұammba ЕӢ sepet ciЕӢ Й“a po ca kappa.

20.1: Wa hiГұoha reeh, ЕӢ hotta malaaka ruhsoheeЙ—a Eel ci, ambiЙ— caaЙ“ndiЕӢ nunga topaaЙ—iina ЕӢ yaah, na ceen duu'in.
20.2: A ammba iiГұ-safaali, iiГұa Й—eЙ“gaan, a yi siЙ“niЙ—i wala Seytaani. A ceennda Й—e, ceeni kaЙ—an kiis junni (1000).
20.3: Malaakaani njaffa Й—e ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ nunga topaaЙ—iina, a taЖҙca buntaani na caaЙ“e, a reewwaa na mandargaani teeЙ“oh ne wa ranguuЙ— ЕӢ tiikiЕӢ Kooh ne iiГұ-safaali minissuu kosЙ—ukoh cuuЙ“ ci lee po kiis ci junniici mit. ЕҠ finho ineem a joyiЙ— toksu ЕӢ jamano Жҙissuut.
20.4: Жіutta ЕӢ hotta Й“i Й“oofoha-buur, Й“i Й“oofee nga ca eЙ—uusa hatil atte'oha. ЕҠ nammba hot ruuh ciЕӢ Й“ooЙ“i haf ciЕӢ Й“a nguЙ—see sagu seede Yeesu na kos woo kiЕӢ Kooh. ЖҒooЙ“eem ГұaamkeeЙ—i Й—oopta na nataaliЕӢ Й—e, te Й“a raakeeЙ—i mandargaaniЕӢ Й—e ЕӢ puk ciЕӢ Й“a wala ЕӢ yaah ciЕӢ Й“a. ЖҒa pesissa, Й“a nikka buur na Kiristaani ini ree kiis junni (1000).
20.5: Weem weЙ— hulti koc. KaaniЙ— ci Й“inooЙ“i jen pesisseeЙ—i po kiis ci junniici mitta.
20.6: ЖҒa neЙ“Й—iЙ—, Й“a hooliЙ— wuu Kooh, Й“ooЙ“i Й“aah ЕӢ hulti koc ! Kakaan ki kanakЙ—oh miniЙ—Й—i Й“a in ; Й“a hey nike seeЖҙkiЙ—oh wuu Kooh na Kiristaani, te Й“a hey nike buur, hun na Kiristaani ini ree kiis junni (1000).
20.7: Kiis ci junniici mit Й—ah, Seytaani hey pulЙ—asse ЕӢ kasoonaЕӢ Й—e,
20.8: te a hey pule ne a kosЙ—ukoh cuuЙ“ ci nik ЕӢ Й“ak ci nikiis ciЕӢ kehЖҙi jen lee ciЕӢ Й—e, ca nikka Gog na Magog, ne a nangЙ—oh Й“a wuu hiГұohi, Й“a hendan na pep ciЕӢ merhey miЕӢ yaah-cookmi laay.
20.9: ЕҠ hotta Й“a pasarkohiЙ— ЕӢ Й—isik nu nik ЕӢ kehЖҙi jen, Й“a ndeerra daliЕӢ Й“o'-Kooh ci na kur-taahi Kooh keeГұkoh. Waaye yongkaah pulohha eel ci, wa hoomiЙ—ta Й“a.
20.10: ЕҠ ineem, Seytaani, yi ГұaaГұohee Й“a, njafuusa ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ kalaЕӢ yongkaaha na suufara , ЕӢ Й—iskaЕӢ Й—oopta, na woosuuЙ—i leyohi. ЖҒa hey degse miskiЙ— nga wek na noh po faw. Atteeni mirndoh
20.11: Жіutta ЕӢ hotta Й“oofoha-buur yakak yaanow na Yi Й“oof nga. KehЖҙi na eel ci saandohha po ca ussa Й—e, ca saayya.
20.12: ЕҠ hotta kaaniЙ— ci, yakiЙ— na Жҙin, tufkiЙ— ЕӢ fiki Й“oofoha-buuri. ЖҒi teere rangsuusa, teere wiiriis nammba rangsu, teerndiЕӢ kipes ki. KaaniЙ— ci atte'ohuusa ЕӢ in ci Й“a tume, findi ca fiisohu ЕӢ teereeci.
20.13: Cookmi eЙ—ohha kaaniЙ— ci kaanoh nga. Kakaan na Jaanim eЙ—ohha kaaniЙ— ciЕӢ ca. ЖҒa jen Й“a atte'ohuusa, yaa nu nga ЕӢ in ci a tume.
20.14: Жіutta Kakaan na Jaanim njafuusa ЕӢ Й—ooЖҙ kalaЕӢ yongkaaha. KaliЕӢ yongkaaheem weЙ— kakaan ki kanakЙ—oh.
20.15: Yaa nu tiikiЕӢ Й—e fiisseeЙ—i ЕӢ teerndiЕӢ kipes ki Й—ah, a njafuusa ЕӢ kaliЕӢ yongkaahi.

21.1: Wi atteeneem coot, ЕӢ hotta eel as na keheЖҙ as. KehЖҙi na eel ci maaГұiЙ— ci sooЖҙeen, cookom raakisseeЙ—i.
21.2: ЕҠ hotta kur-taahi hooliЙ—i, Yerusalemi asi puloh ЕӢ Kooh. Wa ruhsohha Eel ci, wa hayeeЙ—a, haЙ“Й—ukiЙ— po haa kilooki na tokse.
21.3: WeЙ— ЕӢ kerhoh hooso meeЙ“uuЙ— puloh ЕӢ Й“oofoha-buuri woyiЙ— ne : В« GenohaaniЕӢ Kooh weЙ—i ЕӢ harmban Й“ooЙ“i kotii ! A genan na Й“a te Й“a hey nike cuuЙ“ ciЕӢ Й—e. Kooh ЕӢ haf ce hey nike na Й“a [a nik KoohiЕӢ Й“a].
21.4: A hey moose muhun nu nik ЕӢ has ciЕӢ Й“a ; kaan raakissanЙ—i, ruy raakissanЙ—i, rooy raakissanЙ—i, miskiЙ— raakissanЙ—i, in ci Й—eЙ“gaan maayiЙ—. В»
21.5: Yi Й“oof ЕӢ Й“oofoha-buuri woosa ne : В« Marka, mi yii tum in ci jen as kotii. В» A woyissa so ne : В« Fiisa woo ceem, ca wooriЙ— te ca keeh. В»
21.6: A Й“aatta nga ne : В« Ca mitiЙ— sik ! Г‘am Alfa na Omega , cambohaani na reehЙ—ohaani. ЕҠ hey one yi sifaЙ—uk a an ЕӢ culiЕӢ masmiЕӢ kipes ki, wa raakЙ—i wirind.
21.7: Yi saahan rahsohan in ceem jen Й—aa. Г‘am nikan KoohiЕӢ Й—e, a nik kuЙ“kiЕӢ ngo.
21.8: Waaye ini kaЙ— ЕӢ neek ci na kosaaЙ—iici na tumoh sepЖҙiЙ— ci na apoh Й“o' ci na Й“i na faankohe faankoh sangohuuЙ— na naah ci na Й“i na taambЙ—e kooh ci nikaaЙ—iici, na leyoh nu nik ; Й“ak Й“a weЙ— ne Й“a mbetu ЕӢ kalaЕӢ suufara kaЙ“Й—uuЙ—a. Weem, weЙ— kakaan ki kanakЙ—oh. В» Yerusalemi asi
21.9: Wi a reehiЙ— woo, malaaka yino hayya. Malaakaaneem Й“aah ЕӢ malaakaaci yasna-kanak ci ambee kaas ci yasna-kanak ci riifee na naamooci yasna-kanak ci mirndoh. A woo so ne : В« Haya ЕӢ teeЙ“ Й—a kilooki, kilook KuyiЕӢ Mbaali Жҙini. В»
21.10: FuuЙ—si Hoolohngaani ammba so, malaakaani coottohha so ЕӢ tango njooloh na njooloh. A teeЙ“pa so kur-taahi hooliЙ—i, Yerusalemi asi puloh ЕӢ Kooh, wa ruhsohha Eel ci, wa hayeeЙ—a.
21.11: Wa siГұaarЙ—eeЙ—a sagu yaki Kooh yak, wa melciЙ—eeЙ—a findi peme, peme yaspis findi weer.
21.12: Wa raakee miir nguusiЙ—, njooliЙ— na yahndeer ndaЕӢkiyaah na kanak (12), malaaka ndaЕӢkiyaah na kanak tufukka niiЙ—eeЙ—a ca. Tiik ciЕӢ cuuЙ“ ciЕӢ Israayel ndaЕӢkiyaah na kanak ci fiisuusa ЕӢ buntaaci.
21.13: ЖҒak nu nga raakee yahndeer kaahay : kaahay ЕӢ pulohaaЙ—-noh, kaahay ЕӢ muyohaaЙ—-noh, kaahay ЕӢ yaah-sing, kaahay ЕӢ yaah-Гұaahum.
21.14: Atoh ndaЕӢkiyaah na atoh kanak (12) ceЙ— raanee miiri wila ; atoh nu nga Й—ah, tiik yino ЕӢ tiik ciЕӢ Apootar ci ndaЕӢkiyaah na kanak ciЕӢ KuyiЕӢ Mbaali Жҙini fiisuusa nga.
21.15: Malaakaani woyee na so ambee ndooЙ— urus Й“eesoha ne a Й“ees kur-taahi na yahndeer ciЕӢ wa na miiriЕӢ wa.
21.16: ЖҒak ciЕӢ wa nikiis ci ceЙ— hend, hutiini na angiini ceЙ— hend. Malaakaani Й“eessa kur ki na ndooЙ—iЕӢ Й—e, wa nikka kilomeet junni-kanak na kilomeet teemet-kanak (2200) ; hutiini na angiini na njooliini hennda hend.
21.17: A Й“eessa miiri, wa nikka suung teemet na suung ndaЕӢkiyaah-nikiis na suung nikiis (144) ЕӢ suung Й“o', weЙ— malaakaani Й“eesohe.
21.18: Miiri haЙ“Й—ohsee yaspis , kur ki ЕӢ haf wa nikka urus koceet ГұiiniЙ— findi seetu hooliЙ—.
21.19: Atoh ci raan miiriЕӢ kur ki moЙ—sinuusa na atoh nu nik ne wa atoh peme Й—ah. Rangi koc ЕӢ fondamaani nikka atoh yaspis , wi kanakЙ—oh nikka safiir , kaahayЙ—ohi halkedoon , nikiisЙ—ohi esmaragdos ,
21.20: yatuusЙ—ohi sardoniksa , yasna-yino'Й—ohi sardiyon , yasna-kanakЙ—ohi hirisolitos , yasna-kaahayЙ—ohi beerillos , yasna-nikiisЙ—ohi topaas , ndaЕӢkiyaahЙ—ohi hirsoparasos , ndaЕӢkiyaah na yino'Й—ohi hiyakintos , ndaЕӢkiyaah na kanakЙ—ohi ametistos .
21.21: Yahndeer ci ndaЕӢkiyaah na kanak ci (12) nikee per, waa nu nga haЙ“Й—ohsee per yino kut. Mbeeddaani yakki ЕӢ kur ki nikka urus koceet ГұiiniЙ— findi seetu.
21.22: ЕҠ hotЙ—i Й—isik nga findi Kahan Kooh. HeЙ—-hatili, HeЙ— Й“oo Kooh na KuyiЕӢ Mbaali Жҙini, a yi ЖҠiska HooliЙ—a ndaam.
21.23: Kur ki etoheeЙ—i noh wala caЙ“in ne wa ГұiinЙ—u, laam yaki Kooh yak siГұaarЙ—ee nga te KuyiЕӢ Mbaali Жҙini a yi laampaaniЕӢ wa.
21.24: CuuЙ“ ci hey tiinde ЕӢ siГұaariЕӢ wa te buur ciЕӢ kehЖҙi hey wa kome in ci baahiЙ— ci Й“a raak.
21.25: Yahndeer ciЕӢ wa genan rangsukiЙ— laam wek raakanЙ—i nga.
21.26: CuuЙ“ ci jen hey wa kome in ci tah ca eЙ—u cir na raak tiik.
21.27: Waaye ali usuЙ“ aasanЙ—i nga, Й“oyi na pese ЕӢ in sepЖҙiЙ— na yi na pese ЕӢ lee namanЙ—i aas nga. ЖҒi tiik ciЕӢ Й“a fiisu ЕӢ teerndiЕӢ kipes ki, wiЕӢ KuyiЕӢ Mbaali Жҙini, Й“eЙ— dong aasan nga.

22.1: Malaakaani taalndiЙ—ta, a teeЙ“pa so kaliЕӢ masmi na eЙ—ohe kipes ; wa melciЙ—ee findi weer, wa puloheeЙ—a Й“oofoha-buuri, wiЕӢ Kooh na KuyiЕӢ Mbaali Жҙini.
22.2: Wa kaЙ—Й—eeЙ—a ЕӢ leerniЕӢ mbeeddaaniЕӢ kur ki. KidgiЕӢ kipes ki paarra ЕӢ harmban salЙ—oh ciЕӢ wa . Wa rimee waas ndaЕӢkiyaah na kanak (12) ЕӢ kiis ki, caЙ“in nu caЙ“in wa rim, saaf ciЕӢ wa paЖҙoha cuuЙ“ ci.
